Genesis1:1 Eng’ taunet
Genesis1:2 Ak kima komi kiy ng’ony ak kima kotinyei iton; ak kimi mesundeito baragutab riret; kiwendoti Tamirmirietab kamuktaindet baragutab beek.
Genesis1:3 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:4 Kigeer anyun Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet
Genesis1:5 Kiguure Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet Bet
Genesis1:6 Kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:7 Ak kiyai Kamuktaindet soet
Genesis1:8 Kiguure Kamuktaindet soet Kipsengwet. Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon
Genesis1:9 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:10 Ak kiguure Kamuktaindet emet ne mami beek Ng’ony; ak kiguure beek che kagoyumgei Nyanjosiek; ak kigeer anyun Kamuktaindet kole mie.
Genesis1:11 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:12 Kibityo anyun suswek eng’ ng’ony
Genesis1:13 Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon
Genesis1:14 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:15 ingoek choto che iluu eng’ soetab kipsengwetisiek si kobiit koluuchi ng’ony; ak kiyaak ko u noto.
Genesis1:16 Kiyai Kamuktaindet tuguk che iluu aeng’ che eechen; si kobiit koboi ne o bet
Genesis1:17 Kiinde Kamuktaindet choto soetab kipsengwetisiek si kobiit koluuchi ng’ony
Genesis1:18 si koboi bet ak kemoi
Genesis1:19 Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon
Genesis1:20 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:21 Ak kitoi Kamuktaindet koyai njirenik che eechen
Genesis1:22 Kiiberur Kamuktaindet ichek
Genesis1:23 Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon
Genesis1:24 Kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:25 Ak kiyai Kamuktaindet tiong’ik che bo ng’ony ko u kergeindanywa
Genesis1:26 Kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:27 Kitoi anyun Kamuktaindet koyai chito eng’ itondanyi
Genesis1:28 Ak kiiberur Kamuktaindet ichek; ak kilenji Kamuktaindet ichek
Genesis1:29 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:30 Kaagochi anyun ketik alak tugul che mengechen che nyalilen koek amitwogikab tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony; ak tarit age tugul ne bo barak
Genesis1:31 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet tuguk tugul che kiga koyai kole miachen mising’. Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon
Genesis2:1 Kigiges anyun yaetab kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony ak chang’indanywa tugul.
Genesis2:2 Kiiges Kamuktaindet boisionikyik che kiga koyai eng’ betut ne bo tisab; ak kiimuuny eng’ betut ne bo tisab eng’ boisionikyik tugul che kiga koyai.
Genesis2:3 Ak kiiberur Kamuktaindet betutab tisab
Genesis2:4 Chu taunaik che bo kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony eng’ betunoto ne kiyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony.
Genesis2:5 Kitomo kobiit ket ne bo kewet eng’ ng’ony
Genesis2:6 Ago kitogosta kibungweret eng’ ng’ony
Genesis2:7 Ak kiyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet chito eng’ ng’ung’unyek
Genesis2:8 Kigol Jehovah Kamuktaindet mbaret eng’ Eden eng’ komostab kong’asis
Genesis2:9 Ak kiigochi Jehovah Kamuktaindet kobit ket age tugul eng’ ng’ony ne kararan eng’ keeret
Genesis2:10 Ak kimong’une Eden ainet ne ibisi mbaret; yeityo kopcheigei eng’ oloto
Genesis2:11 Kainetab ne bo tai ko Pison: noto ne yiemei emet komugul ne bo Abila ole mi tahabu;
Genesis2:12 miachen tahabu che bo emonoto: mitei oloto bedola ak soam.
Genesis2:13 Kiguure ainet ne bo aeng’ Gion: noto ne yiemei emet komugul ne bo Kus.
Genesis2:14 Kiguure ainet ne bo somok Hidikel
Genesis2:15 Kiimut Jehovah Kamuktaindet chito kwo kotebe mbaretab Eden si kobiit kosemberi ak koribei.
Genesis2:16 King’at Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto kolenji
Genesis2:17 ago amat iam che bo ketit ne bo naet ne kinae ne mie ak ne ya; amu eng’ betut ne keam che bo ketoto
Genesis2:18 Kimwa Jehovah Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis2:19 Kiyai anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony eng’ ng’ung’unyek
Genesis2:20 Ak kitochi chichoto tuga tugul kainaik
Genesis2:21 Kiigochi anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto ruondo ne nyigis
Genesis2:22 ak koyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet karasto kiinemune chichoto
Genesis2:23 Ak komwa chichoto kole
Genesis2:24 Amu noto anyun
Genesis2:25 Ak kitebyei tuwai ach ngor
Genesis3:1 Ki ng’alindet ndaret kosiir tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony ne kiga koyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet. Kilenji anyun kwondo
Genesis3:2 Ak kilenji kwondo ndaret
Genesis3:3 ago kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis3:4 Kolenji ndaret kwondo
Genesis3:5 amu ingen Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis3:6 Ak ye kingogeer kwondo kole mie ketoto eng’ amet
Genesis3:7 Koyatogis anyun konyekwak ichek tuwai
Genesis3:8 Ak kigas Jehovah Kamuktaindet kowendoti eng’ mbar ye kiga kogaititit koskoleny; koung’gei koistoegei ole mi Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto ak kwondanyi
Genesis3:9 Koguur anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto
Genesis3:10 Kowolji inendet
Genesis3:11 Ak komwa kole
Genesis3:12 Kolenji chito
Genesis3:13 Kolenji Jehovah Kamuktaindet kwondo
Genesis3:14 Kolenji Jehovah Kamuktaindet ndaret
Genesis3:15 ak ande bunyondit kwenung’wong’ inye ndaret ak kwondo; ak kwenutab iyoteng’ung’ ak nenyi; ak kotui inendet meting’ung’
Genesis3:16 Kolenji kwondo anyun
Genesis3:17 Kolenji anyun Adam
Genesis3:18 iiun ng’ony katok ak katablelinik; ak iame ngwek alak tugul che bo emet;
Genesis3:19 ak iame amigwogik eng’ kaotik che bo togeng’ung’
Genesis3:20 Ak kiguure Adam kwondanyi Awa; amu inendet kametab tugul che soptos.
Genesis3:21 Ak kinapchi Jehovah Kamuktaindet Adam ak kwondanyi sumotik
Genesis3:22 Ak kimwa Jehovah Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis3:23 eng’ noto anyun
Genesis3:24 Kion anyun chichoto komanda
Genesis4:1 Kiituiyogei chichoto ak kwondanyi Awa; ak kimanach kosich Kaen
Genesis4:2 Ak kisich kogeny ne tupcho Abil. Ak kiiyagi Abil kechirek ago ki kabatindet Kaen ne kiibati ng’ony.
Genesis4:3 Ak kingobata betusiek alage
Genesis4:4 Ak kikwerichi Abil agine che kigitwatei che bo akwennyi che akwaen. Ak kicham Jehovah Abil ak kagochinennyi.
Genesis4:5 Ago ma cham Kaen ak kagochinennyi. Ak kinerech Kaen mising’
Genesis4:6 Kolenji Jehovah Kaen
Genesis4:7 Ngot iyai ne mie
Genesis4:8 King’alalji Kaen ng’etab kamet Abil. Ak ye kimi tuwai timin kong’eetyi Kaen ng’etab kam Abil ak kobar.
Genesis4:9 Koteebe Jehovah Kaen anyun kolenji
Genesis4:10 Koteebe kolenji
Genesis4:11 I chubot anyun
Genesis4:12 si ye ibati ng’ony ko matesun kimnatetab ruratennyi: ak iegu ne mweoti ak koombenoti eng’ ng’ony.
Genesis4:13 Kolenji Kaen Jehovah
Genesis4:14 Keer anyun-o
Genesis4:15 Kilenji anyun Jehovah
Genesis4:16 Ak kiwa Kaen anyun
Genesis4:17 Ak kiituiyogei Kaen ak osotiondennyi; ak kimanach
Genesis4:18 Kisich Enok Irat: ak kisich Irat Meujael: ak kisich Meujael Metusael: ak kisich Metusael Lamek.
Genesis4:19 Ak kiitun Lamek kwonyik aeng’: kainetab age ko ki Ada
Genesis4:20 Ak kisich Ada Jabel: inendet ko kwandab icheget che kimeng’oti emaisiek
Genesis4:21 Ak kigiguure kainetab ne tupcho Jubal: inendet kwandab icheget che butei ketubosiek ak ndurerusiek.
Genesis4:22 Ak kisich Sila Tubal-Kaen agine
Genesis4:23 Ak kimwachi Lamek kwonyikyik kolenji
Genesis4:24 Ngot ko kigiyaakyi mugetut Kaen konyil tisab
Genesis4:25 Ak kiituiyogei Adam ak kwondanyi kogeny: ak kisich werit
Genesis4:26 Ak kisich Set agine werit; ak kiguure kainennyi Enos: eng’ betusiechoto anyun
Genesis5:1 Ni ko bukuit ne bo oretab lagokab Adam. Eng’ betut ne kitoi Kamuktaindet koyai chito
Genesis5:2 kitoi koyai muren ak tie; ak koberur
Genesis5:3 Ak kitar Adam kenyisiek bogol ak sosom
Genesis5:4 ak betusiekab Adam ko ki kenyisiek bogol sisit ye kingo kagosich Set: ak kisich werik ak tibik.
Genesis5:5 Ak betusiek tugul che kitar Adam ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak sosom; si komee.
Genesis5:6 Ak kitar Set kenyisiek bogol ak mut
Genesis5:7 ak kitar Set kenyisiek bogol sisit ak tisab ye kingo kagosich Enos
Genesis5:8 ak betusiek tugul che bo Set ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak taman ak aeng’; si komee.
Genesis5:9 Kitar Enos kenyisiek tamanwogik sogol
Genesis5:10 ak kitar Enos kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak taman ak mut ye kingo kagosich Kenan
Genesis5:11 ak betusiek tugul che bo Enos ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak mut; si komee.
Genesis5:12 Kitar Kenan kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab
Genesis5:13 ak kitar Kenan kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak artam
Genesis5:14 ak betusiek tugul che bo Kenan ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak taman; si komee.
Genesis5:15 Kitar Maalalel kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak mut
Genesis5:16 ak kitar Maalalel kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Jaret
Genesis5:17 ak betusiek tugul che bo Maalalel ko ki kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak tamanwogik sogol ak mut; si komee.
Genesis5:18 Kitar Jaret kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng’
Genesis5:19 ak kitar Jaret kenyisiek bogol sisiit ye kingo kagosich Enok
Genesis5:20 ak betusiek tugul che bo Jaret ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng’; si komee.
Genesis5:21 Kitar Enok kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak mut
Genesis5:22 ak kibendat Enok ak Kamuktaindet eng’ kenyisiek bogol somok ye kingo kagosich Metusela
Genesis5:23 ak betusiek tugul che bo Enok ko ki kenyisiek bogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak mut:
Genesis5:24 ak kibendoti Enok ak Kamuktaindet; ak kimata kotook
Genesis5:25 Kitar Metusela kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak tisab
Genesis5:26 ak kitar Metusela kenyisiek bogol tisab ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng’ ye kingo kagosich Lamek
Genesis5:27 ak betusiek tugul che bo Metusela ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak tamanwogik lo ak sogol; si komee.
Genesis5:28 Kitar Lamek kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng’
Genesis5:29 Ak kiguure kainennyi Noa
Genesis5:30 Ak kitar Lamek kenyisiek bogol mut ak tamanwogik sogol ak mut ye kingo kagosich Noa
Genesis5:31 ak betusiek tugul che bo Lamek ko ki kenyisiek bogol tisab ak tamanwogik tisab ak tisab; si komee.
Genesis5:32 Ak ye kingo kagotar Noa kenyisiek bogol mut
Genesis6:1 Ak ye kingotoi kotesogis bik eng’ ng’ony
Genesis6:2 kogeer anyun werikab Kamuktaindet tibikab bik kole kororon; ak kiimutygei tugul che kilewen koek kwonyikwak.
Genesis6:3 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole
Genesis6:4 Kimitei Nepilik ng’ony eng’ betusiechoto
Genesis6:5 Ak kigeer Jehovah kole
Genesis6:6 Kiibwat Jehovah kole
Genesis6:7 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole
Genesis6:8 Ago kichamak Noa eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Genesis6:9 Chu ko ortinwekab Noa. Ki chito ne bo imanda Noa
Genesis6:10 Ak kisich Noa werik somok
Genesis6:11 Ak kiga kong’emak ng’ony eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet
Genesis6:12 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet ng’ony
Genesis6:13 Kilenji Kamuktaindet Noa
Genesis6:14 Yachigei melit ne bo ketikab taragonik; ak ipchei gorik che mengechen eng’ melit
Genesis6:15 Ak iyai melit ko u ni: koindanyi ko kakwautik bogol somok che bo eut
Genesis6:16 Ak iyai ole bunu lapkeiyet eng’ melit
Genesis6:17 Ogeero
Genesis6:18 Ago kaagimit kayomisennyu koboten: ak inyo melit
Genesis6:19 Ak igetu alak eng’ tuguk tugul che soptos che bo borwek kobwa melit orit
Genesis6:20 Ak che bo taritik ko u kergeindanywa
Genesis6:21 Ak iipchige amitwogik alak tugul che kiamei; iyumjige anyun
Genesis6:22 Ak kiyai Noa ko u noto; ko u tugul che king’at Kamuktaindet inendet
Genesis7:1 Kilenjin Jehovah Noa
Genesis7:2 Ketu che bo tiong’ik alak tugul che miachen tisab tisab
Genesis7:3 ak che bo taritik che bo barak agichek
Genesis7:4 Amu tomo betusiek tisabu
Genesis7:5 Ak kiyai Noa tugul ko u ye king’at Jehovah inendet.
Genesis7:6 Ak kiga kotar Noa kenyisiek bogol lo si kobiitu maranet eng’ ng’ony.
Genesis7:7 Kiba anyun Noa melit ak werikyik
Genesis7:8 Kiba anyun alak eng’ tiong’ik che miachen
Genesis7:9 aeng’ aeng’
Genesis7:10 Ak kingobata betusiek tisabu
Genesis7:11 Eng’ kenyit ne kiite Noa kenyisiek bogol lo
Genesis7:12 Ak kirobonji ng’ony betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam.
Genesis7:13 Kiba melit Noa eng’ betunoto
Genesis7:14 icheget
Genesis7:15 Kiba melit ole mi Noa
Genesis7:16 Ak ichek che kiba
Genesis7:17 Ak kimarane beek ng’ony betusiek artam; kitesak beek
Genesis7:18 Kigimegitu beek
Genesis7:19 Kigimegitu beek eng’ ng’ony mising’ kosiir; ak kituch tulonok che koen
Genesis7:20 Kichang’it beek kot kotuch tulonok che itei kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut.
Genesis7:21 Kibek tugul che bo borwek che kibendote ng’ony
Genesis7:22 Kibek tugul che tinyei eng’ serunekwak kabusetab tamirmiriet ne sobei
Genesis7:23 Ak kigibar kiwong’ kiy age tugul ne kisobei
Genesis7:24 Ak kigimegitu beek eng’ ng’ony betusiek bogol ak konom.
Genesis8:1 Kiibwat anyun Kamuktaindet Noa
Genesis8:2 ak kigerogis kong’ik che kutune beek che bo riret
Genesis8:3 ak kiweeigei beek eng’ ng’ony eng’ betusiechoto tugul: ak kingobata betusiek bogolu ak konom kong’ering’itu beek.
Genesis8:4 Ak kitebe melit tulonokab Ararat eng’ arawetab tisab
Genesis8:5 Kiweeigei beek mutyo kong’ering’itu kotugul kot koit arawetab taman
Genesis8:6 Ak ye kingobata betusiek artamu
Genesis8:7 Kiimaanda chepkugit
Genesis8:8 Kiimaanda anyun cheptuget
Genesis8:9 ago kimanyor cheptuget ole namei
Genesis8:10 Ak kita kotebi betusiek alak tisab; yeityo komanda cheptugonoto eng’ melit kogeny.
Genesis8:11 Ak koweekyigei inendet cheptugonoto koskoleny; ogeero
Genesis8:12 Kita kotebi betusiek alak tisab; yeityo komaanda cheptugonoto; ak mata koweekyigei inendet kogeny.
Genesis8:13 Kitenyo beek anyun eng’ ng’ony eng’ kenyitab bogol lo ak agenge eng’ arawet ne bo tai
Genesis8:14 Kiyaam anyun ng’ony arawet ne bo aeng’ eng’ betut ne bo tiptem ak tisab ne bo arawanato.
Genesis8:15 King’alalji anyun Kamuktaindet Noa
Genesis8:16 Mande eng’ melit
Genesis8:17 Yatu komong’ kiy age tugul ne sobei ne mi koboten ne tinyei borto
Genesis8:18 Kimanda anyun Noa
Genesis8:19 kimanda anyun eng’ melit tiony age tugul
Genesis8:20 Kiteekyi Noa Jehovah kaptisisiet
Genesis8:21 Ak king’uuchi Jehovah anyinyindo ne bo nyamdutik; ak kole Jehovah eng’ muguleldanyi
Genesis8:22 Kota komi ng’ony ko mabegu kolset ak kesisiet
Genesis9:1 Ak kiiberur Kamuktaindet Noa ak werikyik
Genesis9:2 Ak koiyweak tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony ak konyor tobotiet agobo okwek
Genesis9:3 Egu amitwogikwok kiy age tugul ne sobei ne wendoti; kagonok tugul ko u ye kiga agonok ngwek alak tugul che nyalilen.
Genesis9:4 Ago moam banyek koboto sobondanyi; sobonoto ko korotikyik.
Genesis9:5 Amagenok iman korotikab sobonwekwok agobo sobondab chi; eng’ tiony age tugul amage korotichoto; ak eng’ chi
Genesis9:6 Ak ne tumdoi korotikab chi
Genesis9:7 Oiiye anyun okwek; otesage; oiiye mising’ eng’ ng’ony
Genesis9:8 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Noa
Genesis9:9 Ogeero
Genesis9:10 ak koboto kiy age tugul ne sobei ne mi kobotok
Genesis9:11 Ak agimit kayomisennyu kobotok
Genesis9:12 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis9:13 Kande chemng’isiriet boldet
Genesis9:14 Ak ye kaauure boldet ng’ony
Genesis9:15 abwat anyun kayomisennyu ne mi kwenunnyo ane
Genesis9:16 Ak ye took anyun chemng’isiriet eng’ boldet
Genesis9:17 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Noa
Genesis9:18 Ak werikab Noa che kimong’ eng’ melit
Genesis9:19 Chuto somok ko ki werikab Noa: ak kiyom ng’ony komugul iyotenywa.
Genesis9:20 Ak kitoi Noa koek kabatindet
Genesis9:21 yeityo koee maiyek ak kobogit ak koteb ach ngor eng’ emainnyi.

Genesis9:23 Ak kiinem Sem ak Japet sambut

Genesis9:25 Ak kile

Genesis9:28 Ak kitar Noa kenyisiek bogol somok ak konom ye kingobata maranet.
Genesis9:29 Ak betusiek tugul che bo Noa ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak konom: si komee.
Genesis10:1 Chu ortinwek che bo werikab Noa
Genesis10:2 Werikab Japet chu: Gomer
Genesis10:3 Ak werikab Gomer chu: Askenas
Genesis10:4 Ak werikab Jaban chu: Elisa
Genesis10:5 Kigipchechi ichek ngegusiek che bo bororiosiek eng’ emotinwekwak; age tugul eng’ kutinnyi
Genesis10:6 Ak werikab Ham chu: Kus
Genesis10:7 Ak werikab Kus: ko Seba
Genesis10:8 Ak kisich Kus Nimrot: Kitoi koek chito ne nyigan eng’ ng’ony.
Genesis10:9 Ki kiplogotiot ne nyigan eng’ taitab Jehovah. Ineni kigimwa kele
Genesis10:10 Taunetab bounatennyi ko ki Babel
Genesis10:11 Ak kimanda eng’ emonoto kwo Asuria
Genesis10:12 ak Resen ne mi kwenutab Ninebe ak Kala (noto ko nganaset ne o).
Genesis10:13 Ak kisich Misraim Ludik
Genesis10:14 ak Patrusik
Genesis10:15 Ak kisich Kanan Sidon
Genesis10:16 ak Jebusik
Genesis10:17 Ak Hibik
Genesis10:18 ak Aribadik
Genesis10:19 Ak kibunei kiwotetab Kananik Sidon
Genesis10:20 Chuto ko werikab Ham
Genesis10:21 Kisich Sem agine lagok
Genesis10:22 Werikab Sem chu: Elam
Genesis10:23 Chu werikab Aram: Us
Genesis10:24 Ak kisich Arbaksat Sela; ak kisich Sela Eber.
Genesis10:25 Ak kisich Eber werik aeng’: kainetab age ko ki Peleg; amu kigipchei ng’ony eng’ betusiekyik; ak kainetab ng’etab kamet ko ki Joktan.
Genesis10:26 Ak kisich Joktan Almotat
Genesis10:27 Hadoram
Genesis10:28 Obal
Genesis10:29 Opir
Genesis10:30 Ak kiboch meng’otenywa Mesa
Genesis10:31 Chuto ko werikab Sem
Genesis10:32 Chuto ko ortinwekab werikab Noa
Genesis11:1 King’alale ng’ony komugul kutit agenge ak ng’alalet agenge.
Genesis11:2 Ak ye kita kouuote kong’asis
Genesis11:3 King’alaljigei anyun ichegei kole
Genesis11:4 Ak kimwa kole
Genesis11:5 Ak kichorgei Jehovah konyo kogeer nganaset ak teekset ne koi ne kitogosta kwo barak
Genesis11:6 Ak kile Jehovah
Genesis11:7 Ongebe
Genesis11:8 Eng’ noto anyun
Genesis11:9 Kigiguure nganasanato Babel anyun
Genesis11:10 Chu ortinwekab Sem. Kitar Sem kenyisiek bogol
Genesis11:11 ak kitar Sem kenyisiek bogol mut ye kingo kagosich Arbaksat
Genesis11:12 Kitar Arbaksat kenyisiek sosom ak mut kosich Sela:
Genesis11:13 ak kitar Arbaksat kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Sela
Genesis11:14 Kitar Sela kenyisiek sosom
Genesis11:15 ak kitar Sela kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Eber
Genesis11:16 Kitar Eber kenyisiek sosom ak ang’wan
Genesis11:17 ak kitar Eber kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Peleg
Genesis11:18 Kitar Peleg kenyisiek sosom
Genesis11:19 kitar Peleg kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ak sogol ye kingo kagosich Reu
Genesis11:20 Kitar Reu kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’
Genesis11:21 kitar Reu kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ak tisab ye kingo kagosich Serug
Genesis11:22 Kitar Serug kenyisiek sosom
Genesis11:23 kitar Serug kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ye kingo kagosich Nahor
Genesis11:24 Kitar Nahor kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol
Genesis11:25 kitar Nahor kenyisiek bogol ak taman ak sogol ye kingo kagosich Tera
Genesis11:26 Kitar Tera kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab
Genesis11:27 Chu ortinwekab Tera. Kisich Tera Abram
Genesis11:28 Kime Haran eng’ taitab kwandanyi Tera eng’ emet ne kigisikyin
Genesis11:29 Ak kiitunis Abram ak Nahor: kigiguure osotiotab Abram Sarai; ak kigiguure osotiotab Nahor Milka
Genesis11:30 Kisonen Sarai; kima kotinyei lakwa.
Genesis11:31 Ak kiimut Tera werinnyi Abram
Genesis11:32 Ak betusiekab Tera ko ki kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ak mut: ak kime Tera eng’ Haran.
Genesis12:1 Kilenji anyun Jehovah Abram
Genesis12:2 ak ayain iegu bororiet ne o
Genesis12:3 Ak aberuri ichek che iberurin
Genesis12:4 Kiwa Abram anyun ko u ye kiga komwachi Jehovah; kiba koboto Lot: kiga kotar Abram kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab ak mut ye kingomandoi eng’ Haran.
Genesis12:5 Kiimut Abram osotiondennyi Sarai
Genesis12:6 Ak kibun Abram emet kwenut agoi oldab Sekem
Genesis12:7 Ak kimong’ji Jehovah Abram
Genesis12:8 Ak kiu kwo eng’ oloto agoi koit tulwet eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo Betel
Genesis12:9 Ak kiu Abram kogeny
Genesis12:10 Ak kibiit rubet eng’ emonoto: kochortagei anyun Abram kwo Misri ak kotebe oloto; amu kieet rubet mising’ kong’wanit eng’ emet.
Genesis12:11 Ak ye ki negit komong’ji Misri
Genesis12:12 ak ye keerin bikab Misri

Genesis45:27 Ak kimwachi ng’alek tugul che bo Josep

Genesis46:3 Ak kile

Genesis47:4 Ak kilenji Parao
Genesis47:5 Ak king’alalji Parao Josep
Genesis47:6 mi taing’ung’ emonito bo Misri; igochi kwandang’ung’ ak werik che otupche komeny emet ole kararan mising’ kosiir tugul; ingomeny anyun emetab Gosen: ak ngot ingen bik alak eng’ ichek che ng’omen

Genesis47:12 Ak kibai anyun Josep kwandanyi
Genesis47:13 Ak kima kota komi amitwogik eng’ emet komugul; amu king’wanit mising’ rubet
Genesis47:14 Ak kiiyum Josep fedaisiek tugul che kibiit eng’ emetab Misri ak emetab Kanan che kigoib koale bek: ak kiib Josep fedaisiechato kobwa gotab Parao.
Genesis47:15 Ak ye kingogesgei fedaisiek che bo emetab Misri
Genesis47:16 Ak kilenji Josep

Genesis47:18 Ak ye kingogesgei kenyinoto
Genesis47:19 amu nee anyun si kebegu eng’ taing’ung’
Genesis47:20 Kialji anyun Josep Parao emet komugul ne bo Misri; amu kialda chi tugul eng’ Misrik mbarennyi
Genesis47:21 Ak kiyai Josep bik koek otwogikyik kong’eete tabanda age agoi tabanda age ne bo Misri.
Genesis47:22 Kobate emetab tisiik ne ma al inendet; amu kicham konyoru tisiik amitwogik chechuak eng’ Parao
Genesis47:23 Kilenji Josep bik anyun

Genesis47:25 Ak kile

Exodus8:11 Ak istoenengei mororochik
Exodus8:12 Kimanda anyun Musa ak Aron eng’ gab Parao: ak kirirji Musa Jehovah agobo mororochichoto che kiga ipchi Parao.
Exodus8:13 Ak kiyai Jehovah ko u ng’olyotab Musa; ak kibek mororochik eng’ gorik
Exodus8:14 Ak kiiyumat koek keburusiek: ak kibul emet.
Exodus8:15 Ak kingogeer Parao kole kagomung’do
Exodus8:16 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus8:17 Ak kiyai ko u noto; ak kichuul eunnyi Aron koboto siarinnyi
Exodus8:18 Ak kiyai ko u noto bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei eng’ ng’orsenywa si kobiit komoong’ isirek
Exodus8:19 Kimwachi anyun bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei
Exodus8:20 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus8:21 Ago ngot ko mechamji bikyuk koba
Exodus8:22 Ak abesie emetab Gosen eng’ betunoto
Exodus8:23 Ak ande kiwotet kwenutab bikyuk ak biguk: biitu kaborunonoto mutai.
Exodus8:24 Ak kiyai Jehovah ko u noto; ak kichang’a kalyang’ik ne ya eng’ gotab Parao
Exodus8:25 Ak kiiyokto Parao keguur Musa ak Aron
Exodus8:26 Ak kile Musa
Exodus8:27 Kibendi banda ne bo betusiek somok eng’ ong’atet
Exodus8:28 Ak kile Parao
Exodus8:29 Ak kile Musa
Exodus8:30 Ak kiwa Musa eng’ ole mi Parao
Exodus8:31 Ak kiyai Jehovah ko u ng’olyotab Musa; kiistoe Parao kalyang’ik
Exodus8:32 Ak kiiuuiit Parao muguleldanyi eng’ yoto agine
Exodus9:1 Kilenji anyun Jehovah Musa
Exodus9:2 Amu ngot iete ichek koba
Exodus9:3 keero
Exodus9:4 Ak ibestos Jehova tugab Israel eng’ tugab Misri: si mame kiy agot agenge eng’ tugul che bo lagokab Israel.
Exodus9:5 Ak kiinde Jehovah ye egune
Exodus9:6 Ak kiyai Jehovah kioto eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto
Exodus9:7 Ak kiiyokto Parao bik
Exodus9:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Exodus9:9 Ak egu choto temburiek che buspus eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri
Exodus9:10 Kiib anyun ichek orekab mat ne o
Exodus9:11 Ak kima imuch kotononso bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei eng’ taitab Musa amu ondirichoto; amu kinam ondirik bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei
Exodus9:12 Ak kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao
Exodus9:13 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus9:14 Amu ayokyini muguleldang’ung’ korotwekyuk tugul ak otwogiguk
Exodus9:15 Amu kata achuule eunnyu
Exodus9:16 ago iman kaachamun itebi
Exodus9:17 Ak ta ilosuge eng’ bikyuk
Exodus9:18 Keero
Exodus9:19 Iyokte anyun
Exodus9:20 Inendet ne kiiywei ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ otwogikab Parao ko kiimweito otwogikyik ak akwotisiekyik koba gorik:
Exodus9:21 ak inendet ne kima iit ng’olyotab Jehovah ko kibagakta otwogikyik ak akwotisiekyik eng’ timin.
Exodus9:22 Kilenji Jehovah Musa anyun
Exodus9:23 Ak kichuul Musa siarinnyi kotokyi kipsengwet: ak kiiyok Jehovah tulet ak koikab ropta ak kichorgei mat konyo kobun ng’ony: ak kiisurur Jehovah koikab ropta korong’ji emetab Misri.
Exodus9:24 Kibiit anyun koikab ropta
Exodus9:25 Ak kibir koikab ropta tugul che kimi timin eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri
Exodus9:26 Emetab Gosen inegei
Exodus9:27 Ak kiiyokto Parao keguur Musa ak Aron
Exodus9:28 Osa Jehovah; amu kagoyam tulosiechu kimen ak koik; si agonok obe
Exodus9:29 Ak kilenji Musa inendet
Exodus9:30 Ago angen ale
Exodus9:31 Ak kigibir mabutek ak sairik: amu kigaba met sairik ak kiga iyesio taptok.
Exodus9:32 Ago kima kibir nganok ak bek alak che kiguure kusemet: amu kitomo koeegitu.
Exodus9:33 Ak kimanda Musa eng’ nganaset kwo eng’ ole mi Parao
Exodus9:34 Ak ye kingogeer Parao kole ma komi ropta ak koikab ropta ak tulosiek
Exodus9:35 Ak kiuuiit muguleldab Parao
Exodus10:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus10:2 ak si kobiit imwa kogas wering’ung’
Exodus10:3 Kiba anyun Musa ak Aron gab Parao
Exodus10:4 Amu ngiesie iunde bikyuk koba
Exodus10:5 ak tuchei emet
Exodus10:6 ak nyiiei goriguk ak gorikab otwogiguk
Exodus10:7 Ak king’alal otwogikab Parao
Exodus10:8 Ak kigimutyi Musa ak Aron Parao kogeny: ak kilenji inendet ichek
Exodus10:9 Ak kile Musa
Exodus10:10 Ak kilenji inendet ichek
Exodus10:11 Ma u noto: oba okweget murenik
Exodus10:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus10:13 Ak kitokyi Musa siarinnyi emetab Misri
Exodus10:14 Ak kitogos chereng’endet koyom emet komugul ne bo Misri
Exodus10:15 Amu kituch emet komugul
Exodus10:16 Kiiyokto anyun Parao keguur Musa ak Aron kochok; ak kolenji
Exodus10:17 Noton anyun
Exodus10:18 Ak kiwa eng’ ole mi Parao
Exodus10:19 Ak kiwal Jehovah usonet ne kim mising’ kousune cherongo
Exodus10:20 Ago kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldo ne bo Parao
Exodus10:21 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus10:22 Ak kichuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi kipsengwet; ak kibiit mesundeito ne o mising’ eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri eng’ betusiek somok;
Exodus10:23 kima imuchi chi kogeer chi
Exodus10:24 Ak kiguur Parao Musa
Exodus10:25 Ak kile Musa

Exodus10:27 Ago kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao

Exodus10:29 Ak kile Musa
Exodus11:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus11:2 Mwachi anyun bik kogas eng’ itikwak
Exodus11:3 Ak kiigochi Jehovah bik chamet eng’ taitab Misrik. Kogeny ko ki toogunot mising’ Musa eng’ emetab Misri
Exodus11:4 Ak kile Musa
Exodus11:5 ak kobek taiywek tugul eng’ emetab Misri
Exodus11:6 Ak kobiit kateiyet ne o eng’ emetab Misri komugul
Exodus11:7 Ago eng’ lagokab Israel ko mami agot seset ne imuchi koseng’eng’ji chi anan tiony: si kobiit onai ole ibestos Jehovah Misrik ak Israel.
Exodus11:8 Ak kochorgei otwogichuguk kobwa ole ami
Exodus11:9 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus11:10 Ak kiyai Musa ak Aron kwong’utichuto tugul eng’ taitab Parao: ak kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao
Exodus12:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron eng’ emetab Misri
Exodus12:2 Egu arawani taunetab arawek eng’ okwek: egu arawet ne bo tai ne bo kenyit eng’ okwek.
Exodus12:3 Omwachi tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel olenji
Exodus12:4 ak ngo ng’ering’ bik eng’ gab chi eng’ aruanato
Exodus12:5 Egu arueng’wong’ ne libwob
Exodus12:6 ak otaban agoi koit betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawanito: si koeny tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel aruanato koskoleny.
Exodus12:7 Ak konam ichek korotik
Exodus12:8 Ak koam banyechato kemounoto
Exodus12:9 Amoam ko tuonen
Exodus12:10 Amat kong’et agot kitigin kot koeekyi; ago ne kang’et agoi koeech obeel eng’ ma.
Exodus12:11 Oam anyun ko u ni; ko kaoratge
Exodus12:12 Amu abunoti kwenutab emetab Misri eng’ kemounoto
Exodus12:13 Ak koek korotichoto kaborunet eng’ okwek eng’ gorikwok eng’ ole omi; ak ye ageer korotik
Exodus12:14 Ak egu betunito kabwatet eng’ okwek
Exodus12:15 Oam makatinik che ma kinde mermerek betusiek tisab; oistoi eng’ gorikwok mermerek agot eng’ betut ne bo tai: amu king’etoi age tugul eng’ Israel ne kaam makatinik che mi mermerek eng’ betut ne bo tai agoi betut ne bo tisab.
Exodus12:16 Ak koek eng’ okwek betut ne bo tai kayumetab ge ne itabanat
Exodus12:17 Ak orib igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek; amu kaamoong’u eng’ betunito lugosiekwok komong’une emetab Misri: amu noto anyun orib betunito eng’ ibinwekwok tugul koek ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny.
Exodus12:18 Oame anyun makatinik che ma kinde mermerek
Exodus12:19 Maginyorjin gorikwok mermerek eng’ betusiechoto tisab: amu king’etoi eng’ tuiyetab Israel
Exodus12:20 Moame kiy age tugul ne kaginde mermerek; oame makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul.
Exodus12:21 Kiguur anyun Musa boisiek tugul che bo Israel
Exodus12:22 Ak onam ratutietab ketik che kiguure husop
Exodus12:23 Amu nyo kosiirtoi Jehovah kowendi kobarei Misrik; ak ye keer korotik eng’ rateiywotab tugatuk ak eng’ tugatugik tuwai
Exodus12:24 Oribe anyun ng’olyondoni koek ng’atutiet eng’ inye ak weriguk koigeny.
Exodus12:25 Ak ye tun oit emet ne konok Jehovah
Exodus12:26 Ak ye tun teebenak lagokwok
Exodus12:27 Olenji anyun
Exodus12:28 Kiba anyun lagokab Israel koyai ko u noto; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Exodus12:29 Ak kingoit kemoi kwen
Exodus12:30 Ak king’eet Parao kemoi
Exodus12:31 Ak kiiyokto keguur Musa ak Aron kemoi
Exodus12:32 Okweri kechirekwok ak tukwok
Exodus12:33 Ak kiichirjir Misrik bik kochakta komanda eng’ emet; amu kile
Exodus12:34 Kinam anyun bik makatinik che tuonen che tomo kinde mermerek
Exodus12:35 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u ng’olyotab Musa; ak kisom Misrik tugukab feda
Exodus12:36 ak kiigochi Jehovah Misrik kocham Israelik
Exodus12:37 Kiba anyun lagokab Israel kong’eetye Rameses agoi koit Sukot
Exodus12:38 Kiba koboto icheget tuiyet ne o ne bo bik alak tugul che terotin; koboto kechirek
Exodus12:39 Ak kibeel makatinik che mengechen che kima kinde mermerek eng’ makatinichoto tuonen che kiibune Misri
Exodus12:40 Kiga kotebe anyun lagokab Israel Misri kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak sosom.
Exodus12:41 Ak kingobata kenyisiechoto bogol ang’wan ak sosom
Exodus12:42 Egu kemout ne kanyol kibwate Jehovah amu kiimut ichek komandae emetab Misri: nito ko kemoutab Jehovah
Exodus12:43 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Exodus12:44 ago amei otwogindet ne kigiale siling’isiek
Exodus12:45 Maamei bunotyot anan otwogindet ne nyoru melekto.
Exodus12:46 Kiame got agenge; amat oib beny komanda sang’ agot kitigin; amat oiri kowet age tugul.
Exodus12:47 Ingoyai ko u noto tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel.
Exodus12:48 Ak ngo rutochin kiprutoiyot
Exodus12:49 Mi ng’atutiet agenge eng’ ne kigisikyin emeng’wong’
Exodus12:50 Kiyai ko u noto lagokab Israel tugul; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Exodus12:51 Ak kiimaanda Jehovah betunoto lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Misri eng’ lugosiekwak.
Exodus13:1 Ak king’alalji Jehova Musa
Exodus13:2 Itabanwa taiywek tugul
Exodus13:3 Ak kilenji Musa bik
Exodus13:4 Omandoi rani eng’ arawetab Abib.
Exodus13:5 Ak ye kagomutak Jehovah oit emetab Kananik
Exodus13:6 Oam makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ betusiek tisab
Exodus13:7 Kiamei eng’ betusiechoto tugul tisab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek; amat kenyorji chi makatinik che kiginde mermerek
Exodus13:8 Ak tun imwachini wering’ung’ eng’ betunoto
Exodus13:9 Ak tun egu noto kaborunet eng’ eung’ung’
Exodus13:10 Orib anyun ng’atutioni eng’ betunnyi ne kiging’atyi eng’ kenyit age tugul.
Exodus13:11 Ak ye tun iitak Jehovah emetab Kananik
Exodus13:12 itabani anyun kobunji Jehovah tugul che yatei iyotet ak che twatei tiong’ik; ak bunjin Jehovah ng’etik ak che kirugik.
Exodus13:13 Ak itiachi ne twatei sigiriet
Exodus13:14 Ak ye tun teebenen wering’ung’ eng’ betusiek che bwanei
Exodus13:15 ak ye kingoetenech Parao kebe
Exodus13:16 Ak egu noto kaborunet eng’ eung’ung’
Exodus13:17 Ak kingo kagounda Parao bik koba
Exodus13:18 ago kiindochinot Kamuktaindet bik kobun ong’atet ne tokyingei Nyanjet ne Birir: ak kitogosta lagokab Israel komanda eng’ emetab Misri ko kagolaach karik.
Exodus13:19 Ak kiib Musa kowekab Josep: amu kiga kogimgim inendet lagokab Israel koyosio
Exodus13:20 Kinam anyun bandanywa kong’eetye Sukot
Exodus13:21 Ak kiindoe Jehovah ichek eng’ toloitab boldet bet
Exodus13:22 Kima isto inendet eng’ taitab bik toloitab boldet bet
Exodus14:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa
Exodus14:2 Mwachi lagokab Isreal koweek komuung’e taitab Pi-hairot
Exodus14:3 Ak tun mwaei Parao agobo lagokab Israel
Exodus14:4 Ak auuiiti muguleldab Parao
Exodus14:5 Ak kigimwachi laitoriatab Misri
Exodus14:6 Kichob anyun karinnyi
Exodus14:7 ak kiib karisiek bogol lo che kigilewen
Exodus14:8 Ak kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao laitoriatab Misri
Exodus14:9 Ak kiisub Misrik ichek
Exodus14:10 Ak ye kingorikta Parao
Exodus14:11 Ak kilenji ichek Musa
Exodus14:12 Tos ma nito ng’olyot ne kigimwaun eng’ Misri
Exodus14:13 Ak kilenji Musa bik
Exodus14:14 Yaei Jehovah inendet luget agobo okwek; osisie okwek.
Exodus14:15 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus14:16 Ak inamji barak siaring’ung’
Exodus14:17 Keero
Exodus14:18 Ak konai Misrik kole a Jehovah
Exodus14:19 Ak kiwa let malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet ne kiindoe tuiyetab Israel
Exodus14:20 ak kitonone kwenutab tuiyetab Misrik ak tuiyetab Israel; ak kimi boldet ak mesundeito
Exodus14:21 Ak kichuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet; ak kiiyok Jehovah usonet ne bunu kong’asis kous kemout komugul
Exodus14:22 Ak kiba lagokab Israel kobun emet ne yaamat eng’ kwenutab nyanjet: ak kitoten beek eng’ komostab tai ak eng’ komostab katam.
Exodus14:23 Ak kiisub Misrik ichek
Exodus14:24 Ak eng’ ripset ne bo karon
Exodus14:25 Ak kiichun kelyekab karisiekwak
Exodus14:26 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus14:27 Ak kichuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet ak kiweeigei beek kotuiyo ko u yegonye ko kaeech; ak kimwei Misrik ye kingogeer beek kotokyingei icheget; ak kitoorji Jehovah Misrik kwenutab nyanjet.
Exodus14:28 Ak kiweeigei beek
Exodus14:29 Ago kibun lagokab Israel emet ko kagoyaam eng’ kwenutab nyanjet; ak kitoten beek eng’ komosi ak komosi.
Exodus14:30 Kisor Jehovah anyun Israel ko u noto eng’ betunoto eng’ eunekab Misrik; ak kigeer Israel Misrik ko kagobek komi ngegutab nyanjet.
Exodus14:31 Ak kigeer Israel boisiet ne kim ne kiyachi Jehovah eng’ Misrik
Exodus15:1 Kitienji Musa koboto lagokab Israel Jehovah tieni
Exodus15:2 Jehovah kimnatennyu ak tiendanyu
Exodus15:3 Jehovah inendet ko ne bo luget: Kainennyi ko Jehovah.
Exodus15:4 Kiwirji nyanjet karisiekab Parao koboto lugennyi: Ak kiimaluuch Nyanjet ne Birir kiptainikyik che kilewen.
Exodus15:5 Kituch ichek rirosiek: Kirorokta koba rirosiek ko u koita.
Exodus15:6 Ee Jehovah
Exodus15:7 Iluuli ichek che ng’eetyinin eng’ oindab telunateng’ung’: Iyoktoi neregeguk
Exodus15:8 Ak kiiyumgei beek amu kimnatetab kabuset ne bo seruneguk
Exodus15:9 Kile bunyondet
Exodus15:10 Kiiusyi eng’ usoneng’ung’
Exodus15:11 Ee Jehovah
Exodus15:12 Kiite eung’ung’ ne bo tai
Exodus15:13 Kiindochi inye eng’ rireneng’ung’ bik che kiitiach
Exodus15:14 Kigogas bororiosiek alage
Exodus15:15 Kitang’any anyun kiruogik che bo Edom; Botandos che kimen che bo Moabik: Kachootyo tugul che menyei Kanan.
Exodus15:16 Kanam ichek kamuiset ak kaiyweisiet; Kasisyo ko u koita amu etunatetab eung’ung’; Ee Jehovah
Exodus15:17 Imutu ichek komong’
Exodus15:18 Laitorani Jehovah koigeny ak koigeny.
Exodus15:19 Amu kiba mbartanyisiek che bo Parao nyanjet koboto karisiekyik ak bikyik che lanyei mbartanyisiek
Exodus15:20 Ak kinam Miriam ne kwondo ne maotio
Exodus15:21 Ak kiwolji Miriam kolenji
Exodus15:22 Ak kiindochi Musa Israelik koba eng’ Nyanjet ne Birir
Exodus15:23 Ak kingoit Mara
Exodus15:24 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji bik Musa

Exodus15:26 ak kile

Exodus16:1 Kinam anyun bandanywa kong’eetye Elim
Exodus16:2 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel Musa ak Aron eng’ ong’atet:
Exodus16:3 ak kilenji lagokab Israel ichek
Exodus16:4 Kilenji Jehovah Musa anyun
Exodus16:5 Ak tebyei ko u ni eng’ betut ne bo lo
Exodus16:6 Ak kilenji Musa ak Aron lagokab Israel tugul
Exodus16:7 ak ogeer karon telunatetab Jehovah; amu kasei inendet kang’unyng’unyeng’wong’ ne ong’unyng’ung’jini Jehovah: achek anyun ko ki ng’o si ong’unyng’ung’jech?
Exodus16:8 Ak kile Musa
Exodus16:9 Ak kilenji Musa Aron
Exodus16:10 Ak ye kita kong’alaljin Aron tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Exodus16:11 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Exodus16:12 Kaagas kang’unyng’unyetab lagokab Israel: mwachi ilenji
Exodus16:13 Ak kibwa taok koskoleny
Exodus16:14 Ak ye kingotogosta rewot ne kogaibut
Exodus16:15 Ak ye kingogeer lagokab Israel tukchoto
Exodus16:16 Nito kit ne kong’at Jehovah
Exodus16:17 Ak kiyai ko u noto lagokab Israel
Exodus16:18 Ak ye kingoger eng’ kerebet
Exodus16:19 Ak kilenji Musa ichek
Exodus16:20 Ago kima kas it kit ne kimwachin Musa; ago kiituuch alage koteb kot koeech
Exodus16:21 Ak kiiyumi karonet age tugul
Exodus16:22 Ak kiiyum eng’ betut ne bo lo che te che cham koyumi konyil aeng’
Exodus16:23 Ak kilenji Musa ichek
Exodus16:24 Ak kigonor kobunji karon
Exodus16:25 Ak kile Musa
Exodus16:26 Oyumi eng’ betusiek lo; ago betutab tisab ko sabato
Exodus16:27 Ago kiba alage eng’ betutab tisab
Exodus16:28 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus16:29 Ogeero
Exodus16:30 Kiimuuny anyun bik eng’ betutab tisab.
Exodus16:31 Ak kiguure gotab Israel amitwogichoto Mana: ki kergei tuguchoto ak bek che mubere che leelach; ak kichamu makatinik che mengechen che kigikwanda kumiat.
Exodus16:32 Ak kile Musa
Exodus16:33 Ak kilenji Musa Aron
Exodus16:34 Kigonor anyun Aron eng’ taitab Baornatet kole kerib
Exodus16:35 Ak kiam lagokab Israel mana kenyisiek artam
Exodus16:36 Kerebonoto kigere mana ne kiguure omer ko kebebertab taman ne bo epah.

Exodus17:2 Kibolji anyun bik Musa amu noto

Exodus17:5 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus17:6 Keero
Exodus17:7 Ak kiguure yoto Masa

Exodus17:10 Kiyai anyun Josua ko u ye kiga komwachi Musa
Exodus17:11 Ak ye kingonamji Musa barak eunnyi
Exodus17:12 Ago kinyigisitu eunekab Musa; kinam anyun koita

Exodus17:16 ak kile
Exodus18:1 Kigas anyun Jetro
Exodus18:2 Ak kiimut Jetro
Exodus18:3 ak werikyik aeng’; kigiguure age Gerson; amu kile
Exodus18:4 ak kigiguure age Elieser; amu kile
Exodus18:5 kiit anyun Jetro
Exodus18:6 ak kilenji inendet Musa
Exodus18:7 Kimanda anyun Musa kwo kotorokta kabyugoinnyi
Exodus18:8 Ak kimwachi Musa anyun kabyugoinnyi tuguk tugul che kigoyachi Jehovah Parao ak Misrik agobo Israel
Exodus18:9 Ak kibaibait Jetro amu mieindo tugul ne kigoyachi Jehovah Israel
Exodus18:10 Ak kile Jetro
Exodus18:11 Angen nguno anyun ale o Jehovah kosiir cheptalelisiek tugul: ee
Exodus18:12 Kinam anyun Jetro kabyugoitab Musa kagochinet ne kibeelei ak tiseiywek koeng’ji Kamuktaindet: ak kinyo Aron
Exodus18:13 Ak eng’ karonet ne bo aeng’
Exodus18:14 Ak ye kingogeer kabyugoitab Musa tuguk tugul che kiyachin Musa bik
Exodus18:15 Ak kilenji Musa kabyugoinnyi
Exodus18:16 ye tinyei ng’olyo
Exodus18:17 Ak kilenji kabyugoinnyi Musa
Exodus18:18 Iwong’ugei kimnateng’ung’
Exodus18:19 Kas anyun ng’olyondennyu
Exodus18:20 ak inet ichek konetisiosiek ak ng’atutik
Exodus18:21 Nyolu kogeny ilewenote
Exodus18:22 ak ingoruoksechi bik bichoto eng’ betusiek tugul: si koibun ng’olyot age tugul ne uui
Exodus18:23 Ak ngot iyai kiito anyun
Exodus18:24 Kigas anyun Musa ng’alekab kabyugoinnyi
Exodus18:25 Ak kilewenot Musa bik che kimen eng’ Israel tugul
Exodus18:26 Ak kiiruoksechi bik eng’ betusiek tugul: kiipchi Musa ng’alek che uuen
Exodus18:27 Ak kichamji Musa kabyugoinnyi kwo; ak kiwa anyun bandanyi agoi emennyi.
Exodus19:1 Kiit anyun lagokab Israel ong’atetab Sinai eng’ arawetab somok koboch ngab komanda eng’ emetab Misri: kiit eng’ betunoto.
Exodus19:2 Ak kingo kagoba eng’ Repadim
Exodus19:3 Ak kitogosta Musa kwo ole mi Kamuktaindet
Exodus19:4 Kiogeer kit ne kiayachi Misrik
Exodus19:5 Eng’ noto anyun
Exodus19:6 ak oegu eng’ ane bororietab tisiik
Exodus19:7 Kinyo anyun Musa koguur boisiekab bichoto
Exodus19:8 Ak kiwol bik tugul kibagenge kole
Exodus19:9 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus19:10 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus19:11 kochopgei agobo betut ne bo somok: amu chorjingei Jehovah tulwetab Sinai eng’ betutab somok eng’ taitab bik tugul.
Exodus19:12 Ak itilji bik ole iboch
Exodus19:13 magitwaei eng’ eut chito ne katwa
Exodus19:14 Ak kichortagei Musa anyun kwo ole mi bik
Exodus19:15 Ak kilenji bik
Exodus19:16 Ak eng’ betutab somok
Exodus19:17 Ak kiimut Musa bik komong’ eng’ nganaset koba kotuiyo ak Kamuktaindet; ak kiba kotononie tulwet kel.
Exodus19:18 Ak kiiyeni tulwet komugul ne bo Sinai
Exodus19:19 Ak kingotesak cheetab iriaget kwo barak mising’ kotwek Musa
Exodus19:20 Ak kichorjigei Jehovah tulwetab Sinai
Exodus19:21 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus19:22 Ak ingoanyinygei tisiik agichek che rikyin Jehovah
Exodus19:23 Ak kilenji Musa Jehovah
Exodus19:24 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet
Exodus19:25 Kichortagei anyun Musa kwo ole mi bik
Exodus20:1 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet ng’alechu tugul kole
Exodus20:2 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung
Exodus20:3 Amecheng’jige cheptalelisiek che ter
Exodus20:4 Ameyachige kanamwet
Exodus20:5 ameng’urukyi anan iot ichek: amu ane Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’
Exodus20:6 ak arire elfusiek eng’ ichek che chama che isubi ng’atutikyuk.
Exodus20:7 Amemwa kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ tangoi; amu iityin Jehovah ng’ogisto ne mwaei kainennyi eng’ tangoi.
Exodus20:8 Ibwat betutab sabato
Exodus20:9 Iboisie betusiek lo
Exodus20:10 ago betutab tisab ko sabato ne bo Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ameyai boisiet eng’ betunoto
Exodus20:11 amu kiyai Jehovah kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony eng’ betusiek lo
Exodus20:12 Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet: si kochang’a betusieguk eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’.
Exodus20:13 Amerumisie.
Exodus20:14 Amoipge.
Exodus20:15 Amechorse.
Exodus20:16 Amebaorianji chitab kokweng’ung’ eng’ lembech.
Exodus20:17 Amegase miat gotab chitab kokweng’ung’

Exodus20:19 Ak kilenji ichek Musa
Exodus20:20 Ak kilenji Musa bik
Exodus20:21 Ak kitononso bik eng’ ole loo
Exodus20:22 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Exodus20:23 Amat oyachige kanamonik alak otesena
Exodus20:24 Teekwa kaptisiet ne bo ng’ung’unyek
Exodus20:25 Ak ngimache iteekwa kaptisisiet ne bo koik
Exodus20:26 Ametogoste iwe kaptisisiennyu ibune long’eiywot
Exodus21:1 Chu anyun kiruogutik che indechini tainywa.
Exodus21:2 Ngial otwogindet ne Hebranindet
Exodus21:3 Ngo kinyonei inegei
Exodus21:4 Ago ngo kiigochin kiptaindennyi osotiot
Exodus21:5 Ak ngo mwa komie otwogindet kole
Exodus21:6 komut anyun kiptaiyandennyi chichoto konyo taitab Kamuktaindet
Exodus21:7 Ak ngo alda chi cheptanyi koek otwogindet
Exodus21:8 Ngo maibaibai cheboto kiptaiyandennyi
Exodus21:9 Ak ngogochi inendet werinnyi koek osotiondennyi
Exodus21:10 Ak ngo sion
Exodus21:11 Ak ngo mayachi inendet tuguchoto somok
Exodus21:12 Inendet ne birei chi kot kome
Exodus21:13 Ago chito ne kama kosetyin
Exodus21:14 Ak ngo wechi chito chitab kokwennyi eng’ menotet
Exodus21:15 Ak inendet ne birei kwandanyi
Exodus21:16 Ak inendet ne chorei chi
Exodus21:17 Ak inendet ne sasei kwandanyi
Exodus21:18 Ak ngo borio bik
Exodus21:19 ago ngo ng’eet
Exodus21:20 Ak ngo bir chi age tugul otwogindennyi ne muren
Exodus21:21 Ago ngot koeekyi betut agenge anan ko aeng’ ama me
Exodus21:22 Ak ngo borio bik
Exodus21:23 Ago ngoyaak kiy ne ya
Exodus21:24 konda eng’ konda
Exodus21:25 beelset eng’ beelset
Exodus21:26 Ak ngo kwer chi kondab otwogindennyi ne muren anan ne tie
Exodus21:27 Ak ngo kwer keldetab otwogindennyi ne muren
Exodus21:28 Ak ngo toor kirgit muren anan kobogorio
Exodus21:29 Ago ngo kocham kobarei bich kirgoto
Exodus21:30 Ak ngo biit kiy ne itiagegei
Exodus21:31 Ngo kibar werit
Exodus21:32 Ak ngo toor kirgit otwogindet ne muren anan otwogindet ne tie; kogoitoi sekelisiek sosom che bo feda
Exodus21:33 Ak ngo yat chito keringet
Exodus21:34 kogeeri chitab kobo keringet; ak igochin chitab kobo tuguchoto siling’isiek
Exodus21:35 Ak ngo bar kirgit kirgitab chito age kot kome; kealdoi noto sobei
Exodus21:36 Ak ngingen kele kicham kobarisiei kirgoto
Exodus22:1 Ngo chor chi tany
Exodus22:2 Ak ngenam chorindet kobutei oldo age
Exodus22:3 Ak ngo chor asis ama kiyachi kiy inendet
Exodus22:4 Ngenyorji eunnyi kioto kachor kota kosobei
Exodus22:5 Ngoyage chito tennyi mbaretab chito age
Exodus22:6 Ngo lal mat
Exodus22:7 Ngogochi chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi fedaisiek anan tuguk kogonorji
Exodus22:8 Ago ngo maginyor chorindet
Exodus22:9 Amu kachiliilutiet age tugul
Exodus22:10 Ngo manakyi chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi sigiriet
Exodus22:11 tebe kayosietab Jehovah kwenutab bichoto tuwai
Exodus22:12 Ago ngo kaga kigichore inendet iman
Exodus22:13 Ngot ko kinam tiondo kotonaton
Exodus22:14 Ak ngo som chi chitab kokwennyi kiy koboisie
Exodus22:15 Ago ngo mi chitab kobo
Exodus22:16 Ak ngogaigai chito bergeiyat ne tom keyachi koito
Exodus22:17 Ak ngo esio kwandab bergeiyandanato eng’ kimnatet
Exodus22:18 Ameunde bonindet kosob.
Exodus22:19 Kibarei age tugul ne ruitos ak che kiyagi.
Exodus22:20 Chi age tugul ne eng’jin tiseiywot cheptalelit age tugul
Exodus22:21 Ameyachi ne ya too
Exodus22:22 Amous mosok age tugul
Exodus22:23 Ngius ichek eng’ kiy age tugul
Exodus22:24 ak kolalyo neregekyuk
Exodus22:25 Ak ngo besenin bikyuk che kibananok che mi koboten
Exodus22:26 Ak nginame besendo ngorietab chitab kokweng’ung’
Exodus22:27 amu noto kityo ne tugegei
Exodus22:28 Amat isas Kamuktaindet
Exodus22:29 Amegage si igoitoi eng’ chang’indab tuguguk
Exodus22:30 Ak iyai ko u noto eng’ tuga cheguk agichek
Exodus22:31 Ak oegu bik che itabanotin eng’ ane: eng’ noto anyun amoam banyek alak tugul che kabar tiong’ik eng’ timin; owirji sesenik.
Exodus23:1 Amemwaate ng’alek che bo lembech: amonamge ak kiptengekyot
Exodus23:2 Amesub tuiyet iwe iyai kiy ne ya; amebaorianji ng’alek isub tuiyet imaas kiruoget:
Exodus23:3 ametiytii kibanania eng’ ng’alekyik.
Exodus23:4 Nginyoru tetab bunyondeng’ung’ anan sigiriennyi ne betoti
Exodus23:5 Nginyoru sigirietab ne wechin ko kagobut amu tuguk che laei
Exodus23:6 Amat imaas kiruogetab kibananiandeng’ung’ eng’ ng’alekyik.
Exodus23:7 Istege
Exodus23:8 Ametaach tuguk che bo kagaigaet: amu tuchei konunoik
Exodus23:9 Amenyalil toondet amu ongen ole teptoi muguleldab toondet
Exodus23:10 Igole mbareng’ung’ kenyisiek lo
Exodus23:11 ago mete eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab koteb komuuny; si kobiit konyor turonik kibananokab biguk: ak koam tiong’ikab timin che ituuchi bichoto. Iyae ko u noto eng’ mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk
Exodus23:12 Yai boisieng’ung’ eng’ betusiek lo
Exodus23:13 Ak orib tuguk tugul che kaamwawok: amat omwa kainaikab cheptalelisiek
Exodus23:14 Iyaiywa igorta konyil somok eng’ kenyit age tugul.
Exodus23:15 Rib igortab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek: iame eng’ betusiek tisab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek
Exodus23:16 Rib igorta ne bo kesisiet
Exodus23:17 Bwanei taitab Kiptaiyat Jehovah murenik tugul konyil somok eng’ kenyit agenge.
Exodus23:18 Ameibu korotikab tiseiywondennyu koboto makatinik che kaginde mermerek; amengoeekyi mwanikab igortanyu.
Exodus23:19 Kanyol iibu tuguk che bo tai eng’ tongoanik che bo emeng’ung’ kobwa gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. Ameyoe aruet chegab kamet.
Exodus23:20 Keero
Exodus23:21 Oripge eng’ tainnyi
Exodus23:22 Ago ngigas it ng’alekyik
Exodus23:23 Amu wendi malaikaiyandennyu kondoenen
Exodus23:24 Amat isa kanamonikwak

Exodus23:26 Ak mabiitu ne rorogu moet
Exodus23:27 Ayoktoi kamuisennyu kondoenen
Exodus23:28 Ak ayokte karamiet kondoenen
Exodus23:29 Maone ichek koba eng’ taing’ung’ eng’ kenyit agenge; si maguber emet
Exodus23:30 Aone komutya koba eng’ taing’ung’ agoi itesage

Exodus23:32 Amoyai arorut ak ichek
Exodus23:33 Amat komeny emeng’ung’
Exodus24:1 Ak kilenji inendet Musa
Exodus24:2 ak nyonei Musa inegei korikyin Jehovah; ago marigu ichek; ak matogosu bik koboto inendet.
Exodus24:3 Ak kinyo anyun Musa konyo komwachi bik ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah
Exodus24:4 Ak kisir Musa ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah
Exodus24:5 Ak kiiyokto murenik che neran che bo lagokab Israel
Exodus24:6 Ak kinam Musa korotik kebeber
Exodus24:7 Ak konam bukuitab arorutiet
Exodus24:8 Yeityo konam Musa korotik
Exodus24:9 Kitogosta anyun Musa
Exodus24:10 ak kigeer Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel; ak kimi kelyekyik kel koita ne kiguure sapire
Exodus24:11 Ak ma twa eng’ eunnyi kandoichoto bo lagokab Israel: ak kigeer Kamuktaindet

Exodus24:13 King’eet anyun Musa ak Josua kiboitiondennyi
Exodus24:14 Ak kilenji boisiek
Exodus24:15 Kitogosta anyun Musa kwo tulwet
Exodus24:16 Ak kitebe lilindab Jehovah tulwetab Sinai
Exodus24:17 Ak ki u itondab lilindab Jehovah mat ne beelei kowong’u eng’ tulwet barak ko u ye kigeerei lagokab Israel.

Exodus25:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Exodus25:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel koibwa konunoik: name konunoichoto chi age tugul ne ichirjini muguleldanyi kogon konunoikyuk.
Exodus25:3 Chu konunoik che itaache eng’ ichek; tahabu
Exodus25:4 ak angok che tuuen ne nyalil
Exodus25:5 ak magatokab mengichik che kigisal kobiriritu
Exodus25:6 mwaitab kit ne ikweng’sei
Exodus25:7 koik che kiguure soam
Exodus25:8 Ak ingoteekwa ole tilil; si ameny kwenunywa.
Exodus25:9 Oyai tugul ko u ye aborun
Exodus25:10 Ak ingoyai moinget eng’ ketik che kiguure shita: ingoek koindanyi kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber; ak ingoek tebeesindanyi kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber; ak ingoek koindab tononennyi kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber.
Exodus25:11 Ak iliige tahabu che tililen
Exodus25:12 Ak itang’ji peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu
Exodus25:13 Ak iyai ketik che kiname che bo shita
Exodus25:14 Ak irookte ketichoto peteinik
Exodus25:15 Tebe ketichato peteinikab moinget; magicheru.
Exodus25:16 Ak inde moingonoto orit baornatet ne agonin.
Exodus25:17 Ak iyai keruennyi ne bo rirenet ne bo tahabu che tililen: ingoek koindanyi kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber
Exodus25:18 Ak iyai kerubisiek aeng’ eng’ tahabu
Exodus25:19 Ak iyai kerubit age kotebe tabanda age
Exodus25:20 Ak koiito kerubisiek kebebaikwak koba barak
Exodus25:21 Ak inde keruanato bo rirenet baragutab moinget; ak inde moinget orit baornatet ne tun agonin.
Exodus25:22 Ak ketuiye ak inye eng’ oloto
Exodus25:23 Ak iyai meset eng’ ketikab shita: ingoek koindanyi kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut
Exodus25:24 Ak iliige tahabu che tililen
Exodus25:25 Ak iyachi tegeleiywot ne yamei eut agenge tebeesindanyi
Exodus25:26 Ak iyachi peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu
Exodus25:27 Ingorikyi peteinichoto tegeleiywot
Exodus25:28 Ak iyai ketik che kiibe
Exodus25:29 Ak itany tahabu che tililen iyai koek tabokyik
Exodus25:30 Ak inde makatinik che bo kabartaet meset kotebe tainnyu kotugul.
Exodus25:31 Ak iyai keldab tait eng’ tahabu che tililen: iyae keloto tahabu che kitanyi
Exodus25:32 ak kosach temenik koek lo eng’ toloato; sachei temenik somogu eng’ komosta age ne bo keloto
Exodus25:33 Tinyei temet agenge kikombok somok che kigiyai koigei taptok che kiguure almond
Exodus25:34 Ak mitei ole bo toloita inendet kikombok ang’wan
Exodus25:35 Ak ye kisage temenik aeng’u
Exodus25:36 Namegei mulonokwak ak temenikwak
Exodus25:37 Ak iyai taisiekyik koek tisab: ak konam taisiekyik
Exodus25:38 Ak kiyae tahabu che tililen kanameiywondennyi
Exodus25:39 Kiyae tainato ak tuguchuto tugul tahabu che tililen che yamei talentait agenge.
Exodus25:40 Rib si iyai tugul ko u kergeindenywa ne kigiborun eng’ tulwet.
Exodus26:1 Teech got anyun
Exodus26:2 Ingoek koindab ngoriet age tugul kakwautik tiptem ak sisiit che bo eut
Exodus26:3 Kiropchindos ngoroik mut; ak keropchin ngoroik alak mut agichek.
Exodus26:4 Ak iyachi belelutik che tuuen ne nyalil eng’ tabandab ngoriet age
Exodus26:5 Napchi ngoriet age belelutik konom
Exodus26:6 Ak iyai karik konom che bo tahabu che kiname ngoroik
Exodus26:7 Ak inab ngoroikab ng’ororek koek emait ne kituge got: napchi taman ak agenge.
Exodus26:8 Ingoek koindab ngoriet age tugul kakwautik sosom che bo eut
Exodus26:9 Ak ituiye ngoroik mut koek agenge
Exodus26:10 Ak iyachi belelutik konom eng’ tabandab ngoriet age ne tabanu barak eng’ ole kituiyechin
Exodus26:11 Ak iyai karik konom che bo sugunonik
Exodus26:12 Ak ne kang’etune ngoroikab emait
Exodus26:13 Ak kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut ne kang’et eng’ komosta age kogeny
Exodus26:14 Ak inab ngoroikab mengichik che kigisal kobiriritu si ketuge emait
Exodus26:15 Ak iyai baoinik che bo ketikab shita
Exodus26:16 Ingoek kakwautik taman che bo eut koindab baoiyot
Exodus26:17 Iyae baoiyot age tugul konyor ng’elyebwek aeng’ che kiituiyogei; yai ko u noto eng’ baoinik tugul che bo got.
Exodus26:18 Yai baoinikab got che itei tiptem; inde choto ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai.
Exodus26:19 Ak ibarbar feda isikyi kong’ik artam
Exodus26:20 ak che bo komosta age ne bo got
Exodus26:21 ak kong’ikwak artam che bo feda
Exodus26:22 Yai anyun baoinik lo kobunji got batai ole tokyingei cherongo.
Exodus26:23 Ak iyai baoinik aeng’ kobunji luukwek che bo go che mi batai.
Exodus26:24 Ak kitwakyindos aeng’ koboch ng’ony agoi barak
Exodus26:25 Ak egu choto baoinik sisiit
Exodus26:26 Ak iyai eng’ shita ketik che u rateiywek; iyae mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta agenge ne bo got
Exodus26:27 ak rateiywek mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta age ne bo got
Exodus26:28 Ak ingobochit tabanda age agoi tabanda age rateiywot ne bo kwen ne muroksei
Exodus26:29 Ak iliige tahabu baoinik
Exodus26:30 Ak ingotonon goyoto ko u ye kiging’at ak kiborun eng’ tulwet.
Exodus26:31 Ak iyai anget ne kigioiye got ne tuui ne nyalil
Exodus26:32 ak isonginine lumeiywek ang’wan che bo ketikab shita che kiliige tahabu
Exodus26:33 Ak isonginine anganato kapkelyenutab karik che kiname ngoroik ak iibu moinget ne bo baornatet inde got ne bo orit ne tilate anget: si kopcheiywok anganato ole tilil ak ole tilil mising’.
Exodus26:34 Ak inde keruet ne bo rirenet moinget ne bo baornatet eng’ ole tilil mising’.
Exodus26:35 Ak inde meset got ne sib kemong’jin
Exodus26:36 Ak inab ngorioet ne kigere kurgetab emait
Exodus26:37 Ak iyachi ngorionoto lumeiywek mut che bo ketikab shita
Exodus27:1 Ak iyai kaptisisiet eng’ ketikab shita
Exodus27:2 Ak iyai isikyi kuinoikyik eng’ luukwekyik ang’wan: kitanyi kuinoichoto konomnyo ak kaptisisiet koek kiy agenge: ak iliige sugunwet.
Exodus27:3 Ak itany terenikyik che kiibe orek
Exodus27:4 ak iyachi sugunonik che kiregeri
Exodus27:5 Ak inde karnanato kagireger kapkelyenutab mireiywot ne yiemei kaptisisiet komosta ole bo kel
Exodus27:6 Ak iyachi kaptisisiet ketik che kiibe
Exodus27:7 Ak kirooktoi ketichato peteinik
Exodus27:8 Itete baoinik koek moinget eng’ kaptisisionoto: ingoyai bik ko u ye kogiborun eng’ tulwet.
Exodus27:9 Ak iyai seremut ne ng’otat ne bo got: ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai
Exodus27:10 ak egu tiptem lumeiywek che bo sugunonik che keratyin ngoroichoto
Exodus27:11 Ak u noto agine eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam
Exodus27:12 Ak eng’ tebeesindab seremut eng’ komostab cherongo
Exodus27:13 Ak ingoek kakwautik konom che bo eut tebeesindo ne bo seremut ne tokyingei kong’asis.
Exodus27:14 Ak ingoek kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut ngoroik che u emait che bo komosta age: ak lumeiywekwak somok ak kong’ikwak somok che tononie.
Exodus27:15 Ak ingoek che bo komosta age ngoroik che yamei kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut; ak lumeiywekwak somok
Exodus27:16 Ak ingoek ngoroik che bo ormarichet ne bo seremut kakwautik tiptem che bo eut
Exodus27:17 Bo feda rateiywek che keratote lumeiywek tugul che yiemei seremut; bo feda ireusiekwak
Exodus27:18 Ingoek koindab seremut kakwautik bogol che bo eut
Exodus27:19 Ingobunji sugunonik tuguk tugul che keboisie eng’ boisietab got
Exodus27:20 Ak ing’at lagokab Israel
Exodus27:21 Ingochobei Aron ak werikyik lapkeiyonoto eng’ taitab Jehovah kong’eete lagat agoi karon
Exodus28:1 Ak imutu Aron ng’etab komet konyo ole ami
Exodus28:2 Ak inapchi Aron ng’etab komet ngoroik che itabanotin che bo teegisto ak kororonindo.
Exodus28:3 Ak ing’alalji tugul che tinyei muguleldo ne bo kaguiyet
Exodus28:4 Chu ngoroik che nabei ichek: ngoriet ne kilaakyin teget
Exodus28:5 Ak ingoib ichek tahabu
Exodus28:6 Ak ingoyai ichek epok eng’ tahabu
Exodus28:7 Tinyei eng’ tigigoik kebeberwek che ituitos ngoroichoto tuwai koek ngoriet agenge.
Exodus28:8 Ak kiginab birenet eng’ ng’omnatet kituiyo kogergeit ak epok si kerategei; kinabe tahabu
Exodus28:9 Nam koik aeng’ che kiguure soam
Exodus28:10 sirji koita age kainaik lo
Exodus28:11 Sirji koichato aeng’ kainaikab lagokab Israel
Exodus28:12 Ak inde koichato aeng’ tigigoikab epod si koek koichato kabwatet agobo lagokab Israel: si koibot Aron kainaikwak eng’ tigigoikyik aeng’
Exodus28:13 Ak iyai tuguk che togulotin eng’ tahabu:
Exodus28:14 ak sirimoik aeng’ che bo tahabu che tililen; ilet koigei rogoonik: ak iratyi sirimwechoto kagilet tuguchoto togulotin.
Exodus28:15 Ak inab ngorionoto bo teget ne bo kiruoget
Exodus28:16 Ingoaechin koindo ak tebeesindo ko kagiliich: ingoek kakwautiennyi olobo inchisiek sogol eng’ koindo ak eng’ tebeesindo.
Exodus28:17 Ak inde ngorionoto koik che tetotin eng’ ortinwekwak ang’wan: inde oret ne bo tai sardio
Exodus28:18 ak inde oret ne bo aeng’ sumaragdo
Exodus28:19 ak inde oret ne bo somok huakinto
Exodus28:20 ak inde oret ne bo ang’wan berulo
Exodus28:21 Egu koichato taman ak aeng’ ko u kainaikab lagokab Israel; bendi ko u kainaikwak; ko u ye kiwaei ng’okset
Exodus28:22 Ak inapchi ngorionoto bo teget sirimwek che u rogoonik che bo tahabu che tililen
Exodus28:23 Ak inapchi ngorionoto bo teget peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus28:24 Ak inde sirimwechoto aeng’ bo tahabu che kigilet
Exodus28:25 Ak inam komoswechun alak aeng’ che bo sirimwechoto aeng’ kigilet
Exodus28:26 Ak ichob peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus28:27 Ak ichob peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus28:28 Ak kogiich ichek ngorietab teget eng’ peteinikyik
Exodus28:29 si koibei Aron kainaikab lagokab Israel eng’ ngorionoto bo teget ne bo kiruoget eng’ muguleldanyi
Exodus28:30 Ak inde ngorionoto bo teget ne bo kiruoget Urim ak Tumim; ak kotebe choto muguleldab Aron
Exodus28:31 Ak inab ngoriet ne kiroochigei
Exodus28:32 Ak inab ole kirooktoi metit eng’ kwenunnyi: ak igurman kaatit ko u boisietab laindet
Exodus28:33 Ak inapchi ngorionoto tabandab kel logoek che tuuen ne nyalil
Exodus28:34 indoi twolyot ne bo tahabu
Exodus28:35 Ak ingolaach Aron si koboisie: ak kegas cheetab chepchingilichoto ye wendi ole tilil eng’ taitab Jehovah
Exodus28:36 Ak itany tahabu che tililen kolebelitu
Exodus28:37 Ak iratyi rogoet ne tuui ne nyalil
Exodus28:38 Ak kotebe togetab Aron
Exodus28:39 Ak inab ngoriet ne koi eng’ katanit ne kararan
Exodus28:40 Ak inapchi werikab Aron ngoroik che koen
Exodus28:41 Ak ilaakyi ng’etab komet Aron tuguchoto
Exodus28:42 Ak inapchi sirualisiek che bo katanit si kobiit kotuge ach ngorinywa; che ng’eete suet agoi kubesoik.
Exodus28:43 Ak kolaach ichek tuguchoto
Exodus29:1 Ni kit ne iyachini ichek ianyinyi
Exodus29:2 koboto makatinik che ma kinde mermerek
Exodus29:3 Ak inde aterut agenge
Exodus29:4 Ak imutu Aron ak werikyik kobwa kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus29:5 Ak inam ngoroik
Exodus29:6 ak igerjine metinnyi nariet
Exodus29:7 Yeityo inam mwaita ne kiilse
Exodus29:8 Ak imutu werikyik agichek
Exodus29:9 Ak igermen eng’ birenaik
Exodus29:10 Ak igetu kirgit konyo taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kogonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab kirgoto.
Exodus29:11 Yeityo ieny kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah
Exodus29:12 Ak itaach korotikab kirgoto
Exodus29:13 Ak ibut mwanik tugul che kiilaach moet
Exodus29:14 Ago beel eng’ mat banyekab kirgoto
Exodus29:15 Ak inam mengit agenge agine: ak kogonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto.
Exodus29:16 Ak ieny mengit
Exodus29:17 Ak itonaton banyekab mengoto
Exodus29:18 Ak ibeel mengoto komugul eng’ kaptisisiet: nito ko kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo Jehovah: nyamdutiet ne anyiny
Exodus29:19 Ak inam mengit ne bo aeng’; si kogonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto.
Exodus29:20 Yeityo anyun ieny mengoto
Exodus29:21 Ak inam korotik che mi kaptisisiet barak
Exodus29:22 Ak inemu mwanikab mengit
Exodus29:23 ak makatiat agenge komugul
Exodus29:24 ak inde choto tugul eunekab Aron
Exodus29:25 Icheru tuguchoto eng’ eunekwak
Exodus29:26 Ak iib tagatet ne bo mengitab boisiet ne bo katabanet ne bo Aron
Exodus29:27 Ak itaban tagatet ne bo kagochinet ne kiongoi
Exodus29:28 ak kobunji choto Aron ak werikyik koek ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ lagokab Israel: amu kagochinet ne kinamjin barak: ak koek noto kagochinet ne kinamjin barak ne bunu lagokab Israel eng’ tiseiywekab kagochinoikwak che bo kalyet
Exodus29:29 Ak tun bunjin werikyik ngoroichoto itabanotin che bo Aron
Exodus29:30 Ak tun ilaachi ngoroichoto betusiek tisab
Exodus29:31 Ak inam mengit ne bo boisietab katabanet
Exodus29:32 Ak koam Aron ak werikyik banyekab mengoto
Exodus29:33 Ak koam tuguchoto che kiyae kagaigaet
Exodus29:34 Ak ngo ng’et banyek che bo noto kigitabanji boisietab katabanet
Exodus29:35 Yachi Aron anyun ko u noto
Exodus29:36 Ak igoitoi inye betut age tugul kirgit ne neran ne bo kagochinet ne bo tengekto kobunji kagaigaet: ak ianyiny kaptisisiet
Exodus29:37 Iyae kagaigaet agobo kaptisisiet eng’ betusiek tisab
Exodus29:38 Chu che igoitoi eng’ kaptisisio; igoitoi betut age tugul arek aeng’ che bo kechir che masiirei kenyit agenge
Exodus29:39 Igoite aruet age karon; ak igoite aruet ne bo aeng’ koskoleny:
Exodus29:40 ak itesyi aruet age kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo epah ne bo busiek che tambulul che kagiburukto kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin ne bo mwaita ne biitune tuisiet
Exodus29:41 Ak igoite aruet age koskoleny
Exodus29:42 Egu noto kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin eng’ taitab Jehovah: eng’ ole kituiyechini ak inye
Exodus29:43 Ak kituiyechini yoto ak lagokab Israel; ak itilili torornatennyu yoto.
Exodus29:44 Ak atilil emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus29:45 Ak ameny kwenutab lagokab Israel
Exodus29:46 Ak konai kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa
Exodus30:1 Ak iyai kapkorosut ole kebeele nyamdutik: yae ketikab shita.
Exodus30:2 Ingoek koindanyi kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut
Exodus30:3 Ak iliige tahabu che tililen baragunnyi
Exodus30:4 Ak itany peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus30:5 Ak iyai ketichato kiibe eng’ ketikab shita
Exodus30:6 Ak inde kapkorosunoto taitab anget ne ioitos got
Exodus30:7 Ak beelei Aron nyamdutik che bo tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny eng’ oloto: karonet age tugul ye chobei taisiek.
Exodus30:8 Ak beelei Aron ye inaami taisiek koskoleny
Exodus30:9 Amobeele oloto nyamdutik che ter
Exodus30:10 Ak koyai Aron kagaigaet eng’ kuinoikab kaptisisionoto konyil agenge eng’ kenyit age tugul: koyai kagaigaet eng’ korotikab kagochinetab tengekto ne bo kagaigaet konyil agenge eng’ kenyit age tugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul: tilil noto mising’ eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Exodus30:11 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Exodus30:12 Ye iit lagokab Israel
Exodus30:13 Chu che konu ichek
Exodus30:14 Igochin chi age tugul Jehovah kagochinet
Exodus30:15 Magonu magoriot che siirei choto
Exodus30:16 Ak itaach feda che bo kagaigaet eng’ lagokab Israel
Exodus30:17 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Exodus30:18 Yai tabet agine ne bo sugunwet
Exodus30:19 Si koune Aron ak werikyik eunekwak ak kelyekwak:
Exodus30:20 iunegei ichek ye mandoi emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus30:21 iuni anyun eunekwak ak kelyekwak
Exodus30:22 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kogeny
Exodus30:23 Inemunote tuguk che miachen kosiir
Exodus30:24 ak che bo kasia che yamei bogol mut
Exodus30:25 ak ichob tuguchoto koburugogis koek mwaita ne tilil ne kiilse
Exodus30:26 Ak iil emait ne kituiyechin eng’ mwaita
Exodus30:27 ak meset ak tugukyik tugul
Exodus30:28 ak kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek ak tugukyik tugul

Exodus34:16 ak itunji weriguk tibikwak
Exodus34:17 Ameyachigei kanamonik che kitanyi.
