Exodus35:35 Kigonyiit inendet ng’omnatet mugulelwekwak
Exodus36:1 Ingobois anyun Besalel ak Oholiab
Exodus36:2 Ak kiguur Musa Besalel ak Oholiab
Exodus36:3 ak kitaach kagochinoik tugul eng’ Musa che kiga koib lagokab Israel kobunji boisietab otisiet ne bo ole tilil
Exodus36:4 Ak kinyo chi tugul kometo boisiennyi ne koyaei
Exodus36:5 Ak king’alalji ichek Musa kolenji
Exodus36:6 Ak king’at Musa anyun kemwaitaat eng’ nganaset komugul kele
Exodus36:7 Amu kiga koyam keyae boisionoto tuguk che kiga keib
Exodus36:8 Ak kiyai chi age tugul ne ng’om eng’ ichek che boisiei
Exodus36:9 Ki kakwautik che bo eut tiptem ak sisiit koindab ngoriet age tugul
Exodus36:10 Ak kiropchindos ngoroik mut: ak kiropchindos chun alak mut agichek
Exodus36:11 Ak kinapchi inendet belelutik che tuuen ne nyalil eng’ tabandab ngoriet age eng’ ole kurmanat
Exodus36:12 Kinapchi ngoriet age belelutik konom
Exodus36:13 Ak kiyai karik che kiname ngoroik konom che bo tahabu
Exodus36:14 Ak kiyai ngoroik che bo kororikab ng’ororek koek emait ne tuge got: kiyai ngoroik taman ak aeng’.
Exodus36:15 Kiek kakwautik sosom che bo eut koindab ngoriet age tugul
Exodus36:16 Ak kiituiyo ngoroik mut koek agenge ichegei
Exodus36:17 Ak kinapchi belelutik konom tabandab ngoriet age ne tabanu barak
Exodus36:18 Ak kiitany karik che kiname ngoroik konom che bo sugunonik che ituiye emait
Exodus36:19 Ak kinab ngoroikab mengichik che kigisal kobirbiritu
Exodus36:20 Ak kiyai baoinik che bo ketikab shita kobunji got
Exodus36:21 Koindab baoiyot age tugul ko ki kakwautik taman che bo eut
Exodus36:22 Kitinyei baoiyot age tugul ng’elyebwek aeng’ che kituiyo: kiyai ko u noto baoinik tugul che bo got.
Exodus36:23 Ak kiyai baoinik che bo got; kiinde choto tiptem kotaban murot ne bo tai:
Exodus36:24 ak kibarbar feda kosikyi kong’ik artam
Exodus36:25 Ak komosta age ne bo aeng’ ne bo got
Exodus36:26 ak kong’ichoto artam che bo feda
Exodus36:27 Kiyai anyun baoinik lo kobunji got batai
Exodus36:28 Ak kiyai baoinik aeng’ kobunji luukwek che bo got che mi batai.
Exodus36:29 Ak kigitwakyin aeng’ koboch ng’ony agoi barak
Exodus36:30 Ak kimi baoinik sisitu
Exodus36:31 Ak kiyai ketikab shita koek rateiywek; kiyai baoinik mut che bo komosta agenge ne bo got
Exodus36:32 ak rateiywek mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta age ne bo got
Exodus36:33 Ak kiyai rateiywotab kwen kwo kong’eete tabani agoi tabani
Exodus36:34 Ak kiiliige tahabu baoinik
Exodus36:35 Ak kiyai ngoriet ne kioiye got eng’ ne tuui ne nyalil
Exodus36:36 Ak kiyachi ngorionoto lumeiywek ang’wan che bo shita
Exodus36:37 Ak kinab ngoriet ne bo kurgetab Emait
Exodus36:38 ak lumeiywekwak mut
Exodus37:1 Ak kiyai Besalel moinget eng’ ketikab shita: kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber
Exodus37:2 ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen orit ak sang’
Exodus37:3 Ak kiitang’ji peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu luukwekwak ang’wan; kiinde aeng’ komosta age
Exodus37:4 Ak kiyai ketik che kiibe che bo shita
Exodus37:5 Ak kiirooch ketichato peteinik che mitei tabanwekab moinget
Exodus37:6 Ak kiyai keruetab rirenet eng’ tahabu che tililen: koindanyi ko ki kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber
Exodus37:7 Ak kiyai kerubisiek aeng’ eng’ tahabu; kiyae tahabu che kitanyi
Exodus37:8 kotebe kerubit age komosi ak kotebe age komosin: inaamdos keruetab rirenet ak kerubisiek eng’ tabanwekyik tuwai.
Exodus37:9 Ak kiito kerubisiek kebebaikwak koba barak
Exodus37:10 Ak kiyai meset eng’ ketikab shita: koindanyi ko ki kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut
Exodus37:11 Ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen
Exodus37:12 Ak kiyachi tegeleiywot ne yamei eut agenge tebeesindanyi koyiem kioto
Exodus37:13 Ak kiitang’ji peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu
Exodus37:14 Kimi peteinichoto ole negite tegeleiywot
Exodus37:15 Ak kiyai ketichato eng’ ketikab shita
Exodus37:16 Ak kiyai eng’ tahabu che tililen tuguk che kimi meset barak
Exodus37:17 Ak kiitany keldab tait eng’ tahabu che tililen: kiyae keloto bo tait tahabu che kitanyi
Exodus37:18 ak kisage temenik lo toloato; kisage temenik somogu komostanyi age ne bo keloto
Exodus37:19 kitinyei temet agenge kikombok somok che kigiyai koigei taptok che kiguure almond
Exodus37:20 Ak kimitei ole bo toloita inendet kikombok ang’wanu
Exodus37:21 Ak ye kisage temenik aeng’u
Exodus37:22 Kinamgei mulonokwak ak temenikwak
Exodus37:23 Ak kiyai taisiekyik koek tisab
Exodus37:24 Kiyai kioto eng’ tahabu che yamei talentait agenge
Exodus37:25 Ak kiyai kapkorosut ole kibeele nyamdutik eng’ ketikab shita: ki kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut koindanyi
Exodus37:26 Ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen
Exodus37:27 Ak kiitany peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus37:28 Ak kiyai ketik che kiibe
Exodus37:29 Ak kichob mwaita ne tilil ne kiilse
Exodus38:1 Ak kiyai kaptisisiet ole kibeele tiseiywek eng’ ketikab shita: koindanyi ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut
Exodus38:2 Ak kiyai kosikyi kuinoik eng’ luukwekyik ang’wan; kigitany kuinoikyik konamgei ak kioto: ak kiiliige sugunwet.
Exodus38:3 Ak kiitany tuguk tugul che bo kaptisisiet
Exodus38:4 Ak kiyachi kaptisiet sugunonik che kiregeri
Exodus38:5 Ak kiitang’ji peteinik ang’wan luukwek ang’wan che bo kioto bo sugunwet ne kigireger
Exodus38:6 Ak kiyai ketichato eng’ shita
Exodus38:7 Ak kiirooch ketichato peteinik orit che mi komoswekab kaptisisiet si kobiit ketandane; kiyai kioto koek moinget orit.
Exodus38:8 Ak kiitany tabet ne bo sugunwet
Exodus38:9 Ak kiyai seremut ne ng’otat: ki bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila
Exodus38:10 ki tiptem lumeiywekwak
Exodus38:11 Ak kimi ngoroik murot katam che yamei kakwautik bogol che bo eut
Exodus38:12 Ak kimi ngoroik che yamei kakwautik konom che bo eut
Exodus38:13 Ak kitabanu komostab kong’asis ngoroik che yamei kakwautik konom che bo eut.
Exodus38:14 Ki kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut ngoroik che bo kurget komosta age; ak lumeiywekwak somok
Exodus38:15 ak kiiliige noto komosta ne bo aeng’: kimi kurget ne bo seremut komosi ak komosi ngoroik che yamei kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut
Exodus38:16 Ngoroik tugul che kiyiemei seremut ko ki bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila.
Exodus38:17 Ak ki bo sugunonik kong’ik che kitononie lumeiywek; ak ki bo feda ireusiek che bo lumeiywek koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye; ak kituge feda metowekab lumeiywechoto; ak ki bo feda rateiywek che kigituiyote lumeiywek tugul che bo seremut.
Exodus38:18 Ak kinab nabindet ne nabei kondoi lelesta
Exodus38:19 Ak ki bo sugunonik lumeiywekwak ang’wanu
Exodus38:20 Ak ki bo sugunonik tigongenik tugul che bo got ak tigongenik tugul che yiemei seremut.
Exodus38:21 Koitetab tuguk che bo got
Exodus38:22 Ak kiyai Besalel
Exodus38:23 Kimi ak inendet Oholiab
Exodus38:24 Kiek tahabu tugul che kigiboisie eng’ boisiet tugul ne bo ole tilil
Exodus38:25 Ak fedaisiekab icheget che kigiit che bo tuiyet
Exodus38:26 kigon chi tugul beka
Exodus38:27 Ak talentaisiechato bogol agenge che bo feda ko kigitanyi kobwa kong’ik che u kelongonik
Exodus38:28 Ak kiitany sekelisiek elfut agenge ak bogol tisab ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut koek ireusiek che bo lumeiywek ak kotuge feda metowekwak
Exodus38:29 ak kiyamei talentaisiek tamanwogik tisab
Exodus38:30 Ak kiitany chuto koek kong’ik che bo kurget che tononie lumeiywekab emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus38:31 ak kong’ik che tononie lumeiywekab seremut
Exodus39:1 Ak kiyai bichoto ngoroik che kigisal kogororonitu eng’ tuguk che tuuen ne nyalil
Exodus39:2 Ak kiyai epod eng’ tahabu
Exodus39:3 Ak kiitany tahabu koterteritu
Exodus39:4 Kinapchi kioto kebeberwekab tigigoik
Exodus39:5 Ak birenet ne kila ng’omotik
Exodus39:6 Ak kiwai koikab soam
Exodus39:7 Ak kiinde koichato epod ole bo tigigoik
Exodus39:8 Ak kiyai ngorietab teget
Exodus39:9 Kiaechin tebeesindo ak koindo; ak kigiliich ngorionoto bo teget koek aeng’; kiek koindanyi olobo inchisiek sogol eng’ koindo ak eng’ tebeesindo
Exodus39:10 Ak kitetyi kioto ortinwek ang’wan che bo koik: kiinde oret ne bo tai sardio
Exodus39:11 Ak kiinde oret ne bo aeng’
Exodus39:12 Ak kiinde oret ne bo somok
Exodus39:13 Ak kiinde oret ne bo ang’wan
Exodus39:14 Ak ki te koichato kainaikab lagokab Israel
Exodus39:15 Ak kinapchi ngorionoto bo teget sirimwek che u rogoonik che bo tahabu che tililen
Exodus39:16 Ak kitogul tahabu koek morik aeng’
Exodus39:17 Ak kiirookto sirimwechoto aeng’ bo tahabu
Exodus39:18 Ak kinam komoswechun alak aeng’ che bo sirimwechoto aeng’ kigilet
Exodus39:19 Ak kiyai peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus39:20 Ak kiyai peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu
Exodus39:21 Ak kiigiich ichek ngorietab teget eng’ peteinikyik
Exodus39:22 Ak kinab ngoriet ne kiroochegei
Exodus39:23 ak kinab ngorionoto kwen ole chutei metit
Exodus39:24 Ak kinapchi ngorionoto tabandab kel logoek che tuuen ne nyalil
Exodus39:25 Ak kiitany chepchingilok che bo tahabu che tililen
Exodus39:26 ye kiinde chepchingiliet
Exodus39:27 Ak kinab ngoroik che koen che bo katanit ne kararan che kigila
Exodus39:28 ak chepkulet ne bo katanit ne kararan
Exodus39:29 ak birenet ne bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila
Exodus39:30 Ak kiitany kit ne kergei ak eurto eng’ nariet ne tilil
Exodus39:31 Ak kiratyi rogoet ne tuui ne nyalil
Exodus39:32 Kiigesgei anyun boisionik tugul che bo gotab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa; kiyai ko u noto.
Exodus39:33 Ak kiipchi ichek got Musa
Exodus39:34 ak emaitab magatokab mengichik
Exodus39:35 ak moingetab baornatet
Exodus39:36 ak meset
Exodus39:37 ak keldo ne tilil ne bo tait
Exodus39:38 ak kapkorosutab tahabu
Exodus39:39 ak kaptisisietab sugunwet
Exodus39:40 ak ngoroik che songinindos che bo serumut
Exodus39:41 ak ngoroik che kigisal kogororonitu si keboisie eng’ ole tilil
Exodus39:42 Kiyai anyun lagokab Israel boisiet tugul ne king’at Jehovah Musa.
Exodus39:43 Ak kigeer Musa boisionichoto tugul
Exodus40:1 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji
Exodus40:2 Lumde goyoto bo emait ne kituiyechin eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet ne bo tai.
Exodus40:3 Ak inde moingetab baornatet got orit
Exodus40:4 Ak ibu meset inde go
Exodus40:5 Ak inde kapkorosut ne bo tahabu ne kibeele nyamdutik eng’ taitab moingetab baornatet
Exodus40:6 Ak inde kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek taitab kurgetab goyoto bo emait ne kituiyechin.
Exodus40:7 Ak inde tabet ne kiunse kwenutab emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisiet
Exodus40:8 Ak lumde ng’otwetab seremut kot kotuiyo
Exodus40:9 Ak iib mwanik che kiilse
Exodus40:10 Ak iil kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek
Exodus40:11 Ak iil tabet ne kiunse
Exodus40:12 Ak imutu Aron ak werikyik kobwa kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:13 Ak ilaakyi Aron ngoroik che kigitaban; ak iil inendet
Exodus40:14 Ak imutu werikyik
Exodus40:15 ak iil ichek
Exodus40:16 Kiyai anyun Musa ko u noto: ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah inendet
Exodus40:17 Ak kigilumda goyoto eng’ arawet ne bo tai eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet.
Exodus40:18 Ak kilumda Musa anyun got
Exodus40:19 Kiito anyun emait eng’ got barak
Exodus40:20 Yeityo koib baornatet konde moinget orit
Exodus40:21 ak kiib inendet moinget kwo go orit
Exodus40:22 Ak kiinde meset got ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:23 Ak kitet makatinik eng’ meset eng’ taitab Jehovah: kou ye king’at Jehovah Musa.
Exodus40:24 Ak kiinde keldab tait emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:25 Ak kiinaam taisiek eng’ taitab Jehovah; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa.
Exodus40:26 Ak kiinde kapkorosut ne bo tahabu got ne kituiyechin eng’ goyoto sib kemong’jin:
Exodus40:27 ak kibeele kapkorosunoto nyamdutik che bo tuguk che ng’uu ne anyin; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa.
Exodus40:28 Yeityo kosonginin ngoriet eng’ kurgetab got.
Exodus40:29 Ak kiinde kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek eng’ kurgetab got ne bo emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:30 Ak kiinde tabet ne kiunse kwenutab emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisiet
Exodus40:31 Ak kiiun Musa ak Aron ak werikyik eunekwak ak kelyekwak eng’ kioto;
Exodus40:32 kiiuni ko u noto ye kimandoi emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:33 Ak kilumda ng’otwetab seremut koyiem got ak kaptisisiet
Exodus40:34 Kinyo kotuch anyun boldet emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:35 Ak kima imuch Musa komanda emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:36 Ak ye kingetogostae boldet eng’ goyoto
Exodus40:37 ago ye kima kitogostae boldet
Exodus40:38 Amu kitebe boldetab Jehovah got barak bet
Leviticus1:1 Kiguur Jehovah Musa ak kong’alalji eng’ emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus1:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Leviticus1:3 Ngo kagochinennyi ko bo tiseiywot ne kibeelei ne bo tuga
Leviticus1:4 Ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinonoto kibeelei; ak ketaach noto agobo inendet si kobiit keyachi inendet kagaigaet.
Leviticus1:5 Ak koeny kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak koib korotik tisiik
Leviticus1:6 Ak koeny kagochinonoto kibeelei
Leviticus1:7 Ingonde mat kaptisisiet werikab Aron tisiindet ak kotetyi kwenik ma:
Leviticus1:8 ye ibata kotet tisiik werikab Aron
Leviticus1:9 ago ingoun eng’ beek tugukab ke koboto kelyekyik: ak kobeel tisiindet kirgoto komugul eng’ kaptisisiet
Leviticus1:10 Ak ngo bo nego kagochinennyi
Leviticus1:11 Ak ingoeny eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ kaptisisiet ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam: ye ibata koisote korotik tisiik werikab Aron
Leviticus1:12 Yeityo kosach banyek
Leviticus1:13 ago ingoun tugukab ke ak kelyek eng’ beek: ak ingogoito tisiindet banyek tugul
Leviticus1:14 Ak ngo bo taritik kagochinennyi ne kigoitoi kebeel
Leviticus1:15 Yeityo koib tisiindet konyo kaptisisiet; ak koiiny kaatinnyi kong’et metit
Leviticus1:16 ak konem kebonjorennyi ak kororikyik
Leviticus1:17 ak kogerer kopcheune aeng’ kebebaikyik
Leviticus2:1 Ak ye igoitoi chi age tugul kagochinet ne bo busiek ne igochin Jehovah
Leviticus2:2 ak koipchi inendet werikab Aron tisiik: ak komugut konyi eut busiechoto tambulul
Leviticus2:3 ak kobunji Aron ak werikyik che kang’et eng’ kagochinet ne bo busiek: tilil mising’ nito kot kosiir
Leviticus2:4 Ak ye igoitoi inye kagochinet ne bo busiek che kiwatani eng’ ma
Leviticus2:5 Ak ngo kagochineng’ung’ ko kagochinet ne bo busiek che kagiwatan eng’ karnet ne lebel
Leviticus2:6 Ak itilate komengegitu
Leviticus2:7 Ak ngo bo busiek kagochineng’ung’ che kagiwatan eng’ tabetab karnet
Leviticus2:8 Ak iipchi Jehovah kagochinetab busiek che kagechob eng’ tuguchuto: si keipchi tisiindet
Leviticus2:9 Yeityo konem tisiindet che bo kabwatet eng’ kagochinonoto bo busiek
Leviticus2:10 Ak kobunji Aron ak werikyik choto kong’et eng’ kagochinetab busiek: tilil mising’ nito kot kosiir
Leviticus2:11 Amat onde mermerek kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek ne ogochini Jehovah: amu mobeele mermerek
Leviticus2:12 Ogochini Jehovah
Leviticus2:13 Ak inde munyuk kagochineng’ung’ age tugul ne bo busiek; amengorartae kagochinetab busiek munyuk che bo kayomisetab Kamuktaindeng’ung’: igoitoi munyuk koboto kagochinoiguk tugul.
Leviticus2:14 Ak ngigochi Jehovah kagochinetab busiek che bo tongoanik
Leviticus2:15 Ak irong’ji mwaita
Leviticus2:16 Ak kobeel tisiindet kabwatet ne bo noto
Leviticus3:1 Ak ngo kagochinennyi ko tiseiywotab kalyet; ingogoitoi ne bo tuga
Leviticus3:2 Ye ibata kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinennyi
Leviticus3:3 Ak igoitoi inendet eng’ tiseiywotab kalyet kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat; mwanik che kiilaach moet
Leviticus3:4 ak soromokyik tuwai koboto mwanikwak
Leviticus3:5 Ak kobeel werikab Aron choto eng’ kaptisisiet konde baragutab tiseiywot ne kibeelei
Leviticus3:6 Ak ngo bo nego kagochinennyi ne bo tiseiywotab kalyet ne ipchin Jehovah; ngo mengit anan kwesta
Leviticus3:7 Ak ngogoitoi mengit koek kagochinennyi
Leviticus3:8 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinennyi
Leviticus3:9 Ak kogoito che bo tiseiywotab kalyet koek kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah; mwanikyik
Leviticus3:10 ak soromok tuwai
Leviticus3:11 Ak kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet: choto amitwogikab kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat.
Leviticus3:12 Ak ngo bo ng’ororiet kagochinennyi
Leviticus3:13 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab ng’ororianato
Leviticus3:14 Ak igochin inendet Jehovah eng’ choto kagochinet ne bunei mat; mwanik che kiilaach moet
Leviticus3:15 ak soromok tuwai
Leviticus3:16 Ak kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet; amitwogikab kagochinet chuto
Leviticus3:17 Egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul
Leviticus4:1 King’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus4:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus4:3 ak ngo yai tengekto tisiindet ne kigiil kot koipchi bik ng’ogisto: ingogoito anyun kirgit ne neran ne libwob kogochi Jehovah
Leviticus4:4 Ak ingoget kirgoto konyo kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin eng’ taitab Jehovah
Leviticus4:5 Ak kotaach tisiindet ne kigiil korotikab kirgoto
Leviticus4:6 yeityo korooch mornennyi korotik
Leviticus4:7 Ye ibata konde tisiindet alak eng’ korotichoto kuinoikab kapkorosut ne bo nyamdutik che ng’uu ne anyin
Leviticus4:8 Ak kobut mwanik tugul che bo kirgoto bo kagochinetab tengekto; mwanik che kiilaach moet
Leviticus4:9 koboto soromok tuwai
Leviticus4:10 ko u ye kibutei che bo kirgit ne tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet: yeityo kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet ne kibeele kagochinoik.
Leviticus4:11 Ak muitab kirgoto
Leviticus4:12 ingoib kirgoto komugul kwo komosta ne tilil eng’ sang’utab nganaset
Leviticus4:13 Ak ngo lel tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel
Leviticus4:14 ak ye kagonaak lelutionoto kayai
Leviticus4:15 Ak ingogonoor boisiekab tuiyet eunekwak metitab kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah; yeityo kebar kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Leviticus4:16 Ye ibata koib tisiindet ne kigiil korotikab kirgoto kobwa emait ne kituiyechin:
Leviticus4:17 ak korooch tisiindet mornennyi korotik
Leviticus4:18 Yeityo konde korotichoto alak kuinoikab kapkorosut ne mitei taitab Jehovah
Leviticus4:19 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul
Leviticus4:20 Ingoyachi ko u noto kirgoto; ko u ye kiyachi kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus4:21 Ak ingola inendet kirgit kwo sang’utab nganaset
Leviticus4:22 Ak ye kalel bounindet
Leviticus4:23 ak ngiborji inendet tengektanyi ne kiyai
Leviticus4:24 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab ng’ororianato
Leviticus4:25 Ak konam tisiindet korotichoto bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus4:26 Ak kobeel mwanikyik tugul eng’ kaptisisiet
Leviticus4:27 Ngo lel chi age tugul ne bo tuiyet
Leviticus4:28 ak ngiborji inendet tengektanyi ne koyai koget anyun ng’ororiet koek kagochinennyi
Leviticus4:29 Ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinonoto bo tengekto
Leviticus4:30 Ak konam tisiindet korotikab artanato eng’ mornennyi
Leviticus4:31 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul
Leviticus4:32 Ngo kagochinennyi ne bo tengekto ko kechiriet
Leviticus4:33 Ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinonoto bo tengekto
Leviticus4:34 Ak konam tisiindet korotichoto bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus4:35 ak kobut mwanikyik tugul
Leviticus5:1 Ak ngo yai chi age tugul tengek
Leviticus5:2 anan ngo twa chi age tugul kiy age tugul ne ng’wan ne kame
Leviticus5:3 anan ngo twa muruonindab chi
Leviticus5:4 anan ngoyosio chi eng’ kutinnyi kosartae
Leviticus5:5 ak ye kagonam inendet tengekto eng’ age eng’ tuguchoto
Leviticus5:6 ak koib kagochinetab chalwoktanyi
Leviticus5:7 Ak ngo maimuchi koal aruet ne bunu akwet
Leviticus5:8 Ak ingoipchi choto tisiindet
Leviticus5:9 yeityo koise korotikab kagochinetab tengekto tabandab kaptisisiet; ak kosochi korotik che kang’et kaptisisiet kel: nito kagochinetab tengekto.
Leviticus5:10 Ak kogoito ne bo aeng’ koek kagochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus5:11 Ak ngo maimuchi koal cheptugenik aeng’
Leviticus5:12 Ak koipchi tisiindet
Leviticus5:13 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet amu tengektanyi ne koyai eng’ age tugul eng’ choto
Leviticus5:14 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus5:15 Ngo yai chi age tugul chalwokto
Leviticus5:16 ak igeeri noto king’em
Leviticus5:17 Ak ngo yai chi age tugul tengek
Leviticus5:18 Ak koget anyun mengit ne libwob ne bunu akwetab kechirek
Leviticus5:19 Nito kagochinetab chalwokto: kigonam inendet iman chalwokto eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Leviticus6:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus6:2 Ngo yai chi age tugul tengek
Leviticus6:3 anan ngonyor kiy ne kibet
Leviticus6:4 koek anyun
Leviticus6:5 anan kiy age tugul ne kiiyosio eng’ lembech agobo kioto; ingoweekta kogesta
Leviticus6:6 Ak kogetyi Jehovah kagochinennyi ne bo chalwokto
Leviticus6:7 ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah
Leviticus6:8 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus6:9 Ng’at Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus6:10 Ak ingolaach tisiindet ngoriennyi ne bo katanit
Leviticus6:11 Yeityo koreek ngoroikyik
Leviticus6:12 Ak ingerib mat ne mi kaptisisiet
Leviticus6:13 Ingorib mat kolal kotugul eng’ kaptisisiet; amat kemeto kome.
Leviticus6:14 Ak ni ng’atutietab kagochinetab busiek: igoitoi werikab Aron eng’ taitab Jehovah
Leviticus6:15 Ak ingomugut chechik konyi eut eng’ busiek che tambulul che bo kagochinetab busiek
Leviticus6:16 Ak koam Aron ak werikyik che kong’etune choto; kiamei ama kinde mermerek eng’ komosta ne tilil; ingoam eng’ seremutab emait ne kituiyechin.
Leviticus6:17 Magibeelei koboto mermerek. Kaagoite noto koek kebebertanywa eng’ kagochinoikyuk che bunei mat; tilil nito mising’
Leviticus6:18 Amei choto age tugul ne muren eng’ lagokab Aron
Leviticus6:19 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus6:20 Ni kagochinetab Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus6:21 Kiwatani koboto mwaita eng’ karnet ne lebel; ak ye kagotuiyo komie ak mwaita
Leviticus6:22 Ak igoitoi tisiindet ne kigiil eng’ werikyik
Leviticus6:23 Ak kibeelei kogesgei kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek ne bo tisiindet: magiamei.
Leviticus6:24 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus6:25 Mwachi Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus6:26 Amei tisiindet ne igoitoi agobo tengekto: kiamei eng’ komosta ne itabanat
Leviticus6:27 Tililitu kiy age tugul ne twaei banyechato: ak ye kasachi korotikab kioto ngor age tugul
Leviticus6:28 Ago kituei teret ne kagiyoe banyechato: ak ngo kagiyoe teretab sugunwet
Leviticus6:29 Amei age tugul ne muren eng’ tisiik
Leviticus6:30 Magiamei kagochinet age tugul ne bo tengekto
Leviticus7:1 Ni ng’atutietab kagochinetab chalwokto: tilil nito mising’.
Leviticus7:2 Kieng’e kagochinetab chalwokto ole kieng’e kagochinet ne kibeelei: ak koise korotikyik kaptisisiet komoswek tugul.
Leviticus7:3 Ak igoitoi inendet eng’ banyechato mwanikyik tugul; saruriet
Leviticus7:4 ak soromok tuwai
Leviticus7:5 ak kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet koek kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat: nito kagochinetab chalwokto.
Leviticus7:6 Amei mureno age tugul eng’ tisiik banyechato: kiamei eng’ komosta ne tilil: tilil nito mising’.
Leviticus7:7 Ko u ole teptoi kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus7:8 Tisiindet ne igoitoi kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo chi age tugul
Leviticus7:9 Bunjin tisiindet ne igoitoi kagochinet
Leviticus7:10 Ak kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek
Leviticus7:11 Ni ng’atutietab tiseiywotab kagochinoik che bo kalyet
Leviticus7:12 Ngogoitoi agobo kongoi
Leviticus7:13 Igoitoi kagochinennyi koboto makatinik che mengechen che kaginde mermerek
Leviticus7:14 Ak igoitoi agenge eng’ choto ne bunu kagochinet age tugul
Leviticus7:15 Kiamei banyekab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet
Leviticus7:16 Ago ngo kayosiet tiseiywotab kagochinennyi
Leviticus7:17 ago che kong’etune banyekab tiseiywot kot koit betutab somok
Leviticus7:18 Ak ngeam banyekab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet eng’ betutab somok
Leviticus7:19 Ak magiamei banyek che katwa kiy age tugul ne ng’wan; kibeelei eng’ ma. Ak amei banyechato age tugul ne tilil.
Leviticus7:20 Ago chito ne amei banyekab tiseiywotab kagochinoik che bo kalyet
Leviticus7:21 Ak ye katwa chi age tugul kiy ne ng’wan
Leviticus7:22 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus7:23 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus7:24 Ak kimuchi keboisie eng’ boision alak
Leviticus7:25 Amu age tugul ne amei mwaitab tany
Leviticus7:26 Amat oam korotik alak tugul
Leviticus7:27 King’etoi eng’ bikyik chi age tugul ne eei korotik alak tugul.
Leviticus7:28 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus7:29 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus7:30 ibu inendet eng’ eunekyik kagochinoikab Jehovah che bunei mat; ibu mwanik koboto tagatet
Leviticus7:31 Yeityo kobeel tisiindet mwanik eng’ kaptisisiet: ago bunjin Aron ak werikyik tagatet.
Leviticus7:32 Ak ogochi tisiindet chatit ne bo komostab tai koek kagochinet ne kinamji barak
Leviticus7:33 Ibei inendet eng’ werikab Aron ne igoitoi korotikab kagochinoikab kalyet
Leviticus7:34 Amu kaataach eng’ lagokab Israel kagochinetab tagatet ne kiongoi
Leviticus7:35 Nito kebebertab kaiilset ne bo Aron
Leviticus7:36 che king’at Jehovah lagokab Israel kole kigochi
Leviticus7:37 Nito ng’atutietab kagochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus7:38 che king’at Jehovah Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai
Leviticus8:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus8:2 Imut Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus8:3 ak iyum tuiyet komugul eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin.
Leviticus8:4 Ak kiyai Musa anyun ko u ye king’at Jehovah; ak kiiyumjigei tuiyet kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin.
Leviticus8:5 Ak kilenji Musa tuiyet
Leviticus8:6 Ak kiimut Musa Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus8:7 Ak kiilaakyi inendet ngoriet ne koi
Leviticus8:8 Ak kiilaakyi inendet ngorietab teget: ak kiinde ngorionoto Urim ak Tumim.
Leviticus8:9 Ak kigerji metit eng’ nariet; ak kiinde narianato ole bo togoch eurto ne bo tahabu
Leviticus8:10 Ak kinam Musa mwaita ne kiilse
Leviticus8:11 Ak kiisochinot mwaata kapkorosut konyil tisab
Leviticus8:12 Yeityo korong’ji mwaita ne kiilse metitab Aron
Leviticus8:13 Ak kiimut Musa werikab Aron
Leviticus8:14 Ak kiget kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto: ak kiigonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab kirgoto bo kagochinetab tengekto.
Leviticus8:15 Ak kieny kirgoto; ak kitaach Musa korotik
Leviticus8:16 Ak kibut sunetik tugul che bo mo
Leviticus8:17 Ago kibeel kirgit
Leviticus8:18 Ak kikweri mengitab kagochinet ne kibeelei: ak kiigonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto.
Leviticus8:19 Ak koeny: ak kiise Musa korotik kaptisisiet komoswek tugul.
Leviticus8:20 Ak kitilat mengoto kosach
Leviticus8:21 Ak kiiun eng’ beek tugukab ke ak kelyek; ak kibeel Musa mengoto komugul eng’ kaptisisiet; ki kagochinet noto ne kibeelei koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny: ki kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa.
Leviticus8:22 Ak kikweri mengit nin age
Leviticus8:23 Ak koeny; ak kitaach Musa korotikab mengoto
Leviticus8:24 Yeityo komut werikab Aron
Leviticus8:25 Ak kibut mwanik
Leviticus8:26 Ak kiinem eng’ aterut ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek
Leviticus8:27 Ak kiinde tugul eunekab Aron
Leviticus8:28 Ak kiinem Musa tuguchoto eng’ eunekwak
Leviticus8:29 Yeityo koib Musa tagatet
Leviticus8:30 Kiinem Musa kebebertab mwaata kiilse
Leviticus8:31 Ak kilenji Musa Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus8:32 Ak obeel eng’ ma banyek ak makatinik che kang’et.
Leviticus8:33 Ak momandoi eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin eng’ betusiek tisab
Leviticus8:34 Ko u ye kageyai rani
Leviticus8:35 Ak otebe kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin betusiek tisab bet ak kemoi
Leviticus8:36 Kiyai anyun Aron ak werikyik tuguk tugul che king’at Jehovah eng’ Musa.
Leviticus9:1 Ak eng’ betutab sisiit
Leviticus9:2 ak kolenji Aron
Leviticus9:3 Ak ng’alalji lagokab Israel
Leviticus9:4 ak kirgit ak mengit kobunji kagochinoikab kalyet
Leviticus9:5 Ak kiget choto king’at Musa kobwa taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kibwa tuiyet komugul korik
Leviticus9:6 Ak kimwa Musa kole
Leviticus9:7 Ak kilenji Musa Aron
Leviticus9:8 Ak kirikyi anyun Aron kaptisisiet
Leviticus9:9 Yeityo kogochi werikyik Aron
Leviticus9:10 ago kibeel mwanik
Leviticus9:11 Ak kibeel eng’ ma banyek ak muito eng’ sang’utab nganaset.
Leviticus9:12 Ak kieny kagochinet ne kibeelei; ak kiib werikyik korotik koba ole mi Aron
Leviticus9:13 Ak kiipchi inendet kagochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus9:14 Ak kiun tugukab ke ak kelyek
Leviticus9:15 Ak kiigoito inendet kagochinetab bik
Leviticus9:16 Yeityo kogoito kagochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus9:17 Ak kiigoito kagochinetab busiek
Leviticus9:18 Ak kieny kirgit koboto mengit
Leviticus9:19 ak mwanikab kirgit
Leviticus9:20 ak kiigonoor mwanichoto tagatok
Leviticus9:21 ak kiongoi Aron tagatok ak chatit ne bo komostab tai koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah; ko u ye king’at Musa.
Leviticus9:22 Ak kiito Aron eunekyik kotokyi ole mi bik
Leviticus9:23 Ak kiba Musa ak Aron emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus9:24 Ak kimong’ mat kobunu taitab Jehovah
Leviticus10:1 Ak kinam Nadab ak Abiu werikab Aron chi tugul terennyi
Leviticus10:2 Ak kimong’ mat ne kibun taitab Jehovah
Leviticus10:3 Kilenji Musa anyun Aron
Leviticus10:4 Ak kiguur Musa anyun Misael ak Elsapan
Leviticus10:5 Ak kirik anyun bichoto
Leviticus10:6 Ak kilenji Musa Aron
Leviticus10:7 Ak amomande eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus10:8 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Aron kolenji
Leviticus10:9 Amat iee divaik anan maiyek alak tugul
Leviticus10:10 si kobiit obesie che itabanotin ak che maitabanotin
Leviticus10:11 si kobiit onet lagokab Israel ng’atutik tugul che kigomwachi Jehovah ichek eng’ Musa.
Leviticus10:12 Ak kilenji Musa Aron
Leviticus10:13 ak oam eng’ ole tilil
Leviticus10:14 Ak oam eng’ komosta ne tilil tagatet ne kiongoi ak chatit ne kinamjin barak; inye ak weriguk
Leviticus10:15 Ibu ichek chatit ne kinamjin barak ak tagatet ne kiongoi koboto kagochinoik che bunei mat che bo mwanik
Leviticus10:16 Ak kicheng’ Musa mising’ ng’ororiet ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus10:17 Amu nee si moam kagochinetab tengekto eng’ ole tilil
Leviticus10:18 Ogeero
Leviticus10:19 Ak kilenji Aron Musa
Leviticus10:20 Ak ye kingogas Musa noto
Leviticus11:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Leviticus11:2 Omwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus11:3 Oame age tugul ne pcheotin siok
Leviticus11:4 Ago moame chu eng’ ichek che itari baroi anan eng’ ichek che pcheotin siok: tambesik
Leviticus11:5 Ak keneriet
Leviticus11:6 Ak kiblengwet
Leviticus11:7 Ak toret
Leviticus11:8 Amat oam banyekwak
Leviticus11:9 Oame chu eng’ che mi beek: age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak berik eng’ beek
Leviticus11:10 Ak tugul che matinyei kebebaik ak berik eng’ nyanjosiek
Leviticus11:11 ak ingoek choto che kiwechei eng’ okwek; amat oam banyekwak
Leviticus11:12 Age tugul ne matinyei kebebaik ak berik eng’ beek
Leviticus11:13 Ak owech chu eng’ taritik; magiamei chuto
Leviticus11:14 ak chesireret
Leviticus11:15 ak chepkugit age tugul ak che kergei;
Leviticus11:16 ak tiondab songolik
Leviticus11:17 ak sugurut ne ming’in
Leviticus11:18 ak sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik
Leviticus11:19 ak kong’onyot
Leviticus11:20 Egu che kiwechei eng’ okwek tiong’ik tugul che tinyei kebebaik
Leviticus11:21 Ago omuchi oam chu
Leviticus11:22 omuchi oam agot chu eng’ ichek; chereng’endet
Leviticus11:23 Ago egu che kiwechei eng’ okwek alak tugul che tinyei kebebaik che ing’oniote kelyek ang’wan.
Leviticus11:24 Ak omuruonitu eng’ tuguchoto: muruonitu age tugul ne twaei bortab tionyoto kagome
Leviticus11:25 ak age tugul ne ibei kebebertab bortab tionyoto kagome
Leviticus11:26 Ng’wan eng’ okwek tiony age tugul ne pcheotin siok
Leviticus11:27 Ak alak tugul che bendote mugungonikwak
Leviticus11:28 Ak ingomwet ngoroikyik ne ibei bortab tionyoto kame
Leviticus11:29 Ng’wonen eng’ okwek chu eng’ che ichuutegei ng’ony: kungundo
Leviticus11:30 ak ne bo oretab chepswererit ak nyiritiet
Leviticus11:31 Chuto che ng’wonen eng’ okwek eng’ tugul che ichuutegei: muruonitu age tugul ne twaei ne kagome eng’ choto
Leviticus11:32 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne ibutyin ne kagome eng’ choto
Leviticus11:33 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne mi oritab teretab ng’ung’unyek
Leviticus11:34 Ak ng’wonegitu amitwogik alak tugul che kechobei eng’ beek: ak ng’wonegitu tuguk alak tugul che kieei che mi age tugul eng’ terenichoto.
Leviticus11:35 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne ibutyin kebebertab borto ne bo tiondo ne kagome; ngo kapkoimaut
Leviticus11:36 Ago tililitu konda ne kutune beek anan keringet ne mi beek: ago muruonitu ne twaei bortab tiondo ne kame.
Leviticus11:37 Ak ngobutyi beny age tugul ne bo tionyoto kame
Leviticus11:38 Ago nginur keswechoto
Leviticus11:39 Ak ngo me tiony age tugul ne oame: muruonitu inendet ne twaei bortab tionyoto
Leviticus11:40 Ak ingomwet ngoroikyik ne amei banyekab noto kame
Leviticus11:41 Egu eng’ okwek ne kiwechei kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony; magiamei.
Leviticus11:42 Kiy age tugul ne ichuute moet ng’ony ak ne bunei kelyek ang’wan
Leviticus11:43 Amoegu che kiwechei eng’ kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony
Leviticus11:44 Amu ane Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: otabange anyun
Leviticus11:45 Amu ane Jehovah ne kiamutwak otogosu omong’une emetab Misri
Leviticus11:46 Ni ng’atutiet anyun
Leviticus11:47 si kobiit kobesio che ng’wonen ak che ma ng’wonen
Leviticus12:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus12:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus12:3 Ak kimuratani iririotab bortab weroto eng’ betut ne bo sisiit.
Leviticus12:4 Ingotebe kwonyoto korotikab katililennyi betusiek sosom ak somok; matwaei kiy age tugul ne itabanat
Leviticus12:5 Ago ngo sich chepto
Leviticus12:6 Ak ye kagogesgei betusiekab katililennyi
Leviticus12:7 ak kogoito inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah
Leviticus12:8 Ak ngo maimuchi koal kwonyoto aruetab kechir
Leviticus13:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Leviticus13:2 Ngobwa iririotab bortab chi
Leviticus13:3 ak kogeer tisiindet koroyoto mitei iririotab borto: ak ngo kogowalak kororik che mi koroyoto koleelagitu
Leviticus13:4 Ak ngo leel ngosiat ne mi iririotab bortanyi
Leviticus13:5 ak kogeer tisiindet inendet eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngo keer kole ta ko u yegonye koroyoto
Leviticus13:6 ak kogeer tisiindet inendet kogeny eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngo machei kola
Leviticus13:7 Ago ngonender moet eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:8 ak kogeer tisiindet
Leviticus13:9 Ye kagonam chito miandab mogondos
Leviticus13:10 ak kogeer anyun tisiindet
Leviticus13:11 ko mogondosik che kigoamei keny iririotab bortanyi
Leviticus13:12 Ak ngo mong’une mogondosik ola tugul eng’ iririonnyi
Leviticus13:13 kogeer anyun tisiindet; ak ogeero
Leviticus13:14 Ago eng’ betut ne katook banyek ko u yegonye
Leviticus13:15 Ak kogeer tisiindet banyechato
Leviticus13:16 Ak ngowalak banyek kogeny kowalogis koleelagitu
Leviticus13:17 ak kogeer tisiindet inendet: ak ogeero
Leviticus13:18 Ak ngo biitune iririotab borto ondiriet
Leviticus13:19 ak ngo biitune ole kami ondiriet
Leviticus13:20 ak kogeer tisiindet ak ogeero
Leviticus13:21 Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole mami kororik che leelach
Leviticus13:22 ak ngonenderi eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:23 Ago ngo matesak ngosiandanato konender
Leviticus13:24 Anan ye tinyei borto ole kolal eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:25 kogeer anyun tisiindet kioto: ak ngo kogowalak kororik koleelagitu
Leviticus13:26 Ago ngo keer tisiindet kole
Leviticus13:27 ak kogeer tisiindet anyun inendet kogeny eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngonenderi eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:28 Ak ngo matesak ngosiandanato konender eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:29 Ak ye tinyei mureno anan kobogorio koroito eng’ metit anan ko eng’ tamnet
Leviticus13:30 kogeer anyun tisiindet koroyoto: ak ngo keer ko lolondoot eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:31 Ak ngo keer tisiindet moanato u kacheet
Leviticus13:32 ak kogeer tisiindet koroyoto eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngo ma tesoksei moanato
Leviticus13:33 kicherji anyun metit
Leviticus13:34 ak eng’ betut ne bo tisab kogeer tisiindet moanato: ak ngo ma tesoksei moet eng’ iririot
Leviticus13:35 Ago ngo tesak moet eng’ iririot ko kagobata katililennyi;
Leviticus13:36 kogeer anyun tisiindet inendet: ak ogeero
Leviticus13:37 Ago ngo keer kole ma tesoksei kachaanato
Leviticus13:38 Ak ye tinyei mureno anan kobogorio ole ibwanat ne u ngosenik eng’ iririotab borwekwak
Leviticus13:39 kogeer anyun tisiindet: ak ogeero
Leviticus13:40 Ak ngo chur metitab chi
Leviticus13:41 Ago ngo chur metit ole bo togoch
Leviticus13:42 Ago ngo mitei miando ne iboru leelindo ne birir eng’ bosta anan eng’ togoch; noto ko mogondosik che komong’une bostanyi anan ko togennyi.
Leviticus13:43 Kogeer anyun tisiindet inendet: ak ogeero
Leviticus13:44 inendet ko chi ne bo mogondos
Leviticus13:45 Kibetei ngoroikab ne amei mogondosik
Leviticus13:46 Muruonitu inendet betusiek tugul kote koamei mianoto; muruon inendet: ak komeng’is inegei; mi sang’utab nganaset meng’otennyi.
Leviticus13:47 Kiborjin tisiindet ngoriet ne mi koroitab mogondosik
Leviticus13:48 anan ngo mitune usisiek che kigitoor anan che kigimur; che bo katanit
Leviticus13:49 ngo machei konyalil anan ngo machei kobirir koroyoto eng’ ngoriet
Leviticus13:50 Ak kogeer tisiindet koroyoto
Leviticus13:51 ak kogeer koroyoto eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ngonenderi koroito eng’ ngoriet
Leviticus13:52 Ak ingobeel ngorionoto anyun
Leviticus13:53 Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole ma tesoksei koroyoto eng’ ngoriet
Leviticus13:54 kong’at anyun tisiindet kole
Leviticus13:55 ak kogeer tisiindet
Leviticus13:56 Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole ma kotoogu komie koroyoto ko kagemwet
Leviticus13:57 ak ngo ta ko toogu eng’ ngoriet
Leviticus13:58 Ak ngo kogobagakta koroito ngoriet
Leviticus13:59 Nito ng’atutiet ne bo koroitab mogondosik ne mi ngorietab kororikab kechirek anan ko ne bo katanit
Leviticus14:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus14:2 Egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo chito ne amei mogondosik eng’ betut ne bo katililennyi: kimutyin inendet tisiindet:
Leviticus14:3 ak komanda tisiindet eng’ nganaset; ak kogeer tisiindet
Leviticus14:4 kong’at anyun tisiindet kole
Leviticus14:5 ak kong’at tisiindet kole kobar taritiet age eng’ teret ne bo ng’ung’unyek
Leviticus14:6 ak konam tisiindet taritiet ne sobei
Leviticus14:7 ak koise inendet ne kitilili eng’ mogondosik konyil tisab
Leviticus14:8 Ak komwet ngoroikyik chichoto kitilili
Leviticus14:9 Ak eng’ betutab tisab konem sumeekyik tugul eng’ metinnyi ak tamnennyi ak kororikab konyek
Leviticus14:10 Ak konam eng’ betut ne bo sisiit arek aeng’ che mengichik che libwoben
Leviticus14:11 Ak kogoito tisiindet ne itilili inendet
Leviticus14:12 ak konam tisiindet mengit agenge eng’ arechato bo kechir
Leviticus14:13 ak koeny mengoto ming’in eng’ komosta ne kieng’e kagochinetab tengekto ak kagochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus14:14 ak konam tisiindet korotik alak eng’ che bo kagochinetab chalwokto
Leviticus14:15 yeityo konem tisiindet mwanik alak che mi tabet
Leviticus14:16 ak korooch tisiindet mornennyi ne bo tai mwaata mi eunnyi ne bo katam
Leviticus14:17 ak mwaita ne kang’etune eutab tisiindet konde walitab itit ne bo tai ne bo inendet ne kitilili
Leviticus14:18 Ak korong’ji mwaita ne kang’etune eutab tisiindet
Leviticus14:19 Ak kogoito tisiindet kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus14:20 ak kogoito kagochinetab busiek eng’ kaptisisiet: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet
Leviticus14:21 Ak ngo kibanania
Leviticus14:22 ak cheptugenik aeng’
Leviticus14:23 Ak ingoipchi inendet tisiindet tuguchoto eng’ betut ne bo sisiit
Leviticus14:24 Ak konam tisiindet aruetab kechir ne bo kagochinetab chalwokto
Leviticus14:25 yeityo koeny aruanato bo kagochinetab chalwokto
Leviticus14:26 ak korong’ji tisiindet mwanik alak rubeitab eunnyi ne bo katam:
Leviticus14:27 ak koisisie tisiindet eng’ mornennyi ne bo tai mwanik alak che mi eunnyi ne bo katam konyil tisab eng’ taitab Jehovah:
Leviticus14:28 ak konde tisiindet mwanichoto alak che mi eunnyi
Leviticus14:29 ak korong’ji tisiindet mwanik che kang’etune eunnyi
Leviticus14:30 Yeityo kogoito agenge eng’ cheptugenik
Leviticus14:31 agot ko u ye imuchi konyor
Leviticus14:32 Nito ng’atutiet ne bo inendet ne mitei koroitab mogondosik orinnyi
Leviticus14:33 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Leviticus14:34 Ye oit emetab Kanan
Leviticus14:35 konyo anyun chitab kobo goyoto konyo komwachi tisiindet
Leviticus14:36 kong’at anyun tisiindet kole
Leviticus14:37 ak kogeer koroito
Leviticus14:38 komanda anyun tisiindet eng’ goyoto agoi kurgat ak koger goyoto betusiek tisab:
Leviticus14:39 ak konyo tisiindet kogeny eng’ betut ne bo tisab
Leviticus14:40 kong’at anyun tisiindet
Leviticus14:41 ak kong’at inendet kole
Leviticus14:42 ak koib koik alak
Leviticus14:43 Ak ngo mong’ koroito kogeny kotook eng’ got
Leviticus14:44 konyo anyun tisiindet go konyo kogeer
Leviticus14:45 Ingobut goyoto
Leviticus14:46 Ak kogeny
Leviticus14:47 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ne karu goyoto; ak mwetei ngorikyik inendet ne kaamisie goyoto.
Leviticus14:48 Ak ngwo go tisiindet kogeer
Leviticus14:49 Ak konam inendet taritik aeng’
Leviticus14:50 ak kobar taritiet age eng’ teretab ng’ung’unyek eng’ baragutab beek che rootei:
Leviticus14:51 ak konam inendet ketitab taragonik
Leviticus14:52 Ak koanyiny got eng’ korotik che bo taritianato
Leviticus14:53 ago ingounda anyun taritiet ne sobei kotiriren komanda eng’ nganaset kwo kewanin: koyai anyun ko u noto kagaigaet agobo got; ak kotililit.
Leviticus14:54 Ni ng’atutiet ne bo koroito age tugul ne bo mogondosik
Leviticus14:55 ak ne bo ngoriet ne tinyei mogondosik
Leviticus14:56 ak ole ibwansei
Leviticus14:57 si kinet ye ng’wonen
Leviticus15:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Leviticus15:2 Omwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus15:3 Ak ni muruonindanyi ne bo kuseronoto: agot ngo mandoi tuguchoto eng’ bortanyi anan ngo kerak
Leviticus15:4 Ng’wanitu itogut age tugul ne rue inendet ne tinyei kuseret: ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne tebe.
Leviticus15:5 Ak mwetei chi age tugul ngoriennyi ne twaei itogunnyi
Leviticus15:6 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik
Leviticus15:7 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne twaei bortab chichoto tinyei kuseret
Leviticus15:8 Ak ngo ng’utyi ne tinyei kuseronoto chito ne tilil; komwetei anyun ngoroikyik
Leviticus15:9 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne kiitoi
Leviticus15:10 Ak muruonitu agoi koimen chi age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne mi ole tebe: ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne ibei tuguchoto
Leviticus15:11 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chi age tugul ne katwa noto ne tinyei kuseronoto
Leviticus15:12 Ak kituei teret ne kigiyai eng’ ng’ung’unyek ne katwa chichoto tinyei kuseret
Leviticus15:13 Ak ye sob chichoto eng’ mianoto bo kuseret
Leviticus15:14 Ak kocheng’jigei eng’ betut ne bo sisiit cheptugenik aeng’
Leviticus15:15 ak kogoito tisiindet choto kobunji age kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus15:16 Ak ngoruotito chi age tugul
Leviticus15:17 Ak kemwet ngoriet age tugul
Leviticus15:18 Ak kwondo agine ne kaituiyogei ak muren
Leviticus15:19 Ak ngo tyech ng’ony kobogoriondo
Leviticus15:20 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne siebei eng’ muruonindanyi: ak komuruonit kiy age tugul ne tebe.
Leviticus15:21 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chi age tugul ne twaei itogunnyi
Leviticus15:22 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chi age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne katebe kobogoriondonoto
Leviticus15:23 Ak ngo mi tuguchoto itogut
Leviticus15:24 Ak ngo ruiyo chi age tugul ak kobogoriondonoto
Leviticus15:25 Ak ngo bwanei korotik eng’ kobogoriot eng’ betusiek che chang’ che ma eng’ betusiek che kitabane
Leviticus15:26 Kergeitu itogut age tugul ne rue eng’ betusiek che mong’une korotik ak itogutab betusiekab katabanennyi: ak muruonitu kiy age tugul ne tebe ko u muruonindab katabanennyi.
Leviticus15:27 Ak muruonitu age tugul ne twaei tuguchoto
Leviticus15:28 Ago ngo kagogesgei mandaetab simwekyik
Leviticus15:29 Ak eng’ betut ne bo sisiit konamjigei cheptugenik aeng’
Leviticus15:30 Ak kogoito tisiindet age kobunji kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus15:31 Otabani lagokab Israel ko u noto agobo simwekwak; si mabek kotinyei simwo
Leviticus15:32 Bo ng’atutioni inendet ne tinyei kuseret
Leviticus15:33 bo kobogoriot ne kitabani amu simwekyik
Leviticus16:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa
Leviticus16:2 ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Leviticus16:3 Nyonei Aron ole tilil ak chu: kirgit ne neran kobunji kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus16:4 Ingolaach ngoriet ne koi ne itabanat ne bo katanit
Leviticus16:5 Ak koget eng’ tuiyetab lagokab Israel kwesik aeng’ kobunji kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus16:6 Ak kogoito Aron kirgit kai
Leviticus16:7 Ak kokweri kwesichoto aeng’
Leviticus16:8 Ak koser Aron barbarek agobo kwesichoto aeng’; bunjin age Jehovah
Leviticus16:9 Yeityo kogoito Aron kwesta ne kagobutyi barbariat
Leviticus16:10 Ago kwesta ne kagobutyi barbariat ne bo Asasel
Leviticus16:11 Yeityo kogoito Aron eito ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus16:12 ak konem teret ne nyiitat ng’etetiot ne bunu matab kaptisisiet ne mi taitab Jehovah
Leviticus16:13 Ak konde inendet nyamdutik ma
Leviticus16:14 Ak konem korotik alak che bo kirgoto
Leviticus16:15 Yeityo koeny kwesta ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus16:16 ak koyai kagaigaet agobo ole tilil
Leviticus16:17 Amat kobiit chi ne mi emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus16:18 Yeityo komanda sang’
Leviticus16:19 Ak koise korotik kaptisisiet eng’ mornennyi konyil tisab
Leviticus16:20 Ak ye kagoges kagaigaetab ole tilil
Leviticus16:21 ak kogonoor Aron eunekyik tuwai metitab kweata sobei
Leviticus16:22 ak kogesen anyun kweata tengekwogikwak tugul koba emet ole mamenyei chi: ak kounda artet kwo eng’ oloto bo surkwen.
Leviticus16:23 Ak konyo Aron agoi emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus16:24 yeityo koungei eng’ komosta ne tilil
Leviticus16:25 Yeityo kobeel mwanik eng’ kaptisisiet
Leviticus16:26 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne kweriei kwesta ne bunjin Asasel
Leviticus16:27 Ak keib koba sang’utab nganaset kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus16:28 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne kabeelei tuguchoto
Leviticus16:29 Ak bunjin koigeny konetisioni eng’ okwek: oming’inge eng’ arawetab tisab
Leviticus16:30 amu kiyaiywok kagaigaet betunoto
Leviticus16:31 Betunoto ko sabato ne bo kamuung’et eng’ okwek
Leviticus16:32 Ak koyai kagaigaet tisiindet ne kiili
Leviticus16:33 ak koyai kagaigaet agobo got ne tilil
Leviticus16:34 Ak egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ okwek
Leviticus17:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus17:2 Mwachi Aron ak werikyik
Leviticus17:3 Chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel ne enyei kirgit
Leviticus17:4 ama get konyo kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus17:5 si kobiit koget lagokab Israel tiseiywekwak che kata enyei eng’ kewanin
Leviticus17:6 Ak koise tisiindet korotik kaptisisietab Jehovah eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus17:7 Ak si mata koeng’ji oik tiseiywekwak kogeny
Leviticus17:8 Ak ilenji ichek
Leviticus17:9 ama get agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus17:10 Ago ngo am korotik alak tugul chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel
Leviticus17:11 Amu mi sobondab borto korotik: ak kiagonok korotichoto oyachinegei kagaigaet eng’ kaptisisio amu sobonwekwok: amu korotik che yaei kagaigaet agobo sobondo.
Leviticus17:12 Kiamwachi anyun lagokab Israel amu noto
Leviticus17:13 Ak ngo bar chi age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Leviticus17:14 Amu korotik ko sobondo ne bo borto komugul
Leviticus17:15 Ak chi age tugul ne amei kiy ne kame inegei
Leviticus17:16 Ago ngo ma mwet
Leviticus18:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus18:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus18:3 Amat oyai tuguk che kiyaei emetab Misri
Leviticus18:4 Oyai kiruogutikyuk
Leviticus18:5 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk
Leviticus18:6 Amat korikyi age tugul eng’ okwek ne tilia kong’any ach ngorinnyi: a Jehovah.
Leviticus18:7 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab kwandang’ung’
Leviticus18:8 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab osotiotab kwandang’ung’; amu noto ach ngoritab kwandang’ung’.
Leviticus18:9 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab chepkomet
Leviticus18:10 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab cheptab wering’ung’
Leviticus18:11 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab cheptab osotiotab kwandang’ung’
Leviticus18:12 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab isengeng’ung’: amu inendet ko kwondo ne negit ne tilia
Leviticus18:13 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab chepkametab komet: amu inendet ko kwondo ne negit ne tilia
Leviticus18:14 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab ng’etab kametab kwandang’ung’
Leviticus18:15 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab osotiotab wering’ung’: amu osotiotab wering’ung’; amat ing’any ach ngorinnyi.
Leviticus18:16 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab imbomurtang’ung’: amu ach ngoritab ng’etab komet.
Leviticus18:17 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab kobogorio ak cheptanyi; amemut cheptab werinnyi
Leviticus18:18 Amat imutyige chepkametab osotiondeng’ung’
Leviticus18:19 Amat irikyi kobogorio ing’any ach ngorinnyi
Leviticus18:20 Amat oipgei ak osotiotab chitab kokweng’ung’
Leviticus18:21 Amegoite iyoteng’ung’ ibeelji Molek
Leviticus18:22 Ameruiye ak murenik ko u ye oruitos ak osotik: samis noto.
Leviticus18:23 Amoruiye ak tiony age tugul si imuruonge: amat kotonon kobogoriondo eng’ taitab tiony
Leviticus18:24 Amat omuruonge eng’ alak tugul eng’ chuto: amu kiimuruongei eng’ choto tugul bororiosiek che kiaon eng’ taing’wong’:
Leviticus18:25 ak kigomuruonit emet: ak aiityini tengekto amu noto
Leviticus18:26 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk ak kiruogutikyuk amu noto
Leviticus18:27 (amu kiyai bikab emoni choto tugul samisen
Leviticus18:28 si maing’ung’dak ak okwek emet
Leviticus18:29 Amu king’etoi eng’ bikwak chi age tugul ne yaei kiy age tugul eng’ tuguchu samis.
Leviticus18:30 Orib anyun kotigonutikyuk amu noto
Leviticus19:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus19:2 Mwachi tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Leviticus19:3 Ingoiywei chi age tugul kamet
Leviticus19:4 Amat omaste osub tuguk che matilei kiy
Leviticus19:5 Ak ye ogochini Jehovah tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoik che bo kalyet
Leviticus19:6 Kiamei eng’ betunoto ogoitoi
Leviticus19:7 Egu kit ne kiwechei ngot keam agot kitigin eng’ betut ne bo somok; magitaachei:
Leviticus19:8 ak ibei tengektanyi chi age tugul ne amei
Leviticus19:9 Ak ye ogesisie eng’ emeng’wong’
Leviticus19:10 Ak ameturote mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk
Leviticus19:11 Amochorse; amoberberisie
Leviticus19:12 Amoyosiechige eng’ kainennyu eng’ lembech
Leviticus19:13 Amesastae chitab kokweng’ung’
Leviticus19:14 Amat isas chi ne ming’at
Leviticus19:15 Amat oyai ne ma bo iman eng’ kiruoget: ametiytii kibananok
Leviticus19:16 Amewe komosi ak komosi ichaamate biguk: ameuny ne kabar chitab kokweng’ung’: a Jehovah.
Leviticus19:17 Amewech ne otupche eng’ muguleldang’ung’: ker kong’ iman chitab kokweng’ung’
Leviticus19:18 Ameyaakyi mugetut
Leviticus19:19 Orib ng’atutikyuk. Amengorie tuga cheguk alage che ma tuga: ameyamechi mbareng’ung’ keswek aeng’ che terotin: amelaach ngoriet ne kigiyae usisiek che terotin.
Leviticus19:20 Ak age tugul ne ruitos ak chepto ne otwogindet
Leviticus19:21 Ak ketu chichoto kagochinennyi ne bo chalwokto konyo ole mi Jehovah
Leviticus19:22 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet
Leviticus19:23 Ak ye oit emonoto
Leviticus19:24 Ago kianyinyi logoekwak tugul eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan
Leviticus19:25 Ak oam logoekwak eng’ kenyit ne bo mut
Leviticus19:26 Amat oam kiy age tugul koboto korotikyik: amoboisie bonisiet
Leviticus19:27 Amobior metowekwok
Leviticus19:28 Amotil borwekwok agobo bik che begu
Leviticus19:29 Amegoite cheptang’ung’
Leviticus19:30 Orib sabatosiekyuk
Leviticus19:31 Amobe oldab che boisie oik
Leviticus19:32 Tononji ne tinyei kalwalek
Leviticus19:33 Ameyachi ne ya toondet ne mi koboten eng’ emeng’wong’.
Leviticus19:34 Igeitu toondet ne meng’isiei kobotok ak ne kisikyin ga
Leviticus19:35 Amoyai ne ma bo iman eng’ kiruoget anan ye okwai eng’ koindo
Leviticus19:36 Oboisie kerutik che aechin che bo iman
Leviticus19:37 Ak osub ng’atutikyuk tugul
Leviticus20:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus20:2 Ilenji lagokab Israel
Leviticus20:3 Ak wechei togennyu agine chichoto
Leviticus20:4 Ak ngo yaigei bikab emet ko u ne mageer chichoto
Leviticus20:5 eng’ yoto anyun aborji chichoto neregekab togennyu
Leviticus20:6 Ak aborjini neregekab togennyu chito ne mastoi kosubi ne boisie oik ak bonik
Leviticus20:7 Otabange anyun
Leviticus20:8 Ak orib ng’atutikyuk
Leviticus20:9 Amu kibarei chi age tugul ne sasei kwandanyi anan kamet: kagosas inendet kwandanyi ak kamet; tebe inendet korotikyik.
Leviticus20:10 Chito ne ibegei ak osotiotab chito age
Leviticus20:11 Ak chito ne ruitos ak osotiotab kwandanyi
Leviticus20:12 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak osotiotab werinnyi
Leviticus20:13 Ak ngo ruiyo mureno ak muren
Leviticus20:14 Ak ngotun chi chepto koboto kamet
Leviticus20:15 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak tiony
Leviticus20:16 Ak ngo rikyi kobogoriondo tiony age tugul
Leviticus20:17 Ak ngomut chi chepkamet

Leviticus20:19 Amat ing’any bortab chepkametab komet
Leviticus20:20 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak osotiotab imamet
Leviticus20:21 Ak ngo ipgei chi ak osotiotab ng’etab kamet
Leviticus20:22 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk tugul amu noto
Leviticus20:23 Amobendate bitonwekab bororiet ne aone eng’ taing’wong’
Leviticus20:24 Ago kiamwawok alenjok
Leviticus20:25 Obesie anyun tiong’ik che anyiny ak che ng’wonen
Leviticus20:26 Ak oegu che tililen eng’ ane: amu a tilil ane Jehovah
Leviticus20:27 Kibarei iman ne boisie oik
Leviticus21:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Leviticus21:2 kobate eng’ tilionutikyik che negit
Leviticus21:3 ak eng’ chepkamet ne bergeiya
Leviticus21:4 Amat komuruongei
Leviticus21:5 Amat koruaigei
Leviticus21:6 Egu che tililen eng’ Kamuktaindenywa
Leviticus21:7 Amat kotun chepkugonio
Leviticus21:8 Itilil inendet anyun amu noto; amu inendet ne igoitoi amitwogikab Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ingotililit anyun inendet eng’ inye: amu ane Jehovah ne atililok
Leviticus21:9 Ak ngomuruongei cheptab tisiindet age tugul
Leviticus21:10 Ak inendet ne tisiindet ne o eng’ che tupcho
Leviticus21:11 anan kwo ole mitei musto
Leviticus21:12 amat komanda eng’ ole tilil
Leviticus21:13 Ingotun anyun chepto ne bergeiya.
Leviticus21:14 Amat kotun mosok
Leviticus21:15 Amat konyerat iyotennyi eng’ bikyik: amu a Jehovah ne atilili inendet.

Leviticus21:18 Amu mariktoi chi age tugul ne ma libwob
Leviticus21:19 anan ne kiil keldo
Leviticus21:20 anan ne kibalbut

Leviticus21:23 Ago mawendi inendet anget orit ne kigioiye got

Leviticus22:2 Ilenji Aron ak werikyik

Leviticus22:5 anan age tugul ne twaei ne ichuutegei ng’ony
Leviticus22:6 ng’wanitu agoi koimen ne twaei age eng’ choto
Leviticus22:7 Ak koanyinyit
Leviticus22:8 Amat koam banyekab tiong’ik che begu ichegei
Leviticus22:9 Ribei anyun kotigonutikyuk

Leviticus22:11 ago ngo al tisiindet chi
Leviticus22:12 Ak ngotun cheptab tisiindet kipsagarin
Leviticus22:13 Ago ngo mosok cheptab tisiindet
Leviticus22:14 Ak ngo am chi age tugul tuguk che tililen ama nai
Leviticus22:15 Amat koreny tuguk che tililen che bo lagokab Israel
Leviticus22:16 si konyor ng’ogisto

Leviticus22:18 Mwachi Aron
Leviticus22:19 si kobiit ketaachak
Leviticus22:20 Ago amat ogoite ne ma libwob; amu magitaachei noto agobo okwek.
Leviticus22:21 Ak chi age tugul ne igoitoi tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet kogochin Jehovah
Leviticus22:22 Amat ogochi Jehovah chu: ne korat
Leviticus22:23 Imuchi igoite koek kagochinetab chamnyet kirgit anan aruetab kechir ne tinyei tuguk che u kunduenik
Leviticus22:24 Amat ogochi Jehovah ne kigibir kitik
Leviticus22:25 Amotaach eng’ eutab kipsagarin amitwogikab Kamuktaindeng’wong’
