Leviticus23:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus23:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Leviticus23:3 Kiyaei boisiet betusiek lo: ago betutab tisab ko sabato ne kimuung’e
Leviticus23:4 Chu igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at
Leviticus23:5 Eng’ arawet ne bo tai
Leviticus23:6 Egu igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek
Leviticus23:7 Egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tai: amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot.
Leviticus23:8 Ago ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah
Leviticus23:9 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus23:10 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus23:11 ak koongoi inendet bechato eng’ taitab Jehovah
Leviticus23:12 Ak eng’ betunoto ongoi okwek bek
Leviticus23:13 Ak egu kagochinennyi ne bo busiek kebeberwek aeng’ eng’ taman che bo epah che bo busiek che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita
Leviticus23:14 Amat oam makatia
Leviticus23:15 Ak oiityige kong’eete betut ne bo aeng’ ko kagobata sabato
Leviticus23:16 oiit betusiek konom agoi betut ne bo aeng’ ko kagobata sabato ne bo tisab; ak ogochi Jehovah kagochinet ne leel ne bo busiek.
Leviticus23:17 Oibu eng’ meng’otosiekwok makatinik aeng’ che kiongoi che yamei kebeberwek aeng’ che bo epah: egu busiek che tambulul
Leviticus23:18 Ak ogoite koboto makatinik arek tisab che libwoben che bo kechir che masiirei kenyit agenge
Leviticus23:19 Ak ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto
Leviticus23:20 Ak koongoi tisiindet choto koboto makatinik che bo tongoanik koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah
Leviticus23:21 Ak oititen eng’ betunoto; biitu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ okwek: amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot: ng’atutiet noto ne bo koigeny eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul.
Leviticus23:22 Ak ye ogesisie eng’ emeng’wong’
Leviticus23:23 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus23:24 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus23:25 Amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot: ak ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat kigochin Jehovah.
Leviticus23:26 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus23:27 Ago egu betutab kagaigaet eng’ betutab taman eng’ arawanito bo tisab: egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ okwek
Leviticus23:28 Amat oyai boisio age tugul eng’ betunoto: amu betutab kagaigaet
Leviticus23:29 Amu chi age tugul ne maiming’inegei eng’ betunoto
Leviticus23:30 Ak chi age tugul ne yaei boisiet age tugul eng’ betunoto
Leviticus23:31 Amat oyai boisio age tugul: ng’atutiet nito eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul.
Leviticus23:32 Egu sabato ne bo kamuung’et eng’ okwek
Leviticus23:33 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus23:34 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus23:35 Ak egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tai: amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot.
Leviticus23:36 Ogoitoi kagochinet ne bunei mat
Leviticus23:37 Chu igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at
Leviticus23:38 che siirei sabatosiek che bo Jehovah
Leviticus23:39 Ago ye kaoyum ruratetab emet
Leviticus23:40 Ak obutyige eng’ betut ne bo tai logoekab ketik che kororon
Leviticus23:41 Ak orib noto koek igortab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tisab eng’ kenyit: ng’atutiet noto ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwok: orib anyun igorato eng’ arawetab tisab.
Leviticus23:42 Omenye keriosiek betusiek tisab; menyei keriosiechoto
Leviticus23:43 si kobiit konai ibinwekwok che biitu let kole
Leviticus23:44 Kimwachi anyun Musa lagokab Israel igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at.
Leviticus24:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus24:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel koibun mwanikab emitik che tililen che kigitui agobo lapkeiyet
Leviticus24:3 Chobei Aron tait eng’ sang’utab anget ne kigioiye got
Leviticus24:4 Chobei inendet taisiek eng’ keldab tait ne tilil eng’ taitab Jehovah kotugul.
Leviticus24:5 Ak inemu busiek che tambulul
Leviticus24:6 Ak itet koek ortinwek aeng’
Leviticus24:7 Ak inde oret age tugul tuguk che tililen che nyamdut
Leviticus24:8 Tetei inendet kioto eng’ sabato age tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah; noto ko amu lagokab Israel
Leviticus24:9 Bunjin Aron ak werikyik; ak amei eng’ ole tilil: amu tilil mising’ eng’ inendet eng’ kagochinoik che bunei mat che bo Jehovah eng’ ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny.
Leviticus24:10 Ak kimanda oldab lagokab Israel weritab kobogoriotab Israel
Leviticus24:11 ak kichub Kainet weroto bo kobogoriotab Israel
Leviticus24:12 Ak kigiger
Leviticus24:13 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus24:14 Imoong’u inendet ne kosasis kwo sang’utab nganaset; ak ingogonoor eunekwak metinnyi ichek tugul che kogasei kosasisiei
Leviticus24:15 Ak imwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus24:16 Ak inendet ne chubei kainetab Jehovah kebarei iman; lage koik iman tuiyet komugul chichoto; ngo bunotyo
Leviticus24:17 Kibarei iman chi age tugul ne barei chito age;
Leviticus24:18 ak igeeri age inendet ne kabar ne bo akwet: sobondo eng’ sobondo.
Leviticus24:19 Ak ngonde chito berut chitab kokwennyi; ko u ye kiyai
Leviticus24:20 moet eng’ moet
Leviticus24:21 Ak inendet ne barei ne bo akwet kogeeri age: ak kebarei chito ne barei chi.
Leviticus24:22 Egu agenge ng’atutieng’wong’
Leviticus24:23 Ak king’alalji Musa lagokab Israel
Leviticus25:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai
Leviticus25:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus25:3 Igole mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk kenyisiek lo
Leviticus25:4 ago egu sabato eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab ne imuunyi emet
Leviticus25:5 Amat iges kolgeinik che bo mbareng’ung’
Leviticus25:6 Ak egu sabatonoto bo emet amitwogikwok; cheguk
Leviticus25:7 ak ko bo tuguk
Leviticus25:8 Ak iityigei sabatosiek tisab che bo kenyisiek
Leviticus25:9 Yeityo iguut iriaget ne cheei mising’
Leviticus25:10 Ak otaban kenyit ne bo konom
Leviticus25:11 Egu jubilii eng’ okwek kenyinoto bo konom: amogolse
Leviticus25:12 Amu jubilii; egu ne tilil eng’ okwek: oame ruratennyi che bunu mbar.
Leviticus25:13 Ak oweekyigei chi tugul ole ki nenyi eng’ kenyini bo jubilii.
Leviticus25:14 Ak ngialdochi kiy chitab kokweng’ung’
Leviticus25:15 Iale chitab kokweng’ung’ ne yamegei ak koitetab kenyisiek
Leviticus25:16 Itese alyennyi ko u chang’indab kenyisiek; ak ichuchuch alyennyi ko u ng’ering’indab kenyisiek; amu aldaun ne yamegei ak kesisiet.
Leviticus25:17 Ago amoyachigei ne ya
Leviticus25:18 Amu noto anyun oyai ng’atutikyuk
Leviticus25:19 Ak koi emet logoek ak oam obiye
Leviticus25:20 Ak ngot ole
Leviticus25:21 yeityo ang’at anyun berurtanyu eng’ okwek eng’ kenyit ne bo lo
Leviticus25:22 Ak ogolse eng’ kenyitab sisiit
Leviticus25:23 Ak magialdoi emonoto agoi; amu nenyu emet: amu o toek kobota eng’ emonoto ak o kiprutoinik kobota.
Leviticus25:24 Ak ogoite katiaget ne bo emet
Leviticus25:25 Ak ngoek banan ne otupche
Leviticus25:26 Ak ngo matinyei chito chi ne itiachi
Leviticus25:27 ingoiit kanyun kenyisiek koboch ngab koalda
Leviticus25:28 Ago ngo maimuch kotiakyigei
Leviticus25:29 Ak ngo alda chi got ne kimenyei ne mi nganaset ne kigiyieme irimet
Leviticus25:30 Ak ngo ma kitiach eng’ kenyinoto komugul
Leviticus25:31 Ago kiiti gorik che mi nganasok che ma kiyieme irimet
Leviticus25:32 Ago imuchi Lawik kotiach nganasokwak
Leviticus25:33 Ak ngotiach chito age ne bo Lawik
Leviticus25:34 Ago amat kealda emet ole agete tukwak che bo nganasokwak
Leviticus25:35 Ak ngoek kibanania tupcheng’ung’
Leviticus25:36 Amat image inendet kelunet anan che tesotin: ago iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’: si kotebi tupcheng’ung’ koboten.
Leviticus25:37 Amegochi siling’isieguk ile si inyorune che siirtoot
Leviticus25:38 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Leviticus25:39 Ak ngoek kibanania tupcheng’ung’ ne mi koboten
Leviticus25:40 ingotebi koboten ko u otwogindet ne nyoru melekto anan ko u bunotyot; ak kootin agoi kenyitab jubilii:
Leviticus25:41 yeityo anyun komanda eng’ oldang’ung’
Leviticus25:42 Amu ichek ko otwogikyuk
Leviticus25:43 Amat ibou inendet eng’ kimnatet ne korom; ago iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’.
Leviticus25:44 Ak eng’ ng’olyotab otwogiguk che murenik ak che tibik
Leviticus25:45 Ago oale eng’ lagokab bunotik che meng’isiei eng’ kwenung’wong’
Leviticus25:46 Ak oyai choto koek borotetab lagokwok
Leviticus25:47 Ak ngot koek magorio ne kipsagarin anan bunotyo ne mi koboten
Leviticus25:48 kimuchi kitiach kogeny ye kagialda; imuchi kotiach age eng’ tupchosiekyik;
Leviticus25:49 imuchi kotiach inendet chitab orennyi
Leviticus25:50 Ak koiit koboto chichoto kialei inendet koboch kenyit ne kialdaegei agoi kenyitab jubilii: ak kotenit che kigialdae inendet koitetab kenyisiek; tebyei koboto inendet che yamegei ak betusiekab otwogindet ne nyoru melekto eng’ otisiennyi.
Leviticus25:51 Ngo ta komi kenyisiek che chang’
Leviticus25:52 Ak ngo ta komi kenyisiek che ng’ering’ kityo si koit kenyitab jubilii
Leviticus25:53 Ak kotebi koboto inendet ko u otwogindet ne nyoru melekto eng’ kenyit agoi kenyit: amat koboi inendet eng’ kimnatet ne korom eng’ taing’ung’.
Leviticus25:54 Ak ngo ma kitiach chichoto eng’ ortinwechato
Leviticus25:55 Amu otwogikyuk lagokab Israel; icheget otwogikyuk che kiamutu komong’une emetab Misri. A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’.
Leviticus26:1 Amat koyachigei tuguk che matilei kiy
Leviticus26:2 Orib sabatosiekyuk
Leviticus26:3 Ngobendate konetisiosiekyuk
Leviticus26:4 agonok anyun ropta eng’ betusiekyik
Leviticus26:5 Ak yamei kesutik che obore
Leviticus26:6 Ak agonu kalyet eng’ emet
Leviticus26:7 Ak oon bunikwok
Leviticus26:8 Ak koon bikwok mutu bik bogol
Leviticus26:9 Ak atokyinok agane togennyu
Leviticus26:10 Ak oam tuguk che konorotin che bo keny
Leviticus26:11 Ak ande gonnyu kwenung’wong’; ama wechok sobondanyu.
Leviticus26:12 Ak awendote kwenung’wong’
Leviticus26:13 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Leviticus26:14 Ago ngo mogasa it
Leviticus26:15 ak ngot oesie konetisiosiekyuk
Leviticus26:16 ayaiywok ni agane: ang’ate kamuiset konyonjok
Leviticus26:17 Ak aboruok neregekyuk
Leviticus26:18 Ak ngo mogasa it eng’ tuguchuto
Leviticus26:19 Ak airi menotetab kimnateng’ung’; ak ayai kipsengwet neng’wong’ koigei karnet
Leviticus26:20 ak oboisie buch kimnateng’wong’; amu magonu emeng’wong’ ruratet
Leviticus26:21 Ak ngotila let
Leviticus26:22 Ak ayogu tiong’ik che bo timin kobwa kwenung’wong’
Leviticus26:23 Ak ngo mocham anetak eng’ tuguchu
Leviticus26:24 atilok let anyun ak okwek; ak abirok anyun anendet konyil tisab amu tengekwogikwok.
Leviticus26:25 Ak aibwok rotwetab chok
Leviticus26:26 Ye atil amitwogikwok kong’ering’itu
Leviticus26:27 Ak ngo mogasa it eng’ tuguchu tugul
Leviticus26:28 atilok let anyun eng’ bandanyu eng’ neregek che bichien
Leviticus26:29 Ak oam banyekab borwekab werikwok
Leviticus26:30 Ak ang’eme awong’u komoswekwok che tororen
Leviticus26:31 Ak ayai nganasokwok koek karotwek
Leviticus26:32 Ak ayai emet koek surkwen: ak kokwong’io bunikwok che menyei oloto.
Leviticus26:33 Ak aiyestochok bororiosiek alak
Leviticus26:34 Yeityo kobaibaitune anyun emet sabatosiekyik
Leviticus26:35 Imuunyi emet kota ko kuberot
Leviticus26:36 Ak eng’ icheget che ng’etu eng’ okwek
Leviticus26:37 Ak koriichgei ichegei eng’ ichegei
Leviticus26:38 Ak olusyi bororiosiek
Leviticus26:39 Ak ichuchui che ng’etu eng’ okwek eng’ tengekwogikwak eng’ emotinwekab bunikwok; ak kogeny amu tengekwogikab kwanisiekwak kochuchui ko u ichek.
Leviticus26:40 Yeityo kong’any tengekwogikwak
Leviticus26:41 ak kiatil let agane ichek
Leviticus26:42 abwat anyun kayomisennyu ne kiayomisyi Jakobo; ak kayomisennyu agine ne kayomisyi Isak
Leviticus26:43 Ak kometo ichek emet
Leviticus26:44 Agot nganda u choto tugul
Leviticus26:45 ago abwati amu ichek
Leviticus26:46 Chu anyun konetisiosiek ak kiruogutik ak ng’atutik che kiyai Jehovah ak lagokab Israel eng’ tulwetab Sinai eng’ Musa.
Leviticus27:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Leviticus27:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Leviticus27:3 Itaune kamanutieng’ung’ ne irogendochini
Leviticus27:4 Ak ngo kobogorio
Leviticus27:5 Ak ngitaune kenyisiek mut agoi kenyisiek tiptem
Leviticus27:6 Ak ngitaune arawet agenge agoi kenyisiek mut
Leviticus27:7 Ak ngitaune kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak kwo tai; ngo muren
Leviticus27:8 Ago ngo banan chichoto kosiir kamanutieng’ung’
Leviticus27:9 Ak ngogoito bik kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah
Leviticus27:10 Amat kowal
Leviticus27:11 Ak ngo tiony age tugul ne ng’wan
Leviticus27:12 ak koiit tisiindet anyun ole te
Leviticus27:13 Ago ngo machei iman kotiach tionyoto
Leviticus27:14 Ak ye itabani chi gonnyi koek ne tilil eng’ Jehovah
Leviticus27:15 Ak ngo machei kotiach gonnyi chichoto koitabani
Leviticus27:16 Ak ngotabanji chi Jehovah kebebertab mbarennyi
Leviticus27:17 Ngotaban mbarennyi koboch kenyitab jubilii
Leviticus27:18 Ago ngotaban inendet mbarennyi ko kagosiirto jubilii
Leviticus27:19 Ak ngotiach iman mbaret inendet ne kiitabani
Leviticus27:20 Ak ngo maitiach inendet mbaranato
Leviticus27:21 ago tililitu mbaranato eng’ Jehovah
Leviticus27:22 Ak ngotabanji chichoto Jehovah mbaret ne kigoal
Leviticus27:23 koiityi anyun tisiindet inendet ole tenitu kamanutieng’ung’ agoi kenyitab jubilii: ak kogon inendet eng’ betunoto kamanutieng’ung’
Leviticus27:24 Kiweekyin mbaranato chito ne kigiale eng’ kenyitab jubilii
Leviticus27:25 Ak u kamanutiguk tugul sekelisiek che bo ole tilil: tinyei sekel agenge gerahisiek tiptem.
Leviticus27:26 Che kitwatei eng’ che kiyagi
Leviticus27:27 Ak ngo bo tiong’ik che ng’wonen
Leviticus27:28 Ago magialdoi
Leviticus27:29 Magitiachi age tugul ne itabanat
Leviticus27:30 Bo Jehovah kebeberwekab taman che bo emet
Leviticus27:31 Ak ngo machei chi kotiach alak eng’ kebebertanyi ne bo taman
Leviticus27:32 Kebeberwek tugul che bo taman che bo tuga anan nego
Leviticus27:33 Amat kogilgilye ngo mie anan ngo ya
Leviticus27:34 Chuto anyun ng’atutik che king’at Jehovah Musa agobo lagokab Israel eng’ tulwetab Sinai.
Numbers1:1 King’alalji Jehovah Musa eng’ ong’atetab Sinai
Numbers1:2 Iit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers1:3 koboch che kigotar kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai
Numbers1:4 Ak mi kobotok chitab oret age tugul; age tugul ne o eng’ gotab kwanisiekyik.
Numbers1:5 Chu kainaikab murenik che tonondos kobotok: eng’ oretab Reuben; Elisur weritab Sedeur.
Numbers1:6 Eng’ oretab Simeon; Selumiel weritab Surisadai.
Numbers1:7 Eng’ oretab Juda; Nason weritab Aminadab.
Numbers1:8 Eng’ oretab Isakar; Natanel weritab Suar.
Numbers1:9 Eng’ oretab Sebulun; Eliab weritab Helon.
Numbers1:10 Eng’ lagokab Josep: eng’ che bo Epraim; Elisama weritab Amiud: eng’ che bo Manase; Gamaliel weritab Pedasur.
Numbers1:11 Eng’ oretab Benjamin; Abidan weritab Gideoni.
Numbers1:12 Eng’ oretab Dan; Aieser weritab Amisadai.
Numbers1:13 Eng’ oretab Aser; Pagiel weritab Okran.
Numbers1:14 Eng’ oretab Gad; Eliasap weritab Deuel.
Numbers1:15 Eng’ oretab Naptali; Aira weritab Enan.
Numbers1:16 Chuto che kigiguur eng’ tuiyet
Numbers1:17 Kiimut anyun Musa ak Aron murenichoto kagemwa kainaikwak.
Numbers1:18 Ak kiiyum ichek tuiyet komugul kotuiyo eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab aeng’
Numbers1:19 Kiit anyun Musa ichek eng’ ong’atetab Sinai ko u ye king’at Jehovah.
Numbers1:20 Ak lagokab Reuben
Numbers1:21 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers1:22 Ak eng’ lagokab Simeon
Numbers1:23 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Simeon
Numbers1:24 Eng’ lagokab Gad
Numbers1:25 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Gad ko ki elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol lo ak konom.
Numbers1:26 Eng’ lagokab Juda
Numbers1:27 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Juda ko ki elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak ang’wan ak bogol lo.
Numbers1:28 Eng’ lagokab Isakar
Numbers1:29 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Isakar ko ki elfusiek konom ak ang’wan ak bogol ang’wan.
Numbers1:30 Eng’ lagokab Sebulun
Numbers1:31 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Sebulun
Numbers1:32 Eng’ lagokab Josep
Numbers1:33 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Epraim ko ki elfusiek artam ak bogol mut.
Numbers1:34 Eng’ lagokab Manase
Numbers1:35 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Manase ko ki elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ ak bogol aeng’.
Numbers1:36 Eng’ lagokab Benjamin
Numbers1:37 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers1:38 Eng’ lagokab Dan
Numbers1:39 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Dan ko ki elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ ak bogol tisab.
Numbers1:40 Eng’ lagokab Aser
Numbers1:41 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers1:42 Eng’ lagokab Naptali
Numbers1:43 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Naptali ko ki elfusiek konom ak somok ak bogol ang’wan.
Numbers1:44 Chuto ichek che kigiit
Numbers1:45 Kiek anyun tugul che kigiit che bo lagokab Israel ko u korikab kwanisiekwak
Numbers1:46 kiek tugul che kigiit elfusiek bogol lo ak somok ak bogol mut ak konom.
Numbers1:47 Ago ma kiitito choto Lawik ko u oretab kwanisiekwak.
Numbers1:48 Amu kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers1:49 Oretab Lawi inegei ne maiiti
Numbers1:50 ago inde Lawik koboi gotab baornatet
Numbers1:51 Ak ye kimakyin got kwo tai
Numbers1:52 Ak kiteech lagokab Israel emaisiekwak
Numbers1:53 Ago menyei Lawik koyiemei gotab baornatet
Numbers1:54 Kiyai anyun ko u noto lagokab Israel: kiyai ichek kou ye king’at Jehovah Musa.
Numbers2:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Numbers2:2 Ingoteech chi age tugul eng’ lagokab Israel ole mitei songoliennyi
Numbers2:3 Ingoteech komostab kong’asis ole chorune asista
Numbers2:4 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:5 Ak ingoteech che bo oretab Isakar korupgei: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Isakar Netanel weritab Suar:
Numbers2:6 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:7 ak oretab Sebulun: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Sebulun Eliab weritab Helon:
Numbers2:8 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:9 Kiek tugul che kigiit che bo nganasetab Juda
Numbers2:10 Tebe songoliet ne bo nganasetab Reuben komostab murot ne bo tai
Numbers2:11 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:12 Ak ingoteech che bo oretab Simeon korupgei: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Simeon Selumiel weritab Surisadai.
Numbers2:13 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:14 ak oretab Gad: ingoek bounindetab lagokab Gad Eliasap weritab Reuel:
Numbers2:15 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:16 Kiek tugul che kigiit che bo nganasetab Reuben elfusiek bogol ak konom ak agenge ak bogol ang’wan ak konom
Numbers2:17 Yeityo anyun kwo tai emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers2:18 Tebe songoliet ne bo nganasetab Epraim cherongo ko u lugosiekwak: ak ingoek Elisama weritab Amiud bounindetab lagokab Epraim.
Numbers2:19 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:20 Ak ne rubei inendet ko oretab Manase: ak ingoek Gamaliel weritab Pedasur bounindetab lagokab Manase:
Numbers2:21 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:22 ak oretab Benjamin: ingoek Abidan weritab Gideoni bounindetab lagokab Benjamin:
Numbers2:23 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit
Numbers2:24 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ nganasetab Epraim elfusiek bogol ak sisiit ak bogol agenge
Numbers2:25 Tebe songoliet ne bo nganasetab Dan murot ne bo katam
Numbers2:26 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:27 Ak choto che teechei korupgei ak inendet ko oretab Aser: ak ingoek Pagiel weritab Okran bounindetab lagokab Aser.
Numbers2:28 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:29 ak oretab Naptali: ingoek Aira weritab Enan bounindetab lagokab Naptali:
Numbers2:30 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers2:31 Kiek tugul che kigiit che bo nganasetab Dan elfusiek bogol ak konom ak tisab ak bogol lo. Bendi chuto koletu
Numbers2:32 Chu che kigiit eng’ lagokab Israel ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak: tugul che kigiit che bo nganasok ko u lugosiekwak ko ki elfusiek bogol lo ak somok ak bogol mut ak konom.
Numbers2:33 Ago kima kiitito Lawik lagokab Israel; ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa.
Numbers2:34 Kiyai anyun ko u noto lagokab Israel: ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa
Numbers3:1 Chu ortinwekab Aron ak Musa eng’ betut ne king’alalji Jehovah Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai.
Numbers3:2 Chu kainaikab werikab Aron; Nadab ne bo tai
Numbers3:3 Choto kainaikab werikab Aron
Numbers3:4 Ak kibek eng’ taitab Jehovah Nadab ak Abiu
Numbers3:5 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers3:6 Imutu oretab Lawik korik
Numbers3:7 Ak korib ichek boisiennyi
Numbers3:8 Ak korib tuguk tugul che bo emait ne kituiyechin orit
Numbers3:9 Ak igochi Aron ak werikyik Lawik: kagigochi inendet ichek iman eng’ lagokab Israel.
Numbers3:10 Ak inde Aron ak werikyik
Numbers3:11 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers3:12 Anendet
Numbers3:13 Amu chechuk werik tugul che bo tai; kiatabanjige werik tugul che bo tai eng’ Israel
Numbers3:14 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ ong’atetab Sinai
Numbers3:15 Iit lagokab Lawik ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak
Numbers3:16 Ak kiit Musa anyun ichek ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah
Numbers3:17 Ki kainaikab werikab Lawi chu: Gerson
Numbers3:18 Chu ko kainaikab werikab Gerson ko u gorikwak; Libni ak Simei.
Numbers3:19 Werikab Kohat ko u gorikwak; ko ki Amram
Numbers3:20 Werikab Merari ko u gorikwak; ko ki Mali ak Musi. Chuto ortinwekab Lawik ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak.
Numbers3:21 Salu Gerson gotab Libnik
Numbers3:22 Kiek tugul choto kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers3:23 Ingoteech che bo gorikab Gersonik gotab tuiyet batai
Numbers3:24 Ak ingoek Eliasap weritab Lael bounindetab Gersonik
Numbers3:25 Ak ingorib werikab Gerson eng’ emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers3:26 Ak ngoroik che king’ote seremut
Numbers3:27 Salu Kohat gotab Amramik
Numbers3:28 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers3:29 Ingoteech gorikab werikab Kohat tabandab got
Numbers3:30 Ak ingoek Elisapan werikab Usiel bounindetab got ne bo kwandab gorikab Kohatik.
Numbers3:31 Ak ingorib ichek moinget
Numbers3:32 Ak ingoek Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet ne o eng’ bounikab Lawik
Numbers3:33 Salu Merari gotab Malik
Numbers3:34 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers3:35 Ak ingoboi Suriel weritab Abiail bounindetab got ne bo kwanisiekab gorikab Merari: ingoteech ichek komostab murot ne bo katam eng’ got.
Numbers3:36 Ak kigigochi werikab Merari baoinik che bo got
Numbers3:37 Ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut
Numbers3:38 Musa ak Aron ak werikyik che teechei taitab got
Numbers3:39 Kiek tugul murenik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ tugul che kigiit che bo Lawik
Numbers3:40 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Numbers3:41 Ak inamwa Lawik kobunja (a Jehovah) kewale werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel; ak che twatei tuga che bo Lawik kewale che twatei tuga che bo lagokab Israel.
Numbers3:42 Kiit anyun Musa
Numbers3:43 Eng’ ichek che kigiit ko kiek werik tugul che bo tai
Numbers3:44 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers3:45 Nam Lawik ak iwale werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel
Numbers3:46 Ak eng’ katiagetab werik che bo tai che bo lagokab Israel
Numbers3:47 iibe chi tugul sekelisiek mut che bo met; iibe ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; (sekel agenge ko gerahisiek tiptem);
Numbers3:48 Ak igochi Aron ak werikyik sekelisiek che bo choto siirtootin che kitiage bichoto.
Numbers3:49 Kitaach anyun Musa sekelisiek che bo katiaget eng’ ichek che kisiir Lawik.
Numbers3:50 Kitaach sekelisiechoto eng’ werikab che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel; kiek sekelisiek elfut agenge ak bogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak mut
Numbers3:51 Kiigochi anyun Musa sekelisiechoto bo katiaget Aron ak werikyik
Numbers4:1 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji
Numbers4:2 Iit werikab Kohat ichegei eng’ lagokab Lawik
Numbers4:3 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom agoi che bo kenyisiek konom
Numbers4:4 Nito boisiet ne bo werikab Kohat eng’ emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers4:5 Ye katoi bik banda
Numbers4:6 ak koliige magatokab mengichikab beek
Numbers4:7 Ak ingoitoe bichoto anget ne tuui ne nyalil baragutab meset ne bo makatinik che bo kabartaet
Numbers4:8 ak kotuge tukchoto anget ne birir
Numbers4:9 Ak ingonam ichek anget ne tuui ne nyalil
Numbers4:10 Ak ingonde tukchoto magatet orit ne bo mengitab beek
Numbers4:11 Ak koitoe anget ne tuui ne nyalil kapkorosut ne bo tahabu
Numbers4:12 ak ingonam ichek tuguk tugul che bo boisiet che kiboisie eng’ ole tilil
Numbers4:13 Ak kingoram orek eng’ kaptisisiet ak kotumda
Numbers4:14 ak konde tugukyik tugul baragunnyi che kiboisie eng’ kaptisisionoto
Numbers4:15 Ak ye kagoges Aron ak werikyik boisiet ne bo tugetab ole tilil
Numbers4:16 Egu boisietab Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet mwaitab kit ne ikweng’sei
Numbers4:17 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji
Numbers4:18 Mongobetyo oretab gorikab Kohatik eng’ Lawik;
Numbers4:19 ago oyachi ko u ni
Numbers4:20 ago amat koba go kogeer ole tilil
Numbers4:21 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers4:22 Iit werikab Gerson agichek
Numbers4:23 iiti koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom; tugul che bendi go koboisiei eng’ emait ne kituiyechin.
Numbers4:24 Ni boisiet ne bo gorikab Gersonik
Numbers4:25 ibei ichek ngoroik che bo got
Numbers4:26 ak ngoroik che u emait che kiyieme seremut
Numbers4:27 Bou Aron ak werikyik boisionik tugul che yaei werikab Gersonik
Numbers4:28 Nito boisiet ne bo gorikab werikab Gersonik eng’ emait ne kituiyechin: ak kobou boisienywa Itamar weritab Aron tisiindet.
Numbers4:29 Ak iit werikab Merari
Numbers4:30 iiti koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom
Numbers4:31 Ni ng’atutietab laisenywa
Numbers4:32 ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut kotuiyo
Numbers4:33 Nito boisiet ne bo gorikab werikab Merari
Numbers4:34 Ak kiit Musa ak Aron ak bounikab tuiyet werikab Kohatik
Numbers4:35 iiti koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom
Numbers4:36 ak kiek elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol tisab ak konom che kigiit ko u gorikwak.
Numbers4:37 Chu che kigiit eng’ gorikab Kohatik
Numbers4:38 Ak kiek che kigiit che bo werikab Gerson
Numbers4:39 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom
Numbers4:40 choto che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers4:41 Choto che kigiit eng’ gorikab werikab Gerson
Numbers4:42 Ak kiek che kigiit che bo ortinwekab werikab Merari
Numbers4:43 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom
Numbers4:44 choto che kigiit eng’ ichek ko u gorikwak
Numbers4:45 Chuto ichek che kigiit che bo gorikab werikab Merari
Numbers4:46 Choto tugul che kigiit eng’ Lawik
Numbers4:47 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom
Numbers4:48 choto che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers4:49 Kigiit eng’ Musa ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah
Numbers5:1 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers5:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel koisto age tugul ne tinyei mogondosik eng’ nganaset
Numbers5:3 Oiste che murenik ak gotab kor
Numbers5:4 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u noto
Numbers5:5 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers5:6 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers5:7 kong’any anyun ng’ogistanywa ne kagoyai: ak kogoito kit ne yamegei ak ng’ogistanyi
Numbers5:8 Ago ngo matinyei chichoto chito ne tilia ne kimuchi keweekyi tukchoto bo ng’ogisto
Numbers5:9 Bunjin tisiindet kagochinet age tugul ne kenamjin barak
Numbers5:10 Ak bunjin tisiindet tuguk che itabani chi age tugul: bunjin tisiindet kiy age tugul ne igochin chi.
Numbers5:11 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers5:12 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers5:13 ak koipgei ak chi
Numbers5:14 ak konyor kang’unyet chichoto eng’ sobondanyi ak konerech agobo osotiondennyi amu koimuruongei osotiondonoto: anan ngonyor kang’unyet chichoto eng’ sobondanyi
Numbers5:15 komutyi anyun chichoto osotiondennyi tisiindet
Numbers5:16 Ak komut tisiindet osotiondonoto korik
Numbers5:17 yeityo konam tisiindet beek che tililen eng’ tabet ne kigiyae ng’ung’unyek; ak komugut ng’ung’unyek che mi got ng’ony
Numbers5:18 ak konde tisiindet kobogoriondonoto taitab Jehovah
Numbers5:19 ak komwachi tisiindet inendet koyosio
Numbers5:20 ago ngo kiigesesen
Numbers5:21 komwachi anyun tisiindet kobogoriondonoto koyosio kayosiet ne bo chubisiet
Numbers5:22 ak koba beechu ibu chubisiet agutaniguk
Numbers5:23 Ak kosirji tisiindet bukuit chubisiosiechuto
Numbers5:24 ak kogochi kobogoriondonoto koee beechoto ibu chubisiet; ak koba beechoto ibu chubisiet bortanyi ak kong’wonegitu.
Numbers5:25 Yeityo konem tisiindet kagochinetab busiek che bo ng’etkonda
Numbers5:26 ak komugut tisiindet kagochinonoto bo busiek konyi eut
Numbers5:27 Ak ye kagogochi koee beechoto
Numbers5:28 Ago ngo ma muruon kobogoriondonoto
Numbers5:29 Nito ng’atutietab ng’etkonda
Numbers5:30 anan ye kanyor chi kang’unyet eng’ sobondanyi
Numbers5:31 Ago manyoru chichoto tengekto
Numbers6:1 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers6:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers6:3 ingoistoegei divaik ak maiyek; amat koee beek alak tugul che mindilil che bo divaik
Numbers6:4 Amat koam kiy age tugul ne bunu sabibuk eng’ betusiekyik tugul che bo katabanennyi kong’eete tenderikab logoechoto agoi mortet.
Numbers6:5 Amat kocher metinnyi eng’ betusiekyik tugul che bo kayosiennyi ne bo katabanet
Numbers6:6 Amat korikyi musto eng’ betusiechoto tugul che itabanjinegei Jehovah.
Numbers6:7 Amat kong’wanitgei agobo kwondanyi
Numbers6:8 Tilil eng’ Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo katabanennyi.
Numbers6:9 Ak ngo me chi eng’ chokyinet eng’ ole negite inendet
Numbers6:10 Ak koipchi tisiindet eng’ betutab sisiit cheptugenik aeng’
Numbers6:11 Ak kogoito tisiindet age kobunji kagochinetab tengekto
Numbers6:12 Ak ingotabanji Jehovah betusiekab katabanennyi
Numbers6:13 Ni ng’atutietab Nasiritindet
Numbers6:14 yeityo kogochi kagochinennyi Jehovah
Numbers6:15 ak kerebet ne o ne mi makatinik che ma kinde mermerek
Numbers6:16 Ak kogoito tisiindet tukchoto eng’ taitab Jehovah
Numbers6:17 Ak kogoito mengit koek tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet kogochi Jehovah
Numbers6:18 Ak konem Nasiritindonoto metinnyi ne bo katabanennyi eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers6:19 Yeityo konem tisiindet kusto ne kagiyo ne bo mengit
Numbers6:20 Ak koongoi tisiindet choto koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah; tilil nito
Numbers6:21 Ni ng’atutietab Nasiritindet ne ibortae kayosiennyi
Numbers6:22 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers6:23 Mwachi Aron ak werikyik ilenji
Numbers6:24 Ingoberurin Jehovah
Numbers6:25 Ingokwenyin lapkeiyetab togetab Jehovah
Numbers6:26 Ingotokyin Jehovah togennyi
Numbers6:27 Indoi anyun ichek kainennyu lagokab Israel ko u noto; ak aberur ichek.
Numbers7:1 Ak eng’ betut ne kiga kolumda Musa got
Numbers7:2 kogoito anyun kagochinoik
Numbers7:3 ak kiib bounichoto kagochinoikwak kobwa taitab Jehovah
Numbers7:4 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers7:5 Taach tukchoto eng’ ichek
Numbers7:6 Kitaach Musa anyun karisiek ak eik
Numbers7:7 Kiigochi werikab Gerson karisiek aeng’ ak eik ang’wan
Numbers7:8 ak kiigochi werikab Merari karisiek ang’wan ak eik sisiit
Numbers7:9 Ago ma igochi kiy werikab Kohat
Numbers7:10 Ak kiigoito bounik kagochinoik agobo katabanetab kaptisisiet eng’ betut ne kigiile

Numbers7:13 Kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda

Numbers8:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa
Numbers8:2 Mwachi Aron
Numbers8:3 Kiyai anyun Aron ko u noto; kiinaam taisiekyik si kobiit kokweng’so eng’ taitab keldab tait
Numbers8:4 Ki u ni yaetab keldab tait: ki tahabu che kigitany; koboch kel agoi taptokyik
Numbers8:5 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa
Numbers8:6 Iste Lawik eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel
Numbers8:7 Ak iyachi ichek ko u ni
Numbers8:8 Yeityo koget kirgit ne neran
Numbers8:9 Ak imut Lawik koba taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak iyum tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel.
Numbers8:10 Ak imut Lawik koba taitab Jehovah; ak kogonoor lagokab Israel eunekwak Lawik.
Numbers8:11 Yeityo kogoito Aron Lawik eng’ taitab Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kiongoi
Numbers8:12 Ak kogonoor Lawik eunekwak metowekab kirugichoto; ak igoite inye age kobunji kagochinetab tengekto
Numbers8:13 Yeityo imut Lawik koba taitab Aron
Numbers8:14 Ibesie ko u noto anyun
Numbers8:15 Yeityo koba Lawik go
Numbers8:16 Amu kigigona ichek inne eng’ lagokab Israel; kianam choto kobunja
Numbers8:17 Amu chechuk werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel
Numbers8:18 Ak kianam Lawik kobunja
Numbers8:19 Ak kiagoite Lawik kobunji Aron ak werikyik eng’ lagokab Israel
Numbers8:20 Kiyachi ko u noto anyun Musa ak Aron ak tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers8:21 Kiianyinygei anyun Lawik koistoegei tengekto
Numbers8:22 Ye kingobata noto
Numbers8:23 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa
Numbers8:24 Bo Lawik ni: koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ak kwo tai
Numbers8:25 ak ye kagoit kenyisiekwak konom kobagakta boisionoto
Numbers8:26 ago tononjin ripset koboto che tupcho eng’ emait ne kituiyechin ago ma koboisiei. Iyachini ko u noto anyun Lawik agobo ripsosiekwak.
Numbers9:1 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ ong’atetab Sinai
Numbers9:2 Ingorib anyun lagokab Israel paska eng’ betut ne kiging’at.
Numbers9:3 Oribe eng’ betunnyi ne kiging’at eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan eng’ arawani
Numbers9:4 Kimwachi anyun Musa lagokab Israel korib paska.
Numbers9:5 Ak kirib ichek paska eng’ arawet ne bo tai
Numbers9:6 Ak kimitei bik alage che ki ng’wonen agobo mustab chito
Numbers9:7 ak kilenji bichoton inendet
Numbers9:8 Ak kilenji Musa ichek
Numbers9:9 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers9:10 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Numbers9:11 Ingorib ichek paska noto eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’ eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan koskoleny; amei koboto makatinik che ma kinde mermerek ak ngwek che ng’wonen.
Numbers9:12 Amat kotuuch kot koeekyi
Numbers9:13 Ago chito ne tilil
Numbers9:14 Ak ngo mi kipsagarin ne meng’isiei eng’ kwenung’wong’
Numbers9:15 Ak kituch boldet got eng’ betunoto ne kigilumdae goyoto
Numbers9:16 Ki u noto kotugul: kituch boldet

Numbers9:18 Kibendi lagokab Israel eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah

Numbers9:20 Ak ye kingotebe boldet goyoto betusiek che ng’ering’
Numbers9:21 Ki betusiek alak kotebe boldet goyoto koskoleny agoi karon
Numbers9:22 Ak kingotebe boldet baragutab got
Numbers9:23 Kimeng’isiei eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah
Numbers10:1 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa
Numbers10:2 Yachigei igondisiek aeng’ che bo feda; kitanyi
Numbers10:3 Ak ye kuut ichek tukchoto
Numbers10:4 Ak ngo kuut igondit agenge
Numbers10:5 Ak ye oguut ne bo waagat
Numbers10:6 Ak ye oguut ne bo waagatab aeng’
Numbers10:7 Ago ye machei koyumgei tuiyet
Numbers10:8 Kuutei werikab Aron tisiik igondisiek; ak egu tukchoto ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ okwek eng’ ibinwekwok tugul.
Numbers10:9 Ak ye obendi luget eng’ emeng’wong’
Numbers10:10 Ak eng’ betut ne bo kagaseng’wong’ bo ge
Numbers10:11 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’
Numbers10:12 Kinam anyun lagokab Israel banwekwak koba eng’ ong’atetab Sinai; ak kitebi boldet eng’ ong’atetab Paran.
Numbers10:13 Ak kitoi bandanywa ne bo tai ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ Musa.
Numbers10:14 Ak kiindo songolietab nganaset ne bo lagokab Juda ko u lugosiekwak: ak kibou lugennyi Nason weritab Aminadab.
Numbers10:15 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Isakar Netanel weritab Suar.
Numbers10:16 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Sebulun Eliab weritab Elon.
Numbers10:17 Ak kigibut got; ak kitoi koba werikab Gerson ak werikab Merari

Numbers10:19 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Simeon
Numbers10:20 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Gad Eliasap weritab Deuel.
Numbers10:21 Kitoi anyun koba Kohatik
Numbers10:22 Ak kitoi banda nganasetab lagokab Epraim
Numbers10:23 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Manase
Numbers10:24 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Benjamin
Numbers10:25 Ak kitoi banda nganasetab lagokab Dan
Numbers10:26 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Aser Pagiel weritab Okran.
Numbers10:27 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Naptali Aira weritab Enan.
Numbers10:28 Ki u noto banwekab lagokab Israel ko u lugosiekwak; ak kiiyaptogei.

Numbers11:34 Ak kigiguure yoto Kibrot-hataaba
Numbers11:35 Ak kiba bik eng’ Kibrot-hataaba agoi koit Haserot; ak kimeny Haserot.

Numbers13:5 Eng’ oretab Simeon
Numbers13:6 Eng’ oretab Juda
Numbers13:7 Eng’ oretab Isakar
Numbers13:8 Eng’ oretab Epraim
Numbers13:9 Eng’ oretab Benjamin

Numbers13:11 Eng’ oretab Josep

Numbers13:14 Eng’ oretab Naptali

Numbers14:1 Kiwaach anyun tuiyet komugul koririo
Numbers14:2 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji lagokab Israel tugul Musa ak Aron; ak kilenji tuiyet komugul ichek
Numbers14:3 Amu nee si komutwech Jehovah kebwa emoni
Numbers14:4 King’alaljigei anyun ichegei kole
Numbers14:5 Kiing’urukso ng’ony anyun Musa ak Aron kot kotiiny togochikwak ng’ony
Numbers14:6 Ak kibet ngoroikwak Josua weritab Nun ak Kaleb weritab Jepune
Numbers14:7 ak king’alalji tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel kolenji
Numbers14:8 Ngot kobaibai Jehovah eng’ achek
Numbers14:9 Ago amongelelji Jehovah
Numbers14:10 Ago kimwa tuiyet komugul kole
Numbers14:11 Ak kiteebe Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers14:12 Abare koroito
Numbers14:13 Ak kilenji anyun Musa Jehovah
Numbers14:14 yeityo komwachi bikab emonito
Numbers14:15 Ngot anyun ibar bichu kibagenge
Numbers14:16 Kigobarji Jehovah bichoto ong’atet amu kima imuch inendet komut ichek koba emet ne kiga koyosiechi.
Numbers14:17 Asain anyun nguno ale
Numbers14:18 Masib konerech Jehovah
Numbers14:19 Asain ale
Numbers14:20 Ak kile Jehovah
Numbers14:21 ago iman
Numbers14:22 amu bicho tugul che kigogeer tororindanyu ak kaborunoikyuk
Numbers14:23 mageerei iman emonoto kiayosiechi kwanisiekwak
Numbers14:24 kobate kiboitiondennyu Kaleb
Numbers14:25 Menyei atebwet Amalegik ak Kananik: oweeige mutai
Numbers14:26 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa ak Aron
Numbers14:27 Amuitoi eng’ tuiyoni ya ne ing’unyng’ung’jina kot kotianit? Koagas kang’unyng’ung’etab lagokab Israel
Numbers14:28 Ilenji ichek
Numbers14:29 obekyini ong’atani; tugul che kigiit eng’ okwek
Numbers14:30 moite emonoto iman
Numbers14:31 Ago amuti lagokwok che kiole egu luulenik koba emonoto
Numbers14:32 Ago okwek
Numbers14:33 Ak koyogisiot lagokwok eng’ ong’atani kenyisiek artam
Numbers14:34 Oiboti tengekwogikwok kenyisiek artam ko u koitetab betusiek che kiotar eng’ segeetab emet
Numbers14:35 Kaamwa ane Jehovah ale
Numbers14:36 Ak kibek bichoto che kiiyokto Musa koba kosegei emet
Numbers14:37 kibek eng’ koroito eng’ taitab Jehovah bichoto kiib ng’alek che yaach agobo emet.
Numbers14:38 Ago king’eet Josua weritab Nun
Numbers14:39 Ak kimwachi Musa lagokab Israel ng’alechuto tugul; ak kiririo bichoto mising’.
Numbers14:40 King’eetyo anyun karon mising’
Numbers14:41 Ak kilenji Musa
Numbers14:42 Amat otogoste
Numbers14:43 Amu mi taing’wong’ eng’ oloto Amalegik ak Kananik
Numbers14:44 Ago kima kas it
Numbers14:45 Kichorgei anyun Amalegik ak Kananik che kimenyei tulwonoto
Numbers15:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers15:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Numbers15:3 ak omach ochopchi Jehovah kagochinet ne bunei mat
Numbers15:4 ingogoito anyun inendet ne igoitoi kagochinennyi kogochin Jehovah
Numbers15:5 ak kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin ne bo divaik kobunji kagochinet ne kieei; chob choto koboto kagochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers15:6 Anan ngo mengit
Numbers15:7 ak igoite kagochinet ne kieei ne bo kebebertab somok ne bo hin ne bo divaik
Numbers15:8 Ak ye ichob kirgit ne ming’in koek kagochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers15:9 ingogoito anyun koboto kirgoto kagochinetab busiek ne yamei kebeberwek somok che bo taman che bo epah che bo busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita ne yamei kebebertab hin.
Numbers15:10 Ak igoite kebebertab hin ne bo divaik koek kagochinet ne kieei
Numbers15:11 Kiyachin ko u noto kirgit age tugul
Numbers15:12 Oyachini age tugul ko u koitenywa
Numbers15:13 Yaei ko u noto tugul che salu ga
Numbers15:14 Ak ngo mi kipsagarin kobotok
Numbers15:15 Agenge ng’atutiet ne bo tuiyet eng’ okwek
Numbers15:16 Egu ng’atutiet agenge ak kiruoget agenge eng’ okwek
Numbers15:17 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers15:18 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers15:19 koek anyun
Numbers15:20 Eng’ makatinikwok che bo tai
Numbers15:21 Ogochini Jehovah makatiandeng’wong’ ne bo tai koek kagochinet ne kinamjin barak eng’ ibinwekwok tugul.
Numbers15:22 Ak ye olel
Numbers15:23 tugul che king’atak Jehovah eng’ Musa
Numbers15:24 koek anyun
Numbers15:25 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers15:26 ak kenyochi kaat tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers15:27 Ago ngo lel chi age tugul amaingen
Numbers15:28 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo chichoto lelei
Numbers15:29 Egu ng’atutiet agenge eng’ okwek ne bo chito ne kalel kiy age tugul amaingen
Numbers15:30 Ago chito ne yaei kiy age tugul kokwetyin

Numbers16:1 Kiiyum bik anyun Kora weritab Isar weritab Kohat weritab Lawi
Numbers16:2 ak kong’eetyo eng’ taitab Musa koboto lagokab Israel alak
Numbers16:3 ak kiiyumgei ichegei si kobiit kotil let Musa ak Aron
Numbers16:4 Ak ye kingogas Musa ng’olyondonoto
Numbers16:5 ak kimwachi Kora ak bikyik kolenji
Numbers16:6 Oyai ko u ni; oib terenik okwek
Numbers16:7 ak onde mastinwek terenichoto orit
Numbers16:8 Ak kilenji Musa Kora
Numbers16:9 tos ogeere ole ming’in ng’olyondoni eng’ okwek
Numbers16:10 ak kigomutun irigu
Numbers16:11 Koyumgei anyun inye oegu agenge ak biguk otil let Jehovah: Aron ko ng’o kot ong’unyng’ung’ji?

Numbers16:13 Tos igeere ile kiy ne ming’in ye kiimutwech ketogosu eng’ emet ne ki nyiitat chego ak kumik
Numbers16:14 Ak koboto noto ko ma imutyech emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik
Numbers16:15 Ak kinerech Musa mising’

Numbers16:21 Otabanegei tuiyoni okwek
Numbers16:22 Ak kiing’urukso kot kotiiny togochikwak ng’ony ak kole

Numbers16:30 Ago ngot koyai Jehovah kiy ne tounen
Numbers16:31 Ak kingo kagomwa ng’alechato tugul koges
Numbers16:32 Ak kiyat ng’ony kutinnyi kolugui ichek
Numbers16:33 Kirorokyi keringet kosoptos bichoto

Numbers16:38 terenikab kiptengeginichu

Numbers16:45 Oistoegei tuiyoni
Numbers16:46 Ak kilenji Musa Aron

Numbers16:50 Ak kiweek Aron kwo ole mi Musa agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kisis koroito.

Numbers17:2 Ng’alalji lagokab Israel

Numbers17:5 Yeityo kong’at siaritab chito ne aleweni; ak awong’u eng’ tainnyu kang’unyng’ung’et ne ing’unyng’ung’jinok lagokab Israel.

Numbers18:9 Egu cheguk tukchoto eng’ che tililen mising’
Numbers18:10 Iame tukchoto eng’ ole tilil: amei age tugul ne muren; egu ne tilil eng’ inye.
Numbers18:11 Ak neng’ung’ ni agine; kagochinenywa ne kinamjin barak ne bo konunenywa

Numbers18:13 Bunjinin tongoanik che bo tuguk tugul che mi emenywa
Numbers18:14 Bunjinin kiy age tugul ne itabanat eng’ Israel.

Numbers19:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji
Numbers19:2 Konetisiet ni ne bo ng’atutiet ne kigong’at Jehovah kole
Numbers19:3 ak igochi Eleasar tisiindet
Numbers19:4 ak korooch Eleasar mornennyi korotikab roriandanato
Numbers19:5 ak ingobeel chito roriandanato eng’ tainnyi; koboto muitanyi
Numbers19:6 ak konam tisiindet tarakwet
Numbers19:7 Yeityo komwet tisiindet ngoroikyik
Numbers19:8 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne beelei roriandanato
Numbers19:9 Ak ingoyum orekab roriandanato chito ne ma ng’wan
Numbers19:10 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ne iyumi orechato
Numbers19:11 Muruonitu betusiek tisab inendet ne twaei musto ne bo chi age tugul:
Numbers19:12 ianyinyegei beechoto inendet eng’ betutab somok
Numbers19:13 Imuruoni gotab Jehovah age tugul ne twaei mustab chi age tugul ne kame
Numbers19:14 Ng’atutiet ni ne bo chi ne kame eng’ go: muruonitu eng’ betusiek tisab chi age tugul ne wendi emainato orit
Numbers19:15 Ak ng’wan kiy age tugul ne yatat
Numbers19:16 Ak muruonitu betusiek tisab age tugul ne twaei eng’ kewanin
Numbers19:17 Ak ingoib ichek orekab kagochinet ne kagebeel ne bo tengekto
Numbers19:18 ak konam chito ne kigianyiny husop
Numbers19:19 ak kois chito ne kigianyiny
Numbers19:20 Ak chito ne muruon
Numbers19:21 Egu ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ ichek: ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne isisie beekab katabanet; ak muruonitu agoi koimen inendet ne twaei beechoto bo katabanet.
Numbers19:22 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne twaei chichoto muruon; ak muruonitu agoi koimen inendet ne twaei kioto.

Numbers25:1 Ak kimeny Israel Sitim
Numbers25:2 amu kiguur bik koba ole kigochine kanamonikwak tiseiywek; ak kiamis bik
Numbers25:3 Ak kinamgei Israel ak Baal-peor: ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel.
Numbers25:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa
Numbers25:5 Ak kilenji Musa kiruogikab Israel
Numbers25:6 Ak ogeero
Numbers25:7 Ak kingogeer Pineas weritab Eleasar
Numbers25:8 ak kiisub Israelindonoto agoi emait
Numbers25:9 Kiek che kibek eng’ koroyoto bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan.

Numbers25:11 Kiisto Pineas weritab Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet
Numbers25:12 Mwa anyun ile
Numbers25:13 egu kayomiset ne bo tiseinatet ne bo koigeny eng’ inendet ak eng’ iyotennyi ne biitu let; amu kitinyei ng’etkonda agobo Kamuktaindet

Numbers25:15 Ak kametab kobogoriotab Midianik

Numbers26:1 Ak kingobata koroyoto komwachi Jehovah Musa ak Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet
Numbers26:2 Iit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers26:3 Ak kimwachi Musa ak Eleasar ichek eng’ warengetab Moab ole negite Jordan ole bo Jeriko
Numbers26:4 Oiit bik koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa ak lagokab Israel che kimong’une emetab Misri.
Numbers26:5 Reuben
Numbers26:6 Hesron
Numbers26:7 Chuto ortinwekab bikab Reuben: ak kiek elfusiek artam ak somok ak bogol tisab ak sosom che kigiit eng’ ichek.
Numbers26:8 Ak ki Eliab weritab Palu.
Numbers26:9 Ak werikab Eliab chu; Nemuel
Numbers26:10 ak kiyat ng’ony kutinnyi
Numbers26:11 Ago kima bek werikab Kora.
Numbers26:12 Werikab Simeon chu ko u ortinwekwak: Nemuel
Numbers26:13 che bo Sera
Numbers26:14 Chuto ortinwekab bikab Simeon
Numbers26:15 Werikab Gad chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Sepon
Numbers26:16 che bo Osni
Numbers26:17 che bo Arod
Numbers26:18 Chuto ortinwekab werikab Gad; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek artam ak bogol mut.
Numbers26:19 Werikab Juda chu
Numbers26:20 Ak werikab Juda ko u ortinwekwak ko ki: che bo Sela
Numbers26:21 Ak werikab Peres ko ki: Hesron
Numbers26:22 Chuto ortinwekab Juda; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak lo ak bogol mut.
Numbers26:23 Werikab Isakar chu ko u ortinwekwak: Tola
Numbers26:24 che bo Jasub
Numbers26:25 Chuto ortinwekab Isakar
Numbers26:26 Werikab Sebulun chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Sered
Numbers26:27 Chuto ortinwekab Sebulunik; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak bogol mut.
Numbers26:28 Werikab Josep chu ko u ortinwekwak: Manase ak Epraim.
Numbers26:29 Werikab Manase chu: che bo Makir
Numbers26:30 Werikab Gilead chu: Ieser
Numbers26:31 ak Asriel
Numbers26:32 ak Semida
Numbers26:33 Ak kima kotinyei werik Selopehad weritab Heper
Numbers26:34 Chuto ortinwekab Manase; kiek che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek konom ak aeng’ ak bogol tisab.
Numbers26:35 Werikab Epraim chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Sutela
Numbers26:36 Ak chu werikab Sutela: che bo Eran
Numbers26:37 Chuto ortinwekab werikab Epraim; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ ak bogol mut. Chuto werikab Josep ko u ortinwekwak.
Numbers26:38 Werikab Benjamin chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Bela
Numbers26:39 che bo Sepupam
Numbers26:40 Ak Ard ak Naaman ko ki werikab Bela: che bo Ard
Numbers26:41 Choto ko werikab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak; kiek che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol lo.
Numbers26:42 Werikab Dan chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Suham
Numbers26:43 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Suhamik
Numbers26:44 Werikab Aser chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Imna
Numbers26:45 Che bo werikab Beria: che bo Heber
Numbers26:46 Ak kainetab cheptab Aser ko ki Sera.
Numbers26:47 Choto ortinwekab Aser che kigiit; kiek elfusiek konom ak somok ak bogol ang’wan.
Numbers26:48 Werikab Naptali ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Jaseel
Numbers26:49 che bo Jeser
Numbers26:50 Choto ko ortinwekab Naptali ko u tilionutikwak; kiek che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol ang’wan.
Numbers26:51 Kiek elfusiek bogol lo ak agenge ak bogol tisab ak sosom choto che kigiit eng’ lagokab Israel.
Numbers26:52 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers26:53 Kipchechin emet chuto koek borotet ko u koitetab kainaik.
Numbers26:54 Che kasiirto koitenywa itesyini borotet
Numbers26:55 Ago kipcheei emet eng’ seretab barbarek: nyabani ko u kainaikab ortinwekab kwanisiekwak.
Numbers26:56 Kipchechin borotenywa ko u ole teptoi seretab barbarek eng’ che chang’ ak eng’ che ng’ering’.
Numbers26:57 Ak chu che kigiit eng’ Lawik ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Gerson
Numbers26:58 Chuto ortinwekab Lawik: gotab Libnitik
Numbers26:59 Ak kainetab osotiotab Amram ko ki Jokebed
Numbers26:60 Ak kigisikyi Aron
Numbers26:61 Ak kibek Nadab ak Abihu ye kiigoitoi mat ne ter eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Numbers26:62 Ak kiek elfusiek tiptem ak somok che kigiit eng’ ichek
Numbers26:63 Choto che kiit Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet; che kiit lagokab Israel eng’ warengetab Moab eng’ ole negite Jordan eng’ Jeriko.
Numbers26:64 Ago eng’ chuto
Numbers26:65 Amu kiga mwa Jehovah agobo ichek

Numbers28:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers28:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers28:3 Ak ilenji
Numbers28:4 Igoitoi aruet agenge karon
Numbers28:5 koboto kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo epah ne bo busiek che ng’ootin
Numbers28:6 Noto kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul
Numbers28:7 Ak ingoek kagochinennyi ne keei kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin eng’ aruet agenge: irong’jini ole tilil kagochinet ne kieei che ng’wonen eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Numbers28:8 Ak igoite aruet age koskoleny: ko u kagochinetab busiek ne igoitoi karon
Numbers28:9 Ak igoite arek aeng’
Numbers28:10 noto kagochinet ne kibeelei eng’ sabato age tugul
Numbers28:11 Ak eng’ taunaikab arawekwok
Numbers28:12 Koboto kebeberwek somok che bo taman che bo epah che bo busiek che ng’ootin
Numbers28:13 ak kebebertab taman ne bo busiek che ng’ootin
Numbers28:14 Ak ingoek kagochinoikwak che keei kebebertab hin ne bo divaik eng’ kiruk
Numbers28:15 Ak kobunji kwesta agenge kagochinetab tengekto eng’ Jehovah; kigoitoi noto ketesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul
Numbers28:16 Biitu paska ne bo Jehovah eng’ arawet ne bo tai
Numbers28:17 Ak egu igorta eng’ betut ne bo taman ak mut ne bo arawanito: kiamei makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ betusiek tisab.
Numbers28:18 Biitu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tai; amoyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot:
Numbers28:19 ago ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat
Numbers28:20 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin
Numbers28:21 ak igoitoi kebebertab taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab;
Numbers28:22 kwesta agenge ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Numbers28:23 Ogoitoi chuto otesyini kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo karon
Numbers28:24 Ogoitoi ko u noto eng’ betut age tugul
Numbers28:25 Ak egu kayumetab ge eng’ betutab tisab; amoyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot.
Numbers28:26 Kogeny ye ogochini Jehovah
Numbers28:27 ago ogoite kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah; kirugik aeng’ che neran
Numbers28:28 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers28:29 ak kebebertab taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab;
Numbers28:30 kwesta agenge
Numbers28:31 Ogoitoi che kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:1 Ak onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ arawet ne bo tisab
Numbers29:2 Ak ogochi Jehovah kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny; kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers29:3 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers29:4 ak kebeberta agenge ne bo taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab:
Numbers29:5 ak kwesta agenge kobunji kagochinetab tengekto
Numbers29:6 ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo arawet ne kaleel
Numbers29:7 Ak onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawanito bo tisab; ak onyalili sobonwekwok; amoyai boit age tugul:
Numbers29:8 ago ogochini Jehovah kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny; kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers29:9 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers29:10 ak kebeberta agenge ne bo taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab:
Numbers29:11 kwesta agenge ne bo kagochinetab tengekto; kitesyin choto kagochinetab tengekto ne bo kaigaigaet
Numbers29:12 Ak onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betutab taman ak mut eng’ arawetab tisab; amoyai boit age tugul ne bo otwoknot
Numbers29:13 ak ogoite kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bunei mat
Numbers29:14 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers29:15 ak kebebertab taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato taman ak ang’wan:
Numbers29:16 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:17 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kirugik taman ak aeng’ che neran
Numbers29:18 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto
Numbers29:19 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:20 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo somok kirugik taman ak agenge
Numbers29:21 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto
Numbers29:22 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:23 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo ang’wan kirugik taman
Numbers29:24 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek
Numbers29:25 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:26 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo mut kirugik sogol
Numbers29:27 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto
Numbers29:28 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:29 Ak ogoite kirugik sisiit eng’ betut ne bo lo
Numbers29:30 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto
Numbers29:31 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:32 Ak ogoite eng’ betutab tisab kirugik tisab
Numbers29:33 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei
Numbers29:34 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto
Numbers29:35 Eng’ betut ne bo sisiit onyoru tuiyetab kaming’inetab ge: amoyai boit age tugul:
Numbers29:36 ago ogoite kagochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers29:37 bendi ko u koitenywa
Numbers29:38 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Numbers29:39 Ogochini Jehovah chuto eng’ igorwekwok che kiging’at

Numbers30:1 Ak kimwachi Musa bounikab ortinwekab lagokab Israel kolenji
Numbers30:2 Ye iarorji chi Jehovah kiy
Numbers30:3 Ak kogeny
Numbers30:4 ak kogas kwandanyi kaarortaennyi
Numbers30:5 Ago ngo ete kwandanyi eng’ betut ne kagas; ko matonondos kaarortaosiekyik
Numbers30:6 Ak ngitun kobogoriondonoto kota komitei eng’ inendet kaarortaosiekyik
Numbers30:7 ak kogas manong’otiondennyi
Numbers30:8 Ago ngo ete manong’otiondennyi eng’ betut ne kagas; kowal anyun chichoto kaarortaetab kobogoriondonoto ne kotinyei
Numbers30:9 Ago kaarortaetab mosok
Numbers30:10 Ak ngo aror inendet komi gotab manong’otiondennyi
Numbers30:11 ak kogas manong’otiondennyi
Numbers30:12 Ago ngo wal manong’otiondennyi tukchoto koek buch eng’ betut ne kigas; ko matononi anyun kiy age tugul ne mong’une kutinnyi agobo kaarortaosiekyik
Numbers30:13 Imuchi kogimit manong’otiot
Numbers30:14 Ago ngo sis manong’otiondennyi eng’ inendet betut age tugul; kogimiti anyun kaarortaosiekyik tugul
Numbers30:15 Ago ngo but koek buch ko kagogas; koib anyun inendet tengektab kwonyoto.

Numbers31:16 Ogeero
Numbers31:17 Ara anyun

Numbers31:20 Ak oanyiny okwege ngoriet age tugul
Numbers31:21 Ak kilenji Eleasar murenikab luget che kiba boriet
Numbers31:22 ago tahabu
Numbers31:23 kiy age tugul ne machootei eng’ mat
Numbers31:24 Ak omwet ngoroikwok eng’ betutab tisab
Numbers31:25 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa
Numbers31:26 Iit luulenik tugul che kigenam
Numbers31:27 ak ipchei che kioluul kobwa kebeberwek aeng’u; bunjin kebeberta age bik che ingen luget
Numbers31:28 yeityo inemu aisurut ne bo Jehovah eng’ murenikab luget che kiba boriet: agenge eng’ bogol mut
Numbers31:29 onemune choto kebebertanywa ak igochi tisiindet Eleasar

Numbers31:31 Ak kiyai Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa.

Numbers31:34 ak sigirok elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak agenge
Numbers31:35 ak bik elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ tugul
Numbers31:36 Koitetab kebeberta
Numbers31:37 ak ki bogol lo ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut aisurutab Jehovah ne bo kechirek.
Numbers31:38 Ak kiek che bo tuga elfusiek sosom ak lo; ak kiek aisurutab Jehovah eng’ choto
Numbers31:39 Ak sigirok
Numbers31:40 Ak kiek bik elfusiek taman ak lo; ak kiek aisurutab Jehovah eng’ choto bik sosom ak aeng’.

Numbers31:44 ak che bo tuga elfusiek sosom ak lo
Numbers31:45 ak sigirok elfusiek sosom ak bogol mut
Numbers31:46 ak bik elfusiek taman ak lo;)
Numbers31:47 ak kiinem Musa eng’ kebebertab lagokab Israel

Numbers33:43 Ak kiba eng’ Bunon
Numbers33:44 Ak kiba eng’ Obot
Numbers33:45 Ak kiba eng’ Iyim
Numbers33:46 Ak kiba eng’ Dibon-gad
Numbers33:47 Ak kiba eng’ Almon-diblataim
Numbers33:48 Ak kiba eng’ tulonokab Abarim
Numbers33:49 Ak kiimuung’e ole negite Jordan
Numbers33:50 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ warengetab Moab
Numbers33:51 Mwachi lagokab Israel
Numbers33:52 oon anyun bik tugul che menyei emonoto
Numbers33:53 ak onam emet kobunjok
Numbers33:54 Ak opchechige emonoto onyabani
Numbers33:55 Ago ngo moon bik che menyei emet
Numbers33:56 Ak tun ayaiywok ko u ye kiabwati ale ayachjini ichek.
Numbers34:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers34:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers34:3 bochitu anyun komostang’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo tai kong’eete ong’atetab Sin korob tabandab Edom
Numbers34:4 ak koweigei kiwoteng’wong’ kotokyigei murot ne bo tai eng’ ole kitogostoe kebendi Akrabim
Numbers34:5 ak koweigei kiwotet kong’eete Asmon agoi koit ainetab Misri
Numbers34:6 Ak egu nyanjet ne o kiwoteng’wong’ ne mi cherongo
Numbers34:7 Ak egu ni kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo katam: kong’eete nyanjet ne oaroroti agoi tulwetab Hor:
Numbers34:8 ak koboch tulwetab Hor
Numbers34:9 ak itei kiwotet Sipron
Numbers34:10 Yeityo oarorote kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo komostab kong’asis koboch Hasar-enan agoi Sepam:
Numbers34:11 ak kochortagei kiwotet kong’eete Sepam agoi Ribla
Numbers34:12 ak kochortagei kiwotet agoi Jordan
Numbers34:13 Ak king’at Musa lagokab Israel kolenji
Numbers34:14 amu kigotaach borotenywa oretab lagokab Reuben ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak
Numbers34:15 kigotaach borotenywa ortinwechoto aeng’u ak kebeber eng’ Jordan bitoni eng’ Jeriko ole tokyingei kong’asis.
Numbers34:16 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers34:17 Chu kainaikab bik che pcheiywok emet koek boroteng’wong’: Eleasar tisiindet
Numbers34:18 Ak onam bounindet ne bo oret age tugul
Numbers34:19 Kainaikab bichoto chu: eng’ oretab Juda
Numbers34:20 Ak eng’ oretab lagokab Simeon
Numbers34:21 Eliad weritab Kislon
Numbers34:22 Ak bounindet Buki weritab Jogli eng’ oretab lagokab Dan.
Numbers34:23 Bounindet Haniel weritab Epod eng’ lagokab Josep
Numbers34:24 bounindet Kemuel weritab Siptan
Numbers34:25 Ak bounindet Elisapan weritab Parnak
Numbers34:26 Ak bounindet Paltiel weritab Asan
Numbers34:27 Ak bounindet Aihud weritab Selomi
Numbers34:28 Ak bounindet Pedael weritab Amiud
Numbers34:29 Chuto che king’at Jehovah kopchechi lagokab Israel borotet eng’ emetab Kanan.
Numbers35:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ warengetab Moab ole negite Jordan eng’ ole bo Jeriko
Numbers35:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel kogochi Lawik nganasok eng’ borotenywa si komeny; ak ogochi Lawik ole agete tuga
Numbers35:3 Ak komeny nganasochoto
Numbers35:4 Egu kakwautik elfut agenge che bo eut oloto agete eng’ nganasok che ogochini Lawik
Numbers35:5 Ak okwa kakwautik elfusiek aeng’ che bo eut eng’ nganaset ole tokyingei kong’asis
Numbers35:6 Egu nganasok che ogochini Lawik
Numbers35:7 Egu artam ak sisiit nganasok tugul che ogochini Lawik: koboto emotinwekwak chugai.
Numbers35:8 Ak eng’ nganasochoto ogoitoi eng’ che bo lagokab Israel
Numbers35:9 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji
Numbers35:10 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Numbers35:11 otabanjige nganasok koek nganasok che omwechini; si kobiit komwechi oloto ne karumis eng’ lelset.
Numbers35:12 Ak egu nganasochoto che omwechini ye komwee ne yaaktoi mugetut; si ma kibar ne karumis
Numbers35:13 Ak nganasochoto lo ogoitoi
Numbers35:14 Ogoitoi nganasok somok eng’ Jordan bitonin
Numbers35:15 Egu nganasochoto lo ole mwechin lagokab Israel
Numbers35:16 Ago ngo kikwere karnet ak kome
Numbers35:17 Ak ngo kiwire koita ne yamei kobar chi
Numbers35:18 Anan ngo kikwere ketit ne yamei kobar chi
Numbers35:19 Barei yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik rumindonoto: ngo tuiyo ak inendet
Numbers35:20 Ak ngo toorta amu wechet
Numbers35:21 anan ngo rabach eng’ bunyondit
Numbers35:22 Ago ngo toorta eng’ yoto
Numbers35:23 anan eng’ koita ne yamei kobar chi
Numbers35:24 koruoch anyun tuiyet agobo barindonoto ak yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik ko u ole teptoi kiruogutichu:
Numbers35:25 ak kosor tuiyet rumindonoto eng’ eutab yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik
Numbers35:26 Ago ngot kosiir rumindonoto kiwotetab nganasennyi ne kiga mwechi;
Numbers35:27 ak konyorji inendet yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik sang’utab nganasennyi ne kimwechin
Numbers35:28 Amu kata nyoljin kotebe nganasennyi ne kimwechin agoi kome tisiindet ne o: ago ye kagome tisiindet ne o koweekyigei anyun rumindet emennyi.
Numbers35:29 Egu tuguchuto ng’atutietab kiruoget eng’ okwek eng’ ibinwekwok tugul ak eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul.
Numbers35:30 Age tugul ne barei chi
Numbers35:31 Amotaach kiy ne kitiage sobondab rumindet ne nyoljin meet: ago kibarei iman.
Numbers35:32 Ak motaach kiy ne kitiage chi ne kamwechi nganasennyi ne kimwechin
Numbers35:33 Amomuruon anyun emet ne omi: amu imuruoni emet korotik: ak mami kiy ne kianyinye emet amu korotik che kitumjigei
Numbers35:34 Ameng’wanit anyun emet ne omenye
Numbers36:1 Ak kirik che eechen eng’ gorikab kwanisiek che bo oretab lagokab Gilead
Numbers36:2 ak kile
Numbers36:3 Ak ngotun ichek werikab bororiosiek alak che bo lagokab Israel
Numbers36:4 Ak ye kait jubilii ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers36:5 Ak king’at Musa lagokab Israel ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenji
Numbers36:6 Kang’at Jehovah ng’olyondoni agobo tibikab Selopehad
Numbers36:7 Si ma kiuuto borotet age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers36:8 Ak chepto age tugul ne bunjin borotet eng’ bororiet age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel
Numbers36:9 Si ma kiuuto borotet age tugul kong’eete bororiet age agoi bororiet age
Numbers36:10 Kiyai tibikab Selopehad ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa:
Numbers36:11 amu kiitun Mala
Numbers36:12 Kiitun ichek ortinwekab werikab Manase weritab Josep
Numbers36:13 Chuto anyun ng’atutik ak kiruogutik

Deuteronomy23:3 Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah Amonindet anan Moabindet; amat komanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah agot eng’ ibinda ne bo taman eng’ tilionutikwak agoi koigeny:
Deuteronomy23:4 amu kima torogunenok makatinik ak beek ye kiomong’une Misri; amu kial Balaam weritab Beor konyo eng’ Petor ne mi Mesopotamia konyo kochupten.

Deuteronomy23:6 Amat icheng’ kalyenywa anan borotenywa eng’ betusieguk tugul koigeny.

Deuteronomy23:14 amu wendote Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kwenutab nganaseng’ung’

Deuteronomy28:52 Ak koyiemin eng’ kurgotiguk tugul

Deuteronomy28:54 Ak kogeere kong’ ne ya chito ne ko kiptalbisio ak ko ng’arng’arge ne mi kwenung’wong’

Deuteronomy28:57 ak eng’ sindariet ne sichei inendet
Deuteronomy28:58 Ngo merib iyai ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni che kigisirji bukuini

Deuteronomy29:7 Ak ye kingoitu oli
Deuteronomy29:8 ak kiginam emenywa

Joshua8:18 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua
Joshua8:19 Ak king’eetyo bichu karibistos kochok eng’ ole karibisye
Joshua8:20 Ak kingogusgong’ bikab Ai
Joshua8:21 Ak kingogeer Josua ak Israel tugul kole kagonam nganaset bichu karibistos
Joshua8:22 Ak kibwa agichek che kimi nganaset kobargei ak bichoto; kotebe anyun kwenutab Israel
Joshua8:23 Ak kinam laitoriatab Ai kosobei
Joshua8:24 Ak kingo kagoges Israel baretab bik tugul che kimenyei Ai eng’ warenget
Joshua8:25 Ak tugul che kiibutyo betunoto
Joshua8:26 Amu ma aruny Josua eunnyi
Joshua8:27 Ago kikweri Israel tuga ak barunenikab nganasanato kobunji
Joshua8:28 Kobeel anyun Josua Ai
Joshua8:29 Ak kiisonginin laitoriatab Ai eng’ ketit kot koimen: ak kingororokta asista kong’at Josua kechoor mustanyi eng’ ketit konyo ng’ony
Joshua8:30 Kiteekyi anyun Josua Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel
Joshua8:31 ko u ye king’at Musa otwogindetab Jehovah lagokab Israel
Joshua8:32 Ak kisirji koichato Ng’atutikab Musa
Joshua8:33 Ak kitononso Israel tugul ak boisiekwak
Joshua8:34 Ak ye ibata kosoman ng’alek tugul che bo Ng’atutik
Joshua8:35 Mami ng’olyo eng’ ng’alek tugul che king’at Musa ne ma soman Josua eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel
Joshua9:1 Ak ye kingogas laitorinik tugul che kimi Jordan bitonin
Joshua9:2 koyumgei kobargei ak Josua koboto Israel
Joshua9:3 Ago kingogas bik che kimenyei Gibeon kit ne kiga yachi Josua Jeriko ak Ai
Joshua9:4 koyai ng’alset agichek
Joshua9:5 ak kweonik che kigoosegitu che kigeginogin
Joshua9:6 Ak kiba ole mi Josua eng’ nganaset eng’ Gilgal
Joshua9:7 Ak kilenji bikab Israel Hibik
Joshua9:8 Ak kilenji ichek Josua
Joshua9:9 Ak kolenji
Joshua9:10 ak tuguk tugul che kiyachi laitorinik aeng’ che bo Amorik
Joshua9:11 Ak kimwawech boisiekyok ak bik tugul che menyei emennyo
Joshua9:12 Kigiibu makatinichuchok eng’ gorikyok ko ta komi ma eng’ betut ne kiging’eetosi kebwane oling’wong’; ago nguno ogeero
Joshua9:13 ak ki leelach lolotinwechu kiga kinyiit divaik
Joshua9:14 Ak kiam ichek amitwogikab bichoto
Joshua9:15 Ak kiyai kalyet Josua ak icheget
Joshua9:16 Ak kingobata betusiek somogu
Joshua9:17 Ak kiba lagokab Israel ak koit nganasokab bichoto eng’ betutab somok. Nganasokwak ko ki Gibeon
Joshua9:18 Ak ma bar lagokab Israel ichek
Joshua9:19 Ago kilenji bounik tugul tuiyet komugul
Joshua9:20 Kiyachini ko u ni
Joshua9:21 Ak kilenji bounik ichek
Joshua9:22 Kiiyokto anyun Josua keguur ichek
Joshua9:23 Ara anyun
Joshua9:24 Ak kiwolji ichek Josua kolenji
Joshua9:25 Ara anyun
Joshua9:26 Ak kiyachi anyun ko u noto
Joshua9:27 Ak kiyai Josua ichek eng’ betunoto koek che betei kwenik ak koramjin beek tuiyet ak kaptisisietab Jehovah
Joshua10:1 Ak kingogas Adoni-sedek laitoriatab Jerusalem kole kigonam Josua Ai
Joshua10:2 koiywei mising’
Joshua10:3 Koyokto anyun Adoni-sedek laitoriatab Jerusalem
Joshua10:4 Otogosu oldanyu
Joshua10:5 Kiiyumgei anyun laitorinik mutu che bo Amorik
Joshua10:6 Kiiyokto bikab Gibeon Josua eng’ nganaset eng’ Gilgal
Joshua10:7 Kitogosta anyun Josua eng’ Gilgal
Joshua10:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua
Joshua10:9 Kiche anyun Josua ichek; amu kitogosta eng’ Gilgal kemout komugul.
Joshua10:10 Kiiyesta Jehovah ichek eng’ taitab Israel
Joshua10:11 Ak ye kingomwei eng’ taitab Israel
Joshua10:12 King’alalji anyun Josua Jehovah eng’ betut ne kiigoito Jehovah Amorik eng’ taitab lagokab Israel; ak kimwa eng’ taitab lagokab Israel
Joshua10:13 Ak kitonon asista
Joshua10:14 Ak kitom kobiitu betut ne u noto eng tai amata kobiit eng’ let
Joshua10:15 Kiweek Josua anyun
Joshua10:16 Kimwei anyun laitorinichoto mutu
Joshua10:17 Ak kigimwachi Josua kelenji
Joshua10:18 Kole Josua anyun
Joshua10:19 amat otebi okweget; oon bunikwok
Joshua10:20 Ak kingo kagobar Josua ak lagokab Israel ichek koges eng’ baret ne o mising’
Joshua10:21 koweek anyun bik tugul eng’ kalyet koba nganaset ole mi Josua eng’ Makeda: ma biit chi ne kitwek komwa ng’olyot ne ya agobo lagokab Israel.
Joshua10:22 Komwa Josua anyun
Joshua10:23 Ak kiyai ko u noto
Joshua10:24 Ak kingo kagomutyi Josua laitorinichato
Joshua10:25 Ak kilenji Josua ichek
Joshua10:26 Ye ibata
Joshua10:27 Ak ye kimachei kororokta asista
Joshua10:28 Ak kinam Josua Makeda betunoto
Joshua10:29 Ak kisiirto Josua eng’ Makeda
Joshua10:30 ak kiigoito Jehovah nganasanato agine
Joshua10:31 Ak kisiirto Josua eng’ Libna
Joshua10:32 ak kiinde Jehovah Lakis eunekab Israel
Joshua10:33 Kitogos anyun Horam laitoriatab Geser kolen kotoret Lakis; ak kibar Josua inendet koboto bikyik
Joshua10:34 Ak kisiirto Josua eng’ Lakis
Joshua10:35 ak kinam eng’ betunoto
Joshua10:36 Ak kitogosta Josua eng’ Eglon
Joshua10:37 ak kinam
Joshua10:38 Ak kiweek Josua
Joshua10:39 ak kinam
Joshua10:40 Kibar anyun Josua emet tugul
Joshua10:41 Ak kibar Josua ichek koboch Kades-barnea agoi Gasa
Joshua10:42 Ak kinam Josua laitorinichoto tugul
Joshua10:43 Ak kiweek Josua
Joshua11:1 Ak kingogas Jabin laitoriatab Hasor
Joshua11:2 ak laitorinik che kimi murot ne bo katam
Joshua11:3 agoi oldab Kananik eng’ kong’asis
Joshua11:4 Ak kimanda icheget ak lugosiekwak tugul
Joshua11:5 Ak kituiyo laitorinichuto tugul; ak kibwa ak koteech komosta agenge eng’ ye negite beekab Merom
Joshua11:6 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua
Joshua11:7 Konyo anyun Josua
Joshua11:8 Ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eunekab Israel
Joshua11:9 Ak kiyachi Josua ichek ko u ye king’at Jehovah: kieb kwarinikab mbartanyisiekwak
Joshua11:10 Ak kiweek Josua eng’ betunoto
Joshua11:11 Ak kibar bik tugul che kimi nganasanato eng’ rotwetab chok
Joshua11:12 Ak kinam Josua nganasok tugul che bo laitorinichato
Joshua11:13 Ago kima beel Israel nganasok che kitonondos eng’ tulonokwak
Joshua11:14 Ak kiib Israel tuguk tugul che bo nganasochuto
Joshua11:15 Ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa otwogindennyi
Joshua11:16 Kinam anyun Josua emonoto tugul
Joshua11:17 koboch tulwetab Halak
Joshua11:18 Kiyai Josua luget eng’ betusiek che chang’ koboto laitorinichato.
Joshua11:19 Ma biit nganaset agot agenge ne kiyai kalyet ak lagokab Israel
Joshua11:20 Amu ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiiuuiit mugulelwekwak
Joshua11:21 Ak kinyo Josua eng’ betusiechoto kobar Anagik kobetyo eng’ emetab tulonok
Joshua11:22 Ma ng’et agot agenge eng’ Anagichato eng’ emetab lagokab Israel: kobate eng’ Gasa kityo
Joshua11:23 Kinam anyun Josua emet komugul
Joshua12:1 Chu ko laitorinikab emonoto
Joshua12:2 Sihon laitoriatab Amorik

Joshua12:5 ak kibounisiei eng’ tulwetab Hermon
Joshua12:6 Kibar Musa
Joshua12:7 Chuto laitorinikab emonoto che kibar Josua ak lagokab Israel eng’ Jordan bitonin ole tokyingei cherongo
Joshua12:8 eng’ emetab tulonok

Joshua13:1 Ak kiga koosit Josua
Joshua13:2 Ni emet ne ta ko ng’etunot: komoswek tugul che bo Pilistik
Joshua13:3 koboch Sihor
Joshua13:4 eng’ murot ne bo tai: emet tugul ne bo Kananik
Joshua13:5 ak emetab Gebalik
Joshua13:6 bik tugul che menyei emetab tulonok koboch Lebanon kot koit Misrepotmaim
Joshua13:7 Pchechi anyun emonito bororiosiechuto sogol ak kebebertab che bo Manase.
Joshua13:8 Kisich borotenywa bikab Reuben ak che bo Gad koboto inendet
Joshua13:9 koboch Aroer
Joshua13:10 ak nganasok tugul che bo Sihon laitoriatab Amorik
Joshua13:11 ak Gilead
Joshua13:12 bororiet tugul ne bo Og eng’ Basan
Joshua13:13 Ago ma on lagokab Israel Gesurik
Joshua13:14 Bororietab Lawik kityo ne ma igochi borotet; borotenywa kagochinoikab Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel
Joshua13:15 Ak kiigochi Musa bororietab lagokab Reuben ko u ortinwekwak.
Joshua13:16 Kiboch kiwotenywa Aroer
Joshua13:17 Hesbon
Joshua13:18 ak Jahas
Joshua13:19 ak Kiriataim
Joshua13:20 ak Bet-peor
Joshua13:21 ak nganasok tugul che bo warenget
Joshua13:22 Kibar lagokab Israel Balaam agine weritab Beor
Joshua13:23 Ak kiwotetab lagokab Reuben ko ki Jordan
Joshua13:24 Ak kiigochi Musa bororietab Gad
Joshua13:25 Ak kiwotenywa ko ki Jaser
Joshua13:26 ak koboch Hesbon kot koit Ramat-mispe
Joshua13:27 ak eng’ atebwet
Joshua13:28 Nito ko borotetab lagokab Gad ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua13:29 Ak kiigochi Musa kebebertab bororietab Manase borotet: ak kibunji kebebertab bororietab Manase ko u ortinwekwak.
Joshua13:30 Ak kiboch kiwotenywa Maanaim
Joshua13:31 ak kebebertab Gilead
Joshua13:32 Chuto ko borotosiek che kipchei Musa eng’ warengosiekab Moab
Joshua13:33 Ago ma igochi Musa bororietab Lawik borotet age tugul: Jehovah
Joshua14:1 Chu ko borotosiek che kinam lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Kanan
Joshua14:2 kipchei kosube barbarekab borotenywa
Joshua14:3 Amu kiga kogochi Musa borotet bororiosiechoto aeng’ ak kebebertab bororiet eng’ Jordan bitonin: ago ma igochi Lawik borotet age tugul eng’ kwenunywa.
Joshua14:4 Amu ki bororiosiek aeng’ lagokab Josep
Joshua14:5 Ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa
Joshua14:6 Kirikta anyun lagokab Juda koba ole mi Josua eng’ Gilgal: ak kimwachi Kaleb weritab Jepune Kenisindet inendet
Joshua14:7 Kia bo kenyisiek artam ye kiiyokwa Musa otwogindetab Jehovah eng’ Kades-barnea anyo asegei emet; ak kiaipchi inendet ng’olyot ko u ye kimi muguleldanyu.
Joshua14:8 Ago kiigochi tupchosiekyuk che kigitogostoi tugul mugulelwekab bik komeiyo: ago kiasub Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu eng’ kagesunatetab ge.
Joshua14:9 Ak kiiyosio Musa betunoto kole
Joshua14:10 Keer anyun-o
Joshua14:11 Agot rani ko a kim ko u eng’ betut ne kiiyoktaa Musa: kit ne ki u kimnatennyu eng’ betunoto
Joshua14:12 Noto anyun
Joshua14:13 Ak kiiberur Josua inendet; ak kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune Hebron koek borotennyi.
Joshua14:14 Kiek anyun Hebron borotetab Kaleb weritab Jepune Kenisindet agoi ra; amu kiisub Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel eng’ kagesunatetab ge.
Joshua14:15 Kainetab Hebron eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-arba; ki chito ne o Arba kosiir tugul eng’ Anagik. Ak kiimuuny emet eng’ luget.
Joshua15:1 Ak barbariatab bororietab lagokab Juda ko u ortinwekwak ko kiibutyi kiwotetab Edom
Joshua15:2 Kibochit kiwotenywa ne bo murot ne bo tai tabandab Araraita ne bo Munyuk
Joshua15:3 ak kibun murot ne bo tai ole kitogostoe kebendi Akrabik
Joshua15:4 ak kisiirto kwo Asmon
Joshua15:5 Ak kiboch kiwotetab kong’asis Araraita ne bo Munyuk
Joshua15:6 ak kiwa kiwotet kot koit Bet-hogla
Joshua15:7 ak kiwa kiwotet kot koit Debir kobun atebwetab Akor si kotokyigei murot ne bo katam
Joshua15:8 ak kiwa kiwotet kobun atebwetab weritab Hinom agoi tabandab Jebusindet murot ne bo tai (noto ko Jerusalem): ak kiwa kiwotet agoi tulwet barak ne mi taitab atebwetab Hinom ne tokyingei cherongo
Joshua15:9 ak kigitil kiwotet kong’eete tulwet barak kot koit kondab beekab Neptoa
Joshua15:10 ak kiweek kiwotet kong’eete Baala kotokyigei cherongo agoi tulwetab Seir
Joshua15:11 ak kimanda kiwotet kwo tabandab Ekron murot ne bo katam: ak kigitil kiwotet kotorjigei Sikeron
Joshua15:12 Ak kiwotet ne bo cherongo ko ki nyanjet ne o
Joshua15:13 Ak kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune kebeberta eng’ kwenutab lagokab Juda
Joshua15:14 Ak kion Kaleb eng’ oloto werik somok che bo Anak
Joshua15:15 Ak kitogosta eng’ oloto kwo kobargei ak che kimenyei Debir: kainetab Debir eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-seper.
Joshua15:16 Ak kile Kaleb
Joshua15:17 Ak kinam Otniel weritab Kenas
Joshua15:18 Ak ye kingoit ole mi inendet
Joshua15:19 Ak kimwa kole
Joshua15:20 Ni ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Juda ko u ortinwekwak.
Joshua15:21 Ak nganasokab taban che bo bororietab lagokab Juda eng’ ole tokyingei kiwotetab Edom eng’ Murot ne bo Tai ko ki Kabseel

Joshua16:1 Ak kiibutyi barbariatab lagokab Josep Jordan eng’ Jeriko
Joshua16:2 ak kiwa komanda eng’ Bet-el kwo Lus
Joshua16:3 ak kwo kochortagei kotokyigei cherongo agoi kiwotetab Japletik
Joshua16:4 Ak kinam lagokab Josep
Joshua16:5 Ak ki u ni kiwotetab lagokab Epraim
Joshua16:6 ak kiwa kiwotet kotokyingei cherongo eng’ Mikmetat eng’ murot ne bo katam; ak kiyiemak kiwotet kotokyigei kong’asis kot koit Taanat-silo
Joshua16:7 ak kichortagei eng’ Janoa kwo Atarot
Joshua16:8 Kiwa kiwotet kong’eete Tapua kobun cherongo kot koit ainetab Kana; ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi nyanjet. Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Epraim ko u ortinwekwak;
Joshua16:9 koboto nganasok che kigitabanji lagokab Epraim eng’ kwenutab borotetab lagokab Manase
Joshua16:10 Ago ma on Kanaik che kimenyei Geser: ago kimeny Kananik kwenutab Epraim
Joshua17:1 Ak ni ko ki barbariatab bororietab Manase; amu ki taita ne bo Josep. Ko u Makir
Joshua17:2 Ak kibunji barbariat lagokab Manase che king’et
Joshua17:3 Ago kima sich werik Selopehad
Joshua17:4 Ak kibwa korik taitab Eleasar tisiindet
Joshua17:5 Ak kisich Manase kebeberwek taman
Joshua17:6 amu kitinyei tibikab Manase borotet koboto werikyik: ak kibunji emetab Gilead werikab Manase che king’et.
Joshua17:7 Ak king’eete kiwotetab Manase Aser kot koit Mikmetat
Joshua17:8 Ki bo Manase emetab Tapua: ago Tapua ne mi kiwotetab Manase ko ki bo lagokab Epraim.
Joshua17:9 Ak kichortagei kiwotet kwo ainetab Kana
Joshua17:10 ki bo Epraim komostab tai
Joshua17:11 Ak kitinyei Manase eng’ Isakar ak eng’ Aser Bet-sean ak nganasokyik
Joshua17:12 Ago kima imuch lagokab Manase koon che kimenyei nganasochoto; ago kimach mising’ Kananik komeng’is eng’ emonoto.
Joshua17:13 Ak ye kiga kogimegitu lagokab Israel
Joshua17:14 Ak king’alalji lagokab Josep Josua
Joshua17:15 Ak kilenji Josua ichek
Joshua17:16 Ak kimwa lagokab Josep kole
Joshua17:17 Ak king’alalji Josua gotab Josep
Joshua17:18 ago bunjinin emetab tulonok; amu nganda osnet
Joshua18:1 Ak kiiyumgei tuiyet tugul ne bo lagokab Israel eng’ Silo
Joshua18:2 Ak king’et eng’ lagokab Israel bororiosiek tisab che kitom kopchei borotenywa.
Joshua18:3 Ak kilenji Josua lagokab Israel
Joshua18:4 Olewenjige bik somok eng’ bororiet age tugul: si ayokto ichek
Joshua18:5 Ak kopchei koek kebeberwek tisab; tebe Juda kiwotennyi eng’ murot ne bo tai
Joshua18:6 Ak osir emonoto koek kebeberwek tisab
Joshua18:7 Amu matinyei Lawik kebeberta eng’ kwenung’wong’; amu tiseinatetab Jehovah ko borotenywa: ak kigosich Gad ak Reuben ak kebebertab bororietab Manase borotenywa
Joshua18:8 Ak king’eetyo bik ak koba: ak kiiyomis Josua bik che kiga ba kosir emet
Joshua18:9 Kiba anyun bichoto kobun emet
Joshua18:10 Ak kiser Josua barbarek agobo ichek eng’ Silo eng’ taitab Jehovah: Ak kipchechi Josua emet lagokab Israel ko u pcheutikwak eng’ oloto.
Joshua18:11 Ak kibiit bororietab lagokab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak: ak kiwa kiwotetab barbariandenywa kwenutab lagokab Juda ak lagokab Josep.
Joshua18:12 Ak king’eete kiwotenywa ne bo komostab katam Jordan; ak kitogosta kiwotenywa kobun tabandab Jeriko eng’ murot ne bo katam
Joshua18:13 Ak kiwa kiwotet eng’ oloto agoi Lus
Joshua18:14 Ak kigitil kiwotet keyiem komostab cherongo ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai kong’eete tulwet ne mi taitab Bet-horon ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai; ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi agoi koit Kiriat-baal (noto ko Kiriat-jearim)
Joshua18:15 Ak king’eete murot ne bo tai tabandab Kiriat-jearim
Joshua18:16 ak kichortagei kiwotet agoi tabandab tulwet ne mi taitab atebwetab weritab Hinom
Joshua18:17 ak kigitil kobun murot ne bo katam
Joshua18:18 ak kosiirto kobun tabanda ne tokyingei Araba murot ne bo katam
Joshua18:19 ak kiwa kiwotet kobun tabandab Bet-hogla kotokyigei murot ne bo katam: ak kimong’ji kiwotet ole kiluktoegei beek murot ne bo katam eng’ Araraita ne bo Munyuk
Joshua18:20 Ak ki Jordan kiwotennyi eng’ komostab kong’asis. Nito ko ki borotetab lagokab Benjamin ko u kiwotosiekyik che kiimut komoswek tugul
Joshua18:21 Nganasokab bororietab lagokab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak ko ki Jeriko
