Joshua18:23 ak Abim
Joshua18:24 ak Keparamoni
Joshua18:25 Gibeon
Joshua18:26 ak Mispe
Joshua18:27 ak Rekem
Joshua18:28 ak Selar
Joshua19:1 Ak kinyo barbariatab aeng’ ne bo Simeon
Joshua19:2 Ak kisich koek borotenywa Beer-seba
Joshua19:3 ak Hasarsual
Joshua19:4 ak Eltolat
Joshua19:5 ak Siklag
Joshua19:6 ak Bet-lebaot
Joshua19:7 Ain
Joshua19:8 ak nganasok tugul che mengechen che kiyiem nganasochuto agoi Balat- beer
Joshua19:9 Kibun borotetab lagokab Simeon kebebertab lagokab Juda: amu ki o kebebertab Juda kosiir ichek: kisich anyun lagokab Simeon borotet eng’ kwenutab borotenywa.
Joshua19:10 Ak kibiit barbariatab somok eng’ lagokab Sebulun ko u ortinwekwak: ak kiit borotetab kiwotenywa Sarik:
Joshua19:11 ak kitogosta kiwotenywa kotokyigei cherongo
Joshua19:12 ak kiweek eng’ Sarik kotokyigei kong’asis
Joshua19:13 ak kisiirto kong’eete yoto kotokyigei kong’asis kwo Get-eper
Joshua19:14 ak kiyiem kiwotet emonoto eng’ katam kwo Anaton: ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi
Joshua19:15 ak Katat
Joshua19:16 Nito ko borotetab lagokab Sebulun ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua19:17 Ak kimong’ barbariatab ang’wan ne bo Isakar
Joshua19:18 Ak kiit kiwotenywa Jesreel
Joshua19:19 ak Aparaim
Joshua19:20 ak Rabit
Joshua19:21 ak Remet
Joshua19:22 ak kiit kiwotet Tabor
Joshua19:23 Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Isakar ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua19:24 Ak kimong’ barbariatab mut ne bo bororietab lagokab Aser ko u ortinwekwak.
Joshua19:25 Ak kiwotenywa ko ki Helkat
Joshua19:26 ak Alamelek
Joshua19:27 ak kiweek kotokyigei ole chorune asista agoi Bet-dagon
Joshua19:28 ak Hebron
Joshua19:29 ak kiweek kiwotet kwo Rama
Joshua19:30 Uma agine
Joshua19:31 Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Aser ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua19:32 Ak kimong’ barbariatab lo ne bo lagokab Naptali
Joshua19:33 King’eete kiwotenywa Helep
Joshua19:34 ak kiweek kiwotet kotokyigei cherongo kwo Asnot-tabor
Joshua19:35 Nganasok che kiga king’ot ko Sidim
Joshua19:36 ak Adama
Joshua19:37 ak Kedes
Joshua19:38 ak Iron
Joshua19:39 Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Naptali ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua19:40 Ak kimong’ barbariatab tisab ne bo bororietab lagokab Dan ko u ortinwekwak.
Joshua19:41 Ak kiwotetab borotenywa ko ki Sora
Joshua19:42 ak Saalabin
Joshua19:43 ak Elon
Joshua19:44 ak Elteke
Joshua19:45 ak Jeud
Joshua19:46 ak Mejarkon
Joshua19:47 Ak kiwa kiwotetab lagokab Dan kosiirto
Joshua19:48 Nito ko borotetab bororietab Dan ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua19:49 Koges anyun pcheetab emet koek borotet eng’ kiwotosiekyik; ak kiigochi lagokab Israel Josua weritab Nun borotet eng’ kwenunywa:
Joshua19:50 kiigochi nganaset ne kiga som ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah
Joshua19:51 Chuto ko borotosiek che kipchei eng’ barbarek Eleasar tisiindet
Joshua20:1 King’alalji Jehovah Josua kolenji
Joshua20:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji
Joshua20:3 si kobiit komwechi rumindet ne kalelso
Joshua20:4 Ak mwechin age eng’ nganasochoto
Joshua20:5 Ak ngot koon inendet ne yaaktoi korotik
Joshua20:6 Ak komeny nganasanato
Joshua20:7 Ak kiitaban Kedes eng’ Galili eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Naptali
Joshua20:8 Ak eng’ Jordan bitonin eng’ Jeriko
Joshua20:9 Chuto ko ki nganasok che kigitabanji lagok tugul che bo Israel
Joshua21:1 Yeityo kobwa kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Lawik korik ole mi Eleasar tisiindet
Joshua21:2 ak king’alalji ichek eng’ Silo eng’ emetab Kanan
Joshua21:3 Ak kiigochi lagokab Israel Lawik eng’ borotenywa
Joshua21:4 Ak kimong’ barbariatab ortinwekab Kohatik: ak kisich lagokab Aron tisiindet
Joshua21:5 Ak kisich eng’ barbariatab lagokab Kohat che king’et
Joshua21:6 Ak kisich eng’ barbariat lagokab Gerson nganasok taman ak somok
Joshua21:7 Kisich eng’ barbariat lagokab Merari ko u ortinwekwak nganasok taman ak aeng’ eng’ bororietab Reuben
Joshua21:8 Ak kiigochi eng’ barbariat lagokab Israel Lawik nganasochoto koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie
Joshua21:9 Ak kiigoito eng’ bororietab lagokab Juda
Joshua21:10 ak kibunji choto lagokab Aron
Joshua21:11 Ak kiigochi Kiriat-arba
Joshua21:12 Ago kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune korotinwekab nganaset kobunji
Joshua21:13 Ak kiigochi ichek lagokab Aron tisiindet Hebron koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:14 ak Jatir koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:15 Holon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:16 ak Ain koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:17 Ak eng’ bororietab Benjamin
Joshua21:18 Anatot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:19 Nganasok tugul che bo lagokab Aron
Joshua21:20 Ak kisich ortinwekab lagokab Kohat
Joshua21:21 Ak kiigochi ichek Sekem koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:22 Ak Kibasaim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:23 Ak eng’ bororietab Dan
Joshua21:24 Aijalon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:25 Ak eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase
Joshua21:26 Nganasok tugul che bo ortinwekab lagokab Kohat che king’et ko ki taman koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie.
Joshua21:27 Ak kiigochi lagokab Gerson eng’ ortinwekab Lawik
Joshua21:28 Ak eng’ bororietab Isakar
Joshua21:29 Jarmut koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:30 Ak eng’ bororietab Aser
Joshua21:31 Elkat koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:32 Ak eng’ bororietab Naptali
Joshua21:33 Nganasok tugul che bo Gersonik ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua21:34 Ak kiigochi ortinwekab lagokab Merari
Joshua21:35 Dimna koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:36 Ak eng’ bororietab Reuben
Joshua21:37 Kedemot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:38 Ak eng’ bororietab Gad
Joshua21:39 Hesbon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie
Joshua21:40 Chuto tugul ko ki nganasokab lagokab Merari ko u ortinwekwak
Joshua21:41 Nganasok tugul che bo Lawik eng’ kwenutab emetab lagokab Israel ko ki nganasok artam ak sisiit koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie.
Joshua21:42 Kitinyei age tugul eng’ nganasochuto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie che kiyiem: ki u noto eng’ nganasochuto tugul.
Joshua21:43 Kiigochi anyun Jehovah Israel emet tugul ne kiiyosiechi kwanisiekwak kole tun igochin; ak kinam kobunji
Joshua21:44 ak kiigochi Jehovah ichek kamuung’et eng’ komoswek tugul
Joshua21:45 Ma bet ng’olyo agot agenge ne mie ne kiga komwachi Jehovah gotab Israel; kiisulda tugul.
Joshua22:1 Kiguur anyun Josua bikab Reuben
Joshua22:2 ak kolenji ichek
Joshua22:3 ma obagakte tupchosiekwok eng’ betusiechu chang’
Joshua22:4 Ak kagogochi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ tupchosiekwok kamuung’et nguno
Joshua22:5 Ago oripge mising’ oyai kayomisutiet ak ng’atutiet
Joshua22:6 Koberur anyun Josua ichek
Joshua22:7 Kiga kogochi Musa kebebertab bororietab Manase borotet eng’ Basan: ak kiigochi Josua kebeberta age ne bo bororionoto borotet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekwak eng’ Jordan bitonin ole tokyingei cherongo. Ak kingomachei Josua komwachi ichek koba emaisiekwak
Joshua22:8 ak kong’alalji kolenji
Joshua22:9 Ak kiweek lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase
Joshua22:10 Ak kingoit emet ne negit Jordan
Joshua22:11 Ak kigas lagokab Israel kemwaei kelen
Joshua22:12 Ak ye kingogas lagokab Israel kioto
Joshua22:13 Ak kiiyokto lagokab Israel Pineas
Joshua22:14 ak kimi koboto inendet bounik tamanu
Joshua22:15 Ak kibwa ole mi lagokab Reuben
Joshua22:16 Kamwa ko u ni tuiyet komugul ne bo Jehovah
Joshua22:17 Tos mayamech tengektab Peor
Joshua22:18 kot omaste rani eng’ kasubet ne osubi Jehovah? Ak amu kaongelelji Jehovah rani
Joshua22:19 Ago
Joshua22:20 Kima yai Akan weritab Sera chalwokto eng’ kit ne ki itabanat
Joshua22:21 Kiwol anyun lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase
Joshua22:22 Ingen Jehovah
Joshua22:23 keteekyige kaptisisiet kemaste eng’ kasubet ne kisubi Jehovah; anan ngot kemache kigoite kagochinet ne kibeelei
Joshua22:24 anan ngot ko kigiyai kii eng’ ribetab ge
Joshua22:25 Amu kiyai Jehovah Jordan koek kiwotennyo ak okwek
Joshua22:26 Noto anyun ko kogimwa kele
Joshua22:27 ago si koek baornatet eng’ kwenunnyo
Joshua22:28 Ko kigimwa anyun kele
Joshua22:29 Ingolooit eng’ achek ama kingelelji Jehovah
Joshua22:30 Ak kingogas Pineas tisiindet
Joshua22:31 Ak kilenji Pineas weritab Eleasar tisiindet lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad
Joshua22:32 Ak kiweek Pineas weritab Eleasar tisiindet
Joshua22:33 Ak kiibaibai kioto lagokab Israel; ak kiilos lagokab Israel Kamuktaindet
Joshua22:34 Ak kiguure lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad kaptisisionoto
Joshua23:1 Ak kingobata betusiek che chang’
Joshua23:2 koguur anyun Josua Israel tugul
Joshua23:3 ak kiogeer tuguk tugul che kigoyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ bororiosiechu tugul amu okwek; amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Joshua23:4 Ogeero
Joshua23:5 Ak timdoi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ichek eng’ taing’wong’
Joshua23:6 Onyiganitu anyun mising’ si orib ak oyai tuguk tugul che kigisir eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutik ne bo Musa
Joshua23:7 si mobe kwenutab bororiosiechu
Joshua23:8 ago onamge ak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Joshua23:9 Amu kigoon Jehovah eng’ taing’wong’ bororiosiek che eechen ak ko kimen: ago ma biit chi ne kitonon eng’ taing’wong’ agoi ra.
Joshua23:10 Onei chito agenge eng’ okwek elfut
Joshua23:11 Oripge anyun mising’ si ocham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’.
Joshua23:12 Amu ngot ochuchuige obe let eng’ kiy age tugul
Joshua23:13 onai komie ole ma koonei kogeny Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ bororiosiechuto eng’ taing’wong’
Joshua23:14 Ak ogeero
Joshua23:15 Ak koek ko u ye kibwanjok tuguk tugul che miachen che kimwawok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Joshua23:16 Ye ongelelji kayomisetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Joshua24:1 Kiiyum anyun Josua bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel koba Sekem
Joshua24:2 Ak kilenji Josua bik tugul
Joshua24:3 Kiamutu kwandang’wong’ Abraham eng’ Ainet bitonin
Joshua24:4 Ak kiagochi Isak Jakobo ak Esau: ak kiagochi Esau tulwetab Seir
Joshua24:5 Ak kiayokte Musa ak Aron
Joshua24:6 Kiamutu kwanisiekwok komong’une Misri: ak kiobwa agoi nyanjet; ak kion Misrik kwanisiekwok eng’ karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek kot koit Nyanjet ne Birir.
Joshua24:7 Ak kingorirji Jehovah
Joshua24:8 Ak kiamutwok oitu emetab Amorik
Joshua24:9 King’eet anyun Balak weritab Sipor
Joshua24:10 ago ma acham agas ng’alekab Balaam; eng’ noto anyun
Joshua24:11 Ak kiolong’une Jordan
Joshua24:12 Ak kiayokte karamiet kondoenak
Joshua24:13 Ak kiagonok emet ne kima oyae kiy
Joshua24:14 Oiywei anyun Jehovah
Joshua24:15 Ak ngot ogeere ko ya oboisiechini Jehovah
Joshua24:16 Ak kiwol bichoto kole
Joshua24:17 amu Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo
Joshua24:18 ak kion Jehovah bik tugul koba eng’ tainnyo
Joshua24:19 Ak kilenji Josua bik
Joshua24:20 Ngot omete Jehovah ak oot kanamonik che too
Joshua24:21 Ak kilenji bik Josua
Joshua24:22 Ak kilenji Josua bik
Joshua24:23 Ara anyun
Joshua24:24 Ak kilenji bik Josua
Joshua24:25 Koyomisgei Josua anyun ak bichoto betunoto
Joshua24:26 Ak kisir ng’alechuto Josua eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutikab Kamuktaindet; ak kiinem koita ne o
Joshua24:27 Ak kimwachi Josua bik tugul kolenji
Joshua24:28 Kilenji anyun Josua bik koba
Joshua24:29 Ak kingobata tuguchuto
Joshua24:30 Ak kitub ichek inendet eng’ kiwotetab borotennyi eng’ Timnat-sera
Joshua24:31 Ak kiboisiechi Israel Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Josua
Joshua24:32 Ak kitub ichek kowekab Josep eng’ Sekem
Joshua24:33 Ak kime agine Eleasar weritab Aron; ak kitub ichek inendet eng’ tulwetab Pineas werinnyi
Judges1:1 Ak kingobata meetab Josua
Judges1:2 Kole Jehovah
Judges1:3 Ak kilenji Juda Simeon ng’etab kamet
Judges1:4 Ak kitogosta Juda; ak kiinde Jehovah eunekwak Kananik ak Perisik: ak kibar ichek eng’ Besek bik elfusiek taman.
Judges1:5 Ak kinyor Adoni-besek eng’ Besek: ak kibargei ak inendet
Judges1:6 Ago kimwei Adoni-besek; ak kion inendet
Judges1:7 Ak kimwa Adoni-besek kole
Judges1:8 Ak kibargei lagokab Juda ak Jerusalem
Judges1:9 Ak kingobata
Judges1:10 Ak kibargei Juda ak Kananik che kimenyei Hebron: (kainetab Hebron eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-arba:) ak kibar Sesai
Judges1:11 Ak kiwa eng’ yoto kwo kobargei ak bik che kimenyei Debir. (Kainetab Debir eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-seper.)
Judges1:12 Ak kimwa Kaleb kole
Judges1:13 Ak kinam Otniel weritab Kenas
Judges1:14 Ak kingonyo ole mi inendet
Judges1:15 Ak kilenji inendet
Judges1:16 Ak kitogosta lagokab Kenindet
Judges1:17 Ak kiba Juda ak Simeon
Judges1:18 Ak kinam Juda Gasar koboto kiwotennyi
Judges1:19 Ak kimi Jehovah koboto Juda; ak kion che kimenyei emetab tulonok; kima imuch koon bik che kimenyei atebwet
Judges1:20 Ak kiigochi Kaleb Hebron
Judges1:21 Ak kima on lagokab Benjamin Jebusik che kimenyei Jerusalem: kimeny Jerusalem Jebusik koboto lagokab Benjamin
Judges1:22 Ak kitogosta che bo gotab Josep agichek koba kobar Bet-el: ak kimi Jehovah koboto ichek.
Judges1:23 Ak kiiyokto che bo gotab Josep bik koba kosegei Bet-el. (Kainetab nganasanato eng’ tai ko ki Lus.)
Judges1:24 Ak kigeer segeik chito komong’une nganaset
Judges1:25 Kiiborji anyun ole kibunei kebendi nganaset ak kibar nganaset eng’ rotwetab chok; ago kibagakta chichoto koboto gonnyi tugul.
Judges1:26 Ak kiwa chichoto emetab Hitik
Judges1:27 Ak ma on Manase che kimenyei Bet-sean ak nganasokyik
Judges1:28 Ak kingo kagogimegitu Israel
Judges1:29 Ak ma on Epraim agine Kananik che kimenyei Geser; kimeny Kananik kwenunywa eng’ Geser.
Judges1:30 Ma on agine Sebulun bik che kimenyei Kitron
Judges1:31 Ma on Aser agine bik che kimenyei Ako
Judges1:32 ago kimeny Aserik kwenutab Kananik
Judges1:33 Ma on agine Naptali bik che kimenyei Bet-semes
Judges1:34 Ak kitoorta Amorik lagokab Dan koba emetab tulonok: amu kima kochamjin ichek korek kobwa atebwet:
Judges1:35 ak kimach Amorik komeny tulwetab Heres
Judges1:36 Ak kiboch kiwotetab Amorik ole kitogoste kebendi Akrabim
Judges2:1 Ak kitogos malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ Gilgal konyo Bokim. Ak kile
Judges2:2 amat oyai arorut ak bik che menyei emoni; obut kapkorsusiekwak: ago ma ogas it kutinnyu: amu nee anyun si oyai ko u nito?
Judges2:3 Kiamwa anyun kogeny amu noto
Judges2:4 Ak kingo kagomwachi malaikaiyatab Jehovah ng’alechu lagok tugul che bo Israel
Judges2:5 Ak kiguure kainetab yoto Bokim: ak kieng’ji Jehovah eng’ yoto.
Judges2:6 Ak kingo kagolenji Josua bik koba
Judges2:7 Ak kiboisiechi bik Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Josua
Judges2:8 Ak kime Josua weritab Nun otwogindetab Jehovah
Judges2:9 Ak kitub ichek inendet eng’ kiwotetab emennyi eng’ Timnat-heres
Judges2:10 Ak kibek agichek tugul che bo ibinato ak kigiyumji oldab kwanisiekwak: ak kobiit ibinda age eng’ let ne kima kongen Jehovah
Judges2:11 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah
Judges2:12 ak kimeto Jehovah
Judges2:13 Ak kimeto Jehovah
Judges2:14 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel
Judges2:15 Komosta age tugul ole kiba
Judges2:16 Ak kiing’eetyi Jehovah kiruogik
Judges2:17 Ago ma kas it kiruogikwak kora
Judges2:18 Ak kingong’eetyi Jehovah kiruogik
Judges2:19 Ago kingo kagome kiruogindet
Judges2:20 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel ak kimwa kole
Judges2:21 ko ma aone agane koboch nguno eng’ tainywa age tugul eng’ bororiosiek che kibagakta Josua ye kingo kagome:
Judges2:22 si kobiit atieme Israel ageer ngo togot korib oretab Jehovah kobendate ko u ye kirib kwanisiekwak
Judges2:23 Kibagakta anyun Jehovah bororiosiechoto
Judges3:1 Chu anyun ko bororiosiek che kibagakta Jehovah
Judges3:2 si kobiit konai ibinwekab lagokab Israel
Judges3:3 ichek ko kiptainik mut che bo Pilistik
Judges3:4 Kigibagakta si kobiit ketieme Israel ichek
Judges3:5 Ak kimeny lagokab Israel kwenutab Kananik; Hitik
Judges3:6 ak kiimut tibikwak koek osotikwak
Judges3:7 Ak kiyai ne ya lagokab Israel eng’ taitab Jehovah
Judges3:8 Noto anyun kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel
Judges3:9 Ak ye kingorirji lagokab Israel Jehovah
Judges3:10 Ak kinyonji inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah
Judges3:11 Ak kiimuuny emet kenyisiek artam. Ak kime Otniel weritab Kenas.
Judges3:12 Ak kiyai ne ya lagokab Israel kogeny eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kiigimit Jehovah Eglon laitoriatab Moab kobargei ak Israel
Judges3:13 Ak kiiyum inendet lagokab Amon ak Amalek kobwa ole mi inendet; ak kiwa kobar Israel
Judges3:14 Ak kiot lagokab Israel Eglon laitoriatab Moabik kenyisiek taman ak sisiit.
Judges3:15 Ago ye kingorirji lagokab Israel Jehovah
Judges3:16 Kiitang’jigei Ehud rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai
Judges3:17 Ak kiipchi kagochinonoto Eglon laitoriatab Moab: ak ki chito ne nerat mising’ Eglon
Judges3:18 ak ye kingo kagogoito kagochinonoto
Judges3:19 Ago kiweek inendet eng’ ole kimi kanamonik eng’ ole negite Gilgal
Judges3:20 Ak kinyo Ehud ole mi inendet; ak kitebyei inegei eng’ gonnyi ne kiuure. Ak kile Ehud
Judges3:21 Ak kiiyogoito eunnyi ne bo katam Ehud ak kiinem rotwetab chok eng’ kubestanyi ne bo tai
Judges3:22 kiwa rotwet orit koboto kungit; ak kituch sundet rotwonoto
Judges3:23 Kimanda anyun Ehud kwo serem
Judges3:24 Ak ye kingomanda
Judges3:25 Kiigenis kot kolilanso: ak ogeero
Judges3:26 Ak kichilil Ehud ye kita kogenisiei ichek
Judges3:27 Ak kingoit
Judges3:28 Ak kilenji ichek
Judges3:29 Ak kibar eng’ betunoto murenik olo bo elfusiek taman che bo Moab
Judges3:30 Kigiterter anyun eng’ betunoto Moab eng’ eutab Israel. Ak kiimuuny emet eng’ kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit.
Judges3:31 Kingobata inendet kobiit Samgar weritab Anat
Judges4:1 Kiyai anyun lagokab Israel yaitiet kogeny eng’ taitab Jehovah
Judges4:2 Ak kialda Jehovah ichek koba eunekab Jabin laitoriatab Kanan
Judges4:3 Ak kirirji lagokab Israel Jehovah: amu kitinyei karisiekab karik bogol sogol; ak kiinyalil lagokab Israel eng’ kimnatet eng’ kenyisiek tiptem.
Judges4:4 Ak kiiruokyi Israel eng’ betusiechoto Debora maotiot
Judges4:5 Kitebe tiretab Debora kel eng’ kwenutab Rama ak Bet-el eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim: ak kitogosu lagokab Israel ole mi inendet kobwanei kiruoget.
Judges4:6 Ak kiiyokto inendet kole keguur Barak weritab Abinoam eng’ Kedes-naptali
Judges4:7 Si amutun Sisera konyo ainetab Kison
Judges4:8 Ak kilenji Barak inendet
Judges4:9 Ak kile
Judges4:10 Ak kiguur Barak Sebulun ak Naptali kotuiyechi Kedes; ak kitogosta murenik elfusiek tamanu kosub inendet: ak kitogosta Debora agine koboto inendet.
Judges4:11 Kiga kotabanegei Heber Kenindet Kenik
Judges4:12 Ak kigimwachi Sisera kelenji
Judges4:13 Ak kiiyum Sisera karisiekyik tugul
Judges4:14 Ak kilenji Debora Barak
Judges4:15 Ak kiiseer Jehovah Sisera
Judges4:16 Ago kion Barak karisiek
Judges4:17 Ago kimwei Sisera kobun keldo agoi koit emaitab Jael osotiotab Heber Kenindet: amu kiting’egei kalyet Jabin laitoriatab Hasor ak gotab Heber Kenindet.
Judges4:18 Ak kimanda Jael kotorokto Sisera
Judges4:19 Yeityo kolenji
Judges4:20 Ak kilenji chichoto inendet
Judges4:21 Yeityo konem Jael osotiotab Heber tigongiotab emait
Judges4:22 Ak ogeero
Judges4:23 Koterter anyun Kamuktaindet eng’ betunoto
Judges4:24 Ak kigimit eutab lagokab Israel koterter Jabin laitoriatab Kanan
Judges5:1 Kotien anyun Debora ak Barak weritab Abinoam eng’ betunoto
Judges5:2 Amu kiindo kandoik eng’ Israel
Judges5:3 Ogas
Judges5:4 Jehovah
Judges5:5 Kiroot tulonok kotenden eng’ taitab Jehovah
Judges5:6 Eng’ betusiekab Samgar weritab Anat
Judges5:7 Kiigesgei bounik eng’ Israel
Judges5:8 Kilewen cheptalelisiek che taunen; Kibiit luget eng’ kurgotik: Tos kibiit long’et anan ko ng’otit ne kigigeerei Eng’ elfusiek artam eng’ Israel?
Judges5:9 Tokyingei muguleldanyu bounikab Israel
Judges5:10 Omwaite okwek che olanye sigirok che leelach
Judges5:11 Che looen eng’ cheetab mwogik
Judges5:12 Ng’eet
Judges5:13 Yeityo kochorgei che king’et eng’ bik che toogunotin eng’ bik; Kichorgei Jehovah agobo ane si kobargei ak che nyigonen.
Judges5:14 Kimong’une Epraim che salu Amalek; Kosubun
Judges5:15 Ak kimi bounikab Isakar koboto Debora; Kit ne ki u Isakar
Judges5:16 Kilya si itebe kwenutab biusiekab kechirek
Judges5:17 Kimeny Gilead Jordan bitonin: Ak Dan
Judges5:18 Sebulun ko ki bik che kiinde sobonwekwak ng’oiyonditab meet
Judges5:19 Kibwa laitorinik ak koyai luget; Kibargei ak laitorinikab Kanan
Judges5:20 Kiyai luget kong’eete kipsengwet
Judges5:21 Kiib ainetab Kison ichek
Judges5:22 Yeityo kotiechatiech kelyekab mbartanyisiek Eng’ torombenet
Judges5:23 Kile malaikaiyatab Jehovah
Judges5:24 Egu Jael ne iberurot eng’ kwonyik
Judges5:25 Kisom beek
Judges5:26 Kiinem tigongiot
Judges5:27 Kiing’uruk eng’ kelyekyik
Judges5:28 Kiitito eng’ tirisia
Judges5:29 Kowolji kwonyikyik che ng’omen
Judges5:30 Tomo konyo
Judges5:31 Ingobetyo anyun buniguk tugul
Judges6:1 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eunekab Midian kenyisiek tisab.
Judges6:2 Ak kiiterter eutab Midian Israel: ak kibaljigei lagokab Israel keringonik eng’ tulonok
Judges6:3 Ak kingo kagogolso Israel
Judges6:4 ak koteech tainywa
Judges6:5 Amu kibwa kotogos ak tukwak ak emaisiekwak
Judges6:6 Ak kinyor Israel nyalilda ne o amu Midianik
Judges6:7 Ak ye kingorirji lagokab Israel Jehovah amu Midianik
Judges6:8 koyokyi Jehovah lagokab Israel maotiot: ak kimwachi kolenji
Judges6:9 ak kiatiachak eng’ eutab Misrik
Judges6:10 ak kialenjok
Judges6:11 Ak kinyo malaikaiyatab Jehovah
Judges6:12 Ak kimong’ji inendet malaikaiyatab Jehovah
Judges6:13 Ak kilenji Gideon inendet
Judges6:14 Ak kigusyi kong’ Jehovah inendet
Judges6:15 Ak kolenji
Judges6:16 Ak kilenji Jehovah
Judges6:17 Ak kilenji
Judges6:18 Asain ale
Judges6:19 Ak kiwa Gideon go
Judges6:20 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet inendet
Judges6:21 Ak kiiyogoito malaikaiyatab Jehovah walitab kirokto ne kitinyei eng’ eunnyi

Judges18:16 Ak kitononso eng’ ye negite ye kibunei eng’ ormarich
Judges18:17 Ak kitogosta murenjoto mutu che kiga ba kosegei emet
Judges18:18 Ak kingo kagoba bichuto gotab Mika
Judges18:19 Ak kilenji
Judges18:20 Ak kibaibait muguleldab tisiindonoto
Judges18:21 Kiweek anyun ichek
Judges18:22 Kingo kagoba ole machei ko loo eng’ gotab Mika
Judges18:23 Ak kiwaage lagokab Dan. Ak kigusgong’
Judges18:24 Ak kile
Judges18:25 Ak kilenji inendet lagokab Dan
Judges18:26 Ak kiba lagokab Dan: ak kingogeer Mika kole kimen eng’ inendet
Judges18:27 Ak kiib tuguchoto kiyaei Mika
Judges18:28 Ak kima biit sorunindet
Judges18:29 Ak kiguure nganasanato Dan
Judges18:30 Ak kilumdochigei lagokab Dan kanamwet ne kigiwai kotonon: ak kiek tisiikab bororietab Danik
Judges18:31 Kilumda anyun kotonon kanamwet ne kigiwai ne bo Mika ne kiyaei inendet

Judges19:2 Ak kiyai kugoinatet chebaigeiyandennyi kosas inendet
Judges19:3 Ak king’eet manong’otiondennyi kosub inendet
Judges19:4 Ak kimach kapyugoinnyi
Judges19:5 Ak eng’ betutab ang’wan
Judges19:6 Kitebi ng’ony ak kiamis ak koeeiso ichek tuwai: ak kilenji kwandab kwonyoto chichoto
Judges19:7 Ak king’eet chichoto kole kwo; ago kiigaigai kapyugoinnyi
Judges19:8 Ak king’eet karon mising’ eng’ betut ne bo mut kole kwo; ak kile kwandab kwonyoto
Judges19:9 Ak kingong’eet chichoto kole kwo
Judges19:10 Ago ma cham chichoto kotebi kemounoto
Judges19:11 Kingomi ye negite Jebus
Judges19:12 Ak kilenji kiptaiyandennyi
Judges19:13 Ak kilenji otwogindennyi
Judges19:14 Kisiirto anyun koba bandanywa; kirorokta asista kota kobendi ko negit koit Gibea
Judges19:15 ak kimasta koba oloto
Judges19:16 Ak ogeero
Judges19:17 Ak kitobendo kogeer kiprutoiyot eng’ oretab nganaset; ak kile boiyondonoto
Judges19:18 Ak kilenji inendet
Judges19:19 Ago kitinye mobek ak amitwogik che kigigonor che bo sigirokyok; ak atinye makatiat ak divaik
Judges19:20 Ak kile boiyondonoto
Judges19:21 Komut anyun kwo gonnyi
Judges19:22 Ak ye kiiboiboi mugulelwekwak
Judges19:23 Kimanda anyun chichoto
Judges19:24 Ogeero
Judges19:25 Ago ma cham bichoto kogasyi ng’alek: kinam anyun chichoto chebaigeiyandennyi ak komutyi ichek eng’ sang’; ak kisuub kwonyoto
Judges19:26 Kinyo anyun kwonyoto ko kairir emet

Judges19:28 Ak kilenji inendet

Judges20:1 Kimanda anyun lagokab Israel tugul
Judges20:2 Kiiyomechigei kiruogikab bik tugul
Judges20:3 (Kigas anyun lagokab Benjamin kole kagotogosta lagokab Israel koba Mispa.) Ak kile lagokab Israel
Judges20:4 Ak kiwol Lawindet manong’otiotab kwonyoto kigibarei
Judges20:5 Ak king’eetya bikab Gibea kobwa koyiem got ne kiami kemoi; kimachei kole kobara anendet
Judges20:6 Ak kianam chebaigeiyandennyu ak aton
Judges20:7 Ogeero
Judges20:8 Ak king’eetyo bik tugul koigei chichak kole
Judges20:9 Ago ni kit ne keyachini Gibea; kitogostoi kebendi yoto eng’ seretab barbarek;
Judges20:10 ak kinemu murenik taman eng’ bogolut age tugul eng’ bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel
Judges20:11 Koyumjigei anyun tugul che bo Israel nganasanato
Judges20:12 Ak kiiyokto bik ortinwekab Israel koba oret tugul ne bo Benjamin
Judges20:13 Ogonu anyun bichoto werikab Belial
Judges20:14 Ak kiiyumgei lagokab Benjamin che kimong’une nganasok
Judges20:15 Ak kigiit lagokab Benjamin betunoto che kimong’une nganasok
Judges20:16 Kimi kwenutab bichuto tugul murenik bogolwogik tisabu che bo katam che kigilewen; kiimuchi age tugul kowirtae borowet koita kowir sumeiyot
Judges20:17 Ak kiek murenikab Israel che kigiit ama boto Benjamin
Judges20:18 Ak king’eetyo lagokab Israel kotogosta Bet-el
Judges20:19 King’eetyo anyun lagokab Israel karon
Judges20:20 Ak kimanda lagokab Israel kobargei ak Benjamin
Judges20:21 Ak kimong’ lagokab Benjamin eng’ Gibea
Judges20:22 Ak kiigimitgei bik
Judges20:23 (Ak kitogosta lagokab Israel koba koririo eng’ taitab Jehovah agoi koskoleny; ak kiteebe Jehovah
Judges20:24 Ak kirikyi lagokab Israel lagokab Benjamin eng’ betut ne bo aeng’.
Judges20:25 Ak kimanda Benjamin eng’ Gibea ak kobargei ak ichek eng’ betut ne bo aeng’
Judges20:26 Yeityo kotogosta lagok tugul che bo Israel
Judges20:27 Ak kiteebe lagokab Israel Jehovah
Judges20:28 ak kitonone taitab moingonoto Pineas
Judges20:29 Ak kiinde Israel bik che ribistos koyiem Gibea korib.
Judges20:30 Ak kitogosta Israel koba kobargei ak lagokab Benjamin eng’ betut ne bo somok
Judges20:31 Ak kimanda lagokab Benjamin kobokyi bichoto
Judges20:32 Ak kimwa lagokab Benjamin kole
Judges20:33 Ak king’eetyo bik tugul che bo Israel eng’ komostanywa
Judges20:34 Ak kibwa kobargei ak Gibea
Judges20:35 Ak kibar Jehovah Benjamin eng’ taitab Israel: ak kibar lagokab Israel eng’ betunoto murenik elfusiek tiptem ak mut ak bogol che bo Benjamin: kitinyei chuto tugul rotokab chok.
Judges20:36 Kigeer lagokab Benjamin anyun kole kagebar: amu kiistochigei lagokab Israel Benjamin
Judges20:37 Ak kichakta bik che karibistos koruai Gibea; ak kiiseergei bichoto
Judges20:38 Ak kimi kaborunet ne kiga kichob eng’ kwenutab bikab Israel ak bik che kiribistos kele konaam iyeto ne o kotogosta eng’ nganaset.
Judges20:39 Ak kiweek murenikab Israel eng’ boriet
Judges20:40 Ago kingotoi kotogosta iyeto ne u toloita eng’ nganaset
Judges20:41 Ak kiweek bikab Israel
Judges20:42 Kimwei eng’ taitab bikab Israel kotuktochi batai
Judges20:43 Kiyiem Benjaminik konde kwen
Judges20:44 Ak kibek bik elfusiek tamanu ak sisiit che bo Benjamin; chuto tugul ko ki murenik che nyigonen.
Judges20:45 Ak kiweek ak komwei kotokyigei ong’atet kot koit ruandetab Rimon: ak kikweat bik elfusiek mut eng’ ichek
Judges20:46 Kibek anyun eng’ betunoto bik elfusiek tiptemu ak mut che bo Benjuamin che kitinyei rotokab chok; chuto tugul ko ki murenik che nyigonen.
Judges20:47 Ago kiweek bik bogolwogik lo
Judges20:48 Ak kiweekyigei kogeny bikab Israel lagokab Benjamin

Judges21:3 Ak kole

Judges21:5 Ak kile lagokab Israel

Judges21:7 Kiyae nee si konyor osotik ichek che kong’et
Judges21:8 Ak kile ichek
Judges21:9 Amu ye kingo kagiit bik
Judges21:10 Ak kiiyokto tuiyet bik elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo che nyigonen eng’ tugul
Judges21:11 Ak kit ne obendi oyae ko ni; obare ogesu muren age tugul
Judges21:12 Ak kinyor eng’ bik che kimenyei Jabes-gilead bergeinik bogol ang’wan che neranik
Judges21:13 Ak kiiyokto tuiyet komugul bik koba kong’alalji lagokab Benjamin che kimi ruandetab Rimon orit
Judges21:14 Ak kiweek Benmjamin eng’ betusiechoto; ak kiigochi ichek kwonyik che kisor kosopcho eng’ che bo kwonyikab Jabes-gilead: ago kima yam ichek.
Judges21:15 Ak kiarogenso bik agobo Benjamin amu kigoyai Jehovah koyatak oldo age eng’ ortinwekab Israel.

Judges21:24 Ak kiba lagokab Israel eng’ betusiechoto
Judges21:25 Kima komi laitoriat Israel eng’ betusiechoto: kiyaei chi tugul ko u ye kigeerei kole mie.
Ruth1:1 Kibiit rubet eng’ emet eng’ betusiek che kiiruochi kiruogik. Kiwa chito age ne bo Bet-lehem-juda kwo komeny emetab Moab
Ruth1:2 Ak kainetab chichoto ko ki Elimelek
Ruth1:3 Ak kime Elimelek manong’otiotab Naomi; ak king’et inendet ak werikyik aeng’.
Ruth1:4 Ak kiitun osotik eng’ kwonyikab Moab; kainetab age ko ki Orpa
Ruth1:5 Ak kibek tuwai Malon ak Kilion; kibegune kwonyoto lagokyik aeng’u ak manong’otiondennyi.
Ruth1:6 King’eet inendet anyun koboto che bo werikyik
Ruth1:7 Ak kiwa eng’ komosta ne kimi

1Samuel1:1 Kimi chito age ne bo Ramataim-sopim
1Samuel1:2 ak kitinyei osotik aeng’; kainetab age ko ki Hana
1Samuel1:3 Ak kicham kotogostoi chichoto eng’ nganasennyi eng’ kenyit age tugul kowendi kosaei ak kogochin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek tiseiywek eng’ Silo. Ak kimi yoto werik aeng’ che bo Eli
1Samuel1:4 Ak kingoit betut ne igoitoi Elkana tiseiywek
1Samuel1:5 ago kiigochi Hana kebeberwek aeng’: amu kichamei Hana
1Samuel1:6 Ak kitach inendet ne kiting’e moiyet
1Samuel1:7 Ak ye kiyaei Elkana ko u noto eng’ kenyit age tugul
1Samuel1:8 Ak kilenji inendet Elkana manong’otiondennyi
1Samuel1:9 King’eet Hana anyun ye kingo kagoamis eng’ Silo
1Samuel1:10 Ak kitinyei inendet ng’wanindo eng’ sobondanyi
1Samuel1:11 Ak kiyai kaarortaet ne kiarorto kole
1Samuel1:12 Ak ye kita kosaei eng’ taitab Jehovah

1Samuel2:2 Mami ne tilil ko u Jehovah; Amu mami age kobatenen: Ama mi ruandet ne u Kamuktaindennyo.

1Samuel2:4 Kigoilyo kwangokab bik che nyigonen
1Samuel2:5 Kigoaldagei si konyor amitwogik icheget che kobiyong’dos; Ak kigosisyo che kiamei rubet; Ee
1Samuel2:6 Barei Jehovah

1Samuel2:9 Ribei kelyekab bikyik che tililen
1Samuel2:10 Kitonatoni che ibeligei ak Jehovah; Tuljin ichek eng’ kipsengwet: Iruokyin Jehovah tabanwekab ng’ony; Ak kogochi kimnatet laitoriandennyi. Ak kotoror kuinetab nenyi ne kigiil.
1Samuel2:11 Ak kiwa Elkana gonnyi eng’ Rama. Ak kiboisiechi lakwet Jehovah eng’ taitab tisiindet Eli.
1Samuel2:12 Werikab Eli ko ki werikab Belial; kima nai ichek Jehovah.

1Samuel2:16 Ak ngot kolenji chito inendet

1Samuel2:19 Kinapchin kogeny kamet ngoriet ne ming’in

1Samuel3:1 Ak kiboisiechi lakwanato Samuel Jehovah eng’ taitab Eli. Kima ko tai kegasei ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto; kima komi ng’ang’utiet ne toogu.
1Samuel3:2 Ak ye kingoru Eli eng’ oldanyi
1Samuel3:3 ak ye kitom kome tait ne bo Kamuktaindet
1Samuel3:4 koguur Jehovah Samuel: ak kile

1Samuel3:6 Ak kiguur Jehovah kogeny

1Samuel3:21 Ak kitook Jehovah kogeny eng’ Silo: amu king’ang’jigei Jehovah Samuel eng’ Silo eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah.

1Samuel4:7 Ak kiiywei Pilistik

1Samuel4:10 Ak kiyai Pilistik luget

1Samuel5:12 Ak bik che ma bek ko kigibire miando ne ibwansei: ak kitogosta kipsengwet rirekab nganaset.
1Samuel6:1 Ak kitebe moingetab Jehovah emetab Pilistik arawek tisab.

1Samuel6:9 Ak ogeer
1Samuel6:10 Ak kiyai bichoto ko u noto; ak koget tuga aeng’ che aboen
1Samuel6:11 Yeityo konde moingetab Jehovah karit
1Samuel6:12 Ak kibun tuchato oret ne litit ne wendi Bet-semes; kibun oret ne o
1Samuel6:13 Ak kigesei nganokwak bikab Bet-semes eng’ atebwet: ak kitobendo
1Samuel6:14 Ak kiit karinato mbaretab Josua Bet-semindet
1Samuel6:15 Ak kiinem Lawik moingetab Jehovah
1Samuel6:16 Ak kingo kagogeer kiptainik mutu che bo Pilistik tuguchoto
1Samuel6:17 Ak chu ko kabwanutik che kigiyae tahabu che kiweektochi Pilistik Jehovah koek kagochinetab chalwokto; bo agenge Asdod
1Samuel6:18 koboto murek che kigiyae tahabu
1Samuel6:19 Ak kibir Jehovah Bet-semes
1Samuel6:20 Ak kile bikab Bet-semes
1Samuel6:21 Ak kiiyokto bik koba ole mi bik che menyei Kiriat-jearim
1Samuel7:1 Ak kibwa bikab Kiriat-jearim
1Samuel7:2 Ak kichang’it betusiek koboch ngotebe moinget Kiriat-jearim; amu kiek kenyisiek tiptem: ak kirirji Jehovah got tugul ne bo Israel.
1Samuel7:3 Ak king’alalji Samuel got tugul ne bo Israel
1Samuel7:4 Kiisto anyun lagokab Israel Baalik ak Astarot
1Samuel7:5 Ak kile Samuel
1Samuel7:6 Ak kiiyumjigei tugul Mispa
1Samuel7:7 Ak kingogas Pilistik kole koiyumgei lagokab Israel eng’ Mispa
1Samuel7:8 Ak kilenji lagokab Israel Samuel
1Samuel7:9 Ak kinam Samuel aruetab kechir ne reriei
1Samuel7:10 Ak ye kingota kogoitoi Samuel kagochinet ne kibeelei
1Samuel7:11 Ak kimanda bikab Israel eng’ Mispa
1Samuel7:12 Yeityo konam Samuel koita
1Samuel7:13 Kigiterter anyun Pilistik
1Samuel7:14 Ak kigiweekyi Israel nganasok che kiga koibe Pilistik
1Samuel7:15 Ak kiiruokyi Samuel Israel eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi.
1Samuel7:16 Ak kiwendi eng’ kenyit age tugul komuutoti Bet-el
1Samuel7:17 Ak kiweekyingei Rama
1Samuel8:1 Ak kingoosit Samuel
1Samuel8:2 Ak kainetab taitanyi ko ki Joel; ak kainetab ne bo aeng’ ko ki Abija: ki kiruogik eng’ Beer-seba.
1Samuel8:3 Ak ma bendate werikyik ortinwekyik
1Samuel8:4 Ak kiiyumgei boisiek tugul che bo Israel
1Samuel8:5 ak kolenji inendet
1Samuel8:6 Ago kiyait ng’olyondonoto eng’ Samuel kingomwa ichek kole
1Samuel8:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah Samuel
1Samuel8:8 Ko u boisionik tugul che kigoyai koboch betut ne kiamutu kotogos eng’ Misri kot koit ra
1Samuel8:9 Kasyi anyun ng’alekwak: ago iteechi komie
1Samuel8:10 Ak kimwachi Samuel bichoto kisomei eng’ inendet laitoriat
1Samuel8:11 Ak kile
1Samuel8:12 ak kolewenjigei icheget koek kiptainikab elfusiek ak kiptainikab konomusiek; ak kobat mbarenikyik alage
1Samuel8:13 Ak konam tibikwok koek che yaei nyamdutik
1Samuel8:14 Ak korebenak mbarenikwok
1Samuel8:15 Ak koib kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo keswekwok
1Samuel8:16 Ak korebenak otwogikwok che murenik
1Samuel8:17 Ibei kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo kechirekwok: ak oegu otwogikyik.
1Samuel8:18 Ak oririe eng’ betunoto amu laitoriandeng’wong’ ne tun olewenjinige; ak mawolwok Jehovah eng’ betunoto.
1Samuel8:19 Ago kiesio bik kogas ng’alekab Samuel; ak kile
1Samuel8:20 si keige ak achek bororiosiek tugul; ak si koruokwech laitoriandennyo

1Samuel10:2 Ye iwe rani eng’ yu ami

1Samuel13:1 Kiga kotar Saul kenyisiek [sosom] ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’ eng’ Israel.
1Samuel13:2 Ak kilewenjigei Saul murenik elfusiek somok che bo Israel; kimi elfusiek aeng’u eng’ choto koboto Saul eng’ Mikmas ak eng’ tulwetab Bet-el
1Samuel13:3 Ak kibar Jonatan irimetab Pilistik ne kimitei Geba
1Samuel13:4 Ak kigas Israel tugul kole
1Samuel13:5 Ak kiiyumgei Pilistik kobargei ak Israel
1Samuel13:6 Kingogeer bikab Israel kole mi eng’ bichiindo
1Samuel13:7 Kiga kolandae Jordan Hebranik alage koba emetab Gad ak Gilead; ago kita komi Saul Gilgal: ak kiisub bik tugul inendet kobotanioti.
1Samuel13:8 Ak kiigenis betusiek tisab
1Samuel13:9 Ak kile Saul
1Samuel13:10 Ak eng’ sainato kiigesune kagoitoetab kagochinet ne kibeelei

1Samuel13:12 amwa anyun ale
1Samuel13:13 Ak kilenji Samuel Saul
1Samuel13:14 Ago nguno
1Samuel13:15 Ak king’eet Samuel
1Samuel13:16 Ak kitebe Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi ak bik che kimi ak inendet Geba ne bo Benjamin: ago kiteech Pilistik Mikmas.
1Samuel13:17 Ak kimong’ luulik eng’ nganasetab Pilistik kopcheunegei somok: kibun kweanet age oret ne wendi Opra
1Samuel13:18 Kibun kweanet age oret ne wendi Bet-horon: kibun kweanet age oret ne bunei kiwotet ne ing’ururi atebwetab Seboim kotokyigei ong’atet.
1Samuel13:19 Kima komitei kitang’indet emet komugul ne bo Israel: amu kile Pilistik
1Samuel13:20 ago kichortagei Israelik tugul koba ole mi Pilistik
1Samuel13:21 ago kitinyei liteito ne bo marusiek
1Samuel13:22 Ago kima biit eng’ betutab luget
1Samuel13:23 Ak kimanda lugetab Pilistik koba ole kibunei eng’ Mikmas.

1Samuel14:4 Ak kimi ruandet ne ng’atib komosi

1Samuel14:23 Kosor anyun Jehovah Israel eng’ betunoto: ak kilanda luget kwo Bet-aben.

1Samuel17:57 Ak ye kingoweeksei Daudi kobunu baretab Pilistindet
1Samuel17:58 Ak kiteebe Saul kolenji
1Samuel18:1 Ak kingo kagoges inendet ng’alaljinetab Saul
1Samuel18:2 Ak kiimut inendet Saul betunoto
1Samuel18:3 Kiiyomisgei anyun Jonatan ak Daudi
1Samuel18:4 Ak kiireek Jonatan ngoriennyi ne bo barak ne kiilaachi
1Samuel18:5 Kiwa Daudi oldo age tugul ole kiiyokto Saul
1Samuel18:6 Ak ye kingobwanei ichek
1Samuel18:7 Ak kitienjingei kobogorisiechoto kourerendos kolen
1Samuel18:8 Ak kinerech Saul kot
1Samuel18:9 Ak kigeerote kong’ ne ya Saul Daudi koboch betunoto agoi.
1Samuel18:10 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto
1Samuel18:11 Ak kitoorta ng’otit Saul; amu kile
1Samuel18:12 Ak kiiywei Saul Daudi
1Samuel18:13 Kiisto Saul anyun inendet eng’ ole mi
1Samuel18:14 Ak kitebi Daudi eng’ ng’omnatet eng’ ortinwekyik tugul; ak kimi Jehovah koboto inendet.
1Samuel18:15 Kingogeer Saul kotebyei Daudi eng’ ng’omnatet ne o
1Samuel18:16 Ago kicham Israel tugul ak Juda Daudi; amu kimandoi ak koweeksei eng’ tainywa.
1Samuel18:17 Ak kilenji Saul Daudi
1Samuel18:18 Ak kilenji Daudi Saul
1Samuel18:19 Ago eng’ betut ne kita kigochin Merab Daudi cheptab Saul
1Samuel18:20 Ak kicham Mikal Daudi
1Samuel18:21 Ak kimwa Saul kole
1Samuel18:22 Ak king’at Saul otwogikyik
1Samuel18:23 Ak kimwachi otwogikab Saul Daudi ng’alechato kogas. Ak kimwa Daudi kole
1Samuel18:24 Ak kimwachi anyun otwogikyik Saul
1Samuel18:25 Ak kile Saul
1Samuel18:26 Ak kingomwachi otwogikyik Daudi ng’alechuto
1Samuel18:27 kong’eet Daudi kwo koboto bikyik
1Samuel18:28 Ak kigeer Saul ak konai kole komi Jehovah koboto Daudi ak kicham Mikal cheptab Saul Daudi.
1Samuel18:29 Ak kites Saul koiywei Daudi; ak kiek Saul bunyotab Daudi betut age tugul.
1Samuel18:30 Kimanda anyun bounikab Pilistik: ak ye kicham komandoi
1Samuel19:1 Ak king’alalji Saul Jonatan werinnyi
1Samuel19:2 Ago kibaibai mising’ Jonatan weritab Saul agobo Daudi. Ak kimwachi Jonatan Daudi
1Samuel19:3 si amanda ak awe atonone ye negite baba eng’ kewet eng’ ole imi
1Samuel19:4 Ak king’alalji Jonatan Saul kwandanyi
1Samuel19:5 amu ma iit sobondanyi
1Samuel19:6 Ak kigas Saul ng’olyotab Jonatan: ak kiiyosio Saul kole
1Samuel19:7 Ak kiguur Jonatan Daudi ak koborji Jonatan inendet tuguchoto tugul. Ak kiimut Jonatan Daudi kwo ole mi Saul
1Samuel19:8 Ak kibiit luget kogeny: ak kimanda Daudi kwo kobargei ak Pilistik
1Samuel19:9 Ak kinyonji Saul tamirmiriet ne ya ne kibunu Jehovah
1Samuel19:10 Ak kilen Saul kotoor Daudi eng’ ng’otit kosore inat; ago kichilil eng’ taitab Saul
1Samuel19:11 Ak kiiyokto Saul bik koba gotab Daudi
1Samuel19:12 Kochoorta anyun Mikal Daudi kwo ng’ony kobun tirisiet: ak kiwa komwei
1Samuel19:13 Ak kinam Mikal kanamwet
1Samuel19:14 Ak kingoyokto Saul bik koba konam Daudi
1Samuel19:15 Ak kiiyokto Saul bichoto koba kogeer Daudi
1Samuel19:16 Ak kingobwa go bichoto
1Samuel19:17 Ak kilenji Saul Mikal
1Samuel19:18 Komwei anyun Daudi
1Samuel19:19 Ak kigimwachi Saul kelenji
1Samuel19:20 Ak kiiyokto Saul bik koba konam Daudi; ak kingogeer tuiyetab maotik komaotendos ng’alek
1Samuel19:21 Ak kingemwachi Saul ng’alechato
1Samuel19:22 Kiwa inendet agine Rama
1Samuel19:23 Ak kiwa oloto bo Naiot eng’ Rama: ak kinyonji inendet agine Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet
1Samuel19:24 Ak kiireek ngoroikyik
1Samuel20:1 Ak kimwei Daudi eng’ Naiot eng’ Rama
1Samuel20:2 Ak kilenji
1Samuel20:3 Ak kogeny
1Samuel20:4 Kolenji anyun Jonatan Daudi
1Samuel20:5 Ak kilenji Daudi Jonatan
1Samuel20:6 Ngot kogeer kwandang’ung’ kole mami ane
1Samuel20:7 Ngot komwa ko u noto
1Samuel20:8 Eng’ noto anyun iyachi ne mie otwogindeng’ung’; amu kiiyachi otwogindeng’ung’ arorutiet ne bo Jehovah koboten: ago ngot atinye tengekto
1Samuel20:9 Ak kile Jonatan
1Samuel20:10 Kolenji anyun Daudi Jonatan
1Samuel20:11 Kolenji Jonatan Daudi
1Samuel20:12 Kilenji Jonatan Daudi
1Samuel20:13 Ingoyachi Jehovah Jonatan ko u noto
1Samuel20:14 Ak iborua mieindab Jehovah
1Samuel20:15 ago kogeny meistoi mieindang’ung’ eng’ gonnyu koigeny: achicha
1Samuel20:16 Koyai anyun Jonatan arorutiet koboto gotab Daudi kole
1Samuel20:17 Ak kiiyosiechi Jonatan Daudi ne bo aeng’
1Samuel20:18 Kilenji anyun Jonatan inendet
1Samuel20:19 Ak ye kaibeni betusiek somok
1Samuel20:20 Ak amwok tabandanyi eng’ kipchabonik somok
1Samuel20:21 Keero
1Samuel20:22 Ago ngot amwachi weroto ko u noto alenji
1Samuel20:23 Ak agobo ng’alek che kagemwa
1Samuel20:24 Kiunygei Daudi anyun eng’ timin: ak kingoleel arawet
1Samuel20:25 Ak kitebe laitoriat ng’echerennyi ko u betusiek alak
1Samuel20:26 Ago kima mwa ng’olyo age tugul betunoto Saul: amu kilen
1Samuel20:27 Ak ki mutai
1Samuel20:28 Ak kiwolji Jonatan Saul kolenji
1Samuel20:29 ak kole
1Samuel20:30 Kolalyo anyun neregekab Saul agobo Jonatan
1Samuel20:31 Amu kota kosobei weritab Jesii eng’ ng’ony
1Samuel20:32 Ak kiwolji Jonatan kwandanyi Saul kolenji
1Samuel20:33 Ak kitoor Saul inendet kolen kobar: konae noto anyun Jonatan kole kogotil kwandanyi kobar Daudi.
1Samuel20:34 Kong’eet anyun Jonatan eng’ meset eng’ neregek che ng’wonen
1Samuel20:35 Ak ki eng’ karon
1Samuel20:36 Ak kilenji lakwanato
1Samuel20:37 Ak kingoit lakwet ole kimi kipchabet ne kiga mwokto Jonatan
1Samuel20:38 Ak kiguur Jonatan lakwet kolenji
1Samuel20:39 Ago ma nai kiy age tugul lakwanato: Jonatan ak Daudi ichegei che kiingen ng’alechato.
1Samuel20:40 Ak kiigochi Jonatan karikyik lakwanatonyi
1Samuel20:41 Ak ne matia ko kata kowendi lakwet
1Samuel20:42 Ak kilenji Jonatan Daudi
1Samuel21:1 Konyo anyun Daudi Nob oldab Aimelek tisiindet: ak kinyo Aimelek kotorok Daudi kobotanonu

1Samuel21:3 Ara anyun
1Samuel21:4 Ak kiwolji tisiindonoto Daudi kolenji
1Samuel21:5 Ak kiwolji Daudi tisiindonoto kolenji
1Samuel21:6 Kogochi anyun tisiindet inendet makatinik che itabanotin: amu kima komi makatinik alage kobate makatinik che bo kabartaet
1Samuel21:7 Kimi yoto chito age ne bo otwogikab Saul eng’ betunoto
1Samuel21:8 Ak kimwachi Daudi Aimelek
1Samuel21:9 Ak kile tisiindonoto

1Samuel21:11 Ak kilenji otwogikyik Aksi
1Samuel21:12 Ak kigonor Daudi ng’alechuto eng’ muguleldanyi

1Samuel21:14 Kilenji anyun Akis otwogikyik
1Samuel21:15 Tos korarua kibionik
1Samuel22:1 Kiwa Daudi anyun eng’ oloto
1Samuel22:2 Ak kiiyumjigei inendet chi age tugul ne kinyalili
1Samuel22:3 Ak kiwa eng’ oloto Daudi kwo Mispe ne bo Moab
1Samuel22:4 Ak kiimut ichek kobwa taitab laitoriatab Moab: ak kimeng’is ak inendet betusiek tugul che kimi Daudi kebenet.
1Samuel22:5 Ak kilenji maotiot Gad Daudi
1Samuel22:6 Ak kigas Saul kole kigenyor Daudi

1Samuel22:9 Kowol anyun Doeg Edomindet
1Samuel22:10 Ak kiteepsechi eng’ Jehovah agobo inendet

1Samuel22:15 Tos katau rani ateepsechi inendet eng’ Kamuktaindet? Ingolooit eng’ ane: amat koiityi laitoriat kiy age tugul otwogindennyi

1Samuel22:17 Ak kilenji laitoriat ribik che kitonondos eng’ ye negite inendet

1Samuel23:21 Ak kile Saul

1Samuel23:23 Ogeer anyun ak onai komoswek tugul ole ung’egei

1Samuel23:27 Ago kinyo chi komwachi Saul kolenji

1Samuel25:1 Ak kime Samuel; ak kiiyumgei Israel tugul

1Samuel25:3 Kainetab chichoto ko ki Nabal; ak kainetab osotiondennyi ko ki Abigail; ak ki ng’om osotiondonoto
1Samuel25:4 Ak kigas Daudi eng’ ong’atet kele
1Samuel25:5 Ak kiiyokto Daudi murenik taman
1Samuel25:6 ak omwachi ko u ni inendet ne meng’isiei eng’ kaberuret
1Samuel25:7 Ak kaagas nguno kele itinye bik che tilei kororikab kechirek: kogotebi mestoweguk kobotech
1Samuel25:8 Teebe murenjotoguget

1Samuel25:15 Ago kiyaiywech ne mie kot bichoto

1Samuel31:3 Ak kigoromit boriet mising’ eng’ Saul

1Samuel31:8 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto
1Samuel31:9 Ak kitil metinnyi
1Samuel31:10 Ak kiinde karikyik gotab Astarot: ak koratyi mustanyi inatutab Bet-san.

2Samuel1:1 Ak kingobata meetab Saul
2Samuel1:2 eng’ betutab somok
2Samuel1:3 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet
2Samuel1:4 Ak kiteebe Daudi inendet kolenji
2Samuel1:5 Ak kilenji Daudi murenonoto kimwachin inendet
2Samuel1:6 Ak kilenji murenenoto kimwachin inendet
2Samuel1:7 Ak kingowelelgei
2Samuel1:8 Ak kilenja
2Samuel1:9 Ak kilenja
2Samuel1:10 Atonone anyun yoto kimitei
2Samuel1:11 Konam anyun Daudi ngoroikyik kogerer; ak kiyai ko u noto bik tugul che kimi ak inendet:
2Samuel1:12 ak kiiteiyo ak koririo ak korugutgei agoi koskoleny agobo Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi
2Samuel1:13 Ak kilenji Daudi murenonoto kimwachin inendet ng’alechato
2Samuel1:14 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet
2Samuel1:15 Ak kiguur Daudi age eng’ murenik
2Samuel1:16 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet
2Samuel1:17 Ak kirirji Daudi Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi eng’ rirechu:
2Samuel1:18 ak kimwachi ichek konet bikab Juda tiendab kwanget: ogeero
2Samuel1:19 Ee Israel
2Samuel1:20 Mat omwaite eng’ Gat
2Samuel1:21 Okwek tulonokab Gilboa
2Samuel1:22 Eng’ korotikab che kigibar
2Samuel1:23 Ki kororon Saul ak Jonatan ak ki chamotin eng’ sobonwekwak
2Samuel1:24 Okwek tibikab Israel
2Samuel1:25 Kiibututa ano che kimen eng’ kwenutab boriet! Kigibar Jonatan eng’ komosweguk che tororen.
2Samuel1:26 Aarogeni amu inye
2Samuel1:27 Kiibututa ano che kimen
2Samuel2:1 Ak kingobata tuguchuto koteebe Daudi Jehovah kole
2Samuel2:2 Kotogosta anyun Daudi oloto
2Samuel2:3 Ak kiimut Daudi bikyik che kimi koboto inendet
2Samuel2:4 Ak kibwa bikab Juda kobwa koiil Daudi eng’ oloto koek laitoriatab gotab Juda. Ak kimwachi icheget Daudi kolenji
2Samuel2:5 Ak kiiyokto Daudi bik koba oldab bikab Jabes-gilead
2Samuel2:6 Ak ingoboruok Jehovah ak okwek mieindo ak imanit: ak ayaakwok agane mieinito
2Samuel2:7 Ingogimegitu anyun eunekwok
2Samuel2:8 Kiga komut Abner weritab Ner
2Samuel2:9 kiinde inendet koek laitoriat koboi Gilead
2Samuel2:10 (Ki bo Is-boset weritab Saul kenyisiek artam ye kitau kolaitorani
2Samuel2:11 Ak betusiek che kilaitoran Daudi eng’ Hebron eng’ gotab Juda ko ki kenyisiek tisab ak arawek lo.
2Samuel2:12 Ak kiba Abner weritab Ner
2Samuel2:13 Ak kiba Joab weritab Seruia
2Samuel2:14 Ak kilenji Abner Joab
2Samuel2:15 King’eetyo anyun koba ak kigiiti; ki taman ak aeng’ che bo Benjamin
2Samuel2:16 Ak kinam age tugul metitab age
2Samuel2:17 Ak kigoromit boriet mising’ eng’ betunoto; ak kigiterter Abner
2Samuel2:18 Ak kimi yoto werik somogu che bo Seruia
2Samuel2:19 Ak kion Asael Abner; ak ma masta kwo eutab tai anan eutab katam ye kionei Abner.
2Samuel2:20 Yeityo kogusgong’ Abner
2Samuel2:21 Ak kilenji Abner inendet
2Samuel2:22 Ak kilenji Abner Asael kogeny
2Samuel2:23 Ago kiesio komasta: kitoor anyun Abner inendet moet eng’ chileiywotab ng’otit
2Samuel2:24 Ago kion Joab ak Abisai Abner: ak kingoit tulwetab Ama
2Samuel2:25 Ak kiiyumgei lagokab Benjamin konamgei ak Abner
2Samuel2:26 Yeityo koguur Abner Joab kolenji
2Samuel2:27 Ak kile Joab
2Samuel2:28 Koguut anyun Joab iriaget
2Samuel2:29 Ak kiba Abner ak bikyik kemounoto tugul kobun Araba; ak kilandae Jordan
2Samuel2:30 Ak kiweek Joab mata kosub Abner: ak kingo kagoyum bik tugul
2Samuel2:31 Ago kiga kobar otwogikab Daudi che bo Benjamin ak murenikab Abner; kot kobek bik bogolwogik somogu ak tamanwogik lo.
2Samuel2:32 Ak kila Asael
2Samuel3:1 Ak kibiit boriet eng’ betusiek che chang’ eng’ gotab Saul ak gotab Daudi: ak kigimit Daudi kotesak
2Samuel3:2 Ak kigisikyi Daudi werik eng’ Hebron: ak taitanyi ko ki Amnon
2Samuel3:3 ak werinnyi ne bo aeng’ ko ki Kileab
2Samuel3:4 ak ne bo ang’wan ko ki Adonija weritab Hagit; ak ne bo mut ko ki Sepatia weritab Abital;
2Samuel3:5 ak ne bo lo ko ki Itream ne kisichei Egla osotiotab Daudi. Kigisikyi chuto Daudi eng’ Hebron.
2Samuel3:6 Ak ye kibortos gotab Saul ak gotab Daudi
2Samuel3:7 Kitinyei Saul chebaigeiyat
2Samuel3:8 Kinerech anyun mising’ Abner amu ng’alekab Is-boset
2Samuel3:9 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ko u noto Abner
2Samuel3:10 auto bounatet eng’ gotab Saul
2Samuel3:11 Ak kimata komuch kowolji Abner ng’olyot age
2Samuel3:12 Ak kiiyokto bik Abner koba oldab Daudi ne kita wendi inendet kolenji
2Samuel3:13 Ak kile Daudi
2Samuel3:14 Ak kiiyokto Daudi bik koba oldab Is-boset weritab Saul
2Samuel3:15 Ak kiiyokto Is-boset bik koba komutune manong’otiondennyi
2Samuel3:16 Ak kiba ak monong’otiondennyi koriroti manong’otiondennyi
2Samuel3:17 Ak king’alal Abner ak boisiekab Israel
2Samuel3:18 ara anyun oyai: amu kigomwa Jehovah agobo Daudi kole
2Samuel3:19 Ak king’alalji Abner Benjamin agine kogas: ak kogeny ko kiwa Abner komwachi Daudi kogas eng’ Hebron tuguk tugul che kigeerei Israel ak gotab Benjamin tugul
2Samuel3:20 Kiit anyun Abner ole mi Daudi eng’ Hebron
2Samuel3:21 Ak kilenji Abner Daudi
2Samuel3:22 Ak ogeero
2Samuel3:23 Kingoit Joab ak luget tugul ne kimi ak inendet
2Samuel3:24 Konyo anyun Joab ole mi laitoriat
2Samuel3:25 Ingen inye Abner weritab Ner ile kanyo koberberin
2Samuel3:26 Ak kingonyo Joab eng’ oldab Daudi
2Samuel3:27 Ak kingo kagoweek Abner konyo Hebron
2Samuel3:28 Ak kingogas Daudi eng’ let
2Samuel3:29 ingotebe metitab Joab
2Samuel3:30 Kibar anyun Joab ak Abisai ng’etab kamet
2Samuel3:31 Ak kilenji Daudi Joab
2Samuel3:32 Ak kitupchi Abner Hebron: ak kiwaach laitoriat eng’ kutit ne o
2Samuel3:33 Ak kirir laitoriat agobo Abner kole
2Samuel3:34 Kima ko ratotin euneguk
2Samuel3:35 Ak kibwa bik tugul komwachi Daudi koamis ye kita ko bet; ago kiiyosio Daudi
2Samuel3:36 Ak kigeer bik tugul kioto
2Samuel3:37 Kinai anyun bik tugul ak Israel tugul eng’ betunoto kole
2Samuel3:38 Ak kilenji laitoriat otwogikyik
2Samuel3:39 A nyalulat rani agot nganda a laitoriat ne kigiil; ak temena bichu werikab Seruia; ingoyaakyi Jehovah yaindetab yaitiet ko u yaitiennyi.
2Samuel4:1 Ak kingogas Is-boset weritab Saul kole kogome Abner eng’ Hebron
2Samuel4:2 Ak kitinyei weritab Saul murenik aeng’ che ki kiptainikab kweanaikab luget: kigiguure kainetab age Baana
2Samuel4:3 ak kimwechi Berotik Gitaim
2Samuel4:4 Kitinyei Jonatan weritab Saul werit ne ki meiyotin kelyek. Ki bo kenyisiek mut inendet ye kiitu ng’alekab Saul ak Jonatan eng’ Jesreel
2Samuel4:5 Ak kiba werikab Rimon Berotindet
2Samuel4:6 Ak kiba kwenutab got
2Samuel4:7 Kingoit go anyun ichek konyor koruei eng’ itogunnyi eng’ got ne kirue
2Samuel4:8 Ak kiib metoto bo Is-boset koipchi Daudi eng’ Hebron
2Samuel4:9 Ak kiwolji Daudi Rekab ak Baana ng’etab kamet
2Samuel4:10 kingomwawa chito age kole
2Samuel4:11 Siirei ne tia
2Samuel4:12 Ak king’at Daudi murenikyik
2Samuel5:1 Kibwa anyun bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel ole mi Daudi eng’ Hebron
2Samuel5:2 Eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto
2Samuel5:3 Kibwa anyun boisiek tugul che bo Israel ole mi laitoriat eng’ Hebron; ak kiyai laitoriat Daudi arorutiet koboto ichek eng’ Hebron eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kiil Daudi koek laitoriat koboi Israel.
2Samuel5:4 Ki bo Daudi kenyisiek sosom ye kitau kolaitorani
2Samuel5:5 Kilaitoran eng’ Hebron kobou Juda kenyisiek tisab ak arawek lo: ak kilaitoran eng’ Jerusalem kenyisiek sosom kobou Israel tugul ak Juda.
2Samuel5:6 Yeityo kwo laitoriat ak bikyik Jerusalem koba kobargei ak Jebusik
2Samuel5:7 Ago kinam Daudi irimetab Sion; noto ko nganasetab Daudi.
2Samuel5:8 Ak kile Daudi eng’ betunoto
2Samuel5:9 Kimeny anyun Daudi irimonoto
2Samuel5:10 Ak kieet Daudi kotesak; amu kimi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab lugosiek koboto inendet.
2Samuel5:11 Ak kiiyokto Iram laitoriatab Turo bik koba oldab Daudi
2Samuel5:12 Ak kinai Daudi kole kigogimit Jehovah inendet koek laitoriat ne bou Israel
2Samuel5:13 Ak kiimutyigei Daudi chebaigeinik alak ak osotik alak eng’ Jerusalem
2Samuel5:14 Ak chu ko kainaikab che kigisikyi inendet eng’ Jerusalem; Samua
2Samuel5:15 ak Ibar
2Samuel5:16 ak Elisama
2Samuel5:17 Ak kingogas Pilistik kole kigiil Daudi koek laitoriat koboi Israel
2Samuel5:18 Ak kibwa Pilistik ak koyom atebwetab Repaim.
2Samuel5:19 Ak kiteebe Daudi Jehovah kolenji
2Samuel5:20 Ak kiit Daudi Baal-perasim
2Samuel5:21 Ak kibagakta kanamonikwak eng’ yoto
2Samuel5:22 Kitogos Pilistik kogeny ne bo aeng’
2Samuel5:23 Ak ye kiteebe Daudi Jehovah
2Samuel5:24 Ak ye igas cheetab banda eng’ ketichato bo logoek barak
2Samuel5:25 Ak kiyai Daudi ko u noto ko u ye king’at Jehovah; ak kibar Pilistik koboch Geba agoi koit Geser.
2Samuel6:1 Ak kiiyum Daudi kogeny murenik tugul che bo Israel che kigilewen
2Samuel6:2 Ak king’eet Daudi
2Samuel6:3 Ak kiinde moingetab Kamuktaindet karit ne leel
2Samuel6:4 Ak kiib konyo eng’ gotab Abinadab ne kimi tulwet
2Samuel6:5 Ak kibut Daudi ak got tugul ne bo Israel eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Samuel6:6 Ak kingoit ichek ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Nakon
2Samuel6:7 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Usa; ak kibir Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ yoto amu lelutiennyi; ak kimechi yoto kimi moingetab Kamuktaindet.
2Samuel6:8 Ak kima cham Daudi
2Samuel6:9 Ak kiiywei Daudi Jehovah betunoto: ak kimwa kole
2Samuel6:10 Ma cham Daudi anyun koib moingetab Jehovah konyo ole mi inendet eng’ nganasetab Daudi; ago kiib Daudi kwo taban kwo gotab Obed-edom Getindet.
2Samuel6:11 Ak kitebe moingetab Jehovah gotab Obed-edom Getindet arawek somok: ak kiiberur Jehovah Obed-edom
2Samuel6:12 Ak kigimwachi Daudi kelenji
2Samuel6:13 Ak kingo kagoba kakwautik lo icheget che kiibei moingetab Jehovah
2Samuel6:14 Ak kiureren Daudi eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ kimnatennyi tugul; ak kigermenegei Daudi epod ne bo katanit.
2Samuel6:15 Kiib anyun Daudi ak got tugul ne bo Israel moingetab Jehovah
2Samuel6:16 Ak kingoit moingetab Jehovah nganasetab Daudi
2Samuel6:17 Ak kiib moingetab Jehovah konyo go
2Samuel6:18 Ak kingo kagoges Daudi kagoitoetab kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet
2Samuel6:19 Ak kipchechi bik tugul eng’ tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel
2Samuel6:20 Yeityo koweek Daudi koberur bikab gonnyi. Ak kinyo sang’ Mikal cheptab Saul kotorok Daudi
2Samuel6:21 Ak kilenji Daudi Mikal
2Samuel6:22 Ak ta kesasa kosiir nito
2Samuel6:23 Ak ma sich Mikal cheptab Saul lakwa agoi betutab meennyi.

2Samuel7:2 kolenji laitoriat Natan maotiot
2Samuel7:3 Ak kilenji Natan laitoriat
2Samuel7:4 Ak kiityi Natan ng’olyotab Jehovah kemounoto
2Samuel7:5 Ui imwachi otwogindennyu Daudi

2Samuel7:7 Eng’ komoswek tugul ole kiawendate ak lagok tugul che bo Israel
2Samuel7:8 Ara anyun
2Samuel7:9 ak kiatebi koboten eng’ oldo tugul ole kiiwe
2Samuel7:10 Ak alewenjini yeto bikyuk Israel
2Samuel7:11 ak koboch betut ne kiang’at kiruogik koboi bikyuk Israel; ak agonin imuuny eng’ buniguk tugul. Ak mwaun Jehovah kogeny kole teegun got Jehovah.
2Samuel7:12 Ak ye igesgei betusieguk
2Samuel7:13 Tun teekyin got inendet kainennyu
2Samuel7:14 Aegu kwandanyi
2Samuel7:15 ago maistoegei inendet rirenennyu
2Samuel7:16 Ak kigimiti gong’ung’ ak bounateng’ung’ koigeny eng’ taing’ung’: kigimiti ng’echeretab laitornateng’ung’ agoi koigeny.

2Samuel7:19 Ak kiek nito kit ne ming’in eng’ taing’ung’
2Samuel7:20 Ak nee age ne ta komuchi Daudi komwaun? Amu ingen inye otwogindeng’ung’
2Samuel7:21 Amu kaiyai etunatoni tugul agobo ng’olyondeng’ung’
2Samuel7:22 I o amu noto
2Samuel7:23 Ak ngoro bororiet ne kergei ak biguk
2Samuel7:24 Kiigimityigei biguk Israel koek biguk koigeny; ak kiiegu inye Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa.

2Samuel8:1 Ak kingobata nito kobar Daudi Pilistik ak koterter ichek: ak kireb Daudi Metegama eng’ eunekab Pilistik.
2Samuel8:2 Ak kibar Moab
2Samuel8:3 Kibar kogeny Daudi Hadadeser weritab Rehob
2Samuel8:4 Ak kirebe Daudi inendet murenik elfut agenge ak bogol tisab che kilanyei mbartanyisiek
2Samuel8:5 Ak kingobwa Suriekab Damasko kotoret Hadadeser laitoriatab Soba
2Samuel8:6 Kiinde anyun Daudi irimosiek Suria ne bo Damasko: ak kiek Suriek otwogikab Daudi
2Samuel8:7 Ak kiib Daudi long’onikab tahabu che kitinyei otwogikab Hadadeser ak kiib kobwa Jerusalem.
2Samuel8:8 Ak kiib laitoriat Daudi sugunonik che chang’ mising’ eng’ Beta ak eng’ Berotai
2Samuel8:9 Ak kingogas Toi laitoriatab Hamat kole kogobar Daudi luget tugul ne bo Hadadeser
2Samuel8:10 koyokto anyun Toi Joram werinnyi
2Samuel8:11 kiitabanji Daudi Jehovah tuguchuto agichek
2Samuel8:12 che bo Suria
2Samuel8:13 Ak kieet kainetab Daudi ye kiweeksei kobunu baret ne kibarei Suriek eng’ Atebwetab Munyuk
2Samuel8:14 Ak kiinde irimosiek Edom; kiinde irimosiek Edom komugul
2Samuel8:15 Ak kilaitoran Daudi eng’ Israel tugul; ak kiiruokyi Daudi bikyik tugul eng’ lititindo ak iman.
2Samuel8:16 Ak kibou Joab weritab Seruia luget; ak ki sirindetab tuguk che biitu
2Samuel8:17 ak ki tisiik Sadok weritab Aitub ak Aimelek weritab Abiatar; ak ki sirindet Seraia:
2Samuel8:18 ak kibou Benaia weritab Jeoiada Keretik ak Peletik; ak ki tisiik werikab Daudi.

2Samuel12:1 Ak kiiyokto Jehovah Natan kwo ole mi Daudi. Ak kinyo ole mi inendet ak kolenji
2Samuel12:2 Kitinyei ne ki magoriot akwotisiek che chang’ mising’ che bo kechirek ak tuga.
2Samuel12:3 Ago kima kotinyei kiy ne ki kibananiat
2Samuel12:4 Ak kinyo kiprutoiyot oldab magoriondonoto
2Samuel12:5 Ak kilalyo mising’ neregekab Daudi agobo chichoto: ak kilenji Natan
2Samuel12:6 ak koyook aruanato konyil ang’wan
2Samuel12:7 Ak kilenji Natan Daudi
2Samuel12:8 ak kiagonin gotab kiptaiyandeng’ung’
2Samuel12:9 Amu nee anyun si isas ng’olyotab Jehovah
2Samuel12:10 Ara anyun
2Samuel12:11 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole

2Samuel12:13 Ak kilenji Daudi Natan
2Samuel12:14 Ago amu kaigochi eng’ yaitioni bunikab Jehovah boroindo ne o kochubis
2Samuel12:15 Ak kiwa Natan gonnyi. Ak kibir Jehovah lakwet ne kiga sikyi Daudi osotiot ne ki bo Uria
2Samuel12:16 Ak kisa Daudi Kamuktaindet agobo lakwanato; ak kiirugutgei Daudi
2Samuel12:17 Ak king’eetyo boisiekab gonnyi kotononio eng’ ye mi inendet
2Samuel12:18 Ak kime lakwet eng’ betut ne bo tisab. Ak kiiywei otwogikab Daudi komwachi inendet kolenji kagome lakwet: amu kile
2Samuel12:19 Ago kingogeer Daudi kochaamjingei otwogikyik

2Samuel13:1 Kitinyei Absalom weritab Daudi chepkamet ne kararan
2Samuel13:2 Ak kiimgei Amnon kot komian amu chepkametinnyi Tamar; amu ki bergeiyat: ak kigeer Amnon kouuit koyachi kiy age tugul inendet.
2Samuel13:3 Ago kitinyei Amnon choruet
2Samuel13:4 Ak kilenji inendet
2Samuel13:5 Ak kilenji Jonadab inendet
2Samuel13:6 Kiru anyun Amnon
2Samuel13:7 Koyokto anyun Daudi keguur Tamar eng’ ga
2Samuel13:8 Kwo anyun Tamar gotab ng’etab kamet Amnon; ak kiruei. Ak kinam busiek che kagitesyi beek
2Samuel13:9 Ak kinam tabetab karnet ak koluluk eng’ tainnyi; ago kiesio koam. Ak kile Amnon
2Samuel13:10 Ak kilenji Amnon Tamar
2Samuel13:11 Ak kingo kagoib makatinichoto koba ye negite inendet
2Samuel13:12 Ak kiwolji kolenji
2Samuel13:13 Si awa ano anyun
2Samuel13:14 Ago ma cham kogas ng’alekyik: ago
2Samuel13:15 Yeityo kowech Amnon inendet eng’ weget ne o mising’: amu kieet weget ne kiwech inendet kosiir chamnyet ne kiga chame inendet. Ak kilenji Amnon inendet
2Samuel13:16 Ak kilenji inendet
2Samuel13:17 Yeityo koguur otwogindet ne kiboisiechin konyo ole mi
2Samuel13:18 Ak kiilaachi cheboto ngoriet ne koi: amu kicham kolaachi tibikab laitoriat che bergeinik ngoroik che u choto. Kiimut anyun otwogindennyi inendet konyo sang’
2Samuel13:19 Ak kiinde Tamar orek metinnyi
2Samuel13:20 Ak kilenji Absalom ng’etab kametab Tamar

2Samuel13:24 Ak kimi Absalom ole mi laitoriat
2Samuel13:25 Ak kilenji laitoriat Absalom
2Samuel13:26 Kile anyun Absalom
2Samuel13:27 Ago kiigaigai Absalom inendet
2Samuel13:28 Ak king’at Absalom otwogik kolenji

2Samuel13:31 King’eet anyun laitoriat
2Samuel13:32 Ak kiwol Jonadab
2Samuel13:33 Noto anyun

2Samuel14:3 ak iwe oldab laitoriat

2Samuel14:5 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet

2Samuel14:7 Ak keero

2Samuel14:13 Ak kile kwonyoto

2Samuel15:8 Amu kiarorte ane otwogindeng’ung’ ye kita ami Gesur eng’ Suria ale

2Samuel17:2 Si ache kota ko ng’etat ko maimuchi koyai kiy

2Samuel19:1 Ak kigimwachi Joab kelenji
2Samuel19:2 Ak kiwalak katerterisiet eng’ betunoto koek kateiyet eng’ bik tugul: amu kigas bik kemwaei betunoto kele
2Samuel19:3 Ak kiba bik nganaset betunoto koung’ategei
2Samuel19:4 Ak kituch laitoriat togennyi
2Samuel19:5 Ak kinyo Joab go
2Samuel19:6 amu ichame ichek che wechin
2Samuel19:7 Ng’eet anyun
2Samuel19:8 Kong’eet anyun laitoriat ak kotebe ormarichet. Ak kigimwachi bik tugul kelenji
2Samuel19:9 Ak kibiit suriet eng’ bik tugul eng’ bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel
2Samuel19:10 Ak kogome eng’ luget Absalom ne kiga kiil koboiywech. Ara anyun amu nee si momwa kimut laitoriat koweek?

2Samuel19:17 Ak kimi koboto inendet bik elfut agenge che bo Benjamin

2Samuel19:28 Amu ki u got tugul ne bo kwandanyu
2Samuel19:29 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet
2Samuel19:30 Ak kilenji Mepiboset laitoriat

2Samuel19:33 Ak kilenji laitoriat Barsilai
2Samuel19:34 Ak kilenji Barsilai laitoriat
2Samuel19:35 A bo rani kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit: ta amuchi abesio ne mie ak ne ya? Ta komuchi otwogindeng’ung’ kogas kit ne chamu tuguk che aame anan ko che aee? Ta amuchi agas cheetab murenik che tiendos
2Samuel19:36 Landoi otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ Jordan kityo

2Samuel20:1 Ak kibiit eng’ yoto chi ne bo Belial
2Samuel20:2 Kotogosta anyun bik tugul che bo Israel
2Samuel20:3 Ak kinyo Daudi gonnyi eng’ Jerusalem; ak kinam laitoriat kwonyichugiche taman
2Samuel20:4 Kilenji anyun laitoriat Amasa
2Samuel20:5 Kwo anyun Amasa koguur bikab Juda kotuiyo: ago kiigagei kosiir che kiga ng’at laitoriat inendet.
2Samuel20:6 Ak kilenji Daudi Abisai
2Samuel20:7 Ak kiisub inendet bikab Joab
2Samuel20:8 Ak kingorikyi koita ne o ne mi Gibeon
2Samuel20:9 Ak kilenji Joab Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Ago ma keer Amasa rotwetab chok ne kitinyei Joab eng’ eunnyi: kotoor anyun moet eng’ rotwonoto
2Samuel20:11 Ak kitonon eng’ ye negite inendet age eng’ murenikab Joab
2Samuel20:12 Ak kimildoegei Amasa korotikyik eng’ kwenutab oret ne o. Ak kingogeer chichoto kole katononso bik tugul
2Samuel20:13 Kingo kageisto eng’ oranato o
2Samuel20:14 Ak kibun bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel agoi koit Abel
2Samuel20:15 Ak kibwa koyiem inendet eng’ Abel ne bo Bet-maaka
2Samuel20:16 Kowaach anyun kwondo age ne ng’om eng’ nganasanato
2Samuel20:17 Ak kinyo ye mi kwonyoto
2Samuel20:18 Yeityo komwa kole
2Samuel20:19 A bo ichek che bo kalyet ak che bo iman eng’ Israel: icheng’e ibar nganaset ak ko kamet eng’ Israel: amu nee si imache ilugui borotetab Jehovah?
2Samuel20:20 Ak kiwol Joab kole
2Samuel20:21 Ma u noto ng’olyondonoto: kimach Sheba weritab Bikri
2Samuel20:22 Kwo anyun kwonyoto eng’ ng’omnatennyi ole mi bik tugul. Ak kitil ichek metitab Sheba weritab Bikri
2Samuel20:23 Ak koboi Joab luget tugul ne bo Israel: ak kiboi Benaia weritab Jeoiada Keretik ak Peletik:
2Samuel20:24 ak kiboi Adoram aisurut: ki sirindetab tuguk che biitu Jeosapat weritab Ailud:
2Samuel20:25 ak ki sirindet Seva: ak ki tisiik Sadok ak Abiatar:
2Samuel20:26 ak ki tisiindetab Daudi agine Ira Jairindet.

2Samuel21:2 Ak kiguur laitoriat Gibeonik
2Samuel21:3 ak kilenji Daudi Gibeonik
2Samuel21:4 Ak kilenji Gibeonik inendet
2Samuel21:5 Ak kilenji ichek laitoriat
2Samuel21:6 ingigonech bik tisab che bo werikyik
2Samuel21:7 Ago kirire laitoriat Mepiboset
2Samuel21:8 Ago kinam laitoriat werik tuwai che bo Rispa cheptab Aia
2Samuel21:9 ak kiinde eunekab Gibeonik
2Samuel21:10 Ak kiinem Rispa cheptab Aia kuniok ak kiitochigei eng’ ruandet
2Samuel21:11 Ak kigimwachi Daudi kit ne koyai Rispa cheptab Aia
2Samuel21:12 Ak kiwa Daudi koib kowekab Saul ak kowekab Jonatan werinnyi eng’ bikab Jabes-gilead
2Samuel21:13 ak kiib kowekab Saul ak kowekab Jonatan werinnyi kotogos; ak kiiyum kowekab icheget che kiga kigartat.
2Samuel21:14 Ak kitub kowekab Saul ak che bo Jonatan werinnyi eng’ emetab Benjamin eng’ Sela
