1Chronicles26:1 Pcheutikab ribikab kurget ko: che bo Koraik ko ki: Meselemia weritab Kore
1Chronicles26:2 Ak kitinyei werik Meselemia
1Chronicles26:3 Elam ne bo mut
1Chronicles26:4 Ak kitinyei werik Obed-edom; Semaia taita
1Chronicles26:5 Amiel ne bo lo
1Chronicles26:6 Ak kigisikyi werik Semaia agine
1Chronicles26:7 Werikab Semaia ko ki: Otni
1Chronicles26:8 Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Obed-edom: icheget ak werikwak ak tupchosiekwak ko ki bik che kimen eng’ kimnatet agobo otisiet; ki bik tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ che bo Obed-edom.
1Chronicles26:9 Ak kitinyei Meselemia werik ak che tupcho
1Chronicles26:10 Kitinyei Hosa agine
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkia ne bo aeng’
1Chronicles26:12 Kimi eng’ chuto pcheutikab bik che kiribei kurget
1Chronicles26:13 Ak kiser barbarek
1Chronicles26:14 Ak kibunji barbariat ne kitokyigei kong’asis Selemia. Yeityo koser barbarek agobo Sekaria werinnyi
1Chronicles26:15 Ki bo Obed-edom ne kitokyigei murot ne bo tai; ak kibunji werikyik got ne kigonore tuguk.
1Chronicles26:16 Kibunji Supim ak Hosa ne kitokyigei cherongo
1Chronicles26:17 Kimi Lawik lo komostab kong’asis
1Chronicles26:18 Kimi bik ang’wanu ye kitogostoe eng’ Parbar
1Chronicles26:19 Chuto ko ki pcheutikab ribikab kurget che bo werikab Koraik
1Chronicles26:20 Ak eng’ Lawik
1Chronicles26:21 Werikab Ladan: werikab Gersonik che bo Ladan
1Chronicles26:22 Werikab Jeieli ko ki: Setam ak Joel ng’etab kamet
1Chronicles26:23 Che bo Amramik
1Chronicles26:24 ak kibou Sebuel weritab Gersom
1Chronicles26:25 Ak tupchosiekyik: kisich Elieser Reabia werinnyi
1Chronicles26:26 Kibou Selomotinito ak tupchosiekyik komoswek tugul ole kigonore tuguk che itabanotin
1Chronicles26:27 Kiitaban che bo barunenik tuguk che kigibaru eng’ lugosiek
1Chronicles26:28 Kibou Selomot ak tupchosiekyik tuguk tugul che kiga kotaban Samuel keerindet
1Chronicles26:29 Kiyaei Kenania ak werikyik
1Chronicles26:30 Eng’ Hebronik
1Chronicles26:31 Che bo Hebronik
1Chronicles26:32 Ak tupchosiekyik
1Chronicles27:1 Kiek lagokab Israel
1Chronicles27:2 Kibou ripset ne bo tai ne bo arawet ne bo tai Jasobeam weritab Sabdiel: ak kimi ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptemu ak ang’wan.
1Chronicles27:3 Ki bo lagokab Peres
1Chronicles27:4 Ak kibou ripset ne bo arawet ne bo aeng’ Dodai Ahoindet
1Chronicles27:5 Kiptaiyat ne bo somok ne bo luget eng’ arawetab somok ko ki Benaia
1Chronicles27:6 Benaia-ini ko ki chito ne nyigan eng’ bik sosom
1Chronicles27:7 Ki Asael ng’etab kametab Joab kiptaiyat ne bo ang’wan eng’ arawet ne bo ang’wan
1Chronicles27:8 Ki Samut Israindet kiptaiyat ne bo mut eng’ arawetab mut: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan.
1Chronicles27:9 Ki Ira weritab Ikes Tekoindet kiptaiyat ne bo lo: eng’ arawet ne bo lo; ak kitinyei bik eng’ ripsennyi elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan.
1Chronicles27:10 Ki Heles Pelonindet
1Chronicles27:11 Ki Sibekai Husatindet ne bo Seraik
1Chronicles27:12 Ki Abieser Anatotindet ne bo Benjaminik
1Chronicles27:13 Ki Maarai Netopatindet ne bo Seraik
1Chronicles27:14 Ki Benaia Piratonindet ne bo lagokab Epraim
1Chronicles27:15 Ki Heldai Netopatindet ne bo Otniel kiptaiyat ne bo taman ak aeng’ eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan.
1Chronicles27:16 Kogeny
1Chronicles27:17 eng’ gab Lawi
1Chronicles27:18 eng’ gab Juda
1Chronicles27:19 eng’ gab Sebulun
1Chronicles27:20 eng’ lagokab Epraim ko ki Hosea weritab Asasia: eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase
1Chronicles27:21 eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase
1Chronicles27:22 eng’ gab Dan
1Chronicles27:23 Ago kima iit Daudi che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak koba ng’ony: amu kiga mwa Jehovah kole
1Chronicles27:24 Kitoi Joab weritab Seruia koiit
1Chronicles27:25 Ak kibou ole kigonore tugukab laitoriat Asmabet weritab Adiel: ak kibou Jonatan weritab Usia ole kigonore tugukab mbarenik
1Chronicles27:26 ak kibou Isri weritab Kelub ichek che kiyaei boisietab mbar
1Chronicles27:27 ak kibou Simei Ramatindet mbarenikab sabibuk: ak kibou Sabdi Sipmindet ruratetab mbarenikab sabibuk che kigonori:

2Chronicles3:1 Kitoi anyun Solomon koteech gotab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem eng’ tulwetab Moria
2Chronicles3:2 Ak kitoi koteekso eng’ betutab aeng’ eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’
2Chronicles3:3 Chu anyun lumeiywek che kilumda Solomon agobo teeksetab gotab Kamuktaindet. Ak kiek koindo kakwautik tamanwogik lo che bo eut eng’ pimanet ne bo tai ne bo kakwautik che bo eut
2Chronicles3:4 Ak koindab keterut ne kimi taitab got
2Chronicles3:5 Ak kitete got ne o ketikab biribirinik che kiiliige tahabu che kororon
2Chronicles3:6 Ak kilelesonji got eng’ koik che bo kamanutiet ne o si kogararanit: ak kibunu tahabu Parbaim.
2Chronicles3:7 Kiiliige kogeny tahabu got
2Chronicles3:8 Ak kiteech got ne tilil mising’; ak kiek koindanyi kakwautik tiptem che bo eut
2Chronicles3:9 Ak kiek nyigisindab kipchumarisiek sekelisiek konom che bo tahabu. Ak kiiliige tahabu gorik che bo barak.
2Chronicles3:10 Ak kiinde itonwek aeng’ che bo karubisiek got ne tilil mising’; ak koliige tahabu.
2Chronicles3:11 Ak ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut koindab kebebaikab kerubisiek: koindab kebepchet agenge ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut
2Chronicles3:12 Ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut kebepchetab kerubit age
2Chronicles3:13 Kiga uitogei kebebaikab kerubisiechuto koit kakwautik tiptem che bo eut: ak kitonondos eng’ kelyekwak
2Chronicles3:14 Ak kinab anget ne kioiye got

2Chronicles9:17 Ak koyai kogeny laitoriat ng’echeret ne o ne bo laitornatet eng’ kelekab belek

2Chronicles11:2 Ago kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Semaia chitab Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles11:3 Ng’alalji Reoboam weritab Solomon
2Chronicles11:4 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni
2Chronicles11:5 Ak kimeny Reoboam Jerusalem
2Chronicles11:6 Kiteech Bet-lehem
2Chronicles11:7 ak Bet-sur
2Chronicles11:8 ak Gat
2Chronicles11:9 ak Adoraim
2Chronicles11:10 ak Sora
2Chronicles11:11 Ak kiigimit irimoik
2Chronicles11:12 Ak kiinde nganaset age tugul long’onik ak ng’otwek
2Chronicles11:13 Ak kibwanji inendet tisiik ak Lawik che kimi Israel tugul
2Chronicles11:14 Amu kibagakta Lawik emotinwekwak che kiyagisie ak tugukwak
2Chronicles11:15 ak kilewenjigei tisiik che bo komoswek che tororen
2Chronicles11:16 Ak kibwa Jerusalem
2Chronicles11:17 Kiigimit anyun bounatetab Juda
2Chronicles11:18 Ak kitun Reoboam Maalat cheptab Jerimot weritab Daudi
2Chronicles11:19 ak kisikyi inendet werik; Jeus
2Chronicles11:20 Yeityo kotun Maaka cheptab Absalom; ak kisikyi inendet Abija
2Chronicles11:21 Ak kicham Reoboam Maaka cheptab Absalom kosiir osotikyik tugul
2Chronicles11:22 Ak kiinde Reoboam Abija weritab Maaka koek ne o
2Chronicles11:23 Kiyai eng’ ng’omnatet
2Chronicles12:1 Ak kingo kagigimit bounatetab Reoboam
2Chronicles12:2 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo mut ne bo laitoriat Reoboam
2Chronicles12:3 kitinyei karisiek elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’
2Chronicles12:4 Ak kinam nganasok che ng’ototin che ki bo Juda
2Chronicles12:5 Konyo maotiot Semaia oldab Reoboam
2Chronicles12:6 Koming’ingei anyun bounikab Israel koboto laitoriat; ak kile
2Chronicles12:7 Ak kingogeer Jehovah kole
2Chronicles12:8 Ago egu ichek otwogikyik; si kobiit konai boisiennyu ak boisietab bounatosiekab emotinwek.
2Chronicles12:9 Kotogos anyun Sisak laitoriatab Misri kobar Jerusalem
2Chronicles12:10 Ak kiyai laitoriat Reoboam long’onik che bo sugunonik kogeere choto
2Chronicles12:11 Ak eng’ betut age tugul ne kanyo laitoriat gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles12:12 Ak kingoming’ingei
2Chronicles12:13 Kiigimitgei anyun laitoriat Reoboam eng’ Jerusalem
2Chronicles12:14 Ak kiyai yaitiet
2Chronicles12:15 Ak boisionikab Reoboam
2Chronicles12:16 Ak kiru Reoboam koboto kwanisiekyik
2Chronicles13:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Abija eng’ Juda eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitoriat Jeroboam.
2Chronicles13:2 Kilaitoran kenyisiek somok eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Mikaia cheptab Uriel ne bo Gibea. Ak kitinyei luget Abija ak Jeroboam eng’ kwenunywa.
2Chronicles13:3 Ak kitet luget Abija koboto lugetab murenik che nyigonen che bo luget
2Chronicles13:4 Ak kitonon Abija eng’ tulwetab Semaraim
2Chronicles13:5 tos manyoljok onai ole kiigochi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel
2Chronicles13:6 Ago king’eet Jeroboam weritab Nebat
2Chronicles13:7 Ak kiiyumjigei inendet bik che yaach
2Chronicles13:8 Ak nguno olen omuchi ogirinde bounatetab Jehovah ne mi eunekab werikab Daudi; ak o tuiyet ne o
2Chronicles13:9 Ma oonu tisiikab Jehovah
2Chronicles13:10 Ago Jehovah ko Kamuktaindennyo achek
2Chronicles13:11 ak beeljin ichek Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei
2Chronicles13:12 Ogeero
2Chronicles13:13 Ago kichob Jeroboam bik kobwa koribisyo eng’ let: kimi ichek taitab Juda
2Chronicles13:14 Ak kingogeer bikab Juda let
2Chronicles13:15 Kowaach anyun bikab Juda; ak ye kita kowaachei bikab Juda
2Chronicles13:16 Ak kimwei lagokab Israel eng’ taitab Juda: ak kiinde Kamuktaindet ichek eunekwak.
2Chronicles13:17 Ak kibar Abija ak bikyik ichek eng’ baret ne o: kobek anyun bik che kigilewen elfusiek bogol mut.
2Chronicles13:18 Kigiming’in ko u noto lagokab Israel eng’ betusiechoto
2Chronicles13:19 Ak kion Abija Jeroboam
2Chronicles13:20 Mata konyor kimnatet kogeny Jeroboam eng’ betusiekab Abija: kibar Jehovah inendet
2Chronicles13:21 Ago kitesak Abija kogimit
2Chronicles13:22 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Abija
2Chronicles14:1 Koru anyun Abija koboto kwanisiekyik
2Chronicles14:2 Ak kiyai Asa ne mie ak ko litit eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi:
2Chronicles14:3 amu kiisto kapkorosusiek che ter
2Chronicles14:4 ak king’at Juda kocheng’ Jehovah
2Chronicles14:5 Kiisto kogeny eng’ nganasok tugul che bo Juda komoswek che tororen ak kanamonikab asista: ak kitinyei kalyet bororiet eng’ tainnyi.
2Chronicles14:6 Ak kiteech nganasok che ng’ototin eng’ Juda: amu kimi kalyet emet
2Chronicles14:7 Amu kimwachi bikab Juda kolenji
2Chronicles14:8 Ak kitinyei Asa luget ne kitinyei long’onik ak ng’otwek; che bo Juda ko ki bik elfusiek bogol somok; ak che bo Benjamin
2Chronicles14:9 Ak kinyo kobargei ak ichek Sera Etiopindet
2Chronicles14:10 Kwo anyun Asa kotorokta inendet
2Chronicles14:11 Ak kirirji Asa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi
2Chronicles14:12 Kobar anyun Jehovah Etiopik eng’ taitab Asa
2Chronicles14:13 Ak kion Asa ak bik che kimi tugul agoi Gerar: ak kibek Etiopik che chang’ ne mata komuch kosorgei; amu kigibar eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Chronicles14:14 Ak kibar nganasok tugul che kimi ole negite Gerar; amu kinyonji ichek kamuisetab Jehovah: ak kinam tuguk eng’ nganasok tugul; amu kimi barunenik che chang’ nganasochato.
2Chronicles14:15 Ak kibar kogeny kaptugusiek
2Chronicles15:1 Ak kinyonji Tamirmirietab Jehovah Asaria weritab Obed:
2Chronicles15:2 ak kiwa kotorokta Asa
2Chronicles15:3 Kiga kotebe Israel egosiek che chang’ ama tinyei Kamuktaindet ne bo iman
2Chronicles15:4 ago kingoweekyigei Jehovah
2Chronicles15:5 Ak kima komi kalyet eng’ betusiechoto eng’ inendet ne kimandoi
2Chronicles15:6 Kitonatongei
2Chronicles15:7 Ago ogimegitu
2Chronicles15:8 Ak kingogas Asa ng’alechuto
2Chronicles15:9 Ak kiiyum Juda tugul ak Benjamin
2Chronicles15:10 Koyumgei anyun eng’ Jerusalem eng’ arawetab somok eng’ kenyitab taman ak mut ne bo laitornatetab Asa.
2Chronicles15:11 Ak kieng’ji Jehovah tiseiywek eng’ betunoto
2Chronicles15:12 Ak kiiyomisgei kocheng’ Jehovah
2Chronicles15:13 ak kole
2Chronicles15:14 Ak kiiyosiechi Jehovah komwa eng’ kutit ne o
2Chronicles15:15 Ak kiboiboitu Juda tugul amu kayosionoto: amu kigayosio eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul
2Chronicles15:16 Ak kiisto Maaka agine
2Chronicles15:17 Ago kima kiisto komoswek che tororen eng’ Israel: ago kiigesunotgei muguleldab Asa eng’ betusiekyik tugul.
2Chronicles15:18 Ak kiib tuguk che kiga taban kwandanyi
2Chronicles15:19 Ak mata kobiit luget kogeny agoi kenyitab sosom ak mut ne bo laitornatetab Asa.
2Chronicles16:1 Eng’ kenyitab sosom ak lo ne bo laitornatetab Asa
2Chronicles16:2 Konem anyun Asa feda ak tahabu eng’ ole kigonore tugukab gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles16:3 Mitei kasyinet kwenunnyo
2Chronicles16:4 Kogasyi anyun Ben-hadad laitoriat Asa ng’alekyik
2Chronicles16:5 Ak kingogas Baasa
2Chronicles16:6 Komut anyun laitoriat Asa Juda tugul; ak koba koib koik che bo Rama
2Chronicles16:7 Ak kinyo eng’ betusiechoto Hanani keerindet ole mi Asa laitoriatab Juda
2Chronicles16:8 Tos kima ko luget ne o Etiopik ak Lubik
2Chronicles16:9 Amu bendoti konyekab Jehovah eng’ ng’ony komugul
2Chronicles16:10 Konerekyi anyun Asa keerindet
2Chronicles16:11 Ak ogeero
2Chronicles16:12 Ak eng’ kenyitab sosom ak sogol ne bo laitornatennyi
2Chronicles16:13 Ak kiru Asa ak kwanisiekyik
2Chronicles16:14 Ak kigitub inendet eng’ kererisiekyik
2Chronicles17:1 Ak kilaitoran werinnyi Jeosapat kogeer inendet
2Chronicles17:2 Ak kiinde lugosiek nganasok tugul che ng’ototin che bo Juda
2Chronicles17:3 Ak kimi Jehovah ak Jeosapat
2Chronicles17:4 ago kicheng’ Kamuktaindetab kwandanyi
2Chronicles17:5 Kiigimit anyun Jehovah laitornatet eng’ eunnyi; ak kiipchi bik tugul che bo Juda Jeosapat kagochinoik; ak kitinyei magornatet ak teegisto eng’ chang’indo.
2Chronicles17:6 Ak kiitororok muguleldanyi eng’ oretab Jehovah: ak kogeny
2Chronicles17:7 Ak kogeny kiiyokto bounikyik eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo laitornatennyi
2Chronicles17:8 ak kimi Lawik koboto ichek
2Chronicles17:9 Ak konetisiot eng’ Juda
2Chronicles17:10 Ak kiibutyi kamuisetab Jehovah bounatosiek tugul che bo emotinwek che kimi tabanwekab Juda
2Chronicles17:11 Ak kiipchi Pilistik alak kagochinoik Jeosapat
2Chronicles17:12 Ak kitesak Jeosapat koeet mising’; ak kiteech irimoik ak nganasok che kigonore tuguk
2Chronicles17:13 Ak kitinye boisionik che chang’ eng’ nganasokab Juda; koboto bikab luget
2Chronicles17:14 Chu koitosiekwak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak: che bo gab Juda
2Chronicles17:15 ak ne kirubei inendet ko ki Jeohanan ne ki kiptaiyat
2Chronicles17:16 ak kirubei inendet Amasia weritab Sikri
2Chronicles17:17 ak che bo gab Benjamin ko ki Eliada ne kim ak ko nyigan
2Chronicles17:18 ak kirubei inendet Jeosabad
2Chronicles17:19 Chuto ko che kiboisiechin laitoriat
2Chronicles18:1 Kitinyei Jeosapat magornatosiek ak teegisto eng’ chang’indo; ak kigangei ak Ahab.
2Chronicles18:2 Ak kingosiirto kenyisiek alage kochortagei oldab Ahab eng’ Samaria. Ak kieng’ji Ahab inendet kechirek ak tuga che chang’ mising’
2Chronicles18:3 Ak kilenji Ahab laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda
2Chronicles18:4 Ak kilenji Jeosapat laitoriatab Israel
2Chronicles18:5 Koyum anyun laitoriatab Israel maotik bogol ang’wan
2Chronicles18:6 Ago kile Jeosapat
2Chronicles18:7 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat
2Chronicles18:8 Kiguur anyun laitoriatab Israel kiptaiyat age
2Chronicles18:9 Ak kiga tebe laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda chi tugul ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet
2Chronicles18:10 Ak kiyachigei Sedekia weritab Kenaana kuinoikab karik
2Chronicles18:11 Ak kimaotenso maotik tugul ko u noto agichek
2Chronicles18:12 Ak king’alalji inendet chito ne kiga kiyokto koguur Mikaia
2Chronicles18:13 Ak kile Mikaia
2Chronicles18:14 Ak kingoit inendet ole mi laitoriat
2Chronicles18:15 Ak kilenji laitoriat
2Chronicles18:16 Ak kile

2Chronicles18:18 Ak kile Mikaia
2Chronicles18:19 Ak kile Jehovah
2Chronicles18:20 Ak kimong’ tamirmiriet ak kotonon eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Chronicles18:21 Ak kile
2Chronicles18:22 Ara anyun
2Chronicles18:23 Korik anyun Sedekia weritab Kenaana
2Chronicles18:24 Ak kile Mikaia
2Chronicles18:25 Ak kimwa laitoriatab Israel kole
2Chronicles18:26 ak olenji
2Chronicles18:27 Ak kile Mikaia
2Chronicles18:28 Kitogosta anyun laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda koba Ramot- gilead.
2Chronicles18:29 Kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat
2Chronicles18:30 Kiga ng’at laitoriatab Suria kiptainikab karisiekyik
2Chronicles18:31 Ak kingogeer kiptainichoto bo karisiek Jeosapat
2Chronicles18:32 Ak kingogeer kiptainikab karisiek kole ma laitoriatab Israel ni
2Chronicles18:33 King’i chito age kwangennyi komwok kosapsapchi
2Chronicles18:34 Ak kitesak luget betunoto: ago kitiigei laitoriatab Israel eng’ karinnyi kotokyigei Suriek agoi koskoleny: ak kingo negit kororokto asista
2Chronicles19:1 Ak kiweek Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda kwo gonnyi eng’ Jerusalem eng’ kalyet.
2Chronicles19:2 Ak kiwa Jeu weritab Hanani keerindet
2Chronicles19:3 Ago kigigeerjin tuguk che miachen
2Chronicles19:4 Ak kimeny Jeosapat Jerusalem: ak kiwendot kogeny eng’ kwenutab bik koboch Beer-seba agoi emetab tulonokab Epraim
2Chronicles19:5 Ak kiinde kiruogik emet
2Chronicles19:6 ak kolenji kiruogichoto
2Chronicles19:7 Ingotebenok anyun kaiyweisiet ne oiywei Jehovah: orib
2Chronicles19:8 Ak kiinde kogeny Jeosapat Jerusalem Lawik ak tisiik
2Chronicles19:9 Ak king’at ichek kolenji

2Chronicles20:1 Ak kingobata nito
2Chronicles20:2 Ak kibwa bik alak komwachi Jeosapat
2Chronicles20:3 Koiywei Jeosapat
2Chronicles20:4 Ak kiiyumgei Juda tugul kocheng’ toretet eng’ Jehovah: kibwa eng’ nganasok tugul che bo Juda kocheng’ Jehovah.
2Chronicles20:5 Ak kitonon Jeosapat eng’ tuiyetab Juda ak ne bo Israel
2Chronicles20:6 ak kile
2Chronicles20:7 Tos ma ion inye
2Chronicles20:8 Ak kimeny olito
2Chronicles20:9 Ngot konyonjech yaitiet
2Chronicles20:10 Keer nguno anyun-o
2Chronicles20:11 keer anyun-o
2Chronicles20:12 Ee Kamuktaindennyo
2Chronicles20:13 Ak kitononso Juda tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Chronicles20:14 Kinyonji anyun Tamirmirietab Jehovah Jaasiel weritab Sekaria
2Chronicles20:15 ak kile
2Chronicles20:16 Orekte mutai obarge ak ichek: ogeero
2Chronicles20:17 Ma okwek che oyae lugoni: otetge
2Chronicles20:18 Ak kiing’uruk Jeosapat kot kotiiny toget ng’ony: ak kiibutyi taitab Jehovah gab Juda tugul ak bikab Jerusalem ak kolos Jehovah.
2Chronicles20:19 Ak kitononso Lawik ak che bo lagokab Kohatik
2Chronicles20:20 Ak king’eetyo karon mising’
2Chronicles20:21 Ak kingo kagong’alal ak bik
2Chronicles20:22 Ak kingotoi kotienso ak kolosu
2Chronicles20:23 Amu kitononso lagokab Amon ak Moab kobargei ak che kimenyei tulwetab Seir
2Chronicles20:24 Ak kingoit Judaik teekset ne koi ne kiripse
2Chronicles20:25 Ak kingonyo Jeosapat koboto bikyik konam tuguk
2Chronicles20:26 Ak kiiyumjigei atebwetab Beraka eng’ betutab ang’wan; amu kiilos Jehovah eng’ oloto: kigiguure anyun kainetab yoto Atebwetab Beraka
2Chronicles20:27 Koweek chi tugul ne bo Juda ak Jerusalem
2Chronicles20:28 Ak kibwa Jerusalem kobutonu kibugandinik ak ketubosiek
2Chronicles20:29 Ak kinam bounatosiek tugul che bo emotinwek
2Chronicles20:30 Kiimuuny anyun bounatetab Jeosapat: amu kiigochi Kamuktaindennyi kamuung’et eng’ tabanwek tugul.
2Chronicles20:31 Kilaitoran Jeosapat eng’ Juda; ki bo kenyisiek sosom ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak mut eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Asuba cheptab Sili.
2Chronicles20:32 Ak kiwendote ortinwekab kwandanyi Asa
2Chronicles20:33 Ago ma kiisto komoswek che tororen; ago kitomo kogiil bik mugulelwekwak kotokyi Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak.
2Chronicles20:34 Ak boisionikab Jeosapat che ng’etunotin
2Chronicles20:35 Ak kingobata nito konamgei Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda ak Aasia laitoriatab Israel; kiyai Aasia ne ya mising’:
2Chronicles20:36 ak kinamgei ak inendet si kobiit koteech melisiek koba Tarsis: ak kiteech melisiechoto eng’ Esion-geber.
2Chronicles20:37 Kimaoten Elieser weritab Dodabahu ne bo Maresa agobo Jeosapat
2Chronicles21:1 Ak kiru Jeosapat ak kwanisiekyik
2Chronicles21:2 Kitinyei inendet werik che tupcho
2Chronicles21:3 Ak kiigochi kwandanywa kagochinoik che eechen
2Chronicles21:4 Ak kingong’eet Jeoram konam bounatetab kwandanyi
2Chronicles21:5 Ki bo Jeoram kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani; kilaitoran kenyisiek sisiit eng’ Jerusalem.
2Chronicles21:6 Ak kiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel
2Chronicles21:7 Agot nganda ki u noto ko ma cham Jehovah kong’em gotab Daudi
2Chronicles21:8 Kiingelelji Edomik bounatetab Juda eng’ betusiekyik
2Chronicles21:9 Kiwa anyun Jeoram kolanda koboto kiptainikyik kotinyei karisiekyik tugul
2Chronicles21:10 Kiingelel anyun Edomik kobagakta bounatetab Juda
2Chronicles21:11 Ak kiteech kogeny komoswek che tororen eng’ tulonokab Juda
2Chronicles21:12 Kinyonji inendet baruet ne kibunu maotiot Elija
2Chronicles21:13 ago kiiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel
2Chronicles21:14 keero
2Chronicles21:15 ak inyoru miando ne o
2Chronicles21:16 Ak kiing’eet Jehovah nereknatetab Pilistik ak ne bo Marabuk che menyei ole negite Etiopik
2Chronicles21:17 ak kitogos kobokyi Juda
2Chronicles21:18 Ak kingobata chuto tugul
2Chronicles21:19 Ak kingobata kenyisiek aeng’u komong’ agutanikyik amu miandanyi
2Chronicles21:20 Ki bo kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani
2Chronicles22:1 Ak kiinde bik che kimenyei Jerusalem Aasia werinnyi ne ming’in koek laitoriat kogeer inendet: amu kibar kweanet ne kigabwa nganaset koboto Marabuk
2Chronicles22:2 Ki bo kenyisiek artam ak aeng’ Aasia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyit agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Atalia cheptab Omri.
2Chronicles22:3 Kiwendote agine ortinwekab gotab Ahab: amu kiek kamennyi konetindennyi ne kiinet inendet koyai ne ya.
2Chronicles22:4 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Chronicles22:5 Kiisub konetisienywa
2Chronicles22:6 Kiweek konyo kinya eng’ Jesreel
2Chronicles22:7 Kibunu Kamuktaindet ng’emisietab Aasia
2Chronicles22:8 Ak ye kita koruokyin Jeu gotab Ahab
2Chronicles22:9 Ak kicheng’ Aasia
2Chronicles22:10 Ak kingogeer Atalia kametab Aasia kole kigome werinnyi
2Chronicles22:11 Ago kiimut Jeosabeat
2Chronicles22:12 Ak kitebi koboto ichek ko ung’at eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet kenyisiek lo: ak kilaitorani Atalia eng’ emet.
2Chronicles23:1 Ak kiigimitgei Jeoiada eng’ kenyitab tisab
2Chronicles23:2 Ak kibendate Juda
2Chronicles23:3 Ak kiiyomisgei ak laitoriat tuiyet komugul eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet. Ak kilenji
2Chronicles23:4 Ni kit ne oyae: egu ribikab kurgotik kebeberta agenge eng’ somok eng’ okwek
2Chronicles23:5 kotebe kebeberta agenge eng’ somok gotab laitoriat; kotebe kebeberta agenge eng’ somok kurgetab lumeiywot: ak ingotebe bik tugul seremusiekab gotab Jehovah.
2Chronicles23:6 Ago amochamji chi konyo gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles23:7 Si koyiem Lawik laitoriat
2Chronicles23:8 Koyai anyun Lawik ak Juda tugul kit ne kang’at ichek Jeoiada tisiindet: komut chi tugul bikyik
2Chronicles23:9 Ak kiigochi Jeoiada tisiindet kiptainikab bogolwogik ng’otwek
2Chronicles23:10 Ak kitet bik tugul
2Chronicles23:11 Komong’ anyun weritab laitoriat
2Chronicles23:12 Ak kingogas Atalia bolatetab bik che ruaoti ak kolosu laitoriat
2Chronicles23:13 Ak kigeerot
2Chronicles23:14 Komut anyun Jeoiada tisiindet kiptainikab bogolwogik
2Chronicles23:15 Koistochigei anyun ichek inendet; ak kiwa ye kichutei ormarichetab mbartanyit ne bo gotab laitoriat; ak kibarji yoto.
2Chronicles23:16 Koyomisgei anyun Jeoiada ak bik tugul
2Chronicles23:17 Ak kiba bik tugul gotab Baal
2Chronicles23:18 Ak king’at Jeoiada boisionikab gotab Jehovah koboi tisiik
2Chronicles23:19 Ak kiinde ribik kurgotikab gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles23:20 Ak kinam kiptainikab bogolwogik
2Chronicles23:21 Koboiboitu anyun bik tugul che bo emet
2Chronicles24:1 Ki bo Joas kenyisiek tisab ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek artam eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Sibia
2Chronicles24:2 Ak kiyai Joas ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Jeoiada tisiindet.
2Chronicles24:3 Ak kiitunji Jeoiada inendet osotik aeng’; ak kisich werik ak tibik.
2Chronicles24:4 Ak kingobata choto komach Joas koteech gotab Jehovah ole kiga kobutok.
2Chronicles24:5 Kiiyum tisiik ak Lawik
2Chronicles24:6 Koguur anyun laitoriat Jeoiada
2Chronicles24:7 Amu kigobut gotab Kamuktaindet werikab Atalia
2Chronicles24:8 Kong’at anyun laitoriat
2Chronicles24:9 Ak kimwaita eng’ Juda ak Jerusalem
2Chronicles24:10 Ak kiboiboitu bounik tugul koboto bik
2Chronicles24:11 Ak kingo kagoib Lawik moinget konyo gotab laitoriat
2Chronicles24:12 Ak kiigochi laitoriat ak Jeoiada bik che kiyai boisietab gotab Jehovah fedaisiechoto; ak kisir bik che bo melekto
2Chronicles24:13 Kobois anyun kiboitinik
2Chronicles24:14 Ak kingo kagoges
2Chronicles24:15 Ak kiosit Jeoiada
2Chronicles24:16 Ak kigitupchi inendet nganasetab Daudi koboto laitorinik
2Chronicles24:17 Kingo kagome Jeoiada kobwa bounikab Juda
2Chronicles24:18 Kometo anyun gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles24:19 Agos kiiyokyi ichek maotik
2Chronicles24:20 Kinyonji Tamirmirietab Jehovah Sekaria weritab Jeoiada tisiindet; ak kitonon eng’ ole toror
2Chronicles24:21 Ak kichaam inendet
2Chronicles24:22 Noto anyun
2Chronicles24:23 Ak kingogesgei kenyit
2Chronicles24:24 Amu kinyo lugetab Suriek komut kweanet ne ming’in; ak kiinde Jehovah eunekwak luget ne o mising’
2Chronicles24:25 Ak kingoba eng’ ole mi inendet
2Chronicles24:26 Ak chu ko ichek che kichaam inendet: Sabad weritab Simeat Jebamonindet
2Chronicles24:27 Ogeero
2Chronicles25:1 Ki bo Amasia kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Jeoadan ne bo Jerusalem.
2Chronicles25:2 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Chronicles25:3 Ak kingo kagogimit laitornatennyi
2Chronicles25:4 Ago ma bar lagokwak
2Chronicles25:5 Kogeny
2Chronicles25:6 Kisir kogeny bik elfusiek bogol che kimen ak ko nyigonen eng’ Israel eng’ talentaisiek bogol che bo feda.
2Chronicles25:7 Ago kinyo chitab Kamuktaindet ole mi
2Chronicles25:8 Ago ngot imache iwe
2Chronicles25:9 Ak kilenji Amasia chitab Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles25:10 Koweekta anyun Amasia ichek
2Chronicles25:11 Konyiganit anyun Amasia
2Chronicles25:12 Ak kiluul lagokab Juda bik alak elfusiek taman
2Chronicles25:13 Ago kibar bikab luget che kiweektoi Amasia kole amaba tugul luget
2Chronicles25:14 Ak kingobunu Amasia baretab Edomik
2Chronicles25:15 Kolalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah agobo Amasia
2Chronicles25:16 Ak ye kita kong’alaldos ak inendet
2Chronicles25:17 Koruoch anyun Amasia laitoriatab Juda
2Chronicles25:18 Ak kiiyokyi Joas laitoriatab Israel bik Amasia laitoriatab Juda
2Chronicles25:19 Imwae ile
2Chronicles25:20 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas; amu kibunu Kamuktaindet kioto
2Chronicles25:21 Kitogosta anyun Joas laitoriatab Israel; ak kigeergei inendet ak Amasia laitoriatab Juda togoch eng’ Bet-semes
2Chronicles25:22 Ak kigiterter Juda eng’ taitab Israel; ak kimwei chi tugul kwo emainnyi.
2Chronicles25:23 Ak kiimut Joas laitoriatab Israel Amasia laitoriatab Juda weritab Joas weritab Jeoahas
2Chronicles25:24 Ak kiib tahabu tugul ak feda
2Chronicles25:25 Ak kita kosob Amasia weritab Joas laitoriatab Juda kenyisiek taman ak mut kingobata meetab Joas weritab Jeoahas laitoriatab Israel.
2Chronicles25:26 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Amasia
2Chronicles25:27 Kichaam bik Amasia eng’ Jerusalem
2Chronicles25:28 Ak kilaune inendet mbartanyisiek
2Chronicles26:1 Yeityo konam bik tugul che bo Juda Usia
2Chronicles26:2 Kiteech Elot
2Chronicles26:3 Ki bo Usia kenyisiek taman ak lo ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek konom ak aeng’ eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Jekilia ne bo Jerusalem.
2Chronicles26:4 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Chronicles26:5 Ak kiigiil muguleldanyi kocheng’ Kamuktaindet eng’ betusiekab Sekaria
2Chronicles26:6 Ak kiwa kobargei ak Pilistik
2Chronicles26:7 Ak kitoret Kamuktaindet inendet kobargei ak Pilistik
2Chronicles26:8 Ak kiigochi Amonik Usia kagochinoik: ak kiyom kainennyi agoi ole kibunei kebendi Misri; amu kitesak kimnatennyi kot.
2Chronicles26:9 Kogeny
2Chronicles26:10 Ak kiteech teeksosiek che koen eng’ ong’atet
2Chronicles26:11 Kitinyei kogeny Usia luget ne bo bikab boriet
2Chronicles26:12 Koitet komugul ne bo kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek
2Chronicles26:13 Ak kimi eunekwak askarik che inetotin
2Chronicles26:14 Ak kichopchi Usia luget tugul
2Chronicles26:15 Ak kiyai injinisiek eng’ Jerusalem
2Chronicles26:16 Ago ye kingo kagogimit
2Chronicles26:17 Ak kiwa go Asaria tisiindet kosub inendet
2Chronicles26:18 Ak kigirinda Usia laitoriat

2Chronicles26:20 Ak kigeer Asaria tisiindet ne o
2Chronicles26:21 Ak kiam mogondosik Usia laitoriat agoi betutab meenyi
2Chronicles26:22 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Usia

2Chronicles27:1 Ki bo Jotam kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamennyi Jerusa cheptab Sadak.

2Chronicles27:3 Kiteech kurget ne bo meto eng’ gortab Jehovah

2Chronicles28:3 Kibeel kogeny nyamdutik eng’ atebwetab weritab Hinom
2Chronicles28:4 Ak kieny tiseiywek ak kobeel nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen

2Chronicles29:1 Kitau Hesekia kolaitorani ko bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamennyi Abija cheptab Sekaria.

2Chronicles29:3 Kiyat kurgotikab gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles29:4 Ak kiimut tisiik ak Lawik kobwa go
2Chronicles29:5 ak kolenji

2Chronicles29:11 Werikyuk

2Chronicles30:2 Amu kiga komwa laitoriat koboto bounik
2Chronicles30:3 Amu kima imuch koyai eng’ betusiechoto
2Chronicles30:4 Ak kimieit kioto eng’ taitab laitoriat ak tuiyet tugul.
2Chronicles30:5 Kogimit anyun ng’atutiet kole kemwaita eng’ Israel tugul
2Chronicles30:6 Kiib anyun bik che kiga kiyokto
2Chronicles30:7 Amoige kwanisiekwok
2Chronicles30:8 Amoegu anyun che uui kaat
2Chronicles30:9 Amu ngoweekyige Jehovah
2Chronicles30:10 Kibun anyun bik
2Chronicles30:11 Agos kiiming’ingei alak che bo Aser ak Manase ak Sebulun

2Chronicles30:13 Ak kiiyumjigei Jerusalem bik che chang’ korib igortab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ arawetab aeng’
2Chronicles30:14 Kong’eetyo anyun ak koisto kaptisisiosiek che kimi Jerusalem
2Chronicles30:15 Kieny anyun aruetab paska eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan eng’ arawetab aeng’: ak kiililanso tisiik ak Lawik
2Chronicles30:16 Ak kitononso eng’ komostanywa ko u ye kiga king’at
2Chronicles30:17 Amu kimi che chang’ eng’ tuiyet che kitom koanyinygei: noto anyun

2Chronicles30:20 Ak kigasyi Jehovah Hesekia
2Chronicles30:21 Ak kirib lagokab Israel che kimi Jerusalem
2Chronicles30:22 Kicheer anyun Hesekia Lawik tugul che ki inetotin eng’ otisietab Jehovah. Koamis anyun eng’ igorta tugul eng’ betusiek tisab
2Chronicles30:23 Ak kichamnyechi tuiyet komugul kole kota korib igorta betusiek alak tisab: ak kirib betusiek alak tisab eng’ kagasetab ge.
2Chronicles30:24 Amu kiigochi Hesekia laitoriatab Juda tuiyet kirugik elfut ak kechirek elfusiek tisab
2Chronicles30:25 Ak kiboiboitu tuiyet komugul ne bo Juda
2Chronicles30:26 Kibiit boiboiyet no o anyun eng’ Jerusalem: amu koboch eng’ betusiekab Solomon weritab Daudi laitoriatab Israel ko kitomo kobiit ne u noto eng’ Jerusalem.
2Chronicles30:27 Kong’eetyo anyun tisiik

2Chronicles31:7 Kitoi koyumat eng’ arawetab somok

2Chronicles31:19 ko u noto agine eng’ werikab Aron tisiik

2Chronicles32:2 Ak kingogeer Hesekia kole kagonyo Senakerib
2Chronicles32:3 kong’alal ak bounikyik ak bikyik che kimen
2Chronicles32:4 Koyumgei anyun bik che chang’
2Chronicles32:5 Ak kinyiganit
2Chronicles32:6 Ak kiinde kiptainikab luget koboi
2Chronicles32:7 Ogimegitu
2Chronicles32:8 Mi koboto inendet eut ne bo borto; ago mi kobotech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo kotoretech
2Chronicles32:9 Kingobata nito koyokto Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria otwogikyik koba Jerusalem
2Chronicles32:10 Kamwa ko u ni Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria
2Chronicles32:11 Tos maigoigook Hesekia si kogoitook obegu eng’ rubet ak melelda

2Chronicles32:13 Tos mongen kit ne kigiyachi
2Chronicles32:14 Tos kimi ng’o eng’ cheptalelisiek tugul che bo bororiosiechoto

2Chronicles32:17 Kisir kogeny baronok
2Chronicles32:18 Ak kiwaage bichoto bikab Jerusalem che kimi irimet barak
2Chronicles32:19 Ak king’alal agobo Kamuktaindetab Jerusalem koyanie kanamonikab bik che bo ng’ony
2Chronicles32:20 Ak kisa laitoriat Hesekia ak maotiot Isaia weritab Amos agobo ng’olyondonito
2Chronicles32:21 Ak kiiyokto Jehovah malaikaiyat
2Chronicles32:22 Kisor anyun Jehovah Hesekia ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem
2Chronicles32:23 Ak kiipchi bik che chang’ Jehovah kagochinoik kobwa Jerusalem
2Chronicles32:24 Kimian Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto ne ki negit kome: ak kisa Jehovah; ak king’alalji Jehovah inendet ak kogochi kaborunet.
2Chronicles32:25 Ago ma yai Hesekia kogeny ko u ye kiga kiyachi ko mie; amu kimen: konyonji anyun nereknatet inendet
2Chronicles32:26 Ago kiiming’ingei Hesekia kometo menotetab muguleldanyi

2Chronicles32:29 Ak kichopchigei kogeny nganasok
2Chronicles32:30 Hesekia nito ne kiimaas beekab kondametut ne mi meto eng’ Gion

2Chronicles33:1 Ki bo Manase kenyisiek taman ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek konom ak mut eng’ Jerusalem.
2Chronicles33:2 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u tuguk che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek
2Chronicles33:3 Amu kiteech kogeny komoswek che tororen che kiga kobut kwandanyi Hesekia; kiteekyi Baalik kapkorosusiek
2Chronicles33:4 Ak kiteech kapkorosusiek eng’ gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles33:5 Ak kiteekyi kapkorosusiek tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet
2Chronicles33:6 Ak kiigoito kogeny lagokyik kobun mat eng’ atebwetab weritab Hinom: ak king’orso ak kiisogis
2Chronicles33:7 Ak kiinde kit ne kigiwai ne bo kanamwet ne kiyai inendet
2Chronicles33:8 amaistoi kogeny keldab Israel eng’ emet ne kiaarorji kwanisiekwak: ngot korib koyai tugul che kiang’at ichek eng’ Musa
2Chronicles33:9 Ak kiigochi anyun Manase Juda ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem
2Chronicles33:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Manase ak bikyik; ago kima mage kiy.
2Chronicles33:11 Komutyi anyun Jehovah ichek kiptainikab luget ne bo laitoriatab Asuria che kiimut Manase ko ratat eng’ sirimwek ak mugurek
2Chronicles33:12 Ak kingomi eng’ nyalilda kosa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi
2Chronicles33:13 Ak kisa
2Chronicles33:14 Kingobata nito koteech irimet ne bo sang’ ne bo nganasetab Daudi eng’ komostab cherongo ne bo Gion
2Chronicles33:15 Ak kiisto kanamonik che too ak kanamwet ne kimi gotab Jehovah ak kapkorosusiek tugul che kiga koteech eng’ tulwetab gotab Jehovah
2Chronicles33:16 Ak kiteech kaptisisietab Jehovah ak kogoitoe yoto tiseiywekab kagochinoikab kalyet ak che bo kongoi
2Chronicles33:17 Agos kita koeny bik tiseiywek eng’ komoswek che tororen
2Chronicles33:18 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Manase
2Chronicles33:19 Kigisirji agine saennyi
2Chronicles33:20 Kiru anyun Manase koboto kwanisiekyik
2Chronicles33:21 Ki bo Amon kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’ eng’ Jerusalem.
2Chronicles33:22 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u ye kiyai kwandanyi Manase: ak kieng’ji Amon tiseiywek kanamonik tugul che kigiwai che kiga koyai kwandanyi Manase
2Chronicles33:23 Ak kima iming’ingei eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u ye kiiming’ingei kwandanyi Manase; ago kites Amon koyai chalwokto mising’ kosiir.
2Chronicles33:24 Ak kichaam inendet otwogikyik
2Chronicles33:25 Ak kibar bikab emonoto bichoto tugul kichaam laitoriat Amon; ak kiieet bikab emet Josia werinnyi koek laitoriat kogeer inendet.

2Chronicles34:8 Ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitornatennyi
2Chronicles34:9 Ak kibwa ole mi Hilkia

2Chronicles34:11 kiigochi musogik ak teegik

2Chronicles34:14 Ak ye kingonem fedaisiek che kiga kiib kobwa gotab Jehovah

2Chronicles34:25 amu kigometa

2Chronicles34:27 amu ki tangus muguleldang’ung’

2Chronicles34:31 Ak kitonon laitoriat eng’ komostanyi

2Chronicles35:1 Ak kiripchi Josia Jehovah paska eng’ Jerusalem; ak kieny aruetab paska eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawet ne bo tai.
2Chronicles35:2 Ak kiinde tiisik ripsosiekwak
2Chronicles35:3 Ak kilenji Lawik che kiineti Israel tugul
2Chronicles35:4 Ak ochopge obee gorikab kwanisiekwok ko u ripsosiekwok
2Chronicles35:5 Ak otononse eng’ ole tilil ko u ole kigipcheita gorikab kwanisiek che bo tupchosiekwok lagokab bik
2Chronicles35:6 Ak oeny aruetab paska ak oanyinyge
2Chronicles35:7 Ak kiigochi Josia bik
2Chronicles35:8 Ak kiigochi bounikyik bik ak tisiik
2Chronicles35:9 Ak kiigochi Konania
2Chronicles35:10 Kochobok anyun otisiet ak kotononso tisiik eng’ komostanywa
2Chronicles35:11 Ak kieny aruetab paska
2Chronicles35:12 Ak kiisto kagochinoik che kibeelei
2Chronicles35:13 Ak kibeel aruetab paska eng’ mat ko u kayomiset: ak kiiyo kagochinoik che tililen eng’ terenik
2Chronicles35:14 Ye ibata kochopchigei ak tisiik; amu kichirjirendos tisiik werikab Aron kogoitoi kagochinoik che kibeelei ak mwanik agoi kemoi: kichopchigei anyun Lawik
2Chronicles35:15 Ak kimi komostanywa tienik werikab Asap
2Chronicles35:16 Kichobok anyun otisiet tugul ne bo Jehovah eng’ betunoto
2Chronicles35:17 Kirib lagokab Israel che kimi yoto
2Chronicles35:18 Ak kitom kobiit paska age koboch betusiekab maotiot Samuel ne kergei ak noto kigirib eng’ Israel; ama rib age tugul eng’ laitorinikab Israel ne u noto koyai Josia
2Chronicles35:19 Kigirib paskainoto eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitornatetab Josia.
2Chronicles35:20 Kingobata choto tugul ko kagochob Josia hekalut
2Chronicles35:21 Ago kiiyokto Neko bik koba ole mi inendet
2Chronicles35:22 Ago kima cham Josia kobagakta inendet
2Chronicles35:23 Ak kimwok mwogik laitoriat Josia; ak kilenji laitoriat otwogikyik
2Chronicles35:24 Komut anyun otwogikyik inendet eng’ karit
2Chronicles35:25 Ak kirir Jeremia agobo Josia: ak kirirji Josia tienik tugul che murenik ak gotab kor
2Chronicles35:26 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Josia
2Chronicles35:27 ak boisionikyik
2Chronicles36:1 Kiieet anyun bikab emet Jeoahas weritab Josia koek laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem kogeer kwandanyi.
2Chronicles36:2 Ki bo Jeoahas kenyisiek tiptem ak somok ye kitau kolaitorani: ak kilaitoran arawek somok eng’ Jerusalem.
2Chronicles36:3 Ak kiribe laitornatennyi laitoriatab Misri eng’ Jerusalem
2Chronicles36:4 Ak kiieet laitoriatab Misri ng’etab kamet Eliakim koboi Juda ak Jerusalem
2Chronicles36:5 Ki bo Jeoiakim kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem; ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi.
2Chronicles36:6 Kitogos Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon konyo kobargei ak inendet
2Chronicles36:7 Kiib kogeny Nebukadnesar terenikab gotab Jehovah koba Babulon
2Chronicles36:8 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeoiakim
2Chronicles36:9 Ki bo Jeoiakin kenyisiek sisiit ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran arawek somok ak betusiek taman eng’ Jerusalem: ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah.
2Chronicles36:10 Ak ye kingogesgei kenyit koyok laitoriat Nebukadnesar bik komut inendet konyo Babulon
2Chronicles36:11 Ki bo Sedekia kenyisiek tiptem ak agenge ye kitau kolaitorani: ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem.
2Chronicles36:12 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi; kima iming’injigei maotiot Jeremia ye king’alal ng’alek che bunu kutitab Jehovah.
2Chronicles36:13 Ak kiingelelji kogeny laitoriat Nebukadnesar
2Chronicles36:14 Kiingelelso kogeny mising’ tisiik tugul che eechen
2Chronicles36:15 Ak kiiyoktoi Jehovah
2Chronicles36:16 Ago kireny bichoto kiiyoktoi Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles36:17 Komutyi anyun icheget laitoriatab Kaldiek
2Chronicles36:18 Ak kiib anyun tuguk tugul che bo gotab Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles36:19 Ak kibeel gotab Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles36:20 Ak kiimut koba Babulon che kiga chililye rotwetab chok; ak kiek otwogikyik ak che bo werikyik agoi bounatetab Persia:
2Chronicles36:21 si kosulda ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa eng’ kutitab Jeremia
2Chronicles36:22 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Kirus laitoriatab Persia
2Chronicles36:23 Kamwa ko u ni Kirus laitoriatab Persia

Ezra1:10 tabok sosom che mengechen che bo tahabu
Ezra1:11 Terenik tugul che bo tahabu ak feda

Ezra3:1 Ak kingoit arawetab tisab
Ezra3:2 Kotonon anyun Jesua weritab Josadak
Ezra3:3 Ak kiinde kaptisisiet ole tebe; amu kitinyei kaiyweisiet amu bikab emotinwek alak: ak kiigochi Jehovah kagochinoik eng’ kaptisisionoto
Ezra3:4 Ak kirib igorta ne bo keriosiek
Ezra3:5 ak kingobata kogoito kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul
Ezra3:6 Kitau kogochin Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab tisab: ago kitomo kelumda lumeiywekab hekalutab Jehovah.
Ezra3:7 Kiigochi kogeny fedaisiek musogikab koik
Ezra3:8 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ngab koit gotab Kamuktaindet eng’ Jerusalem
Ezra3:9 Kotonon anyun Jesua koboto werikyik ak tupchosiekyik
Ezra3:10 Ak kingolumda teegik lumeiywotab hekalutab Jehovah
Ezra3:11 Ak kiwoljingei kotieni kolosu ak komwachin kongoi Jehovah
Ezra3:12 Ago kiririo eng’ kutit ne o tisiik che chang’ ak Lawik ak kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek
Ezra3:13 kot ko mata komuch bik kobesio waagat ne bo boiboiyet ak ne bo rirekab bik: amu kiwaach bik eng’ waagat ne o
Ezra4:1 Kingogas anyun bunikab Juda ak Benjamin kole kateekyi Jehovah
Ezra4:2 korikta anyun ole mi Serubabel
Ezra4:3 Ago kilenji ichek Serubabel
Ezra4:4 Kiigochi anyun bikab emonoto bikab Juda kochorirenso
Ezra4:5 Ak kisir ng’omotik che bo melekto
Ezra4:6 Ak kisir bichoto kataamset agobo bik che kimenyei Juda ak Jerusalem eng’ betusiekab laitornatetab Aasuerus
Ezra4:7 Ak eng’ betusiekab Artaserses kosirji baruet Bislam
Ezra4:8 Kisir anyun baruet Reum bounindetab kiruoget ak Simsai sirindet
Ezra4:9 kisir anyun Reum bounindetab kiruoget
Ezra4:10 ak bororiosiek alak che kiimutu Osnaper ne o ak ko toogunot
Ezra4:11 Chu anyun ng’alek che bo baruanato kigiyoktochin laitoriat Artaserses: Achek otwogiguk che kimi bitoni
Ezra4:12 Ingonaak eng’ laitoriat kole
Ezra4:13 Ingonaak nguno eng’ laitoriat kole
Ezra4:14 Ara anyun
Ezra4:15 si kobiit kecheng’ eng’ bukuit ne bo ng’alekab betusiekab kwanisieguk: si kobiit inyorji bukuinoto bo ng’alekab betusiek
Ezra4:16 Kiborjini anyun laitoriat kelenjini
Ezra4:17 Kiiyokyi anyun laitoriat wolunet Reum bounindetab kiruoget
Ezra4:18 Baruet ne kigooyokwech ko kagesoman komie eng’ tainnyu.
Ezra4:19 Ak koang’at
Ezra4:20 Kimitei kogeny laitorinik che ki kimen che kibou Jerusalem
Ezra4:21 Ong’at anyun kit ne igochin bichoto kosisyo
Ezra4:22 Oripge anyun si mogaege ng’olyondonoto: amu nee si kotesak ng’emisiet ne inyalili laitorinik?
Ezra4:23 Kingo kagesoman ng’alekab baruetab laitoriat Artaserses eng’ taitab Reum
Ezra4:24 Kotonon anyun boisietab gotab Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem; ak kitonon agoi kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo laitornatetab Darius laitoriatab Persia.

Ezra6:1 King’at anyun laitoriat Darius
Ezra6:2 Ak kiginyorji bukuit Akmeta
Ezra6:3 Eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitoriat Kirus
Ezra6:4 koboto ortinwek somok che bo koik che eechen
Ezra6:5 ak ingeweekta kogeny terenik che bo tahabu ak che bo feda che bo gotab Kamuktaindet
Ezra6:6 Ara anyun inye Tatenai bounindetab ainet bitonin
Ezra6:7 oistoege boisietab gotab Kamuktaindet; ingoteech bounindetab Yahudik koboto boisiekab Yahudik
Ezra6:8 Kang’at kogeny agobo kit ne oyachini boisiechoto bo Yahudik agobo teeksetab goito bo Kamuktaindet: ale kigochi bichoto eng’ kagiiletab ge
Ezra6:9 Ak tuguk che makyingei
Ezra6:10 si kobiit kogochi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet korosekab nyamdutik che anyiny
Ezra6:11 Kang’at kogeny ale
Ezra6:12 ak kobar Kamuktaindet ne kiinde kainennyi komeny oloto
Ezra6:13 Kiyai anyun ko u noto kochokyi Tatenai
Ezra6:14 Ak kiteekso anyun boisiekab Yahudik ak kobor
Ezra6:15 Ak kigiges goyoto eng’ betut ne bo somok eng’ arawetab Adar
Ezra6:16 Ak kiitaban eng’ boiboiyet lagokab Israel
Ezra6:17 Ak kiigoito kirugik bogol agenge
Ezra6:18 Ak kiinde tisiik ko u pcheutikwak
Ezra6:19 Ak kirib paska lagokab luulenik eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawet ne bo tai.
Ezra6:20 Amu kiga koanyinygei tisiik ak Lawik tugul; ki tililen tugul: ak kieny aruetab paska agobo lagok tugul che bo luulenik
Ezra6:21 Ak kiam paska lagokab Israel che kiweeksei kobunu ole kiga kiluulji
Ezra6:22 ak korib eng’ boiboiyet igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek betusiek tisab: amu kiigochi Jehovah ichek koboiboitu

Ezra7:6 kotogosta anyun Esra nito eng’ Babulon; ak ki sirindet ne ng’om eng’ Ng’atutikab Musa

Ezra7:8 Ak kiit Esra Jerusalem eng’ arawet ne bo mut

Ezra7:12 Ane

Ezra7:15 ak iib feda ak tahabu

Ezra7:17 noto anyun ial eng’ fedaisiechu eng’ kagiiletab ge
Ezra7:18 Ak kit age tugul ne igeere inye ak tupchosieguk ole mie oyae fedaisiek tugul che kang’et
Ezra7:19 Ak igoite eng’ taitab Kamuktaindetab Jerusalem terenik che kigonin agobo otisietab gotab Kamuktaindeng’ung’.
Ezra7:20 Ak kit age tugul ne ta kemakyin gotab Kamuktaindeng’ung’

Ezra7:22 kot koit talentaisiek bogol che bo feda
Ezra7:23 Ak kit age tugul ne ng’atei Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet

Ezra7:25 Lewen inye Esra ko u ng’omnatetab Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne mi eung’ung’
Ezra7:26 Ak age tugul ne machamei koyai ng’atutikab Kamuktaindeng’ung’

Ezra8:2 Eng’ werikab Pineas

Ezra8:7 Ak eng’ werikab Elam
Ezra8:8 Ak eng’ werikab Sepatia

Ezra8:10 Ak eng’ werikab Selomit

Ezra8:12 Ak eng’ werikab Asgad
Ezra8:13 Ak eng’ werikab Adonikam
Ezra8:14 Ak eng’ werikab Bigbai
Ezra8:15 Ak kiayumji ichek ainet ne rootyin Ahaba; ak kigitebe yoto betusiek somok: ak kiageerote bik
Ezra8:16 Kiayokte anyun keguur Elieser
Ezra8:17 Ak kiayokte ichek koba oldab Ido ne ki o eng’ ole kiguure Kasipia; ak amwachi kit ne kanyol komwachi Ido
Ezra8:18 Ak ko u ye kimi kobotech eut ne mie ne bo Kamuktaindennyo
Ezra8:19 ak Hasabia
Ezra8:20 ak eng’ Netinik
Ezra8:21 Ang’at anyun karugutetab ge
Ezra8:22 Amu kialilan asom laitoriat kweanet ne bo askarik
Ezra8:23 Kigirugutge anyun ak kesa Kamuktaindennyo agobo nito; ak kigaswech.
Ezra8:24 Kiataban anyun taman ak aeng’ che eechen eng’ tisiik
Ezra8:25 ak kiagerji ichek feda
Ezra8:26 kiagerji ichek talentaisiek bogol lo ak konom che bo feda
Ezra8:27 ak tabok tiptem che bo tahabu
Ezra8:28 Ak kialenji ichek
Ezra8:29 Oripse
Ezra8:30 Kitaach anyun tisiik ak Lawik ole ki te nyigisindab feda ak tahabu
Ezra8:31 Kebe anyun eng’ ainetab Ahaba eng’ betutab taman ak aeng’ ne bo arawet ne bo tai
Ezra8:32 Ak kigibwa Jerusalem
Ezra8:33 Ak eng’ betut ne bo ang’wan ko kigiger feda ak tahabu ak terenik eng’ gotab Kamuktaindennyo
Ezra8:34 kigiit tuguk tugul ak keger: ak kigisir ole ki te nyigisindo eng’ betunoto.
Ezra8:35 Kiigoito lagokab luulenik
Ezra8:36 Ak kiigochi ng’atutikab laitoriat kandoikab laitoriat ak bounik che mi ainet bitonin: ak kitoret bik ak gotab Kamuktaindet.
Ezra9:1 Kingo kagoyaak tuguchu
Ezra9:2 Amu kigotun tibikwak ak kotunji werikwak; kot koburuigei keswot ne tilil ak bikab emotinwek
Ezra9:3 Ak kingagas ng’olyondoni
Ezra9:4 Kiiyumjagei anyun chi age tugul ne kibotani agobo ng’alekab Kamuktaindetab Israel
Ezra9:5 Ak kiang’eet eng’ kaming’inennyu bo ge ye kigigoitoi kagochinetab koskoleny
Ezra9:6 ak ale
Ezra9:7 Kigeegu kiptengeginik mising’ koboch betusiekab kwanisiekyok agoi rani; ak kigindeech eunekab laitorinik che bo emotinwek
Ezra9:8 Kagiboruech anyun nguno eng’ boroini ming’in mieindo ne bunu Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo
Ezra9:9 Amu ki otwogik; ago ma bagakyech Kamuktaindennyo ratisiennyo
Ezra9:10 Ara anyun
Ezra9:11 che kigeng’at eng’ otwogiguk maotik
Ezra9:12 Amogochi anyun tibikwok werikwak
Ezra9:13 Ak amu kigobwanjech choto tugul amu boisionikyok che yaach
Ezra9:14 tos
Ezra9:15 Ee Jehovah
Ezra10:1 Ak ye kita kosaei Esra
Ezra10:2 Ak kiwolji Sekania weritab Jehiel
Ezra10:3 Ongiyomisge anyun ak Kamuktaindennyo keiste osotik tugul ak lagok che kisichei osotichoto
Ezra10:4 Ng’eet anyun; amu neng’ung’ ng’olyondonito
Ezra10:5 Kong’eet anyun Esra
Ezra10:6 Kong’eet anyun Esra eng’ taitab gotab Kamuktaindet
Ezra10:7 Ak kimwaita eng’ Juda tugul ak Jerusalem
Ezra10:8 Ak age tugul ne ma nyo ko kagobata betusiek somogu
Ezra10:9 Kiiyumjigei anyun Jerusalem bik tugul che bo Juda ak Benjamin kotomo kogesgei betusiek somogu; ki arawetab sogol
Ezra10:10 Kotonon anyun Esra tisiindet
Ezra10:11 Ong’ang’ji anyun Jehovah
Ezra10:12 Kiwol anyun tuiyet tugul eng’ kutit ne o
Ezra10:13 Ago chang’ bik
Ezra10:14 Ingelewen anyun bounikyok agobo tuiyet tugul
Ezra10:15 Jonatan weritab Asael ak Jaseia weritab Tikba ichegei che kitononso kogirinda ng’olyondonito: ak kitoret ichek Mesulam ak Sabetai Lawindet.
Ezra10:16 Ak kiyai ko u noto lagokab bik che kiga kiluul. Ak kigitaban tisiindet Esra
Ezra10:17 Ak kiiges eng’ betut ne bo tai eng’ arawet ne bo tai ng’alek tugul che bo murenik che kiga kotun tibik che toek.
Ezra10:18 Ak kibiit eng’ werikab tisiik che kiga kotun tibik che toek: eng’ werikab Jesua
Ezra10:19 Ak kiiyosio kole istoi osotikwak; ak amu kitinyei tengekto
Ezra10:20 Ak eng’ werikab Imer ko ki Hanani ak Sebadia.
Ezra10:21 Ak eng’ werikab Harim ko ki Maaseia
Ezra10:22 Ak eng’ werikab Pasur ko ki Elioenai
Ezra10:23 Ak eng’ Lawik ko ki Josabad
Ezra10:24 Ak eng’ tienik ko ki Eliasib: ak eng’ ribikab kurgotik ko ki Salum
Ezra10:25 Ak eng’ Israel: eng’ werikab Paros ko ki Ramia
Ezra10:26 Ak eng’ werikab Elam ko ki Matania
Ezra10:27 Ak eng’ werikab Satu ko ki Elioenai
Ezra10:28 Ak eng’ werikab Bebai ko ki Jeohanan
Ezra10:29 Ak eng’ werikab Bani ko ki Mesulam
Ezra10:30 Ak eng’ werikab Pahat-moab ko ki Adna
Ezra10:31 Ak eng’ werikab Harim ko ki Elieser
Ezra10:32 Benjamin
Ezra10:33 Eng’ werikab Asum ko ki Matenai
Ezra10:34 Eng’ werikab Bani ko ki Maadai
Ezra10:35 Benaia
Ezra10:36 Bania
Ezra10:37 Matania
Ezra10:38 ak Bani
Ezra10:39 ak Selemia
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai
Ezra10:41 Asarel
Ezra10:42 Salum
Ezra10:43 Eng’ werikab Nebo ko ki Jeiel
Ezra10:44 Kiga kotun chuto tugul tibik che toek; ak kitinyei alak osotik che kiga kosikyi lagok.
Nehemiah1:1 Ng’alekab Neemia weritab Hakalia. Ak eng’ arawetab Kisleb
Nehemiah1:2 konyo Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Ak kimwawa kole
Nehemiah1:4 Ak kingagas ng’alechuto
Nehemiah1:5 ak ale
Nehemiah1:6 ingoeb it itiguk
Nehemiah1:7 Kigeyaun ne ya mising’
Nehemiah1:8 Asain ale
Nehemiah1:9 ago ngot oweekyage
Nehemiah1:10 Ara anyun chuto ko otwogiguk ak ko biguk
Nehemiah1:11 Asain
Nehemiah2:1 Ak eng’ arawetab Nisan
Nehemiah2:2 Ak kilenja laitoriat
Nehemiah2:3 Ak alenji laitoriat
Nehemiah2:4 Komwawa anyun laitoriat kolenja
Nehemiah2:5 Ak kialenji laitoriat
Nehemiah2:6 Ak kilenja laitoriat
Nehemiah2:7 Kiamwachi kogeny laitoriat
Nehemiah2:8 ak baruet ne kisirjin Asap ribindetab osnetab laitoriat
Nehemiah2:9 Kiait anyun oldab bounik che kimi ainet bitonin
Nehemiah2:10 Ak kingogas Sanbalat Horonindet
Nehemiah2:11 Kiait anyun Jerusalem
Nehemiah2:12 Ak kiang’eet kemoi
Nehemiah2:13 Ak kiamande kemoi eng’ ormarichet ne bo atebwet
Nehemiah2:14 Kiawe anyun ormarichetab kondab beek agoi tamboiyotab laitoriat: ago kima biit ole bunei tiondo ne kialanye.
Nehemiah2:15 Kiatogoste anyun kemoi abun tabandab kererut
Nehemiah2:16 Ak kima nai bounik ole kigawe
Nehemiah2:17 Yeityo alenji

Nehemiah3:1 King’eet anyun Eliasib tisiindet ne o
Nehemiah3:2 Ak che kiteeksei korubei inendet ko ki bikab Jeriko. Ak che kiteeksei korubei ichek ko ki Sakur weritab Imri.
Nehemiah3:3 Ak kiteech werikab Hasenaa ormarichet ne bo njirenik; ak kiinde tugatugikab kurgotik
Nehemiah3:4 Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Meremot weritab Uria
Nehemiah3:5 Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Tekoitik; ago ma chuuljigei bikwak che toogunotin boisietab kiptaiyandenywa.
Nehemiah3:6 Ak kiteech kogeny ormarichet ne bo keny Joiada weritab Pasea ak Mesulam weritab Besodeia
Nehemiah3:7 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Melatia Gibeonindet
Nehemiah3:8 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Usiel weritab Haraia
Nehemiah3:9 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Repaia weritab Hur
Nehemiah3:10 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Jedaia weritab Harumap
Nehemiah3:11 Kiteechei kebeberta age Malkija weritab Harim
Nehemiah3:12 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Salum weritab Haloes
Nehemiah3:13 Kiteech kogeny Hanun ormarichet ne bo atebwet
Nehemiah3:14 Ak kiteech kogeny ormarichet ne bo ng’atatek Malkija weritab Rekab
Nehemiah3:15 Ak kiteech kogeny ormarichetab kondab beek Salum weritab Kolhose
Nehemiah3:16 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Neemia weritab Asbuk
Nehemiah3:17 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Lawik
Nehemiah3:18 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki tupchosiekwak
Nehemiah3:19 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Eser weritab Jesua
Nehemiah3:20 Kiteech kogeny eng’ kagiiletab ge
Nehemiah3:21 Ak kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Meremot weritab Uria weritab Akos
Nehemiah3:22 Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki tisiik
Nehemiah3:23 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Benjamin ak Hasub ole tokyingei gonywa. Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Asaria weritab Maaseia weritab Anania ole negite gonnyi.
Nehemiah3:24 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Binui weritab Henadad
Nehemiah3:25 Kiteech kogeny Palal weritab Usai ole tokyingei ole weegegei irimet
Nehemiah3:26 (Kimenyei Netinik Opel
Nehemiah3:27 Ak che kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Tekoitik che tokyingei teekset ne koi ne kiichumda
Nehemiah3:28 Kiteech kogeny tisiik baragutab ormarichetab mbartanyit
Nehemiah3:29 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Sadok weritab Imer kotokyingei gonnyi. Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Semaia weritab Sekania
Nehemiah3:30 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Hanania weritab Selemia
Nehemiah3:31 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Malkija ne ki age eng’ kitang’ikab tahabu kot koit gotab Netinik
Nehemiah3:32 Ak kiteech kogeny kitang’ikab tahabu ak chemung’arainik kwenutab ole kitogostoe eng’ luita ak ormarichetab kechirek.
Nehemiah4:1 Ago kingogas Sanbalat kole kiteechei irimet
Nehemiah4:2 Ak king’alal eng’ taitab tupchosiekyik ak lugetab Samaria
Nehemiah4:3 Kimi ak inendet Tobia Amonindet
Nehemiah4:4 Kas anyun
Nehemiah4:5 amat ketuch tengektanywa
Nehemiah4:6 Kigiteech anyun irimet; ak kigituiyo irimet tugul kot koit kebeberta ne bo koindab tononennyi: amu kitinyei bik mugulelwek che chamei boisiet.
Nehemiah4:7 Ago kingogas Sanbalat
Nehemiah4:8 koruoch tugul kibagenge kole kobwa ak kobargei ak Jerusalem
Nehemiah4:9 Ago kigisa Kamuktaindennyo ak kiginde ribik koripso bet ak kemoi
Nehemiah4:10 Ak kile Juda

Nehemiah8:1 Ak kiiyumgei bik tugul ko u chichak eng’ komosta ne baraa ne kimi taitab ormarichetab beek; ak kilenji bichoto Esra sirindet koib bukuitab Ng’atutikab Musa
Nehemiah8:2 Kiib anyun Esra tisiindet Ng’atutik kobwa taitab tuiyet
Nehemiah8:3 Ak kisoman Ng’atutichoto eng’ taitab komosta ne baraa ne kimitei taitab ormarichetab beek
Nehemiah8:4 Ak kitonon Esra sirindet eng’ komosta ne kigiteege ketik kotororit
Nehemiah8:5 Ak king’any Esra bukuinoto eng’ taitab bik tugul; (amu kimi ye toror kosiir bik;) ak kingong’any bukuinoto kotononso bik tugul.

Nehemiah11:1 Ak kimeny Jerusalem bounikab bik: ak kiser kogeny barbarek bik che king’et
Nehemiah11:2 Ak kiiberur bik murenik tugul che kiigoitogei eng’ chamnyet komeny Jerusalem.
Nehemiah11:3 Chu ko bik che eechen che bo emotinwek che kimeny Jerusalem: ago kimeny chi tugul komostanyi eng’ nganasokab Juda eng’ nganasokwak
Nehemiah11:4 Ak kimeny Jerusalem alak eng’ lagokab Juda
Nehemiah11:5 ak Maaseia weritab Baruk
Nehemiah11:6 Kiek werik tugul che bo Peres che kimenyei Jerusalem bogol ang’wan ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit
Nehemiah11:7 Ak chu werikab Benjamin: Salu weritab Mesulam
Nehemiah11:8 Ak kirubei inendet Gabia
Nehemiah11:9 Ak ki bounindenywa Joel weritab Sikri: ak ki ne bo aeng’ ne kibou nganaset Juda weritab Hasenua.
Nehemiah11:10 Che bo tisiik ko ki Jedaia weritab Joiarib
Nehemiah11:11 Seraia weritab Hilkia
Nehemiah11:12 ak tupchosiekwak che kiyai boisietab got
Nehemiah11:13 ak tupchosiekyik
Nehemiah11:14 ak tupchosiekwak
Nehemiah11:15 Ak che bo Lawik ko ki Semaia weritab Hasub

Nehemiah11:17 ak Matania weritab Mika

Nehemiah13:1 Kisoman eng’ betunoto bukuitab Musa kogas bik; ak kiginyor ng’alek che kigisir kele machutei Amonindet ak Moabindet tuiyetab Kamuktaindet koigeny;
Nehemiah13:2 amu kima torogune lagokab Israel amitwogik ak beek
Nehemiah13:3 Ak kingogas ichek Ng’atutiet
Nehemiah13:4 Ak ye kitomo koyaak ng’olyondonito
Nehemiah13:5 got ne kigigonore koboch keny
Nehemiah13:6 Ago eng’ betusiechoto tugul ko kima ami Jerusalem: amu kiawe oldab laitoriat eng’ kenyitab sosom ak aeng’ ne bo Artaserses laitoriatab Babulon
Nehemiah13:7 ak kianyo Jerusalem ak agas yaitiet ne kiga koyai Eliasib agobo Tobia
Nehemiah13:8 Ak kigona aarogen mising’: awirte anyun komanda tuguk tugul che bo gotab Tobia
Nehemiah13:9 Yeityo ang’at
Nehemiah13:10 Ak kianai ale ma kigochi Lawik kebeberwekwak; amu noto anyun ko kimwei age tugul kwo mbarennyi eng’ Lawik ak tienik che kiyaei boisiet.
Nehemiah13:11 Kiaborie anyun bounik alenji
Nehemiah13:12 Kiib anyun Juda tugul kebeberwekab taman che bo bek ak che bo divaik ak che bo mwanik
Nehemiah13:13 Ak kiande ribik korib ole kigonore tuguk
Nehemiah13:14 Ibwata
Nehemiah13:15 Kiageer eng’ betusiechoto eng’ Juda alak che kitiechei sabibuk eng’ ole kituisie eng’ betutab sabato
Nehemiah13:16 Kimenyei oloto bikab Turo agichek
Nehemiah13:17 Yeityo aborie bik che toogunotin che bo Juda
Nehemiah13:18 Tos kima yai ko u noto kwanisiekwok
Nehemiah13:19 Ak ye kimachei koimenit eng’ ormarichokab Jerusalem ye kitom koit sabato
Nehemiah13:20 Kitebe anyun sang’utab Jerusalem konyil agenge anan aeng’
Nehemiah13:21 Yeityo abaorian agirinde ichek
Nehemiah13:22 Ak kiang’at Lawik koanyinygei
Nehemiah13:23 Kiageer kogeny eng’ betusiechoto Yahudik che kiga kotun tibikab Asdod
Nehemiah13:24 ak king’alali lagokwak kebebertab ng’alekab Asdodik
Nehemiah13:25 Ak kiaborie ichek
Nehemiah13:26 Tos kima yai tengek Solomon laitoriatab Israel eng’ tuguchu? Nganda kima komi laitoriat ne u inendet eng’ bororiosiek che chang’
Nehemiah13:27 Tos kigasak it anyun keyai yaitioni o tugul
Nehemiah13:28 Ak ki sandetab Sanbalat Horonindet
Nehemiah13:29 Ibwat ichek
Nehemiah13:30 Kiaanyiny ichek anyun eng’ bikab bororiosiek tugul
Nehemiah13:31 Ak che bo kagochinetab kwenik
Esther1:1 Eng’ betusiekab Aasuerus (Aasuerus-nito ko ne kilaitorani koboch India agoi Etiopia
Esther1:2 eng’ betusiechoto
Esther1:3 eng’ kenyit ne bo somok ne bo laitornatennyi
Esther1:4 ye kingobiit tuguchoto kobarta magornatosiekab bounatennyi ne toror
Esther1:5 Ak kingogesgei betusiechuto
Esther1:6 kimitei ngoroik che songinindos che ki leelach
Esther1:7 Ak kiinaga ichek koee eng’ tuguk che bo tahabu
Esther1:8 Ak kieei ko u ng’atutiet; kima kibirji chi: amu kiga kong’at laitoriat ko u noto agobo kiptainik tugul che bo gonnyi
Esther1:9 Kiyachi agine Basiti
Esther1:10 Eng’ betut ne bo tisab
Esther1:11 komut Basiti osotiotab laitoriat konyo taitab laitoriat kolaagonu nariet ne bo laitornatet
Esther1:12 Ago kiesio Basiti osotiotab laitoriat konyo ye kingong’at laitoriat inendet eng’ kutitab ribik: kinerech anyun mising’ laitoriat
Esther1:13 Kolenji anyun laitoriat bik che ng’omen
Esther1:14 ak che kirubei inendet ko ki Karsena
Esther1:15 kile
Esther1:16 Ak kiwol Memukan eng’ taitab laitoriat ak bounik kole
Esther1:17 Amu tun kasei kwonyik tugul boisionito bo osotiondonito
Esther1:18 Ak imuchi komwa ko u noto rani tibikab laitorinikab Persia ak Media che kagogas agobo boisietab osotiotab laitoriat
Esther1:19 Ngot kocham anyun laitoriat
Esther1:20 Ak ye tun kagimwaita ng’atutietab laitoriat ne tun yaei eng’ bounatennyi tugul
Esther1:21 Ak kiibaibai ng’olyondonoto laitoriat ak bounik; ak kiyai laitoriat ko u ng’olyotab Memukan:
Esther1:22 amu kiiyokto baronok koba emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat
Esther2:1 Kingobata tuguchuto
Esther2:2 Yeityo komwa otwogikab laitoriat che kiboisiechin inendet
Esther2:3 ak ingonde laitoriat kiptainik emotinwek tugul che bo bounatennyi
Esther2:4 ak koek osotiotab laitoriat chepto ne iboiboi laitoriat kogeer Basiti. Ak kiibaibai laitoriat ng’olyondoni; ak kiyai ko u noto.
Esther2:5 Kimi Yahudiot age Susan
Esther2:6 ne kiga kimut eng’ Jerusalem koboto luulenik
Esther2:7 Ak kiigui Hadasa
Esther2:8 Ak kingegas ng’olyotab laitoriat ak ng’atutiennyi
Esther2:9 Ak kiibaibai cheboto inendet
Esther2:10 Kitom kobor Esta ole salu bikyik anan tilionutikyik: amu kiga kong’at Mordekai inendet si mamwa.
Esther2:11 Ak kiwendote Mordekai betut age tugul taitab seremut ne bo gotab kwonyik
Esther2:12 Ak kingoit betut ne wendi chepto age tugul ole mi laitoriat Aasuerus
Esther2:13 kinyonei anyun ko u nito chepto ole mi laitoriat
Esther2:14 Kiwendi koskoleny
Esther2:15 Ak kingoit anyun betutab Esta
Esther2:16 Kigimut anyun Esta kwo ole mi laitoriat Aasuerus eng’ gonnyi ne bo laitornatet
Esther2:17 Ak kicham laitoriat Esta kosiir tibik tugul
Esther2:18 Kiyachi anyun laitoriat igorta ne o bounikyik tugul ak otwogikyik
Esther2:19 Ak kingo kagoyumgei bergeinik ne bo aeng’
Esther2:20 Kitom kobor Esta ole salu tilionutikyik anan bikyik: ko u ye kiga ng’at Mordekai inendet: amu kigas it Esta ng’atutietab Mordekai
Esther2:21 Eng’ betusiechoto
Esther2:22 Ak kinaak kioto eng’ Mordekai
Esther2:23 Ak kingo kagegin ng’olyondonoto
Esther3:1 Kingobata tuguchuto koeet laitoriat Aasuerus Haman weritab Hamedata Agagindet
Esther3:2 Ak kiing’urukso otwogik tugul che bo laitoriat che kimi ormarichetab laitoriat
Esther3:3 Komwachi anyun otwogikab laitoriat che kimi ormarichetab laitoriat
Esther3:4 Kingong’alaljin anyun inendet eng’ betut age tugul
Esther3:5 Ak kingogeer Haman kole ma ing’uruk Mordekai
Esther3:6 Ago kigeer kole matilei kiy kobar Mordekai inegei; amu kiga koborji ichek inendet ole salu bikab Mordekai: kocheng’ anyun Haman kobar Yahudik tugul che kimi bounatet tugul ne bo Aasuerus
Esther3:7 Eng’ arawet ne bo tai
Esther3:8 Ak kilenji Haman laitoriat Aasuerus
Esther3:9 Ngot kochamei laitoriat
Esther3:10 Kiinem anyun laitoriat peteit eng’ eunnyi
Esther3:11 Ak kilenji laitoriat Haman

Esther3:13 Ak kigiyokto baronok
Esther3:14 Ak kigimwachi bororiosiek tugul ng’alekab sirutichoto
Esther3:15 Kiba anyun bik che kiga kiyokto kochakta eng’ ng’atutietab laitoriat
Esther4:1 Ye kingonai Mordekai tuguk tugul che kagoyaak
Esther4:2 ak kinyo taitab ormarichetab laitoriat: amu ma kichamji chi age tugul kochut ormarichetab laitoriat kolaachi kuniok.
Esther4:3 Ak kibiit arogenet ne o eng’ Yahudik
Esther4:4 Ak kibwa tibikab Esta ak ribikyik
Esther4:5 Kiguur anyun Esta Hatak
Esther4:6 Kwo anyun Hatak ole mi Mordekai agoi ole baraa eng’ nganaset
Esther4:7 Ak kimwachi Mordekai inendet tuguk tugul che kagoyaak agobo inendet
Esther4:8 Ak kiigochi kogeny inendet ng’alekab sirutik che bo ng’atutiet ne kigimwaita eng’ Susan kele kebar ichek
Esther4:9 Ak kinyo Hatak ak komwachi Esta ng’alekab Mordekai.
Esther4:10 Kong’alalji anyun Esta Hatak
Esther4:11 Ingen otwogik tugul che bo laitoriat
Esther4:12 Ak kimwachi ichek Mordekai ng’alekab Esta.
Esther4:13 Kong’at anyun Mordekai ichek koipchi Esta wolunet
Esther4:14 Amu ngot isis kityo eng’ betusiechuto
Esther4:15 Kong’at anyun Esta ichek keipchi Mordekai wolunet
Esther4:16 Ui iyum Yahudik tugul che mitei Susan
Esther4:17 Kwo anyun Mordekai ak koyai ko u tugul che kang’at Esta inendet.

Job1:1 Kimi chi eng’ emetab Us
Job1:2 Kigisikyi werik tisab ak tibik somok
Job1:3 ak tugukyik ko ki kechirek elfusiek tisab
Job1:4 Ak kibendi werikyik gotab age tugul
Job1:5 Ak kingogesgei betusiekwak che bo igorta
Job1:6 Kimi anyun betut ye kibwanei werikab Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng’ taitab Jehovah
Job1:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani
Job1:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani
Job1:9 Kowolji anyun Setani Jehovah kolenji
Job1:10 Tos ma iyieme ng’otwet inendet koboto gonnyi
Job1:11 Ago chuul eung’ung’
Job1:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani
Job1:13 Ak eng’ betut ye kiamisiei ak koeei divaik werikyik ak tibikyik eng’ gotab werit ne tupcho
Job1:14 koit ole mi Job chito ne kiga kiyokto
Job1:15 koset Sabeik ak kokweri akwotisiechoto; ee
Job1:16 Ye kita kong’alali
Job1:17 Ye kita kong’alali
Job1:18 Ye kita kong’alali
Job1:19 ak ogeero
Job1:20 Kong’eet anyun Job
Job1:21 ak kile
Job1:22 Ma yai Job tengek eng’ chuto tugul
Job2:1 Kimi kogeny betut ye kibwanei werikab Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng’ taitab Jehovah
Job2:2 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani
Job2:3 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani
Job2:4 Ak kiwolji Setani Jehovah kolenji
Job2:5 Ago chuul eung’ung’ nguno
Job2:6 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani
Job2:7 Kwo anyun Setani eng’ taitab Jehovah
Job2:8 Ak kiinem Job rokyet kong’iriregei; ak kitebe orek.
Job2:9 Yeityo kolenji osotiondennyi
Job2:10 Ago kilenji Job inendet
Job2:11 Kingogas anyun choronok somogu che bo Job agobo yaitioni tugul kinyonji inendet
Job2:12 Ak kitobendi ichek eng’ ye loo
Job2:13 Kotebe ng’ony anyun ak inendet betusiek tisab ak kemousiek tisab
Job3:1 Kingobata chuto kotwek Job kosas betunnyi.
Job3:2 Ak kiwol Job kole
Job3:3 Ingobet betut ne kigisigena
Job3:4 Ingoimenit betunoto; Amat komage kiy Kamuktaindet eng’ barak
Job3:5 Ingonam betunoto mesundeito ak uruetab meet kobunji; Ingotebe boldet betunoto; Ingomu betunoto tugul che yaei
Job3:6 Ingonam mesundeito ne kitung’dung’ioti kemounoto: Amat kogasgei betunoto eng’ betusiek che bo kenyit; Amat kiitito betusiekab arawek.
Job3:7 Ee
Job3:8 Ingochub betunoto ichek che chubei betut
Job3:9 Ingoimenitu kecheik che bo ye karatarat: Ingocheng’ lapkeiyet
Job3:10 Amu kima rat moetab kamennyu
Job3:11 Amu nee si ma amee ami mo? Amu nee si ma amee ko kagisicha?
Job3:12 Kilya si kotorocha kutung’oik? Anan kinaik
Job3:13 Amu ki ta arue ak asis; Ki ta anuuchi
Job3:14 Koboto laitorinik ak kiruogik che bo ng’ony
Job3:15 Anan koboto bounik che kitinyei tahabu
Job3:16 Ki ta kaigai nda kiga kiooswa si mabiitu; Ko u manyurunik che ma keer lapkeiyet.
Job3:17 Maiimi sogoranik oloto; Ak imuunyi eng’ oloto che ng’etyotin.
Job3:18 Imuunyi eng’ oloto che ratotin; Magasei kutitab kayagindet.
Job3:19 Mi oloto ne ming’in ak ne o; Itiagat otwogindet eng’ kiptaiyandennyi.
Job3:20 Amu nee si kigochi lapkeiyet ne mi nyalilda
Job3:21 Che igeni meet
Job3:22 Che boiboitu mising’
Job3:23 Amu nee si kigochin lapkeiyet chito ne ung’at orennyi
Job3:24 Amu nyonei arogenennyu kotom aamisie
Job3:25 Amu kanyonja kit ne aiywei
Job3:26 Matinye talbis
Job4:1 Kiwol anyun Elipas Temanindet kole
Job4:2 Ngot kotiem chi kong’alalun
Job4:3 Keero
Job4:4 Kigogonob ng’aleguk inendet ne kiibuti
Job4:5 Ago kagoityin kiito nguno
Job4:6 Tos ma kamang’uneng’ung’ kaiyweisiet ne iywei Kamuktaindet
Job4:7 Asomin ale
Job4:8 Ko u ye kiageer
Job4:9 Betos eng’ kabusetab Kamuktaindet
Job4:10 Borisenetab ng’etundo
Job4:11 Meei ng’etundo ne kagoosit amu ma kologoteni
Job4:12 Kigiibwa anyun ng’olyot eng’ ung’ot
Job4:13 Eng’ kabwatet ne bo ng’ang’utikab kemoi
Job4:14 Konyonja kaiyweisiet ak botanet
Job4:15 Yeityo kosiirtoena tamirmiriet; Kitononso sumeekab bortanyu.
Job4:16 Kitonon tamirmiriet
Job4:17 Tos bo iman chito ne ma bo koigeny kosiir Kamuktaindet? Tos tilil chito kosiir Yaindennyi?
Job4:18 Keero
Job4:19 Tos siirei ne tia icheget che menyei gorikab menet
Job4:20 King’emang’emi kong’eete karon agoi koskoleny: Lustos koigeny ama iiti chi.
Job4:21 Tos ma kitut rogoetab emainywa eng’ orinywa: Betu ichek
Job5:1 Kuur anyun; tos mi ne wolu? Iwendi oldab ng’o eng’ che tililen?
Job5:2 Amu barei neregek chito ne berber. Ak barei ng’et konda chito ne berber.
Job5:3 Kiageer kolumdogei chito ne berber: Ago kiachub eng’ yoto meng’otennyi.
Job5:4 Looen lagokyik eng’ ole ribot
Job5:5 Amei kogesu bekwak che amei rubet
Job5:6 Amu mamong’une nyalilda ng’ung’unyek
Job5:7 Ago kisikyin chito kaiimetab ge
Job5:8 Ago nda ka ane
Job5:9 Inendet ne yaei tuguk che eechen che maisiagaksei; Tuguk che kikwong’e che maiitoksei:
Job5:10 Ne igochin ng’ony ropta
Job5:11 Si kobiit kieet icheget che nyerotin; Ak kitorori ichek che rirtos kotebe ole ribot.
Job5:12 Ng’emei chobutikab ng’alik
Job5:13 Namei che ng’omen eng’ ng’alsenywa: Sib kong’emaksei kiruogutikab che imaasotin.
Job5:14 Nyonjin ichek mesundeito bet
Job5:15 Ago soru ne banani eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo kutinywa
Job5:16 Tinyei anyun kibananiat kamang’unet
Job5:17 Keero
Job5:18 Amu igochin ng’wanindo
Job5:19 Sorun eng’ nyalilwogik lo; Ee
Job5:20 Itiachin eng’ rubet si mabarin; Ak kotiachin eng’ luget eng’ kimnatetab rotwetab chok.
Job5:21 Kiunyin eng’ biretab ng’elepta; Ameiywei ng’emisiet ye kanyo.
Job5:22 Irorechini ng’emisiet ak rubet; Ameiywei tiong’ikab ng’ony.
Job5:23 Amu onamege ak koikab warenget; Ak oting’ege kalyet ak tiong’ikab timin.
Job5:24 Ak inai ile mi kalyet emaing’ung’; Irutochini biung’ung’
Job5:25 Ak inai ile chang’aitu iyoteng’ung’
Job5:26 Iwendi kerering’ung’ eng’ kalilet
Job5:27 Keer ni-o
Job6:1 Kiwol anyun Job
Job6:2 Ee
Job6:3 Amu nyigisitu kosiir ng’aniek che bo nyanjosiek: Kasartae anyun ng’alekyuk.
Job6:4 Amu mi orinnyu kipchabonikab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet
Job6:5 Tos itei sigirietab timin ye tinyei suswek? Anan iuti eito ye tinyei amitwogik?
Job6:6 Tos kiamei kit ne machamu kiy ama kinde munyuk? Anan tos chamu kiy kebeberta ne leel ne bo koitab ngok?
Job6:7 Esioi sobondanyu kotwa; U bendo ne samis eng’ ane.

Job6:9 Agot nda chamei Kamuktaindet korurunya; Kochuul eunnyi

Job6:11 Nee kimnatennyu
Job6:12 Tos u kimnatennyu kimnatetab koik? Anan bo bortanyu sugunwet?
Job6:13 Tos ma amu matinye ane toretet eng’ orinnyu
Job6:14 Kanyolji konyor inendet ne machei kotanui
Job6:15 Kigoyai tupchosiekyuk kaberberisiet ko u kererut
Job6:16 Che katuuegitu amu kagau
Job6:17 Ak ye kalalang’itu kobetyo; Ak kobetyo eng’ kemeut eng’ oldanywa.

Job6:23 Anan ale
Job6:24 Oneta

Job6:28 Ara anyun ocham ogeera; Amu mamwawok iman lembech eng’ taing’wong’.

Job6:30 Tos mi kenisiet ng’elyeptanyu? Tos mamuchi abesio tugukab yaitiet?

Job7:4 Ye arue
Job7:5 Kagilaakyi bortanyu kutik ak mogoronikab temburiek; Laei bortanyu ak konenderi kogeny.

Job16:2 Kiagas tuguk che chang’ che u choto: O kagoigoik okwek tugul che otese nyalilda.
Job16:3 Tos tinyei ng’alek che bo buch ole igesunegei? Anan nee ne katachin kot iwolu?

Job16:9 Kagogerera eng’ neregekyik

Job16:22 Amu ye kagosiirto kenyisiek che ng’ering’

Job17:3 Kona kit ne bo kayosiet

Job18:12 Amei rubet kimnatennyi
Job18:13 Amei kebeberwekab bortanyi
Job18:14 Kitutu inendet eng’ emainnyi ne kiimang’u; Ak kimutyi laitoriatab kamuisosiek.
Job18:15 Menyei emainnyi kit ne ma nenyi: Kiseere meng’otennyi koik che laldos.
Job18:16 Yaamdos tigitikyik eng’ orit
Job18:17 Lusei kabwatennyi eng’ ng’ony
Job18:18 Kionei eng’ ole mi lapkeiyet kwo mesundeito
Job18:19 Manyoru inendet werit anan mochogoret eng’ bikyik
Job18:20 Kwong’dos eng’ betunnyi icheget che biitu let
Job18:21 U noto iman meng’otosiekab che ma bo iman
Job19:1 Kiwol anyun Job kole
Job19:2 Onyalili sobondanyu agoi kotianit
Job19:3 Kaochota konyil chu taman: Molilandosi amu oyaiywa ne uui.
Job19:4 Ak ngo kialel iman
Job19:5 Ngot oeetge agobo ane
Job19:6 Onai anyun ole kagogabua Kamuktaindet
Job19:7 Ogeero
Job19:8 Kagong’ot orennyu kot ko mamuchi abun
Job19:9 Kagoreegunena torornatennyu
Job19:10 Kagotua eng’ komosta age tugul
Job19:11 Kagolalyo kogeny neregekyik agobo ane
Job19:12 Bwanei kweanaikyik che bo luget kobokyina
Job19:13 Kagoistoena tupchosiekyuk kolooena
Job19:14 Kagobagakta tilionutikyuk
Job19:15 Kagoiita bik che menyei gonnyu
Job19:16 Aguure otwogindennyu
Job19:17 Kagoek kabusennyu kiy ne too eng’ kwondanyu
Job19:18 Sasa agot lagok che mengech: Ngang’eet
Job19:19 Wecha choronokyuk che kogichamdosi mising’: Ak wecha che kiachame.

Job19:23 Ee

Job19:26 Ak ye kagong’emak iririondennyu ko u ni
Job19:27 Ne tun ageere kimni
Job19:28 Ngot omwa ole
Job19:29 Oiywei rotwetab chok: Amu ibu neregek biret ne bo rotwetab chok

Job20:2 Kona kabwatutikyuk wolunet

Job20:4 Tos kitom inai nito koboch keny

Job20:8 Siirtoi ko u karuotitoet

Job20:18 Iweegu tuguk che kigobirtochigei

Job20:21 Ma ng’et kiy ne kima am; Noto anyun

Job22:1 Kowol anyun Elipas Temanindet kole

Job22:4 Tos kerin kong’ amu kaiyweisiet ne iywei inendet
Job22:5 Tos ma o tengektang’ung’? Ama tinyei tengekwogiguk ole igesunegei.

Job23:5 Ta anae ng’alek che wolwa

Job24:1 Amu nee si ma konor Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet betusiek? Ak amu nee si mageer betusiekyik ichek che ingen inendet?
Job24:2 Mi che istoi kiwotosiek; Rebei ichek eng’ kimnatet akwotisiekab kechirek
Job24:3 Kweriei ichek sigirietab che matinyei kwanda
Job24:4 Imaasi che banandos: Ung’egei uwak kibananokab ng’ony.

Job24:15 Igeni kondab ne ibegei ko ratarat
Job24:16 Balei gorik kemoi: Kerjingei go bet; Manaei lapkeiyet.

Job24:19 Istoi kemeut ak kiptoret beekab teluchi: U noto istoi oldab che kigobek che kigoyai tengekto.
