Job33:8 Iman
Job33:9 A tilil
Job33:10 Ogeero
Job33:11 Indoi kelyekyuk temeleiywek
Job33:12 Keero
Job33:13 Amu nee si oborie ak inendet? Amu matetu ng’alekyik agot agenge.
Job33:14 Amu ng’alali Kamuktaindet konyil agenge
Job33:15 Eng’ karuotitoet
Job33:16 Yatei anyun itikab bik
Job33:17 Si kobiit koisto chito eng’ kit ne tokyingei
Job33:18 Ribei sobondanyi si maibutyi keringet
Job33:19 Kitigone kogeny ng’wanindo eng’ itogunnyi. Ak boriet ne mi kotugul eng’ kowekyik:
Job33:20 Kot kowech sobennyi amitwogik
Job33:21 Inchuchui banyekyik
Job33:22 Ee
Job33:23 Ngot komi malaikaiyat koboto inendet
Job33:24 Korire inendet anyun
Job33:25 Ng’arng’aritu bortanyi kosiir ne bo lakwet; Weekyingei betusiekab ming’inatennyi:
Job33:26 Saei Kamuktaindet
Job33:27 Tieni eng’ taitab bik
Job33:28 Kigosor sobondanyu si mawo keringet
Job33:29 Keero
Job33:30 Si koweech sobondanyi komong’une keringet
Job33:31 Keer komie
Job33:32 Ngitinye kiy age tugul ne imwae
Job33:33 Ngo ma u noto
Job34:1 Kiwol kogeny Eliu kole
Job34:2 Ogas ng’alekyuk
Job34:3 Amu tiemei itit ng’alek
Job34:4 Ongelewenjige kit ne bo iman: Ongenai acheget kit ne mie.
Job34:5 Amu kamwa Job kole
Job34:6 Nganda a bo iman ko kigiita kele a kiplembechwa: Mainyaaksei ng’otobennyu
Job34:7 Ngoro chi ne u Job
Job34:8 Ne wendoti koboto yaikab tengekto
Job34:9 Amu kigomwa kole
Job34:10 Ogas anyun amu noto
Job34:11 Amu yaakyin chito ko u boisionikyik
Job34:12 Ee
Job34:13 Ng’o ne king’at inendet si kobiit korib ng’ony? Anan ng’o ne kiinde ng’ony komugul ole tebe?
Job34:14 Ngot kochamei chito eng’ muguleldanyi
Job34:15 Kobegu anyun bik tugul kibagenge
Job34:16 Ngot itinye anyun kaguiyet igas nito: Epchi it ng’alekyuk.
Job34:17 Tos imuchi kobounis inendet ne wechei imanda? Ak tos igikyini inye inendet ne bo iman ak ko kim?
Job34:18 Tos nyolu kelenji laitoriat
Job34:19 Kotam nee anyun eng’ inendet ne magonyiti bounik
Job34:20 Begu eng’ ye matia
Job34:21 Amu keerei konyekyik ortinwekab chi
Job34:22 Mami mesundeito
Job34:23 Amu manyoljin inendet ko ta kobwat chito
Job34:24 Tonatoni bik che kimen eng’ ortinwek che ma naoksei
Job34:25 Naei anyun boisionikwak: Ak kogabui kemoi
Job34:26 Birei ichek ko u bik che yaachen Kogeerei bik alak;
Job34:27 Amu kimasta
Job34:28 Kot kogochi rirekab kibananok koit ole mi inendet
Job34:29 Ye konu inendet kamuung’et
Job34:30 Si malaitoran chito ne maiywei Kamuktaindet
Job34:31 Tos kigomwachi chi age tugul Kamuktaindet
Job34:32 Ineta che ma ageere: Ngot ko kiayai tengekto
Job34:33 Tos biitu yaakyinennyi ko u ye ichame amu iesioi? Amu kanyol ilewen
Job34:34 Lenjina bik che tinyei naet
Job34:35 Ng’alali Job ko matinyei naet
Job34:36 Kata mie ketiem Job agoi let
Job34:37 Amu tesyin ngelelnatet tengektanyi
Job35:1 Kowol kogeny Eliu kole
Job35:2 Tos ilen imandang’ung’ nito
Job35:3 Kot ile
Job35:4 Awolun anyun
Job35:5 Inyal kipsengwetisiek
Job35:6 Ngot ko kaiyai tengek
Job35:7 Ngot i bo iman
Job35:8 Imuchi kogochi yaitieng’ung’ ng’wanindo chito ne u inye; Ak imuchi imandang’ung’ kogochi keljinet weritab chito.
Job35:9 Rirtos amu chang’indab usisiosiek; Rirtos komachei toretet amu eutab inendet ne tinyei kamuget.
Job35:10 Ago mami ne mwaei kole
Job35:11 Ne inetech kosiir tiong’ikab ng’ony
Job35:12 Rirtos anyun
Job35:13 Iman magasei Kamuktaindet tangoita
Job35:14 Kotam nee ye imwae ile
Job35:15 Ago
Job35:16 Komwa anyun Job ng’alekab buch; Tesei ng’alek ama tinyei naet.
Job36:1 Kiwa tai kogeny Eliu eng’ ng’alalennyi
Job36:2 Kang’wa kitigin
Job36:3 Aibune naennyu ole loo
Job36:4 Amu ma lembech ng’alekyuk iman: Mi koboten inendet ne igesunotgei eng’ naet.
Job36:5 Keero
Job36:6 Maribei sobetab che yaachen: Ago igochin che kinyalili tuguk che nyoljin.
Job36:7 Maistoe konyekyik bik che bo iman: Ago indoi ichek kotebi koigeny Koboto laitorinik
Job36:8 Ak ngot kerat eng’ mugurek
Job36:9 Koborji anyun ichek boisienywa
Job36:10 Yatei kogeny itikwak si kogas konetisiet
Job36:11 Ngot kogas it inendet ak koot
Job36:12 Ago ngot ko magas it
Job36:13 Ago ichek che maiywei Kamuktaindet eng’ muguleldo
Job36:14 Begu ye ta ko neran
Job36:15 Soru chito ne kinyalili eng’ nyalildanyi
Job36:16 Ee
Job36:17 Ago kagonyiin kiruogutikab chi ne ya: Namin kiruoget ak imanda.
Job36:18 Amu mi neregek
Job36:19 Tos yamin magornatosieguk
Job36:20 Amat imach kemout
Job36:21 Ripge
Job36:22 Keero
Job36:23 Ng’o ne kigong’at orennyi? Anan ng’o ne imuchi komwa kole
Job36:24 Ibwat itoror boisiennyi
Job36:25 Kagogeer bik tugul noto; Keerei bik eng’ ole loo.
Job36:26 Keero
Job36:27 Amu ichuuti inendet beek che saitoi
Job36:28 Che rong’u bolik Ak korobonji bik ropta ne o.
Job36:29 Ee
Job36:30 Keero
Job36:31 Amu iruokyine bik chuto; Konu amitwogik eng’ chang’indo.
Job36:32 Tuge eunekyik kalyelet; Ak kong’at ole kwere.
Job36:33 Mwaitoi tulet inendet
Job37:1 Botani muguleldanyu eng’ nito agine
Job37:2 Ogas anyun cheetab tugennyi
Job37:3 Iyoktoi kwo kureret tugul ne bo kipsengwet
Job37:4 Ye ibata kotugul; Tulei eng’ tugetab etunatennyi: Ak magerei inendet ichek ye kagigas tugennyi.
Job37:5 Tulei Kamuktaindet eng’ tugennyi eng’ kwong’et; Yaei tuguk che eechen
Job37:6 Amu lenjin teluchi
Job37:7 Ratei eutab chi age tugul; Si kobiit konai bik tugul che kiyaei.
Job37:8 Koba anyun tiong’ik ole ung’egei
Job37:9 Bunu usonet ne o gorikab murot ne bo tai: Kobun kaititiet murot ne bo katam.
Job37:10 Konu kabusetab Kamuktaindet beek che kigogau: Ak kogau chang’indab beek.
Job37:11 Ee
Job37:12 Ak kiweleli eng’ kandoisiennyi
Job37:13 Ngo bo kotigonet
Job37:14 Kas ng’olyondoni
Job37:15 Tos ingen inye ole ng’atitoi Kamuktaindet ichek
Job37:16 Tos ingen ole songinindoi bolik
Job37:17 Lalang’en mising’ ngoroiguk
Job37:18 Tos imuchi iite sengwetiet koboto inendet
Job37:19 Inetech kit ne kimwachini inendet; Amu magimuchi ketet ng’alekyok amu mesundeito.
Job37:20 Tos kimwachin inendet kelenjin
Job37:21 Mageerei anyun bik lapkeiyet ne iluu eng’ sengwetisiek: Ago siirtoi usonet
Job37:22 Bunu murot ne bo katam kakweng’et ne u tahabu: Tinyei Kamuktaindet etunatet ne kiywei.
Job37:23 Magimuchi kegeer Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet; tinyei telunatet eng’ kamuktaet: Mainyalilisiei eng’ kiruoget ak eng’ imanda ne o.
Job37:24 Iywei anyun bik inendet: Matiytii age tugul ne ng’om eng’ muguleldo.
Job38:1 Kiwolji anyun Jehovah Job eng’ kipchurjuriet
Job38:2 Ng’o nito indoi mesundeito kiruoget Eng’ ng’alek che matinyei naet?
Job38:3 Kermenge anyun nguno ko u muren; Amu amagenen ng’olyot
Job38:4 Kiimi ano ye kiandoi lumeiywekab ng’ony? Mwau anyun
Job38:5 Ng’o ne king’atei kakwautikyik
Job38:6 Kigiratyi ano lumeiywekyik? Anan ng’o ne kiinde koitanyi ne bo luita;
Job38:7 Ye kitienso kecheikab karon kibagenge
Job38:8 Anan ng’o ne kigere nyanjet kurgotik
Job38:9 Ye kiayai boldet koek ngoriennyi
Job38:10 Ak ang’atyi ng’atutiennyu
Job38:11 Ak ale
Job38:12 Kiing’at karonet koboch ngo biit betusieguk
Job38:13 Si kobiit konam tabanwekab ng’ony
Job38:14 Kiwalei ko u menet ye king’ochi; Ak kotononso tuguk tugul ko u ngoriet:
Job38:15 Ak kiete bik che yaachen lapkeiyenywa
Job38:16 Tos kiichut kondemetusiekab nyanjet? Anan kiiwendote komoswek che ung’otin che bo riret?
Job38:17 Tos kiging’ang’un ormarichokab meet? Anan kiigeer kurgotikab uruetab meet?
Job38:18 Tos kiinai tebeesindab ng’ony? Mwau
Job38:19 Mi ano oret ne wendi ole menyei lapkeiyet
Job38:20 Si kobiit iib kot koit kiwotennyi
Job38:21 Ingen iman
Job38:22 Tos kiichut ole kigonore teluchi
Job38:23 Che kiagonorji betutab nyalilda
Job38:24 Kipcheune ano lapkeiyet
Job38:25 Ng’o ne kibet oretab maranet
Job38:26 Si kogochi korobonji emet ole mami chi; Korobonji ong’atet ole mami chi;
Job38:27 Si kobiyo emet ne karatia ne kigoguber; Ak kogochi suswek che ng’orng’or kobityo?
Job38:28 Tos tinyei ropta kwanda? Anan ng’o ne kisich rewot ne sau?
Job38:29 Kibunu moetab ng’o beek che kigogau? Ak ng’o ne kisich chepkoset ne bunu kipsengwet?
Job38:30 Ung’otin beek ko u koita
Job38:31 Tos imuchi irat karurugutikab Koremerik
Job38:32 Tos imuchi indochi Masarot eng’ betusiekwak? Anan imuchi indochi kecheik che u Tiondo ak lagokyik?
Job38:33 Tos ingen ng’atutik che kiging’atyi kipsengwetisiek? Tos imuchi igimit bounatennyi eng’ ng’ony?
Job38:34 Tos imuchi koit kuting’ung’ bolik
Job38:35 Tos imuchi iyokte kalyelosiek si koba
Job38:36 Ng’o ne kiinde ng’omnatet kebeberwek che bo orit? Anan ng’o ne kiigochi naet kundit?
Job38:37 Ng’o ne imuchi koiit bolik eng’ ng’omnatet? Ng’o ne tumu chuboinikab kipsengwet
Job38:38 Ye kayumgei temburiek koek tulwo
Job38:39 Tos ilogotenjini ng’etuny ne kotoy? Anan ibai neranikab ng’etunyik kobiyong’so
Job38:40 Ye ribistos eng’ kebenonikwak
Job38:41 Ng’o ne baei chepkugit
Job39:1 Ingen betusiek ye itos sitok? Anan igeere ye ristos kenyelok?
Job39:2 Imuchi iit arawek che tarei? Anan ingen betusiek ye itos?
Job39:3 Ing’uruktos
Job39:4 Tebe chametab ge arekwak
Job39:5 Ng’o ne kiitiach sigiriet ne bo timin? Anan ng’o ne kiitiach ratutikab sigirietab timin?
Job39:6 Che kiagochi komeny ong’atet
Job39:7 Sasei bolatetab nganaset
Job39:8 Agetye barautietab tulonok
Job39:9 Tos cham soet koboisieun? Anan tos tebe ole negite biung’ung’?
Job39:10 Tos imuchi iratyi soet mogombet? Anan tos murmurun mbaret ne kaibat?
Job39:11 Tos imang’u inendet
Job39:12 Tos imang’u inendet
Job39:13 Baibai kebepchetab tiondab songolik; Ago tos tinyei rirenet kebebaikyik ak kororikyik?
Job39:14 Amu bagakyin koikyik ng’ung’unyek
Job39:15 Ak koutie kole tuei keldo
Job39:16 Koromjin lagokyik ko u che ma chechik: Agot ngo buch boisiennyi
Job39:17 Amu kiete Kamuktaindet ng’omnatet
Job39:18 Ago ye yot met komwei
Job39:19 Kiigochini mbartanyit kimnatet? Kiilaakyini kaatinnyi masek che usausi?
Job39:20 Kiigochini inendet kotoromben ko u chereng’endet? Imui bich torornatetab waagatab serunekyik.
Job39:21 Kutei atebwet
Job39:22 Chotei kaiyweisiet
Job39:23 Boljin inendet motietab kipchabonik
Job39:24 Lugui emet eng’ koromnatet ak neregek; Ama iyani kole noto ko cheetab iriaget.
Job39:25 Sait age tugul ye cheei iriaget
Job39:26 Tos tirirene keeret ng’omnateng’ung’
Job39:27 Tos tirirene kipsichit ng’atutieng’ung’
Job39:28 Menyei ruandet
Job39:29 Segei eng’ yoto tiondanyi; Tobeni konyekyik ole loo.
Job39:30 Chuchuni lagokyik agichek korotik: Ak ole mi muswek
Job40:1 Kiwolji kogeny Jehovah Job kolenji
Job40:2 King’alaljin ne imesesi kobelegei ak Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet? Ingowol inendet ne tiitos ak Kamuktaindet.
Job40:3 Kowolji anyun Job Jehovah kolenji
Job40:4 Keero
Job40:5 Kiamwa konyil agenge
Job40:6 Kowolji anyun Jehovah Job eng’ kipchurjuriet
Job40:7 Kermenge ko u muren; Amagenen ng’olyo
Job40:8 Tos iwale kiruogennyu koek buch? Tos iruokwa
Job40:9 Anan itinye eut ne u ne bo Kamuktaindet? Ak imuchi itul eng’ tuget ko u inendet?
Job40:10 Ilaakyige anyun telunatet ak etunatet; Ilaakyige teegisto ak kororonindo.
Job40:11 Rong’u neregeguk che ing’irtogei: Ak igeer age tugul ne menei
Job40:12 Keer age tugul ne menei
Job40:13 Ung’e temburiek kibagenge; Tuch togochikwak eng’ ole ung’at.
Job40:14 Si abarten ale Kaga imuchi eung’ung’ ne bo tai kosorun.
Job40:15 Keer anyun-o magaut ne kiayai koboten; Ageti ko u teta.
Job40:16 Keer anyun-o
Job40:17 Birabirtoi saruriennyi ko u tarakwet: King’walgei tigitikab chotikyik.
Job40:18 U kowekyik karik che kimen che bo sugunwet; U karaswekyik temeleiywekab karik.
Job40:19 O inendet
Job40:20 Iman baei inendet tulonok; Ole urerense tiong’ik tugul che bo kewanin.
Job40:21 Rue ketit kel ye mi uruet
Job40:22 Iuuri inendet ketik; Yiemei inendet ketikab kererusiek.
Job40:23 Keero
Job40:24 Tos imuchi chi konam tionyoto ye ripsei
Job41:1 Tos imuchi ing’usune tiondo ne u tiong’ong’et kombetab njirenik? Anan irate ng’elyeptanyi borowet?
Job41:2 Imuchi inde rogoet serunnyi? Anan itoore tagilgiliennyi kombet?
Job41:3 Tos saisain konyil che chang’? Anan tos ng’alalun ng’alek che tangus?
Job41:4 Tos oyomisge ak inendet
Job41:5 Tos iurerenji ko u taritiet? Anan tos irat kobunji tibiguk?
Job41:6 Tos aldaat che namei njirenik? Tos pchechi inendet chemung’arainik?
Job41:7 Tos imuchi inyiit iririondennyi kibitinosiek
Job41:8 Nam inendet; Ibwat luget
Job41:9 Keero
Job41:10 Mami ne korom ne kanyei kong’eet: Ng’o anyun inendet ne imuchi kotonone tainnyu?
Job41:11 Ng’o ne kisib kogona
Job41:12 Masise agobo kebeberwekyik
Job41:13 Ng’o ne imuchi koreegune ngoriennyi ne bo barak? Ng’o ne rikyin kotinyei karnet ne ki soniot aeng’ ne kiratyin kutit?
Job41:14 Ng’o ne imuchi koyat kurgotikab togennyi? Kiyiem kamuiset kelekyik.
Job41:15 Berikyik che kimen ko menotennyi. Kinamgei ko u ng’okset.
Job41:16 Rikyindos kot
Job41:17 Kinamgei; Kitiinygei
Job41:18 Ilyeli karionennyi
Job41:19 Mong’une kutinnyi kegenganikab mastinwek
Job41:20 Mong’une iyeto serunekyik
Job41:21 Inaami kabusennyi nesek
Job41:22 Mi kimnatet kaatinnyi
Job41:23 Kinamgei tagalosiekyik tugul: Kiigiigei; magimuchi keisto.
Job41:24 Uui muguleldanyi ko u koita; Ee
Job41:25 Ye kang’eet
Job41:26 Ngo len chi koeb
Job41:27 Iiti karnet ko u suswek
Job41:28 Mamwee kipchabet; Walaksei koik che kewirtoe borowet
Job41:29 U rungusiek mobek eng’ inendet: Rorechin ndirit ne kitoore.
Job41:30 U moennyi rokyonik che ng’atiben: Iitoi eng’ ng’atatek tuguk che kiborse.
Job41:31 Igochin riret kowasgei ko u teret ne mi ma: Yaei nyanjet koigei mwaita.
Job41:32 Leelitu ole kabunei: Len chito kaek riret kalwalek.
Job41:33 Mami ne kergei ak inendet eng’ ng’ony
Job41:34 Keerei kit age tugul ne toror: Laitoriat inendet ne bou werik tugul che bo menotik.
Job42:1 Kowolji anyun Job Jehovah
Job42:2 Angen ale imuchi iyai tuguk tugul. Ama kimuchi kegirinda mageng’ung’.
Job42:3 Ng’o ni unyei kiruoget ama tinyei naet? Noto anyun kiamwa che kima aguiye
Job42:4 Asain ale kaswa
Job42:5 Kiagasin kityo kibit; Ago ageerin nguno
Job42:6 Kaasasge anyun amu noto
Job42:7 Ak kingo kagomwachi Jehovah Job ng’alechuto
Job42:8 Onam anyun kirugik tisab
Job42:9 Koba anyun Elipas Temanindet ak Bildad Suindet ak Sopa Naamatindet
Job42:10 Kowal anyun Jehovah ratetab Job
Job42:11 Kobwa werik tugul che tupcho
Job42:12 Kiiberur anyun Jehovah betusiek che bo let che bo Job kosiir betusiekyik che bo tai: amu kitinyei kechirek elfusiek taman ak ang’wan
Job42:13 Ak kitinyei kogeny werik tisab ak tibik somok.
Job42:14 Ak kiguure kainetab ne bo tai
Job42:15 Ak kima komitei emet tugul kwonyik che kororon kosiir tibikab Job: ak kiigochi kwandanywa ichek borotet koboto werik che tupcho.
Job42:16 Ak kingobata nito kotar Job kenyisiek bogol agenge ak artam
Job42:17 Kolil anyun Job.
Psalms1:1 Iberurot chi ne manamei ng’alekab bik che yaachen
Psalms1:2 Ago baibaitune ng’atutietab Jehovah; Ak kobwatoti ng’atutiennyi bet ak kemoi.
Psalms1:3 Ak kogergeit ak ketit ne kigiminji ole negite ainosiek
Psalms1:4 Ma u noto che yaachen; Ago kergei ichek ak metetek che ibei usonet.
Psalms1:5 Eng’ noto anyun matonondos che yaachen eng’ kiruoget
Psalms1:6 Amu ingen Jehovah oretab che bo imanda: Ago betei oretab kiptengeginik.
Psalms2:1 Amu nee si koyumgei bororiosiek ak koboldos
Psalms2:2 Tetegei laitorinikab ng’ony
Psalms2:3 Ongeng’eti tugukwak che ratisie
Psalms2:4 Tun roriei inendet ne tebyei eng’ kipsengwetisiek: Ak kochot Kiptaiyat ichek.
Psalms2:5 Ak kong’alalji anyun eng’ neregekyik
Psalms2:6 Ago kande laitoriandennyu Tulwennyu ne tilil ne bo Sion.
Psalms2:7 Abartoi ng’atutiet: Kilenja Jehovah
Psalms2:8 Soma
Psalms2:9 Itue ichek siaritab karnet; Ak ituatui ichek ko u rokyetab cheptereniot.
Psalms2:10 Noto anyun ong’omegitu
Psalms2:11 Oboisiechi Jehovah eng’ kaiyweisiet
Psalms2:12 Oming’inityige werit si manerech
Psalms3:1 Ee Jehovah
Psalms3:2 Mitei che chang’ che mwaei agobo sobondanyu
Psalms3:3 Ago inye
Psalms3:4 Arirjini Jehovah eng’ kutinnyu
Psalms3:5 Kialyelde ak anuuch; Kiagosu; amu kiigimita Jehovah.
Psalms3:6 Maiywei bik tamanusiekab elfusiek
Psalms3:7 Ng’eet
Psalms3:8 Bo Jehovah yetunet: Ingotebe berurtang’ung’ biguk.
Psalms4:1 Wolwa ye aguursei
Psalms4:2 Ee okwek
Psalms4:3 Ago onai ni ole kigotabanjigei Jehovah chito ne bo iman: Kasei Jehovah ye aguure inendet.
Psalms4:4 Obotanse
Psalms4:5 Ogoite tiseiywek che bo imanda
Psalms4:6 Mwaei che chang’ kole
Psalms4:7 Kiinde muguleldanyu kagasetab ge
Psalms4:8 Alyeldoi eng’ kalyet
Psalms5:1 Epchi it ng’alekyuk
Psalms5:2 Kas ye atwegu arire
Psalms5:3 Ee Jehovah
Psalms5:4 Amu ma i Kamuktaindet ne ibaibaitune yaitio: Ama tebe oldang’ung’ yaitio.
Psalms5:5 Matonondos eng’ taing’ung’ menotik: Iweche tugul che yaei tengekto.
Psalms5:6 Ing’eme che mwaei lembechek: Wechei Jehovah chitab korotik ak ng’alindet.
Psalms5:7 Ago ane
Psalms5:8 Ee Jehovah
Psalms5:9 Amu mami lititindo eng’ kutuswekwak; Tengek kityo mugulelwekwak: Kererit ne yatat mokwekwak; Lasei bich eng’ ng’elyebwekwak.
Psalms5:10 Iityi ichek tengekto
Psalms5:11 Ago ingoboiboitu ichek tugul che imang’un
Psalms5:12 Amu iberuri inye chitab imanda; Ee Jehovah
Psalms6:1 Ee Jehovah
Psalms6:2 Rirena
Psalms6:3 Nyalili agine sobondanyu mising’: Ee inye Jehovah
Psalms6:4 Iweege
Psalms6:5 Amu mami chi ne ibwati eng’ oldab meet: Mwaun ng’o kongoi eng’ oldab che kigobek?
Psalms6:6 Kaang’et eng’ tigenoikyuk; Marane beekab kong’ itogunnyu kemout age tugul; Sachin beekyuk bo kong’ ole arue.
Psalms6:7 Machei kong’emogis konyekyuk amu arogenet; Kaosegitu amu bunikyuk tugul.
Psalms6:8 Oistoenage
Psalms6:9 Kagogas Jehovah somsennyu: Taachei Jehovah saennyu.
Psalms6:10 Ililandos bunikyuk tugul ak konyalildos mising’: Weechegei let ak kolilanso eng’ yoto.
Psalms7:1 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms7:2 Si magerer sobondanyu ko u ng’etundo
Psalms7:3 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms7:4 Ngo kiayaakyi yaitio ne kigimi tuwai eng’ kalyet; (Ee
Psalms7:5 Ingoon bunyot sobondanyu
Psalms7:6 Ng’eet
Psalms7:7 Ak ingoyiemin tuiyetab bororiosiek: Ak iweege barak ibou ichek.
Psalms7:8 Ibesiechin Jehovah bororiosiek: Iruokseiywa
Psalms7:9 Ingowong’gei tengektab kiptengeginik
Psalms7:10 Mi long’ennyu eng’ Kamuktaindet
Psalms7:11 Kamuktaindet ko kiruogindet ne bo imanda
Psalms7:12 Ngo masik chi
Psalms7:13 Kigochopchi karik che kibare; Yaei kipchabonikyik che bo mat.
Psalms7:14 Ogeero
Psalms7:15 Kogochob keringet
Psalms7:16 Weekyingei metinnyi yaitiennyi
Psalms7:17 Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi ko u imandanyi: Ak atienjini kalosunet kainetab Jehovah ne Toror Mising’.
Psalms8:1 Ee Jehovah
Psalms8:2 Kiing’at kimnatet kobun kutuswekab lagok ak che reritos
Psalms8:3 Ye ageere kipsengwetisieguk
Psalms8:4 Ale
Psalms8:5 Amu kiiyai inendet koming’init kitigin eng’ Kamuktaindet
Psalms8:6 Kiigochi inendet koboi boisionikab euneguk; Kiinde tuguk tugul keldebesaikab kelyekyik kogas it;
Psalms8:7 Kechirek tugul ak eik tugul
Psalms8:8 Taritik che mi barak
Psalms8:9 Ee Jehovah
Psalms9:1 Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi eng’ muguleldanyu tugul; Abartoi kwong’utiguk tugul.
Psalms9:2 Abaibaitu ak agasige eng’ inye: Atienjini kalosunet kaineng’ung’
Psalms9:3 Ye kaweek let bunikyuk
Psalms9:4 Amu kiiyai kiruogennyu ak ng’alekyuk; Kiitebe ng’echeretab laitornatet iruoch eng’ iman.
Psalms9:5 Kiiger kong’ bororiosiek
Psalms9:6 Kigogesgei bunik
Psalms9:7 Ago tebyei Jehovah koigeny: Kigochopchi ng’echerennyi bo laitornatet kiruoget.
Psalms9:8 Ak iruokyin inendet ng’ony eng’ imanda
Psalms9:9 Egu Jehovah irimetab ne kiusei
Psalms9:10 Ak imang’un che ingen kaineng’ung’; Amu ma imete inye
Psalms9:11 Otienji kalosunet Jehovah ne menyei Sion: Omwaite boisionikyik eng’ kwenutab bik.
Psalms9:12 Amu ibwati ichek ne yaaktoi mugetut agobo korotik: Mautie rirekab kibananok.
Psalms9:13 Rirena
Psalms9:14 Si kobiit abarta kalosuneng’ung’ tugul: Eng’ kurgotikab cheptab Sion
Psalms9:15 Kagororokyi bororiosiek keringet ne kibalei: Kagonam kelyekwak mestet ne kiga uny.
Psalms9:16 Kigoborgei Jehovah
Psalms9:17 Weechegei kiptengeginik kobendi oldab meet
Psalms9:18 Amu magiutie kotugul kibananok
Psalms9:19 Ng’eet
Psalms9:20 Ee Jehovah
Psalms10:1 Ee Jehovah
Psalms10:2 Isubi kiptengeginik che menot kibananok eng’ koromnatet; Ingonam ichek mestonok che kigobwat.
Psalms10:3 Amu ilosunegei kiptengekyot magetab muguleldanyi
Psalms10:4 Len kiptengekyot eng’ menotennyi
Psalms10:5 Mi nyalilda ortinwekyik kotugul; Mi barak kiruogutiguk
Psalms10:6 Len eng’ muguleldanyi
Psalms10:7 Nyiitat kutinnyi chubisiet ak ng’alset ak sastaet: Mitei ng’elyeptanyi mastaet ak yaitiet.
Psalms10:8 Tebe ole ung’egei eng’ nganasok: Barei che matinyei ng’ogi eng’ komoswek che ung’otin: Sapchin konyekyik inendet ne nyerat.
Psalms10:9 Saptoi eng’ ole ung’at ko u ng’etundo eng’ kebenennyi: Sapchin kibananok: Namei kibananiat
Psalms10:10 Ribisi
Psalms10:11 Len eng’ muguleldanyi
Psalms10:12 Ng’eet
Psalms10:13 Amu nee si kosas kiptengekyot Kamuktaindet
Psalms10:14 Koigeer inye; amu igeere mastaet ak tagisiet
Psalms10:15 Iri eutab kiptengekyot; Ak icheng’ tengektab ne ya
Psalms10:16 Laitoriat Jehovah ne bo koigeny ak koigeny: Kigobetyo bororiosiek eng’ emennyi.
Psalms10:17 Kiigas inye
Psalms10:18 Si ibesiechi ne matinyei kwanda ak ne kisastae
Psalms11:1 Amang’u Jehovah: Teptoi ano si olenji sobondanyu

Psalms11:6 Rong’jin kiptengeginik mestonok; Egu mat ak tuguk che laldos che u munyeik ak usonet ne beelsei
Psalms11:7 Amu bo imanda Jehovah; chamei imanda: Keerei che bo iman togennyi.

Psalms14:1 Kigomwa ne berber eng’ muguleldanyi
Psalms14:2 Keerei Jehovah eng’ kipsengwet werikab bik
Psalms14:3 Kigomasta tugul; kigosamisitu tugul: Mami ne yaei ne mie agot agenge.

Psalms15:1 Ng’o ne nyoljin kotebe gong’ung’ Jehovah! Ng’o ne tos meny tulweng’ung’ ne tilil?

Psalms15:3 Ne mang’ochei eng’ ng’elyeptanyi
Psalms15:4 Sasat eng’ tainnyi inendet ne esioot; Ago konyiti che iywei Jehovah. Ne mawalei kayosiennyi matiny kanyor nyalil;
Psalms15:5 Mabesendoi fedaisiekyik si kosige che siirtoot
Psalms16:1 Riba
Psalms16:2 Kaalenji Jehovah
Psalms16:3 Ago eng’ che tililen che mi ng’ony
Psalms16:4 Tesoksei nyalilwogikab ichek che wale kit age Jehovah: Matumdoi ane kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo korotik
Psalms16:5 Jehovah ko kebebertab borotennyu ak ne bo kikombennyu: Iname barbariandennyu.
Psalms16:6 Kagokwaiywa komoswek che miachen; Ee
Psalms16:7 Alosu Jehovah ne kiing’omita: Ee

Psalms16:9 Baibai muguleldanyu amu noto
Psalms16:10 Amu memetoi sobondanyu eng’ oldab meet; Amechamjini kogeer neng’ung’ ne tilil nunet.
Psalms16:11 Iborua oretab sobondo: Mi kagasetab ge taing’ung’ ne nyiitat; Mi eung’ung’ ne bo tai che kechamei agoi koigeny.
Psalms17:1 Kas imanda
Psalms17:2 Ingomong’ kiruogennyu eng’ ole imi; Ingogeer konyeguk tugul che nyolunotin.

Psalms17:4 Ago eng’ boisionikab bik

Psalms17:6 Kaguurin

Psalms18:2 Jehovah ruandennyu
Psalms18:3 Aguure Jehovah
Psalms18:4 Kialacha boroonikab meet

Psalms18:7 Kigirgiren ng’ony anyun
Psalms18:8 Kitogostae iyeto serunekyik
Psalms18:9 Kiim kipsengwetisiek agichek
Psalms18:10 Ak kilany kerubindet
Psalms18:11 Kiyai mesundeito koek ole ung’egei
Psalms18:12 Kibun bolikyik che tuuen kaluunet ne kimi tainnyi
Psalms18:13 Kitul Jehovah eng’ kipsengwetisiek
Psalms18:14 Ak kiiyokto kipchabonikyik
Psalms18:15 Kitook anyun kererusiekab beek
Psalms18:16 Kiiyok eng’ barak
Psalms18:17 Kisorua eng’ bunyondennyu ne kim
Psalms18:18 Kichea eng’ betutab nyalildanyu: Ago kiek Jehovah ne atiiege.
Psalms18:19 Kiimuta amanda awa ole baraa; Kisorua
Psalms18:20 Kigona Jehovah ko u imandanyu; Kigona ko u tililindab eunekyuk.
Psalms18:21 Amu kiarib ortinwekab Jehovah
Psalms18:22 Amu kimi tainnyu kiruogutikyik tugul
Psalms18:23 Kiagesunotge eng’ tainnyi
Psalms18:24 Kigona anyun Jehovah ko u imandanyu
Psalms18:25 Eng’ che tinyei rirenetab ge i bo rirenetab ge: Ak eng’ chito ne igesunotgei ibartoige ile igesunotge.
Psalms18:26 Eng’ che tililen ibartoige ile i tilil
Psalms18:27 Amu isoru che nyerotin; Ago iming’ini che mendos.
Psalms18:28 Amu inaami tainnyu: Ikweng’wa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu mesundeitanyu.
Psalms18:29 Amu aiyestoi luget eng’ inye; Ak eng’ Kamuktaindennyu atorombeni asiire irimet.
Psalms18:30 Igesunotgei oretab Kamuktaindet: Kigonaak ng’olyotab Jehovah; Inendet long’etab icheget tugul che imang’u.
Psalms18:31 Amu tos ng’o Kamuktaindet
Psalms18:32 Inendet Kamuktaindet ne ratwa kimnatet
Psalms18:33 Yaei inendet kelyekyuk koigei che bo kenyelet ne kotoy: Nama atonon eng’ komoswekyuk che sutotin.
Psalms18:34 Ineti eunekyuk koyai luget; Si kong’i eunekyuk kwanget ne bo sugunwet.
Psalms18:35 Kiigona long’etab yetuneng’ung’ agine: Ak kigotiia eung’ung’ ne bo tai
Psalms18:36 Kiibaraiywa kakwautikyuk
Psalms18:37 Aone bunikyuk
Psalms18:38 Atue kot koma komuchi kong’eetyo: Ibutyin ichek kelyekyuk kel.
Psalms18:39 Amu kiiratwa kimnatet ne bo luget: Kiiterterwa aboi che king’eetya.
Psalms18:40 Kiiwelel bunikyuk kotuktocha batai
Psalms18:41 Kiririo
Psalms18:42 Kiatonaton eng’ noto komengegitu koigei temburiek che ibei usonet: Kiawaste ko u ng’atatek che mi ortinwek.
Psalms18:43 Kiisorua eng’ boriosiekab bik; Kiigona aek metitab bororiosiek: Tun ota bik che tom anai.
Psalms18:44 Ye kas agobo ane
Psalms18:45 Begunoti toek kowandogei
Psalms18:46 Sobei Jehovah; ak iberurot ruandennyu; Ingotororit Kamuktaindet ne bo yetunennyu:
Psalms18:47 Kamuktaindet ne yaaktoiywa mugetut

Psalms18:49 Aweegun kongoi anyun

Psalms19:8 Lititen konetisiosiekab Jehovah

Psalms21:2 Kiigochi kit ne machei muguleldanyi

Psalms21:7 Amu imang’u laitoriat Jehovah
Psalms21:8 Nyoru eung’ung’ buniguk tugul; Nyoru eung’ung’ ne bo tai icheget che wechin.

Psalms22:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu

Psalms22:4 Kiimang’un kwanisiekyok: Kiimang’ ak kiisoru.

Psalms22:6 Ago ane ko a kutiet
Psalms22:7 Rorechina tugul che keera: Ak kochota eng’ kutit
Psalms22:8 Tiiege Jehovah; ingosor Jehovah inendet: Ingosor
Psalms22:9 Ago inye ne kiimoong’wa eng’ moetab kamennyu: Inye ne kiigona amang’ ye kiachuchuni.
Psalms22:10 Kigiwirja oldang’ung’
Psalms22:11 Amelooitena; amu negit nyalilda; Amu mami toretindet.

Psalms22:13 Kagoseng’eng’ja
Psalms22:14 Kagitumda ko u beek
Psalms22:15 Kagoyaam kimnatennyu ko u rokyet; Ak kanamgei ng’elyeptanyu ak tagilgiliet; Ak kaimutya temburiekab meet.
Psalms22:16 Amu kagoyiema sesenik: Ak kagogerja oret tuiyetab kiptengeginik; Katoor eunekyuk ak kelyekyuk.
Psalms22:17 Amuchi aiit kowekyuk tugul; Keera ak konjurura:
Psalms22:18 Pchechingei ngoroikyuk
Psalms22:19 Ago

Psalms22:21 Sorua eng’ kutitab ng’etundo; Ee
Psalms22:22 Amwachini kaineng’ung’ tupchosiekyuk: Alosun eng’ kwenutab tuiyet.
Psalms22:23 Okwek che ogonyiti Jehovah
Psalms22:24 Amu kima sas anan kowech nyalildab ne kinyalili; Ama ung’e togennyi inendet; Ago ye kingorirji
Psalms22:25 Inye ne alosu eng’ kwenutab tuiyet ne o: Agoitoi che kiaarorte eng’ taitab ichek che iywei inendet
Psalms22:26 Amisiei che taloen ak kobiyong’so: Ilosu Jehovah che cheng’ei inendet: Ingosopcho mugulelwekwok koigeny.
Psalms22:27 Ibwati Jehovah tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony ak koweekyigei inendet: Tun kutung’jinin inye ortinwek tugul che bo bororiosiek.
Psalms22:28 Amu bo Jehovah laitornatet: Ak inendet bounindetab bororiosiek.
Psalms22:29 Tun amisiei tugul che neriotin che bo ng’ony
Psalms22:30 Tun boisiechin inendet iyotet; Kiityin Kiptaiyat eng’ ibinwek.
Psalms22:31 Bwanei kobartoi imandanyi Eng’ bik che tun kisichei

Psalms23:2 Kona arue ole mi suswek che nyalilen; Indoiywa awa ole mi beekab kalyet.

Psalms23:4 Ee
Psalms23:5 Iitoi meset eng’ tainnyu eng’ ole mi bunikyuk: Kaiile metinnyu mwaita; kagonyi kikombennyu kot kong’irtagei.
Psalms23:6 Isubota iman mieindo ak chamnyet ne tala betusiek tugul kote asobe: Ak atebe gotab Jehovah koigeny.

Psalms25:4 Iborua ortinweguk
Psalms25:5 Indoiywa eng’ imaning’ung’
Psalms25:6 Ibwat
Psalms25:7 Amebwat tengekwogik che bo ming’inatennyu
Psalms25:8 Mie Jehovah ak ko bo iman: Eng’ noto anyun ineti inendet kiptengeginik eng’ oret.
Psalms25:9 Indochin che taloen eng’ kiruoget: Ak ineti che taloen orennyi.
Psalms25:10 Chamnyet ne tala ortinwek tugul che bo Jehovah ak ko bo imanit. Eng’ ichek che ribei kayomisennyi ak baornatosiekyik.
Psalms25:11 Nyoiywa kaat tengektanyu
Psalms25:12 Chi ng’o ne iywei Jehovah? Ineti Jehovah inendet eng’ or ne leweni.
Psalms25:13 Tebyei sobondanyi eng’ tunenatet; Ak konyaban iyotennyi emet.
Psalms25:14 Mitei ung’otietab Jehovah koboto ichek che iywei inendet; Ak koborji ichek arorutiennyi.
Psalms25:15 Tokyingei konyekyuk Jehovah kotugul; Amu inemu kelyekyuk eng’ mestet.
Psalms25:16 Iweekyage ak irirena; Amu ami anege ak anyalili.
Psalms25:17 Katesak nyalilwogik che bo muguleldanyu: Imaanda eng’ bichiinwekyuk.

Psalms26:1 Ibesiewa
Psalms26:2 Isiacha
Psalms26:3 Amu mi tainnyu chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala; Ak kiawendote imaning’ung’.
Psalms26:4 Tomo ketebi ak bik che iberberisiei; Ama kinamege ak ng’alik.
Psalms26:5 Aweche tuiyetab che yaei yaitio. Ama kitebye ak kiptengeginik.
Psalms26:6 Auni eunekyuk amu matiinya lelutio; Si amuut kaptisisieng’ung’
Psalms26:7 Si aamda kogasak kutitab kongoi. Ak ang’alale boisioniguk tugul che kikwong’e.

Psalms26:9 Ameistaa koboto kiptengeginik
Psalms26:10 Mi eunekwak kolgoliet
Psalms26:11 Ago ane
Psalms26:12 Tonone keldanyu ole mie: Alosu Jehovah eng’ tuiyosiek.
Psalms27:1 Jehovah lapkeiyennyu ak yetunennyu; tos aiywei ng’o? Jehovah kimnatetab sobondanyu; aiywei ng’o?

Psalms27:3 Agot ngo yiema luget
Psalms27:4 Kiamage kit agenge Jehovah
Psalms27:5 Amu ung’ena gonnyi eng’ betutab nyalilda: Ee

Psalms28:3 Amewirta koboto kiptengeginik
Psalms28:4 Igochi ko u boisionikwak
Psalms28:5 Amu mamage kiy boisionikab Jehovah
Psalms28:6 Iberurot Jehovah
Psalms28:7 Jehovah kimnatennyu ak long’ennyu; Kigomang’ muguleldanyu inendet; ak kigetoreta: Eng’ noto anyun igasegei muguleldanyu mising’; Ak alosu inendet eng’ tiendanyu.
Psalms28:8 Jehovah kimnatetab bikyik
Psalms28:9 Soru biguk
Psalms29:1 Ogochi Jehovah
Psalms29:2 Ogochi Jehovah teegisto ne nyoljin kainennyi; Ogutung’ji Jehovah eng’ telunatetab tililindo.
Psalms29:3 Mitei twegunetab Jehovah nyanjosiek: Tulei Kamuktaindetab teegisto
Psalms29:4 Tinyei kimnatet twegunetab Jehovah; Nyiitat etunatet twegunetab Jehovah.
Psalms29:5 Iriei twegunetab Jehovah taragonik; Ee
Psalms29:6 Igochin Jehovah ichek kotorombenso ko u moita; Ko u moitab soet
Psalms29:7 Betei twegunetab Jehovah laletab mat.
Psalms29:8 Itumdumi twegunetab Jehovah ong’atet: Itumdumi Jehovah ong’atetab Kades.
Psalms29:9 Igochin twegunetab Jehovah kenyelok koiiyo
Psalms29:10 Tebe Jehovah maranet ko u laitoriat; Ee
Psalms29:11 Igochin Jehovah bikyik kimnatet; Iberuri Jehovah bikyik eng’ kalyet.
Psalms30:1 Alosun
Psalms30:2 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms30:3 Ee Jehovah
Psalms30:4 Otienji Jehovah kalosunet
Psalms30:5 Tebyei neregekyik ne matia; Ichuldos chametab Jehovah eng’ sobetab chi: Mi rirek kemout
Psalms30:6 Ak kiale eng’ berurtanyu
Psalms30:7 Inye Jehovah ne kiigochi tulwennyu eng’ chameng’ung’ kotonon kogimit: Kiiuny togeng’ung’; ak kiaiyweisie.
Psalms30:8 Kiarirjin
Psalms30:9 Tinyei nee keljino korotikyuk
Psalms30:10 Kas
Psalms30:11 Kiiwal kateennyu koek ureriet; Kiireegunena kuniet
Psalms30:12 Si kobiit kolosun teegistanyu eng’ tiendo ama sisei. Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms31:1 Amang’un inye
Psalms31:2 Epcha it; sorua chokyi: Egu ruandet ne kim eng’ ane
Psalms31:3 Amu inye ko i ruandennyu ak irimennyu; Eng’ noto anyun indoiywa amu kaineng’ung’ ak imutata.
Psalms31:4 Imaanda eng’ mestet ne kigiriich agobo ane eng’ ung’ot; Amu inye ko i kimnatennyu.
Psalms31:5 Kande tamirmiriennyu eung’ung’: Kiitiacha
Psalms31:6 Aweche ichek che isubi atebosiek che manyolu che bo lembech: Ago amang’u Jehovah.
Psalms31:7 Agasige ak abaibaitu eng’ rireneng’ung’: Amu kiigeer nyalildanyu; Kiinai sobondanyu eng’ betusiekab nyalilda:
Psalms31:8 Ama ichamde konama eutab bunyot; Kiicham kotonone kelyekyuk ole bara.
Psalms31:9 Rirena
Psalms31:10 Kagowong’gei betusiekyuk amu arogenet
Psalms31:11 Kaegu ne itewerat amu bunikyuk tugul
Psalms31:12 Kigeutiena ko u chi ne kigome ne magibwati: Kiaige teret ne kigoiye.
Psalms31:13 Amu kiagas kataamsetab che chang’
Psalms31:14 Ago kiamang’un inye
Psalms31:15 Mitei betusiekyuk eung’ung’: Sorua eng’ eunekab bunikyuk
Psalms31:16 Ingokweny togeng’ung’ kiboitiondeng’ung’. Sorua eng’ chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala.
Psalms31:17 Ameng’alilan
Psalms31:18 Ingonamak kut kiplembechonik; Che itaami che bo imanda eng’ menotet
Psalms31:19 Ee
Psalms31:20 Iung’e ichek ole imi ole ung’at si maityi chaamsetab bik: Iunye ichek eng’ ung’ot eng’ emait si manyor bolatet ne bo ng’alek.
Psalms31:21 Iberurot Jehovah: Amu kigoborua chamnyennyi ne tala ne kikwong’e eng’ nganaset ne kim.
Psalms31:22 Ago kiamwa eng’ sartaet ale
Psalms31:23 Ee
Psalms31:24 Ogimegitu
Psalms32:1 Igasatgei ne kigenyochi kaat bistoennyi
Psalms32:2 Baibai mising’ chi ne maiityin Jehovah tengekto
Psalms32:3 Ye kiasise
Psalms32:4 Amu kichiila eung’ung’ bet ak kemoi: Kiyaam bortanyu ko u ye kabiit kemeut.
Psalms32:5 Kiamwaun chalwoktanyu
Psalms32:6 Ingosain chi age tugul ne tilil amu noto eng’ betut ne ta komuchi konyorun: Iman ye kagong’irtagei beek che chang’
Psalms32:7 Inye ko i oldanyu ole aung’ege; iriba inye si manyorua nyalilda; Iyiemena tienwogikab yetunet.
Psalms32:8 Atigonin ak anetin eng’ oret ne ibune: Ang’omitin ageerotin.
Psalms32:9 Amoige mbartanyit
Psalms32:10 Nyoru ng’woninwogik che chang’ kiptengekyot: Ago kimuute rirenetab ge ne imang’u Jehovah.
Psalms32:11 Ogasge Jehovah
Psalms33:1 Oboiboitu eng’ Jehovah
Psalms33:2 Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi eng’ ketubet: Otienji kalosunoik eng’ kibugandet ne tinyei inoik taman.
Psalms33:3 Otienji tiendo ne leel; Obut komie si kogasak tiendo.
Psalms33:4 Amu bo iman ng’olyotab Jehovah; Ak yaei boisionikyik tugul eng’ imanda.
Psalms33:5 Chamei imanda ak kiruoget: Nyiitat ng’ony chamnyet ne tala ne bo Jehovah.
Psalms33:6 Kigiyai kipsengwetisiek eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah; Ak chang’indanywa tugul eng’ kabusetab kutinnyi.
Psalms33:7 Iyumi beekab nyanjet koigei tulwo: Ak konore rirosiek chogenik.
Psalms33:8 Ingoiywei ng’ony tugul Jehovah: Ingobotanso bik tugul che menyei ng’ony
Psalms33:9 Amu kimwa
Psalms33:10 Walei Jehovah ruchinaikab bororiosiek koek buch: Yaei kabwatutikab bik koek che matilei kiy.
Psalms33:11 Tonondos ruchinaikab Jehovah koigeny
Psalms33:12 Iberurot bororiet ne Kamuktaindenywa Jehovah; Bik che kigolewen koek borotennyi.
Psalms33:13 Ing’ururi Jehovah eng’ kipsengwetisiek; Keerei inendet werik tugul che bo bik;
Psalms33:14 Keeroti eng’ ole menyei Bik tugul che menyei ng’ony;
Psalms33:15 Inendet ne yaei mugulelwekwak tugul
Psalms33:16 Mami laitoriat ne sorunegei chang’indab luget: Magisoru chito ne nyigan eng’ kimnatet ne o.
Psalms33:17 Kit buch mbartanyit eng’ katerteret: Ama soru chi eng’ kimnatennyi ne o.
Psalms33:18 Ogeero
Psalms33:19 Si kosor sobonwekwak eng’ meet
Psalms33:20 Kigogen sobonwekyok Jehovah: Inendet toretindennyo ak long’ennyo.
Psalms33:21 Amu boiboitu mugulelwekyok eng’ inendet
Psalms33:22 Ingotebenech rireneng’ung’
Psalms34:1 Alasu Jehovah kotugul: Tebe kutinnyu kalosunennyi kotugul.
Psalms34:2 Ilosugei sobondanyu eng’ Jehovah: Kasei noto che taloen
Psalms34:3 Ongilosu Jehovah
Psalms34:4 Kiacheng’ Jehovah ak kiwolwa
Psalms34:5 Kiinyal inendet
Psalms34:6 Kirir kimnyaliliandani
Psalms34:7 Menyei malaikaiyatab Jehovah komoswek tugul che bo icheget che iywei Jehovah
Psalms34:8 Ee
Psalms34:9 Ee
Psalms34:10 Rarjin kirugikab ng’etunyik
Psalms34:11 Obwa lagochu
Psalms34:12 Ng’o chi ne machei kosob keny
Psalms34:13 Rib ng’elyeptang’ung’ eng’ yaitio
Psalms34:14 Istoege yaitio
Psalms34:15 Tokyingei konyekab Jehovah che bo imanda
Psalms34:16 Kirindoi togetab Jehovah che yaei yaitio
Psalms34:17 Kiririo che bo iman
Psalms34:18 Negite Jehovah icheget che ilyotin mugulelwekwak
Psalms34:19 Chang’ nyalilwogikab ne bo imanda: Ago soru Jehovah inendet eng’ choto tugul.
Psalms34:20 Ribei kowekyik tugul: Mailei agot agenge.
Psalms34:21 Barei yaitwogik sogoranik: Ak kiruokyin che wechei ne bo imanda.
Psalms34:22 Itiachi Jehovah sobonwekab kiboitinikyik: Ak magiruokyin agot agenge ne imang’u inendet.
Psalms35:1 Obarege
Psalms35:2 Nam long’et ak torgochet
Psalms35:3 Ng’usu ng’otit
Psalms35:4 Ingolilanso ak kotewerogis che cheng’ei sobondanyu: Ingoweektagei let ak kotobtobenso icheget che cheng’ei koyaiywa ne ya.
Psalms35:5 Ingogergeit ak metetek che ibei usonet
Psalms35:6 Ingoimen orenywa ak kochabait
Psalms35:7 Amu kiuny mestenywa buch agobo ane eng’ keringet
Psalms35:8 Ingoche inendet ng’emisiet; Ak ingonam inendet mestet ne kiunyei: Ingororkyi oloto eng’ ng’emisionoto.
Psalms35:9 Ak kobaibait sobondanyu eng’ Jehovah: Ak baibaitu eng’ yetunennyi.
Psalms35:10 Len kowekyuk tugul
Psalms35:11 Ng’eetos baorinikab lembech; Ak teebena tuguk che mangen.
Psalms35:12 Yaakwa yaitiet eng’ ne mie
Psalms35:13 Ago ane
Psalms35:14 Kicham awendoti ko u ye choruennyu inendet anan werit ne kitupche: Kiang’uruge arir ko u ne iteei agobo kamet.
Psalms35:15 Ago kiboiboitu ye kiang’wali
Psalms35:16 Ko u sasik che yaachen eng’ igorwek
Psalms35:17 Ee Kiptaiyat
Psalms35:18 Aweegun kongoi eng’ tuiyet ne o: Alosun eng’ ole mi bik che chang’.
Psalms35:19 Amegochi koboiboitunena bunikyuk buch: Anan komismis konyek che wecha buch.
Psalms35:20 Amu mang’alali che bo kalyet: Ago cheng’ei ng’alekab ng’alset agobo ichek che taloen che bo emet.
Psalms35:21 Ee
Psalms35:22 Kaigeer inye
Psalms35:23 Ng’eet
Psalms35:24 Iruoksewa
Psalms35:25 Amegochi komwa eng’ mugulelwekwak
Psalms35:26 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso che boiboi ye kanyorua kiy ne ya: Ingilaakyi kalilanet ak tewernatet che ilosunenagei.
Psalms35:27 Ingotien eng’ boiboiyet ak kogasgei ichek che machei imandanyu: Ee
Psalms35:28 Ak kong’alale ng’elyeptanyu imandang’ung’
Psalms36:1 Mwaei yaitietab bistoindet eng’ muguleldanyu
Psalms36:2 Amu ilosugei inendet
Psalms36:3 Ng’alekab kutinnyi ko tengekto ak ng’alset: Ma komage kiy kong’omit anan koyai ne mie.
Psalms36:4 Ruchin tengekto eng’ itogunnyi; Indogei oret ne ma mie; Mawechei yaitiet.
Psalms36:5 Itei chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala kipsengwetisiek
Psalms36:6 Kergei imandang’ung’ ak tulonokab Kamuktaindet; Riret ne o kiruogutiguk: Ee Jehovah
Psalms36:7 Kararan ne tia chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala
Psalms36:8 Biyong’dos eng’ akwaiyetab gong’ung’; Ak igochini koee che bo ainetab boiboindang’ung’.
Psalms36:9 Amu mi oldang’ung’ kondab beekab sobon: Kigeere lapkeiyet eng’ lapkeiyeng’ung’.
Psalms36:10 Ingotepto chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ichek che ingenin; Ak ingotepto imandang’ung’ che bo iman eng’ mugulelwekwak.
Psalms36:11 Ameng’ koit ole ami kelyekab menotiot
Psalms36:12 Oloto ole kigobutyi che yaei tengekto: Kigetimda
Psalms37:1 Ameng’ konyitin che yaei yaitio
Psalms37:2 Amu matenitu ketil ko u suswek
Psalms37:3 Imang’u Jehovah
Psalms37:4 Baibaitune Jehovah; Ak kogonin somutikab muguleldang’ung’.
Psalms37:5 Igochi Jehovah kondochi bandang’ung’; Imang’u inendet
Psalms37:6 Yaei imandang’ung’ kotook ko u lapkeiyet
Psalms37:7 Imuuny eng’ Jehovah
Psalms37:8 Mete nereknatet
Psalms37:9 Amu kiwong’u che yaei yaitio: Ago namei emet che igeni Jehovah.
Psalms37:10 Amu tomo kitigin
Psalms37:11 Ago namei emet che taloen; Ak kogasgei eng’ kalyet ne o.
Psalms37:12 Chobei kiptengekyot yaitiet agobo ne bo imanda
Psalms37:13 Rorechin Kiptaiyat inendet: Amu keerei kole nyonei betunnyi.
Psalms37:14 Kang’us kiptengeginik rotokwak bo chok
Psalms37:15 Toorei rotokwak bo chok mugulelwekwak
Psalms37:16 Kaigai che ng’ering’ che tinyei ne bo imanda Kosiir chang’indab che bo kiptengeginik.
Psalms37:17 Amu ildos eunekab kiptengeginik: Ago tiiei Jehovah che bo imanda.
Psalms37:18 Ingen Jehovah betusiekab che igesunotgei: Ak bo koigeny borotenywa.
Psalms37:19 Manyoru kalilanet eng’ betusiek che yaachen: Ak kobiyong’so eng’ betusiekab rubet.
Psalms37:20 Ago lustos che ma bo iman
Psalms37:21 Chito ne ma bo iman kobesenisiei
Psalms37:22 Amu che kigoberur Jehovah
Psalms37:23 Chobei Jehovah ole bunoti chi; Ak baibaitu eng’ orennyi;
Psalms37:24 Agot ngo terteriot
Psalms37:25 Kia ming’in ak kaositu nguno
Psalms37:26 Boisie aiyebindo betut komugul
Psalms37:27 Itabanegei yaitio
Psalms37:28 Amu chamei Jehovah imanda
Psalms37:29 Namei emet che bo imanda
Psalms37:30 Ng’alali chi ne bo imanda eng’ ng’omnatet
Psalms37:31 Mitei muguleldanyi ng’atutietab Kamuktaindennyi; Maichabaitoi eng’ kakwautikyik.
Psalms37:32 Sapchin kiptengekyot chi ne bo imanda
Psalms37:33 Ago mametochin Jehovah inendet eutab kiptengekyot
Psalms37:34 Igen Jehovah
Psalms37:35 Kiageer kiptengekyot ne tinyei bounatet ne o
Psalms37:36 Ago kibun yoto chi
Psalms37:37 Rib chito ne igesunotgei
Psalms37:38 Ago kibarei bistoik kibagenge: Kagesunetab kiptengeginik ko ng’emisiet.
Psalms37:39 Ago bo Jehovah yetunetab che bo imanda: Inendet ko irimenywa eng’ betutab nyalilda.
Psalms37:40 Ak kotoreti Jehovah ichek
Psalms38:1 Amegera kong’
Psalms38:2 Amu kigomwoga kipchaboniguk
Psalms38:3 Ma kosobei bortanyu amu neregeguk; Ama komi kamuung’et kowekyuk amu tengektanyu.
Psalms38:4 Amu kagomaluucha tengekwogikyuk: Kagotemena ko u milet ne nyigis.
Psalms38:5 Kagosamisitu ng’otobosiekyuk ak kogonunio
Psalms38:6 Kaarigage ak ang’uruksei mising’; Ariroti bet komugul.
Psalms38:7 Amu nyiitat ng’wanindo suennyu; Ama kosobei bortanyu.
Psalms38:8 Kanyaratitu ak kagonyanya bortanyu; Koatigen amu nyalildab muguleldanyu.
Psalms38:9 Ee Kiptaiyat
Psalms38:10 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu
Psalms38:11 Tonondos eng’ ole loo che chama ak choronokyuk si marikyi miandanyu; Ak tonondos eng’ ole loo tilionutikyuk agichek.

Psalms39:2 Kinamak kutinnyu

Psalms39:5 Keero
Psalms39:6 Iman wendoti chi age tugul ko u uruet ne siirtoi: Iman iimegei bichoto buch: Iyumi tuguk

Psalms39:10 Iistoena bireng’ung’: Kaiwong’wa kweretab eung’ung’.
Psalms39:11 Ye itigoni chi eng’ keretab kong’ amu tengekto

Psalms39:13 Undaa
Psalms40:1 Kiagen Jehovah mising’; Ak kiepcha it
Psalms40:2 Kiganabwa kora among’une keringet ne kiywei
Psalms40:3 Ak kagonde kutinnyu tiendo ne leel
Psalms40:4 Baibai mising’ chito ne imang’u Jehovah
Psalms40:5 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms40:6 Kima ibaibaitune tiseiywot ak kagochinet; Kiiyat itikyuk: Kima imach kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinet ne bo tengekto.
Psalms40:7 Amwa anyun ale
Psalms40:8 Abaibai ayai mageng’ung’
Psalms40:9 Kiaamde imanda eng’ tuiyet ne o; Keero
Psalms40:10 Kimauny imandang’ung’ eng’ muguleldanyu; Kiabarte imandang’ung’ ak yetuneng’ung’: Kimaung’e chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ak imaning’ung’ tuiyet ne o.
Psalms40:11 Amemelela rirenosieguk che bo chamnyet
Psalms40:12 Amu kigoyiema yaitwogik che magimuchi kiit
Psalms40:13 Ee Jehovah
Psalms40:14 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso ko kaiyomogei Ichek che cheng’ei kobar sobondanyu: Ingolit olin ak kolilanso Che boiboi ye anyalili.
Psalms40:15 Ingoek bonon amu tewernatenywa Che lenjina
Psalms40:16 Ingogasgei ak koboiboitu tugul che cheng’in: Ingomwa tugul che chamei yetuneng’ung’ kotugul kole
Psalms40:17 Ago a ne nyalili
Psalms41:1 Baibai mising’ inendet ne ibwati che nyerotin: Soru Jehovah inendet eng’ betutab nyalilda.
Psalms41:2 Ribei Jehovah inendet
Psalms41:3 Tiie Jehovah inendet ye miani eng’ itogunnyi: Iitochini itogunnyi eng’ miandanyi.

Psalms41:5 Mwaitaena bunikyuk yaitio
Psalms41:6 Ak ngo nyo kogeera

Psalms41:8 Mwaei ichek kole
Psalms41:9 Ee
Psalms41:10 Ago rirena
Psalms41:11 Kaanai eng’ ni ale iboiboitunena
Psalms41:12 Ak itia eng’ kagesunatennyu bo ge
Psalms41:13 Ingitoror Jehovah
Psalms42:1 Ko u ye isyenyi teweretiot agobo kererusiekab beek
Psalms42:2 Amei sobondanyu melelda amu machei Kamuktaindet
Psalms42:3 Kaek beekyuk bo kong’ amitwogikyuk che bo bet ak kemoi
Psalms42:4 Abwati tuguchu
Psalms42:5 Amu nee si ing’uruge
Psalms42:6 Ee Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms42:7 Kuurei riret riret age eng’ cheetab beeguk che isururtoi: Kigomaluucha beeguk tugul che mildogei ak che somotitogei.
Psalms42:8 Ago ng’atei Jehovah bet chamnyennyi ne tala
Psalms42:9 Alenjini Kamuktaindet ne ruandennyu

Psalms42:11 Amu nee si ing’uruge
Psalms43:1 Ibesiewa ng’alekyuk
Psalms43:2 Amu i Kamuktaindet ne bo kimnatennyu; amu nee anyun si ibagakta? Amu nee si awa ariroti amu kanyaliletab bunyot?
Psalms43:3 Iyokte lapkeiyeng’ung’ ak imaning’ung’; ingondoiywa choto: Ingomuta agoi tulweng’ung’ ne tilil
Psalms43:4 Si awa anyun kaptisisietab Kamuktaindet
Psalms43:5 Amu nee si ing’uruge
Psalms44:1 Kigegas eng’ itikyok
Psalms44:2 Kole
Psalms44:3 Amu ma nam emet eng’ rotokwak bo chok
Psalms44:4 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms44:5 Kitoortoi bunikyok eng’ inye: Ak kitieche eng’ kaineng’ung’ che machei kong’eetyech.
Psalms44:6 Amu ma kwangennyu ne amang’u
Psalms44:7 Ago kiisoruech eng’ bunikyok
Psalms44:8 Kilosunege Kamuktaindet betut komugul
Psalms44:9 Ago kaibagaktech
Psalms44:10 Kegonech kemwee bunikyok: Ak kanyabanjigei che wechech tuguk che luulei.
Psalms44:11 Keyaech kegergeitu ak kechirek che kienyei; Ak kiiyestech kebe oldab bororiosiek.
Psalms44:12 Ialdoi biguk buch
Psalms44:13 Kegonech keegu che iteweri bikyok che bo kok
Psalms44:14 Kegonech keegu kalewenet eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek
Psalms44:15 Mi tainnyu tewernatennyu betut komugul
Psalms44:16 Amu kutitab inendet ne rosu ak kochubisiei; Amu bunyot ak ne yaaktoi mugetut.
Psalms44:17 Kabwanjech chuto tugul; ago tomo keutienen
Psalms44:18 Ama weekyingei let mugulelwekyok
Psalms44:19 Agot ye kiibirech mising’ eng’ oldab suik
Psalms44:20 Ngo kageutie kainetab Kamuktaindennyo
Psalms44:21 Ko tos macheng’ei Kamuktaindet nito? Amu ingen ung’otikab muguleldo.
Psalms44:22 Iman
Psalms44:23 Ee Kiptaiyat
Psalms44:24 Amu nee si iuny togeng’ung’
Psalms44:25 Amu kagong’urukso sobonwekyok kotokyigei temburiek: Kanamgei mootinwekyok ak ng’ony.
Psalms44:26 Ng’eet
Psalms45:1 Ing’irtogei tuguk che miach eng’ muguleldanyu; Amwaitoi tuguk che kiayai agobo laitoriat: Kergei ng’elyeptanyu ak ne sirisie sirindet ne ng’om.
Psalms45:2 Isiire werikab bik eng’ kororonindo; Kirong’jin kuting’ung’ mieindo: Eng’ noto anyun kigoberurin Kamuktaindet koigeny.
Psalms45:3 Ee
Psalms45:4 Ak iwendote eng’ etunateng’ung’ eng’ kaberuret
Psalms45:5 Ng’atiben kipchaboniguk; Ak kobutyin bik kelyeguk Eng’ mugulelwekab bunikab laitoriat;
Psalms45:6 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms45:7 Kiicham imanda
Psalms45:8 Ng’uu ngoroiguk tugul nyamdutiet ne bo tuguk che u igomoik
Psalms45:9 Mi tibikab laitorinik koboto chebiosok che konyitotin: Tononi osotiotab laitoriat eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai kolaachi tahabu ne bunu Opir.
Psalms45:10 Ee chebi
Psalms45:11 Ak kocham anyun laitoriat kororonindang’ung’; Amu inendet Kiptaiyandeng’ung’; ak igutung’jini.
Psalms45:12 Ak tun mi cheptab Turo
Psalms45:13 Tinyei cheptab laitoriat teegisto mising’ eng’ go: Kiginapchi ngoroikyik tahabu.
Psalms45:14 Kimutyin laitoriat kolaachi ngoroik che kiginde lelesta: Kimutu bergeinik che choronokyik che isubu inendet
Psalms45:15 Kimutu eng’ kagasetab ge ak boiboindo: Agoi koba gotab laitoriat orit.
Psalms45:16 Iyae weriguk koek bounik eng’ ng’ony komugul
Psalms45:17 Ak kolosun bik agoi koigeny ak koigeny eng’ noto.

Psalms68:12 Mweei laitorinikab lugosiek
Psalms68:13 Agot ngirue biusiekab kechirek
Psalms68:14 Ye kiiyesta Ne bo Kamuktaet laitorinik eng’ oloto
Psalms68:15 Tulwetab Kamuktaindet ko tulwetab Basan; Tinyei tulwetab Basan walisiek che koen.
Psalms68:16 Amu nee si koamak ng’etkong’
Psalms68:17 Karisiekab Kamuktaindet ko elfusiek tiptem
Psalms68:18 Kiitogoste barak
Psalms68:19 Iberurot Kiptaiyat
Psalms68:20 Kamuktaindet eng’ achek ko Kamuktaindet ne bo sorunoik; Bo JEHOVAH Kiptaiyat ortinwek che kechilile eng’ meet.
Psalms68:21 Ago tuei Kamuktaindet metowekab bunikyik
Psalms68:22 Kile Kiptaiyat
Psalms68:23 Si kobiit irooch keldang’ung’ korotik
Psalms68:24 Kigogeer ichek banweguk
Psalms68:25 Kiindo tienik
Psalms68:26 Olosu Kamuktaindet eng’ tuiyosiek
Psalms68:27 Mitei Benjamin ne ming’in
Psalms68:28 Kigong’at Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kimnateng’ung’: Igimit
Psalms68:29 Ibun laitorinik kagochinoik Amu hekalung’ung’ eng’ Jerusalem.
Psalms68:30 Ker kong’ tiondab timin ne mi mutwek
Psalms68:31 Tun mong’une bounik Misri; Iyogochin Etiopia eunekyik Kamuktaindet kochokyin.
Psalms68:32 Otienji Kamuktaindet
Psalms68:33 Inendet ne lanyei kipsengwetisiekab kipsengwetisiek
Psalms68:34 Ingobunji kimnatet Kamuktaindet: Mi telunatennyi Israel
Psalms68:35 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms69:1 Sorua
Psalms69:2 Karorokyi ng’atatiat ne loo
Psalms69:3 Koang’et eng’ rirekyuk; kagoyaam moktanyu: Kagoimenitu konyekyuk ye ta ageni Kamuktaindennyu.
Psalms69:4 Chang’ kosiir sumeekyuk che wecha buch; Kimen bunikyuk che mwaei lembech che machei kobara: Ak kiagoite choto che kima arebe chi.
Psalms69:5 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms69:6 Ee Kiptaiyat
Psalms69:7 Amu kiaegu ne kirosyin agobo inye: Kigotuch togennyu kalilanet.
Psalms69:8 Kiaegu too eng’ che kitupche
Psalms69:9 Amu kiama ng’etkondab gong’ung’; Ak kigobwanja rosyinetab icheget che rosyinin.
Psalms69:10 Ak ye kiarire
Psalms69:11 Ye kialaagoti kuniet
Psalms69:12 Ng’alali agobo ane che tebyei eng’ ormarich; Ak kiaegu tiendab kibogitinik.
Psalms69:13 Ago ane
Psalms69:14 Sorua eng’ ng’atatiat
Psalms69:15 Amengotucha mogochek
Psalms69:16 Wolwa Jehovah
Psalms69:17 Ak ameung’e togeng’ung’ kiboitiondeng’ung’; Chokyi wolwa
Psalms69:18 Rikyi sobondanyu
Psalms69:19 Ingen rosyinet ne kirosyina
Psalms69:20 Kogoiri muguleldanyu rosyinet; ak a rumot: Ak kiagen che tinyei rirenet
Psalms69:21 Kigona tuguk che ng’wonen koek amitwogik; Ak ye kiama melel konaga siki aee.
Psalms69:22 Ingoek mestet mesenywa ne mi tainywa; Ak ingoek mestet ye mi ichek eng’ kalyet.
Psalms69:23 Ingoimenitu konyekwak
Psalms69:24 Rong’ji ichek nyitateng’ung’
Psalms69:25 Ingoguber ole menyei; Amat komeny chi emaisiekwak.
Psalms69:26 Amu usei ichek inendet ne kiibir; Ak komwaoti agobo arogenetab ichek che kiiguoten.
Psalms69:27 Tesyi tengekto age tengektanywa: Ak amat kobwanji ichek imandang’ung’.
Psalms69:28 Ingibukto ichek eng’ bukuitab sobon
Psalms69:29 Ago a kibananiat ak atinye arogenet: Ingotorora yetuneng’ung’
Psalms69:30 Alosu kainetab Kamuktaindet eng’ tiendo
Psalms69:31 Ak kobaibai noto Jehovah kosiir eito
Psalms69:32 Kagogeer che taloen
Psalms69:33 Amu kasei Jehovah che bonondos
Psalms69:34 Ingolos inendet kipsengwet ak ng’ony
Psalms69:35 Amu soru Kamuktaindet Sion
Psalms69:36 Nyaboni agichek keswekab otwogikyik oloto; Ak komeny oloto ichek che chamei kainennyi.
Psalms70:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms70:2 Ingolilanso ak kotewerogis Che cheng’ei sobondanyu: Ingoweektagei let ak kotewerogis Che boiboi amu ng’wanindanyu.
Psalms70:3 Ingeweekta koba let amu tewernatenywa. Che len
Psalms70:4 Ingoboiboitu ichek tugul che cheng’in
Psalms70:5 Ago ane ko a banan ak matinye kiy; Chogu ole ami
Psalms71:1 Amang’un
Psalms71:2 Sorua eng’ imandang’ung’
Psalms71:3 Egu eng’ ane ruandet ne amenye
Psalms71:4 Kona achilil
Psalms71:5 Amu inye ne agenin
Psalms71:6 Kigitiia koboch ami mo: Inye ne kiimoong’wa eng’ moetab chebiosennyu ne kisicha: Neng’ung’ kalosunennyu kotugul.
Psalms71:7 A u kwong’utiet eng’ che chang’; Ago inye ko i ole amwechini ne kim.
Psalms71:8 Nyiiei kutinnyu kalosuneng’ung’
Psalms71:9 Amewirta ye tun kaaositu; Amebagakta ye kagobet kimnatennyu.
Psalms71:10 Amu ng’alalena bunikyuk; Ak iruochi ichek che sapchin sobondanyu
Psalms71:11 Len

Psalms71:13 Ingolilanso ak kobetyo che bunikab sobondanyu; Ingotuch ichek rosyinet ak tewernatet che cheng’ei koyaiywa ne ya.

Psalms72:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms72:2 Iruokyin biguk eng’ imanda
Psalms72:3 Ipchin tulonok biguk kalyet
Psalms72:4 Iruoksechin kibananokab bik
Psalms72:5 Iywein ichek kota komi asista
Psalms72:6 Chorugei inendet ko u ropta ne chorjingei maleliet: Ko u ropta ne inesyin ng’ony.
Psalms72:7 Eng’ betusiekyik konyoru ne bo imanda berurto; Ak chang’indab kalyet agoi ko ma komi arawet.
Psalms72:8 Laitorani inendet koboch nyanjet agoi nyanjet age
Psalms72:9 Ing’urukyin inendet ichek che menyei ong’atet; Ak komel temburiek bunikyik.
Psalms72:10 Ibu kagochinoik laitorinikab Tarsus ak che bo ngegusiek; Igoitoi kagochinoik laitorinikab Sheba ak Seba.
Psalms72:11 Ee
Psalms72:12 Amu soru ne nyalili ye karir; Ak kibananiat
Psalms72:13 Rire kibananiat ak ne nyalili
Psalms72:14 Itiachi sobonwekwak eng’ usisiet ak koromnatet; Ak bunjin kamanut korotikwak eng’ tainnyi:
Psalms72:15 Ak soptos ichek; ak kigochi inendet tahabu ne bo Sheba: Ak saei bik kotugul agobo inendet; Iberuri inendet betut komugul.
Psalms72:16 Ak tun biitu chang’indab bek eng’ ng’ony eng’ tulonok barak; Ak itumdumegei logoekyik ko u Lebanon: Ak tunendos ichek che bo nganaset ko u suswek che bo ng’ony.
Psalms72:17 Tebyei kainennyi koigeny; Tebyei kainennyi kota komi asista: Ak kiberuri bik eng’ inendet; Ak kuure bororiosiek tugul ne baibai.
Psalms72:18 Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindet
Psalms72:19 Ak iberurot kainennyi ne tinyei torornatet agoi koigeny; Ak ingonyi ng’ony komugul torornatennyi. Amen
Psalms72:20 Kagogesgei sautikab Daudi weritab Jesii.
Psalms73:1 Iman mie Kamuktaindet eng’ Israel
Psalms73:2 Ago eng’ ane
Psalms73:3 Amu kiama ng’etkong’ agobo che mendos
Psalms73:4 Amu manyoru ng’wanindo; Chamegei borwekwak
Psalms73:5 Matinyei icheget nyalilwogik ko u bik alak; Ama nyoru biret ko u bik alak.
Psalms73:6 Eng’ noto anyun u menotet sirimdo ne mi kaatwekwak; Katuch ichek koromnatet ko u ngoriet.
Psalms73:7 Ibwanotin konyekwak eng’ neratet: Tinyei tuguk che siirei che machei mugulelwekwak.
Psalms73:8 Chotisiei
Psalms73:9 Kigotoror kutuswekwak agobo kipsengwetisiek
Psalms73:10 Eng’ noto anyun
Psalms73:11 Ak kolen ichek
Psalms73:12 Ogeero
Psalms73:13 Iman kiatilil muguleldanyu buch
Psalms73:14 Amu kaanyoru biret eng’ betut komugul
Psalms73:15 Nda kigamwa ale ang’alali ko u ni
Psalms73:16 Ye kingacheng’ ole amuchi anaita nito
Psalms73:17 Agoi among’ji oldab Kamuktaindet ole tilil
Psalms73:18 Iman igochini kotebe ichek komoswek che chaboen: Ak iwirjini ichek ng’ony koba ng’emisiet.
Psalms73:19 Katepto ano kot kosib kong’emogis ichek ngunoto! Kagowong’gei eng’ kamuisosiek.
Psalms73:20 U karuotitoet ye kagos chito; Ko u noto
Psalms73:21 King’wanit muguleldanyu
Psalms73:22 Kia abusat
Psalms73:23 Agot nga u noto ami koboten kotugul: Kiinam eunnyu ne bo tai.
Psalms73:24 Inye ne indoiywa eng’ ruchineng’ung’
Psalms73:25 Ng’o ne atinye eng’ kipsengwet ne ma inye? Ama mi age ne amache eng’ ng’ony kosiirin.
Psalms73:26 Ichuchui bortanyu ak muguleldanyu: Ago Kamuktaindet kimnatetab muguleldanyu ak kebebertanyu koigeny.
Psalms73:27 Amu keero
Psalms73:28 Ago mie eng’ ane arikyi Kamuktaindet: Kiacham koek Kiptaiyat Jehovah ole amwechini
Psalms74:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms74:2 Ibwat tuiyeng’ung’ ne kiial keny
Psalms74:3 Iyogochi keldang’ung’ ole kigong’emak koigeny
Psalms74:4 Kogoborisenso buniguk eng’ kwenutab tuiyeng’ung’; Kigonde songolikwak koek kaborunoik.
Psalms74:5 Ki u ichek bik Che namjin barak aonok
Psalms74:6 Ago butei ichek nguno aonok ak kirisonok Boisiennyi tugul ne kagiwai.
Psalms74:7 Kigobeel oldang’ung’ ne tilil; Kigoyai ole menyei kaineng’ung’ kong’wanit agoi ng’ony.
Psalms74:8 Kile eng’ mugulelwekwak
Psalms74:9 Magigeere kaborunoikyok; Ma komi maotiondo; Ama mi kwenunnyo age tugul ne ingen kole tianitu.
Psalms74:10 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms74:11 Kalya si iweekte eung’ung’
Psalms74:12 Ago Kamuktaindet ko Laitoriandennyu koboch keny
Psalms74:13 Kiipchei inye nyanjet eng’ kimnateng’ung’: Kiiri metowekab cheluguinik eng’ beek.
Psalms74:14 Kiiri kotonogis metowekab tiong’ik che eechen che bo beek
Psalms74:15 Kiigerer kong’ikab beek ak ainosiek: Kiitenyi ainosiek che kirootei agoi.
Psalms74:16 Neng’ung’ betut
Psalms74:17 Kiipchei kiwotosiek tugul che bo ng’ony: Kiiyai kemeut ak iwot.
Psalms74:18 Ibwat nito
Psalms74:19 Ee
Psalms74:20 Ibwat kayomiset: Amu nyiitat komoswek che imenen che bo ng’ony
Psalms74:21 Amengoweek kolilananu ne tinyei usisiet; Ingolos kaineng’ung’ che nyalildos ak che matinyei kiy.
Psalms74:22 Ng’eet
Psalms74:23 Ameutie ng’alekab buniguk: Togostoi kotugul bolatetab icheget che ng’eetyinin.

Psalms75:2 Ye kanyoru boroindo ne chobot

Psalms77:1 Arirjini Kamuktaindet; Ee
Psalms77:2 Kiacheng’ Kiptaiyat eng’ betutab nyalildanyu: Kiaiite eunnyu kemoi
Psalms77:3 Abwati Kamuktaindet
Psalms77:4 Iname konyekyuk kogos: Aiimige kot ko mamuchi ang’alal.
Psalms77:5 Koabwat betusiek che bo keny. Kenyisiek che kigobunji keny mising’.
Psalms77:6 Abwati tiendanyu kemoi: Ang’alali ak muguleldanyu; Ak kogosiach tamirmiriennyu eng’ kagiiletab ge.
Psalms77:7 Tos toortoisiei Kiptaiyat agoi? Tos mata kobaibait kogeny?
Psalms77:8 Tos kigogesgei rirenennyi koigeny? Tos ma kosuldoi arorutiennyi koigeny?
Psalms77:9 Tos kigoutie Kamuktaindet rirenennyi? Anan kigoger neregekyik rirenennyi ne tala?
Psalms77:10 Ak kiale

Psalms77:16 Kigeerin beek
Psalms77:17 Kirong’ bolik beek; Kibiitune cheet barak: Ak kiiyesta kipchaboniguk.

Psalms78:1 Oepchi it ng’atutiennyu
Psalms78:2 Ayate kutinnyu eng’ kalewenet; Amwae ng’alek che ung’otin che bo keny:
Psalms78:3 Che kigegas ak kenai
Psalms78:4 Magiung’e choto lagokwak
Psalms78:5 Amu kiigimit baornatet eng’ Jakobo
Psalms78:6 Si konai choto ibinda ne biitu
Psalms78:7 Si konde kamang’unenywa eng’ Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:8 Ak si matun igei kwanisiekwak
Psalms78:9 Kiweektagei let lagokab Epraim eng’ betutab luget
Psalms78:10 Kima rib kayomisetab Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:11 Ak kiutie tugukyik che kiga yai
Psalms78:12 Kiyai inendet tuguk che bo kwong’et eng’ taitab kwanisiekwak
Psalms78:13 Kipcheune aeng’ nyanjet
Psalms78:14 Kiindochi eng’ boldet bet
Psalms78:15 Kitui ruandosiek eng’ ong’atet
Psalms78:16 Kiimong’une ruandet beek che rootei
Psalms78:17 Ago kites ichek koyachi inendet tengekto
Psalms78:18 Ak kitiem Kamuktaindet eng’ mugulelwekwak Eng’ sometab amitwogik eng’ kasenywa bo miat.
Psalms78:19 Ee
Psalms78:20 Ogeero
Psalms78:21 Kigas Jehovah anyun
Psalms78:22 Amu kima iyan bichoto Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:23 Ago king’at bolik eng’ barak
Psalms78:24 Ak kirong’ji mana si koam
Psalms78:25 Kiam bik amitwogikab che kimen: Kiiyokyi amitwogik kobiyong’so.
Psalms78:26 Kiigochi usonetab kong’asis kous eng’ kipsengwet: Ak kiindochi usonet ne bo murot ne bo tai eng’ kimnatennyi.
Psalms78:27 Kirong’ji ichek banyek che te temburiek
Psalms78:28 Ak kiigochi kobutyi kwenutab nganasenywa
Psalms78:29 Kiamis anyun
Psalms78:30 Ago kima igesgei magenywa
Psalms78:31 Konyonji eng’ yoto neregekab Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:32 Agot nganda kinyor choto tugul ko kita koyai tengekto
Psalms78:33 Kiiwong’ anyun betusiekwak kobetyo buch
Psalms78:34 Ye kingobar ichek
Psalms78:35 Ak kiibwat kole Kamuktaindet ko ruandenywa
Psalms78:36 Ago kiiberber inendet eng’ kutuswekwak
Psalms78:37 Amu kima ko lititen mugulelwekwak eng’ inendet
Psalms78:38 Ago kinyochi kaat tengektanywa amu ki nyiitat inendet rirenetab ge
Psalms78:39 Ak kiibwat kole
Psalms78:40 Ak kingelelji inendet konyil ata eng’ ong’atet
Psalms78:41 Ak kiweek kogeny kotiem Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:42 Ma ibwat eunnyi
Psalms78:43 Ko u ye kiyai kaborunoikyik eng’ Misri
Psalms78:44 Ak kiwal beekab ainosiekwak koek korotik
Psalms78:45 Kiiyokto kalyang’ik koba kwenunywa
Psalms78:46 Ak kiigochi koam tinapchet ruratenywa
Psalms78:47 King’eme koikab ropta sabibukwak
Psalms78:48 Ak kibire koiyat tukwak
Psalms78:49 Kiwirji ichek koromnatetab neregekyik
Psalms78:50 Kiyachi neregekyik oret; Ak kima rire sobonwekwak eng’ meet
Psalms78:51 Ak kibar taiywek tugul eng’ Misri
Psalms78:52 Ago kiindochi bikyik ko u kechirek
Psalms78:53 Kiindochi eng’ kalyet
Psalms78:54 Ak kiimut agoi koit kiwotetab oldanyi ole tilil
Psalms78:55 Kion bororiosiek eng’ tainywa
Psalms78:56 Ago kitiem ak kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’
Psalms78:57 Ak kiweektagei let
Psalms78:58 Kitach inendet kot konerech eng’ oldinwekwak che sutotin
Psalms78:59 Ye kingogas Kamuktaindet nito konerech
Psalms78:60 Ak kimeto anyun hekalut ne kimi Silo
Psalms78:61 Ak kiigoito kimnatennyi keluul
Psalms78:62 Kiigoito bikyik agichek kebare rotwetab chok; Ak kinerekyi borotennyi.
Psalms78:63 Kibar mat werikwak; Ama kitienji tibikwak tiendab katunisiet.
Psalms78:64 Kigibare tisiikwak rotwetab chok; Ak kima iteiyo mosogikwak.
Psalms78:65 King’eet anyun Kiptaiyat ko u ne karuei
Psalms78:66 Ak kibarat bunikyik koweektagei let: Ak kiigochi kolilanso agoi.
Psalms78:67 Ak kiesio emaitab Josep
Psalms78:68 Ago kilewen oretab Juda
Psalms78:69 Ak kiteech oldanyi ne tilil koigei ole sutot
Psalms78:70 Kilewen Daudi agine kiboitiondennyi
Psalms78:71 Ye kiisubu kechirek che aboen
Psalms78:72 Kibai anyun ichek ko u kagesunatetab ge ne bo muguleldanyi; Ak kiindochi eng’ utatietab eunekyik.

Psalms81:2 Otien tiendab kalosunet

Psalms81:4 Amu ng’atutiet nito eng’ Israel

Psalms81:6 Kiaistoe tigikyennyi milet: Kigiistoe eunekyik kitongok:
Psalms81:7 Kiiguurse eng’ nyalilda
Psalms81:8 Ogas
Psalms81:9 Amat kobiitunenen kanamwet ne too; Anan igutung’ji cheptalelit age tugul ne bo bororiosiek alak.
Psalms81:10 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’
Psalms81:11 Ago kima epchi it kutinnyu bikyuk; Ak kima ko magena kiy Israel.

Psalms81:13 Bwa
Psalms81:14 Ta kasib aterterji bunikwak

Psalms81:16 Kata bae ichek nganok che neriotin kosiir: Ak kata abaenen kumiat ne bunu ruandet kot ibiye.

Psalms88:9 Kagochuchuiso konyekyuk amu nyalilda: Aguurin betut age tugul
Psalms88:10 Tos iborji kwong’utik bik che kigobek? Tos ng’eetyo che kigobek si kolosun?

Psalms89:1 Atieni agobo rirenetab ge ne bo Jehovah agoi koigeny: Abortoi eng’ kutinnyu imandang’ung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul.

Psalms89:3 Kigiyomisge ak nenyu ne kialewen
Psalms89:4 Agimiti kesweguk koigeny
Psalms89:5 Ilosu kipsengwetisiek kwong’utiguk
Psalms89:6 Amu mi ng’o eng’ barak ne kirogendoe Jehovah? Tos mi ng’o eng’ werikab che kimen ne kergei ak Jehovah
Psalms89:7 Inendet Kamuktaindet ne kiywei mising’ eng’ tuiyetab che tililen
Psalms89:8 Ee Jehovah
Psalms89:9 Inye ne ibou wasetab ge ne bo nyanjet: Ye kang’eet mildaennyi bo ge igere kong’ kosis.
Psalms89:10 Kiituatui Rahab ko u ne kagebar. Kiiyeste buniguk eng’ eutab kimnateng’ung’.
Psalms89:11 Cheguk kipsengwetisiek
Psalms89:12 Kiitau iyai murot ne bo katam ak murot ne bo tai: Tiendos eng’ boiboiyet Tabor ak Hermon eng’ kaineng’ung’.
Psalms89:13 Itinye eut ne bo kamuktaet: Kim eung’ung’
Psalms89:14 Ole tebe ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo bounatet ko imanda ak kiruoget: Indoenen rirenetab ge ak imanit.
Psalms89:15 Boiboen bik che ingen tiendab boiboiyet: Bendote ichek lapkeiyetab togeng’ung’
Psalms89:16 Igasegei betut komugul eng’ kaineng’ung’: Ak kitorori ichek eng’ imandang’ung’.
Psalms89:17 Amu inye kororonindab kimnatenywa: Ak kitorori kuinennyo eng’ chameng’ung’.
Psalms89:18 Amu bo Jehovah long’ennyo; Ak bo Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel laitoriandennyo.
Psalms89:19 Kiing’alalji anyun cheguk che tililen eng’ ng’ang’utik
Psalms89:20 Kianyoru Daudi kiboitiondennyu; Kiaiile inendet mwaitanyu ne tilil:
Psalms89:21 Ne tun kimitu eunnyu eng’ inendet; Igimiti agine eunnyu inendet.
Psalms89:22 Maimuchi bunyot koyachi inendet kiy ne ya; Anan konyalil weritab yaitiet inendet.
Psalms89:23 Atuatui bunikyik eng’ tainnyi
Psalms89:24 Ak tebyei koboto inendet imandanyu ak rirenennyu; Ak tororitu kuinennyi eng’ kainennyu.
Psalms89:25 Agochini eunnyi koboi nyanjet
Psalms89:26 Rirjina kolen
Psalms89:27 Ayae inendet koek taitanyu
Psalms89:28 Agonorjini rirenennyu koigeny
Psalms89:29 Achamjini iyotennyi agine kotebi koigeny. Ak ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet ko u betusiekab kipsengwet.
Psalms89:30 Ago ngo bagakta lagokyik ng’atutiennyu
Psalms89:31 Ngot kobut konetisiosiekyuk
Psalms89:32 Atigone anyun bistoenywa kirokto
Psalms89:33 Ago maistoi rirenennyu kot kogestagei eng’ inendet
Psalms89:34 Mabute kayomisennyu
Psalms89:35 Kiayosie konyil agenge eng’ tililindanyu; Ale
Psalms89:36 Tebyei iyotennyi koigeny
Psalms89:37 Kigimiti koigeny ko u arawet
Psalms89:38 Ago kiitimde ak iesie
Psalms89:39 Kiisas kayomiset ne bo kiboitiondeng’ung’: Ak kiing’wanit nariennyi ne bo laitornatet kot iwirji ng’ony.
Psalms89:40 Kiibut ng’otonokyik tugul; Kiiluul irimoikyik.
Psalms89:41 Rebe inendet tugukyik bik che siirtoi: Kigoek ne itewerat eng’ bikab kokwennyi.
Psalms89:42 Kiitoror eutab tai ne bo bunikyik; Kiigochi bunikyik tugul koboiboitu.
Psalms89:43 Ee
Psalms89:44 Kiiunde tililindanyi kogesgei. Ak kiiwirji ng’ony ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet.
Psalms89:45 Kiitil kong’ering’itu betusiekab ming’inatennyi; Kiilaakyi inendet tewernatet.

Psalms101:5 Ang’eme age tugul ne chaamoti chitab kokwennyu eng’ ung’ot: Mamuitochini menotio

Psalms102:4 Kagebir muguleldanyu ko u suswek

Psalms102:10 Amu koromindab neregeguk ak nyitateng’ung’; Amu kiiganaba ak iwirta.
