Psalms102:12 Ago inye
Psalms102:13 Ing’eete
Psalms102:14 Amu boiboitu kiboitiniguk eng’ koikyik
Psalms102:15 Koiywei anyun bororiosiek kainetab Jehovah
Psalms102:16 Amu kagoteech Jehovah Sion
Psalms102:17 Kagogas saetab kibananiat
Psalms102:18 Kisirjin nito ibinda ne biitu: Ak kolos Jehovah bik che tun kiyaei.
Psalms102:19 Amu kigogeer inendet olito bo ng’ony eng’ tororindab oldanyi ne tilil; Kigeer Jehovah ng’ony eng’ kipsengwet;
Psalms102:20 Si kogas tigenetab kimonjororiot; Si kotiach ichek che kigechopchi meet;
Psalms102:21 Si kobarta bik kainetab Jehovah eng’ Sion
Psalms102:22 Ye kagoyumgei bik
Psalms102:23 Kiyai kimnatennyu konyalul eng’ oret; Kitil betusiekyuk konwagitu.
Psalms102:24 Kiale
Psalms102:25 Kiiyai ole tonone ng’ony keny; Ak boisietab euneguk kipsengwetisiek.
Psalms102:26 Betos ichek; ago itebye inye agoi: Ee
Psalms102:27 Ago i u noto inye agoi
Psalms102:28 Tebyei lagokab kiboitiniguk
Psalms103:1 Ilosu Jehovah
Psalms103:2 Ilosu Jehovah
Psalms103:3 Inendet ne nyoun kaat tengekwogiguk tugul; Ak kosoobin eng’ mianwogiguk tugul;
Psalms103:4 Inendet ne itiachi sobondang’ung’ eng’ oldab ng’emisiet; Ak kolaagun kutwetab chamnyet ne tala ak rirenosiek:
Psalms103:5 Ne konin tuguk che miach kot koyamin; Si kiweegun ming’inateng’ung’ ko u kipsichit.
Psalms103:6 Yaei Jehovah boisionikab imanda
Psalms103:7 Kiiborji Musa ortinwekyik
Psalms103:8 Nyiitat Jehovah rirenet ak ko bo mieindo
Psalms103:9 Magerei kong’ kotugul; Ama konori neregekyik agoi.
Psalms103:10 Tom koyaiywech ko u ye nyoljin chalwogikyok
Psalms103:11 Amu ko u ye toror kipsengwet eng’ ng’ony
Psalms103:12 Ko u ye loochin kong’asis ak cherongo
Psalms103:13 Ko u ye rire kwanda lagokyik
Psalms103:14 Amu ingen borwekyok; Ibwati inendet kole
Psalms103:15 Ago chito
Psalms103:16 Amu bunei yoto usonet
Psalms103:17 Ago tebyei rirenetab Jehovah koigeny ak koigeny eng’ ichek che iywei inendet
Psalms103:18 Eng’ ichek che ribei kayomisennyi
Psalms103:19 Kigogimit Jehovah ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet eng’ kipsengwetisiek; Ak bou laitornatennyi tugul:
Psalms103:20 Olosu Jehovah
Psalms103:21 Olosu Jehovah
Psalms103:22 Olosu Jehovah
Psalms104:1 Ilosu Jehovah
Psalms104:2 Inye ne itugege lapkeiyet ko u ngoriet; Iitoi kipsengwetisiek ko u ngoriet;
Psalms104:3 Inendet ne indoi beek kimurtoinikab gorikyik; Inendet ne yaei bolik koek karinnyi; Ne wendote kebebaikab usonet:
Psalms104:4 Inendet ne yaei usonaik koek chechik che kiyoktoi; Ne yaei kiboitinikyik koek mat ne liblibeni:
Psalms104:5 Ne kilumda lumeiywek che tonone ng’ony
Psalms104:6 Kiilaakyi ng’ony riret ko u ngoriet; Kiimaluuchi beek tulonok.
Psalms104:7 Kimwei eng’ kereng’ung’ bo kong’
Psalms104:8 Kitogosta tulonok
Psalms104:9 Kiinde kiwotet si masiir; Si maweek kogeny kotuch ng’ony.
Psalms104:10 Iyoktoi kong’ikab beek korootyi atebwosiek; Chokchogoni eng’ tulonok:
Psalms104:11 Inagi beek tiondo age tugul ne bo timin; Imise sigirokab timin meleldanywa.
Psalms104:12 Menyei taritik che bo barak ngegusiekwak
Psalms104:13 Ibise beek tulonok eng’ gorikyik: Biyonyi ng’ony logoekab boisioniguk.
Psalms104:14 Ibiityin tuga suswek
Psalms104:15 Ak divaik che iboiboi muguleldab chito
Psalms104:16 Biyonyi ketikab Jehovah; Taragonikab Lebanon
Psalms104:17 Ole teechei kesonokwak taritik: Gotab cheptalamiat biribiriet.
Psalms104:18 Bo tulonok che koen ng’ororek che bo timin; Ruandosiek ko ole mwechin kenerok.
Psalms104:19 Kiinde arawet si kobor betusiek: Ingen asista ole roroktae.
Psalms104:20 Iyae mesundeito
Psalms104:21 Boriseni neranikab ng’etunyik ye mi logenywa
Psalms104:22 Ye chor asista komwei
Psalms104:23 Wendi chito boisiennyi Kwo kobois agoi koimen.
Psalms104:24 Ee Jehovah
Psalms104:25 Mi olin nyanjet
Psalms104:26 Bendi oloto melisiek; Mi oloto tiondo ne o ne bo beek
Psalms104:27 Igenin chuto tugul
Psalms104:28 Iyumi che igochini; Ing’anye eung’ung’
Psalms104:29 Ye keuny togeng’ung’
Psalms104:30 Iyoktoi tamirmirieng’ung’
Psalms104:31 Ingoteb tororindab Jehovah koigeny; Ingobaibait Jehovah eng’ boisionikyik:
Psalms104:32 Botani ng’ony ye kageer inendet; Twaei tulonok
Psalms104:33 Atienjini Jehovah kote asobe: Atienjini Kamuktaindennyu kalosunet kota asobe.
Psalms104:34 Ingoanyinyitu kabwatutikyuk eng’ inendet: Agasige eng’ Jehovah.
Psalms104:35 Ingiwong’ kiptengeginik eng’ ng’ony
Psalms105:1 Oweekyi kongoi Jehovah
Psalms105:2 Otienji
Psalms105:3 Olosunege kainennyi ne tilil: Ingoboiboitu mugulelwekab ichek che cheng’ei Jehovah.
Psalms105:4 Ocheng’ Jehovah ak kimnatennyi; Ocheng’ togennyi kotugul.
Psalms105:5 Obwat boisionikyik che kikwong’e che kigoyai; Kwong’utikyik
Psalms105:6 Ee okwek
Psalms105:7 Inendet ko Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo
Psalms105:8 Ibwati kayomisennyi koigeny
Psalms105:9 Ne kiyai koboto Abraham
Psalms105:10 Ak kiigimityi Jakobo noto koek ng’atutiet
Psalms105:11 Kolenji
Psalms105:12 Ye kita ko ng’ering’ bichoto; Ee
Psalms105:13 Ak kibendat kobunot bororiet age agoi bororiet age; Kibun bounatet age koba oldab bik alak.
Psalms105:14 Kima chamji chi koyachi ichek ne ya; Ee
Psalms105:15 Kole
Psalms105:16 Ak kiguur rubet konyonji emet; Ak kitil amitwogik tugul kong’ering’itu.
Psalms105:17 Kiiyokto chi kondoe ichek; Kigialda Josep koek otwogin:
Psalms105:18 Kiigochi ng’wanindo kelyekyik eng’ mugurek; Kiginde inendet oldab karik:
Psalms105:19 Agoi betut ne kiisulda ng’olyondennyi; Kitiem ng’olyotab Jehovah inendet.
Psalms105:20 Kiiyokto laitoriat kitiach inendet; Agot bounindetab bik
Psalms105:21 Kiinde inendet koek kiptaiyatab gonnyi
Psalms105:22 Si korat bounikyik ko u ye machei
Psalms105:23 Kinyo Israel agine Misri; Ak kiuchi Jakobo emetab Ham.
Psalms105:24 Ak kites bikyik mising’. Ak kogimit ichek kosiir bunikwak.
Psalms105:25 Kiwal mugulelwekwak kowech bikyik
Psalms105:26 Kiiyokto Musa kiboitiondennyi
Psalms105:27 Kiinde kwenunywa kaborunoikyik
Psalms105:28 Kiiyokto mesundeito
Psalms105:29 Kiwal beekwak koek korotik
Psalms105:30 Kiyom mororochik emenywa
Psalms105:31 Kitwek
Psalms105:32 Kiigochi koik ne kata ropta
Psalms105:33 Kibir ketikwak agichek che bo sabibuk ak mogoonikwak; Ak kiiri ketikab kiwotosiekwak.
Psalms105:34 Kitwek
Psalms105:35 Ak kiam sogot age tugul ne bo emenywa
Psalms105:36 Kibar agichek taiywek tugul eng’ emenywa
Psalms105:37 Ak kiimong’ ichek koibei feda ak tahabu: Ak kima komi chi ne nyalulat agot agenge eng’ bororiosiekyik.
Psalms105:38 Kibaibait Misri ye kingoba; Amu kiga konyor kaiyweisiet amu ichek.
Psalms105:39 Kiito boldet koek ne tuge; Ak mat si kogochi bichoto lapkeiyet kemoi.
Psalms105:40 Kisom
Psalms105:41 Kiyat ruandet
Psalms105:42 Amu kiibwat ng’olyondennyi ne tilil
Psalms105:43 Ak kiimut bikyik komong’ eng’ boiboiyet
Psalms105:44 Ak kiigochi ichek emotinwekab bororiosiek; Ak kinam boisionikab bik kobunji:
Psalms105:45 Si kobiit korib konetisiosiekyik
Psalms106:1 Olosu Jehovah
Psalms106:2 Ng’o ne imuchi komwa boisionikab kamuktaet
Psalms106:3 Boiboen ichek che ribei kiruoget
Psalms106:4 Ibwata
Psalms106:5 Si ageer borotetab cheguk che kigelewen
Psalms106:6 Kigechalwogense koboto kwanisiekyok
Psalms106:7 Ma iguiyo kwanisiekyok kwong’utiguk eng’ Misri; Ma ibwat chang’indab rirenosieguk; Ago kiingelelso eng’ ye negit nyanjet
Psalms106:8 Ago kisor ichek amu kainennyi
Psalms106:9 Kiger kong’ Nyanjet ne Birir agine
Psalms106:10 Ak kisor ichek eng’ eutab inendet ne kiwechei ichek
Psalms106:11 Ak kiimaluuch beek bunikwak: Ma ng’et agot agenge eng’ ichek.
Psalms106:12 Kiiyan anyun ng’alekyik; Kitien kalosunennyi.
Psalms106:13 Ne matianit koutie boisionikyik; Ma ingen ng’olyondennyi:
Psalms106:14 Ago kinyor maget ne o eng’ ong’atet
Psalms106:15 Ak kiigochi kit ne kisom; Ago kiigochi kosogityi sobonwekwak.
Psalms106:16 Kiam ng’etkong’ ichek agobo Musa agine eng’ nganaset
Psalms106:17 Kiyatak ng’ony ak kilugui Datan
Psalms106:18 Ak kilal mat eng’ kweanenywa; Ak kibeel mat bichoto yaachen.
Psalms106:19 Kiitany itondab moita eng’ Horeb
Psalms106:20 Kiwal anyun telunatenywa Kogergeit ak eito ne ageti.
Psalms106:21 Kiiutie Kamuktaindet
Psalms106:22 Boisionik che kikwong’e eng’ emetab Ham
Psalms106:23 Kimwa anyun kole ng’emei inendet ichek amu noto
Psalms106:24 Ee
Psalms106:25 Ago kiing’unyng’ung’so eng’ emaisiekwak
Psalms106:26 Kinamji barak anyun eunnyi amu noto
Psalms106:27 Ak koiyestaat iyotenywa koyom bororiosiek
Psalms106:28 Kinamgei ichek ak Baal-peor
Psalms106:29 Kitach inendet kot konerech amu boisionikwak; Ak king’eet koroito eng’ kwenunywa.
Psalms106:30 Kitonon anyun Pineas
Psalms106:31 Ak kigiit noto koek imanda eng’ inendet
Psalms106:32 Kitach inendet kogeny eng’ beekab Meriba
Psalms106:33 Amu kiingelelji tamirmiriennyi
Psalms106:34 Ma bar bororiosiek
Psalms106:35 Ago kiburuigei koboto bororiosiek
Psalms106:36 Ak kiot kanamonikwak; Che kiek mestet eng’ ichek:
Psalms106:37 Ee
Psalms106:38 Ak kitumda korotik che matinyei tengek
Psalms106:39 Kimuruonitu anyun eng’ boisionikwak
Psalms106:40 Kilalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah eng’ bikyik. Ak kiwech borotennyi.
Psalms106:41 Ak kiigoito ichek koba eunekab bororiosiek; Ak kiboi ichek che kiwechei.
Psalms106:42 Kiinyalil ichek bunikwak
Psalms106:43 Kisor ichek konyil che chang’; Ago kiek ngelelik eng’ ng’olyondenywa
Psalms106:44 Ago kigeer bichiindanywa
Psalms106:45 Ak kiibwat kayomisennyi ne kigayomisyi ichek
Psalms106:46 Kiigochi bik tugul che kiluulei ichek
Psalms106:47 Soruech
Psalms106:48 Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel
Psalms107:1 Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms107:2 Ingomwa ko u noto che kigotiach Jehovah
Psalms107:3 Ak kiiyum komong’ eng’ emotinwek
Psalms107:4 Kiombenoti eng’ ong’atet eng’ turguito; Kimanyor nganaset ne menyei.
Psalms107:5 Kiamoti rubet ak melelda
Psalms107:6 Kirirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa
Psalms107:7 Kiindochi agine eng’ oret ne litit
Psalms107:8 Ee
Psalms107:9 Amu igochin kobiyo sobondo ne tinyei emosto
Psalms107:10 Ichek che kitebe mesundeito ak uruetab meet
Psalms107:11 Amu kiingelelji ng’alekab Kamuktaindet
Psalms107:12 Eng’ noto anyun kiiming’in Jehovah mugulelwekwak eng’ boisiet ne kibirtoegei; Kiibutyo
Psalms107:13 Kirirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa
Psalms107:14 Kiimoong’une mesundeito ak uruetab meet
Psalms107:15 Ee
Psalms107:16 Amu kibut kereiywekab sugunonik che bo ormarichok
Psalms107:17 Kinyalili che berber amu bistoenywa
Psalms107:18 Wechei sobonwekwak amit age tugul; Ak rikyin kurgotikab meet.
Psalms107:19 Korirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa
Psalms107:20 Iyoktoi ng’olyondennyi
Psalms107:21 Ee
Psalms107:22 Ak ingogoito korosekab kongoi
Psalms107:23 Ichek che chorjingei nyanjet eng’ melisiek
Psalms107:24 Keerei chuto boisionikab Jehovah
Psalms107:25 Amu ng’atei
Psalms107:26 Togostoi kipsengwet
Psalms107:27 Iyongooti ak koterterioti ko u chi ne kagobogit
Psalms107:28 Korirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa
Psalms107:29 Igochin anyun kipchurjuriet kosis
Psalms107:30 Koboiboitu anyun amu kagomuung’do; Ak komut agoi koit ole machei komuung’e.
Psalms107:31 Ee
Psalms107:32 Ingolos ichek inendet eng’ tuiyetab bik
Psalms107:33 Walei ainosiek koek ong’atet
Psalms107:34 Walei emet ne iyiot koek ong’atetab munyuk
Psalms107:35 Walei ong’atet koek tamboiyot
Psalms107:36 Ak igochin komeny oloto che amei rubet
Psalms107:37 Ak kogol mbarenik
Psalms107:38 Iberuri anyun ichek
Psalms107:39 Ak kogeny
Psalms107:40 Renyei bounik
Psalms107:41 Ago itorori ne banani si manyor usisiet
Psalms107:42 Keerei che bo iman ak kogasgei; Ak konamak kut tengekto tugul.
Psalms107:43 Epchin it ne ng’om tuguchuto
Psalms108:1 Igiilotgei muguleldanyu
Psalms108:2 Ong’eetye
Psalms108:3 Aweegun kongoi
Psalms108:4 Amu o rireneng’ung’ kosiir kipsengwetisiek
Psalms108:5 Tororitu
Psalms108:6 Si kesor chamaniguk
Psalms108:7 Kigotwek Kamuktaindet eng’ tililindanyi; agasige: Apchee Sekem
Psalms108:8 Nenyu Gilead; ak nenyu Manase; Epraim agine kimnatetab metinnyu; Juda ko siarinnyu ne bo laitornatet.
Psalms108:9 Moab ko teret ne aunege; Awirjini kweiyondennyu Edom: Aorene Pilistia.
Psalms108:10 Imuta ng’o awo nganaset ne ng’otat? Indoiywa ng’o agoi Edom?
Psalms108:11 Tos ma iwirtech inye
Psalms108:12 Konech toretet kegirindae bunyot: Amu matilei kiy toretetab chi.
Psalms108:13 Kiyae tuguk che kimen eng’ Kamuktaindet: Amu inendet ne tiekyin ng’ony bunikyok.
Psalms109:1 Amesis
Psalms109:2 Amu kaiseng’eng’ja kiptengekyot ak ng’alindet: Kagong’alalwa eng’ kutit ne bo lembech.
Psalms109:3 Koyiemena ng’alek che bo wechet
Psalms109:4 Kiachame ago kiek bunikyuk: Ago asae.
Psalms109:5 Ak kiigeerua ne ya eng’ ne mie
Psalms109:6 Inde chito ne ya koboi inendet: Ak ingotonone bunyot eunnyi ne bo tai.
Psalms109:7 Ingonam inendet tengekto ye kiruokyin; Ak ingowalak saennyi koek tengekto.
Psalms109:8 Ingong’ering’itu betusiekyik; Ak ingonam age boisiennyi.
Psalms109:9 Ingoek lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda
Psalms109:10 Ingoombenot lagokyik
Psalms109:11 Ingorebe yaagindet tuguk tugul che tinyei; Ak ingoluul toek boisiennyi.
Psalms109:12 Amat kobiit chi ne rire inendet; Amat kobiit ne rire lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda.
Psalms109:13 Ingogesgei iyotennyi; Ak ingobugok kainenywa eng’ ibinda ne isubu.
Psalms109:14 Ingobwatak tengektab kwanisiekyik eng’ Jehovah; Amat kibukto tengektab kamet.
Psalms109:15 Ingotebe taitab Jehovah kotugul
Psalms109:16 Amu ma ibwat kobarta rirenet
Psalms109:17 Ee
Psalms109:18 Kiilaach chubisiet ko u ngoriennyi
Psalms109:19 Ingoek eng’ inendet ngoriet ne tugegei
Psalms109:20 Nito melektab bunikyuk ne bunu Jehovah
Psalms109:21 Ago boisie inye agobo ane
Psalms109:22 Amu a ne nyalili
Psalms109:23 Kiabetite ko u uruet ne betei: Kionota ko u chereng’endet.
Psalms109:24 Nyalulyotin kutung’oikyuk amu karugutetab ge; Ak kagosagit bortanyu.
Psalms109:25 Kaegu ne kirasyin eng’ ichek: Ye keera
Psalms109:26 Toreta
Psalms109:27 Si kobiit konai kole nito ko eung’ung’; Ak konai kole
Psalms109:28 Ingochubis
Psalms109:29 Ingilaakyi tewernatet bunikyuk
Psalms109:30 Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi ne o eng’ kutinnyu; Ee
Psalms109:31 Amu tonone eutab tai ne bo inendet ne banani
Psalms110:1 Kalenji Jehovah kiptaiyandennyu
Psalms110:2 Iyoktoi Jehovah siarit ne bo kimnateng’ung’ eng’ Sion: Bou inye eng’ kwenutab buniguk.
Psalms110:3 Chamdogei biguk eng’ betutab kimnateng’ung’: Eng’ kororonindab tililindo
Psalms110:4 Kigoyosio Jehovah
Psalms110:5 Kiptaiyat ne mi eung’ung’ ne bo tai. Ko tun tiechatiechi laitorinik eng’ betutab neregekyik.
Psalms110:6 Iruochi eng’ bororiosiek
Psalms110:7 Eei inendet beekab ainet eng’ oret: Yotei met anyun amu noto.
Psalms111:1 Olosu Jehovah. Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi eng’ muguleldanyu komugul
Psalms111:2 Eechen boisionikab Jehovah
Psalms111:3 Boisiennyi ko teegisto ak etunatet: Ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny.
Psalms111:4 Kiyai Jehovah boisionikyik che kikwong’e
Psalms111:5 Kigogochi amitwogik che iywei inendet: Ibwati kayomisennyi kotugul.
Psalms111:6 Kigoborji bikyik kimnatetab boisionikyik
Psalms111:7 Boisionikab eunekyik ko imanda ak kiruoget; Isuldootin konetisiosiekyik tugul.
Psalms111:8 Kigigimit kotebi koigeny ak koigeny
Psalms111:9 Kigoyokyi bikyik katiaget; Kigong’at kayomisennyi kobunji koigeny: Tilil kainennyi ne kiywei.
Psalms111:10 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko taunetab ng’omnatet; Tinyei kaguiyet ne mie ichek tugul che yaei choto: Tebyei koigeny kalosunennyi.
Psalms112:1 Olosu Jehovah. Baibai chi ne iywei Jehovah
Psalms112:2 Tun kimitu iyotennyi eng’ ng’ony: Kiberuri oretab che bo iman.
Psalms112:3 Mi gonnyi magornatet ak berurwogik: Ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny.
Psalms112:4 Ng’eetei lapkeiyet eng’ mesundeito koluuchin che bo iman: Tinyei mieindo
Psalms112:5 Mie eng’ chito ne boisiei eng’ mieindo ak kobesendoi; Chobei ng’alekyik eng’ imanda.
Psalms112:6 Amu magoi kiisto; Kibwati ne bo iman koigeny.
Psalms112:7 Maiywei inendet ng’alek che yaachen: Igiilotgei muguleldanyi
Psalms112:8 Lumdaat muguleldanyi
Psalms112:9 Kigoseerseer
Psalms112:10 Keerei kiptengekyot
Psalms113:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu
Psalms113:2 Iberurot kainetab Jehovah Koboch nguno agoi koigeny.
Psalms113:3 Koboch ko kachor asis agoi kororokto Nyolu kilos kainetab Jehovah.
Psalms113:4 Toror Jehovah eng’ bororiosiek tugul. Ak toror etunatennyi kosiir kipsengwetisiek.
Psalms113:5 Ng’o ne kergei ak Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo
Psalms113:6 Ne iming’inegei si kogeer Che mi kipsengwet ak che mi ng’ony?
Psalms113:7 Ing’eeti kibananiat komong’une temburiek
Psalms113:8 Si kogochi kotebi ak bounik
Psalms113:9 Igochin ne son korib got
Psalms114:1 Ye kingomanda Israel eng’ Misri
Psalms114:2 Koek Juda oldanyi ne tilil
Psalms114:3 Kigeer nyanjet inendet
Psalms114:4 Kitorombenso tulonok ko u mengichik
Psalms114:5 Amin nee
Psalms114:6 Okwek tulonok
Psalms114:7 Botan
Psalms114:8 Ne kiwal ruandet koek tamboiyot
Psalms115:1 Amegonech
Psalms115:2 Amu nee si komwa bororiosiek kole
Psalms115:3 Ago mitei Kamuktaindennyo kipsengwetisiek: Kigoyai inendet kiy age tugul ne kimachei.
Psalms115:4 Bo feda ak tahabu kanamonikwak
Psalms115:5 Tinyei kutuswek
Psalms115:6 Tinyei itik
Psalms115:7 Tinyei eunek
Psalms115:8 Kergeitu icheget che kiyaei
Psalms115:9 Ee Israel
Psalms115:10 Ee gotab Aron
Psalms115:11 Okwek che oiywei Jehovah
Psalms115:12 Kigobwatech Jehovah; iberurech: Iberuri gotab Israel; Iberuri gotab Aron.
Psalms115:13 Iberuri ichek che iywei Jehovah
Psalms115:14 Ingoyabak Jehovah obaraitu
Psalms115:15 Oberurotin eng’ Jehovah
Psalms115:16 Kipsengwetisiek ko kipsengwetisiek che bo Jehovah. Ago kiigochi ng’ony werikab bik.
Psalms115:17 Mailosu Jehovah che kigobek
Psalms115:18 Ago kilosu achek Jehovah Koboch nguno agoi koigeny. Olosu Jehovah.
Psalms116:1 Achame Jehovah
Psalms116:2 Amu kigoepcha it
Psalms116:3 Kiyiema boroonikab meet
Psalms116:4 Kiaguur anyun kainetab Jehovah; Ee Jehovah
Psalms116:5 Bo mieindo Jehovah ak ko bo imanda; Ee
Psalms116:6 Ribei Jehovah abusanik: Kiginyerata
Psalms116:7 Iweekyige kamuung’eng’ung’
Psalms116:8 Amu kiisoru sobondanyu eng’ meet
Psalms116:9 Awendote taitab Jehovah Eng’ emotinwekab che soptos.
Psalms116:10 Ayani
Psalms116:11 Kiamwa eng’ sartaet
Psalms116:12 Aweekyini nee Jehovah Amu konunoikyik tugul che kona?
Psalms116:13 Aname kikombetab yetunet
Psalms116:14 Agochini Jehovah che kiaarorji
Psalms116:15 Kit ne siirtoot mising’ eng’ kororonindo eng’ taitab Jehovah Ko meetab chechik che tililen.
Psalms116:16 Ee Jehovah
Psalms116:17 Agonin korosiot ne bo kongoi
Psalms116:18 Agochini Jehovah choto che kiaarorji
Psalms116:19 Eng’ seremusiekab gotab Jehovah
Psalms117:1 Olosu Jehovah
Psalms117:2 Amu o rirenennyi eng’ achek; Ak tebyei koigeny imandab Jehovah. Olosu Jehovah.
Psalms118:1 Omwachi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms118:2 Ingomwa Israel kole
Psalms118:3 Ingomwa gotab Aron nguno kole
Psalms118:4 Ingomwa nguno ichek che iywei Jehovah
Psalms118:5 Kiaguur Jehovah eng’ bichiindanyu: Kiwolwa Jehovah ak kondea ole baraa.
Psalms118:6 Mi Jehovah komostanyu; maiyweisiei: Imuchi koyaiywa nee chi?
Psalms118:7 Mi Jehovah komostanyu eng’ kwenutab che toreta: Ageere anyun amu noto magennyu eng’ che wecha.
Psalms118:8 Kaigai kimang’u Jehovah Kosiir kimang’u chi.
Psalms118:9 Kaigai kimang’u Jehovah Kosiir kimang’u bounik.
Psalms118:10 Kiyiema bororiosiek tugul: Ang’eetoi ichek eng’ kainetab Jehovah.
Psalms118:11 Kiyiema; ee
Psalms118:12 Kiyiema ko u segemik; kibek ko u matab katok; Ang’eetoi ichek eng’ kainetab Jehovah.
Psalms118:13 Kiiokta inye ile abut: Ago kitoreta Jehovah.
Psalms118:14 Kimnatennyu ak tiendanyu Jehovah; Ak kagoek yetunennyu.
Psalms118:15 Mitei emaisiekab che bo iman kutitab boiboindo ak yetunet: Yaei eutab tai ne bo Jehovah tuguk che kimen.
Psalms118:16 Itororot eutab tai ne bo Jehovah: Yaei eutab tai ne bo Jehovah tuguk che kimen.
Psalms118:17 Mamee
Psalms118:18 Kibira Jehovah mising’: Ago ma igoita ame.
Psalms118:19 Oyatwa kurgotikab imanda: Awa orit
Psalms118:20 Ni ko kurgetab Jehovah; Bunei che bo iman.
Psalms118:21 Amwaun kongoi
Psalms118:22 Koita ne kiesio teegik
Psalms118:23 Bunu Jehovah ng’olyondoni; Kwong’utiet noto eng’ konyekyok.
Psalms118:24 Ni betut ne kiyai Jehovah; Kiboiboi ak kigasege noto.
Psalms118:25 Ee Jehovah
Psalms118:26 Iberurot inendet ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Jehovah: Kagiberurok achek eng’ kaberuret ne bunu gotab Jehovah.
Psalms118:27 Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet
Psalms118:28 I Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms118:29 Omwachi kongoi Jehovah; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms119:1 Boiboen che igesunotgei eng’ oret
Psalms119:2 Boiboen ichek che ribei baornatosiekyik
Psalms119:3 Ee
Psalms119:4 Kiing’at konetisiosieguk
Psalms119:5 Ee
Psalms119:6 Si malilan
Psalms119:7 Amwaun kongoi eng’ lititindab muguleldo
Psalms119:8 Asubi ng’atutiguk: Ee
Psalms119:9 Itilile nee mureno orennyi? Kogas it
Psalms119:10 Kiacheng’in eng’ muguleldanyu tugul: Amegona alooitune ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:11 Kaagonore muguleldanyu ng’olyondeng’ung’. Si mayaun tengek.
Psalms119:12 Iberurot inye
Psalms119:13 Kiamwaite eng’ kutinnyu Kiruogutik tugul che bunu kuting’ung’.
Psalms119:14 Kiabaibaitune oretab baornatosieguk
Psalms119:15 Abwatati konetisiosieguk
Psalms119:16 Abaibaitu eng’ ng’atutiguk; Mautie ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:17 Yachi kiboitiondeng’ung’ eng’ aiyebindo
Psalms119:18 Yat konyekyuk
Psalms119:19 A kiprutoiyo eng’ ng’ony: Ameung’ena ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:20 Tonoksei sobondanyu amu emosto Ne tinyei kotugul eng’ kiruogutiguk.
Psalms119:21 Kiiger kong’ menotik che chubotin
Psalms119:22 Istoena chotisiet ak sasisiet; Amu kiarib baornatosieguk.
Psalms119:23 Kitebi bounik kochaama: Ago kiibwati kiboitiondeng’ung’ ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:24 Boiboiyennyu baornatosieguk Ak che ing’omita.
Psalms119:25 Namegei sobondanyu ak temburiek: Isooba inye ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:26 Kiaboru ortinwekyuk
Psalms119:27 Kona aguiyo oretab konetisiosieguk: Si abwatat boisioniguk che kikwong’e.
Psalms119:28 Chootei sobondanyu amu arogenet: Igimita ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:29 Istoena oretab lembech: Ak igona ng’atutieng’ung’ eng’ mieindo.
Psalms119:30 Kialewen oretab imanda: Kiande tainnyu kiruogutiguk.
Psalms119:31 Kinamege ak baornatosieguk: Ee Jehovah
Psalms119:32 Alabati eng’ oretab ng’atutiguk Ye ibaroi muguleldanyu.
Psalms119:33 Ineta
Psalms119:34 Kona naet
Psalms119:35 Kona abun oretab ng’atutiguk; Amu abaibaitune choto.
Psalms119:36 Tokyi muguleldanyu baornatosieguk
Psalms119:37 Iweech konyekyuk si mageer che ma nyolu. Ak isooba eng’ ortinweguk.
Psalms119:38 Igimityi kiboitiondeng’ung’ ne iywein
Psalms119:39 Istoena rosyinet ne aiywei: Amu miachen kiruogutiguk.
Psalms119:40 Keero
Psalms119:41 Ingobwanja rirenosieguk
Psalms119:42 Si anyor kit ne awoljini inendet ne rosyina; Amu amang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:43 Amereb ng’olyondeng’ung’ ne bo iman eng’ kutinnyu; Amu kiamang’u kiruogutiguk.
Psalms119:44 Si asub ng’atutiguk kotugul Koigeny ak koigeny.
Psalms119:45 Si awendot eng’ kaiyesetab ge; Amu kiacheng’ konetisiosieguk.
Psalms119:46 Amwaitoi agine baornatosieguk eng’ taitab laitorinik
Psalms119:47 Ak abaibaitu eng’ ng’atutiguk
Psalms119:48 Anamjini barak eunekyuk atokyini ng’atutiguk
Psalms119:49 Ibwat ng’olyot ne kiiarorji kiboitiondeng’ung’
Psalms119:50 Nito ko kagaigaennyu eng’ nyalildanyu: Amu kigosooba ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:51 Kigororecha mising’ menotik: Ago tom amaste amete ng’atutieng’ung’.
Psalms119:52 Kiabwat kiruogutiguk che bo keny
Psalms119:53 Kianerech mising’ kot
Psalms119:54 Kigoek ng’atutiguk tienwogikyuk Eng’ gotab rutoitanyu.
Psalms119:55 Kiabwat kaineng’ung’ kemoi
Psalms119:56 Kiatinye ko u noto
Psalms119:57 Jehovah kebebertanyu: Kiamwa ale asubi ng’aleguk.
Psalms119:58 Kiarirji chamnyeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldanyu komugul: Rirena ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:59 Kiabwat ortinwekyuk
Psalms119:60 Kiachokyi
Psalms119:61 Kigoratarata boroonikab kiptengeginik; Ago tom autie ng’atutieng’ung’.
Psalms119:62 Ang’eete kemoi kwen amwaun kongoi Amu kiruogutiguk che bo iman.
Psalms119:63 A choruetab ichek tugul che iywein
Psalms119:64 Nyiitat ng’ony rireneng’ung’
Psalms119:65 Kiiyachi ne mie kiboitiondeng’ung’
Psalms119:66 Ineta kiruoget ne mie ak naet; Amu kiayan ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:67 Kiabetote ye kitom kinyalila; Ago nguno asubi ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:68 I mie
Psalms119:69 Kogochob menotik lembechek agobo ane: Aribe konetisiosieguk eng’ muguleldanyu komugul.
Psalms119:70 Katimogis mugulelwekwak eng’ akwaindo; Ago abaibaitune ng’atutieng’ung’
Psalms119:71 Mie eng’ ane amu kiginyalila; Si kobiit anetge ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:72 Kaigai eng’ ane ng’atutietab kuting’ung’ Kosiir elfusiekab tahabu ak feda.
Psalms119:73 Kiyaa euneguk ak kogimita: Kona naet
Psalms119:74 Keera che iywein ak koboiboitu; Amu kiamang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:75 Angen
Psalms119:76 Asain ale ingoek chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ne igaigaa
Psalms119:77 Ingobwanja rirenosieguk che bo chamnyet
Psalms119:78 Ingolilanso menotik; amu kigonyalila buch: Ago abwatati konetisiosieguk.
Psalms119:79 Ingoweekyagei che iywein
Psalms119:80 Ingoek ne igesunotgei muguleldanyu eng’ ng’atutiguk; Si malilan.
Psalms119:81 Tanui sobondanyu amu machei yetuneng’ung’: Ago amang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:82 Kaimenitu konyekyuk agobo ng’olyondeng’ung’
Psalms119:83 Amu kaige sotet ne kiginde iyeto; Ago mautie ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:84 Egu ata betusiekab kiboitiondeng’ung’? Iruokyini au che onota?
Psalms119:85 Kigobal keringonik menotik agobo ane
Psalms119:86 Bo iman ng’atutiguk tugul: Onota buch; toreta inye.
Psalms119:87 Ki negit kowong’wa eng’ ng’ony; Ago kima abagakte konetisiosieguk.
Psalms119:88 Isooba eng’ chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala; Si asub anyun baornatetab kuting’ung’.
Psalms119:89 Ee Jehovah
Psalms119:90 Yamu ibinwek tugul imandang’ung’: Kiigimit inye ng’ony
Psalms119:91 Tebyei ichek agoi kora ko u kiruogutiguk; Amu otwogiguk tuguk tugul.
Psalms119:92 Nda kimaek boiboiyennyu ng’atutieng’ung’
Psalms119:93 Magoi autie konetisiosieguk; Amu kiisooba inye eng’ choto.
Psalms119:94 A neng’ung’
Psalms119:95 Kiigena kiptengeginik
Psalms119:96 Kiageer ole bochitu kagesunatetab ge tugul; Ago baraa ng’atutieng’ung’.
Psalms119:97 Tia chamnyet ne achame ng’atutieng’ung’! Noto kabwatennyu betut komugul.
Psalms119:98 Ing’omita ng’atutiguk asiir bunikyuk: Amu mi kobota kotugul.
Psalms119:99 Atinye naet ne o asiir konetikyuk tugul; Amu kabwatennyu baornatosieguk.
Psalms119:100 Aguitosi asiir boisiek
Psalms119:101 Kiaistoe kelyekyuk oret age tugul ne ya
Psalms119:102 Tom amaste abagakte kiruogutiguk; Amu kiineta inye.
Psalms119:103 Anyinyen ne tia ng’aleguk ye achamjami! Ee
Psalms119:104 Anyoru naet eng’ konetisiosieguk: Noto aweche oret age tugul ne bo lembech.
Psalms119:105 Taitab kelyekyuk ng’olyondeng’ung’
Psalms119:106 Kiayosie
Psalms119:107 Kinyalila mising’: Isooba
Psalms119:108 Asain ale taach konunoikab kutinnyu
Psalms119:109 Aiboti sobondanyu eng’ eunnyu kotugul; Ago mautie ng’atutieng’ung’.
Psalms119:110 Kagochob mestet kiptengeginik agobo ane; Ago mamaste abagakte konetisiosieguk.
Psalms119:111 Koanam baornatosieguk koek borotet ne bo koigeny; Amu choto boiboiyetab muguleldanyu.
Psalms119:112 Kiatokyi muguleldanyu ale ayai ng’atutiguk
Psalms119:113 Aweche ichek che bo kabwatutik aeng’; Ago achame ng’atutieng’ung’.
Psalms119:114 I ole aung’egei ak ko i long’ennyu: Amang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:115 Oba eng’ ole ami
Psalms119:116 Tiia ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’
Psalms119:117 Tiia
Psalms119:118 Kiiwal koek buch ichek tugul che istoegei ng’atutiguk; Amu lembech ng’alsenywa.
Psalms119:119 Iistoi ko u busagariek kiptengeginik tugul che bo ng’ony: Achame anyun baornatosieguk amu noto.
Psalms119:120 Botani bortanyu amu aiywein; Ak aiywei kiruogutiguk.
Psalms119:121 Kiayai kiruoget ak imanda: Amebagakya usikyuk.
Psalms119:122 Egu ne tononjin kiboitiondeng’ung’ eng’ ne mie: Amat kousa menotik.
Psalms119:123 Kaimenitu konyekyuk amu machei yetuneng’ung’

Psalms119:125 A kiboitiondeng’ung’

Psalms119:127 Achame anyun ng’atutiguk amu noto Kosiir tahabu
Psalms119:128 Eng’ noto anyun aiiti ale lititen konetisiosieguk tugul agobo tuguk tugul; Ak aweche oret age tugul ne bo lembech.
Psalms119:129 Bo kwong’et baornatosieguk: Ribei anyun sobondanyu ichek amu noto.
Psalms119:130 Igoitoi lapkeiyet ng’ang’utietab ng’aleguk; Ing’omiti ne abusat.
Psalms119:131 Kiaseng’eng’e
Psalms119:132 Iweekyage
Psalms119:133 Igimit tiegutikyuk eng’ ng’olyondeng’ung’; Amat koboiywa tengek age tugul.
Psalms119:134 Itiacha eng’ sastaet ne bo chi: Si asub anyun konetisiosieguk.
Psalms119:135 Ikweng’e kiboitiondeng’ung’ togeng’ung’; Ak ineta ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:136 Isururune beek che chang’ konyekyuk
Psalms119:137 I bo iman

Psalms119:139 Kigowong’wa kagiilennyu bo ge
Psalms119:140 Tilil mising’ ng’olyondeng’ung’; Chamei kiboitiondeng’ung’ anyun amu noto.
Psalms119:141 A nyerat

Psalms119:144 Bo iman baornatosieguk agoi: Kona naet
Psalms119:145 Kiaguurse eng’ muguleldanyu komugul; wolwa
Psalms119:146 Kiaguurin; sorua anyun

Psalms119:148 Asib agosu kota ko kemoi
Psalms119:149 Kas kutinnyu ko u chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala: Isooba

Psalms119:151 I negit inye
Psalms119:152 Kianai koboch keny eng’ baornatosieguk
Psalms119:153 Ibwat nyalildanyu
Psalms119:154 Ibesiewa ng’alekyuk
Psalms119:155 Loo yetunet eng’ kiptengeginik; Amu macheng’ei ichek ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:156 Eechen rirenosieguk che bo chamnyet
Psalms119:157 Chang’ usikyuk ak bunikyuk; Ago tom amaste eng’ baornatosieguk.
Psalms119:158 Kiageer che ng’alsei
Psalms119:159 Ibwat ole achamdoi konetisiosieguk: Isooba ko u chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala
Psalms119:160 Bo iman ng’aleguk tugul ko kagiyomo; Ak tebyei koigeny kiruogeng’ung’ age tugul ne bo iman.
Psalms119:161 Kigoonata buch bounik; Ago iywei muguleldanyu ng’aleguk.
Psalms119:162 Abaibai eng’ ng’olyondeng’ung’
Psalms119:163 Aweche ak asase lembechek; Ago achame ng’atutieng’ung’.
Psalms119:164 Alosun konyil tisab eng’ betut
Psalms119:165 Tinyei kalyet ne o che chamei ng’atutieng’ung’; Ama mi kiy ne inachi ichek.
Psalms119:166 Kiamang’u yetuneng’ung’
Psalms119:167 Kigosub sobondanyu baornatosieguk; Ak achame mising’ kot.
Psalms119:168 Kiasub konetisiosieguk ak baornatosieguk; Amu mi taing’ung’ ortinwekyuk tugul.
Psalms119:169 Ingorikyi taing’ung’ rirekyuk ee Jehovah: Kona naet ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:170 Ingonyo taing’ung’ somennyu: Sorua ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’.
Psalms119:171 Ingotwek kutinnyu komwa kalosunet; Amu ineta ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:172 Ingotien ng’elyeptanyu agobo ng’olyondeng’ung’; Amu bo iman ng’atutiguk.
Psalms119:173 Ingochobok eung’ung’ kotoreta; Amu kialewen konetisiosieguk.

Psalms119:175 Ingosob sobondanyu

Psalms132:10 Amewelel togetab neng’ung’ ne kiil Amu kiboitiondeng’ung’ Daudi.
Psalms132:11 Kiiyosiechi Jehovah Daudi eng’ iman; Maweechegei let: Andoi ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo bounateng’ung’ age ne bunu bortang’ung’.
Psalms132:12 Ngot korib lagoguk arorutiennyu Ak bounatennyu ne tun aneti
Psalms132:13 Amu kigolewen Jehovah Sion; Kimakyigei koek ole tebe.
Psalms132:14 Yuto ko komosta ole amuung’e koigeny: Atebe yuto; amu kiamach.
Psalms132:15 Aberuri mising’ amitwogikyik: Abae kibananokyik amitwogik kot kobiyong’so.
Psalms132:16 Alaakyini tisiikyik agichek yetunet: Ak kogasgei eng’ kutit ne o eng’ boiboindo chechik che tililen.
Psalms132:17 Ayae eng’ oloto kuinetab Daudi kong’at: Kiachopchi nenyu ne kigiil
Psalms132:18 Alaakyini bunikyik kalilanet: Ago tuneni eng’ inendet mariennyi ne bo bounatet.

Psalms133:2 Kergei ak mwaita ne kararan mising’ ne kiile metit
Psalms133:3 U rewotab Hermon

Psalms134:2 Otokyi eunekwok oldab tililindo

Psalms135:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu kainetab Jehovah; Olosu inendet
Psalms135:2 Okwek che kotonondosi eng’ gotab Jehovah
Psalms135:3 Olosu Jehovah; amu mie Jehovah: Otienji kainennyi kalosunoik; amu kararan.
Psalms135:4 Amu kigolewenjigei Jehovah Jakobo
Psalms135:5 Amu angen ale o Jehovah. Ak siirei Kiptaiyandennyo cheptalelisiek tugul.
Psalms135:6 Kigoyai Jehovah kit age tugul ne chamei
Psalms135:7 Igochin kibungweret kotogosta kong’eete tabanwekab ng’ony; Yachin ropta kalyelosiek; Imoong’u usonet eng’ konoraikyik.
Psalms135:8 Ne kibar taiywek che bo Misri
Psalms135:9 Kiiyokto kaborunoik ak kwong’utik koba kwenung’ung’
Psalms135:10 Ne kibir bororiosiek che chang’
Psalms135:11 Sihon laitoriatab Amorik
Psalms135:12 Ak kiigoito emenywa koek borotet
Psalms135:13 Tebyei kaineng’ung’ koigeny
Psalms135:14 Amu iruoksechin Jehovah bikyik

Psalms135:21 Iberurot Jehovah eng’ Sion
Psalms136:1 Ogochi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:2 Ee ogochi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne bou cheptalelisiek: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:3 Ee ogochi kongoi Kiptaiyatab kiptainik: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:4 Inendet ne yaei inegei kwong’utik che eechen: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:5 Inendet ne kiyai kipsengwetisiek eng’ ng’omnatet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:6 Inendet ne kiito ng’onyut eng’ beek barak: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:7 Inendet ne kiyai lapkeiyosiek che eechen: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:8 Asista ne bou eng’ betut: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:9 Arawek ak kecheik che bou eng’ kemoi: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:10 Inendet ne kibir Misri eng’ taiywekwak: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:11 Ak kiimut Israel komong’ eng’ kwenunywa: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:12 Eng’ eut ne kim ak eng’ eut ne chuulat: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:13 Inendet ne kipcheune aeng’ Nyanjet ne Birir: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:14 Ak kiigochi Israel kobun kwenunnyi: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:15 Ago kitoorji Parao ak lugosiekyik Nyanjet ne Birir: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:16 Inendet ne kiindochi bikyik kobun ong’atet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:17 Inendet ne kibir laitorinik che eechen: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:18 Ak kibar laitorinik che toogunotin: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:19 Sihon laitoriatab Amorik: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:20 Ak Og laitoriat Basan: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:21 Ak kiigoito emenywa koek borotet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:22 Borotetab kiboitiondennyi Israel: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:23 Ne kiibwatech eng’ nyeratiennyo: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny:
Psalms136:24 Ak ne kiitiachech eng’ bunikyok: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:25 Inendet ne igochin amitwogik tugul che bo borwek: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.
Psalms136:26 Ee ogochi kongoi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny.

Psalms145:1 Alosun inye
Psalms145:2 Amwae betut age tugul ale iberurot; Ak alosu kaineng’ung’ koigeny ak koigeny.
Psalms145:3 O Jehovah
Psalms145:4 Ilosu boisioniguk ibinda age agoi age
Psalms145:5 Abwatati telunatet ne o ne bo teegistang’ung’
Psalms145:6 Ak ng’alali bik agobo kamuktaetab boisioniguk che kiywei; Ak amwaitoi oindang’ung’.
Psalms145:7 Twegu ichek komwaei kabwatetab mieindang’ung’ ne o
Psalms145:8 Jehovah ko ne bo mieindo
Psalms145:9 Mie Jehovah eng’ bik tugul; Ak bou rirenosiekyik che taloen boisionikyik tugul.

Psalms145:13 Laitornateng’ung’ ko laitornatet ne bo koigeny. Ak tebyei bounatengung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul.
Psalms145:14 Tiiei Jehovah tugul che ibutos
Psalms145:15 Igenin konyekab bik tugul; Ak igochini amitwogikwak eng’ betut ne nyolu.
Psalms145:16 Ing’anye eung’ung’
Psalms145:17 Bo iman Jehovah eng’ ortinwekyik tugul
Psalms145:18 Negit Jehovah icheget tugul che kuurei inendet
Psalms145:19 Isuldochin icheget che iywei inendet kit ne machei ichek; Kasei inendet rirekwak
Psalms145:20 Ribei Jehovah tugul che chamei inendet; Ago ng’emei kiptengeginik.
Psalms145:21 Ng’alali kutinnyu agobo kalosunetab Jehovah; Ak ingolos bik tugul kainennyi ne tilil koigeny ak koigeny.

Psalms147:4 Iiti kecheik ole te; Tochin ichek tugul kainaik.
Psalms147:5 O Kiptaiyandennyo

Psalms147:8 Ne tuge bolik kipsengwet
Psalms147:9 Igochin inendet amitwogik tiong’ik

Psalms147:15 Iyokyin ng’ony ng’atutiennyi; Ak labati ng’olyondennyi mising’.

Psalms148:9 Tulonok ak tulonok che mengechen; Ketik che iitos

Psalms149:1 Olosu Jehovah. Otienji Jehovah tiendo ne leel
Psalms149:2 Ingobaibait Israel eng’ yaindennyi: Ingogasgei lagokab Sion eng’ Laitoriandennywa.
Psalms149:3 Ingolos kainennyi ye urerendos: Ingotienji inendet kalosunoik eng’ sugutit ne ming’in ak ketubet.
Psalms149:4 Amu baibai Jehovah eng’ bikyik: Igororoni eng’ yetunet che iming’inegei.
Psalms149:5 Ingoboiboitu che tililen eng’ telunatet: Ingotienso eng’ boiboiyet eng’ itogusiekwak.
Psalms149:6 Ingotebe kutuswekwak kalosunoik che eechen che bo Kamuktaindet
Psalms149:7 Si kobiit koyaakyi mugetut bororiosiek
Psalms149:8 Korat laitorinikwak eng’ sirimwek
Psalms149:9 Ak koruokyine kiruoget ne sirat; Tinyei teegisi chechik tugul che tililen. Olosu Jehovah.
Psalms150:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu Kamuktaindet eng’ oldanyi ne tilil: Olosu inendet eng’ yamunetab kimnatennyi.
Psalms150:2 Olosu inendet amu boisionikyik che bo kamuktaet: Olosu inendet ko u ole te etunatennyi ne telunot mising’.
Psalms150:3 Olosu inendet eng’ cheetab iriaget: Olosu inendet eng’ kibugandet ak ketubet.
Psalms150:4 Olosu inendet eng’ sugutit ne ming’in ak urertiet: Olosu inendet eng’ kibugandinik che bo inoik ak ndurerusiek.
Psalms150:5 Olosu inendet eng’ sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei che cheitos: Olosu inendet eng’ sanisiekab sugunonik che cheitos mising’.
Psalms150:6 Ingolos Jehovah kiy age tugul ne tinyei kabuset. Olosu Jehovah.

Proverbs1:2 Kenae ng’omnatet ak konetisiet; Kiguiyo ng’alekab naet;
Proverbs1:3 Ketaach konetisietab ng’omnatet
Proverbs1:4 Kigochi utatiet che berberen
Proverbs1:5 Si kobiit kogas chito ne ng’om
Proverbs1:6 Koguiyo kalewenet
Proverbs1:7 Taunetab naet ko kiywei Jehovah: Ago sasei che berber ng’omnatet ak konetisiet.
Proverbs1:8 Werinnyu
Proverbs1:9 Amu egu choto narietab mieindo eng’ meting’ung’
Proverbs1:10 Werinnyu
Proverbs1:11 Ngo mwa kole
Proverbs1:12 Ongelugui kosoptos ko u oldab che kigobek
Proverbs1:13 Kinyoru tuguk tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o
Proverbs1:14 Ongenamge; Si keyamde tugukyok tugul:
Proverbs1:15 Werinnyu
Proverbs1:16 Amu ruachin kelyekwak yaitiet
Proverbs1:17 Kigiriich mestet buch
Proverbs1:18 Ribistos chuto kotumdoi korotikwak
Proverbs1:19 U noto ortinwekab age tugul ne kipkeiyat agobo kelunet; Rebei sobonwekab bik.
Proverbs1:20 Waachei mising’ ng’omnatet eng’ oret; Ng’alali eng’ komoswek che baroen;
Proverbs1:21 Kuursei eng’ ole tuiyechin bik; Eng’ ole kibunei eng’ ormarichok
Proverbs1:22 Ochame abusnateng’wong’ kot kotianit
Proverbs1:23 Oweege eng’ kateunennyu
Proverbs1:24 Amu kiaguurse
Proverbs1:25 Ago kiosas kiruogutikyuk tugul
Proverbs1:26 Arorie eng’ betutab nyalildang’wong’; Achotisiei ye kanyo kaiyweisieng’wong’;
Proverbs1:27 Ye kanyo kaiyweisieng’wong’ ko u usonet ne o
Proverbs1:28 Koguura anyun
Proverbs1:29 Amu kiwech naet
Proverbs1:30 Ama cham kiruogutikyuk; Kisas kateunaikyuk tugul:
Proverbs1:31 Amei anyun logoekab ortinwekwak
Proverbs1:32 Amu barei ichek kachuchugetab ge ne bo abusanik
Proverbs1:33 Ago age tugul ne kasa kotebe chametab ge
Proverbs2:1 Werinnyu
Proverbs2:2 Kot iepchi it ng’omnatet
Proverbs2:3 Ee
Proverbs2:4 Ngot icheng’ inendet ko u ye icheng’e feda
Proverbs2:5 Iguiye anyun kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah
Proverbs2:6 Amu igoitoi Jehovah ng’omnatet: Mong’une kutinnyi naet ak kaguiyet:
Proverbs2:7 Konorjin che bo iman ng’omnatet ne igesunotgei
Proverbs2:8 Si kobiit korib ortinwekab kiruoget
Proverbs2:9 Iguiye anyun imanda ak kiruoget
Proverbs2:10 Amu chutei ng’omnatet muguleldang’ung’
Proverbs2:11 Ribin ruchinet
Proverbs2:12 Si kosorun eng’ oretab chito ne ya
Proverbs2:13 Che laaktoi ortinwekab lititindo
Proverbs2:14 Che boiboitu koyai yaitiet
Proverbs2:15 Che kunuren ortinwekwak
Proverbs2:16 Si kosorun eng’ chepkugoniot
Proverbs2:17 Ne metoi choruet ne kinerjindos
Proverbs2:18 Chorjingei gonnyi meet
Proverbs2:19 Maweeksei age tugul ne wendi oldanyi
Proverbs2:20 Si kobiit iwendote ortinwekab bik che miach
Proverbs2:21 Amu menyei emet bik che bo iman. Ak ng’etune oloto che igesunotgei.
Proverbs2:22 Ago kiistoi bik che yaachen eng’ emet
Proverbs3:1 Werinnyu
Proverbs3:2 Amu tesun choto chang’indab betusiek
Proverbs3:3 Amecham koistoenengei rirenet ak iman: Ratyi kaating’ung’; Sirji muguleldang’ung’;
Proverbs3:4 Si inyoru anyun chamet ak kaguiyet ne mie Eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet ak bik.
Proverbs3:5 Imang’u Jehovah eng’ muguleldang’ung’ tugul
Proverbs3:6 Ng’any inendet eng’ ortinweguk tugul
Proverbs3:7 Amendege inyege ile i ng’om; Iywei Jehovah
Proverbs3:8 Egu chametab ge ne bo mugung’ung’
Proverbs3:9 Konyite Jehovah tuguguk
Proverbs3:10 Si konyi chogeniguk eng’ aiyebindo
Proverbs3:11 Werinnyu
Proverbs3:12 Amu iteechin Jehovah age tugul ne chamei; Ko u ye iteechin kwanda werinnyi ne boiboitune.
Proverbs3:13 Baibai chito ne nyoru ng’omnatet
Proverbs3:14 Amu siirei chemung’arainatet ne bo ng’omnatet ne bo feda
Proverbs3:15 Bo kamanutiet ne o inendet kosiir koek che kiguure peninim: Ak tuguk tugul che imache ko mami che kiroge ng’omnatet.
Proverbs3:16 Mi eunnyi ne bo tai chang’indab betusiek; Komi eunnyi ne bo katam magornatosiek ak teegisto.
Proverbs3:17 Bo kagasetab ge ortinwekyik
Proverbs3:18 Ketitab sobondo inendet eng’ ichek che namei: Ak baibai age tugul ne namegei ak inendet.
Proverbs3:19 Kilum Jehovah ng’ony eng’ ng’omnatet; Kiigimit kipsengwetisiek eng’ naet.
Proverbs3:20 Kipcheak rirosiek eng’ naennyi. Ak isau bolik rewot.
Proverbs3:21 Werinnyu
Proverbs3:22 Egu anyun choto sobondo eng’ muguleldang’ung’
Proverbs3:23 Iwendote anyun oreng’ung’ eng’ chametab ge
Proverbs3:24 Ameiywei kiy ye irue: Ee
Proverbs3:25 Amearogeni eng’ ne chein
Proverbs3:26 Amu egu Jehovah kamang’uneng’ung’
Proverbs3:27 Ameete mieindo che nyoljin kigochi
Proverbs3:28 Amelenji chitab kokweng’ung’
Proverbs3:29 Amechopchi yaitiet chitab kokweng’ung’
Proverbs3:30 Amobelge ak chi buch
Proverbs3:31 Amat koamjin ng’etkong’ chito ne korom
Proverbs3:32 Amu wechei Jehovah ngeleliot: Ago mi ung’otikyik ak bikab iman.
Proverbs3:33 Mi chubetab Jehovah gotab kiptengekyot; Ago iberuri meng’otetab bik che bo iman.
Proverbs3:34 Chotei inendet iman chotik
Proverbs3:35 Bunjin torornatet bik che ng’omen; Ago egu tewernatet etunatetab che berber.
Proverbs4:1 Ogas werju kotigonetab kwanda
Proverbs4:2 Amu agonok konetisiet ne mie; Amobagakte ng’atutiennyu.
Proverbs4:3 Amu kia weritab baba
Proverbs4:4 Ak kiineta baba
Proverbs4:5 Cheng’jige ng’omnatet
Proverbs4:6 Amemete
Proverbs4:7 Ng’omnatet ko kit ne o; cheng’ anyun ng’omnatet: Ee
Proverbs4:8 Itoror
Proverbs4:9 Indoi meting’ung’ sonoekab mieindo: Konin narietab telunatet.
Proverbs4:10 Kaso
Proverbs4:11 Kianetin eng’ oretab ng’omnatet; Kiandoun eng’ ortinwekab lititindo.
Proverbs4:12 Ye iwendi ko maigiichi kiy kakwautiguk; Ak ngot ilabati
Proverbs4:13 Nam mising’ konetisiet; mat ichamji kwo: Rib: amu inendet ko sobondang’ung’.
Proverbs4:14 Mechut oretab kiptengeginik
Proverbs4:15 Istoege noto
Proverbs4:16 Amu mainuuktos kobate ko kagoyai yaitiet; Istoegei ichek kanuuget
Proverbs4:17 Amu amei amitwogikab yaitiet
Proverbs4:18 Ago oretab che bo iman ko u lapkeiyet ne iluu
Proverbs4:19 Oretab kiptengeginik ko u mesundeito: Manaei kit ne riichei ichek.
Proverbs4:20 Werinnyu
Proverbs4:21 Amat ingoistoegei taing’ung’; Rib kotebe muguleldang’ung’ orit.
Proverbs4:22 Amu sobondo eng’ icheget che nyoru
Proverbs4:23 Rib muguleldang’ung’ eng’ kagiiletab ge tugul; Amu bunu kong’ikab beekab sobon yoto.
Proverbs4:24 Istoege kutit ne ngelelio
Proverbs4:25 Keer tai
Proverbs4:26 Ruchi komie ole bunei kelyeguk
Proverbs4:27 Amemaste iwe eutab tai anan ne bo katam; Istoe keldang’ung’ yaitiet.
Proverbs5:1 Werinnyu
Proverbs5:2 Si kobiit irib ruchinet
Proverbs5:3 Amu saune kumiat kutitab chepkugoniot
Proverbs5:4 Ago ng’wan kagesunennyi ko u ng’wonet
Proverbs5:5 Chorjingei kelyekyik meet; Namegei kakwautikyik ak oldab che kigobek;
Proverbs5:6 Kot ko manyoru oret ne litit ne bo sobondo: Ma tononiotin ortinwekyik
Proverbs5:7 Ogasa anyun werju
Proverbs5:8 Iste oreng’ung’ kolooit eng’ korgonoto
Proverbs5:9 Si megochi teegistang’ung’ bik alak; Ak igochi kenyisieguk bik che kolgol:
Proverbs5:10 Si manyor toek kimnateng’ung’; Si matebe boisioniguk che kimen gotab kipsagarindet;
Proverbs5:11 Si irir let
Proverbs5:12 Ak imwa ile
Proverbs5:13 Ama agas it konetikyuk
Proverbs5:14 Kiga arikyi yaitiet tugul Eng’ kwenutab tuiyet ak kayumetab ge.
Proverbs5:15 Ee beek che mi tereng’ung’
Proverbs5:16 Tos kanyol koseergei kondametusieguk che bo beek eng’ olo tugul
Proverbs5:17 Ingobunjin inyege
Proverbs5:18 Ingoek ne iberurot kondametung’ung’ ne bo beek; Ak ibaibaitu eng’ osotiotab ming’inoteng’ung’.
Proverbs5:19 Ko u kenyelet ne kotoy ak sitwet ne kotoy
Proverbs5:20 Amu nee werinnyu
Proverbs5:21 Amu keerei Jehovah ortinwekab chito
Proverbs5:22 Namei kiptengekyot yaitwogikyik
Proverbs5:23 Meei ama tinyei konetisiet; Ak betei amu oindab berberindanyi.
Proverbs6:1 Werinnyu
Proverbs6:2 Kagoriichin anyun ng’alek che imwae
Proverbs6:3 Yai anyun nito
Proverbs6:4 Ameru
Proverbs6:5 Sorugei ko u ye sorugei cheptirgichet eng’ kiplogotiot
Proverbs6:6 Ui oldab birechet
Proverbs6:7 Amu matinyei kiruogindet
Proverbs6:8 Konorjingei amitwogik eng’ kemei
Proverbs6:9 Irue kot kotianit-o
Proverbs6:10 Ruondo kitigin
Proverbs6:11 Konyo anyun banandang’ung ko u rebindet
Proverbs6:12 Wendoti chito ne matilei kiy
Proverbs6:13 Ng’wegisie konyekyik
Proverbs6:14 Mi mastaet muguleldanyi
Proverbs6:15 Cheei anyun inendet nyalildanyi; Ng’emaksei eng’ chokyinet
Proverbs6:16 Mitei tuguk lo che wechei Jehovah; Ee
Proverbs6:17 Choto ko
Proverbs6:18 Muguleldo ne chobei kabwatutik che yaach
Proverbs6:19 Baoriat ne ma bo iman
Proverbs6:20 Werinnyu
Proverbs6:21 Ratyi choto muguleldang’ung’ kotugul
Proverbs6:22 Ye iwendoti
Proverbs6:23 Amu kayomisutiet ko tait; ak ng’atutiet ko lapkeiyet; Ak keretab kong’ ne bo kotigonet ko oretab sobondo:
Proverbs6:24 Si koribin eng’ kwondo ne ya. Koribin eng’ chemwaikutnatet ne bo chepkugoniot.
Proverbs6:25 Amegase miat eng’ muguleldang’ung’ kororonindanyi; Amengoriigenen konyekyik.
Proverbs6:26 Amu ibeeti chepkugoniot chito agoi kong’etyi kererutiet: Ak cheng’oti chepkugoniot koriich sobondo ne kararan.
Proverbs6:27 Imuchi chi konamji mat tegennyi
Proverbs6:28 Imuchi chi kotiegat ng’etetiot
Proverbs6:29 U noto chito ne ibegei ak osotiotab chitab kokwennyi; Age tugul ne twaei inendet ko magibagaktoi buch.
Proverbs6:30 Masasei bik chorindet
Proverbs6:31 Ago ngot kenyor
Proverbs6:32 Matinyei naet chito ne ibegei ak kwony; Inendet ne yaei noto kong’emei sobondanyi.
Proverbs6:33 Nyoru ng’otobosiek ak tewernatet; Ama kiistoi tewernatennyi.
Proverbs6:34 Amu ng’etkonda nereknatetab chi; Ama rire eng’ betutab yaaktaetab mugetut.
Proverbs6:35 Mamage kiy kit ne kitiage; Magigoigoi
Proverbs7:1 Werinnyu
Proverbs7:2 Rib kayomisutikyuk si isob; Rib ng’atutiennyu ko u ye iribe laptetab kondang’ung’.
Proverbs7:3 Ratyi moriguk; Sirji muguleldang’ung’.
Proverbs7:4 Ilenji ng’omnatet
Proverbs7:5 Si kobiit koribin eng’ chepkugoniot
Proverbs7:6 Amu kiaiitite eng’ tirisietab gonnyu Eng’ tirisiennyu ne bo segengeisiek;
Proverbs7:7 Ak kiageer eng’ kwenutab che abusanik
Proverbs7:8 Kobunei oret ole negite luitab kwonyoto
Proverbs7:9 Ko karatarat
Proverbs7:10 Ak ogeero
Proverbs7:11 Bolin ak ko ngelelio; Matononi eng’ gonnyi:
Proverbs7:12 Mi oret ra
Proverbs7:13 Konam anyun inendet
Proverbs7:14 Atinye korosekab kagochinoikab kalyet; Kaayaakte rani tuguk che kiga arorte.
Proverbs7:15 Kaanyo anyun atorogun
Proverbs7:16 Kaaiite ngoroik che bo lelesta
Proverbs7:17 Kaande nyamdutik itogunnyu Koboto tuguk che u igomoik
Proverbs7:18 Nyo kibaibaige kot koeech; Ngibaibaige eng’ chamnyet.
Proverbs7:19 Amu mami ga chitab kobo got
Proverbs7:20 Kaib loletab fedaisiek; Tun itu ga eng’ kwenutab arawet.
Proverbs7:21 Iterteri inendet eng’ ng’alekyik che chang’ che tangus
Proverbs7:22 Isubi anyun inendet kwonyoto eng’ yoto

Proverbs7:26 Amu kigoluul che chang’ che kigiguoten: Ee
Proverbs7:27 Gonnyi ko oret ne wendi oldab che kigobek
Proverbs8:1 Tos mabolei ng’omnatet
Proverbs8:2 Tonone baragutab komoswek che tororen ye negit oret
Proverbs8:3 Ole negite ormarichok
Proverbs8:4 Kole
Proverbs8:5 Okwek che o abusotin
Proverbs8:6 Ogas
Proverbs8:7 Amu mwaei kutinnyu imanda; Ak wechei kutinnyu tengekto.
Proverbs8:8 Bo imanda ng’alek tugul che amwae; Mami kiy ne imaasat anan ko ne bo ngelelnatet.
Proverbs8:9 Kasoksei tugul eng’ inendet ne iguitos
Proverbs8:10 Taach kotigonennyu
Proverbs8:11 Amu kararan ng’omnatet kosiir koik che kiguure peninim; Ak magirogendoi ng’omnatet tuguk tugul che kimachei.
Proverbs8:12 Ane
Proverbs8:13 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko kewech yaitio: Aweche menotet
Proverbs8:14 Nenyu kiruoget
Proverbs8:15 Laitorani laitorinik amu ane
Proverbs8:16 Bounisiei bounik amu ane
Proverbs8:17 Achame che chama; Ak nyorua che cheng’a eng’ kagiiletab ge.
Proverbs8:18 Atinye magornatosiek ak teegisto; Magornatosiek che tebyei
Proverbs8:19 Kororon logoekyuk kosiir tahabu
Proverbs8:20 Awendote oretab imanda
Proverbs8:21 Si kobiit agochi icheget che chama konyor borotet
Proverbs8:22 Kiami koboto Jehovah koboch taunetab orennyi
Proverbs8:23 Kigiyaa abiit koboch keny
Proverbs8:24 Kigisicha ye kitomo kobiit rirosiek; Ye kitomo kobiit kondametusiek che rootune beek che chang’.
Proverbs8:25 Ye kitomo kelumda tulonok
Proverbs8:26 Ye kitomo koyai inendet ng’ony anan emotinwek
Proverbs8:27 Kiami ye kiigimiti inendet kipsengwetisiek: Ye kiinde yiemutiet ole boch riret:
Proverbs8:28 Ye kiigimiti bolik eng’ barak: Ye kingogimegitu kondametusiekab riret:
Proverbs8:29 Ye kiinde nyanjet kiwotennyi
Proverbs8:30 Kigimi tuwai
Proverbs8:31 Abaibaitune emennyi ne menyei bik; Ak kimi boiboiyennyu eng’ werikab bik.
Proverbs8:32 Ogasa anyun
Proverbs8:33 Ogas kotigonet
Proverbs8:34 Iberurot chito ne kasa
Proverbs8:35 Amu inendet ne nyorua
Proverbs8:36 Ago inendet ne chalwogenjina ko kang’em sobondanyi: Chamei meet tugul che wecha.
Proverbs9:1 Kigoteech ng’omnatet gonnyi
Proverbs9:2 Kigoeny tukyik; kigoburuch divaikyik; Kigochob amitwogik eng’ mesennyi.
Proverbs9:3 Kigoyokto tibikyik
Proverbs9:4 Ingonyo yu age tugul ne abusat: Mwachin chito ne matinyei naet
Proverbs9:5 Nyo
Proverbs9:6 Obagakte abusnatet
Proverbs9:7 Nyoru tewernatet inendet ne itigoni chotindet; Nyoru tisiet ne kerei kong’ kiptengekyot.
Proverbs9:8 Ameger kong’ chotindet
Proverbs9:9 Inet ne ng’om si kong’omit kosiir: Inet chito ne bo iman
Proverbs9:10 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko taunetab ng’omnatet: Ak naet ne kinae Inendet ne Tilil ko kaguiyet.
Proverbs9:11 Amu tesoksei betusieguk eng’ ane
Proverbs9:12 Ngot ko i ng’om
Proverbs9:13 Bolin kwondo ne berber; Abusat
Proverbs9:14 Ak tebe kurgetab gonnyi
Proverbs9:15 Si koguur che siirtoi
Proverbs9:16 Ingonyo yu age tugul ne abusat: Ak mwachin inendet ne matinyei naet kolenjin
Proverbs9:17 Anyiny beek che kechorei
Proverbs9:18 Ago manaei kole mi oloto che kigobek; Kole
Proverbs10:1 Kalewenaikab Solomon. Iboiboi werit ne ng’om kwanda: Ago inyalili werit ne berber kamet.
Proverbs10:2 Mami keluno konoraikab yaitiet: Ago soru imanda eng’ meet.
Proverbs10:3 Machamjin Jehovah sobondab ne bo iman kotanui eng’ rubet: Ago timdoi magetab kiptengeginik.
Proverbs10:4 Banani ne choriren: Ago ibu magornatet eutab ne igiiligei.
Proverbs10:5 Ng’om werit ne iyumi eng’ kemei: Ago ibu tewernatet werit ne ruei kegesisiei.
Proverbs10:6 Tebe kaberuroik ne bo iman: Ago tuchei koromnatet kutitab kiptengekyot.
Proverbs10:7 Iberurot kabwatetab ne bo iman; Ago nunei kainetab kiptengeginik.
Proverbs10:8 Taachei kayomisutik ne ng’om eng’ muguleldo: Ago ibuti ne berber ne chang’ ng’alek.
Proverbs10:9 Inendet ne wendote lititindo kowendote chemetab ge: Ago naoksei inendet ne imaasi ortinwekyik.
Proverbs10:10 Ibu arogenet ne ng’wegisie konda: Ago ibuti ne berber ne chang’ ng’alek.
Proverbs10:11 Kondametutab sobon kutitab ne bo iman: Ago tuchei koromnatet kutitab kiptengekyot.
Proverbs10:12 Ing’eeti wechet boriosiek: Ago tuchei chamnyet bistaosiek tugul.
Proverbs10:13 Kinyorjin ng’omnatet kutitab chito ne tinyei ruchinet: Ago nyoljin kirokto batetab inendet ne matinyei naet.
Proverbs10:14 Konori bik che ng’omen naet: Ago ng’emisiet ne negit kutitab ne berber.
Proverbs10:15 Magornatetab magoriot ko nganasennyi ne kim: Ng’emisietab kibananok ko banandanywa.
Proverbs10:16 Tokyingei sobondo boisietab ne bo iman; Tokyingei tengekto berurtab kiptengekyot.
Proverbs10:17 Mitei oretab sobondo ne ribei kotigonet: Ago mastoi chito ne bagaktoi keretab kong’.
Proverbs10:18 Inendet ne unyei weget kotinyei kutitab lembechek; Ak inendet ne mwaei ng’alekab chemereret ko berber.
Proverbs10:19 Mabete bistoet ng’alek che chang’: Ago ng’om ne sisei.
Proverbs10:20 U fedaisiek che kororon ng’elyeptab ne bo iman: Matilei kiy muguleldab kiptengekyot.
Proverbs10:21 Baei bik che chang’ kutitab chito ne bo iman: Ago begu che berber amu matinyei naet.
Proverbs10:22 Imagornoni kaberuretab Jehovah
Proverbs10:23 U ureriet eng’ ne berber ye yaei yaitwogik: Ak u noto ng’omnatet eng’ chito ne tinyei naet.
Proverbs10:24 Kit ne iywei kiptengekyot
Proverbs10:25 Ye siirto kipchurjuriet koma komi kiptengekyot: Ago lumeiywot ne bo koigeny chito ne bo iman.
Proverbs10:26 U siki eng’ kelek
Proverbs10:27 Tesei betusiek kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: Ago kitilei kenyisiekab kiptengeginik kong’ering’itu.
Proverbs10:28 Kagasetab ge kamang’unetab che bo iman: Ago lusei kamang’unetab kiptengeginik.
Proverbs10:29 Irimet ne kim oretab Jehovah eng’ ne bo iman; Ago ng’emisiet eng’ yaikab yaitio.
Proverbs10:30 Magoi kiisto ne bo iman: Ago mamenyei kiptengeginik emet.
Proverbs10:31 Mong’une ng’omnatet kutitab ne bo iman: Ago kitilei ng’elyeptab ne imaasisiei.
Proverbs10:32 Ingen kutitab ne bo iman tuguk che taagaksei: Ago mwaei kutuswekab kiptengeginik ng’alek che bo kamaaset.
Proverbs11:1 Wechei Jehovah kerutiet ne ma bo iman: Ago chamei Jehovah kerutiet ne bo iman.
Proverbs11:2 Ye nyo menotet
Proverbs11:3 Indochin che bo iman kagesunatenywa bo ge: Ago ng’emei che yaei kaberberisiet
Proverbs11:4 Matilei kiy magornatosiek eng’ betutab neregek: Ago sorunisiei imanda eng’ meet.
Proverbs11:5 Indochin ne igesunotgei imandanyi eng’ orennyi: Ago ibuti kiptengekyot eng’ tengektanyi.
Proverbs11:6 Soru che bo iman imandanywa: Ago kinamei che yaei kaberberisiet eng’ ng’alsenywa.
Proverbs11:7 Ye mee chito ne kiptengekyot
Proverbs11:8 Kisoru ne bo iman komong’ eng’ nyalilda
Proverbs11:9 Ng’emei eng’ kutinnyi
Proverbs11:10 Ye bor che bo iman
Proverbs11:11 Kitorori nganaset eng’ berurtab che bo iman: Ago igabui kutuswekab kiptengeginik nganaset.
Proverbs11:12 Matinyei ng’omnatet ne sasei chitab kokwennyi: Ago sisei chito ne tinyei naet.
Proverbs11:13 Ng’anyei ung’otik inendet ne chaamsoti: Ago unyei ng’olyot inendet ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne bo iman.
Proverbs11:14 Ibutos bik eng’ ole mami kandoiset ne bo ng’omnatet: Ago mi sorunet eng’ ole mi kiruogik che chang’.
Proverbs11:15 Nyoru nyalilda ne tononjin too: Ago inendet ne wechei tononjinet kotebe chametab ge.
Proverbs11:16 Nyoru teegisto kwondo ne mie: Teptoi bik che koromen magornatosiek.
Proverbs11:17 Chito ne tinyei rirenetab ge koyachin ne mie sobondanyi: Ago chito ne kolgol konyalili bortanyi.
Proverbs11:18 Nyoru kiptengekyot melektab ng’alset: Ago inendet ne kolei imanda kotinyei melekto ne bo iman.
Proverbs11:19 Inendet ne kimitu eng’ imanda koityin sobondo: Ak inendet ne isubi yaitiet kosubi meennyi inegei.
Proverbs11:20 Wechei Jehovah icheget che imaasotin mugulelwek: Baibai inendet eng’ che igesunotgei eng’ orenywa.
Proverbs11:21 Magimetoi iman chito ne ya ama kibir: Ago kisoru iyotetab che bo iman.
Proverbs11:22 Kergei peteitab tahabu ne mi serutab toret
Proverbs11:23 Magutikab che bo iman ko miachen kityo: Ago kamang’unetab kiptengeginik ko neregek.
Proverbs11:24 Mi ne iseeri
Proverbs11:25 Nerei sobondab ne aiyeb: Ak kibisi ne ibisisiei.
Proverbs11:26 Chubei bik che etei bek: Ago kiberuri ne aldoi.
Proverbs11:27 Inendet ne cheng’ei ne mie eng’ kagiiletab ge
Proverbs11:28 Inendet ne imang’u magornatosiekyik
Proverbs11:29 Inendet ne inyalili gonnyi konyoru usonet: Ak koegu ne berber otwogindetab ne ng’om eng’ muguleldo.
Proverbs11:30 Logoekab ne bo iman ketitab sobondo; Ng’om inendet ne soru sobonwekab bik.
Proverbs11:31 Keero
Proverbs12:1 Age tugul ne chamei kotigonet kochamei naet: Ago inendet ne esioi keretab kong’ ko u tiondo.
Proverbs12:2 Nyoru chamet eng’ Jehovah chito ne mie: Ago igikyin Jehovah chito ne bo chobutik che yaachen.
Proverbs12:3 Magimitu chi eng’ yaitio: Amagoi kitut tigitiotab che bo iman.
Proverbs12:4 Egu kwondo ne mie konditab manong’otiondennyi: Ago kwondo ne ibu kalilanet ko u nunatet eng’ kowekab chichoto.
Proverbs12:5 Bo iman kabwatutikab che bo imanda: Ago ng’alset kiruogutikab kiptengeginik.
Proverbs12:6 Sapchin kotumda korotik ng’alekab kiptengeginik: Ago soru ichek kutitab che bo iman.
Proverbs12:7 Kigabui kiptengeginik
Proverbs12:8 Kilosu chi ko u kit ne te ng’omnatennyi: Ago kisasei inendet ne tinyei muguleldo ne imaasat.
Proverbs12:9 Kaigai inendet ne kesasei
Proverbs12:10 Ribei chito ne bo iman sobetab tennyi: Ago kolgolen rirenosiekab bik che yaach.
Proverbs12:11 Nyoru amitwogik che chang’ chito ne ibati korennyi: Ago inendet ne isubi tangoita
Proverbs12:12 Machei kiptengekyot mestetab bik che yaach: Ago yiei logoek tigitiotab che bo iman.
Proverbs12:13 Mi mestetab chito ne ya bistoetab kutit: Ago mong’une nyalilda chito ne bo iman.
Proverbs12:14 Biyonyi chito mieindo eng’ logoekab kutinnyi: Ak kigeerjin chito boisionikab eunekyik.
Proverbs12:15 Litit eng’ ne berber orennyi ngo keerei: Ago epchin it kiruoget inendet ne ng’om.
Proverbs12:16 Sib konaoksei neregekab ne berber: Ago unyei tewernatet chito ne ng’om.
Proverbs12:17 Inendet ne mwaei iman kobortoi imanda
Proverbs12:18 Mi ne sartae ng’alek ko u rotwetab chok ne toorsei: Ago chametab ge ng’elyeptab ne ng’om.
Proverbs12:19 Kigimiti koigeny kutit ne bo iman; Ago bo sait ne matia ng’elyepta ne mwaei lembech.
Proverbs12:20 Mi ng’alset mugulelwekab che chobei yaitiet: Ago tinyei boiboiyet che mwaitoi kalyet.
Proverbs12:21 Manyoru yaitiet age tugul chito ne bo iman: Ago nyiiei yaitiet kiptengeginik.
Proverbs12:22 Wechei Jehovah kutit ne mwaei lembech: Ago baibai inendet eng’ che boisie iman.
Proverbs12:23 Unyei naet chito ne ng’om: Ago mwaitoi mugulelwekab che berber berberindo.
Proverbs12:24 Bounisiei eutab ne igiilegei; Ago kibirjin chito ne choriren kobois.
Proverbs12:25 Ing’uruksei muguleldab chito amu nyigisindo ne tinyei; Ago iboiboi muguleloto ng’olyot ne mie.
Proverbs12:26 Chitab iman ko kandoindetab chitab kokwennyi: Ago ibeeti kiptengeginik orenywa.
Proverbs12:27 Mawatani chito ne choriren kit ne kanyor eng’ loget: Ago tinyei chito ne igiilegei tuguk che bo kamanutiet ne o.
Proverbs12:28 Mi sobondo oretab imanda; Ama mi meet eng’ orennyi.
Proverbs13:1 Epchin it werit ne ng’om kotigonetab kwandanyi: Ago magasei keretab kong’ chotindet.
Proverbs13:2 Amei chito ne mie eng’ logoekab kutinnyi: Ago amei koromnatet sobondo ne yaei kaberberisiet.
Proverbs13:3 Ribei sobondanyi ne ribei kutinnyi: Ago nyoru ng’emisiet ne yatei kutinnyi mising’.
Proverbs13:4 Tinyei maget sobondab ne choriren
Proverbs13:5 Wechei chito ne bo iman lembechek: Ago samisitu chito ne ya
Proverbs13:6 Imanda ne ribei inendet ne litit eng’ oret: Ago igabui yaitiet kiptengekyot.
Proverbs13:7 Mi ne yaegei koek magorio
Proverbs13:8 Kitiage sobondab chito magornatosiekyik: Ago magasei kibananok kamuiset.
Proverbs13:9 Iluu mising’ lapkeiyetab che bo iman: Ago kimisi taitab kiptengeginik.
Proverbs13:10 Ibu menotet boriet kityo: Ago mi ng’omnatet koboto ichek che ng’ategei.
Proverbs13:11 Ichuchugaksei magornatet ne kiginyoru eng’ menotet: Ago tesoksei che bo chito ne iyumi eng’ birtoetab ge.
Proverbs13:12 Miani muguleldo eng’ kamang’unet ne igaegei: Ago ye isulda magonato
Proverbs13:13 Age tugul ne sasei ng’olyot koipchingei ng’emisiet: Ago kigochin melekto chito ne iywei kayomiset.
Proverbs13:14 Kondametutab sobon ng’atutietab ne ng’om: Si kobiit koistoegei mestonokab meet.
Proverbs13:15 Ibu chamet naet ne mie: Ago uui oretab kaberberik.
Proverbs13:16 Boisie naet chito age tugul ne ng’om: Ago iseeri ne berber berberindo.
Proverbs13:17 Ibutyin yaitiet chito ne ya ne kiyoktoi: Ago egu chametab ge tononjinindet ne kiyani.
Proverbs13:18 Nyoru bananda ak tewernatet inendet ne esioi kotigonet: Ago nyoru teegisto inendet ne epchin it keretab kong’.
Proverbs13:19 Anyiny eng’ sobondo maget ne isuldaat: Ago wechei che berber ngo istoegei yaitwogik.
Proverbs13:20 Obendate ak bik che ng’omen
Proverbs13:21 Isubi yaitiet kiptengeginik: Ago kigeerjin che bo iman mieindo.
Proverbs13:22 Bagakyin chito ne mie tugukyik mochogoronikyik; Ak kigonorjin chitab iman magornatetab kiptengekyot.
Proverbs13:23 Mi amitwogik che chang’ eng’ kabatisietab kibananok: Ago mi ne keng’emei amu mami imanda.
Proverbs13:24 Wechei werinnyi ne mabirei: Ago inendet ne chamei werinnyi kotigoni ko u ye nyolu.
Proverbs13:25 Amei ne bo iman kot kobiyo sobondanyi; Ago manyoru kiptengeginik che yamei.
Proverbs14:1 Teechei gonnyi kwondo age tugul ne ng’om: Ago butei ne berber.
Proverbs14:2 Iywei Jehovah inendet ne wendote imandanyi: Ago sasei Jehovah inendet ne imaasat eng’ ortinwekyik.
Proverbs14:3 Mitei kutitab ne berber kiroktab menotet: Ago ribei kutuswekwak che ng’omen.
Proverbs14:4 Tilil biut ole mami tuga: Ago ibu kimnatetab tuga kelunet ne o.
Proverbs14:5 Mamwaei lembech baoriat ne kiyani: Ago mwaei lembech baoriat ne ma bo iman.
Proverbs14:6 Cheng’ei chotindet ng’omnatet
Proverbs14:7 Ui ole mi chito ne berber
Proverbs14:8 Ng’omnatetab chito ne ng’om ko koguiyo orennyi: Ago ng’alset berberindab che berber.
Proverbs14:9 Sasei che berber ng’ogisto: Ago mi mieindo eng’ kwenutab che bo iman.
Proverbs14:10 Ingen muguleldo ng’wanindanyi; Ak matinyei toondet yamdao ak boiboiyennyi.
Proverbs14:11 Kigabui gotab kiptengeginik: Ago kiberuri emaitab ne bo iman.
Proverbs14:12 Mi oret ne len chito litit
Proverbs14:13 Rirei muguleldo agot ngo roriei; Ak kagesunetab boiboiyet ko nyigisindo.
Proverbs14:14 Inendet ne ichuchuchegei eng’ muguleldo kobiyonyi ortinwekyik: Ak yamatgei chito ne mie eng’ muguleldanyi.
Proverbs14:15 Iyani ng’olyo age tugul ne abusat: Ago keerei komie chito ne ng’om ole wendi.
Proverbs14:16 Iyweisiei chito ne ng’om
Proverbs14:17 Inendet ne sib konerechi
Proverbs14:18 Berberindo ko borotetab che abusotin. Ago kilaakyin che ng’omen chepkuletab naet.
Proverbs14:19 Ing’uruksei che yaachen eng’ taitab che miachen; Ak kong’uruksei kiptengeginik eng’ ormarichokab che bo iman.
Proverbs14:20 Kiwechei kibananiat
Proverbs14:21 Yaei tengekto chito ne sasei chitab kokwennyi: Ago baibai ne rire kibananok.
Proverbs14:22 Tos mayaei chalwok bik che chobei yaitiet? Ago nyoru rirenet ak imanda che chobei mieindo.
Proverbs14:23 Tinyei kelunet boisiet age tugul: Ago ibu bananda ng’alek ichegei.
Proverbs14:24 Chepkuletab che ng’omen ko magornatosiekwak: Ago berberindab che berber ko berberindo kityo.
Proverbs14:25 Soru sobonwek baoriat ne bo iman: Ago ibu ng’alset inendet ne mwaei lembech.
Proverbs14:26 Mi kamang’unet ne kim eng’ kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: Ak nyoru lagokyik ole mwechin.
Proverbs14:27 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko kondametutab beekab sobon
Proverbs14:28 Torornatetab laitoriat ko chang’indab bikyik: Ago ng’emisietab bounindet ko ng’ering’indab bik.
Proverbs14:29 Tinyei naet ne o inendet ne masartae nerek: Ago tesei berberindo inendet ne sib konerechi.
Proverbs14:30 Sobondab borto muguleldo ne tinyei chametab ge: Ago nunatetab kowek ng’etkonda.
Proverbs14:31 Iteweri Yaindennyi ne usei kibananiat; Ago konyiti Yaindennyi inendet ne rire ne matinyei kiy.
Proverbs14:32 Kiwirjin ng’ony kiptengekyot amu boisionikyik che yaach: Ago tinyei kamang’unet ne bo iman eng’ meenyi.
Proverbs14:33 Tebe ng’omnatet muguleldab inendet ne tinyei naet: Ago king’anyei che mi mugulelwekab che berber.
Proverbs14:34 Itorori imanda bororiet: Ago iteweri tengekto boror age tugul.
Proverbs14:35 Chamei laitoriat otwogindet ne boisiei eng’ ng’omnatet: Ago nerekyin inendet ne ibu kalilanet.
Proverbs15:1 Istoi wolunet ne tala neregek: Ago ing’eeti ng’olyot ne ng’wan neregek.
Proverbs15:2 Mwaei ng’elyebwekab che ng’omen naet ne litit: Ago rong’u kutuswekab che berber berberindo.
Proverbs15:3 Mitei konyekab Jehovah komosta age tugul
Proverbs15:4 Ketitab sobondo ng’elyepta ne isoobisiei: Ago ng’emei ngelelnatet tamirmiriet.
Proverbs15:5 Sasei ne berber kotigonetab kwandanyi: Ago nyoru ng’omnatet inendet ne epchin it keretab kong’.
Proverbs15:6 Mitei konoraik che chang’ gotab ne bo iman: Ago mitei nyalilda kelunaikab kiptengekyot.
Proverbs15:7 Iyestoi naet kutuswekab che ng’omen: Ago mayaei ko u noto mugulelwekab che berber.
Proverbs15:8 Wechei Jehovah tiseiywotab kiptengeginik: Ago boiboiyennyi saetab che bo iman.
Proverbs15:9 Wechei Jehovah oretab kiptengekyot: Ago chamei ne isubi imanda.
Proverbs15:10 Mi kotigonet ne ng’wan eng’ inendet ne metoi oret: Ak meei inendet ne wechei keretab kong’.
Proverbs15:11 Mi taitab Jehovah oldab che kigobek ak Ng’emisiet: Siirei ne tia anyun mugulelwekab bik!
Proverbs15:12 Machamei chotindet keger kong’: Mawendi ole mi che ng’omen.
Proverbs15:13 Igochin muguleldo ne igasegei toget kobaibait: Ago tanui tamirmiriet eng’ arogenetab muguleldo.
Proverbs15:14 Cheng’ei naet muguleldab inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet: Ago baegei kutuswekab che berber
Proverbs15:15 Yaachen betusiek tugul che bo che kinyalili: Ago muguleldo ne igasegei ko igorta ne bo kotugul.
Proverbs15:16 Kaigai tuguk che matia koboto kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah
Proverbs15:17 Kaigai keam ngwek eng’ ole mi chamnyet
Proverbs15:18 Ing’eeti chito ne kolgol boriet: Ago tisei boriet inendet ne masartae nerek.
Proverbs15:19 U oretab chito ne choriren ng’otwetab katok: Ago baraitu oretab che bo iman.
Proverbs15:20 Iboiboi kwanda werit ne ng’om: Ago sasei kamet chito ne berber.
Proverbs15:21 Egu berberindo boiboiyetab ne ma ng’om: Ago ilititi ortinwekyik chito ne tinyei kaguiyet.
Proverbs15:22 Maisuldoi chobutik eng’ ole mami kiruoget: Ago kigimiti chobutichoto eng’ ole mi kiruogik che chang’.
Proverbs15:23 Baibaitu chi eng’ wolunetab kutinnyi: Ago ng’olyot ne kimwaei eng’ sait ne nyolu
Proverbs15:24 Wendi barak oretab sobondo eng’ ne ng’om
Proverbs15:25 Itutu Jehovah gotab menotik: Ago igimiti kiwotetab mosoget.
Proverbs15:26 Chobutik che yaachen ko tuguk che kiwechei eng’ Jehovah: Ago tililen ng’alek che iboiboi bich.
Proverbs15:27 Inyalili gonnyi inendet ne kipkeiyat agobo kelunaik: Ago sobei inendet ne wechei kagochinoik.
Proverbs15:28 Ruchin muguleldab ne bo iman
Proverbs15:29 Looe Jehovah kiptengeginik: Ago kasei sautikab che bo iman.
Proverbs15:30 Iboiboi lapkeiyetab konyek muguleldo: Iakwai kowek ng’alek che miach.
Proverbs15:31 Tebe kwenutab che ng’omen Itit ne kasei keretab kong’ ne bo sobondo.
Proverbs15:32 Inendet ne esioi kotigonet
Proverbs15:33 Kotigonetab ng’omnatet kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah; Ak indoi kaming’inetab ge eng’ teegisto.
Proverbs16:1 Boisietab chi kochob muguleldanyi: Ago bunu Jehovah wolunetab ng’elyepta.
Proverbs16:2 Tililen ortinwek tugul che bo chi ye keerei: Ago kerei Jehovah tamirmirik eng’ karogendoet.
Proverbs16:3 Igochi Jehovah boisioniguk kondochi
Proverbs16:4 Kiyai Jehovah tuguk tugul ko u ye kimakyin: Ee
Proverbs16:5 Kit ne wechei Jehovah ko muguleldo age tugul ne menei: Agot ngo namgei eunek
Proverbs16:6 Kiundoi yaitiet eng’ rirenet ak iman: Ak istoegei bik yaitiet ye iywei Jehovah.
Proverbs16:7 Ye iboiboi ortinwekab chi Jehovah
Proverbs16:8 Kaigai tuguk che matia koboto imanda Kosiir kelunaik che chang’ koboto kertaetab kong’.
Proverbs16:9 Chobei muguleldab chi orennyi: Ago indochin Jehovah kakwautikyik.
Proverbs16:10 Bunu kutitab laitoriat tiletab kiruoget ne bo Kamuktaindet: Malelei kutinnyi eng’ kiruoget.
Proverbs16:11 Bo Jehovah kerutiet ne bo iman ak tuguk che kigerisie: Boisiennyi koik tugul che mi lolet che kigerisie.
Proverbs16:12 Kit ne kiwechei eng’ laitorinik ko koyai tengekto: Amu kigimiti laitornatet eng’ imanda.
Proverbs16:13 Boiboiyetab laitorinik kutuswek che bo iman: Ak kochamei ichek chi ne mwaei iman.
Proverbs16:14 U neregekab laitoriat bik che kiyoktoi che bo meet: Ago tisei chito ne ng’om.
Proverbs16:15 Mi sobondo lapkeiyetab togetab laitoriat; Ak u chamennyi boldetab ropta ne bo let.
Proverbs16:16 Kararan anyun ne tia kenyor ng’omnatet kosiir tahabu! Ee
Proverbs16:17 Oret ne o ne bo bik che bo iman ko koistoegei yaitiet: Ribei sobondanyi ne ribei orennyi.
Proverbs16:18 Indoe menotet ng’emisiet
Proverbs16:19 Kaigai ngetepto kaming’inetab ge koboto kibananok
Proverbs16:20 Nyoru mieindo ne epchin it ng’olyot: Ak baibai age tugul ne imang’u Jehovah.
Proverbs16:21 Inendet ne ng’om eng’ muguleldanyi
Proverbs16:22 Kaguiyet ko kondametutab beekab sobon eng’ inendet ne tinyei: Ago berberindo kotigonet ne kitigoni che berber.
Proverbs16:23 Ineti muguleldab ne ng’om kutinnyi
Proverbs16:24 U kumiat ng’alek che iboiboi bich
Proverbs16:25 Mi oret ne len chito litit
Proverbs16:26 Boisiechin chi magetab boisiet; Amu ichirjiri kutinnyi inendet.
Proverbs16:27 Chobei yaitiet chito ne matilei kiy: Ak mitei kutinnyi kit ne u mat ne beelsei.
Proverbs16:28 Iseeri boriet chito ne imaasat: Ak ibestos chaamindet choronok che eechen.
Proverbs16:29 Iboiboi chito ne korom chitab kokwennyi
Proverbs16:30 Chobei tuguk che imaasotin chito ne kerei konyekyik: Ibu yaitiet inendet ne susei kutinnyi.
Proverbs16:31 Chepkuletab torornatet kalwalek
Proverbs16:32 Kaigai inendet ne masartae nerek kosiir ne kim; Ak kaigai inendet ne bou tamirmiriennyi kosiir ne luulei nganaset.
Proverbs16:33 Kiwirjin barbariat ngoriet; Ago bunu Jehovah kiruogennyi tugul.
Proverbs17:1 Kaigai kererutiet ne yaamat koboto kamuung’et
Proverbs17:2 Bou otwogindet ne boisie ng’omnatet
Proverbs17:3 Bo teret feda che kitilili
Proverbs17:4 Epchin it chito ne yamei yaitiet
Proverbs17:5 Age tugul ne chotei kibananiat kogerei kong’ Yaindennyi: Ama kimetoi ama kibir
Proverbs17:6 Chepkuletab boisiek mochogoronikwak; Ak torornatetab lagok kwanisiekwak.
Proverbs17:7 Manyoljin ng’alek che kororon abusanet: Kotam nee anyun kutit ne mwaei lembech
Proverbs17:8 U koita ne bo kamanutiet ne o
Proverbs17:9 Cheng’ei chamnyet inendet ne tuchei bistoet: Ago ibestos choronok che eechen
Proverbs17:10 Chutei keretab kong’ inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet Kosiir birutik bogol eng’ ne berber.
Proverbs17:11 Cheng’ei chito ne ya bistoet kityo; Noto anyun kiyokyin inendet chito ne kolgol.
Proverbs17:12 Kaigai kotuiyo ak chi tiondo ne u keerit ne kagirebe arekyik
Proverbs17:13 Age tugul ne yaaktoi yaitiet eng’ ne mie
Proverbs17:14 U taunetab boriet ye kiyatei beek; Omete anyun boriet kotom kobiit bolatet.
Proverbs17:15 Inendet ne iityin imanda kiptengekyot
Proverbs17:16 Lyon anyun si kotinyei ne berber kit ne ale ng’omnatet
Proverbs17:17 Tinyei choruet chamnyet kotugul
Proverbs17:18 Namegei eunek chito ne matinyei naet
Proverbs17:19 Chamei bistoet ne chamei boriet: Ak inendet ne itorori kurgennyi kocheng’ei ng’emisiet.
Proverbs17:20 Manyoru kiy ne mie inendet ne imaasat muguleldo: Ak ibutyin yaitiet ne tinyei ng’elyepta ne imaasat.
Proverbs17:21 Inendet ne sichei ne berber konyoru arogenet: Ak matinyei boiboiyet kwandab ne abusat.
Proverbs17:22 Kerichek che miach muguleldo ne igasegei: Ago iyaami kowek tamirmiriet ne katanui.
Proverbs17:23 Inemune kiptengekyot tegennyi kitab kagaigaet
Proverbs17:24 Mi ng’omnatet taitab inendet ne tinyei naet: Ago mi konyekab ne berber tabanwekab ng’ony.
Proverbs17:25 Werit ne berber ko arogenet eng’ kwandanyi
Proverbs17:26 Ma mie kogeny kebir ne bo iman
Proverbs17:27 Tinyei naet ne maiseeri ng’alekyik: Ak tinyei kaguiyet inendet ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne bo muitaet.
Proverbs17:28 Agot ne berber

Proverbs18:2 Maboiboitune ne berber kaguiyet
Proverbs18:3 Ye nyo kiptengekyot
Proverbs18:4 U beekab keringet ne loo ng’alekab chito; U kondametutab ng’omnatet kererut ne rootei.
Proverbs18:5 Ma mie ketiytii kiptengekyot
Proverbs18:6 Chutei kutitab ne berber ole mi tiiyet
Proverbs18:7 Ng’emisietab ne berber kutinnyi
Proverbs18:8 U tuguk che anyiny ng’alekab chaamindet
Proverbs18:9 Inendet agine ne choriren eng’ boisiennyi Ko tupcho ak ng’emindet.
Proverbs18:10 Irimet ne kim kainetab Jehovah: Mwechin ne bo iman
Proverbs18:11 Magornatetab magoriot ko nganasennyi ne kim
Proverbs18:12 Menei muguleldab chi kotom konyor ng’emisiet
Proverbs18:13 Inendet ne wolu ko ma epchi it
Proverbs18:14 Igimiti tamirmirietab chito nyalulnatennyi; Ago imuchi ng’o komuita eng’ arogenet?

Proverbs18:17 Chito ne sib kong’alali
Proverbs18:18 Iwong’u kabeletab ge barbariat
Proverbs18:19 Uui kosiir nganaset ne kim keweech tupchet ne kiginach: Ak u tiiyosiek che u choto
Proverbs18:20 Biyonyi moetab chi logoekab kutinnyi; Biyonyi inendet iyotetab kutinnyi.
Proverbs18:21 Mitei kimnatetab ng’elyepta
Proverbs18:22 Nyoru kit ne mie age tugul ne nyoru osotiot ne ituni
Proverbs18:23 Boisie kibananiat kagaigaosiek: Ago wolu magoriot kong’emei.
Proverbs18:24 Cheng’jingei ng’emisiet inendet ne cheng’ei choronok che chang’: Ago mi choruet ne namegei kosiir ng’etab kamet.
Proverbs19:1 Kaigai kibananiat ne wendote imandanyi Kosiir ne imaasat eng’ ng’alekyik
Proverbs19:2 Ma mie kogeny sobondo ne matinyei naet; Ak yaei tengekto inendet ne sartae bandanyi.
Proverbs19:3 Igunuri oretab chito berberindanyi. Ak konerekyin Jehovah eng’ muguleldanyi.
Proverbs19:4 Tesei choronok che chang’ magornatet: Ago itabanegei kibananiat choruennyi.
Proverbs19:5 Magimetoi baoriatab lembech ama kibir; Ak machilili inendet ne mwaei lembechek.
Proverbs19:6 Rirjin bik che chang’ mieindab chito ne toogunot: Ak chi age tugul ko choruetab inendet ne igoitoi konunoik.
Proverbs19:7 Wechei kibananiat tupchosiekyik tugul: Istoegei anyun ne tia choronokyik! Isube ichek ng’alek
Proverbs19:8 Chamei sobondanyi ne nyoru ng’omnatet: Nyoru mieindo inendet ne ribei naet.
Proverbs19:9 Magimetoi baoriatab lembech ama kibir; Ak lusei inendet ne mwaei lembechek.
Proverbs19:10 Manyoljin tugukab talbisto ne berber; Kotam nee anyun ngele bou otwogindet werikab laitoriat.
Proverbs19:11 Masartae neregek chito ne ng’om; Ak egu torornatennyi ye kasiirtoe bistoet.
Proverbs19:12 U borisenetab ng’etundo neregekab laitoriat; Ago u mieindanyi rewot ne mi suswek.
Proverbs19:13 Nyalildab kwandanyi werit ne berber: U beek che saitoi bolatetab osotiot.
Proverbs19:14 Got ak magornatosiekab chi ko borotet ne bunu kwanisiek; Ago bunu Jehovah osotiot ne ng’om.
Proverbs19:15 Igochin chito chorirnatet ruondo ne nyigis; Amei rubet chito ne choriren.
Proverbs19:16 Ribei sobondanyi ne ribei ng’atutik: Ago meei ne maribei ortinwekyik.
Proverbs19:17 Inendet ne rire kibananiat ko kabesendochi Jehovah
Proverbs19:18 Itigon wering’ung’ kota komi kamang’unet; Amat itil eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile mie ngo mee.
Proverbs19:19 Nyoru biret chito ne tinyei nereknatet ne o: Amu ngot isoru inendet
Proverbs19:20 Epchi it kotigonet
Proverbs19:21 Mi chobutik che chang’ muguleldab chito; Ago tebyei kotigonetab Jehovah.
Proverbs19:22 Kichamei chito amu mieindanyi: Ak kaigai kibananiat kosiir kiplembechwet.
Proverbs19:23 Tokyingei sobondo kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: Yamei kotugul kaiyweisionoto inendet ne tinyei: Manyonjin yaitiet.
Proverbs19:24 Unyei eunnyi eng’ tabet chito ne choriren
Proverbs19:25 Bir sasindet
Proverbs19:26 Ibu kalilanet ak tewernatert
Proverbs19:27 Amat igas anyun werinnyu konetisiet Ne ibeetenen ng’alekab ng’omnatet.
Proverbs19:28 Chotei kiruoget baoriat ne matilei kiy; Ak lugui yaitiet kutuswekab kiptengeginik.
Proverbs19:29 Kichopchin kiruogutik chotik
Proverbs20:1 Chotindet divaik
Proverbs20:2 U borisenetab ng’etundo kamuisetab laitoriat: Inendet ne tachei laitoriat koyachin sobondanyi tengekto.
Proverbs20:3 Teegisto eng’ chi ngo istoegei boriet: Ago bolei age tugul ne berber.
Proverbs20:4 Machamei kobatis inendet ne choriren eng’ betusiekab kaititiet; Somsoti anyun kegesisie
Proverbs20:5 U riret kiruoget eng’ muguleldab chito
Proverbs20:6 Ibortoi chi age tugul eng’ bik che chang’ mieindanyi: Ago imuchi ng’o konyor chito ne kiyani?
Proverbs20:7 Iberurotin lagokab chito ne bo iman
Proverbs20:8 Iseertoi yaitwogik tugul eng’ konyekyik Laitoriat ne tebe ng’echeretab kiruoget.
Proverbs20:9 Ng’o ne imuchi komwa kole
Proverbs20:10 Ratilisiek che terotin
Proverbs20:11 Naoksei lakwet eng’ boisionikyik
Proverbs20:12 Kiyai Jehovah tuwai
Proverbs20:13 Amecham ruondo
Proverbs20:14 Mwaei alindet kole
Proverbs20:15 Mi tahabu
Proverbs20:16 Nam ngorietab inendet ne tononjin toondet; Ak onam inendet koek kaarorunet ne tononjin toek.
Proverbs20:17 Anyiny eng’ chi amitwogikab lembeita; Ago ne matia konyi kutinnyi koik.
Proverbs20:18 Kigimiti chobutiet age tugul eng’ kiruoget: Ak iyai luget eng’ ng’omnatet.
Proverbs20:19 Ng’anyei ung’otik ne iboti ng’alek; Amat onamge anyun ak inendet ne iberberisiei.
Proverbs20:20 Kimisi eng’ mesundeito ne o mising’ Taitab age tugul ne sasei kwandanyi anan kamet.
Proverbs20:21 Borotet ne biitu eng’ chokyinet Ko magiberuri eng’ let.
Proverbs20:22 Amat imwa ile
Proverbs20:23 Wechei Jehovah ratilisiek che terotin; Ama mie kerutietab lembech.
Proverbs20:24 Bo Jehovah kakwautikab chi; Imuktoi ano anyun chi koguiyo orennyi?
Proverbs20:25 Mestet eng’ chi kosartae kole
Proverbs20:26 Iyestoi laitoriat ne ng’om kiptengeginik
Proverbs20:27 Tait ne bo Jehovah tamirmirietab chi
Proverbs20:28 Ribei rirenet ak iman laitoriat: Ak kogimiti rirenet ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet.
Proverbs20:29 Torornatetab murenik ko kimnatenywa: Ak kororonindab boisiek kalwalek.
Proverbs20:30 Iundoi yaitwogik birutik che ng’wonen: Ak itei kwerutik moet orit.
Proverbs21:1 U ainosiek muguleldab laitoriat eng’ eutab Jehovah: Imuti kotokyigei oldo tugul ole machei.
Proverbs21:2 Len chi bo iman orennyi age tugul: Ago kerei Jehovah mugulelwek eng’ karogendoet.
Proverbs21:3 Keyaei iman ak kiruoget Ko taachaksei eng’ taitab Jehovah kosiir korosiot.
Proverbs21:4 Konyek che tinyei menotet
Proverbs21:5 Tokyingei chang’indo kityo kabwatutikab che igiilegei: Ago banani age tugul ne sartae.
Proverbs21:6 Ye kinyoru konoraik eng’ lembeita Ko u kibungweret ne kiwirjin komosi ak komosi; cheng’ei meet che cheng’ei choto.
Proverbs21:7 Onei kiptengeginik koromnatenywa; Amu esioi koruoch.
Proverbs21:8 Kunur mising’ oretab inendet ne laei ng’ogisto: Ago eng’ inendet ne tilil
Proverbs21:9 Kaigai kemeny taban eng’ got barak
Proverbs21:10 Machei yaitiet sobondab chito ne ya: Manyoru chamet chitab kokwennyi eng’ tainnyi.
Proverbs21:11 Ye kibir chotindet
Proverbs21:12 Ibwati chitab iman gotab kiptengekyot; Ole kigabuitoi kiptengeginik eng’ ng’emisienywa.
Proverbs21:13 Inendet ne timei itikyik ye rirei kibananiat
Proverbs21:14 Imisi neregek konunotiot ne kigonu eng’ ung’ot
Proverbs21:15 Boiboiyet eng’ chito ne bo iman koyai kiruoget; Ago ng’emisiet eng’ yaikab tengekto.
Proverbs21:16 Imuunyi eng’ tuiyetab che kigobek Chito ne mastoi eng’ oretab kaguiyet.
Proverbs21:17 Egu kibananiat chito ne chamei ureriet: Maegu magoriot inendet ne chamei divaik ak mwanik.
Proverbs21:18 Egu kiptengekyot ne kitiage ne bo iman; Ak kogeeri kaberberindet che bo iman.
Proverbs21:19 Kaigai kemeny kong’atet
Proverbs21:20 Mitei konoraik che bo kamanutiet ne o
Proverbs21:21 Inendet ne isubi imanda ak rirenet
Proverbs21:22 Lanyei chito ne ng’om nganasetab che kimen
Proverbs21:23 Age tugul ne ribei kutinnyi ak ng’elyeptanyi Koribei sobondanyi si manyor nyalilwogik.
Proverbs21:24 Kiguure chotindet chito ne menei
Proverbs21:25 Barei chito ne choriren magennyi; Amu esioi eunekyik kobois.
Proverbs21:26 Mi ne kasei miat eng’ keiyandit bet komugul: Ago igoitoi ne bo iman ama etei.
Proverbs21:27 Kit ne kiwechei korosiotab kiptengeginik: Kotam nee anyun ye ibu korosiondonoto
Proverbs21:28 Lusei baoriat ne bo lembech: Ago ng’alali ng’alek che tebyei keny chito ne kasei.
Proverbs21:29 Iuuiiti togennyi chito ne ya: Ago chobei ortinwekyik chito ne bo iman.
Proverbs21:30 Mami ng’omnatet anan kaguiyet Anan kiruoget ne kirindoi Jehovah.
Proverbs21:31 Choboksei mbartanyit agobo betutab luget: Ago bo katerteret Jehovah.

Proverbs23:2 Ak inde rotwet moktang’ung’
