Proverbs25:1 Kalewenaikab Solomon chuto agichek
Proverbs25:2 Torornatetab Kamuktaindet kouny kiy: Ago torornatetab laitorinik kocheng’ ng’olyo age tugul.
Proverbs25:3 Ko u ye maisiagaksei tororindab kipsengwet
Proverbs25:4 Kenende michikyigek eng’ feda
Proverbs25:5 Iste kiptengekyot eng’ taitab laitoriat
Proverbs25:6 Amelosuge eng’ taitab laitoriat
Proverbs25:7 Amu kaigai ngelenjin
Proverbs25:8 Amat isib iyai boriet
Proverbs25:9 Oruoch ak chitab kokweng’ung’ inegei
Proverbs25:10 Si maitewerin inendet ne kasei
Proverbs25:11 U logoekab tahabu che mi kerebonikab feda Ng’olyot ne kemwaei eng’ sait ne nyolu.
Proverbs25:12 U munaiyetab itit ne bo tahabu
Proverbs25:13 U kaititietab teluchi eng’ betusiekab kesisiet
Proverbs25:14 U bolik ak usonet ne matinyei ropta
Proverbs25:15 Kigoigoi kiruogindet eng’ muitaet ne o

Proverbs26:2 Ko u ye maombenoti buch chepkelembut

Proverbs26:5 Wolji ne berber ko u berberindanyi
Proverbs26:6 Tilei kelyekyik
Proverbs26:7 Ko u ye songinindos kelyekab ne ing’wali: Ko u noto kalewenet eng’ kutuswekab che berber.
Proverbs26:8 U chito ne indoi koita borowet ne kiwirtoisie
Proverbs26:9 U katet ne toorei eutab kibogitiot
Proverbs26:10 U mwogindet ne iguoteni tugul
Proverbs26:11 U seset ne weekyingei kang’undaikyik
Proverbs26:12 Tos igeere chito ne iityingei kole ng’om eng’ losennyi bo ge? Mitei kamang’unet eng’ chito ne berber kosiir inendet.

Proverbs26:26 Agot ngo tugegei wechet eng’ ng’alset

Proverbs27:1 Amechauge agobo mutai; Amu mengen kit ne biitu eng’ betut age tugul.
Proverbs27:2 Ingolosun age
Proverbs27:3 Nyigis koita
Proverbs27:4 Korom nereknatet
Proverbs27:5 Kaigai keretab kong’ ne toogu Kosiir chamnyet ne kiunyei.
Proverbs27:6 Bo iman kaguotenetab choruet: Ago chang’ ng’ututosiekab bunyot.
Proverbs27:7 Wechei masamek chito ne biyong’ot: Ago anyiny kiy age tugul ne ng’wan eng’ chito ne amei rubo.
Proverbs27:8 U taritiet ne ng’eete keswennyi koombenoti
Proverbs27:9 Iboiboi muguleldo mwanik ak nyamdutik: Iboiboi ko u noto anyinyindab choruetab chi ye toreti inendet.

Proverbs27:11 Werinnyu
Proverbs27:12 Keerei chito ne ng’om yaitiet
Proverbs27:13 Nam ngorietab inendet ne tononjin toondet; Ak inam inendet koek kaarorunet ne tononjin chepkugoniot.

Proverbs27:18 Age tugul ne ribei mogoiywet koamei logoekyik; Ak kitorori inendet ne ribei kiptaiyandennyi.

Proverbs27:26 Bo ngoroiguk arekab kechir
Proverbs27:27 Ak mitei chegab ng’ororek che yamei koek amitwogiguk
Proverbs28:1 Mweei kiptengekyot ye maonei chi: Ago nyigonen che bo iman ko u ng’etundo.
Proverbs28:2 Chang’aitu bounikab emet amu bistoennyi: Ago tebyei keny emonoto amu bik che tinyei kaguiye ak naet.
Proverbs28:3 U usonet ropta ne ng’emei amitwogik Chito ne matinyei kiy
Proverbs28:4 Ilosu bik che yaach icheget che metoi ng’atutik: Ago borie bichoto yaachen icheget che ribei ng’atutik.
Proverbs28:5 Maiguitos bik che yaach kiruoget: Ago iguitos tuguk tugul icheget che cheng’ei Jehovah.
Proverbs28:6 Kaigai kibananiat ne wendote imandanyi
Proverbs28:7 Werit ne ng’om age tugul ne ribei ng’atutik: Ago iteweri kwandanyi inendet ne choruetab kipkeinik.
Proverbs28:8 Inendet ne tesei tugukyik eng’ keljinet ne siirei ne nyolu
Proverbs28:9 Kiwechei saetab inendet Ne esioi kogas ng’atutik.
Proverbs28:10 Ibutyin keringennyi Age tugul ne imaasi che bo iman kobun oret ne ya: Ago borei eng’ tuguk che miach
Proverbs28:11 Mene magoriot ng’omnatennyi; Ago isiachi inendet kibananiat ne tinyei kaguiyet.
Proverbs28:12 Biitu torornatet ne o ye iterterisiei che bo iman: Ago ye ng’eetyo kiptengeginik
Proverbs28:13 Manyoru berurto inendet ne unyei bistaosiekyik: Ago nyoru rirenet age tugul ne ng’anyei ak kometo.
Proverbs28:14 Baibai chito ne iyweisiei kotugul; Ago ibutyin yaitiet inendet ne iuuiiti muguleldanyi.
Proverbs28:15 U ng’etundo ne boriseni ak tiondo ne u keerit ne ombenoti
Proverbs28:16 Usindet ne o agine bounindet ne matinyei kaguiyet: Ago inendet ne wechei kasetab miat kotesei betusiekyik.
Proverbs28:17 Mwechin keringet chito ne mi baragunnyi korotikab chi age; Amat korany chi inendet.
Proverbs28:18 Kisoru age tugul ne wendote imanda: Ago ibuti ngunoto inendet ne imaasat eng’ ortinwekyik.
Proverbs28:19 Nyoru amitwogik che chang’ chito ne ibati korennyi: Ago nyoru bananda ne o inendet ne isubi tangoita.
Proverbs28:20 Nyoru berurwogik che chang’ chito ne bo iman: Ago magimetoi ama kibir inendet ne labatyin koek magorio.
Proverbs28:21 Ma mie ketiytii bik: Anan kobistoe chi kole si konyor kererutiet.
Proverbs28:22 Labatyin magornatosiek inendet ne tinyei kong’ ne ya
Proverbs28:23 Tun nyoru chamet inendet ne kere kong’ chi Kosiir inendet ne chemwai kut.
Proverbs28:24 Inendet ne chorei tugukab kwandanyi anan kamet
Proverbs28:25 Ing’eeti boriet inendet ne tinyei kasetab miat: Ago nerei inendet ne imang’u Jehovah.
Proverbs28:26 Berber inendet ne imang’ugei: Ago kisoru age tugul ne wendote ng’omnatet.
Proverbs28:27 Mararjin kiy inendet ne igochin tuguk kibananiat: Ago nyoru chubisiosiek che chang’ inendet ne unyei konyekyik.
Proverbs28:28 Unyegei bik
Proverbs29:1 Inendet ne iuuiiti kaatinnyi
Proverbs29:2 Boiboitu bik ngo tesak che bo iman: Ago tigendos bik ngo bounis chito ne ya.
Proverbs29:3 Iboiboi kwanda age tugul ne chamei ng’omnatet: Ago iseerseeri tuguk inendet ne namegei ak chepkugonik.
Proverbs29:4 Igimiti emet laitoriat eng’ kiruoknatet: Ago igabui emet inendet ne taachei tuguk che kigoigoisie.
Proverbs29:5 Iitochin kakwautikyik mestet ne regereiywot Chito ne ilosu buch chitab kokwennyi.
Proverbs29:6 Mitei mestet bistoetab chito ne ya; Ago tieni ak kobaibai chito ne bo iman.
Proverbs29:7 Ibwati chito ne bo iman ng’alekab kibananok: Matinyei kaguiyet kiptengekyot konai noto.
Proverbs29:8 Beelei nganaset chotik: Ago kirindoi bik che ng’omen neregek.
Proverbs29:9 Ngot kotinyei kabeletab ge chito ne ng’om ak chito ne berber
Proverbs29:10 Wechei bik che tumdoi korotik
Proverbs29:11 Ibortoi chito ne berber neregekyik tugul: Ago bou ak kosisei eng’ choto
Proverbs29:12 Ngot koepchi it bounindet lembeita
Proverbs29:13 Tuitos kibagenge kibananiat ak usindet: Ikweng’jin Jehovah konyekab ichek tuwai.
Proverbs29:14 Kigimiti agoi koigeny laitornatetab laitoriat Ne iruokyin kibananok eng’ imanda.
Proverbs29:15 Ibu kirokto ak keretab kong’ ng’omnatet: Ago iteweri kamet lakwet ne kigochin koboigei.
Proverbs29:16 Ye tesak kiptengeginik
Proverbs29:17 Itigon wering’ung’
Proverbs29:18 Betyoti bik eng’ ole mami ng’ang’utiet: Ago baibai inendet ne ribei ng’atutiet.
Proverbs29:19 Magitigone ng’alek otwogindet: Amu nganda iguitos
Proverbs29:20 Tos igeere chi ne sartae ng’alekyik? Mitei kamang’unet eng’ chito ne berber kosiir inendet.
Proverbs29:21 Inendet ne ribei komie otwogindennyi koboch ko ta ko lakwa Kotun koegu werit eng’ let.
Proverbs29:22 Ing’eeti boriet kimnerekyiat
Proverbs29:23 Iming’ini chi menotennyi: Ago nyoru teegisto inendet ne iming’inegei.
Proverbs29:24 Wechei sobondanyi inendet ne tinyei yamdaet ak chorindet: Kasei chubisiet ama twegu.
Proverbs29:25 Ibu mestet kaiyweisiet ne kiywei chi: Ago nyoru chametab ge age tugul ne imang’u Jehovah.
Proverbs29:26 Cheng’ei che chang’ mieindo eng’ bounindet: Ago bunu gab Jehovah kiruogetab chi.
Proverbs29:27 Wechei che bo iman ne ma bo iman: Wechei ne ya ne isubi iman.
Proverbs30:1 Ng’alekab Agur weritab Jake; maoinatet. Kilenji chito Itiel
Proverbs30:2 A u tiony iman asiir chi tugul
Proverbs30:3 Ak tom anetge ng’omnatet
Proverbs30:4 Ng’o ne kitogosta kipsengwet
Proverbs30:5 Tilil ng’olyotab age tugul ne bo Kamuktaindet: Inendet ko long’etab ichek che imang’u inendet.
Proverbs30:6 Ametesyi ng’olyo ng’alekyik
Proverbs30:7 Kasomin tuguk aeng’; Amat ietena kotom amee:
Proverbs30:8 Iste kolooegitu eng’ ane
Proverbs30:9 Si mabiye ak aesien
Proverbs30:10 Ametaam otwogindet eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyi
Proverbs30:11 Mi ibinda ne chubei kwanisiekwak
Proverbs30:12 Mitei ibinda ne iitigei kole tilil
Proverbs30:13 Mitei ibinda
Proverbs30:14 Mitei ibinda che u kelekwak rotokab chok
Proverbs30:15 Tinyei binyinyet arek aeng’
Proverbs30:16 Choto ko kererit
Proverbs30:17 Kondab chito ne chotei kwandanyi
Proverbs30:18 Mitei tuguk somogu che bo kwong’et ne o eng’ ane
Proverbs30:19 Ole tirirendoi kipsichit eng’ soet: Ole wetitoi erenet eng’ ruandet; Ole wetitoi melit eng’ nyanjet; Ak ole teptoi mureno ak chepto.
Proverbs30:20 U ni atebetab kwondo ne tinyei ibetab ge; Amisiei ak kouus kutit
Proverbs30:21 Botani ng’ony agobo tuguk somok
Proverbs30:22 Choto ko chu: otwogindet ne kaek laitoriat; Ak chito ne abusat ye kagobiyo;
Proverbs30:23 Ak kwondo ne kiwechei ye kagitun; Ak chepto ne otwogindet ne tun bunjin tugukab kwondo ne bou inendet.
Proverbs30:24 Mitei tuguk ang’wanu ng’ony che mengechen
Proverbs30:25 Tiong’ik che ma kimen birechik
Proverbs30:26 Tiong’ik che nyerotin kenerok
Proverbs30:27 Matinyei laitoriat chereng’enyinik
Proverbs30:28 Namisie cheringisiet eunekyik
Proverbs30:29 Mitei tuguk somogu che bendoti komie eng’ bandanywa
Proverbs30:30 Choto ko chu: ng’etundo
Proverbs30:31 Seset ne chepcheb; ak kwesta agine; Ak laitoriat ne magirindoi chi.
Proverbs30:32 Ngot ko kaitororge eng’ berberindo
Proverbs30:33 Amu nyonei mwaita ye kisach chego
Proverbs31:1 Ng’alekab laitoriat Lemuel; maoinatet ne kiinet kamet.
Proverbs31:2 Nee
Proverbs31:3 Amegochi karusiek kimnateng’ung’
Proverbs31:4 Manyoljin laitorinik
Proverbs31:5 Si ye kagoee
Proverbs31:6 Inage maiyek inendet ne machei kolus
Proverbs31:7 Ingoee ak koutie banandanyi
Proverbs31:8 Ng’alal agobo ne namat kut
Proverbs31:9 Ng’alal
Proverbs31:10 Ng’o ne imuchi konyor kwondo ne nyolunot? Amu siirei mising’ kamanutiennyi
Proverbs31:11 Imang’u manong’otiondennyi inendet
Proverbs31:12 Yachin ne mie osotiondennyi inendet
Proverbs31:13 Cheng’ei osotiondonoto kororikab kechirek ak katanit
Proverbs31:14 U inendet melisiekab che iboti tuguk che kialdoi; Amu ibu amitwogikyik eng’ ole loo.
Proverbs31:15 Ng’eetei kogeny kota ko kemoi
Proverbs31:16 Ibwati agobo mbaret
Proverbs31:17 Kermenegei kimnatet
Proverbs31:18 Keerei kole tinyei keljinet mung’arennyi: Mameei tainnyi kemoi.
Proverbs31:19 Namei ketit ne kitae kororik
Proverbs31:20 Aiyeb inendet eng’ kibananiat; Ee
Proverbs31:21 Maiywei kole tos nyor bikyik kaititietab teluchi; Amu ilaachi bik tugul che bo gonnyi ngoroik che biriren.
Proverbs31:22 Napchingei kitambaok che bo lelesta; Bo ngoroikyik katanit ne kararan ak ko bo tuguk che arusen ne birir.
Proverbs31:23 Naat manong’otiondennyi eng’ ormarichok
Proverbs31:24 Nabei osotiondonoto ngoroikab katanit si koalda; Igochin chemung’arainik birenoik.
Proverbs31:25 Kimnatet ak teegisto ko ngoroikyik; Rorechin betusiek che bwanei.
Proverbs31:26 Twegu eng’ ng’omnatet; Mi kutinnyi konetisietab talasiet.
Proverbs31:27 Ribei komie atebosiekab bikab gonnyi
Proverbs31:28 Ng’eetos lagokyik
Proverbs31:29 Kigoyai ne nyolunot tibik che chang’
Proverbs31:30 Iberberisiei mieindo
Proverbs31:31 Ogochi logoekab eunekyik; Ak ingolos boisionikyik inendet eng’ ormarichok.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ng’alekab Amdoindet
Ecclesiastes1:2 Mwaei Amdoindet kole
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nee keljinet ne nyoru chito eng’ boisionikyik tugul che yaei eng’ kureretab asista?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Siirtoi ibinda age
Ecclesiastes1:5 Choru kogeny asista
Ecclesiastes1:6 Usyin usonet murot ne bo tai
Ecclesiastes1:7 Rootyin ainosiek tugul nyanjet
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ng’etos tuguk tugul; maimuchi chi komwa: mabiyonyi konda che keerei
Ecclesiastes1:9 Noto ne kigobiit
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tos mi kiy ne mwaei bik kole
Ecclesiastes1:11 Mami kabwato agobo ibinwek che bo tai; ama kibwati ibinwek che bo let che ta kobwanei
Ecclesiastes1:12 Kia laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem ane Amdoindet.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ak kiagiil muguleldanyu kocheng’ ak kosiach eng’ ng’omnatet agobo tuguk tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab kipsengwet: kiigochi Kamuktaindet werikab bik boisiet ne bo nyalilda kotigone.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Kiageer boisionik tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista; ak ogeero
Ecclesiastes1:15 Magimuchi kilitit kit ne kunur: ama kimuchi kiit ne mami.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Kiamwachi muguleldanyu alenji
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ak kiagiil muguleldanyu konai ng’omnatet
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu mi arogenet ne o ng’omnatet ne o: ak tesei arogenet inendet ne tesei ng’omnatet.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Kiamwa eng’ muguleldanyu ale
Ecclesiastes2:2 Kiamwa agobo roriot ale
Ecclesiastes2:3 Kiasiach eng’ muguleldanyu ole aboiboititoi bortanyu eng’ divaik
Ecclesiastes2:4 Kiayachige boisiosiek che eechen; kiateekyige gorik; kiaminjige sabibuk;
Ecclesiastes2:5 kiabatyige mbarenik ak achob ole kiuure
Ecclesiastes2:6 Kiayachige tamboinik
Ecclesiastes2:7 Kiaal otwogik che murenik ak che tibik
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kiayumjige kogeny feda ak tahabu
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kia o anyun
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ak kima aete konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne kimach: ma aete muguleldanyu boiboiyet age tugul
Ecclesiastes2:11 Kiageer anyun boisionik tugul che kiayai
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kiawelelge anyun acheng’ ng’omnatet
Ecclesiastes2:13 Kiageer anyun ale siirei ng’omnatet berberindo
Ecclesiastes2:14 Tinyei konyek che keertoe ne ng’om
Ecclesiastes2:15 Kiale anyun eng’ muguleldanyu
Ecclesiastes2:16 Amu magibwati ne ng’om agoi
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kiawech anyun sobet amu kigona ng’wanindo boisiet ne kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista: amu buch tugul ak kaiimetab ge ne bo buch.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ak kiawech boisiennyu tugul ne kiabirtochige eng’ kureretab asista: amu eng’ ne matiny
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ak ng’o ne ingen ngo tun egu chito ne ng’om anan ko ne berber? Nganda u noto
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kiawelelge anyun ak agochi muguleldanyu koarogen amu boisiet tugul ne kiabirtochige eng’ kureretab asista.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Amu mi chito ne yaei boisiennyi eng’ ng’omnatet
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nee ne nyoru chito eng’ birtoennyi bo ge tugul
Ecclesiastes2:23 Amu bo arogenet betusiekyik tugul
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mami kit ne kaigai eng’ chito kosiir koamis ak koeeiso
Ecclesiastes2:25 Amu ng’o ne imuchi koamis
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amu igochin Kamuktaindet ng’omnatet

Ecclesiastes5:1 Rib keldang’ung’ ye iwendi gotab Kamuktaindet; amu kaigai kerikyi si kegas
Ecclesiastes5:2 Amat kosartae kuting’ung’
Ecclesiastes5:3 Amu nyonei karuotitoet eng’ boisionik che chang’; ak mwaei ne berber ng’alek che chang’.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ye iarorji Kamuktaindet kaarorunet
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kaigai amearorte
Ecclesiastes5:6 Amengogochi kuting’ung’ bortang’ung’ koyai tengek; anan imwa eng’ taitab malaikaiyat ile
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu mi ng’alek che chang’ eng’ chang’indab karuotitaosiek ak tuguk che bo buch; ago iywei inye Kamuktaindet.
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ngot igeer kesastae kibananiat
Ecclesiastes5:9 Bo tugul keljinetab ng’ony: boisiechin agine laitoriat tugukab mbar.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Mabiyonyi feda ne chamei feda; ama biyonyi tuguk che tesoksei
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ye tesak tuguk
Ecclesiastes5:12 Anyiny ruondab chito ne boisiei
Ecclesiastes5:13 Mi yaitiet ne ng’wan ne kiageer eng’ kureretab asista
Ecclesiastes5:14 ak betos magornatosiechoto eng’ boisiet ne ya; ak ngot ko kigosich werit

Ecclesiastes5:16 Nito agine ko yaitiet ne ng’wan
Ecclesiastes5:17 Amisiei kogeny eng’ betusiekyik tugul eng’ mesundeito
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ogeero
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ak chi age tugul agine ne kiigochi Kamuktaindet magornatosiek ak chang’indab tuguk
Ecclesiastes5:20 Amu ma kobwati mising’ betusiekab sobennyi; amu woljin Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ boiboindab muguleldanyi.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Mi yaitiet ne kiageer eng’ kureretab asista
Ecclesiastes6:2 chito ne igochin Kamuktaindet magornatosiek
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ngot kosich chito lagok bogol
Ecclesiastes6:4 amu nyonei buch
Ecclesiastes6:5 ama keer asista anan konai; tinyei nito kamuung’et kosiir ni kai.
Ecclesiastes6:6 Agot ngo sob kenyisiek elfut konyil aeng’
Ecclesiastes6:7 Bo boisiet tugul ne bo chito kutinnyi
Ecclesiastes6:8 Amu tinyei keljinet nee chito ne ng’om kosiir ne berber? Anan tinyei nee chito ne banan

Ecclesiastes6:10 Kiy age tugul ne mi
Ecclesiastes6:11 Amu mi tuguk che chang’ che tesei tangoita
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ng’o anyun ne ingen kit ne mie agobo chito eng’ sobennyi
Ecclesiastes7:1 Kaigai kainet ne mie kosiir mwanik che bo kamanutiet ne o; ak kaigai betutab meet kosiir betut ne kisichei chi.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kaigai kebe got ne kiteiye
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kaigai arogenet kosiir roriot: amu kiboiboi muguleldo eng’ arogenetab toget.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mi mugulelwekab che ng’omen got ne kiteiye; ago mi mugulelwekab che berber got ne bo boiboiyet.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kaigai kegas keretab kong’ ne bo chito ne ng’om
Ecclesiastes7:6 Amu u kateretab katok che mi mat ne mi teret ne kotkotat
Ecclesiastes7:7 Igochin iman sastaet chito ne ng’om koberberit; ak ng’emei kit ne kigoigoisie
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kaigai kagesunetab kiy kosiir taunennyi: kaigai ne muitoi eng’ tamirmiriet kosiir ne menei.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Amesartae nerek eng’ sobondang’ung’: amu tebe neregek tegetikab che berber.
Ecclesiastes7:10 Amemwa ile
Ecclesiastes7:11 Mie ng’omnatet ko u ye mie borotet: ee
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu irimet ng’omnatet ko u fedaisiek: ago telunatetab naet ko ni
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ibwat boisietab Kamuktaindet: amu ng’o ne imuchi kolitit kit ne kiyai inendet kogunurit?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Baibaitu eng’ betutab berurto
Ecclesiastes7:15 Kiageer choto tugul eng’ betusiekyuk che bo buch: mi chito ne bo iman ne meitoi imandanyi
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ametepte imanda ne siirtoot; ameng’omitu mising’; amu nee si ing’emge?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ameegu ne ya mising’
Ecclesiastes7:18 Mie inam komie nito; ee
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ng’omnatet ko kimnatetab chito ne ng’om ne siirei bounik taman che mi nganaset.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Iman
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ameepchi it kogeny ng’alek tugul che kimwaei; si megas kochubin otwogindeng’ung’:
Ecclesiastes7:22 amu ingen agine muguleldang’ung’ konyil che chang’ kole kiichub aginye alak ko u noto.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Kiageer chuto tugul eng’ ng’omnatet: kiale
Ecclesiastes7:24 Kit ne mi
Ecclesiastes7:25 Kiaweege
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ak anyoru kit ne ng’wan kosiir meet

Ecclesiastes7:29 Ogeero
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ng’o ne kergei ak chito ne ng’om? Ak ng’o ne ingen kaweegetab kiy? Igochin ng’omnatetab chito togennyi koluu
Ecclesiastes8:2 Aborun ale
Ecclesiastes8:3 Amesib iwe eng’ tainnyi; ameyai kiy ne ya kotugul: amu yaei laitoriat kiy age tugul ne iboiboegei.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Amu tinyei kimnatet ng’olyotab laitoriat; ak ng’o ne imuchi kolenji inendet
Ecclesiastes8:5 Manaei kiy ne ya age tugul ne ribei ng’atutiet; ak ibestos muguleldab chito ne ng’om betusiek ak kiruoget:
Ecclesiastes8:6 amu mi betut ak kiruoget ne bo ng’olyot age tugul; amu o nyalilda ne tinyei chito eng’ choto:
Ecclesiastes8:7 amu manaei kit ne biitu; amu tos ng’o ne imuchi komwachi inendet ole biitundoi kioto?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Mami chi ne tinyei kimnatet eng’ tamirmiriet korany tamirmiriet; ama tinyei kimnatet koboi betutab meet; ama mi undaet eng’ lugonoto: ama soru yaitiet inendet ne igochingei yaitionoto.
Ecclesiastes8:9 Kiageer chuto tugul
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ak kiageer ketubei kiptengeginik
Ecclesiastes8:11 Amu ma sib kiruokyin boisiet ne ya

Ecclesiastes8:13 ago mamieitu eng’ kiptengeginik
Ecclesiastes8:14 Mi tangoita ne yaoksei eng’ ng’ony; amu mi bik che bo iman

Ecclesiastes9:1 Kiabwat choto tugul eng’ muguleldanyu
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ityin bik tugul tuguk tugul kogergeit: ityin kit agenge chi ne bo iman ak chi ne ya; ityin ne mie
Ecclesiastes9:3 Nito ko yaitiet eng’ tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista
Ecclesiastes9:4 Amu tinyei kamang’unet inendet ne namegei ak tugul che soptos: amu kaigai seset ne sobei kosiir ng’etundo ne kagome.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Amu ingen che soptos kole begu: ago manaei kiy age tugul che kigobek
Ecclesiastes9:6 Kigobet chamnyenywa
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ui oldang’ung’
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ingoleelagitu ngoroiguk kotugul; ameng’ korarji mwaita meting’ung’.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Otebi eng’ boiboiyet ak osotiot ne ichame
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kit age tugul ne iyae eng’ eung’ung’
Ecclesiastes9:11 Kiaweege ak ageer eng’ kureretab asista
Ecclesiastes9:12 Amu manai chito agine betunnyi: u njirenik che kinamei eng’ regereiywot ne ya

Ecclesiastes9:14 Kimi nganaset ne ming’in

Ecclesiastes9:16 Kiale anyun

Ecclesiastes9:18 Mie ng’omnatet kosiir karik che bo luget: ago ng’emei kiptengekyot agenge mieinwek che chang’.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Buldos mwanik che anyiny che bo ng’omotiot
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mi muguleldab chito ne ng’om eunnyi ne bo tai; ago mi muguleldab ne berber eunnyi ne bo katam.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ee
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngot kolaljin neregekab bounindet
Ecclesiastes10:5 Mi yaitiet ne kiageer eng’ kureretab asista
Ecclesiastes10:6 kindoi berberindo komoswek che tororen
Ecclesiastes10:7 Kiageer otwogik kolanyei mbartanyisiek
Ecclesiastes10:8 Inendet ne balei keringet kobutyin yoto; ak age tugul ne butei ng’otwet kosusei erenet.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Iberjin koik chi age tugul ne waei; imuchi kokwer kwendet inendet ne betei.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ngo ng’utum karnet
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ngot kosusis erenet kotom kigaigai
Ecclesiastes10:12 Miachen ng’alekab chito ne ng’om; ago luguegei kutitab chito ne berber.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Berberindo taunetab ng’alekyik: ak kagesunetab ng’alalennyi ko iywek che ng’emisiei.
Ecclesiastes10:14 Tesei kogeny ne berber ng’alek: ago manaei chi kit ne biitu; ak ng’o ne mwachin inendet tuguk che biitu let eng’ inendet?
Ecclesiastes10:15 Boisietab che berber kogochin age tugul eng’ icheget kong’et

Ecclesiastes11:1 Wirji amitwogiguk beek; amu tun inyoru ko kagosiirto betusiek che chang’.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Igochi kebeberta bik tisab
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ngo nyi ropta bolik
Ecclesiastes11:4 Magolsei inendet ne ribei usonet; ama kesei inendet ne keerei bolik.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Ko u ye mengen oretab usonet anan ole nertoi kowekab lakwet eng’ moetab inendet ne managat; u noto mengen boisietab Kamuktaindet ne yaei tuguk tugul.

Ecclesiastes11:7 Anyiny iman lapkeiyet

Ecclesiastes12:1 Ibwat kogeny Yaindeng’ung’ eng’ betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’
Ecclesiastes12:2 kotom koimenit asista
Ecclesiastes12:3 eng’ betut ye tun botanso ribikab got
Ecclesiastes12:4 ak keger kurgotik eng’ oret
Ecclesiastes12:5 ee
Ecclesiastes12:6 kotom kitaach borowetab feda
Ecclesiastes12:7 ak koweekyigei ng’ung’unyek ng’ony ko u ye kinye
Ecclesiastes12:8 Mwaei Amdoindet kole
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ago
Ecclesiastes12:10 Kicheng’ Amdoindet ng’alek che taachaksei
Ecclesiastes12:11 U kiplitok ng’alekab bik che ng’omen
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kas anyun werinnyu kateunet: mami ole igesunegei siretab bukuisiek che chang’: ak ng’etei borto eng’ somanosiek che chang’.
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kagesunetab tuguchu ni; kagogasak tugul: iywei Kamuktaindet ak irib ng’atutikyik; amu nyoljin chito boisionito tugul.
Ecclesiastes12:14 Amu ipchin Kamuktaindet boisiet age tugul oldab kiruoget
SongOfSongs1:1 Tiendo ne siirei tugul
SongOfSongs1:2 Ingong’ututena kutinnyi: Amu siirei chamnyeng’ung’ divaik.
SongOfSongs1:3 Tinyei nyamdutiet ne mie mwaniguk; U kaineng’ung’ mwaita ne kirong’un; Chamin anyun bergeinik amu noto.
SongOfSongs1:4 Ichuuta; si keruou
SongOfSongs1:5 A tuui ak ko a kararan
SongOfSongs1:6 Amegeera
SongOfSongs1:7 Mwawa anyun
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngo mengen
SongOfSongs1:9 Ee chamanennyu
SongOfSongs1:10 Kororon matong’oik koboto lelestang’ung’
SongOfSongs1:11 Kiyaun achek tugukab tahabu che kigila
SongOfSongs1:12 Ye kitebyei laitoriat eng’ mesennyi
SongOfSongs1:13 U chamanennyu loletab tuguk che u igomoik
SongOfSongs1:14 U chamanennyu temet ne mi taptokab biribirinik Che mi mbarenikab sabibuk che bo En-gedi.
SongOfSongs1:15 Keero
SongOfSongs1:16 Keero
SongOfSongs1:17 Bambanikab gonnyo ko taragonik
SongOfSongs2:1 A taptetab Saron
SongOfSongs2:2 A u taptet ne mi kwenutab katok
SongOfSongs2:3 U ketitab logoek eng’ ketikab timin
SongOfSongs2:4 Kimutwa anyo gotab igorta
SongOfSongs2:5 Igimitena logoek che saiyotin
SongOfSongs2:6 Tiie metinnyu eunnyi ne bo katam
SongOfSongs2:7 Kayosiewok
SongOfSongs2:8 Ogas
SongOfSongs2:9 U chamanennyu cheptirgichet anan aruetab teweretiot: Ogeero
SongOfSongs2:10 King’alal chamanennyu kolenja
SongOfSongs2:11 Keero
SongOfSongs2:12 Yiestos taptok eng’ emet; Kagoit betusiekab tiendo
SongOfSongs2:13 Igochin mogoiywet logoekyik che tuonen korurio
SongOfSongs2:14 Ee cheptugennyu
SongOfSongs2:15 Namwech lelwek
SongOfSongs2:16 Nenyu chamanennyu
SongOfSongs2:17 Agoi kogaititit

SongOfSongs3:2 Kiale

SongOfSongs3:6 Ng’o ni togosu eng’ ong’atet ko u tolochikab iyeto

SongOfSongs3:11 Oba anyun

SongOfSongs4:2 U keleguk akwetab kechirek che kagetil kororikwak

SongOfSongs4:4 U kaating’ung’ teekset ne koi ne bo Daudi ne kigiteekyi karikab luget
SongOfSongs4:5 U kinaiguk tuwai arek aeng’ che bo chemnyogoset
SongOfSongs4:6 Agoi kogaititit

SongOfSongs4:14 Ketit ne bo nyamdutik ak karkom
SongOfSongs4:15 I kondametutab beekab mbarenik
SongOfSongs4:16 Ng’eet
SongOfSongs5:1 Kaanyo mbarennyu
SongOfSongs5:2 Kianuuchi
SongOfSongs5:3 Kaareegu kotinnyu; ta alaaktoi ano kogeny? Kaaun kelyekyuk; ta andoitoi ano simdo kogeny?
SongOfSongs5:4 Kiyogoune chamanennyu eunnyi konda ne mi kurget
SongOfSongs5:5 Kiang’eet alen ayatyi chamanennyu; Kisaitae eunekyuk tuguk che u igomoik
SongOfSongs5:6 Kiayatyi chamanennyu; Ago kiwelelgei chamanennyu ak kwo. Kitanui sobondanyu ye kingotwekwa: Kiacheng’ inendet
SongOfSongs5:7 Kinyorua ribik che bendoti eng’ nganaset
SongOfSongs5:8 Kayosiewok
SongOfSongs5:9 Siirei eng’ nee chamaneng’ung’ chamanet age
SongOfSongs5:10 Leel chamanennyu ago tilial ne birir
SongOfSongs5:11 U metinnyi tahabu ne kararan mising’
SongOfSongs5:12 U konyekyik che bo cheptugenik eng’ ngegusiekab kererusiek; Che kiune chego
SongOfSongs5:13 U matong’oikyik mbaretab nyamdutik
SongOfSongs5:14 U eunekyik peteinikab tahabu che kigitetyi berulo: U bortanyi kelekab belek che kigiliige sapire.
SongOfSongs5:15 U kelyekyik tolochikab koik che leelach
SongOfSongs5:16 Anyiny ng’alekyik mising’: ee
SongOfSongs6:1 Kawa ano chameneng’ung’
SongOfSongs6:2 Kachorjigei chamanennyu mbarennyi

SongOfSongs6:4 Ee chamanennyu
SongOfSongs6:5 Keer olin
SongOfSongs6:6 U keleguk akwetab kechirek
SongOfSongs6:7 U togeng’ung’ kebebertab logoiyat ne birir Ne tuchei sumeeguk.
SongOfSongs6:8 Mitei osotik tamanwogik lo che bo laitoriat
SongOfSongs6:9 Agenge cheptugennyu
SongOfSongs6:10 Ng’o ne tobendoi ko u karonet
SongOfSongs6:11 Kiachorjige mbaretab logoek che u njuguk
SongOfSongs6:12 Kingo tom anai
SongOfSongs6:13 Weeguge
SongOfSongs7:1 Kororon ne tia kelyeguk komi kweonik
SongOfSongs7:2 U mugeng’ung’ tabet ne mugul
SongOfSongs7:3 U kinaiguk tuwai arek aeng’ che bo chemnyogoset Che u saramekab cheptirgichet.
SongOfSongs7:4 U kaating’ung’ teekset ne koi ne bo kelekab belek; U konyeguk tamboinik che mi Hesbon
SongOfSongs7:5 U meting’ung’ Karmel
SongOfSongs7:6 I kararan ne tia ak ko i chamat
SongOfSongs7:7 U tononanito-ng’ung’et tiret
SongOfSongs7:8 Kiamwa ale
SongOfSongs7:9 Ak ingoigei kuting’ung’ divaik che miachen mising’
SongOfSongs7:10 A bo chamanennyu
SongOfSongs7:11 Nyo anyun chamanennyu
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngemusyi mbarenikab logoekab sabibuk; Ngegeer ngo kagong’atyo ketikab sabibuk
SongOfSongs7:13 Ng’uu ne anyiny tuguk che u labotik
SongOfSongs8:1 Kita kaigai nda kii u werit ne kitupche
SongOfSongs8:2 Ta kamutin iwe gotab kamennyu
SongOfSongs8:3 Ta katiie metinnyu eunnyi ne bo katam
SongOfSongs8:4 Kayosiewok
SongOfSongs8:5 Ng’o ni togosu eng’ ong’atet
SongOfSongs8:6 Indea muguleldang’ung’ ko u ng’okset
SongOfSongs8:7 Maimuchi beek che chang’ kotis chamnyet
SongOfSongs8:8 Kitinye chepto ne ming’in ne kitupche
SongOfSongs8:9 Ngot ko inatut inendet
SongOfSongs8:10 A inatut
SongOfSongs8:11 Kitinyei Solomon mbaretab sabibuk eng’ Baal-hamon; Kiimanakyi mbaranato bo sabibuk ribik; Kinyoljin chi tugul koib fedaisiek elfut che bo logoekyik.
SongOfSongs8:12 Mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk
SongOfSongs8:13 Inye ne imenye mbarenik
SongOfSongs8:14 Chakte
Isaiah1:1 Ng’ang’utietab Isaia weritab Amos
Isaiah1:2 Ogas
Isaiah1:3 Ingen eito chitab kobo
Isaiah1:4 Bwa
Isaiah1:5 Amu nee si kota kebirok
Isaiah1:6 Mami ole sobei koboch keldebesiet agoi metit; ago tinyei ng’otobosiek
Isaiah1:7 Kigoguber emeng’wong’; kigebeel nganasokwok; ibokyin toek emeng’wong’ ogeere
Isaiah1:8 Ak kigebagakta cheptab Sion ko u keriet eng’ mbaretab sabibuk
Isaiah1:9 Nda kima bagakwech Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ng’etunenik che ng’ering’ mising’
Isaiah1:10 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah
Isaiah1:11 Tilei nee eng’ ane chang’indab tiseiywekwok? Mwaei Jehovah. Kigonyiia kagochinoik che bo beelset che bo mengichik
Isaiah1:12 Ye obwa tainnyu
Isaiah1:13 Amatata oibu kagochinoik che matilei kiy; aweche nyamdutik che kibeelei; ma amuchi amuita agobo igorwekab arawet ne kaleel
Isaiah1:14 Wechei sobondanyu arawekwok che kaleel ak igorwekwok che kiging’at: inyalila tuguchoto; kaang’et eng’ laetab tuguchoto.
Isaiah1:15 Ak ye oiite eunekwok
Isaiah1:16 Ounge
Isaiah1:17 onetge oyai ne mie; ocheng’ kiruoget
Isaiah1:18 Obwa anyun
Isaiah1:19 Ngot ochame ak ogase it
Isaiah1:20 ago ngot oesie ak ongelelse
Isaiah1:21 Kaegundo ano chepkugoniot nganaset ne ko bo iman
Isaiah1:22 Kigoigei fedaisieguk michikyigek che kigenendoe feda
Isaiah1:23 Ngelelik bouniguk
Isaiah1:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat
Isaiah1:25 ak atokyin eunnyu
Isaiah1:26 ak aweegu kiruogiguk ko u eng’ tai
Isaiah1:27 Tun kitiachi Sion eng’ kiruoget
Isaiah1:28 Ago tun biitu ng’emisietab bistoik ak ne bo kiptengeginik eng’ betut agenge
Isaiah1:29 Amu ililandos ichek amu ketik che kiomache
Isaiah1:30 Amu oigeitu ketit ne yaamdos sogekyik
Isaiah1:31 Ak koigei che kimen katanisiek che arurendos
Isaiah2:1 Ng’olyotab Isaia weritab Amos
Isaiah2:2 Kimitu eng’ betusiek che bo let
Isaiah2:3 Ak tun itendenjin oloto bik che chang’ kolen
Isaiah2:4 Ak koruoksechin inendet bororiosiek
Isaiah2:5 Ee gotab Jakobo
Isaiah2:6 Amu kiibagakte biguk
Isaiah2:7 Nyiitat emenywa kogeny feda ak tahabu
Isaiah2:8 Nyiitat emenywa kogeny kanamonik; ilosu boisionikab eunekwak
Isaiah2:9 Ing’uruksei chito ne nyerat
Isaiah2:10 Chut ruandet
Isaiah2:11 Kinyeroti che ieetegei
Isaiah2:12 Amu tun biitu betutab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Isaiah2:13 Ak eng’ taragonik tugul che bo Lebanon
Isaiah2:14 ak eng’ tulonok tugul che koen
Isaiah2:15 ak eng’ teekset age tugul ne koi
Isaiah2:16 ak eng’ melisiek tugul che bo Tarsis
Isaiah2:17 Ak kiming’ini kaeetetab ge ne bo chito
Isaiah2:18 Ak igesugei kanamonik.
Isaiah2:19 Ak komwechi bik kebenonik che mi ruandosiek
Isaiah2:20 Laktoi chito kanamonikyik che bo feda betunoto
Isaiah2:21 si komwechi kebenonik
Isaiah2:22 Amomang’u chi
Isaiah3:1 Ogeer anyun-o
Isaiah3:2 koboto chito ne kim
Isaiah3:3 koboto kiptaiyatab bik konom
Isaiah3:4 Ak agochi lagok koek bounikwak
Isaiah3:5 Ak tun kiusei bik
Isaiah3:6 Ye tun nam chi ng’etab kamet eng’ gotab kwandanyi
Isaiah3:7 mwaei inendet eng’ betunoto kole
Isaiah3:8 Amu kogong’emak Jerusalem
Isaiah3:9 Baorianjin ichek togochikwak; ak komwaitoi tengekwogikwak ko u Sodom
Isaiah3:10 Omwachi ne bo iman olenji
Isaiah3:11 Bwa eng’ kiptengekyot! Yaitu eng’ inendet; amu kigochin melektab boisionikab eunekyik.
Isaiah3:12 Usei lagok bikyuk
Isaiah3:13 Tononi Jehovah kong’alaldowok
Isaiah3:14 Chutei Jehovah kiruoget
Isaiah3:15 Lyon anyun
Isaiah3:16 Kimwa kogeny Jehovah kole
Isaiah3:17 bire anyun Kiptaiyat tibikab Sion bokbogenetab metowekwak
Isaiah3:18 Istoi Kiptaiyat eng’ betunoto kororonindab mugurekwak
Isaiah3:19 munaok
Isaiah3:20 ak chepkuloik
Isaiah3:21 peteinik
Isaiah3:22 ngoroik che kororon che bo tuiyosiek
Isaiah3:23 kioinik
Isaiah3:24 Ak tun kigeere nyamdutik che anyiny
Isaiah3:25 Kibare mureniguk rotwetab chok
Isaiah3:26 Ak koririo ormarichokyik ak koteiyo; ak koguber ak kotebe ng’ony.
Isaiah4:1 Ak tun namei kwonyik tisabu muren agenge eng’ betunoto
Isaiah4:2 Kororonitu ak kotororitu eng’ betunoto temetab Jehovah
Isaiah4:3 Ak tun kiguure ne itabanat inendet ne ng’etu eng’ Sion
Isaiah4:4 ye tun kagoundo Jehovah simdab tibikab Sion
Isaiah4:5 Ak koyai Jehovah boldet ak iyeto eng’ bet kouur meng’otet tugul ne bo tulwetab Sion
Isaiah4:6 Ak tun biitu emait ne tun kiuure bet eng’ kiptoret
Isaiah5:1 Ngatienji chamanennyu tiendo ne bo chamanennyu agobo mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk. Kitinyei chamanennyu mbaretab sabibuk eng’ tulwet ne ming’in ne akwai mising’:
Isaiah5:2 ak kibal keringet koyieme
Isaiah5:3 Ara anyun
Isaiah5:4 Nee ne kita ta keyaei ne siirei
Isaiah5:5 Ui anyun nguno; amwawok kit ne aitoi mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk: aistoi ng’otwennyi
Isaiah5:6 ak angem; ma kesabori
Isaiah5:7 Mbaretab sabibuk ne bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko gotab Israel
Isaiah5:8 Bwa eng’ ichek che ituitos gorik
Isaiah5:9 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Isaiah5:10 Amu yiei ekaisiek tamanu che bo mbaretab sabibuk
Isaiah5:11 Bwa eng’ ichek che ng’eetos karon mising’
Isaiah5:12 Ak ketubet ak kibugandet
Isaiah5:13 Kigeluul anyun bikyuk
Isaiah5:14 Noto anyun
Isaiah5:15 Kinyeroti chito ne nyerat
Isaiah5:16 ago tororitu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ kiruoget
Isaiah5:17 Yeityo koagetyo arekab kechir ko u eng’ ole cham koagete
Isaiah5:18 Bwa eng’ ichek che ichuutune ng’ogisto boroonik che bo buch
Isaiah5:19 che mwaei kole
Isaiah5:20 Bwa eng’ ichek che kuure yaitiet mieindo
Isaiah5:21 Bwa eng’ ichek che indogei kole ki ng’omen
Isaiah5:22 Bwa eng’ ichek che koromen koee divaik
Isaiah5:23 Che iityin kiptengekyot agobo tugukab kagaigaet
Isaiah5:24 Noto anyun
Isaiah5:25 Kilalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah agobo bikyik
Isaiah5:26 Ak konamji barak songoliet koborji bororiosiek che looen
Isaiah5:27 mabiitu eng’ ichek ne ng’etei anan ko ne ibuti; ama mi ne inuuchi
Isaiah5:28 che ng’atiben kipchabonikwak
Isaiah5:29 u borisenenywa ne bo ng’etundo
Isaiah5:30 Ak komororji ichek eng’ betunoto ko u mororetab nyanjet: ak ngo keer chi emet
Isaiah6:1 Eng’ kenyit ne kimee laitoriat Usia
Isaiah6:2 Kitonondos serapik eng’ baragunnyi: kitinyei age tugul kebebaik lo; kituge aeng’ togennyi
Isaiah6:3 Ak kitwekyi age age kolenji
Isaiah6:4 Ak kiitumdumgei lumeiywekab tugatugikab kurget amu tugetab inendet ne kitwek
Isaiah6:5 Kiale anyun
Isaiah6:6 Kitirirenja anyun age eng’ serapik
Isaiah6:7 Ak kitwae kutinnyu
Isaiah6:8 Ak kiagas kutitab Kiptaiyat kolen
Isaiah6:9 Ak kile
Isaiah6:10 Yai mugulelwekab bichu konyigisitu
Isaiah6:11 Kiateebe anyun
Isaiah6:12 Ko kagouto Jehovah bik koba ole loo
Isaiah6:13 Ak ngot ko ta komi kebeberta agenge eng’ taman
Isaiah7:1 Eng’ betusiekab Ahas weritab Jotam
Isaiah7:2 Ak kigimwachi gotab Daudi
Isaiah7:3 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Isaia kolenji
Isaiah7:4 ak ilenji inendet
Isaiah7:5 Amu kagochaamin Suria
Isaiah7:6 Ongetogoste kebarge ak Juda
Isaiah7:7 kamwa ko u ni Kiptaiyat Jehovah
Isaiah7:8 Amu metitab Suria ko Damasko
Isaiah7:9 ak metitab Epraim ko Samaria
Isaiah7:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Ahas kogeny kolenji
Isaiah7:11 Som Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kaborunet; som agot ngo mitei riret
Isaiah7:12 Ago kimwa Ahas kole
Isaiah7:13 Ak kimwa kole
Isaiah7:14 Konok anyun Kiptaiyat inendet kaborunet; ogeero
Isaiah7:15 Amei inendet mwaitab chego ak kumik
Isaiah7:16 Amu kotom konai lakwet koesio ne ya
Isaiah7:17 Ibun Jehovah
Isaiah7:18 Ak eng’ betunoto koititenji Jehovah kalyang’et ne mi tabanwek che looen che bo ainosiekab Misri
Isaiah7:19 Ak kobwa
Isaiah7:20 Inemu metit Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ rotwet ne kialei
Isaiah7:21 Ak eng’ betunoto
Isaiah7:22 amu tun konu icheget chego che chang’
Isaiah7:23 Ak tun biitu eng’ betunoto katablelinik ak katok eng’ komosta age tugul
Isaiah7:24 Wendi chito oloto kotinyei kipchabonik ak kwanget: amu egu emonoto tugul katablelinik ak katok.
Isaiah7:25 Morikyini betunoto tulonok tugul che mengechen che kigibat
Isaiah8:1 Ak kilenja Jehovah
Isaiah8:2 si kobiit acheng’jige baorinik che kiyani
Isaiah8:3 Kiawe anyun oldab chebioset ne maotio; ak kimanach
Isaiah8:4 Amu kotom komuch lakwanato kotwek kole
Isaiah8:5 Ak king’alalwa Jehovah kogeny
Isaiah8:6 Amu kiesio bichu beekab Siloa che rootei mutyo
Isaiah8:7 keero
Isaiah8:8 ak kobokto kwo Juda; ak koyom kosiir oloto; nyiiei kot koit kaatit; ak konyiiei kaiitoetab kebebaikyik tebeesindab emeng’ung’
Isaiah8:9 Owaach
Isaiah8:10 Oruoch tugul
Isaiah8:11 Amu king’alalwa Jehovah ko u noto eng’ eut ne kim
Isaiah8:12 Amomwa ole
Isaiah8:13 Amu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek inegei ne ogonyiti; ak ingoek inendet ne oiywei
Isaiah8:14 Ak koek inendet ole tilil; ago egu koita ne inachi bich ak ruandet ne riichei bich eng’ gorik tuwai che bo Israel
Isaiah8:15 Kinachi che chang’ eng’ oloto
Isaiah8:16 Rat anyun baornatet
Isaiah8:17 Si agen Jehovah
Isaiah8:18 Ogeero
Isaiah8:19 Ak ye mwawok kole
Isaiah8:20 Onamge ak ng’atutik ak baornatet! Ngot ko mang’alal ichek kosub ng’olyondonito
Isaiah8:21 Ak tun siirtoe yoto
Isaiah8:22 ak kogeer ng’ony
Isaiah9:1 Ago mami mesundeito eng’ emet ne kitinyei bichiindo. Eng’ betusiek che bo tai
Isaiah9:2 Kogogeer lapkeiyet ne o bik che kibendote mesundeito: kogoluuchi lapkeiyet ichek che kimenyei emetab uruetab meet.
Isaiah9:3 Kiites bororiet
Isaiah9:4 Amu koiiri chogitab lautiennyi
Isaiah9:5 Amu kibeelei karik tugul che bo chitab luget eng’ wasetab ge
Isaiah9:6 Amu kagisikwech lakwet
Isaiah9:7 Mami ole igesunegei tesetab ge ne bo bounatennyi ak kalyet
Isaiah9:8 Kiiyokyi Kiptaiyat Jakobo ng’olyot
Isaiah9:9 Ak konai bik tugul
Isaiah9:10 Kagobutyo matabaruk
Isaiah9:11 Noto anyun ing’eeti Jehovah bounikab Resin
Isaiah9:12 Ing’eeti Suriek eng’ tai
Isaiah9:13 Nganda u noto ko ma weekyigei bik inendet ne kibir ichek
Isaiah9:14 Tilei anyun Jehovah metit ak katutiet eng’ Israel
Isaiah9:15 Metit ko boiyot ne konyitot; ak katutiet ko maotiot ne ineti lembechek.
Isaiah9:16 Amu ibeeti bichu icheget che indochin ak keng’emei ichek che kindochin.
Isaiah9:17 Maboiboitu Jehovah eng’ murenikwak
Isaiah9:18 Amu lalei yaitiet ko u mat; igesu katablelinik ak katok: ee
Isaiah9:19 Kigolal emet eng’ neregekab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: kagoigei bik kwenik che kilaali; marire chi ng’etab kamet.
Isaiah9:20 Wiriti age eng’ komostab eutab tai
Isaiah9:21 amei Manase Epraim; ak amei Epraim Manase: ak kogirindoi ichek tuwai Juda. Nganda u noto
Isaiah10:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che ng’atei ng’atutik che ma bo iman
Isaiah10:2 kobeet ne nyalili eng’ kiruoget
Isaiah10:3 Ak oyae nee eng’ betut ne ityinok bireng’wong’
Isaiah10:4 Ing’urukyin ichek kimonjororinik
Isaiah10:5 Bwa Asuriaindet
Isaiah10:6 Ayoktoi kobargei ak bororiet ne ya
Isaiah10:7 Ago maibwati ko u noto
Isaiah10:8 Amu kimwa kole
Isaiah10:9 Tos
Isaiah10:10 Ko u ye kagonyor eunnyu bounatosiekab kanamonik
Isaiah10:11 tos mayachini Jerusalem ak kanamonikyik ko u ye kiayachi Samaria ak kanamonikyik?
Isaiah10:12 Noto anyun ye tun kagoyai Kiptaiyat boisiennyi komugul eng’ tulwetab Sion ak eng’ Jerusalem
Isaiah10:13 Amu kigomwa kole
Isaiah10:14 ak kigonyor eunnyu magornatosiekab bororiosiek ko u keswetab taritiet; ak ko u ye iyumi chito koik che kigelakta
Isaiah10:15 Tos ichaugei aiywet eng’ inendet ne ebisie? Tos ieetegei musumenet eng’ inendet ne tilisie? Ko u nda itumdumi kirokto ne namei
Isaiah10:16 Igochin anyun Kiptaiyat
Isaiah10:17 Ak koek mat lapkeiyetab Israel
Isaiah10:18 Ak kobeel inendet torornatetab osnennyi
Isaiah10:19 Ak kong’ering’itu ketik che ng’etu che bo osnennyi
Isaiah10:20 Ak eng’ betunoto ko ma kotiiegei kogeny che king’et eng’ Israel
Isaiah10:21 Weekyingei Kamuktaindet ne bo kamuktaet
Isaiah10:22 Agot nganda u biguk che bo Israel ng’aniek che bo nyanjet
Isaiah10:23 Amu yaei Kiptaiyat
Isaiah10:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat
Isaiah10:25 Amu ta komi kitigin mising’
Isaiah10:26 Ak kong’eetyi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek inendet biret
Isaiah10:27 Ak eng’ betunoto
Isaiah10:28 Kagoit Aiat
Isaiah10:29 kagoba kosiir ole kibunei; kagoru Geba: botani Rama; kamwei Gibea ne bo Saul.
Isaiah10:30 Waach mising’
Isaiah10:31 Kamwei Madmena; iyumigei bik che menyei Gebim si komwei.
Isaiah10:32 Tonone Nob eng’ betuni bo rani: ing’wereri tulwetab cheptab Sion
Isaiah10:33 Ogeero
Isaiah10:34 Ak koluule inendet karik osnet ne o
Isaiah11:1 Ak komong’une temet oretab Jesii
Isaiah11:2 ak kotebe inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah
Isaiah11:3 Ak komi boiboiyennyi kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: amairuochi ko u ye keerei
Isaiah11:4 ago iruoksechin kibananok eng’ imanda
Isaiah11:5 Ak egu imanda birenet ne rategei
Isaiah11:6 Ak kotebi suiyot koboto aruetab kechir
Isaiah11:7 Ak koaget teta ak tiondo ne u keerit; ruitos moekwak tugul: ak koam ng’etundo suswek ko u teta.
Isaiah11:8 Ak kourerene lakwet ne reriei keringetab erenet
Isaiah11:9 Ma ito kiy chi anan kong’emis eng’ tulwennyu tugul ne tilil: amu nyiiei ng’ony naetab Jehovah ko u ye nyiiei beek nyanjet.
Isaiah11:10 Ak cheng’ei bororiosiek eng’ betunoto tigitiotab Jesii
Isaiah11:11 Ak eng’ betunoto koyogoito Kiptaiyat eunnyi kogeny ne bo aeng’
Isaiah11:12 Ak kolumda songoliet agobo bororiosiek
Isaiah11:13 Ak koistogei ng’et kondab Epraim kogeny
Isaiah11:14 Ak kobokyi tigigoikab Pilistik eng’ cherongo; ak koluul ichek tuwai bikab kong’asis: chuulei eunekwak kogirinda Edom ak Moab; ak kogas it ichek lagokab Amon.
Isaiah11:15 Ak kong’em Jehovah kowong’ ng’elyeptab nyanjetab Misri; ak kotwaitwai eunnyi kotokyi Ainet eng’ usonennyi ne beelsei
Isaiah11:16 Ak kobiit oret ne o ne bo bikyik che tun ng’etu eng’ Asuria; ko u ye kimi agobo Israel eng’ betut ne kitogosu komong’une emetab Misri.
Isaiah12:1 Ak eng’ betunoto imwae ile
Isaiah12:2 Ogeero
Isaiah12:3 Tun orame anyun beek eng’ boiboiyet
Isaiah12:4 Ak omwae eng’ betunoto ole
Isaiah12:5 Otienji Jehovah; amu kigoyai tuguk che bo telunatet: ingonaak nito eng’ ng’ony komugul.
Isaiah12:6 Owaach mising’ ak otiense
Isaiah13:1 Lautietab Babulon
Isaiah13:2 Olumde songoliet eng’ tulwet ne churat
Isaiah13:3 Koang’at bikyuk che itabanotin
Isaiah13:4 Bolatetab tuiyet eng’ tulonok
Isaiah13:5 Bunu ichek emet ne loo
Isaiah13:6 Oteiye; amu kagorik betutab Jehovah; nyonei ko u ng’emisiet ne bunu Inendet ne ko Kamuktaet.
Isaiah13:7 Nyaluldos anyun eunek tugul
Isaiah13:8 ak kotoptobenso; ak konam ichek ng’woninwek ak arogenosiek; nyoru ng’wanindo ko u kwondo ne amei moet: ak kokwong’e age age; ak koigei togochikwak togochikab liblibenetab mat.
Isaiah13:9 Ogeero
Isaiah13:10 Amu ma kogonu kecheikab kipsengwet ak kecheikyik che iyumigei lapkeiyenywa: imenitu asista komachei kochor
Isaiah13:11 Ak abir ng’ony amu yaitiennyi
Isaiah13:12 Ayae chito koek ne kicheng’ei kosiir tahabu che kororon
Isaiah13:13 Ayae anyun kipsengwetisiek kobotan
Isaiah13:14 Ak koweekyigei chi age tugul bikyik ko u cheptirgichet ne kionei
Isaiah13:15 Kitoorei age tugul ne kinyoru; ak kibare rotwetab chok age tugul ne kinamei.
Isaiah13:16 Kitonatoni lagokwak kogeerei; kiluulei gorikwak
Isaiah13:17 Ogeero
Isaiah13:18 Ak kotonaton kwangokwak murenik; ama tinyei rirge eng’ che kisichei; marire lagok.
Isaiah13:19 Ak ko u ye kiigabui Kamuktaindet Sodom ak Gomora
Isaiah13:20 Ma komenyei bik kogeny
Isaiah13:21 Ago tebe oloto tiong’ik che bo ong’atet; ak konyi gorikwak tiong’ik che irigendos: menyei oloto tiong’ikab songolik
Isaiah13:22 Ak koteiyo suik eng’ irimoikwak
Isaiah14:1 Amu rire Jehovah Jakobo
Isaiah14:2 Ak komut bororiosiek ichek agoi oldanywa: ak kobunji gotab Israel bichoto eng’ emetab Jehovah
Isaiah14:3 Ak eng’ betut ne konin Jehovah kamuung’et eng’ arogeneng’ung’
Isaiah14:4 imwa kalewenoni agobo laitoriatab Babulon
Isaiah14:5 Kigoiri Jehovah kirokta kiptengeginik
Isaiah14:6 che kibir bororiosiek eng’ neregek eng’ biretab kotugul
Isaiah14:7 Mi kamuung’et ng’ony komugul
Isaiah14:8 Ee
Isaiah14:9 Kagotumdumgei oldab che kigobek eng’ orit kotorogun ye inyone: ing’eetun bik che kigobek
Isaiah14:10 Wolun tugul kolenjinin
Isaiah14:11 Kagichorta etunateng’ung’ kwo oldab che kigobek
Isaiah14:12 Ha-a
Isaiah14:13 Ak kiimwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile
Isaiah14:14 Atogostoi asiir bolik; aigeitu Inendet ne Toror Mising’.
Isaiah14:15 Ago anyun
Isaiah14:16 Injururin che keerin
Isaiah14:17 ne kiyai ng’ony koek ong’atet
Isaiah14:18 Ruitos laitorinik tugul che bo bororiosiek
Isaiah14:19 Ago kagiwirjin sang’ eng’ kerering’ung’ ko u temet ne kiwechei
Isaiah14:20 Motuitosi koboto ichek eng’ tubet
Isaiah14:21 Ochopchi lagokyik barisiet amu ng’ogistab kwanisiekwak; si mang’eetyo
Isaiah14:22 Ak ang’eet agirinde ichek
Isaiah14:23 Ak agochi komeny emonoto chepswererinik
Isaiah14:24 Kigoyosyo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Isaiah14:25 ale atonatoni Asuriek eng’ emennyu
Isaiah14:26 Nito chobet ne kigechob agobo ng’ony komugul: ak ni ko eut ne kigichuulji bororiosiek tugul.
Isaiah14:27 Amu kigochob Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Isaiah14:28 Kibiit lautioni eng’ kenyit ne kimee laitoriat Ahas.
Isaiah14:29 Amebaibaitu
Isaiah14:30 Ak koamis taiywek che bo kibananok
Isaiah14:31 Itee
Isaiah14:32 Kiwoljin nee anyun bik che kiyoktoi
Isaiah15:1 Lautietab Moab. Amu king’emei Ar ne bo Moab eng’ kemout agenge
Isaiah15:2 Katogosta Bayit
Isaiah15:3 Kermenegei kuniok eng’ ortinwekwak: iteei age tugul ak korirei mising’
Isaiah15:4 Ak rirei Hesbon
Isaiah15:5 Rirei muguleldanyu amu Moab; mwechin Soar bik che mweoti agoi Eglatselisiya: amu togostoe Luhit koririoti; amu iteitos kateiyet ne bo ng’emisiet eng’ oret ne wendi Horonaim.
Isaiah15:6 Amu tendos beekab Nimrim: amu kagoresyo suswek
Isaiah15:7 Ibei anyun chang’indab tuguk che kigonyor
Isaiah15:8 Amu kigoit rirek kiwotosiek tugul che bo Moab; kiit kateiyennyi Eglaim
Isaiah15:9 Amu nyiitat korotik beekab Dimon: amu ta aipchini alak Dimon
Isaiah16:1 Okweri arekab kechir eng’ Sela ne tokyingei ong’atet
Isaiah16:2 Amu kergeitu tibikab Moab eng’ ole kilandoe eng’ Arnon
Isaiah16:3 Oruoch
Isaiah16:4 Ingomeny koboten chechuk che kigetimda; egu inye ole ung’egei Moab komwee luulindet: amu kagoek buch rebindet
Isaiah16:5 Ak kigimiti ng’echeretab laitornatet eng’ rirenet
Isaiah16:6 Kigegas menotetab Moab
Isaiah16:7 Iteechin anyun Moab Moab
Isaiah16:8 Amu restos mbarenikab Hesbon
Isaiah16:9 Arire anyun eng’ rirekab Jaser agobo ketikab sabibuk che bo Sibma; aisenen beekyuk bo kong’
Isaiah16:10 Ak kageisto kagasetab ge
Isaiah16:11 Morori anyun moennyu ko u ketubetab Moab
Isaiah16:12 Ak ye kagoborgei Moab
Isaiah16:13 Nito ng’olyot ne kimwa Jehovah agobo Moab eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto.
Isaiah16:14 Ago kagomwa nguno Jehovah kole
Isaiah17:1 Lautietab Damasko. Ogeero
Isaiah17:2 Kigebagakta nganasokab Aroer: bunjin akwotisiekab kechirek che ruitos
Isaiah17:3 Iwong’ugei kogeny irimetab Epraim
Isaiah17:4 Nyerotitu torornatetab Jakobo eng’ betunoto
Isaiah17:5 Ak kergeitu ak ye iyumi bek kesindet
Isaiah17:6 Nganda u noto
Isaiah17:7 Inyali betunoto chi Yaindennyi
Isaiah17:8 Ama koiiti kapkorosusiek kole kiy
Isaiah17:9 Igeitu eng’ betunoto nganasokyik che kimen komoswek che kigebagakta eng’ osnet
Isaiah17:10 Amu kiutie Kamuktaindetab yetuneng’ung’
Isaiah17:11 ing’ote eng’ betutab kolseng’ung’
Isaiah17:12 Bwa
Isaiah17:13 Ruaei bororiosiek ko u ruaetab beek che chang’: ago kerei kong’ inendet ichek: ak komwei kolooegitu
Isaiah17:14 Ogeero
Isaiah18:1 Bwa emet ne tinyei kebebaik che cheitos
Isaiah18:2 ne iyoktoi bik che tononjin kobun nyanjet
Isaiah18:3 Okwek tugul che omenye ng’ony
Isaiah18:4 Amu kamwawa Jehovah ko u ni kolenja
Isaiah18:5 Amu ye tom kobiit kesisiet
Isaiah18:6 Kibagakyin ichek tugul taritik che koromen che bo tulonok
Isaiah18:7 Kiipchin eng’ betunoto Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kagochinet ne bo bik che koen ak ko ng’orng’oren
Isaiah19:1 Lautietab Misri. Ogeero
Isaiah19:2 Ak ang’eet Misrik kobargei ak Misrik: ak kobargei chi tugul ak tupchennyi
Isaiah19:3 Ak tun kiyaei koek buch tamirmirietab Misri eng’ kwenunnyi; ak ang’em kiruogennyi: ak koba kocheng’ kanamonik
Isaiah19:4 Ak agochi Misrik kiptaiyat ne korom koboi ichek; ak koboi ichek laitoriat ne korom
Isaiah19:5 Ak kotenyo beek eng’ nyanjet
Isaiah19:6 Ak kobulyo ainosiek; ak kotenyo ainosiekab Misri ak koyaamnyo: Ak koresyo saosanik ak cherungusiek.
Isaiah19:7 Ak koyaamnyo morong’inik che mi ainetab Nael
Isaiah19:8 Ak koririo kogeny ramik che bo njirenik
Isaiah19:9 Kogeny
Isaiah19:10 Ak koilyo tolochikyik kotonogis
Isaiah19:11 Berberen mising’ bounikab Soan; kaabusak kiruogetab kiruogik che ng’omen mising’ che bo Parao: omwachindoi ano Parao
Isaiah19:12 Mi ano anyun biguk che ng’omen? Ak ingomwaun nguno
Isaiah19:13 Kagoek che berber bounikab Soan
Isaiah19:14 Kigoburuch Jehovah tamirmirietab kamaaset eng’ kwenunnyi: ak kogogochi ichek Misri komasta eng’ boisiennyi age tugul
Isaiah19:15 Ama komi boisiet age tugul agobo Misri
Isaiah19:16 Eng’ betunoto
Isaiah19:17 Ak koek emetab Juda kamuiset eng’ Misri
Isaiah19:18 Tun biitu eng’ betunoto nganasok mutu eng’ emetab Misri che ng’alali kutitab Kananik
Isaiah19:19 Tun biitu eng’ betunoto kaptisisietab Jehovah eng’ kwenutab emetab Misri
Isaiah19:20 Ak koek noto kaborunet ak baornatet ne bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ emetab Misri: amu tun rirjin Jehovah amu usik
Isaiah19:21 Ak konaak Jehovah eng’ Misri
Isaiah19:22 Ak tun birei Jehovah Misri
Isaiah19:23 Tun biitu oret ne o eng’ betunoto ne ng’ete Misri agoi Asuria
Isaiah19:24 Tun egu ne bo somok Israel eng’ betunoto
Isaiah19:25 amu kogoberur Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ichek
Isaiah20:1 Eng’ kenyit ne kiwa Tartan Asdod
Isaiah20:2 king’alal Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto eng’ Isaia weritab Amos
Isaiah20:3 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole
Isaiah20:4 imuti ko u noto laitoriatab Asuria luulenik che bo Misri
Isaiah20:5 Ak koarogenso
Isaiah20:6 Ak tun mwaei eng’ betunoto ne menyei emoni bo ngegut
Isaiah21:1 Lautietab ong’atetab nyanjet. Ko u ye ibuksei kipchurjuriet ne bunu Murot ne bo Tai
Isaiah21:2 Kagiborua ng’ang’utiet ne ng’wan; iberberisiei kaberberindet
Isaiah21:3 Kanyi anyun arogenet suennyu; kanama ng’woninwek
Isaiah21:4 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu
Isaiah21:5 Iitoi meset
Isaiah21:6 Amu kamwawa Kiptaiyat agobo noto kole
Isaiah21:7 ak ye keer karikab luget
Isaiah21:8 Ak kowaach inendet ko u ng’etundo kole
Isaiah21:9 ak
Isaiah21:10 Ee inye
Isaiah21:11 Lautietab Duma. Kuura age eng’ Seir
Isaiah21:12 Mwaei ribindet kole
Isaiah21:13 Lautietab Arabia. Omenye osnet eng’ Arabia
Isaiah21:14 Kiipchi beek inendet ne kiamei melel; kitoroktae amitwogik bik che kimenyei emetab Tema
Isaiah21:15 Amu kimwee rotokab chok
Isaiah21:16 Amu kagomwawa Kiptaiyat ko u ni kole
Isaiah21:17 ak ng’ering’itu che ng’etu eng’ mwogik
Isaiah22:1 Lautietab atebwetab ng’ang’utiet. Amin nee anyun
Isaiah22:2 Ee inye ne nyiitat bolatosiekab bik
Isaiah22:3 Kimwei kibagenge bouniguk
Isaiah22:4 Kiamwa anyun ale
Isaiah22:5 Amu betutab nyalilda ni
Isaiah22:6 Ak kiib Elam motiet
Isaiah22:7 Ak kinyi atebwosieguk che miach karisiek che bo luget
Isaiah22:8 Ak kiisto inendet kit ne kituchei Juda; ak kiigeer inye eng’ betunoto karikab luget eng’ got ne mi osnet.
Isaiah22:9 Ak kiogeer ole chang’ ole kigobutogis eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak oyum beekab tamboiyot ne mi ng’ony.
Isaiah22:10 Ak oiit gorikab Jerusalem
Isaiah22:11 Kiobal keringetab beek eng’ kwenutab irimoik aeng’
Isaiah22:12 Ak kiguurso eng’ betunoto Kiptaiyat
Isaiah22:13 ak ogeero
Isaiah22:14 Ak king’ang’jigei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek itikyuk
Isaiah22:15 Kamwa ko u ni Kiptaiyat
Isaiah22:16 Iyae nee eng’ yu? Ak omi ak ng’o yu
Isaiah22:17 Keero
Isaiah22:18 Weleljiningei iman ak kowirten iwe barak ko u tagurguruet eng’ emet ne baraa; imechini oloto
Isaiah22:19 Ak aonin eng’ boisieng’ung’
Isaiah22:20 Ak aguur otwogindennyu Eliakim weritab Hilkia eng’ betunoto:
Isaiah22:21 ak alaakyi inendet ngorieng’ung’
Isaiah22:22 Ak ande tigikyiennyi yatutietab gotab Daudi; ak yatei inendet
Isaiah22:23 Ak agiich inendet ko u kipchumariat eng’ ole kim; ak koek ng’echeretab torornatet eng’ gotab kwandanyi.
Isaiah22:24 Ak kolaakyi ichek inendet torornatet tugul ne bo gotab kwandanyi
Isaiah22:25 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole
Isaiah23:1 Lautietab Turo. Oteiye okwek melisiekab Tarsis; amu kageng’em
Isaiah23:2 Osisye
Isaiah23:3 Ak keljinennyi ko ki iyotetab Sihor ne kibunu beek che chang’
Isaiah23:4 Ililan
Isaiah23:5 Ye it ng’alek Misri
Isaiah23:6 Olande Tarsis; oteiye
Isaiah23:7 Tos nganaseng’wong’ ni ne bo boiboiyet
Isaiah23:8 Ng’o ne kichob ng’olyondonito agobo Turo
Isaiah23:9 Kigochob noto Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Isaiah23:10 Bun emeng’ung’ ko u Nael
Isaiah23:11 Kigotokyi eunnyi nyanjet
Isaiah23:12 Kile
Isaiah23:13 Ogeero
Isaiah23:14 Oteiye
Isaiah23:15 Tun kiutie Turo kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab eng’ betusiechoto
Isaiah23:16 Nam ketubet
Isaiah23:17 Ak ye ibata kenyisiek tamanwogik tisabu
Isaiah23:18 Ak koek mung’arennyi ak melektanyi tililindo eng’ taitab Jehovah: magigonori ama kibasei; amu bunjin mung’arennyi ichek che menyei taitab Jehovah
Isaiah24:1 Ogeero
Isaiah24:2 Ak kit ne u eng’ bik
Isaiah24:3 Kiyai emet koek ne matinyei kiy
Isaiah24:4 Arogeni ng’ony ak kowong’gei
Isaiah24:5 Kigimuruon ng’ony amu bik che menyei; amu kigobistoe ng’atutik
Isaiah24:6 Kigoam anyun chubisiet ng’ony
Isaiah24:7 Rirtos divaik che leelach
Isaiah24:8 Sisei kagasetab ge ne bo sugutit ne ming’in
Isaiah24:9 Maeei divaik kotiendos; ng’wonegitu maiyek eng’ icheget che eei.
Isaiah24:10 Kigebut nganaset ne mi chemarget: kigerei got age tugul
Isaiah24:11 Mi rirek ortinwek amu divaik; kagoimenit boiboiyet tugul
Isaiah24:12 Ng’etu kubernatet eng’ nganaset
Isaiah24:13 Amu egu ko u noto eng’ ng’ony eng’ bororiosiek
Isaiah24:14 Waaktos chuto
Isaiah24:15 Otoror anyun Jehovah eng’ kong’asis
Isaiah24:16 Kigegas tienwogik che bunu tabanwekab ng’ony
Isaiah24:17 Kanyonjin kaiyweisiet
Isaiah24:18 Ak tun ibutyin keringet inendet ne mwee bolatetab kaiyweisiet; ak namei mestet inendet ne togosune keringet: amu yatotin tirisiok eng’ barak
Isaiah24:19 Kigobutok ng’ony mising’
Isaiah24:20 Terterioti ng’ony ko u chito ne kabogit
Isaiah24:21 Ak tun birei Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ barak lugetab icheget che tororen
Isaiah24:22 Ak kiyum ichek tugul
Isaiah24:23 Ak kotoptoben arawet
Isaiah25:1 Ee
Isaiah25:2 Amu kiiyai nganaset koek karurugutiet; kiiyai nganaset ne ng’otat koek karatia: kiiyai gotab laitoriat ne bo toek koek ole mami nganaset; magoi ta keteech kogeny.
Isaiah25:3 Konyitin anyun bik che kimen
Isaiah25:4 Amu kiiegu irimetab kibananiat
Isaiah25:5 Iming’ini bolatetab toek ko u kiptoret eng’ ole yaamat; kinyeroti tiendab che imuisei ko u kiptoret eng’ tulugenet.
Isaiah25:6 Ak tun yachin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek bororiosiek tugul
Isaiah25:7 Ak tun ng’emei eng’ tulwoni kit ne kituge bik tugul
Isaiah25:8 Kigolugui inendet meet koigeny; ak tun ibuchi Kiptaiyat Jehovah beekab kong’ eng’ togochik tugul; ak koisto tewernatetab bikyik eng’ ng’ony komugul: amu kagomwa Jehovah nito.
Isaiah25:9 Ak tun kimwaei eng’ betunoto kele
Isaiah25:10 Amu imuunyi eutab Jehovah eng’ tulwoni
Isaiah25:11 Ak koiitochi eunekyik kwenunywa
Isaiah25:12 Ak kagobut ole ng’otat ne bo teekset ne koi
Isaiah26:1 Tun kitieni tieni eng’ emetab Juda eng’ betunoto: Kitinye achek nganaset ne kim; ng’atei inendet yetunet koek inatusiek ak irimoik.
Isaiah26:2 Oyat ormarichok
Isaiah26:3 Iribe inendet kotebe kalyet ne igesunotgei
Isaiah26:4 Omang’u Jehovah koigeny: amu mi eng’ Jehovah JEHOVAH ruandet ne bo koigeny.
Isaiah26:5 Amu kigochoor inendet ichek che menyei ole toror
Isaiah26:6 Kitiechei; tiechei kibananiat
Isaiah26:7 Litit oretab inendet ne bo iman: inye ne i litit
Isaiah26:8 Ee
Isaiah26:9 Koamachin eng’ sobondanyu kemoi; ee
Isaiah26:10 Agot nda kiborji chamet kiptengekyot
Isaiah26:11 Kasutok eung’ung’ Jehovah
Isaiah26:12 Inye Jehovah ne ing’atwech kalyet amu inye ne kiiyaiywech kogeny boisionikyok tugul.
Isaiah26:13 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo
Isaiah26:14 Kigobek ichek
Isaiah26:15 Kiites bororiet
Isaiah26:16 Ee Jehovah
Isaiah26:17 Ko u kwondo ne tamano
Isaiah26:18 Kigi tamonoin
Isaiah26:19 Tun soptos cheguk che kigobek; ng’eetos muswekyuk. Ong’eetye ak otien
Isaiah26:20 Obwa
Isaiah26:21 Amu
Isaiah27:1 Tun birei Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ rotwennyi ne bo chok ne korom ak ko o ak ko kim
Isaiah27:2 Otienji eng’ betunoto
Isaiah27:3 Ane Jehovah ne aribe; abisi kotugul
Isaiah27:4 Matinye neregek che ng’wonen: kata mie nda koboriena katablelinik ak katok! Ta katiegoti ichek
Isaiah27:5 Anan konam inendet kimnatennyu
Isaiah27:6 Kimitu Jakobo eng’ betusiek che bwanei; bitei Israel ak kong’at: ak konyiit ng’ony logoek.
Isaiah27:7 Tos kigobir inendet ko u ye kibir ichek che kibir inendet? Anan kagibar inendet ko u barisietab ichek che kibar inendet?
Isaiah27:8 Kioborie ak inendet ne yamei
Isaiah27:9 Tun kiundoi anyun eng’ nito yaitietab Jakobo
Isaiah27:10 Amu mi inegei nganaset ne ng’otat
Isaiah27:11 Ye kagoresyo temenikyik
Isaiah27:12 Ak tun birei Jehovah eng’ betunoto logoekyik korara
Isaiah27:13 Ak tun kiguutei iriaget ne o eng’ betunoto; ak tun bwanei che ki negit kolusyo eng’ emetab Asuria
Isaiah28:1 Bwa eng’ chepkuletab menotet ne bo kibogitinikab Epraim
Isaiah28:2 Ogeero
Isaiah28:3 Kitiekyin ng’ony chepkuletab menotet ne bo kibogitinikab Epraim;
Isaiah28:4 kergeitu taptet ne resei ne bo kororonindab torornatennyi
Isaiah28:5 Egu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ betunoto nariet ne bo torornatet
Isaiah28:6 ak koek tamirmirietab kiruoget eng’ inendet ne tebe kiruoget
Isaiah28:7 Ago kigochilil chuto agichek amu divaik
Isaiah28:8 Amu kigonyi mesosiek tugul kang’ung’daik ak simwek
Isaiah28:9 Ineti ng’o inendet naet? Ak ng’o ne igochin koguiyo ng’alek? Ichek che kigeluge
Isaiah28:10 Amu kineti ng’atutiet kegetyingei ng’atutiet
Isaiah28:11 Achicha
Isaiah28:12 che kimwachi inendet kolenji
Isaiah28:13 Noto anyun
Isaiah28:14 Ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah okwek bik sasik
Isaiah28:15 Amu kiomwa ole
Isaiah28:16 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole
Isaiah28:17 Ak ayai kiruoget koek kit ne litit
Isaiah28:18 Ak kewal kayomiseng’wong’ ne kioyomisge ak meet koek buch
Isaiah28:19 Ibok eng’ betut age tugul ye siirtoi; amu siirtoi karonet age tugul bet ak kemoi: ak egu kamuiset kityo ye ogase ng’alek.
Isaiah28:20 Amu nwagitu itogut kosiir ne imuchi koiitoegei chito; ak kotendenit kit ne ketugegei kot kosiir ne yamei kotugegei chito.
Isaiah28:21 Amu ng’eetei Jehovah ko u eng’ tulwetab Perasim
Isaiah28:22 Noto anyun
Isaiah28:23 Oeb it
Isaiah28:24 Tos ibatisiei chito ne ibatisiei kotugul si kogol? Tos ibati ak kobirei mogoronik kotugul che bo mbarennyi?
Isaiah28:25 Ye kagobirok mbaranato komieit
Isaiah28:26 Amu itigoni Kamuktaindennyi inendet komie
Isaiah28:27 Amu magibore kit ne ng’atib keswekab ngwek
Isaiah28:28 King’oe nganok che kikwanyei; amu magiborei kotugul; agot ngoseer keldab karinnyi ak mbartanyisiekyik
Isaiah28:29 Bunu nito agine Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Isaiah29:1 Bwa Ariel
Isaiah29:2 si aiim anyun Ariel
Isaiah29:3 Amu amuutin komoswek tugul
Isaiah29:4 Ak kinyeratin
Isaiah29:5 Ago kergeitu chang’indab buniguk ak ng’ung’unyek che busbus
Isaiah29:6 Nyonjin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek inendet eng’ tulet
Isaiah29:7 Ak kogergeit karuotitoet
Isaiah29:8 Ak kogergeit ak ye iruotitoi chito ne amei rubet
Isaiah29:9 Ogenisie ak okwong’ie; oyai ko u ye omache
Isaiah29:10 Amu kirong’jok Jehovah tamirmirietab ruondo ne nyigis
Isaiah29:11 Ak kagergeit eng’ okwek ng’ang’utiet tugul ak ng’alekab bukuit ne kiging’och
Isaiah29:12 Yeityo kigochi chito ne ma inetat
Isaiah29:13 Ak kile Kiptaiyat
Isaiah29:14 ogeer anyun-o

Isaiah29:17 Tos mami boroindo kitigin

Isaiah30:1 Bwa eng’ lagok che ngelel
Isaiah30:2 che ng’eetos kochorjingei Misri
Isaiah30:3 Egu anyun kimnatetab Parao kolilaneng’wong’
Isaiah30:4 Amu mi bounikyik Soan
Isaiah30:5 Ililandos tugul agobo bik che maimuchi konyorune kiy
Isaiah30:6 Lautietab tiong’ik che bo Murot ne bo Tai. Ibe magornatosiekwak tigigoikab moekab sigirok
Isaiah30:7 Amu toretisiei buch Misri
Isaiah30:8 Ui anyun nguno
Isaiah30:9 Amu icheget ko bik che ngelel
Isaiah30:10 che mwachin keerik kolenji
Isaiah30:11 oistege eng’ oret

Isaiah30:13 kergeitu anyun tengegito eng’ okwek ak ole kigong’eer ole negit kobut

Isaiah30:16 Ago kiomwa ole
Isaiah30:17 Mwee elfut agenge keretab kong’ ne bo agenge; omwee keretab kong’ ne bo mut: agoi kebagaktak oige ketit ne koi ne mi tulwet barak
Isaiah30:18 Igenok anyun Jehovah
Isaiah30:19 Amu menyei bik Sion eng’ Jerusalem: ma irire kogeny; iborun iman mieindo ye kas rireguk; ye kas kowolun.

Isaiah30:21 Ak igas ng’olyot ne mi let eng’ inye
Isaiah30:22 Ak omuruon kit ne kigiliige kanamoniguk che bo feda che kigiwai

Isaiah32:6 Amu ng’alali ne berber kaberberisiet

Isaiah32:19 Ago roboni koikab ropta kot kolul osnet; ak kolul nganaset tugul.

Isaiah33:1 Bwa eng’ inye ne ing’emisiei
Isaiah33:2 Ee Jehovah

Isaiah44:27 ne mwachin riret kolenjin
Isaiah44:28 ne mwaei agobo Kirus kole

Isaiah45:2 Andoenen
Isaiah45:3 ak agonin konoraikab mesundeito
Isaiah45:4 Kiaguurin eng’ kaineng’ung’ amu Jakobo otwogindennyu ak amu Israel nenyu ne kialewen: kaataun kainet nganda tomo inaa.
Isaiah45:5 A Jehovah
Isaiah45:6 si kobiit konai ichek koboch ko kachor asis
Isaiah45:7 Ayae lapkeiyet
Isaiah45:8 Osau

Isaiah45:10 Bwa eng’ inendet ne lenjin kwandanyi
Isaiah45:11 Mwaei Jehovah

Isaiah50:3 Alaakyini kipsengwetisiek tuuindo

Isaiah50:8 Negit inendet ne iityina imanda; kibortosi ak ng’o? Ngetononse tuwai: ng’o bunyondennyu? Ingonyo korikya.

Isaiah51:5 Negit imandanyu

Isaiah53:1 Ng’o ne kiiyan ng’alekyok? Ak kiging’ang’ji ng’o eutab Jehovah?
Isaiah53:2 Amu tun eetu eng’ tainnyi ko u ketit ne ng’arng’ar
Isaiah53:3 Kigisas
Isaiah53:4 Kiib iman ng’woninwekyok
Isaiah53:5 Ago kigitoor agobo bistaosiekyok
Isaiah53:6 Ki u achek tugul kechirek che kigobetyo; kigosub age tugul eng’ achek orennyi; ak kigonde Jehovah inendet tengekwogikyok achek tugul.
Isaiah53:7 Kiginyalil
Isaiah53:8 Kiginam eng’ suriet ak kiruokyi; ak ng’o ne ibwati eng’ ibindanyi kole kigiisto inendet eng’ emetab che soptos: Amu kigibir agobo bistoetab bikyuk.
Isaiah53:9 Ak kiyachi inendet kererit koboto kiptengeginik

Isaiah53:11 Tun keerei che biitune ng’wanindab sobondanyi
Isaiah53:12 Apchechini anyun inendet kebeberta koboto bik che eechen
Isaiah54:1 Tien
Isaiah54:2 Ibaraa oldab emaing’ung’
Isaiah54:3 Amu inaktoi komostab eutab tai ak ne bo katam; ak konyaban iyoteng’ung’ bororiosiek
Isaiah54:4 Ameiywei; amu melilani: anan itoptoben; amu magitewerin: amu iutie tewernatetab ming’inateng’ung’
Isaiah54:5 Amu Yaindeng’ung’ ko manong’otiondeng’ung’; Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kainennyi: ak Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel ko katiagindeng’ung’; kiguure inendet Kamuktaindetab ng’ony komugul.
Isaiah54:6 Amu kigoguurin Jehovah ko u osotiot ne kigebagakta
Isaiah54:7 Kiabagakten ne matia; ago ayumin eng’ rirenet ne o.
Isaiah54:8 Kiaung’enen togennyu ne matia eng’ neregek che ing’irtogei; ago arirenen eng’ talasiet ne bo koigeny
Isaiah54:9 Amu u nito eng’ ane beekab Noa: amu ko u ye kiayosie ale ma komarane emet beekab Noa kogeny
Isaiah54:10 Amu istogei tulonok ak kiutoi tulonok che mengechen; ago maistoenengei talasiennyu
Isaiah54:11 Ee inye ne kinyalili
Isaiah54:12 Ak ateege irimoiguk koik che biriren
Isaiah54:13 Ak ineti Jehovah lagoguk tugul; ak koeet kalyetab lagoguk.
Isaiah54:14 Kigimitin eng’ imanda; ilooitu eng’ nyalilda
Isaiah54:15 Keero
Isaiah54:16 Keero

Isaiah55:1 Ee chi age tugul ne amei melel

Isaiah57:1 Begu che bo iman
Isaiah57:2 Mong’jin ole mi kalyet; imuunyi eng’ itogusiekwak

Isaiah57:4 Ourerenjini ng’o? Oseng’eng’jini ng’o
Isaiah57:5 che olaali mageng’wong’ eng’ ketik kel
Isaiah57:6 Mi kebebertang’ung’ koik che chaboen che bo atebwet; choto
Isaiah57:7 Kainde itogung’ung’ tulwet ne kiwa barak ak ko koi mising’: ak kiiwe kogeny oloto igoite tiseiywek.
Isaiah57:8 Ak kiitepte kit ne bo kabwateng’ung’ eng’ ole bo let eng’ kereiywek ak tugatugik: amu kiing’ang’jige age
Isaiah57:9 Ak kiiwe oldab laitoriat iibe mwanik
Isaiah57:10 Kiing’et amu koindab oreng’ung’; ago kima imwa ile
Isaiah57:11 Ak kiiywei ng’o anyun ak itoptoben

Isaiah58:1 Waach mising’
Isaiah58:2 Ago cheng’a betut age tugul
Isaiah58:3 Mwaei ichek kole
Isaiah58:4 Ogeero
Isaiah58:5 Tos noto karugutetab ge ne kialewen? Betut ne inyalili chi sobondanyi? Koabuch chi metinnyi ko u cherungut
Isaiah58:6 Tos ma karugutetab ge ni ne kialewen: ale kitiach ratutikab yaitet
Isaiah58:7 Tos ma kebae amitwogiguk che amei rubet
Isaiah58:8 Koluu anyun lapkeiyeng’ung’ ko u karonet
Isaiah58:9 Yeityo anyun iguurse
Isaiah58:10 ak ngot irire che amei rubo
Isaiah58:11 Ak kondoun Jehovah kotugul
Isaiah58:12 Ak koteech biguk karotwek che bo keny: ak ing’eet lumeiywekab ibinwek che chang’; ak keguurenen
Isaiah58:13 Ngot iiste keldang’ung’ eng’ betutab sabato
Isaiah58:14 ibaibaegei anyun Jehovah; ak agonin ilany komoswek che tororen che bo ng’ony; ak abaenen borotetab Jakobo kwandang’ung’: amu kagomwa nito kutitab Jehovah.
Isaiah59:1 Ogeero
Isaiah59:2 ago kigobesienok tengekwogikwok Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Isaiah59:3 Amu muruonen eunekwok eng’ korotik
Isaiah59:4 Mami agot agenge ne cheng’ei imanda ne bo kiruoget
Isaiah59:5 Igenyi koikab erenet
Isaiah59:6 Maegu gorikab kibroroginik ngoroik
Isaiah59:7 Ruachin kelyekwak yaitiet
Isaiah59:8 Maingen ichek oretab kalyet; ama mi kiruoget eng’ ortinwekwak: kigoyachigei ortinwek che kunuren; maingen kalyet age tugul ne bunei oloto.
Isaiah59:9 Loo anyun kiruoget eng’ achek
Isaiah59:10 Kisapsabisioti kecheng’e inatut ko u kipkoratinik
Isaiah59:11 Kimorori tugul ko u keerisiek
Isaiah59:12 Amu kigotesogis bistaosiekyok eng’ taing’ung’
Isaiah59:13 kigiesie Jehovah eng’ bistoennyo
Isaiah59:14 Ak kikwa let kiruoget
Isaiah59:15 Ee

Isaiah59:17 Ak kiilaach imanda ko u karnetab teget
Isaiah59:18 Yaakyin ichek ko u boisionikwak
Isaiah59:19 Iywei anyun kainetab Jehovah eng’ cherongo
Isaiah59:20 Ak konyo katiagindet Sion
Isaiah59:21 Ni anyun kayomisennyu ne kiyomisyinige ak ichek
Isaiah60:1 Ng’eet
Isaiah60:2 Amu
Isaiah60:3 Ak kobwanji bororiosiek lapkeiyeng’ung’
Isaiah60:4 Yot met ak igeer komoswek tugul: iyumigei ichek tugul
Isaiah60:5 Igeer anyun ak kikwenyin
Isaiah60:6 Tuchin chang’indab tambesik
Isaiah60:7 Kiyumjinin akwotisiek tugul che bo kechirekab Kedar
Isaiah60:8 Ng’o chu ruaei ko u boldet
Isaiah60:9 Igena iman ngegusiek
Isaiah60:10 Ak koteech toek irimoiguk
Isaiah60:11 Kiyatei kogeny ormarichoguk kotugul; magigerei bet anan kemoi; si koibun bik magornatosiekab bororiosiek
Isaiah60:12 Amu lusei bororiet ak bounatet ne maboisieun; ee
Isaiah60:13 Nyonjinin torornatetab Lebanon
Isaiah60:14 Ak kobwanjin werikab icheget che kiinyalilin kong’urugonu; ak kogutung’so eng’ keldebesaikab kelyeguk ichek tugul che kisasin; ak koguurenen
Isaiah60:15 Ak ko u ye kiga kebagakten
Isaiah60:16 Ichuchuni kogeny chegab bororiosiek
Isaiah60:17 Aibu tahabu ageere sugunonik
Isaiah60:18 Ma kegasei kogeny koromnatet eng’ emeng’ung’
Isaiah60:19 Ma koegu asista lapkeiyeng’ung’ bet: ama kogonin lapkeiyet kaluunetab arawet: ago egu Jehovah lapkeiyeng’ung’ ne bo koigeny; ak koek Kamuktaindeng’ung’ torornateng’ung’.
Isaiah60:20 Ma kororoktoi asistang’ung’
Isaiah60:21 Ak koek che bo imanda kogeny biguk tugul
Isaiah60:22 Egu ne ming’in elfut
Isaiah61:1 Mi kobota tamirmirietab Kiptaiyat Jehovah; amu kiila Jehovah si kobiit aamji logoiywek che miach che nyerotin; kigoyokta anya che ilyotin mugulelwek
Isaiah61:2 Si kobiit aamda kenyit ne chamat eng’ Jehovah
Isaiah61:3 si aarorji ichek che rirtos eng’ Sion
Isaiah61:4 Ak koteech kogeny karatwek che bo keny
Isaiah61:5 Ak kotononso toek koyaga akwotisiekab kechirekwok
Isaiah61:6 Ago kiguurenok tisiikab Jehovah: kuurenok bik kiboitinikab Kamuktaindennyo: oame magornatosiekab bororiosiek
Isaiah61:7 Onyoru konyil aeng’ agobo kalilaneng’wong’; ak koboiboitu eng’ kebebertanywa kogeere toiyet: nyabani anyun ichek konyil aeng’ eng’ emenywa: bunjin ichek boiboiyet ne bo koigeny.
Isaiah61:8 Amu achame ane Jehovah kiruoget
Isaiah61:9 Ak konaak iyotenywa eng’ bororiosiek
Isaiah61:10 Abaibaitu mising’ eng’ Jehovah
Isaiah61:11 Amu ko u ye ing’atos tuguk eng’ ng’ony
Isaiah62:1 Masise agobo Sion
Isaiah62:2 Ak kogeer bororiosiek imandang’ung’
Isaiah62:3 Iegu kogeny narietab kororonindo eng’ eutab Jehovah
Isaiah62:4 Ma keguurenen kogeny Ne Kigimeto; ama keguure emeng’ung’ kogeny Karaita: ago kiguurenen Hepsi-ba
Isaiah62:5 Amu ko u ye ituni mureno bergeiyat
Isaiah62:6 Kande ribik irimoiguk
Isaiah62:7 amogochini inendet komuuny

Isaiah62:9 ago amei ichek che kigonori
Isaiah62:10 Omande
Isaiah62:11 Ogeero
Isaiah62:12 Ak koguure ichek
Isaiah63:1 Ng’o ne bunu Edom
Isaiah63:2 Amu nee si kobiriritu ngoroiguk
Isaiah63:3 Kiatiech anege sabibuk eng’ ole kitue; ak kima komi chi kobota eng’ bichoto; ee
Isaiah63:4 Amu kimi muguleldanyu betutab yaaktaetab mugetut
Isaiah63:5 Ak kiageerote
Isaiah63:6 Ak kiatiech bik eng’ neregekyuk
Isaiah63:7 Amwaitoi chamnyet ne tala ne bo Jehovah
Isaiah63:8 Amu kimwa kole
Isaiah63:9 Kiginyalil inendet eng’ nyalilwogikwak tugul
Isaiah63:10 Ago kiingelelso ak kogochi arogenet Tamirmiriennyi ne tilil: kigiwal anyun koek bunyondenywa
Isaiah63:11 Kiibwat anyun betusiek che bo keny
Isaiah63:12 ne kichuul eunnyi ne bo torornatet koba koboto eutab tai ne bo Musa
Isaiah63:13 ne kiindochi ichek kobun riret
Isaiah63:14 Ko u ye chorjingei tuga atebwet
Isaiah63:15 Keer anyun ng’ony eng’ kipsengwet
Isaiah63:16 Amu i kwandanyo
Isaiah63:17 Ee
Isaiah63:18 Kinyaban biguk che tililen; ago ne matia kotiech bunikyok oldang’ung’ ne tilil.
Isaiah63:19 Kageige bik che kitom ibou; ko u icheget che ma kimwaitae kaineng’ung’.
Isaiah64:1 Kata mie ibet kipsengwetisiek
Isaiah64:2 ko u ye beelei mat sigorik
Isaiah64:3 Ye kingiyai tuguk che bo kamuiset che kima kicheng’
Isaiah64:4 Amu tomo kogas bik koboch keny
Isaiah64:5 Otuitosi ak inendet ne baibai ak koyaei imanda
Isaiah64:6 Amu kigiige tugul chi ne bo simdo
Isaiah64:7 Ama mi ne kuurei kaineng’ung’
Isaiah64:8 Ara anyun
Isaiah64:9 Amat inerech mising’
Isaiah64:10 Kigoek kong’atet nganasoguk che tililen
Isaiah64:11 Kigebeel gonnyo ne tilil ne kararan
Isaiah64:12 Ee Jehovah
Isaiah65:1 Teeba bik che kima koteeba; kigonyorua ichek che kima cheng’a: kialenji bororiet ne kima kemwaitae kainennyu
Isaiah65:2 Kiaiitochi eunekyuk bet komugul bik che ingeleldos
Isaiah65:3 bik che tacha kimni kotugul
Isaiah65:4 che teebote kererisiek
Isaiah65:5 Che mwaei kole
Isaiah65:6 Ogeero
Isaiah65:7 tengekwogikwok
Isaiah65:8 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Isaiah65:9 Ak amutu ne kigii eng’ Jakobo
Isaiah65:10 Ak koek Saron biutab akwotisiekab kechirek
Isaiah65:11 Ago okwek che ometoi Jehovah
Isaiah65:12 aityinok anyun rotwetab chok
Isaiah65:13 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole
Isaiah65:14 ogeero
Isaiah65:15 Ak obagakte kaineng’wong’ koek chubisiet eng’ chechuk che kialewen
Isaiah65:16 si koek ne iberuregei eng’ ng’ony ne iberuregei eng’ Kamuktaindet ne bo iman
Isaiah65:17 Ogeero
Isaiah65:18 Ago ogasge ak oboiboitu agoi agobo kit ne atau ayae: amu atau ayae Jerusalem koek ne kiboiboitune
Isaiah65:19 Ak abaibaitune Jerusalem
Isaiah65:20 Ma biitu eng’ oloto kogeny lakwet ne bo betusiek che ng’ering’ anan boiyot ne ma ilil: amu meei lakwet ko bo kenyisiek bogol

Isaiah65:22 Mateeksei ichek
Isaiah65:23 Maboisiei buch
Isaiah65:24 Ak ye tom koguurso
Isaiah65:25 Ageti suiyot ak aruetab kechir
Isaiah66:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Isaiah66:2 Amu kiyaei eunnyu tuguchuto tugul
Isaiah66:3 Inendet ne barei teta ko kergei ak inendet ne barei chito; inendet ne igoitoi aruetab kechir koek tiseiywot
Isaiah66:4 alewenjini anyun kaberberisiosiekwak
Isaiah66:5 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah
Isaiah66:6 Waagat ne bo wasetab ge ne bunu nganaset
Isaiah66:7 Kisigis amanyor ng’wanindo; kisich werit kotom kogas ng’wanindo.
Isaiah66:8 Kigogas ng’o ng’olyot ne u ni? Kigogeer ng’o tuguk che u chu? Tos kisichei emet eng’ betut agenge? Tos kisichei bororiet eng’ sait ne matia? Amu kisich Sion lagokyik
Isaiah66:9 Tos aete kesich lakwet ne kogoyam kesich? Mwaei Jehovah. Tos arate moet ne agochini koi? Mwaei Kamuktaindeng’ung’.
Isaiah66:10 Oboiboitu okwek koboto Jerusalem
Isaiah66:11 si kobiit ochuchun obiyong’se eng’ kainaikab kagaigaosiekyik; si kobiit ochuchun tugul
Isaiah66:12 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Isaiah66:13 Agoigook ko u inendet ne igoigoi kamet; ak kigaigaak eng’ Jerusalem.
Isaiah66:14 Ak ogeero
Isaiah66:15 Amu ogeero
Isaiah66:16 Amu iruoksechin Jehovah bik tugul eng’ mat ak eng’ rotwennyi bo chok: ak kochang’a che barei Jehovah.
Isaiah66:17 Mwaei Jehovah kole
Isaiah66:18 Amu angen boisionikwak ak kabwatutikwak: nyonei betut
Isaiah66:19 Ak ande kaborunet kwenunywa
Isaiah66:20 Ak komut tupchosiekwok tugul komong’une bororiosiek tugul koek kagochinet eng’ Jehovah
Isaiah66:21 Ak ande alak eng’ ichek kogeny koek tisiik ak Lawik
Isaiah66:22 Amu ko u ye tebe tainnyu kipsengwetisiek che leelach ak ng’onyut ne leel
Isaiah66:23 Ak tun bwanei bik tugul koloswa eng’ tainnyu koboch ye kaleel arawet agoi koleel age
Isaiah66:24 Ak komanda koba kogeer muswekab bik che kiingelelja: amu mabegu kutikwak

Jeremiah17:1 Kigisire tengektab Juda kalamitab karnet koboto ng’atibindab koita ne uui: kigisirji mugulelwekwak ak eng’ kuinoikab kapkorosusiekwak;
Jeremiah17:2 ko ta kobwati lagokwak kapkorosusiekwak ak Aserik che mi ole mi ketik che tuonen eng’ tulonok barak.
Jeremiah17:3 Ee tulwennyu ne mi kewanin
Jeremiah17:4 Ak ibagaktoi aginye boroteng’ung’ ne kiagonin; ak agonin iot buniguk eng’ emet ne mengen: amu kiolaal mat eng’ neregekyuk

Jeremiah17:15 Keero

Jeremiah17:17 Amat imua: i ole amwechini eng’ betutab yaitiet.

Jeremiah17:20 ak ilenji ichek

Jeremiah26:1 Kibun ng’onyondoni Jehovah eng’ taunetab laitornatetab Jeoiakim weritab Josia
Jeremiah26:2 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tonon eng’ seremutab gotab Jehovah
Jeremiah26:3 Abere imuchi kogas
Jeremiah26:4 Ak ilenji ichek
Jeremiah26:5 ogas ng’alekab otwogikyuk maotik
Jeremiah26:6 ayae anyun goi koigei Silo
Jeremiah26:7 Ak kigasei tisiik ak maotik ak bik tugul komwaei Jeremia ng’alechuto eng’ gotab Jehovah.
Jeremiah26:8 Ak kingo kagoges Jeremia ng’alalet tugul ne kiga ng’at Jehovah komwachi bik tugul
Jeremiah26:9 Amu nee si imaoten eng’ kainetab Jehovah
Jeremiah26:10 Ak kingogas bounikab Juda tuguchuto
Jeremiah26:11 Yeityo komwachi tisiik ak maotik
Jeremiah26:12 Yeityo komwachi Jeremia bounik tugul ak bik tugul kolenji
Jeremiah26:13 Noto anyun
Jeremiah26:14 Ago ogeero
Jeremiah26:15 Ago onai komie ole
Jeremiah26:16 Yeityo komwachi bounik ak bik tugul tisiik ak maotik kolenji: Manyoljin meet chichi; amu kagong’alalwech eng’ kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo.
Jeremiah26:17 Kong’eetyo anyun boisiek alak che bo emet
Jeremiah26:18 Kimaoten Mikaia Morastindet eng’ betusiekab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda; ak king’alalji bik tugul che bo Juda kolenji
Jeremiah26:19 Tos kita kobar Hesekia laitoriatab Juda ak Juda tugul inendet? Tos kima iywei Jehovah
Jeremiah26:20 Ak kimi chito age agine ne kimaoten eng’ kainetab Jehovah
Jeremiah26:21 Ak ye kingogas laitoriat Jeoiakim
Jeremiah26:22 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat Jeoiakim bik koba Misri
Jeremiah26:23 ak kiimut Uria eng’ Misri
Jeremiah26:24 Ago kirib Aikam weritab Sapan Jeremia
Jeremiah27:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyondoni kobunu Jehovah eng’ taunetab laitornatetab Jeoikam weritab Josia
Jeremiah27:2 kolenji
Jeremiah27:3 yeityo iyokyi laitoriatab Edom
Jeremiah27:4 ak iyomis ichek koba oldab kiptainikwak kolenji
Jeremiah27:5 Kiayai ng’onyuni
Jeremiah27:6 Kaagochi anyun emotinwechuto tugul Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon
Jeremiah27:7 Ak koot bororiosiek tugul inendet ak werinnyi
Jeremiah27:8 Ak tun abire bororiet ak bounatet ne maotei Nebukadnesar nito laitoriatab Babulon
Jeremiah27:9 Ago
Jeremiah27:10 amu maotenwok lembeita
Jeremiah27:11 Ago bororiet ne kase it laitoriatab Babulon
Jeremiah27:12 Ak kiang’alalji Sedekia laitoriatab Juda ko u ng’alechuto tugul
Jeremiah27:13 Amu nee si imee
Jeremiah27:14 Amogas ng’alekab maotik che ng’alalwok kolenjinok
Jeremiah27:15 Amu ma ayogu ichek
Jeremiah27:16 Kiang’alalji tisiik agichek ak bichu tugul
Jeremiah27:17 Amogas bichoto; oot laitoriatab Babulon si osopche: amu nee anyun si koek karaita nganasani?
Jeremiah27:18 Ago ngot ko maotik icheget
Jeremiah27:19 Amu kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni agobo tolochik
Jeremiah27:20 che kima ib Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon
Jeremiah27:21 ee
Jeremiah27:22 Kiibei koba Babulon
Jeremiah28:1 Ak eng’ kenyinoto
Jeremiah28:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah28:3 Kotom kogesgei kenyisiek aeng’
Jeremiah28:4 ak amutu kogeny konyo olito Jekonia weritab Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda
Jeremiah28:5 Kimwachi anyun maotiot Jeremia maotiot Hanania eng’ taitab tisiik ak eng’ taitab bik tugul che kitonondos eng’ gotab Jehovah
Jeremiah28:6 ak kile maotiot Jeremia
Jeremiah28:7 Ago gas anyun ng’olyondoni amwae eng’ taing’ung’ ak eng’ taitab bik tugul:
Jeremiah28:8 Kimaoten maotik che bo keny che kiindounena ak che kiindounenen agobo emotinwek che chang’
Jeremiah28:9 Maotiot ne maoteni agobo kalyet
Jeremiah28:10 Kiinem anyun maotiot Hanania chogit ne kimi kaatitab maotiot Jeremia
Jeremiah28:11 Ak king’alal Hanania eng’ taitab bik tugul kole
Jeremiah28:12 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia
Jeremiah28:13 Ui
Jeremiah28:14 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah28:15 Yeityo komwachi maotiot Jeremia maotiot Hanania
Jeremiah28:16 Noto anyun
Jeremiah28:17 Kime anyun maotiot Hanania eng’ kenyinoto eng’ arawetab tisab.

Jeremiah29:3 kiib Elasa weritab Sapan

Jeremiah29:5 ko u ni kole
Jeremiah29:6 Otunisie
Jeremiah29:7 Ak ocheng’ji kalyet nganaset ne kiachamde keluuljok
Jeremiah29:8 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah29:9 Amu maotenwok lembeita eng’ kainennyu: ma ayogu ichek
Jeremiah29:10 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Jeremiah29:11 Amu angen kabwatutik che abwati agobo okwek

Jeremiah29:14 Ak onyorua
Jeremiah29:15 Amu kiomwa ole

Jeremiah29:19 amu ma kas ng’alekyuk

Jeremiah30:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah
Jeremiah30:2 Mwaei Jehovah
Jeremiah30:3 Keero
Jeremiah30:4 Ak chu ng’alek che kimwa Jehovah agobo Israel ak Juda.
Jeremiah30:5 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigegas tuget ne bo botanet
Jeremiah30:6 Oteeb anyun
Jeremiah30:7 Bwa! Amu o betunoto
Jeremiah30:8 Ak tun airie eng’ betunoto choginnyi ne mi kaating’ung’
Jeremiah30:9 Ago otei Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa
Jeremiah30:10 Ameiywei anyun
Jeremiah30:11 Amu ami koboten
Jeremiah30:12 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Jeremiah30:13 Mami chi ne ng’alaldaun
Jeremiah30:14 Kigoutienen chamaniguk tugul: macheng’in: amu kaaguotenin eng’ kaguotenetab bunyot eng’ kotigonetab inendet ne korom; amu oindab yaitieng’ung’
Jeremiah30:15 Amu nee si irir eng’ kaguoteneng’ung’? Mainyaaksei ng’wanindang’ung’: amu oindab yaitieng’ung’
Jeremiah30:16 Kiamei anyun ichek tugul che amin; kiluulei buniguk tugul
Jeremiah30:17 Amu asoobin
Jeremiah30:18 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Jeremiah30:19 Ak komong’une oloto kongoi ak kutitab icheget che igasegei: ak ates ichek
Jeremiah30:20 Ak koigei lagokwak atkinye tai
Jeremiah30:21 Ak kobiitune ichek bounindenywa
Jeremiah30:22 Ak oegu bikyuk
Jeremiah30:23 Ogeero
Jeremiah30:24 Mamweeksei neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah agoi koyai koges
Jeremiah31:1 Mwaei Jehovah kole

Jeremiah31:4 Ateechin kogeny
Jeremiah31:5 Ak imin kogeny sabibuk eng’ tulonokab Samaria: minsei minik
Jeremiah31:6 Amu biitu betut ye ititendos ribik eng’ tulonok che bo Epraim

Jeremiah31:8 Ogeero

Jeremiah31:10 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah
Jeremiah31:11 Amu kisor Jehovah Jakobo
Jeremiah31:12 Ak kobwa kotien eng’ ole toror eng’ Sion
Jeremiah31:13 Kobaibait anyun bergeiyat eng’ ureriet
Jeremiah31:14 Ak abae akwaindo sobonwekab tisiik kobiyong’so
Jeremiah31:15 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigasei kutit eng’ Rama
Jeremiah31:16 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amat ite
Jeremiah31:17 Ak mi kamang’unet ne bo betusieguk che bo let
Jeremiah31:18 Koagas iman koteechingei Epraim
Jeremiah31:19 Kiasigu iman ko kiawelelage; ak kiarabach kubestanyu ko kagineta: Kialilan
Jeremiah31:20 Tos werinnyu ne achame
Jeremiah31:21 Lumjige kaborunoik che bo oret
Jeremiah31:22 Iombenoti kot kotianit
Jeremiah31:23 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah31:24 Ak komeny oloto Juda ak nganasokyik tugul; koboto kabatik
Jeremiah31:25 Amu kaabai kobiyo sobondo ne ng’etat
Jeremiah31:26 Kiagosu anyun
Jeremiah31:27 Ogeero
Jeremiah31:28 Ak ko u ye kiarib ichek si kobiit atut ak agabui ak ang’em
Jeremiah31:29 Ma komwaei eng’ betusiechoto kole
Jeremiah31:30 Ago meei chi age tugul amu tengektanyi: ak kiliilei kelekab chito age tugul ne amei sabibuk che mindililen.
Jeremiah31:31 Ogeero
Jeremiah31:32 ma ko u kayomiset ne kigiyomisge ak kwanisiekwak eng’ betut ne kianamanu ichek amutu komong’ eng’ emetab Misri; kayomisonotonyunet ne king’em ichek
Jeremiah31:33 Ago ni kayomiset ne kiyomisige ak gotab Israel ye ibata betusiechoto
Jeremiah31:34 Ama koneti kogeny chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi
Jeremiah31:35 Mwaei Jehovah
Jeremiah31:36 Nda istoenagei ng’atutichuto
