Jeremiah31:38 Ogeero
Jeremiah31:39 Ak ta kikwae borowet kolititit kotokyigei tulwet ne ming’in ne kiguure Gareb
Jeremiah31:40 Ak koek ne tilil eng’ Jehovah atebwet komugul ne bo muswek
Jeremiah32:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah eng’ kenyitab taman ne bo Sedekia laitoriatab Juda
Jeremiah32:2 Kiyiem anyun lugetab laitoriatab Babulon Jerusalem eng’ betusiechoto: ak kiga kigerji maotiot Jeremia seremutab ribik
Jeremiah32:3 Amu kiga koger inendet Sedekia laitoriatab Juda kolenji
Jeremiah32:4 ama chilili Sedekia laitoriatab Juda eng’ eutab Kaldeik
Jeremiah32:5 ak komut Sedekia kwo Babulon
Jeremiah32:6 Ak imwa Jeremia kole
Jeremiah32:7 Keero
Jeremiah32:8 Kinyonja anyun Hanamel weritab imamennyu eng’ seremutab ribik ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah
Jeremiah32:9 Ak kiaal mbaranato ne kimi Anatot ne bo Hanamel weritab imamennyu
Jeremiah32:10 Ak kiasir baruetab kayanjinet
Jeremiah32:11 Kiaib anyun baruetab kayanjinet ne bo alyet
Jeremiah32:12 Ak kiagochi anyun barunato bo kayanjinet ne bo alyet Baruk weritab Neria weritab Maseia
Jeremiah32:13 Ak kiang’at Baruk eng’ tainywa
Jeremiah32:14 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah32:15 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah32:16 Kingo kaagochi Baruk weritab Neria baruetab kayanjinet ne bo alyet
Jeremiah32:17 Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Keero
Jeremiah32:18 inye ne irire elfusiek
Jeremiah32:19 inendet ne o eng’ kiruoget
Jeremiah32:20 ne kiinde kaborunoik ak kwong’utik emetab Misri
Jeremiah32:21 ak kiimutu biguk Israel komong’ eng’ emetab Misri eng’ kaborunoik
Jeremiah32:22 ak igochi emoni
Jeremiah32:23 ak kibwa
Jeremiah32:24 Ogeero karurugutikab ng’ung’unyek ole bunu bik kobwanei koluulei nganasani; ak kagigochi nganasani eutab Kaldeik che baregei ak nganasanato
Jeremiah32:25 Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah
Jeremiah32:26 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia
Jeremiah32:27 Keero
Jeremiah32:28 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero
Jeremiah32:29 ak kobwa Kaldeik che baregei ak nganasani
Jeremiah32:30 Amu kigoyai lagokab Israel ak lagokab Juda ne ya eng’ tainnyu koboch ming’inatenywa: amu kigotacha lagokab Israel anerech eng’ boisionikab eunekwak
Jeremiah32:31 Amu kigoek eng’ ane nganasani tagisietab nereknatennyu ak ne bo neregekyuk che ng’wonen koboch betut ne kiteechei ichek agoi rani; kot aiste eng’ tainnyu
Jeremiah32:32 amu yaitiet tugul ne bo lagokab Israel ak ne bo lagokab Juda
Jeremiah32:33 Ak kigotuktocha batai
Jeremiah32:34 Ago kiinde tugukwak che kiwechei
Jeremiah32:35 Ak kiteech komoswek che tororen che bo Baal
Jeremiah32:36 Mwaei anyun Jehovah
Jeremiah32:37 Ogeero
Jeremiah32:38 Ak koek bikyuk
Jeremiah32:39 ak agochi ichek muguleldo agenge ak oret agenge
Jeremiah32:40 ak kiyomisige ak ichek kayomiset ne bo koigeny
Jeremiah32:41 Ee
Jeremiah32:42 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye kiaipchi bichu yaitioni o tugul
Jeremiah32:43 Ak keal mbarenik eng’ emoni
Jeremiah32:44 Alei bik mbarenik eng’ fedaisiek
Jeremiah33:1 Kinyonji kogeny ne bo aeng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia
Jeremiah33:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne yaei noto
Jeremiah33:3 Kuura
Jeremiah33:4 Amu mwaei Jehovah
Jeremiah33:5 Bwanei kobaregei ak Kaldeik
Jeremiah33:6 Ogeero
Jeremiah33:7 Ak agochi Juda ak Israel koweek eng’ ole kiga kiluulji
Jeremiah33:8 Ak aun ichek eng’ tengektanywa tugul
Jeremiah33:9 Ak koek nganasani eng’ ane kainet ne kiboiboitune
Jeremiah33:10 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ta kegasei kogeny eng’ olito
Jeremiah33:11 kigasei tugetab boiboiyet ak ne bo kagasetab ge
Jeremiah33:12 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ta kobiitu kogeny eng’ olito ole karatia
Jeremiah33:13 Bunei kogeny akwotisiekab kechirek taitab inendet ne iiti eng’ nganasok che bo emetab tulonok
Jeremiah33:14 Ogeero
Jeremiah33:15 Agochini kobityi Daudi Temetab imanda eng’ betusiechoto ak eng’ betunoto; ak koruoch kiruoget ak imanda eng’ emet.
Jeremiah33:16 Kisoru Juda eng’ betusiechoto; ak komeng’is Jerusalem eng’ chametab ge; ak ni kainet ne kimwaitoe
Jeremiah33:17 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Magoi betyi chi Daudi ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo gotab Israel;
Jeremiah33:18 ama betyin chi tisiik Lawik eng’ tainnyu ne igoitoi kagochinoik che kibeelei
Jeremiah33:19 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia kolenji
Jeremiah33:20 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ndaomuchi obut arorutiennyu ne bo bet
Jeremiah33:21 ta kimuchi kebut agine kayomisennyu ne kigiyomisge ak Daudi otwogindennyu
Jeremiah33:22 Ko u ye magimuchi kiit tuguk che bo kipsengwet
Jeremiah33:23 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia
Jeremiah33:24 Tos mebwati kit ne kagomwa bichu kole
Jeremiah33:25 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ngot ko matononi arorutiennyu ne bo bet ak ne bo kemoi
Jeremiah33:26 atimdoi anyun agine iyotetab Jakobo

Jeremiah36:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyondoni ne kibunu Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia
Jeremiah36:2 Nam bukuit ne mamanat
Jeremiah36:3 Abere tamangab kogas gotab Juda yaitiet tugul ne kaatil ale ayachini ichek; si koweek chi tugul eng’ ichek kometo orennyi ne ya
Jeremiah36:4 Kiguur anyun Jeremia Baruk weritab Neria; ak kisir Baruk ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah che kimwaei Jeremia
Jeremiah36:5 Ak king’at Jeremia Baruk
Jeremiah36:6 ui anyun isoman bukuinito
Jeremiah36:7 Tamangab komwaita somutikwak eng’ taitab Jehovah
Jeremiah36:8 Ak kiyai Baruk weritab Neria ko u tugul che king’at maotiot Jeremia inendet
Jeremiah36:9 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo mut ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia
Jeremiah36:10 Kisoman anyun Baruk ng’alekab Jeremia che kigisirji bukuit
Jeremiah36:11 Ak ye kingogas Mikaia weritab Gemaria
Jeremiah36:12 kochortagei kwo gotab laitoriat
Jeremiah36:13 Komwachi anyun Mikaia ichek ng’alek tugul che kagas
Jeremiah36:14 Koyokto anyun bounik tugul Jeudi weritab Netania
Jeremiah36:15 Ak kilenji ichek inendet
Jeremiah36:16 Kingo kagogas ng’alechato tugul anyun
Jeremiah36:17 Yeityo koteebe ichek Baruk kolenji
Jeremiah36:18 Kowolji anyun Baruk ichek
Jeremiah36:19 Yeityo komwachi bounik Baruk
Jeremiah36:20 Kiba anyun oldab laitoriat eng’ seremut; ago kiga konde bukuinoto got ne bo orit ne bo Elisama sirindet; ak kimwachi laitoriat ng’alechato tugul kogas.
Jeremiah36:21 Koyokto anyun laitoriat Jeudi kwo koib bukuit: ak kiinem eng’ got ne bo orit ne bo Elisama sirindet. Ak kisoman Jeudi kogas laitoriat
Jeremiah36:22 Kitebe laitoriat got ne kimenyei eng’ betusiekab kaititiet eng’ arawetab sogol: ak kimi mat ne kilalei eng’ kisigirit eng’ tainnyi.
Jeremiah36:23 Ak kingo kagosoman Jeudi kartasisiek somok anan ang’wan
Jeremiah36:24 Ma iyweis
Jeremiah36:25 Kiigaigai anyun Elnatan ak Delaia ak Gemaria laitoriat
Jeremiah36:26 Ak king’at laitoriat Jerameel weritab laitoriat
Jeremiah36:27 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia
Jeremiah36:28 Nam bukuit age kogeny
Jeremiah36:29 Ak imwa agobo Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda ile
Jeremiah36:30 Mwaei anyun Jehovah agobo Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda ko u ni kole: Masichei chi ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi: ak kiwirtoi mustanyi bet kobir asista
Jeremiah36:31 Ak abire inendet ak iyotennyi
Jeremiah36:32 Kinam anyun Jeremia bukuit age ne mamanat
Jeremiah37:1 Ak kilaitoran Sedekia weritab Josia kogeer Konia weritab Jeoiakim ne kiieet Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon koek laitoriat eng’ emetab Juda.
Jeremiah37:2 Ago ma kas inendet
Jeremiah37:3 Ak kiiyokto Sedekia laitoriat Jeukal weritab Selemia
Jeremiah37:4 Kinyonei anyun Jeremia orit ak komandoi eng’ kwenutab bik: amu kitom korat chi inendet eng’ korgoret.
Jeremiah37:5 Ak kiibok lugetab Parao eng’ Misri: ak kingo kagogas Kaldeik che kiga koyiem Jerusalem ng’alekwak
Jeremiah37:6 Yeityo konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiot Jeremia
Jeremiah37:7 Mwaei Jehovah
Jeremiah37:8 Ak kobwa Kaldeik kogeny
Jeremiah37:9 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amat oberberge
Jeremiah37:10 Amu nganda kiobar luget komugul ne bo Kaldeik che kiborienok
Jeremiah37:11 Ak kingo kagotogosta lugetab Kaldeik koba eng’ Jerusalem
Jeremiah37:12 kwo anyun Jeremia eng’ Jerusalem agoi emetab Benjamin

Jeremiah50:41 Ogeero
Jeremiah50:42 Tinyei kwangok ak ng’otwek; kolgolen
Jeremiah50:43 Kigogas laitoriatab Babulon kalosunenywa
Jeremiah50:44 Ogeero
Jeremiah50:45 Ogas anyun kiruogetab Jehovah
Jeremiah50:46 Botani ng’ony eng’ cheetab luget ne kiluule Babulon
Jeremiah51:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole
Jeremiah51:2 Ak ayokyi Babulon toek che sesei; kowong’ tugul che mi emennyi: amu baregei ichek ak inendet eng’ betutab nyalilda kobunu komoswek tugul.
Jeremiah51:3 Amat koriich kwangennyi mwogindet
Jeremiah51:4 Ak kobutyo ko kagobek eng’ emetab Kaldeik ko kagetoor eng’ ortinwekyik.
Jeremiah51:5 Amu magimetoi Israel
Jeremiah51:6 Omwei eng’ Babulon
Jeremiah51:7 Ki kikombetab tahabu Babulon eng’ eutab Jehovah
Jeremiah51:8 Kagobut Babulon kochakta
Jeremiah51:9 Kata kimache kisoob Babulon
Jeremiah51:10 Kagomoong’ Jehovah imandanyo: obwa
Jeremiah51:11 Olit kipchabonik; onam long’onik komie: kagong’eet Jehovah tamirmirikab laitorinikab Medik; amu chobennyi ko kogirinda Babulon
Jeremiah51:12 Onamji barak songoliet
Jeremiah51:13 Ee
Jeremiah51:14 Kagoyosiechigei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah51:15 Kiyai ng’ony eng’ kamuktaennyi
Jeremiah51:16 ye twek
Jeremiah51:17 Kergeitu chito age tugul ak tiondo ne matinyei naet; ililane kitang’indet age tugul ne bo tahabu kanamwennyi ne kigiwai: amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne kigitany
Jeremiah51:18 Buch choto
Jeremiah51:19 Ma u chuto kebebertab Jakobo; amu bo tai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul; ak Israel ko bororietab borotennyi: kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek.
Jeremiah51:20 Inye ko i aiywennyu ne bo boriet
Jeremiah51:21 ak atonatoni eng’ inye mbartanyit koboto chito ne lanyei;
Jeremiah51:22 ak atonatoni eng’ inye karitab luget koboto chito ne lanyei; ak atonatoni eng’ inye muren ak kwony; ak atonatoni eng’ inye boiyo ak neran; ak atonatoni eng’ inye muren ak tie;
Jeremiah51:23 ak atonatoni eng’ inye mestowot ak akwennyi; ak atonatoni eng’ inye kabatindet koboto eikyik che bo chogit; ak atonatoni eng’ inye bounik ak kiptainik.
Jeremiah51:24 Ak ayaakyini Babulon ak bik tugul che menyei Kaldea
Jeremiah51:25 Keero
Jeremiah51:26 Ak maibei eng’ inye koita ne bo luita
Jeremiah51:27 Onamji barak songoliet eng’ emet
Jeremiah51:28 Ochob bororiosiek kobargei ak inendet
Jeremiah51:29 Ak kobotan emet ak komi eng’ ng’wanindo: amu tonondos chobutikab Jehovah che kichobei agobo Babulon
Jeremiah51:30 Kigometo boriet murenikab Babulon che nyigonen
Jeremiah51:31 Labati chito ne kiyoktoi koib baronok kwo kotuiyo ak age
Jeremiah51:32 kagenam tabarwek
Jeremiah51:33 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Jeremiah51:34 Kigoama Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon
Jeremiah51:35 Mwaei chi ne menyei Sion kole
Jeremiah51:36 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole
Jeremiah51:37 Ak koek Babulon karurugutik
Jeremiah51:38 Borisendos ko u ng’etunyik che barnotik; morortos ko u arekab ng’etunyik.
Jeremiah51:39 Ye tinyei tawirenet ichek
Jeremiah51:40 Amutu ichek ko u arekab kechir che bendi ole kieng’se
Jeremiah51:41 Haa
Jeremiah51:42 Kagonyonji nyanjet Babulon: kagotuch inendet chang’indab mildaetab ge ne bo beekyik.
Jeremiah51:43 Kagoek nganasokyik karatia
Jeremiah51:44 Aruokyini Bel eng’ Babulon
Jeremiah51:45 Omong’une bikyuk
Jeremiah51:46 Amongotanuiso mugulelwekwok
Jeremiah51:47 Ogeero
Jeremiah51:48 Yeityo kotien eng’ boiboiyet kipsengwet ak ng’ony
Jeremiah51:49 Ko u ye kibarei Babulon Israel kobutyo
Jeremiah51:50 Oba okwek
Jeremiah51:51 Kililandosi
Jeremiah51:52 Ogeero
Jeremiah51:53 Agot nda togosta Babulon agoi kipsengwet
Jeremiah51:54 Waagatab rirek ne bunu Babulon
Jeremiah51:55 Amu luulei Jehovah Babulon
Jeremiah51:56 amu kagonyonji inendet luulindet
Jeremiah51:57 Ak agochini kobogityo bounikyik ak murenikyik che ng’omen
Jeremiah51:58 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Kigabui irimoik che tebeesen che bo Babulon kigesu
Jeremiah51:59 Ni ng’olyot ne king’atyi maotiot Jeremia Seraia weritab Neria
Jeremiah51:60 Ak kisirji Jeremia bukuit yaitiet tugul ne tun nyonjin Babulon
Jeremiah51:61 Ak kilenji Jeremia Seraia
Jeremiah51:62 ak ile
Jeremiah51:63 Ak ye kaisoman bukuini igesu
Jeremiah51:64 ak imwa ile
Jeremiah52:1 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak agenge Sedekia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Hamutal cheptab Jeremia ne bo Libna.
Jeremiah52:2 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah
Jeremiah52:3 Ak kibiitune tuguchoto neregekab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem ak Juda kot kotimda ichek koba eng’ tainnyi. Ak kiingelelji Sedekia laitoriatab Babulon.
Jeremiah52:4 Ak eng’ kenyitab sogol ne bo laitornatennyi
Jeremiah52:5 Koyiem anyun nganaset agoi kenyitab taman ak agenge ne bo laitoriat Sedekia.
Jeremiah52:6 King’wanit rubet eng’ nganasanato eng’ arawetab ang’wan eng’ betutab sogol ne bo arawanato
Jeremiah52:7 Kobut anyun bik irimetab nganaset
Jeremiah52:8 Ago kion lugetab Kaldeik laitoriat
Jeremiah52:9 Komut anyun laitoriat
Jeremiah52:10 Ak kibar laitoriatab Babulon werikab Sedekia kogeerei inendet: kibar kogeny bounik tugul che bo Juda eng’ Ribla.
Jeremiah52:11 Ak kibar konyekab Sedekia; ak korat laitoriatab Babulon inendet eng’ sirimwek
Jeremiah52:12 Ak eng’ arawetab mut
Jeremiah52:13 ak kibeel gotab Jehovah
Jeremiah52:14 Ak kibut luget tugul ne bo Kaldeik ne kimi koboto kiptaiyatab ribik
Jeremiah52:15 Yeityo komut koluul Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik bik che kibananok mising’
Jeremiah52:16 Ago kibagakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik
Jeremiah52:17 Ak kitui Kaldeik tolochikab sugunonik che kimi gotab Jehovah
Jeremiah52:18 Ak kiib terenik
Jeremiah52:19 Ak kikombok
Jeremiah52:20 Tolochichoto
Jeremiah52:21 Ago eng’ tolochik
Jeremiah52:22 Ak kimi metitab sugunwet baragunnyi; ak koindab tononetab metoto ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut
Jeremiah52:23 Ak kimi logoek tamanwogik sogolu ak lo komoswekyik; ki bogol agenge logoechoto tugul che kimi karichato regerotin eng’ komoswek tugul.
Jeremiah52:24 Ak kiimut kiptaiyatab ribik Seraia tisiindet ne o
Jeremiah52:25 Ak kiimut eng’ nganaset kiptaiyat ne kibou luget: ak bik tisab eng’ ichek che kigeerei togetab laitoriat
Jeremiah52:26 Ak kiimut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik bichoto
Jeremiah52:27 Ak kibir laitoriatab Babulon bichoto
Jeremiah52:28 Chu bik che kiimut Nebukadresar koluul: eng’ kenyitab tisab ko kiluul Yahudik elfusiek somok ak tiptem ak somok:
Jeremiah52:29 eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo Nebukadresar komut koluul eng’ Jerusalem bik bogolwogik sisiit ak sosom ak aeng’.
Jeremiah52:30 Eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak somok ne bo Nebukadresar komut Nubusaraden kiptaiyatab ribik
Jeremiah52:31 Ak eng’ kenyitab sosom ak tisab koboch ngeluul Jeoiakin laitoriatab Juda
Jeremiah52:32 ak king’alalji inendet eng’ rirenetab ge
Jeremiah52:33 Ak kiwal ngoroikyik che bo korgoret
Jeremiah52:34 Ak kiigochi laitoriatab Babulon inendet kotugul kebebertanyi ne bo amitwogik
Lamentations1:1 Lyon si komi buch nganaset
Lamentations1:2 Rirei mising’ kemoi
Lamentations1:3 Kigiluul Juda amu nyalilda
Lamentations1:4 Iteitos ortinwekab Sion
Lamentations1:5 Kogoek usikyik kandoik
Lamentations1:6 Kogoistoegei cheptab Sion torornatennyi tugul: Kogoigei bounikyik cheptirgichik che matinyei ole agete
Lamentations1:7 Ibwati Jerusalem eng’ betusiekab nyalildanyi ak che bo bichiinwekyik Tugukyik tugul che kiiboiboi inendet koboch betusiek che bo keny: Ye kiibutyi bikyik eutab bunyot
Lamentations1:8 Kigoyai Jerusalem tengekto ne ya mising’; kogoek anyun kit ne muruon amu noto: Sasei inendet tugul che kigonyiti inendet
Lamentations1:9 Kimi simdanyi ngoroikyik; ma ibwat kagesunennyi ne bo let; Katururgei anyun eng’ kwong’et; matinyei kagaigaindet: Keero
Lamentations1:10 Kogoiitochi bunyot eunnyi tugukyik tugul che koboiboitune: Amu kagogeer kole kogochut bororiosiek oldanyi ne tilil
Lamentations1:11 Tigendos bikyik tugul
Lamentations1:12 Tos ma kiy eng’ okwek
Lamentations1:13 Kiiyok inendet mat eng’ barak koyokyi kowekyuk
Lamentations1:14 Kirat eunnyi chogitab bistaosiekyuk: Kigonamgei tugul
Lamentations1:15 Kigoyai Kiptaiyat bik tugul che nyigonen koek buch eng’ kwenunnyu; Kigoguurja tuiyet ne kiging’at kole kotuatui neranikyuk: Kigotiechatiech Kiptaiyat bergeiyatab Juda ko u ye kitiechei ole kitue sabibuk.
Lamentations1:16 Arire anyun agobo tuguchuto; saitoi beekab kong’ eng’ konyekyuk; Amu loo eng’ ane kagaigaindet ne kata isoobi sobondanyu: Kigoek lagokyuk kibananok
Lamentations1:17 Iitoi Sion eunekyik; ago mami chi ne igoigoi inendet; Kigong’at Jehovah agobo Jakobo
Lamentations1:18 Bo imanda Jehovah; amu kiangelelji ng’atutiennyi: Asaok ale
Lamentations1:19 Kiaguur chamanikyuk
Lamentations1:20 Keero
Lamentations1:21 Kigogas ichek kole atigeni; mami chi ne igoigoa; Kigogas bunikyuk tugul agobo nyalildanyu; boiboi ichek amu kiiyai ko u noto: Tun iibu betut ne kiimwaite
Lamentations1:22 Ingobwa taing’ung’ yaitwogikwak tugul; Ak iyachi ichek
Lamentations2:1 Lyon si kotuge Kiptaiyat cheptab Sion boldet eng’ neregekyik! Kigotim kororonindab Israel eng’ kipsengwet konyo ng’ony
Lamentations2:2 Kigolugui Kiptaiyat meng’otosiek tugul che bo Jakobo
Lamentations2:3 Kigotil kuinetab Israel eng’ neregekyik che ng’wonen; Kigoweech eunnyi ne bo tai konyo eng’ taitab bunik: Ak kigobeel Jakobo ko u mat ne liblibeni
Lamentations2:4 Kigoriich kwangennyi ko u bunyot
Lamentations2:5 Kiigei Kiptaiyat bunyot
Lamentations2:6 Kigoisto emainnyi eng’ koromnatet
Lamentations2:7 Kigotimda Kiptaiyat kaptisisiennyi
Lamentations2:8 Kigochob Jehovah kong’em irimetab cheptab Sion; Kigokwerta kit ne kikwaise
Lamentations2:9 Isuwe kobendi ng’ony ormarichokyik; king’em ak koiri temeleiywekyik: Mi laitoriandennyi ak bounikyik kwenutab bororiosiek ole mami ng’atutiet; Ee
Lamentations2:10 Tebyei ng’ony boisiekab cheptab Sion
Lamentations2:11 Ibwandos konyekyuk amu beekab kong’
Lamentations2:12 Teebe ichek kametwagikwak kolenjin
Lamentations2:13 Abaorianun alen nee? Arogenen nee
Lamentations2:14 Kigogeer maotiguk ng’ang’utik agobo inye che bo tangoita ak berberindo; Ak tom kong’any tengektang’ung’
Lamentations2:15 Iraprapchin eunek ichek tugul che siirtoi; Reng’sei ak kolelechi metowekwak agobo cheptab Jerusalem
Lamentations2:16 Kagoyatyin kutuswekwak buniguk tugul; Reng’sei ak kosusei kelek; mwaei kole
Lamentations2:17 Kigoyai Jehovah noto kigochob; Kagoyai ng’olyondennyi kosulda ne kiga ng’at eng’ betusiek che bo keny; Kagowirta kwo ng’ony

Lamentations2:20 Keero
Lamentations2:21 Ruitos ng’ony murenik ak boisiek eng’ ortinwek; Kagebar bergeinikyuk ak neranikyuk eng’ rotwetab chok: Kiibar ichek eng’ betutab neregeguk; kiibar
Lamentations2:22 Kiiguur kamuisosiekyuk eng’ komosta age tugul
Lamentations3:1 A chito ne kiageer nyalildab kiroktab neregekyik.
Lamentations3:2 Kigondoiywa ak kogena awendote mesundeito ama eng’ lapkeiyet.
Lamentations3:3 Iman kiitocha eunnyi konyil ak konyil betut komugul.
Lamentations3:4 Kigoyai bortanyu ak iririondennyu koosegitu; kigoiri kowekyuk.
Lamentations3:5 Kigong’ota kogirindaa ak koyiemena kipsegetetiet ak ng’wanindo.

Lamentations3:7 Kigong’ota
Lamentations3:8 Ee
Lamentations3:9 Kigong’ote ortinwekyuk koik che kigiwai
Lamentations3:10 U inendet tiondo ne u keerit ne sapchina
Lamentations3:11 Kigomaas ortinwekyuk
Lamentations3:12 Kigoriich kwangennyi ak kondea aek kit ne kimwogei.
Lamentations3:13 Kigogochi kipchabonikab motiennyi kochut suennyu.
Lamentations3:14 Kiaegu ne rorechin bikyuk tugul; ak aegu tiendanywa bet komugul.
Lamentations3:15 Kigonyiita ng’wanindo
Lamentations3:16 Kigoirie kelekyuk kibargook
Lamentations3:17 Ak kiiste sobondanyuu kolooit eng’ kalyet; kiautie borotet.

Lamentations3:21 Abwati nito
Lamentations3:22 Ki rirenosiekab Jehovah kityo si ma kigeswech
Lamentations3:23 Leelachen rirenosiekyik karonet age tugul; o imandang’ung’.

Lamentations3:25 Mie Jehovah eng’ icheget che igeni inendet
Lamentations3:26 Mie eng’ chito komang’ ak kogen eng’ muitaet yetunetab Jehovah.
Lamentations3:27 Mie eng’ chito kogesen chogit eng’ betusiekab ming’inatennyi.
Lamentations3:28 Ingoteb inegei ak kosis
Lamentations3:29 Ingotoore kutinnyi temburiek; tamangab kobiit kamang’unet.
Lamentations3:30 Ingogochi matandanyi inendet ne irabachi; inginyiit inendet chotisiet.

Lamentations3:33 Amu mainyalilisiei kokwetyin

Lamentations3:35 Anan kimaase chi imaninnyi eng’ taitab Inendet ne Toror Mising’
Lamentations3:36 Anan kibeet chi eng’ ng’olyondennyi.
Lamentations3:37 Ng’o inendet ne mwaei ak kosulda kioto
Lamentations3:38 Tos mamong’une kutitab Inendet ne Toror Mising’ yaitiet ak mieindo?
Lamentations3:39 Amu nee anyun si kong’unyng’uny chito
Lamentations3:40 Ongisiach ak ketiem ortinwekyok
Lamentations3:41 Ongetokyi mugulelwekyok koboto eunekyok Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet.
Lamentations3:42 Kigibistoe ak kigingelelse; ma inyoiywech kaat.
Lamentations3:43 Kiitugege neregek ak ionatech; kiibarisie
Lamentations3:44 Kiitugege boldet
Lamentations3:45 Kiiyaech keige tuguk che kibuktoi che kilaktoi ak busagariek eng’ bororiosiek.

Lamentations3:52 Kigoona ichek mising’ ko u tarit
Lamentations3:53 Kigoisto sobondanyu eng’ keringet
Lamentations3:54 Rootei beek kosiirei metinnyu; kiamwa ale
Lamentations3:55 Kiaguur kaineng’ung
Lamentations3:56 Kiigas kutinnyu; meung’e iting’ung’ kabusennyu
Lamentations3:57 Kiirigu eng’ betut ne kiaguurin: kiimwa ile

Lamentations3:59 Ee Jehovah

Lamentations3:61 Kiigas inye chotisienywa
Lamentations3:62 Kiigas kutuswekab ichek che king’eetya ak kabwatutikwak che ibwati agobo ane betut komugul.
Lamentations3:63 Keer inye ye tebyei ng’ony ak ye ng’eetos; a tiendanywa.
Lamentations3:64 Iyaaktochini ichek ko u boisienywa
Lamentations3:65 Igochini mugulelwekwak kouuegitu
Lamentations3:66 Ionati ichek eng’ neregek
Lamentations4:1 Lyon si komuruonitu tahabu! Lyon si kowalaksei tahabu che tililen mising’! Kagirong’ koikab ole tilil eng’ tabandab oret age tugul.
Lamentations4:2 Kergei werikab Sion che bo kamanutiet ne o ak tahabu che kororon
Lamentations4:3 Tinyei lelwek agichek kinaik
Lamentations4:4 Yaamei ng’elyeptab lakwet ne reriei eng’ kutinnyi amu melelda: Somei lagok amitwogik
Lamentations4:5 Kimetoi eng’ ortinwek ichek che kibaegei amitwogikab talbisto: Tebe kapng’atat icheget che kinerta kalaaksetab ngoroik che biriren.
Lamentations4:6 Amu o tengektab cheptab bikyuk kosiir tengektab Sodom
Lamentations4:7 Ki tililen bikyik che toogunotin kosiir teluchi
Lamentations4:8 Tuuen togochikwak kosiir nesek; maginae eng’ ortinwek: Namegei irirenikwak ak kowekwak; kogoresyo
Lamentations4:9 Kaigai che barei rotwetab chok kosiir icheget che barei rubet; Amu restos choto
Lamentations4:10 Kigonam kwonyik che kitinyei rirenet lagokwak koyo; Kiek choto amitwogikwak eng’ ng’emisietab cheptab bikyuk.
Lamentations4:11 Kigoyai Jehovah neregekyik che ng’wonen kosulda
Lamentations4:12 Kima koyani laitorinikab ng’ony
Lamentations4:13 Kibiit ko u nito amu tengekwogikab maotikyik
Lamentations4:14 Ombenioti eng’ ortinwek ko u kipkoratinik
Lamentations4:15 Kitwekyi kolenji
Lamentations4:16 Kigopchei ichek neregekab Jehovah; ma koiiti Jehovah ichek kogeny: Ma tiytii ichek tisiik
Lamentations4:17 Kagong’etyo konyekyok kigeni toretet ne matilei kiy: Kigigen eng’ kagenisiennyo bororiet ne maimuchi kosor chi.
Lamentations4:18 Sapchin kakwautikyok
Lamentations4:19 Chepcheben che onatech kosiir kipsichinikab barak: Kionatech eng’ tulonok
Lamentations4:20 Kinamji keringonikwak kabusetab serunekyok
Lamentations4:21 Baibaitu ak igasge
Lamentations4:22 Kagosulda biretab tengektang’ung’
Lamentations5:1 Ibwat anyun
Lamentations5:2 Kigigochi borotennyo toek
Lamentations5:3 Kogeegu chebusoi ak che matinyei kwanda. Kogoigei kametisiekyok mosogik.
Lamentations5:4 Kigee beek che kigiale feda; Kigeal ketik.
Lamentations5:5 Negit konamech kaatit bik che onatech: Kigeng’etye ama kitinye kamuung’et.
Lamentations5:6 Kigenamge eunek ak Misrik eng’ kayosiet
Lamentations5:7 Kigoyai tengekto kwanisiekyok ak ma komi; Ak kigegesen tengekwogikwak.
Lamentations5:8 Boiywech otwogik: Mami chi ne soruech kemong’une eunekwak.
Lamentations5:9 Kindoi sobonwekyok ng’oiyondit si kobiit kenyoru amitwogik Amu rotwetab chok ne bo ong’atet.
Lamentations5:10 Tuuen irirenikyok ko u ole kilaali Amu kemeut ne lalei ne bo iljet.
Lamentations5:11 Kisuub ichek kwonyik eng’ Sion
Lamentations5:12 Kiigartat icheget bounik eng’ eunekwak: Ma konyit chi boisiek.
Lamentations5:13 Ibei neranik koitab bai
Lamentations5:14 Ma kobendi boisiek ormarich
Lamentations5:15 Kigogesgei boiboiyetab mugulelwekyok; Kigowalak ureriennyo koek rirek.
Lamentations5:16 Kigobut nariet eng’ metowekyok: Bwa achek! Amu kigeyai tengekto.
Lamentations5:17 Kagotanuiso mugulelwekyok amu noto; Kagogorio konyekyok amu tuguchuto;

Lamentations5:19 Ee Jehovah
Lamentations5:20 Amu nee anyun si iutienech agoi

Ezekiel1:1 Kiyatak kipsengwet eng’ kenyitab sosom
Ezekiel1:2 Eng’ betut ne bo mut ne bo arawet
Ezekiel1:3 konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Esekiel tisiindet
Ezekiel1:4 Ak kiageer
Ezekiel1:5 Ak kimong’une kwenunnyi kergeindo ne bo tuguk ang’wan che soptos. Ki u ni itondanywa; kitinyei itondo ne u ne bo chi.
Ezekiel1:6 Ak kitinyei age tugul togochik ang’wan
Ezekiel1:7 Ak ki chuulotin kelyekwak; ak ki u keldebesaikab kelyekwak siokab moita: ak kiilyeldos ko u itondab sugunwet ne sitat.
Ezekiel1:8 Ak kitinyei eunek che u che bo chito eng’ kebebaikwak orit eng’ komoswekwak ang’wan; ak kitinyei icheget ang’wanu togochikwak ak kebebaikwak ko u ni;
Ezekiel1:9 kiga namgei kebebaikwak; kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi; kiwendi age tugul kogeerei tai.
Ezekiel1:10 Kergeindab togochikwak
Ezekiel1:11 Ki besiotin togochikwak ak kebebaikwak eng’ ole bo barak; kiga namgei kebebaik aeng’ eng’ age tugul
Ezekiel1:12 Kiwa tai age tugul: kiba ichek ole kamach tamirmiriet; kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi.
Ezekiel1:13 Kergeindab tuguchoto soptos ko ki u itondanywa ng’etetiot
Ezekiel1:14 Ak kiruaei tuguchoto soptos ak koweechegei ko u kakweng’etab kalyelet.
Ezekiel1:15 Kingota ageere anyun tuguchoto soptos

Ezekiel16:57 ye kitom keng’any yaitieng’ung’
Ezekiel16:58 Koiib yaitieng’ung’ ak tuguguk che kiwechei
Ezekiel16:59 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ayaun ko u ye koiyai
Ezekiel16:60 Nganda u noto
Ezekiel16:61 Ibwat anyun ortinweguk
Ezekiel16:62 Ak agimit kayomisennyu koboten; si inai ile a Jehovah:
Ezekiel16:63 si kobiit ibwat
Ezekiel17:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah
Ezekiel17:2 Ee weritab chi
Ezekiel17:3 ilenji
Ezekiel17:4 ak kieb temet ne ki tabanu barak ne kinamgei ak che ng’orng’oren
Ezekiel17:5 Kiib kogeny keswek che bo emonoto
Ezekiel17:6 Ak kibit ak koek ketitab sabibuk ne tebeesitu ne magoitu
Ezekiel17:7 Kimi kogeny kipsichit age ne o ne kitinyei kebebaik che eechen ak kororik che chang’: ak ogeero
Ezekiel17:8 Kiga kiminji ng’ung’unyek che miachen eng’ ole negite beek che chang’
Ezekiel17:9 Mwa inye ile
Ezekiel17:10 Ee
Ezekiel17:11 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja
Ezekiel17:12 Mwachi anyun got ne ngeleliot
Ezekiel17:13 Ak kiluul iyotetab laitoriat ak koyomisgei koboto inendet: kibirji kogeny inendet eng’ kayosiet
Ezekiel17:14 kole
Ezekiel17:15 Ago kiingelelji inendet amu kiiyokto tononjinikyik koba Misri
Ezekiel17:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole
Ezekiel17:17 Ama tilei kiy eng’ inendet Parao koboto lugennyi ne kim
Ezekiel17:18 Amu kigosas kayosiet kobut arorutiet
Ezekiel17:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye asobe
Ezekiel17:20 Ak aiitochini mestennyu inendet
Ezekiel17:21 Ak kebare rotwetab chok bikyik tugul che kimweei eng’ kweanaikyik tugul
Ezekiel17:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Aibe kogeny walitab tarakwet ne koi ak amin; ak aeb temet ne ng’arng’ar
Ezekiel17:23 Aminjini tulwet ne koi ne bo Israel: ak kowakta
Ezekiel17:24 Si konai ketik tugul che bo timin kole
Ezekiel18:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah
Ezekiel18:2 Oboru nee si oboisie kalewenoni agobo emetab Israel
Ezekiel18:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole
Ezekiel18:4 Ogeero
Ezekiel18:5 Ago ngot ko bo iman chi
Ezekiel18:6 ak tomo koamisie tulonok
Ezekiel18:7 ak tom koyachi chi kiy ne ya
Ezekiel18:8 inendet ne tom kogoito tuguk si konyorune kelunet ne siirtoot
Ezekiel18:9 ne kigowendote ng’atutikyuk
Ezekiel18:10 Ngot kosich chichoto werit ne rebindet
Ezekiel18:11 ama yaei age eng’ boisionichuto
Ezekiel18:12 ne kigoyachi ne ya kibananiat ak ne matinyei kiy
Ezekiel18:13 ne kigogoito tuguk si konyorune kelunet ne siirtoot
Ezekiel18:14 Ara anyun
Ezekiel18:15 ne tom koamisie tulonok
Ezekiel18:16 ne tom koyachi chi age tugul kiy ne ya
Ezekiel18:17 ne kigoisto eunnyi si matwa kibananiat
Ezekiel18:18 Ago ne u kwandanyi
Ezekiel18:19 Ago omwae okwek ole
Ezekiel18:20 Meei chito ne yaei tengekto: manamei werit ng’ogistab kwandanyi
Ezekiel18:21 Ago ngot koweek kiptengekyot kometo tengekwogikyik tugul che kigoyai
Ezekiel18:22 Magiityin inendet agot agenge eng’ bistaosiekyik che kigoyai: sobei inendet eng’ imandanyi ne kigoyai.
Ezekiel18:23 Tos abaibai eng’ meetab kiptengekyot? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: tos ma abaibai ngo week kometo orennyi si kosob?
Ezekiel18:24 Ago ye week ne bo iman kometo imandanyi
Ezekiel18:25 Ago omwae ole
Ezekiel18:26 Ye week chito ne bo iman kometo imandanyi
Ezekiel18:27 Kogeny
Ezekiel18:28 Amu ruchin ak kometo bistaosiekyik tugul che kigoyai
Ezekiel18:29 Ago mwaei gotab Israel kole
Ezekiel18:30 Aruokwok anyun
Ezekiel18:31 Omete bistaosiekwok tugul che kigogonok obistoe; ak ochopchige muguleldo ne leel ak tamirmiriet ne leel: amu nee si obegu
Ezekiel18:32 Amu ma abaibai eng’ meetab inendet ne meei

Ezekiel19:2 ak ile

Ezekiel19:4 Kigas bororiosiek agobo inendet: ak kiname keringenywa: ak kiichuutune kombok agoi emetab Misri.
Ezekiel19:5 Ak kingogeer kamet kole kigogenis ak kigobet kamang’unennyi
Ezekiel19:6 Ak kiwendote kwenutab ng’etunyik ak kiek ng’etundo ne neran: ak kiinetgei loget
Ezekiel19:7 Ak kinai gorikwak che bo laitorinik

Ezekiel19:9 Ak kiinde inendet korgoret

Ezekiel19:12 Ago kigitut eng’ neregek che ng’wonen
Ezekiel19:13 Kogeminji anyun ong’atet
Ezekiel19:14 Ak kagomisok mat eng’ ketikab temenikyik

Ezekiel23:2 Ee
Ezekiel23:3 Ak kiyai ichek kugoinatosiek eng’ Misri; kiyai kugoinatosiek eng’ ming’inatenywa: kigichiil kinaikwak eng’ oloto
Ezekiel23:4 Kainaikwak ko ki Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 Ak kiyai Ohola kugoinatet ye kita ko nenyu; ak kicham mising’ chamanikyik
Ezekiel23:6 che kiilaachi ngoroik che tuuen ne nyalil

Ezekiel23:9 Kiande anyun inendet eunekab chamanikyik

Ezekiel23:15 che kirategei birenoik
Ezekiel23:16 Ak kingogeer ichek kocham ngunoto
Ezekiel23:17 Ak kibwanji inendet Babulonik eng’ itogutab chamnyet

Ezekiel23:19 Ago kites kugoinatosiekyik

Ezekiel23:23 Babulonik ak Kaldeik tugul

Ezekiel23:33 Kinyiitin bogitet ak arogenet
Ezekiel23:34 Iee ichololi

Ezekiel23:39 Amu ye kingobarji lagokwak kanamonikwak
Ezekiel23:40 Ak kogeny kioguur bik eng’ ole loo: che kiga kiyokyi
Ezekiel23:41 ak kiitebe itogut ne kararan

Ezekiel26:8 Bare rotwetab chok tibiguk che mi emet: ak koteech irimoik kotokyin
Ezekiel26:9 Ak konde injinisiek che kibutisie

Ezekiel26:13 Ak agesu cheetab tienwogiguk; ama kegasei kogeny cheetab ketubosieguk.

Ezekiel27:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja
Ezekiel27:2 Ee inye
Ezekiel27:3 ak ilenji Turo
Ezekiel27:4 Mi kiwotosieguk kwenutab nyanjosiek
Ezekiel27:5 Kigoyai ichek baoiniguk eng’ biribirinik che bunu Senir: kigoib taragonik eng’ Lebanon si kobiit koyaun toloitab melit.
Ezekiel27:6 Kigoyai ichek mugangoguk che kiwase beek
Ezekiel27:7 Ki bo katanit ne kararan ne kiginde lelesta
Ezekiel27:8 Ki kiboitiniguk che bo melit
Ezekiel27:9 Kimenyin boisiekab Gebal koboto bikyik che ng’omen che kitimoti ole kaundur: kimi kwenung’ung’ melisiek tugul che bo nyanjet koboto kiboitinikwak si koyai mung’areng’ung’.
Ezekiel27:10 Kimi lugeng’ung’ bikab Persia
Ezekiel27:11 Kimi bikab Abad koboto lugeng’ung’ irimoiguk barak komoswek tugul
Ezekiel27:12 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Tarsis amu chang’indab magornatosiek alak tugul; kiyaei mung’aret eng’ feda
Ezekiel27:13 Ki chemung’arainiguk Jaban
Ezekiel27:14 Kiyae mung’aret ichek che bo gotab Togarma mbartanyisiek
Ezekiel27:15 Ki chemung’arainiguk bikab Dedan: kiek ole ialdoisie ngegusiek che chang’: kialunenen tuguguk kelekab belek ak ketik che tuuen.
Ezekiel27:16 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Suria
Ezekiel27:17 Ki chemung’arainiguk Juda
Ezekiel27:18 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Damasko amu chang’indab tugukab musognateng’ung’
Ezekiel27:19 Kiyae mung’aret Bedan ak Jaban tuguk che bunu Usal: kiboto tuguguk che bo mung’aret
Ezekiel27:20 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Dedan eng’ ngoroik che kiitoi eng’ mbartanyisiek.
Ezekiel27:21 Ki chemung’arainiguk Arabia
Ezekiel27:22 Chemung’arainikab Sheba ak che bo Raama ko ki chemung’arainiguk: kiyae mung’aret tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny kosiir tugul
Ezekiel27:23 Haran
Ezekiel27:24 Ki chemung’arainiguk chuto eng’ tuguk che kororon
Ezekiel27:25 Kiibei tuguguk che bo mung’aret melisiekab Tarsis: ak kiitesage
Ezekiel27:26 Kigomutun kiboitiniguk che bo melit inyo beek che chang’: kiriebin usonetab kong’asis eng’ kwenutab nyanjosiek.
Ezekiel27:27 Ibutyin kwenutab nyanjosiek magornatosieguk
Ezekiel27:28 Botandos kiwotosiek amu waagatab biguk che kweriei melisiek.
Ezekiel27:29 Chorugei eng’ melisiekwak bik tugul che wasei beek eng’ mugangok
Ezekiel27:30 Ak kowaach kot igas
Ezekiel27:31 ak kocher metowekwak amu inye
Ezekiel27:32 Ak korirjin eng’ kateiyenwa
Ezekiel27:33 Ye kibun tuguguk che bo mung’aret nyanjosiek
Ezekiel27:34 Eng’ betut ne kigiiriin eng’ nyanjosiek eng’ rirosiek
Ezekiel27:35 Kwong’enen bik tugul che menyei ngegusiek
Ezekiel27:36 Renyin chemung’arainik che mi bororiosiek; kiiegu kamuiset ama ibiitu agoi.
Ezekiel28:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah
Ezekiel28:2 Ee
Ezekiel28:3 keero
Ezekiel28:4 kiisikyige magornatosiek eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ ak naeng’ung’
Ezekiel28:5 kiites magornatosieguk eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ ne o ak eng’ mung’areng’ung’
Ezekiel28:6 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiiyaige eng’ muguleldang’ung’ iige Kamuktaindent;
Ezekiel28:7 keer anyun
Ezekiel28:8 Ak kochoorten iwe keringet; ak imeei eng’ meosiekab che kigibar
Ezekiel28:9 Tos ta imwae eng’ taitab inendet ne barin
Ezekiel28:10 Imee eng’ meosiekab che ma kimuratan eng’ eutab toek: amu kaamwa ng’olyondonito
Ezekiel28:11 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah
Ezekiel28:12 Ee
Ezekiel28:13 Kiimi Eden mbaretab Kamuktaindet; kiitugege koita age tugul ne bo kamanutiet
Ezekiel28:14 Kii kerubindet ne kigiil ne kiiuurisiei: ak kiandein si itebe tulwet ne tilil ne bo Kamuktaindet; kiiwendote kwenutab koik che bo mat.
Ezekiel28:15 Kiigesunotge eng’ ortinweguk koboch betut ne kigiyaenen

Ezekiel28:17 Kiitororge eng’ muguleldang’ung’ amu kororonindang’ung’

Ezekiel28:19 Kwong’enen ichek tugul che ingenin che mi bororiosiek: kiiegu kamuiset

Ezekiel31:6 Kiteech taritik tugul kesonokwak eng’ temenikab ketoto
Ezekiel31:7 Ki kararan anyun eng’ etunatennyi
Ezekiel31:8 Ma imuch taragonik che kimi mbaretab Kamuktaindet kouny inendet: kima ko kergei biribirinik ak temenikyik; ak kima ko kergei ketik che u kurinik ak temenikyik; ak kima komi ketit age tugul eng’ mbaretab Kamuktaindet ne kergei ak inendet eng’ kororonindanyi.

Ezekiel38:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bwanjinin kabwatutik eng’ betunoto
Ezekiel38:11 ak imwa ile
Ezekiel38:12 si kobiit aluul ak aib barunenik; si kobiit ibar komoswek che ki karatwek che kimenyei nguno
Ezekiel38:13 Teebenen Sheba
Ezekiel38:14 Maoten anyun
Ezekiel38:15 Ak inyo eng’ oldang’ung’ eng’ tabanwek che looen che bo murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel38:16 ak obwa obarge ak bikyuk Israel
Ezekiel38:17 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tos inye ne kiamwaite keny eng’ otwogikyuk maotikab Israel
Ezekiel38:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole
Ezekiel38:19 Amu kaamwa eng’ ng’etkondanyu ak eng’ matab neregekyuk
Ezekiel38:20 kot kobotanso eng’ tainnyi njirenikab nyanjet
Ezekiel38:21 Ak aguur rotwetab chok kobargei ak inendet agoi tulonokyuk tugul
Ezekiel38:22 Ak ager kong’ inendet eng’ koroito ak korotik; ak ayokyi inendet
Ezekiel38:23 Ak atororge
Ezekiel39:1 Ee
Ezekiel39:2 ak awelelin
Ezekiel39:3 ak akwer kwangeng’ung’ ne mi eung’ung’ ne bo katam
Ezekiel39:4 Ibutyini tulonokab Israel
Ezekiel39:5 Imeechini kewanin: amu kaamwa ng’olyondonito
Ezekiel39:6 Ak ayokyi mat Magog
Ezekiel39:7 Ak abarte kainennyu ne tilil eng’ bikyuk Israel; ama achamdoi kainennyu ne tilil king’wanit kogeny: si konai bororiosiek kole a Jehovah
Ezekiel39:8 Keero
Ezekiel39:9 Ak komanda ichek che menyei nganasokab Israel
Ezekiel39:10 kot ko ma kobutei ichek kwenik anan koluul ket age tugul eng’ osnosiek
Ezekiel39:11 Ak agochini eng’ betunoto Gog komosta ne kitupchin eng’ Israel
Ezekiel39:12 Ak kotub gotab Israel ichek arawek tisab
Ezekiel39:13 Ee
Ezekiel39:14 Ak kotaban bik kobunot emet betusiek tugul
Ezekiel39:15 Ak ye bunoti icheget emet
Ezekiel39:16 Ak koek kogeny Hamona kainetab nganaset. Ianyinyi emet ko u noto.
Ezekiel39:17 Ee
Ezekiel39:18 Oam banyekab che kimen
Ezekiel39:19 Ak koam mwanik kot obiyong’se
Ezekiel39:20 Ak obiyong’dosi eng’ mesennyu eng’ mbartanyisiek ak karisiek che bo luget
Ezekiel39:21 Ak ande torornatennyu kwenutab bororiosiek ak kogeer bororiosiek tugul kiruogennyu ne kaayai
Ezekiel39:22 Konai anyun gotab Israel kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa
Ezekiel39:23 Ak konai bororiosiek kole kigiluul gotab Israel amu tengektanywa; amu kiingelelja
Ezekiel39:24 Kiayachi ichek ko u muruonindanywa ak ko u bistaosiekwak; ak kiaung’e ichek togennyu.
Ezekiel39:25 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amutu kogeny che kigiluul che bo Jakobo
Ezekiel39:26 Ak kogesen kalilanenywa
Ezekiel39:27 ye tun kaamutu ichek kogeny komong’ eng’ bororiosiek
Ezekiel39:28 Ak konai ichek kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa
Ezekiel39:29 ama aung’e ichek togennyu kogeny; amu kaarong’ji tamirmiriennyu gotab Israel
Ezekiel40:1 Kimi baragunnyu eutab Jehovah eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak mut
Ezekiel40:2 Kiimutwa eng’ ng’ang’utikab Kamuktaindet anyo emetab Israel ak kondea tulwet ne koi mising’
Ezekiel40:3 Ak kiimutwa anyo yoto
Ezekiel40:4 Ak kilenja chichoto
Ezekiel40:5 Ak ogeero
Ezekiel40:6 Kiit anyun ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis
Ezekiel40:7 Ak kiek koindab got age tugul ne bo orit tegat agenge
Ezekiel40:8 Kiikwa kogeny keterut ne bo ormarichet ne tokyingei got
Ezekiel40:9 Yeityo kokwa keterut ne bo ormarichet koek kakwautik sisiit che bo eut; ak kiek tugatugikyik kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut; ak kitokyingei keterut ne bo ormarichet got.
Ezekiel40:10 Ak ki somok gorik che kimi komosi ak komosin che bo ormarichet ne kitokyingei kong’asis; kiaechin tugul ko somok: ak kiaechin tugatugikab komosi ak komosin.
Ezekiel40:11 Ak kiikwa tebeesindab ole kibunei eng’ ormarichet
Ezekiel40:12 ak kimi tegeleiywot taitab gorichoto bo orit
Ezekiel40:13 Ak kiikwa ormarichet koboch got barak ne bo got age agoi got barak ne bo got age
Ezekiel40:14 Kiikwa keterut
Ezekiel40:15 Kiek kakwautik konom che bo eut koboch taitab ormarichet ne kibunei kebendi orit agoi taitab keterut ne bo orit ne bo ormarichet.
Ezekiel40:16 Ak kitinyei gorichoto bo orit tirisiok che regerotin
Ezekiel40:17 Kikimutwa anyun anyo seremut ne kimong’jin
Ezekiel40:18 Kimi komoswek che kigimal ole negite ormarichok
Ezekiel40:19 Yeityo kokwa tebeesindo koboch ormarichet ne tabanu ng’ony
Ezekiel40:20 Ak kiikwa koindo ak tebeesindo ne bo ormarichetab seremut ne kimong’jin ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam.
Ezekiel40:21 Ak kimi gorikyik somogu che bo orit komosi ak komosin; kiaechin kakwautikab tugatugikyik koboto che bo keterunnyi
Ezekiel40:22 Ak ki aechin kakwautikab tirisiokyik
Ezekiel40:23 Ak kimi ormarichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne bo orit ne kitokyingei ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo katam ak kimi ormarichet ne kitokyingei ormarichet ne bo kong’asis; ak kiikwa kong’eete ormarichet age agoi ormarichet age
Ezekiel40:24 Ak kiimuta atokyige murot ne bo tai
Ezekiel40:25 Ak kitinyei tirisiok ormarichanato koboto keterunnyi eng’ komoswek tugul che u tirisiochu ka bo tai: ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindo
Ezekiel40:26 Ak kimi long’eiywot ne tinyei tuguk tisab che kitiegoti
Ezekiel40:27 Ak kimi ormarichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne bo orit ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai: ak kiikwa kong’eete ormarichet age agoi ormarichet age kotokyigei murot ne bo tai
Ezekiel40:28 Kiimutwa anyun agoi seremut ne bo orit abune ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo tai: ak kiikwa ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo tai ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai;
Ezekiel40:29 koboto gorikyik che bo orit
Ezekiel40:30 Ak kimi keterut komoswek tugul
Ezekiel40:31 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne bo sang’; ak kimi itonwekab tironik tugatugikyik: ak kitinyei long’eiywot tuguk sisiit che kitiegoti ketogostoi.
Ezekiel40:32 Ak kiimutwa anyo seremut ne bo orit ne tokyingei kong’asis: ak kiikwa ormarichet ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai;
Ezekiel40:33 koboto gorikyik che bo orit
Ezekiel40:34 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne sib kemong’jin; ak kimi itonwekab tironik tugatugikyik eng’ komosi ak komosin: ak kitinyei long’eiywot tuguk sisiit che kitiegoti ketogostoi.
Ezekiel40:35 Ak kiimutwa anyo ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo katam: ak kiikwa ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai;
Ezekiel40:36 koboto gorikyik che bo orit
Ezekiel40:37 Ak kitokyingei tugatugikyik seremut ne sib kemong’jin; ak kitinyei tugatugichoto itonwekab tironik eng’ komosi ak komosin
Ezekiel40:38 Ak kimi got ne bo orit koboto kurgennyi ye negite tugatugikab ormarichok; kigiune yoto kagochinet ne kibeelei.
Ezekiel40:39 Ak kimi ye negite keterutab ormarichet
Ezekiel40:40 Ak kimi mesosiek aeng’u eng’ komosta age eng’ ole bo sang’ eng’ ole kitogostoe kebendi ormarichet ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam; ak kimi mesosiek aeng’u komosta age che ki bo keterut ne bo ormarichet.
Ezekiel40:41 Kimi mesosiek ang’wanu komosi
Ezekiel40:42 Ak kimi mesosiek ang’wanu
Ezekiel40:43 Ak kigiratyi kombok komoswek tugul
Ezekiel40:44 Ak kimi sang’utab ormarichet ne bo orit gorik che bo orit che bo tienik eng’ seremut ne bo orit
Ezekiel40:45 Ak kimwawa kolenja
Ezekiel40:46 Ak bo got ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam tisiik che tononjin ripsetab kaptisisiet: chuto ko werikab Sadok
Ezekiel40:47 Ak kiikwa seremut
Ezekiel40:48 Kiimutwa anyun anyo keterutab got
Ezekiel40:49 Kiek kakwautik tiptem che bo eut koindab keterut
Ezekiel41:1 Yeityo komutwa anyo hekalut
Ezekiel41:2 Ak ki kakwautik taman che bo eut tebeesindab ole kibunei kebendi orit; ak komoswekab ole kibunei kebendi orit ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut eng’ komosi
Ezekiel41:3 Kiwa anyun inendet orit
Ezekiel41:4 Ak kiikwa koindanyi
Ezekiel41:5 Yeityo kokwa inatutab got
Ezekiel41:6 Ak kimitoti gorik che kigiyab koba barak konyil somok
Ezekiel41:7 Ak kitesogis gorjoto kigiyab kobaraitu koba barak; ko u ye kiyiem got kotes koba barak; amu ye kiyiemei got ko kitesak koba barak eng’ komoswek tugul che bo got: kitesak anyun tebeesindab got kwo barak; kiimuchi chi kotogosta kong’eete got ne tabanu ng’ony agoi got ne tabanu barak kobunei got ne bo kwen.
Ezekiel41:8 Kiageer kogeny ale tinyei got ole sutot eng’ komoswekyik: kiyamegei lumeiywek che bo gorik che mi inat ak tegat ne bo kakwautik lo che bo eut.
Ezekiel41:9 Ki kakwautik mut che bo eut nyigisindab inatut ne bo gorik che mi inat che tabanu sang’; ak ole kiga ng’et ko ki oldab gorik che bo inat che ki bo got.
Ezekiel41:10 Ak ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut tebeesindo ne bo kwenutab gorjoto mengechen
Ezekiel41:11 Ak kitokyingei kurgotikab gorjoto bo kwen ole kiga ng’et
Ezekiel41:12 Ak ki kakwautik tamanwogik tisab che bo eut tebeesindab got ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne kimi taban eng’ komosta ne tokyingei cherongo; ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut nyigisindab inatutab got eng’ komoswek tugul
Ezekiel41:13 Kikwa anyun got
Ezekiel41:14 ak kiek kakwautik bogol che bo eut tebeesindab togetab got
Ezekiel41:15 Ak kiikwa koindab got ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne kimi taban
Ezekiel41:16 koboto tugatugik
Ezekiel41:17 agoi kurget barak
Ezekiel41:18 Kigiwai itonwekab kerubik ak che bo tironik; ak kiga rubatgei tironik ak kerubisiek; ak kitinyei itonda age tugul ne bo kerubit togochik aeng’;
Ezekiel41:19 kitokyingei anyun toget ne u ne bo chito tiret age
Ezekiel41:20 Kiga kiyai itonwekab kerubisiek ak che bo tironik kong’eete ng’ony agoi baragutab kurget: ki u noto anyun inatutab hekalut.
Ezekiel41:21 Kitinyei koriosiek ang’wan tugatugikab kurgetab hekalut; ak ki u togetab ole tilil itondab hekalut.
Ezekiel41:22 Ki bo ketik kapkorosut
Ezekiel41:23 Ak kitinyei hekalut ak ole tilil kereiywek aeng’ che bo kurgotik.
Ezekiel41:24 Ak kitinyei kereiywot age tugul kebeberwek aeng’
Ezekiel41:25 Ak kigiwachi kereiywechoto bo hekalut itonwekab kerubisiek ak che bo tironik
Ezekiel41:26 Ak kimi tirisiok che regerotin ak itonwekab tironik eng’ komosi ak komosin
Ezekiel42:1 Kiimutwa anyun anyo seremut ne sib kemong’jin
Ezekiel42:2 Ki kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut koindab gorik che kimi murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel42:3 Kimi komoswek aeng’u che kigibendote che kiitorjindos
Ezekiel42:4 Ak kimi taitab gorichoto ole kigibunoti
Ezekiel42:5 Ki nwagen anyun gorik che kitabanu barak; amu kiibe boroindo komoswek che kigibendote
Ezekiel42:6 Amu kimitoti gorik che kigiyab koba barak
Ezekiel42:7 Ki kakwautik konom koindab totet ne kitabanu sang’ ole negite gorjoto mengechen
Ezekiel42:8 Amu ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindab gorjoto kimi seremut ne sib kemong’jin: ak ogeero
Ezekiel42:9 Ak kimi kurget eng’ kureretab gorjoto mengechen
Ezekiel42:10 Kimi gorik che mengechen totet orit ne bo seremut ne tokyingei kong’asis
Ezekiel42:11 Ak ki u oret ne kimi tainywa kergeindab oret ne ki bo gorik che mengechen che kitokyingei murot ne bo katam; kiaechin koindanywa ak tebeesindanywa: ak ki u atebenywa tugul ak kurgotikwak
Ezekiel42:12 Ak kimi kurget ne ki u kurgotikab gorik che mengechen che kitokyingei murot ne bo tai
Ezekiel42:13 Kilenja anyun
Ezekiel42:14 Ye ba tisiik orit
Ezekiel42:15 Ak kingo kagoges kakwaetab got ne bo orit
Ezekiel42:16 Kiikwae tegat ne kikwaise komostab kong’asis
Ezekiel42:17 Kiikwa komostab murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel42:18 Kiikwa komostab murot ne bo tai
Ezekiel42:19 Kiwelelgei kotokyigei komostab cherongo
Ezekiel42:20 Kiikwa komoswek ang’wan: kigiyieme inatut
Ezekiel43:1 Ye ibata komutwa anyo ormarichet
Ezekiel43:2 ogeero
Ezekiel43:3 Ak ki u itondab lilinato ng’ang’utiet ne kigageer
Ezekiel43:4 Ak kinyo go lilindab Jehovah kobun oretab ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis.
Ezekiel43:5 Ak kiganaba Tamirmiriet
Ezekiel43:6 Ak kiagas kong’alalwa chi eng’ go; ak kitonon chi eng’ ye ami.
Ezekiel43:7 Ak kilenja
Ezekiel43:8 ye kingonde tugatukyenywa korikyi tugatukyennyu
Ezekiel43:9 Ingoisto anyun nguno kugoinatenywa ak muswekab laitorinikwak
Ezekiel43:10 Ee
Ezekiel43:11 Ak ngot kolilanso amu tuguk tugul che kigoyai
Ezekiel43:12 Nito ko ng’atutietab got: egu ne tilil mising’ eng’ tulwet barak komoswek tugul ole boch. Ogeero
Ezekiel43:13 Chu ko kakwautikab kaptisisiet eng’ kakwautik che bo eut: (kakwautiet ko kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut ak tebeesindab eut:) egu kelut kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut
Ezekiel43:14 Ak egu kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut koboch ng’ony agoi tegeleiywot ne tabanu ng’ony
Ezekiel43:15 Ak egu kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut kaptisisiet ole tabanu barak; ak koboch ole kibeelse eng’ kaptisisiet ak kwo barak
Ezekiel43:16 Ak egu koindab ole kibeelse kakwautik taman ak aeng’ che bo eut
Ezekiel43:17 Ak egu kakwautik taman ak ang’wan che bo eut
Ezekiel43:18 Ak kilenja
Ezekiel43:19 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole
Ezekiel43:20 Ak itaach korotikyik
Ezekiel43:21 Ikwerie kogeny kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto
Ezekiel43:22 Ak igoite eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kwesta ne libwob koek kagochinetab tengekto; yeityo koanyiny ichek kaptisisiet ko u ye kaga koanyinye kirgit.
Ezekiel43:23 Ye kaigesu kaanyinyet
Ezekiel43:24 Ak igetu korik taitab Jehovah
Ezekiel43:25 Ichobe eng’ betusiek tisab kwesta koek kagochinetab tengekto: chobei kirgit ne barnotiot kogeny
Ezekiel43:26 Yaei ichek kagaigaet agobo kaptisisiet eng’ betusiek tisab koanyinyi; itabani anyun ko u noto.
Ezekiel43:27 Ak ye kagobata betusiechoto

Ezekiel44:2 Ak kilenja Jehovah
Ezekiel44:3 Ago bounindet

Ezekiel44:5 Ak kilenja Jehovah
Ezekiel44:6 Ak imwachi ngeleliot
Ezekiel44:7 amu kiomutu kipsagarek
Ezekiel44:8 Ama orib ng’atutietab tugukyuk che tililen: ago kiondechige okwege ribikab boisiennyu eng’ oldanyu ne tilil.
Ezekiel44:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole
Ezekiel44:10 Ago ibei tengektanywa Lawik che kigoistoenagei kolooegitu
Ezekiel44:11 Ago egu ichek kiboitinik eng’ oldanyu ne tilil
Ezekiel44:12 Ko u ye kiboisiechin ichek bik eng’ taitab kanamonikwak
Ezekiel44:13 Ama rikyina
Ezekiel44:14 Nganda u noto
Ezekiel44:15 Ago bwanei korikyina koboisiewa tisiik Lawik
Ezekiel44:16 bendi oldanyu ne tilil
Ezekiel44:17 Ak ye ba orit kobun ormarichokab seremut ne bo orit

Ezekiel44:19 Ak ye mandoi kobendi seremut ne sib kemong’jin
Ezekiel44:20 Maicheru metowekwak
Ezekiel44:21 Ama eei tisiindet age tugul divaik ye wendi seremut ne bo orit.
Ezekiel44:22 Ama ituni mosogik
Ezekiel44:23 Ak konet bikyuk kobesyo che tililen ak che ma tililen
Ezekiel44:24 Ak koruokyi che ibeligei; koruokyi ko u kiruogutikyuk: ak korib ng’atutikyuk ak konetisiosiekyuk eng’ igorwekyuk tugul che kiging’at; ak kotaban sabatosiekyuk.
Ezekiel44:25 Ama rikyin musto si maing’wanitgei: ago imuchi kong’wanitgei amu kwanda anan kamet
Ezekiel44:26 Ak ye kagianyiny
Ezekiel44:27 Ak eng’ betut ne wendi ole tilil
Ezekiel44:28 Ak konyor borotet; a borotenywa: ak mogochini ichek kit ne namei kobunji eng’ Israel; a nenywa.
Ezekiel44:29 Amei kagochinetab busiek
Ezekiel44:30 Ak bunjin tisiik tongoanik tugul che bo tai che bo kiy age tugul
Ezekiel44:31 Maamei tisiik kiy age tugul ne kamee inegei
Ezekiel45:1 Ak ye opche emet eng’ seretab barbarek koek borotet
Ezekiel45:2 Bunjin kebebertab emonoto komosta ne tilil ne egu koindo bogol mut
Ezekiel45:3 Ak eng’ nito kaikwa
Ezekiel45:4 Noto ko kebeberta ne tilil ne bo emet
Ezekiel45:5 Bunjin Lawik kiboitinikab got
Ezekiel45:6 Ak omarar komosta ne bunjin nganaset koek elfusiek mut tebeesindo
Ezekiel45:7 Ak kobunji bounindet emet ne mi komosi ak komosi ne bo kagochinet ne tilil ak ne bo emet ne bunjin nganaset
Ezekiel45:8 Bunjin inendet emonoto eng’ Israel: ama kousei kogeny bounikyuk bikyuk; ago igochin emet gotab Israel kobee bororiosiekwak.
Ezekiel45:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ingoyamak noto
Ezekiel45:10 Oboisie kerutik che aechin che bo iman
Ezekiel45:11 Aechin epah ak debeisiek aeng’
Ezekiel45:12 Ak yamei sekel agenge ak gerahisiek tiptem: sekelisiek mut koegu sekelisiek mut
Ezekiel45:13 Ni ko kagochinet ne ogoitoi; kebeberta agenge eng’ lo ne bo epah eng’ homer ne bo nganok
Ezekiel45:14 ak kebebertab mwaita ne kiging’at ne bo debeisiek aeng’ che bo mwaita
Ezekiel45:15 koboto aruet agenge ne bo akwetab kechirek
Ezekiel45:16 Igoitoi bik tugul che bo emet kagochinoni agobo bounindet eng’ Israel.
Ezekiel45:17 Ak koek boisietab bounindet kagochinoik che kibeelei
Ezekiel45:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Eng’ arawet ne bo tai
Ezekiel45:19 Ak konam tisiindet korotikab kagochinetab tengekto
Ezekiel45:20 Ak iyai ko u noto eng’ betutab tisab ne bo arawet agobo age tugul ne lelei
Ezekiel45:21 Eng’ arawet ne bo tai eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawanato
Ezekiel45:22 Ak chobei eng’ betunoto bounindet kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto

Ezekiel45:24 Ak kochob kagochinetab busiek
Ezekiel45:25 Yaei inendet ko u nito eng’ arawetab tisab
Ezekiel46:1 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigerei eng’ betusiek lo che bo boisiet ormarichet ne bo seremut ne bo orit
Ezekiel46:2 Ak kwo orit bounindet kobunei oret ne bo keterut ne bo ormarichet ne bo sang’
Ezekiel46:3 Ak kosa bikab emet eng’ kurgetab ormarichet eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ sabatosiek
Ezekiel46:4 Ak kagochinet ne kibeelei ne igoitoi bounindet kogochin Jehovah eng’ betutab sabato
Ezekiel46:5 ak kagochinetab busiek che bo epah kobunji mengit agenge
Ezekiel46:6 Ak eng’ betut ne kaleel arawet kigoito kirgit ne libwob ne barnotiot; ak arek lo che bo kechir
Ezekiel46:7 ak kochob inendet kagochinetab busiek
Ezekiel46:8 Ak ye wendi bounindet orit
Ezekiel46:9 Ago ye bwa bikab emet taitab Jehovah eng’ igorwek che kiging’at
Ezekiel46:10 Ak ye bendi orit
Ezekiel46:11 ak eng’ igorwek koboto igorwek che kiging’at
Ezekiel46:12 Ak ye chobei bounindet kagochinetab chamnyet
Ezekiel46:13 Ak ichobe aruetab kechir ne libwob ne masiirei kenyit agenge koek kagochinet ne kibeelei kigochin Jehovah betut age tugul: ichobe noto karonet age tugul.
Ezekiel46:14 Ak ichob kagochinetab busiek koboto aruanato bo kechir karonet age tugul
Ezekiel46:15 Kichobei anyun ko u noto aruetab kechir
Ezekiel46:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ngot kogochi bounindet kagochinet age eng’ werikyik
Ezekiel46:17 Ago ngot kogochi kebebertab borotennyi age eng’ otwogikyik
Ezekiel46:18 Ago maibei bounindet borotetab bik
Ezekiel46:19 Kiimutwa anyun abun ole kibunei kebendi orit
Ezekiel46:20 Ak kilenja

Ezekiel46:22 Kimi seremusiek che mengechen che kiging’ot eng’ luukwechoto ang’wan che bo seremut
Ezekiel46:23 Ak kigiteech inatut koyiem seremusiechoto ang’wan
Ezekiel46:24 Kilenja anyun
Ezekiel47:1 Ak kiimutwa aweek anyo kurgetab got; ak ogeero
Ezekiel47:2 Yeityo komutwa among’ abun oretab ormarichet ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel47:3 Ye kiwa chito kotokyigei kong’asis
Ezekiel47:4 Kiikwa kogeny elfut agenge
Ezekiel47:5 Ye ibata
Ezekiel47:6 Ak kolenja
Ezekiel47:7 Ye kingaweege anyun
Ezekiel47:8 Kilenja anyun
Ezekiel47:9 Ak kosob kiy age tugul ne sobei
Ezekiel47:10 Ak kotononse ngegut ramikab njirenik: ak koek ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njirenik koboch En-gedi agoi En-eglaim; isubi njirenikwak kergeindanywa
Ezekiel47:11 Ago magianyinyi komoswekyik che mi ng’atatek
Ezekiel47:12 Ak kobit ketit age tugul ne kiamei eng’ ngegutab ainonoto
Ezekiel47:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Egu nito kiwotet
Ezekiel47:14 Bunjinok nito
Ezekiel47:15 Ak egu nito kiwotetab emet: eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel47:16 Hamat
Ezekiel47:17 Ak koek kiwotet ne bunu nyanjet Hasar-enon ne mi murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel47:18 Ak egu Jordan kiwotetab kong’asis
Ezekiel47:19 Egu kiwotetab komostab tai koboch Tamar agoi beekab Meribot-kades
Ezekiel47:20 Egu kiwotetab cherongo nyanjet ne o
Ezekiel47:21 Opchechinige anyun emonito kobee ortinwekab Israel.
Ezekiel47:22 Opchei anyun eng’ seretab barbarek koek boroteng’wong’ koboto toek che kitebe kwenung’wong’
Ezekiel47:23 Ak eng’ oret age tugul ne katebe toondet
Ezekiel48:1 Chu anyun kainaikab ortinwek: koboch tabandab murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel48:2 Ak koboch kiwotetab Dan kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Aser.
Ezekiel48:3 Ak koboch kiwotetab Aser
Ezekiel48:4 Ak koboch kiwotetab Naptali
Ezekiel48:5 Ak koboch kiwotetab Manase kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Epraim.
Ezekiel48:6 Ak koboch kiwotetab Epraim kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Reuben.
Ezekiel48:7 Ak koboch kiwotetab Reuben
Ezekiel48:8 Ak koboch kiwotetab Juda
Ezekiel48:9 Egu koindab kagochinet ne ogochini Jehovah
Ezekiel48:10 Ak bunjin ichek
Ezekiel48:11 Bunjin noto tisiik che kigitaban eng’ werikab Sadok
Ezekiel48:12 ak koek noto eng’ ichek kagochinet ne bunu kagochinetab emet
Ezekiel48:13 Ak nyoru Lawik kiwotet ne koindo ko elfusiek tiptem ak mut
Ezekiel48:14 Ama aldoi emonoto
Ezekiel48:15 Ak koboisie bik tugul emet ne kang’et
Ezekiel48:16 Ak chu ko kakwautikyik; egu komostab murot ne bo katam elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut
Ezekiel48:17 Ak tinyei nganaset ole kiyagisie; egu ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam bogol aeng’ ak konom
Ezekiel48:18 Ak aechin koindab ne ng’etu
Ezekiel48:19 Ak kobat emonoto ichek che boisiei eng’ nganaset che bunu ortinwek tugul che bo Israel.
Ezekiel48:20 Egu kagochinet komugul elfusiek tiptem ak mut eng’ koindo ak elfusiek tiptem ak mut eng’ tebeesindo: ogoitoi kagochinet ne tilil ne aechin komoswek tugul ko ang’wan
Ezekiel48:21 Ak kobunji bounindet ne ng’etu
Ezekiel48:22 Bunjin kogeny bounindet koboch emetab lawik
Ezekiel48:23 Ak eng’ ortinwek che ng’etunotin: koboch komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Benjamin.
Ezekiel48:24 Ak koboch kiwotetab Benjamin
Ezekiel48:25 Ak koboch kiwotetab Simeon
Ezekiel48:26 Ak koboch kiwotetab Isakar kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Sebulun.
Ezekiel48:27 Ak koboch kebeberta ne bo Sebulun
Ezekiel48:28 Ak koboch kiwotetab Gad
Ezekiel48:29 Nito emet ne opchechini ortinwekab Israel eng’ seretab barbarek koek borotenywa
Ezekiel48:30 Ak chu ko ole kimandoe eng’ nganaset; eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam
Ezekiel48:31 Ak kimwaitoe ormarichokab nganaset kainaikab ortinwekab Israel; tokyingei murot ne bo katam ormarichok somogu: ormarichetab Reuben
Ezekiel48:32 ak eng’ komostab kong’asis koegu tegat elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut; ak ormarichok somok: choto ko ormarichetab Josep
Ezekiel48:33 Ak eng’ komostab murot ne bo tai koegu tegat elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut; ak ormarichok somok: ormarichetab Simeon
Ezekiel48:34 eng’ komostab cherongo
Ezekiel48:35 Egu tegat elfusiek taman ak sisiit komoswek tugul: ak keguure kainetab nganasanato koboch betunoto
Daniel1:1 Kinyo Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon Jerusalem
Daniel1:2 Ak kiinde Kiptaiyat eutab Nebukadnesar Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda
Daniel1:3 Ak king’alalji laitoriat Aspenas bounindetab kiptainikyik
Daniel1:4 neranik che kima kotinyei berut
Daniel1:5 Ak king’at laitoriat kigochi ichek amitwogikab laitoriat che yamei betut age tugul
Daniel1:6 Kimi anyun eng’ choto eng’ lagokab Juda
Daniel1:7 Ak kitochi bounindetab kiptainik ichek kainaik: koguure Daniel Beltesasar
Daniel1:8 Ago kitil Daniel eng’ muguleldanyi kole si maing’wanitegei amitwogikab laitoriat
Daniel1:9 Kiigochi anyun Kamuktaindet Daniel konyor chamet ak rirenet eng’ taitab bounindetab kiptainik.
Daniel1:10 Ak kilenji bounindetab kiptainik Daniel
Daniel1:11 Yeityo komwachi Daniel ribindet
Daniel1:12 kolenji
Daniel1:13 Si igeer anyun togochikyok
Daniel1:14 Kigasyi anyun bounindet ng’olyondonoto
Daniel1:15 Ak kingogesgei betusiechoto tamanu
Daniel1:16 Kiisto anyun ribindet amitwogikwak
Daniel1:17 Ago eng’ atebetab neranichuto ang’wan
Daniel1:18 Ak kingogesgei betusiek che king’at laitoriat kole kimut ichek kobwa go
Daniel1:19 Ak king’alal laitoriat ak ichek; ama biit agot agenge eng’ ichek tugul ne u Daniel
Daniel1:20 Ak kigeer anyun laitoriat bichoto kole siirei bik tugul che ng’omen che ng’orsei
Daniel1:21 Ak kitebi Daniel agoi kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitoriat Kirus.
Daniel2:1 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo laitornatetab Nebukadnesar
Daniel2:2 King’at anyun laitoriat keguur bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei
Daniel2:3 Ak kilenji laitoriat ichek
Daniel2:4 Kong’alalji anyun Kaldeik laitoriat eng’ kutitab Suria
Daniel2:5 Kiwolji laitoriat Kaldeik kolenji
Daniel2:6 Ago ngot oborua karuotitoet ak kaweeksennyi
Daniel2:7 Kiwolji ne bo aeng’ kolenji
Daniel2:8 Kowol laitoriat kole
Daniel2:9 Ago ngot ko moborua karuotitoet
Daniel2:10 Kowol Kaldeik eng’ taitab laitoriat kole
Daniel2:11 Ak ko kit ne ma bo kotugul ni kateeb laitoriat
Daniel2:12 Kinerech anyun mising’ laitoriat eng’ neregek che ng’wonen eng’ ng’olyondonito
Daniel2:13 Kigimwaita anyun ng’atutiet kele kebar bik che ng’omen; ak kigicheng’ Daniel ak choronokyik kele kebar.
Daniel2:14 Kiwol anyun Daniel eng’ naet ak ng’omnatet
Daniel2:15 kiwolji Daniel Ariok kiptaiyatab laitoriat kolenji
Daniel2:16 Ak kiwa Daniel go
Daniel2:17 Kiwa anyun Daniel gonnyi
Daniel2:18 si kosom rirenosiek che bo Kamuktaindetab kipsengwert agobo ung’otioni; kole si ma kibar Daniel ak choronokyik koboto bik alak che ng’omen che bo Babulon.
Daniel2:19 Kiging’ang’ji anyun Daniel ung’otionoto eng’ ng’ang’utiet ne bo kemoi. Kiilos anyun Daniel Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet.
Daniel2:20 Kiwol Daniel kole
Daniel2:21 ak kowalei betusiek ak kenyisiek; istoi laitorinik
Daniel2:22 ng’anyei tuguk che looen ak ko ung’otin: ingen tuguk che mi mesundeito
Daniel2:23 Aweegun kongoi
Daniel2:24 Kwo anyun Daniel ole mi Ariok
Daniel2:25 Komut anyun Ariok Daniel kochaktae kwo taitab laitoriat
Daniel2:26 Kiwolji laitoriat Daniel
Daniel2:27 Kowol Daniel eng’ taitab laitoriat
Daniel2:28 ago mi Kamuktaindet kipsengwet ne ng’anyei ung’otik
Daniel2:29 ago inye
Daniel2:30 Ago eng’ ane
Daniel2:31 Koigeer inye
Daniel2:32 Ko bo tahabu ne kararan metitab kanamwonoto
Daniel2:33 ko bo karnet kelyekyik
Daniel2:34 Koigeer kot keeb koita ne ma kiebe eunek
Daniel2:35 Kotonogis anyun tugul; karik
Daniel2:36 Karuotitoet nito; ak kimwachini laitoriat kaweeksennyi.
Daniel2:37 Ee laitoriandani
Daniel2:38 ak kigogonin inendet oldo tugul ole menyei bik
Daniel2:39 Ak ye tun ma imi
Daniel2:40 Ak kimitu bounatet ne bo ang’wan ko u karnet: amu tonatoni karnet tuguk tugul ak koterter: ak ko u ye nyinyiri karnet chuto tugul
Daniel2:41 Ak ko u ye koigeer keldebesaik koboto morik
Daniel2:42 Ak ko u ye ko bo morikab keldebesaik kebebertab karnet
Daniel2:43 Ak ko u ye koigeer ko burugot karnet ak menet ne boto ng’ung’unyek
Daniel2:44 Ak tun lumdoi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet eng’ betusiekab laitorinichoto bounatet ne magoi king’em
Daniel2:45 Ak ko u ye koigeer ile kogieb koita ne komi tulwet ama eng’ eunek

Daniel9:24 Kaging’atyi biguk wigisiek tamanwogik tisab koboto nganaseng’ung’ ne tilil
Daniel9:25 Nai anyun ak iguiye ile koboch ngab komong’ ng’atutiet kele kituur ak keteech Jerusalem
Daniel9:26 Ak ye ibata wigisiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ keisto inendet ne iilat ama kotinyei kiy: ak kobwa bikab bounindet kong’em nganaset ak ole tilil; ak nyonei kagesunennyi koboto maranet
Daniel9:27 Ak koyomisgei koboto bik che chang’ eng’ kayomiset ne kim ne bo wigit agenge: ak koges tiseiywot ak kagochinetab busiek eng’ kwenutab wigit; ak konyo age ne ibu ng’emisiet eng’ kebepchetab tuguk che kiwechei; ak kerong’ji ng’emindet neregek che kigeng’at
Daniel10:1 Kiging’ang’ji Daniel ne kigiguure Beltesasar kiy eng’ kenyit ne bo somok ne bo Kirus laitoriatab Persia; ak ki bo iman kioto
Daniel10:2 Kiarir ane Daniel eng’ betusiechoto
Daniel10:3 Kima am amitwogik che miach
Daniel10:4 Ak eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawet ne bo tai
Daniel10:5 ayot met ak atobende
Daniel10:6 ki u kogeny bortanyi berulo
Daniel10:7 Ak kiageer ng’ang’utiet anege
Daniel10:8 Kiang’etu anyun anege
Daniel10:9 Ago kiagas twegunetab ng’alekyik: ak kingagas twegunetab ng’alekyik
Daniel10:10 Ak ogeero
Daniel10:11 Ak kilenja
Daniel10:12 Kolenja anyun
Daniel10:13 Ago kiranya bounindetab bounatetab Persia eng’ betusiek tiptem ak agenge: ago keero
Daniel10:14 Kanyo anyun si kobiit aborun iguiye tuguk che tun bwanjin biguk eng’ betusiek che bo let: amu bo ng’ang’utiet betusiek che chang’.
Daniel10:15 Ak kingo kagong’alalwa ng’alechuto
Daniel10:16 Ak ogeero
Daniel10:17 Amu imuktoi ano otwogindetab kiptaiyandaninyu kong’alal ak kiptiyandennyu? Amu ne u ane
Daniel10:18 Yeityo kotwaa kogeny age ne u chito
Daniel10:19 Ak kile
Daniel10:20 Yeityo kole
Daniel10:21 Ago amwaun kit ne sirat eng’ sirutik che bo iman: ama mi age ne toreta agirinda tuguchuto
Daniel11:1 Ago kiatonon ane
Daniel11:2 Aborun anyun ne bo iman. Keero
Daniel11:3 Ak kobiit laitoriat ne kim mising’
Daniel11:4 Ak ye kagobiit
Daniel11:5 Ak tun kimitu laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo tai
Daniel11:6 Ak ye igesgei kenyisiek
Daniel11:7 Ago mong’u age ne bunu temetab tigitikyik ne igeeri inendet
Daniel11:8 ak koib kogeny kanamonikwak koboto che kigitanyi
Daniel11:9 Ak kwo oldab bounatetab laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo tai
Daniel11:10 Ak koyai luget werikyik
Daniel11:11 Ak konerech laitoriatab murot ne bo tai
Daniel11:12 Ak ye kagimut tuiyet
Daniel11:13 Ak koweeigei laitoriatab murot ne bo katam
Daniel11:14 Ak tun ng’eetos che chang’ eng’ betusiechoto kogirinda laitoriatab murot ne bo tai: ak koeetgei lagokab bik che koromen eng’ biguk si kogimit ng’ang’utiet; ago ibutos.
Daniel11:15 Konyo anyun laitoriatab murot ne bo katam
Daniel11:16 Ago inendet ne nyonei kobaregei ak chichoto koyaei ko u ne machei
Daniel11:17 Ak igiilegei konyo koboto kimnatetab laitornatennyi komugul
Daniel11:18 Ak ye ibata nito
Daniel11:19 Yeityo koweek kotokyi togennyi irimoikab emennyi: ago kinachi ak kobut
Daniel11:20 Ye ibata nito
Daniel11:21 Ak kogeer inendet chito age ne kasasei
Daniel11:22 Ak keisto ichek eng’ tainnyi eng’ luget ne marani
Daniel11:23 Ak kobois eng’ ng’alset ye kagobata kasyinet: amu tun togosu ak kogimit
Daniel11:24 Ibokyin komoswek che akwaen che bo emet eng’ betusiekab kalyet; ak koyai kit ne kima yai kwanisiekyik
Daniel11:25 Ak kong’eet kimnatennyi ak nyiganatennyi kobargei ak laitoriatab murot ne bo tai koboto luget ne o; ak koyai luget laitoriatab murot ne bo tai koboto luget ne o mising’ ak ko kim: ago matononi
Daniel11:26 Ee
Daniel11:27 Ak che u laitorinichuto tuwai
Daniel11:28 Yeityo koweekyigei emennyi koboto tuguk che chang’; ak kowech muguleldanyi kayomiset ne tilil; ak koyai ko u ye machei
Daniel11:29 Weeksei kogeny eng’ betut ne kiging’at
Daniel11:30 Amu tun bwanjin melisiekab Kitim kobargei ak inendet; arogeni anyun
Daniel11:31 Ak kotononso lugosiek eng’ komostanyi ak komuruon ole tilil
Daniel11:32 Ak komaas inendet eng’ mwaikutnatet che yaei yaitio kowechei kayomiset: ago kimegitu bik che ingen Kamuktaindenywa
Daniel11:33 Ak konet bik che chang’ bik che ng’omen che mi kwenutab bik: ago kibarei eng’ rotwetab chok
Daniel11:34 Ye kagobutyo anyun
Daniel11:35 Ak kobutyo alak che ng’omen eng’ ichek
Daniel11:36 Ak koyai laitoriat ko u ye machei; ak kotororgei ak koeetgei kosiir cheptalelit age tugul
Daniel11:37 Ama iiti cheptalelisiekab kwanisiekyik
Daniel11:38 Ago konyiti cheptalelitab irimoik eng’ komostanyi: ak kogonyit cheptalelit ne kima nai kwanisiekyik
Daniel11:39 Ak konam irimoik che kimen mising’ eng’ toretetab cheptalelit ne ter; tesyin torornatet age tugul ne chamei inendet: ak kogochin inendet ichek koboi che chang’
Daniel11:40 Ak koborio ak inendet laitoriatab murot ne bo tai eng’ betusiek che bo let: ak kobokyi inendet laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo katam ko u kipchurjuriet
Daniel11:41 Wendi inendet kogeny emet ne kararan
Daniel11:42 Tokyin eunnyi kogeny emotinwechoto: ama chilili emetab Misri.
Daniel11:43 Ago bou inendet konoraik che bo tahabu ak che bo feda ak tuguk tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o che bo Misri: ak kosub inendet Libyanik ak Etiopik.
Daniel11:44 Ago iimi inendet ng’alek che bunu kong’asis ak che bunu murot ne bo katam: ak kwo eng’ neregek che ng’wonen che eechen kwo kong’emis ak kobar che chang’.
Daniel11:45 Ak koteech emaisiekab gonnyi ne bo laitornatet eng’ kwenutab nyanjet ak tulwet ne tilil ne kararan; ago tun meei
Daniel12:1 Ak kotonon eng’ betunoto Mikael
Daniel12:2 Ak kong’eetyo che chang’ eng’ ichek che kigoruiyo eng’ ng’ung’unyek
Daniel12:3 Ak koluu che ng’omen ko u kakweng’et ne bo barak; ak koluu koigeny ak koigeny ko u kecheik ichek che imutyin che chang’ imanda.
Daniel12:4 Ago tuch ng’alechu
Daniel12:5 Kiageer anyun ane Daniel
Daniel12:6 Ak kiteebe age ne kiilaachi ngoroikab katanit
Daniel12:7 Agas chito ne kiilaachi ngoroikab katanit
Daniel12:8 Ak kiagas
Daniel12:9 Ak kile
Daniel12:10 Ianyinyegei che chang’
Daniel12:11 Egu betusiek elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik sogol
Daniel12:12 Iberurot inendet ne igenisiei
Daniel12:13 Ago ui inye oldang’ung’ agoi koit kagesunet: amu imuunyi
Hosea1:1 Ni ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kinyonji Hosea weritab Beri
Hosea1:2 Ye kingong’alale Jehovah Hosea eng’ tai
Hosea1:3 Kiwa anyun kotun Gomer cheptab Diblaim; ak kimanach
Hosea1:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet
Hosea1:5 Ak tun airie kwangetab Israel eng’ atebwetab Jesreel eng’ betunoto.
Hosea1:6 Ak kimanach kogeny
Hosea1:7 Ago arire gotab Juda
Hosea1:8 Ak kingo kagoluge Lo-ruhama
Hosea1:9 Ak kile Jehovah
Hosea1:10 Ago tenitu lagokab Israel ng’aniek che bo nyanjet
Hosea1:11 Ak kiyum lagokab Juda ak lagokab Israel
Hosea2:1 Omwachi ng’etab kametwagikwok olenji
Hosea2:2 Ogaigai komet
Hosea2:3 si mareegune ngoroikyik
Hosea2:4 ee
Hosea2:5 Amu kiyaei kamet kugoinatet: kiyai inendet ne kimanachi ichek
Hosea2:6 Keer anyun-o
Hosea2:7 Ak kosubot chamanikyik
Hosea2:8 Amu ma nai kole ane ne kiagochini bek
Hosea2:9 Aweechi anyun bekyuk eng’ betusiekyik
Hosea2:10 Ak ang’anye tewernatennyi eng’ taitab chamanikyik
Hosea2:11 Ak agesu kogeny boiboiyennyi
Hosea2:12 Ak ang’em ketikyik che bo sabibuk
Hosea2:13 Ak aipchi inendet biret agobo betusiekab Baalik
Hosea2:14 Noto anyun
Hosea2:15 Ak agochi inendet mbarenikyik che bo sabibuk eng’ oloto
Hosea2:16 Ak iguurena eng’ betunoto
Hosea2:17 Amu aistoi kainaikab Baalik eng’ kutinnyi
Hosea2:18 Ak ayai arorutiet eng’ betunoto agobo ichek koboto tiong’ikab timin ak taritikab barak
Hosea2:19 Ak achob ale atunin koigeny; ee
Hosea2:20 Achobe atunin eng’ imanda: ak inai Jehovah.
Hosea2:21 Ak tun awolu eng’ betunoto
Hosea2:22 ak kowolji ng’ony bek
Hosea2:23 Ak agoljige inendet eng’ emet; ak arire inendet ne kima kirire; ak alenji ichek che kima ko bikyuk

Hosea3:5 ye ibata koweek lagokab Israel
Hosea4:1 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah
Hosea4:2 Mami kit age kobate chubisiet ak lembechek

Hosea4:4 Ago amat kotiiyo chi eng’ choto
Hosea4:5 Ago ibuti bet
Hosea4:6 Kigeng’em bikyuk amu matinyei naet: amu kiiesie naet
Hosea4:7 Ko u ye kitesak
Hosea4:8 Baegei ichek tengektab bikyuk
Hosea4:9 Ak kit ne u eng’ bik
Hosea4:10 Ak koamisiei
Hosea4:11 Istoi kugoinatet ak divaik ak divaik che leelach
Hosea4:12 Somei bikyuk kiruoget eng’ ketik
Hosea4:13 Enyei tiseiywek eng’ tulonok barak

Hosea4:15 Agot ngiyae inye Israel kugoinatet
Hosea4:16 Amu kigongelel Israel

Hosea4:19 Kagotuch usonet inendet eng’ kebebaikyik; ak ililandos amu tisieywekwak.
Hosea5:1 Ogas nito
Hosea5:2 Kigotes mising’ bistoik barisiet; ago agere kong’ ichek tugul.
Hosea5:3 Angen Epraim
Hosea5:4 Machamjin ichek boisionikwak koweekyigei Kamuktaindenywa: amu tinyei tamirmirietab kugoinatet
Hosea5:5 Ak baoriani menotetab Israel eng’ tainnyi: ibutos anyun Israel ak Epraim eng’ tengektanywa; ibuti Juda agine koboto ichek.
Hosea5:6 Bendi ichek koboto akwotisiekwak che bo kechirek ak che bo tuga
Hosea5:7 Kigoberber Jehovah; amu kigosich lagok che kipsagarek; amei arawet ne kaleel ichek koboto mbarenikwak.
Hosea5:8 Oguut igondit eng’ Gibea
Hosea5:9 Egu karatia Epraim eng’ betutab keretab kong’: kiaboru eng’ kwenutab bororiosiekab Israel kit ne tun biitu.
Hosea5:10 U bounikab Juda bik che inaktoe kiwotet: arong’jini ichek neregekyuk ko u beek.

Hosea6:4 Ee Epraim
Hosea6:5 Kiawai anyun ichek eng’ maotik; kiabare ichek ng’alekab kutinnyu: ak u kiruogutiguk lapkeiyet ne mong’u.

Hosea7:1 Ye kata amache asoob Israel

Hosea7:3 Iboiboi laitoriat eng’ yaitienywa
Hosea7:4 Ichek tugul ko bik che yaei ibetab ge; u kapkoima ole ilaali beelindetab makatinik; maiyuokyin mat koboch kokwanykwanyi makatiat agoi koguut.
Hosea7:5 Kieeiso bounik kot kobogityo mising’ eng’ maiyek

Hosea7:12 Ye ba

Hosea7:15 Agot nganda kianet ichek ak agimit eunekwak

Joel1:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Joel weritab Petuel
Joel1:2 Ogas ng’olyondoni
Joel1:3 Omwachi lagokwok agobo nito
Joel1:4 Kiam chereng’endet che kiituuch munene; ak kiam tinapchet che kiituuch chereng’endet; ak kiam masaek che kiituuch tinapchet.
Joel1:5 Ong’eetye okwek kibogitinik
Joel1:6 Amu kagotogos emennyu bororiet ne kim
Joel1:7 Kagong’em ketinnyu ne bo sabibuk
Joel1:8 Oteeiye ko u bergeiyat ne iyuegei kuniet agobo manong’otiotab ming’inatennyi.
Joel1:9 Kageisto kagochinetab busiek ak kagochinet ne kieei eng’ gotab Jehovah; rirtos tisiik
Joel1:10 Kagong’emak mbaret
Joel1:11 Olilanse
Joel1:12 Kagoyaam ketitab sabibuk
Joel1:13 Ogermenege kuniok
Joel1:14 Otaban karugutetab ge
Joel1:15 Bwa amu betunoto! Amu kagorik betutab Jehovah
Joel1:16 Tos ma kiisto amitwogik kegeerei
Joel1:17 Nundos keswek eng’ ng’ung’unyekwak; kagong’emogis chogenik
Joel1:18 Tigendos tiong’ik ne tia! Kaiimgei akwotisiekab tuga
