Joel2:1 Oguut iriaget eng’ Sion
Joel2:2 betutab mesundeito ak tuuindo
Joel2:3 Amisiei mat eng’ tainywa; ak lalei liblibenetab mat eng’ let: u emet mbaretab Eden eng’ tainywa
Joel2:4 U itondanywa itondab mbartanyisiek; ak koruaei ko u bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek.
Joel2:5 U ruaenywa kirgirenetab karisiekab luget eng’ tulonok barak
Joel2:6 Bichiityin bororiosiek eng’ tainywa: walaksei togochikab bik tugul amu kaiyweisiet.
Joel2:7 Ruaei ko u che nyigonen; lanyei irimet ko u bikab luget; wendi age tugul orennyi kotokyingei tai
Joel2:8 Ama toortoi age age; wendi age tugul eng’ orennyi: siarei karik
Joel2:9 Torombenjin nganaset; ruaei eng’ irimet; lanyei kobendi gorik orit; chutei tirisiok ko u chorik.
Joel2:10 Botani emet eng’ tainywa; botandos kipsengwetisiek: imenitu asista ak arawet
Joel2:11 Ak kotwek Jehovah eng’ taitab lugennyi; amu o kabuureitanyi; amu kim inendet ne yaei ng’olyondennyi kosulda; amu o betutab Jehovah ak komuisei mising’; ng’o ne imuchi komuita?
Joel2:12 Ago mwaei Jehovah kole
Joel2:13 ak ogerer mugulelwekwok
Joel2:14 Ng’o ne ingen ngo tos ma week ak kowal kabwatutikyik
Joel2:15 Oguut iriaget eng’ Sion
Joel2:16 oyum bik
Joel2:17 Ingoririo tisiik
Joel2:18 Kiam ng’etkong’ anyun Jehovah amu emennyi
Joel2:19 Ak kiwolji Jehovah bikyik kolenji
Joel2:20 ago aistoi kolooit eng’ okwek luget ne bunu murot ne bo katam
Joel2:21 Ee emoni
Joel2:22 Amoiyweisie
Joel2:23 Ogasge anyun
Joel2:24 Ak konyi bek ruanyusiek che kiborse
Joel2:25 Ak ageeruok che bo kenyisiek che kiam chereng’endet
Joel2:26 Ak oam che chang’ ak obiyong’se
Joel2:27 Ak onai ole ami kwenutab Israel
Joel2:28 Ak ye ibata choto
Joel2:29 ak arong’ji kogeny Tamirmiriennyu otwogik che murenik ak tibik eng’ betusiechoto.
Joel2:30 Ak abarte kwong’utik eng’ kipsengwetisiek
Joel2:31 Ak koimenit asista
Joel2:32 Ak tun kisoru age tugul ne kuurei kainetab Jehovah: amu tun mitei che chilildos eng’ tulwetab Sion ak Jerusalem
Joel3:1 Amu
Joel3:2 ak amut ichek koba atebwetab Jeosapat; ak aruokyi ichek eng’ oloto amu bikyuk ak amu borotennyu Israel
Joel3:3 Ak kigoser barbarek agobo bikyuk: ak kigogoito ng’etet agobo chepkugoniot
Joel3:4 Ee Turo
Joel3:5 Amu ko u ye kioib fedaisiekyuk ak tahabusiekyuk
Joel3:6 kioalde kogeny lagokab Juda ak lagokab Jerusalem oaldochi werikab Yunanik
Joel3:7 ogeero
Joel3:8 ak aalde werikwok ak tibikwok koba eutab lagokab Juda
Joel3:9 Omwaite ng’olyondoni eng’ bororiosiek; ochob luget: ong’eet bik che nyigonen; ingorik murenik tugul che bo luget
Joel3:10 Otany mogomboikwok che bo tuga koek rotokab chok
Joel3:11 Ochogu
Joel3:12 Ingong’eetgei bororiosiek
Joel3:13 Ogese chepkeswet
Joel3:14 Bik che chang’
Joel3:15 Imenitu asista ak arawet
Joel3:16 ak boriseni Jehovah eng’ Sion
Joel3:17 Onai anyun ole a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’
Joel3:18 Ak saune betunoto divaik che anyiny tulonok
Joel3:19 Kuberi Misri
Joel3:20 Ago tebyei Juda koigeny
Joel3:21 Ak aanyiny korotikwak che tom aanyiny: amu menyei Jehovah Sion.
Amos1:1 Ng’alekab Amos
Amos1:2 Kimwa kole
Amos1:3 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Damasko amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos1:4 ago ayokyini mat gotab Hasael
Amos1:5 Ak airi temeleiywotab Damasko
Amos1:6 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Gasa amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos1:7 ago ayokyini mat irimetab Gasa
Amos1:8 ak aiste ne menyei Asdod
Amos1:9 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Turo amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos1:10 ago ayokyini mat irimetab Turo
Amos1:11 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Edom
Amos1:12 ago ayokyini mat Teman
Amos1:13 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maawechi biret ne abire lagokab Amon amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos1:14 ago anaami mat eng’ irimetab Raba
Amos1:15 ak keluul laitoriandenywa
Amos2:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Moab amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos2:2 ago ayokyini mat Moab
Amos2:3 ak aiste kiruogindet eng’ kwenunnyi
Amos2:4 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Juda amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos2:5 ago ayokyini mat Juda
Amos2:6 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Israel amu bistaosiekyik somok
Amos2:7 che isienyi komachei temburiekab emet eng’ metowekab kibananok
Amos2:8 ak koruiye ngoroik che kiname besendo eng’ ole negite kapkorosut age tugul
Amos2:9 Ago kiabar Amorindet eng’ tainywa
Amos2:10 Ak kiamutwak kogeny otogosu eng’ emetab Misri
Amos2:11 Ak kiande alak eng’ werikwok koek maotik
Amos2:12 Ago koigochi Nasiritik divaik koee; ak ong’at maotik olenji
Amos2:13 Ogeero
Amos2:14 Ak kobetyi chepchebindo che mweei
Amos2:15 ama imuchi kotonon inendet ne namei kwanget
Amos2:16 ak komwei ach ngor eng’ betunoto inendet ne nyigan eng’ che nyigonen
Amos3:1 Ogas ng’olyondoni kagomwa Jehovah agobo okwek
Amos3:2 Okwege kityo che angen eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo ng’ony: aiitwok anyun biret amu tengekwogikwok tugul.
Amos3:3 Tos bendat bik aeng’u ngot ko magasyindos?
Amos3:4 Tos boriseni ng’etundo eng’ osnet ngo ma bar tiondo? Tos boriseni ng’etundo ne neran eng’ kebenennyi ngot ko ma am kiy?
Amos3:5 Tos ibutyin taritiet mestet ne mi ng’ony eng’ ole mami mestet ne namei inendet? Tos iwir mestet ama twa kiy?
Amos3:6 Tos kiguutei iriaget eng’ nganaset
Amos3:7 Iman mayaei kiy Kiptaiyat Jehovah kotom kong’ang’ji ung’otiennyi otwogikyik maotik.
Amos3:8 Kagoborisen ng’etundo
Amos3:9 Omwaite eng’ gorikab laitoriat eng’ Asdod
Amos3:10 Mwaei Jehovah kole
Amos3:11 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Biitu bunyot
Amos3:12 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye soru mestowot kelyek aeng’ anan motwet ne bo itit eng’ kutitab ng’etundo; kisoru anyun ko u noto lagokab Israel che tebe Samaria eng’ luitab kit ne kilyeldoe
Amos3:13 Ogas okwek
Amos3:14 Amu eng’ betut ne tun aiityini biret Israel amu bistaosiekyik
Amos3:15 Ak abut gotab betusiekab kaititiet koboto ne bo betusiekab lalang’indo; ak keng’em gorik che kigiteege kelekab belek
Amos4:1 Ogas ng’olyondoni
Amos4:2 Kigoyosio Kiptaiyat Jehovah eng’ tililindanyi
Amos4:3 Ak omande obun komoswek che kibutok eng’ irimet
Amos4:4 Obwa Bet-el
Amos4:5 ak ogoite korosiotab kongoi ne bo kit ne kaginde mermerek
Amos4:6 Ak koagonok agine iljet eng’ nganasokwok tugul
Amos4:7 Ak kiaetenak kogeny ropta
Amos4:8 Koombeniot anyun nganasok aeng’u anan ko somok koba nganaset age si koee beek
Amos4:9 Kiabirenok chelalitiet ak uchatet: kiam munene mbarenikwok che chang’ ak mbarenikwok che bo sabibuk
Amos4:10 Kiayokwok koroito ko u ni ki bo Misri: kiabar murenikwok eng’ rotwetab chok
Amos4:11 Kiang’em agesu alak eng’ okwek
Amos4:12 Ayaun ko u noto anyun
Amos4:13 Amu
Amos5:1 Ogas ng’olyondoni amwae eng’ rirek agobo okwek
Amos5:2 Kagobut bergeiyatab Israel; ma kong’eetei kogeny: kagewirta eng’ emennyi: mami chi ne ing’eeti.
Amos5:3 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Nganaset ne kocham komandoe bik elfut agenge kong’etyin bogulu
Amos5:4 Amu mwachin Jehovah gotab Israel ko u ni kole
Amos5:5 amocheng’ Bet-el
Amos5:6 Ocheng’ Jehovah si osopche: si ma lal ko u mat eng’ gotab Josep
Amos5:7 okwek che oweechi kiruoget koek ng’wonet
Amos5:8 ocheng’ inendet ne yaei Koremerik ak Kapsomoguk
Amos5:9 ne ipchin che kimen ng’emisiet koche
Amos5:10 Wechei ichek inendet ne kerei kong’ eng’ ormarichet
Amos5:11 Amu kiotiechatiech kibananok
Amos5:12 Amu angen ole te chang’indab bistaosiekwok ak ole te oindab tengekwogikwok; okwek che onyalili bik che bo iman
Amos5:13 Sisei anyun ne ng’om eng’ betusiek che u choto; amu yaachen betusiechoto.
Amos5:14 Ocheng’ che miach
Amos5:15 Owech yaitiet
Amos5:16 Mwaei anyun Jehovah
Amos5:17 Ak kobiit rirek eng’ mbarenik tugul che bo sabibuk: amu abune kwenung’ung’
Amos5:18 Bwa eng’ okwek che omache betutab Jehovah! Amu nee si omache betutab Jehovah? Mesundeito betunoto
Amos5:19 ko u ye kamwee chito ng’etundo
Amos5:20 Tos maimenitu betutab Jehovah ama lapkeitu? Ee
Amos5:21 Aweche
Amos5:22 Ee
Amos5:23 Oistoena cheetab tienwogikwok; amu mamache agas anyinyindab kibugandinikwok.
Amos5:24 Ago ingoroot kiruoget ko u beek
Amos5:25 Ee gotab Israel
Amos5:26 Ee
Amos5:27 Agoitook anyun keluulok
Amos6:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che mi kalyet eng’ Sion
Amos6:2 Osiirte oba Kalne
Amos6:3 Okwek che oistoi kolooit betut ne ya
Amos6:4 ichek che ruitos eng’ itogusiek che bo kelekab belek
Amos6:5 ichek che tieni tienwogik che bo buch eng’ cheetab kibugandet; che chopchingei tuguk che bo tienwogik
Amos6:6 che eei divaik eng’ bagulisiek
Amos6:7 Kiluulei anyun koboto ichek che kisib keluul
Amos6:8 Kigoyosiechigei Kiptaiyat Jehovah
Amos6:9 Ak ngot kong’et bik tamanu eng’ got agenge
Amos6:10 Ak ye sut chi imamet
Amos6:11 Amu
Amos6:12 Tos ruaei mbartanyisiek eng’ ruandet? Tos ibate chi eik oloto? Ko owal kiruoget koek kit ne ng’wan
Amos6:13 okwek che oboiboitune kit ne bo buch
Amos6:14 Amu
Amos7:1 Kiiborua Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni: ogeero
Amos7:2 Ak ye kingo kagoam suswek koges eng’ emet
Amos7:3 Kiwal Jehovah kabwatutikyik agobo nito: mabiitu ko u noto
Amos7:4 Kiiborua Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni: ogeero
Amos7:5 Yeityo amwa ale
Amos7:6 Kiwal Jehovah kabwatutikyik agobo nito: Mabiitu nito agine
Amos7:7 Kiiborua inendet ko u ni: ogeero
Amos7:8 Ak kilenja Jehovah
Amos7:9 ak koguber komoswek che tororen che bo Isak
Amos7:10 Kiiyokto anyun tisiindet Amasia ne bo Bet-el keguur Jeroboam laitoriatab Israel
Amos7:11 Amu mwaei Amos ko u ni kole
Amos7:12 Kilenji kogeny Amasia Amos
Amos7:13 ago mat kota imaoten kogeny eng’ Bet-el: amu oloto ko oldo ne tilil ne bo laitoriat

Amos7:15 ak kiimuta Jehovah ayagisiei
Amos7:16 Kas anyun nguno ng’olyotab Jehovah: Imwae inye ile
Amos7:17 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Egu osotiondeng’ung’ chepkugoniot eng’ nganaset

Amos8:2 Ak kilenja

Amos8:5 olen
Amos8:6 kole si kobiit keale kibananok feda

Amos8:10 Ak awal igorwekwok koek rirek

Amos8:12 Ak koombeniot kong’eete nyanjet age agoi nyanget age

Amos9:1 Kiageer Kiptaiyat kotonone ole negite kaptisisiet: ak kile

Amos9:3 Agot ngo ung’egei tulwetab Karmel barak
Amos9:4 Agot ngo luul bunikwak

Obadiah1:1 Ng’ang’utietab Obadia. Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni agobo Edom: Kigegas ng’alek che bunu Jehovah
Obadiah1:2 Keero
Obadiah1:3 Kigoberberin menotetab muguleldang’ung’
Obadiah1:4 Agot ngitiriren iwe barak mising’ ko u kipsichit
Obadiah1:5 Ngot kobwanjin chorik
Obadiah1:6 Kisiaktoi ano tugukab Esau! Kicheng’doi ano konoraikyik che ung’otin!
Obadiah1:7 Kigoonin bik tugul che kionamege kot iit kiwoto: kigong’alin bik che kioting’ege kalyet
Obadiah1:8 Tos mang’eme bik che ng’omen che bo Edom
Obadiah1:9 Ak toptobendos mureniguk che nyigonen
Obadiah1:10 Tuchin tewernatet amu koromnatet ne kiiyachi ng’etab komet Jakobo
Obadiah1:11 Eng’ betut ne kiitononi eng’ bitonin
Obadiah1:12 Ago amat igeer betutab ng’etab komet eng’ betutab tiritindanyi
Obadiah1:13 Amechut ormarichetab bikyuk eng’ betutab nyalildanywa; ee
Obadiah1:14 Ametonone ole tuiyechin ortinwek
Obadiah1:15 Amu karikyi betutab Jehovah bororiosiek tugul: ko u ye kiiyai keyaun ko u noto; weekyingei meting’ung’ boisioniguk.
Obadiah1:16 Amu ko u ye kioeeise eng’ tulwennyu ne tilil
Obadiah1:17 Ago biitu che chilildos eng’ tulwetab Sion
Obadiah1:18 Ak koek gotab Jakobo mat
Obadiah1:19 Ak konam ichek che bo Murot ne to Tai tulwetab Esau kobunji; ak konam ichek che menyei emet ne soi
Obadiah1:20 Ak konam che kiga keluul che bo lugonito bo lagokab Israel che mi kwenutab Kananik
Obadiah1:21 Ak togosu sorunik tulwetab Sion koruokyi tulwetab Esau; ak kobunji bounatet Jehovah.
Jonah1:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jona weritab Amitai
Jonah1:2 Ng’eet
Jonah1:3 Ago king’eet Jona kolen komwechi Tarsis komwee Jehovah; ak kichortagei kwo Jopa
Jonah1:4 Ago kiiyokyi Jehovah nyanjet usonet ne o
Jonah1:5 kiiyweis anyun kiboitinikab melit
Jonah1:6 Kiwa anyun kiptaiyatab melit ole mi inendet
Jonah1:7 Ak kilenji age tugul choruennyi
Jonah1:8 Kimwachi anyun inendet kolenji
Jonah1:9 Ak kilenji ichek
Jonah1:10 Kiiyweis anyun bik mising’
Jonah1:11 Koteebe anyun bichoto inendet kolenji
Jonah1:12 Ak kilenji ichek
Jonah1:13 Ago kiwaas bichoto beek eng’ kimnatet kolen kokweri melit koweek kwo ngegut; ago ma imuch: amu kitesak mising’ wasetab ge ne bo nyanjet kogirinda ichek.
Jonah1:14 Kirirji anyun Jehovah kolenji
Jonah1:15 Koganab anyun Jona
Jonah1:16 Koiywei anyun bichoto Jehovah mising’; ak koeng’ji Jehovah tiseiywot
Jonah1:17 Ak kichob Jehovah njiriot ne o si kobiit kolugui Jona; ak kitebe Jona moetab njiriot betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok.

Jonah2:3 Amu kiiwirja riret
Jonah2:4 Ak kiamwa ale
Jonah2:5 Kiyiema beek
Jonah2:6 Kiachortege agoi kelusiekab tulonok; Kirata ng’ony koboto temeleiywekyik agoi: Ago kiimutu kora sobondanyu komong’ eng’ keringet
Jonah2:7 Ye kitanui sobondanyu
Jonah2:8 Istoegei rirenenywa bo ge Ichek che isubi atebosiek che ma nyolu che bo lembech.
Jonah2:9 Ago aeng’un tiseiywot ne amwae kongoi; Ayaagun che kiaarorun. Bo Jehovah yetunet.
Jonah2:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah njiriot

Jonah3:2 Ng’eet
Jonah3:3 Kong’eet anyun Jona kwo Ninebe
Jonah3:4 Ak kitoi Jona kochut nganaset eng’ bandab betut agenge
Jonah3:5 Ak kiiyan bikab Ninebe Kamuktaindet; ak kimwaita karugutetab ge
Jonah3:6 Ak kiit ng’alek oldab laitoriatab Ninebe
Jonah3:7 Ak kimwaita ak kobarta eng’ Ninebe komugul eng’ ng’atutietab laitoriat ak bikyik che toogunotin
Jonah3:8 ago ingetuge ichek tugul kuniok
Jonah3:9 Ng’o ne ingen ngo tos ma week Kamuktaindet ak kowal kabwatutikyik
Jonah3:10 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet boisionikwak

Jonah4:2 Ak kisa Jehovah kole
Jonah4:3 Ara anyun
Jonah4:4 Ak kile Jehovah
Jonah4:5 Kiwa anyun Jona sang’utab nganaset
Jonah4:6 Ak kichob Jehovah Kamuktaindet silangwet
Jonah4:7 Ago kingoeech eng’ betut ne bo aeng’
Jonah4:8 Ak kingochor asista kochob Kamuktaindet usonet ne bunu kong’asis ne imelisiei; ak kibeel asista metitab Jona

Jonah4:10 Ak kile Jehovah

Micah1:1 Ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kinyonji Mika Morastindet eng’ betusiekab Jotam
Micah1:2 Ogas okwek bororiosiek
Micah1:3 Amu
Micah1:4 Ak kochootyo tulonok eng’ kelyekyik
Micah1:5 Biitu chuto amu bistoetab Jakobo
Micah1:6 Ayae anyun Samaria koek karurugutietab emet
Micah1:7 Ak kebir ketuatui kanamonikyik tugul che kigiwai
Micah1:8 Ateei ak awaache amu nito
Micah1:9 Amu ma inyaoksei ng’otobosiekyik: amu kagonyo kot koit Juda; itei ormarichetab bikyuk
Micah1:10 Amat imwaite ng’olyondonito eng’ Gat
Micah1:11 Osiirte
Micah1:12 Amu igeni mising’ chito ne menyei Marot kole konyor mieindo: amu kachorjigei yaitiet ormarichetab Jerusalem kobunu Jehovah.
Micah1:13 Ratyi karitab luget mbartanyit ne chepcheb
Micah1:14 Igochini anyun Moreset-gat kagochinetab saisere: egu gorikab Aksib kit ne bo ng’alset eng’ laitorinikab Israel.
Micah1:15 Ta amutun chito ne nyonei konamin ibunji
Micah1:16 Ingochurin met
Micah2:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che chobei tengekto ak kotilei eng’ itogusiekwak ole yaitoi yaitiet! Ye kagoeech koyaei
Micah2:2 Kasei miat mbarenik
Micah2:3 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero
Micah2:4 Mwaei eng’ betunoto kalewenet agobo inye
Micah2:5 Menyoru anyun chito ne wirtoi borowet eng’ barbariat eng’ tuiyetab Jehovah.
Micah2:6 Mwaei ichek kole
Micah2:7 Ee gotab Jakobo
Micah2:8 Ago kota koboriena bikyuk ko u bunyot: oreegune ngoriet ne tabanu barak ichek che siirtoi eng’ kalyet
Micah2:9 Otimdoi kwonyikab bikyuk koba eng’ gorikwak che kororon; orebe torornatennyu lagokwak agoi.
Micah2:10 Ong’eetye
Micah2:11 Ngot komwa lembech chito ne wendoti eng’ usonet ak lembechek
Micah2:12 Ee Jakobo
Micah2:13 Kagondoe butindet ichek: kagobutis ak koba agoi ormarichet
Micah3:1 Kiamwa ale
Micah3:2 Che oweche mieindo ak ochame yaitiet; che onemu irirenikwak koboto banyekwak eng’ kowekwak;
Micah3:3 che amei kogeny banyekab bikyuk; ak koenyei irirenikwak
Micah3:4 Ye ibata korirji Jehovah
Micah3:5 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni agobo maotik che igochin bikyuk kolel; che susisiei eng’ kelekwak ak kowaachei kole
Micah3:6 egu anyun kemout eng’ okwek
Micah3:7 Ak kolilanso keerik
Micah3:8 Ago kanyiia iman kimnatet eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah
Micah3:9 Asomok anyun ale ogas nito
Micah3:10 Teege Sion korotik
Micah3:11 Iruochi kandoik amu tuguk che kigoigoisie ak inetisiei tisiik amu melekto
Micah3:12 Kibati anyun Sion agobo okwek ko u ye kibati mbaret
Micah4:1 Ago kigimiti eng’ betusiek che bo let tulwetab gotab Jehovah eng’ tulonok barak
Micah4:2 Ak bendi bororiosiek che chang’ ak komwa kole
Micah4:3 Ak koruoksechin bororiosiek che chang’
Micah4:4 Ago tebe chi tugul kelutab ketinnyi ne bo sabibuk
Micah4:5 Amu wendoti bororiet age tugul eng’ bororiosiek tugul eng’ kainetab cheptalelinnyi

Micah5:2 Ago inye
Micah5:3 Igoitoi anyun inendet ichek kot koit betut ne sigisiei inendet ne tinyei ng’wanindo: tun weekyingei anyun che king’et che bo tupchosiekyik
Micah5:4 Ak kotonon kobai akwennyi eng’ kimnatetab Jehovah
Micah5:5 Egu chichito kalyennyo ye tun kait Asuriaindet emennyo
Micah5:6 Ak kong’em emetab Asuria eng’ rotwetab chok
Micah5:7 Ak kotebe bik che king’et che bo Jakobo kwenutab bororiosiek che chang’ ko u rewot ne bunu Jehovah
Micah5:8 Ak kotebe bik che king’et che bo Jakobo kwenutab bororiosiek
Micah5:9 Ingitoror eung’ung’ eng’ baragutab buniguk
Micah5:10 Mwaei Jehovah kole
Micah5:11 ak abar nganasokab emeng’ung’
Micah5:12 ak aiste bonisosiek eng’ eung’ung’; ama inyoru kogeny kipsogeinik:
Micah5:13 ak aiste eng’ kwenung’ung’ kanamoniguk che kigiwai ak tolochiguk; ak ma ilosu kogeny boisionikab euneguk.
Micah5:14 Ak atutu Aserik eng’ kwenung’ung’; ak ang’em nganasoguk.
Micah5:15 Ak ayaaktochi mugetut eng’ neregek ak eng’ neregek che ng’wonen

Micah7:1 Bwa ane! Amu a u yo kagiyum logoekab kemei
Micah7:2 Kigobet chi ne iywei Jehovah eng’ ng’ony
Micah7:3 Igiilegei eng’ eunekwak koyai kit ne ya; somsei bounindet
Micah7:4 Ne mie eng’ ichek ko u katableliat: ne litit mising’ eng’ ichek ko ya kosiir ng’otwetab katok: kagoit betutab ribiguk

Micah7:6 Amu iteweri werit kwanda

Micah7:8 amebaibaitunena
Micah7:9 Amuitoi eng’ neregekab Jehovah
Micah7:10 Yeityo kogeer anyun bunyondennyu
Micah7:11 Betut ne kiteechei irimoiguk! Kiistoi kolooit ng’atutiet eng’ betunoto.
Micah7:12 Bwanjinin ichek eng’ betunoto
Micah7:13 Nganda u noto koegu emet karatia amu ichek che menyei oloto
Micah7:14 Iyage biguk eng’ kiroktang’ung’
Micah7:15 Aborjini inendet tuguk che kikwong’e ko u eng’ betusiek che kiimong’u eng’ emetab Misri.
Micah7:16 Keerei bororiosiek ak kolilanso amu kimnatenywa tugul: kere eunekwak kutuswekwak
Micah7:17 Melei ng’ung’unyek ko u erenet; mong’u kobotanionu eng’ komoswekwak che ung’egei ko u tuguk che ichuutegei ng’ony: bwanei eng’ kaiyweisiet ole mi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo
Micah7:18 Ng’o Kamuktaindet ne u inye
Micah7:19 Tun weeksei kogeny ak korirenech; tun tiekyin ng’ony tengekwogikyok: ak iwirji tengekwogikwak tugul rirosiekab nyanjet.

Nahum1:1 Lautietab Ninebe. Bukuitab ng’ang’utietab Nahum Elkosindet.

Nahum1:4 Kere kong’ nyanjet
Nahum1:5 Botandos tulonok eng’ tainnyi

Nahum1:7 Mie Jehovah
Nahum1:8 Ago igesu komosato eng’ maranet ne o

Zechariah5:11 Ak kilenja
Zechariah6:1 Kiayot met kogeny
Zechariah6:2 Ki biriren mbartanyisiek che bo karit ne bo tai
Zechariah6:3 ak ki leelach mbartanyisiekab karit ne bo somok; ak ki busienen mbartanyisiekab karit ne bo ang’wan ak ko muruonen.
Zechariah6:4 Kiawolji anyun malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa
Zechariah6:5 Ak kiwol malaikaiyat kolenja
Zechariah6:6 Wendi karit ne bo mbartanyisiek che tuuen kotokyingei emet ne bo murot ne bo katam; ak kiba che leelachen kosub choto
Zechariah6:7 Ak kiba mbartanyisiek che muruonen
Zechariah6:8 Kiguura anyun
Zechariah6:9 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja
Zechariah6:10 Imut bik alak eng’ che kigiluul
Zechariah6:11 Ee
Zechariah6:12 ak imwachi inendet ilenji
Zechariah6:13 ee
Zechariah6:14 Ak kobunjin chepkuloichoto Helem
Zechariah6:15 Ak kobwa ichek che mi ole loo ak koteech hekalutab Jehovah
Zechariah7:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Sekaria
Zechariah7:2 Kiga koyokto anyun ichek che bo Bet-el Sareser ak Regem-melek
Zechariah7:3 ak kong’alalji tisiikab gotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek
Zechariah7:4 Kinyonja anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kolenja
Zechariah7:5 Ng’alalji bik tugul che bo emet
Zechariah7:6 Ak ye oame
Zechariah7:7 Tos manyoljok ogas ng’alek che kimwa Jehovah eng’ maotik che bo tai
Zechariah7:8 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Sekaria kolenji
Zechariah7:9 Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole
Zechariah7:10 amous mosok
Zechariah7:11 Ago kiesio kogas it
Zechariah7:12 Ee
Zechariah7:13 Ak ko u ye kingorirji inendet ichek
Zechariah7:14 ago aiyestoi ichek eng’ kipchurjuriet eng’ bororiosiek tugul che kitomo konai. Kiek anyun emet karatia eng’ let
Zechariah8:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kolenja
Zechariah8:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ama ng’etkong’ agobo Sion
Zechariah8:3 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kaaweekyige Sion
Zechariah8:4 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ta komenyei boisiek ak chebiosok ortinwekab Jerusalem
Zechariah8:5 Ak konyi ortinwek che bo nganaset ng’etik ak tibik che urerendos eng’ ortinwechato.
Zechariah8:6 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ngot ko bo kwong’et eng’ konyekab bik che ng’etu eng’ bichu eng’ betusiechoto
Zechariah8:7 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ogeero
Zechariah8:8 ak amutu ichek
Zechariah8:9 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ingogimegitu eunekwok
Zechariah8:10 Amu kingotom koit betusiechoto ko kima konyoru chi melekto
Zechariah8:11 Ago ma a u eng’ bichu king’et
Zechariah8:12 Amu tun biitu keswotab kalyet: tun yiei ketitab sabibuk
Zechariah8:13 Ak ko u ye kioegu che chubotin eng’ bororiosiek
Zechariah8:14 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ko u ye kigabwat ayaiywok yaitiet
Zechariah8:15 kaabwat anyun kogeny eng’ betusiechuto ayachi ne mie Jerusalem koboto gotab Juda: amoiywei.
Zechariah8:16 Chu tuguk che tun oyae; Ingomwachi chi age tugul eng’ okwek chitab kokwennyi imanit; oyai kiruoget ne bo imanit ak kalyet eng’ ormarichokwok:
Zechariah8:17 amat kobwat chi age tugul eng’ okwek yaitiet eng’ muguleldanyi agobo chitab kokwennyi: amocham kayosiet age tugul ne bo lembech: amu aweche tuguchuto tugul
Zechariah8:18 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kolenja
Zechariah8:19 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Egu eng’ gotab Juda boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge
Zechariah8:20 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Tun bwanei bororiosiek ak bik che menyei nganasok che chang’:
Zechariah8:21 ak koba bik che bo nganaset age nganaset age kolenji
Zechariah8:22 Ee
Zechariah8:23 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Tun namei bik tamanu eng’ betusiechoto
Zechariah9:1 Lautietab ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo emetab Hadrak
Zechariah9:2 koboto Hamat agine ne mi kiwotennyi: Turo ak Sidon
Zechariah9:3 Ak kiteekyigei Turo irimet
Zechariah9:4 Ogeero
Zechariah9:5 Keerei Askelon ak koiyweis; keerei Gasa agine
Zechariah9:6 Ak komeny chito ne bo sarbuch Asdod
Zechariah9:7 Ak aiste korotikyik eng’ kutinnyi
Zechariah9:8 Ak ameng’isie ayiem gonnyu si agirinda luget
Zechariah9:9 Baibaitu mising’
Zechariah9:10 Ak ang’em karitab luget eng’ Epraim
Zechariah9:11 Ago eng’ inye
Zechariah9:12 Oweekyige irimet
Zechariah9:13 Amu kiarikyige Juda ko u kwanget
Zechariah9:14 Ak kotook Jehovah eng’ baragunywa
Zechariah9:15 Ak korib Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ichek; ak koges
Zechariah9:16 Ak kosor Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa ichek eng’ betunoto ko u akwetab kechirekab bikyik: amu tun kergeitu ak koik che bo chepkulet
Zechariah9:17 Amu o ne tia mieindanyi
Zechariah10:1 Osom Jehovah ropta eng’ betusiek che bo ropta ne bo let
Zechariah10:2 Amu kigomwa terapik tangoita
Zechariah10:3 Anerekyini mestowek
Zechariah10:4 Mong’une inendet koita ne bo luita
Zechariah10:5 Ak koigei bik che nyigonen
Zechariah10:6 Ak agimit gotab Juda
Zechariah10:7 Ak koigei ichek che bo Epraim chito ne nyigan
Zechariah10:8 Aititenjini ichek
Zechariah10:9 Ak agol ichek eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek; ak kobwata komi emotinwek che looen: ak komeng’is koboto lagokwak
Zechariah10:10 Amutu ichek kogeny komong’une emetab Misri
Zechariah10:11 Ak beek che mildogei eng’ nyanjet
Zechariah10:12 Ak agimit ichek eng’ Jehovah; ak kobendate kainennyi
Zechariah11:1 Yat kurgotiguk
Zechariah11:2 Waach
Zechariah11:3 Kutitab mestowek che waachei! Amu kageng’em torornatenywa; kutitab ng’etunyik che neran che borisendos! Amu kageng’em menotetab Jordan.
Zechariah11:4 Kamwa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu ko u ni kole: Iyage akwetab kechirek che kienyei;
Zechariah11:5 che enyei bikab kobo
Zechariah11:6 Amu ma arire kogeny bik che menyei emoni
Zechariah11:7 Kiayage anyun akwetab kechirek che kienyei
Zechariah11:8 Ak kiang’em mestowek somok eng’ arawet agenge; amu kigong’et sobondanyu agobo ichek
Zechariah11:9 Kiamwa anyun ale
Zechariah11:10 Ak kianam kiroktanyu Mieindo
Zechariah11:11 Ak kibutok eng’ betunoto: ak kinai anyun che nyerotin che bo akwetab kechirek
Zechariah11:12 Ak kialenji ichek
Zechariah11:13 Ak kilenja Jehovah
Zechariah11:14 Yeityo aeb apcheune aeng’ kiroktanyu age
Zechariah11:15 Ak kilenja Jehovah
Zechariah11:16 Amu
Zechariah11:17 Bwa mestowot ne matilei kiy ne bagaktoi akwet! Ing’ururi rotwetab chok eunnyi ak kondanyi ne bo tai: yaamei eunnyi
Zechariah12:1 Lautietab ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo Israel.
Zechariah12:2 Mwaei Jehovah
Zechariah12:3 Ak ayae Jerusalem eng’ betunoto koek koita ne nyigis ne iimi bik tugul; nyoru berutik che chang’ ichek che kanabi koyato: ak koyumjigei inendet bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony.
Zechariah12:4 Mwaei Jehovah eng’ betunoto kole
Zechariah12:5 Ak komwa bounikab Juda eng’ mugulelwekwak kole
Zechariah12:6 Ayae eng’ betunoto bounikab Juda koigei rokyietab mat ne mi kwenik
Zechariah12:7 Sib kosoru Jehovah emaisiekab Juda
Zechariah12:8 Ribei Jehovah eng’ betunoto bik che menyei Jerusalem; ak koigei ne nyalulat eng’ ichek Daudi eng’ betunoto; ak koigei gotab Daudi Kamuktaindet
Zechariah12:9 Ak acheng’ abar eng’ betunoto bororiosiek tugul che ibokyin Jerusalem.
Zechariah12:10 Ak arong’ji tamirmirietab mieindo ak ne bo somet gotab Daudi
Zechariah12:11 Biitu eng’ betunoto kateeiyet ne o eng’ Jerusalem
Zechariah12:12 Ak kote emet
Zechariah12:13 iteeitos che bo gotab Lawi ichegei
Zechariah12:14 iteeitos ortinwek tugul che kang’et
Zechariah13:1 Tun kiyatyin gotab Daudi ak bik che menyei Jerusalem
Zechariah13:2 Ak mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole
Zechariah13:3 Ak ngot ko tun komaoten age tugul
Zechariah13:4 Ak tun ililandos maotik eng’ betunoto
Zechariah13:5 ago mwaei kole
Zechariah13:6 Ak keteebe kelenji
Zechariah13:7 Ng’eet
Zechariah13:8 Kiistoi
Zechariah13:9 Ak amut kebeberato bo somok kobun mat
Zechariah14:1 Ogeero
Zechariah14:2 Amu tun ayumi bororiosiek tugul kobokyi Jerusalem kobargei; ak kenam nganaset
Zechariah14:3 Yeityo kwo Jehovah
Zechariah14:4 Ak tun tononie kelyekyik eng’ betunoto tulwetab Emitik
Zechariah14:5 Ak omwei obun atebwetab tulonokyuk; amu itei atebwetab tulonok Asel: ee
Zechariah14:6 Ak mailuu lapkeiyet eng’ betunoto amaimenitu:
Zechariah14:7 ago betut agenge ne naat eng’ Jehovah; ma bet
Zechariah14:8 Ak tun mong’une beek che soptos Jerusalem eng’ betunoto; bendi kebeberta age kotokyingei nyanjet ne mi kong’asis
Zechariah14:9 Ak koek Jehovah laitoriatab ng’ony komugul: egu agenge Jehovah eng’ betunoto
Zechariah14:10 Kiwalei emet tugul koigei Araba
Zechariah14:11 Ak komeny bik oloto
Zechariah14:12 Ak biitu koroitab ng’ony ne bire Jehovah bik tugul che kibargei ak Jerusalem: nundos borwekwak kota kotonondos
Zechariah14:13 Bunu Jehovah eng’ betunoto wasetab ge ne o
Zechariah14:14 Ak kobargei Juda agine ak Jerusalem; ak kiyomo magornatosiek che bo bororiosiek tugul
Zechariah14:15 Ak biitu ko u noto
Zechariah14:16 Ak age tugul ne ng’etu eng’ bororiosiek tugul che kiibokyin Jerusalem
Zechariah14:17 Ak age tugul ne bo ortinwek tugul che bo ng’ony ne matogostoi Jerusalem kolosu Laitoriat
Zechariah14:18 Ak ngot ko matogosta oretab gotab Misri
Zechariah14:19 Egu nito biretab Misri
Zechariah14:20 Tun kisirjin eng’ betunoto chepchingilokab mbartanyisiek kole
Zechariah14:21 Ee
Malachi1:1 Lautietab ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiigochi Israel eng’ Malaki.
Malachi1:2 Kiachamak
Malachi1:3 ago kiawech Esau
Malachi1:4 Amu mwaei Edom kole
Malachi1:5 Ogeere ak ole
Malachi1:6 Teechei werit kwandanyi
Malachi1:7 Ogoitoi makatinik che muruonen eng’ kaptisisiennyu. Ak omwae ole
Malachi1:8 Ak ye ogoitoi che koriotin koek tiseiywek
Malachi1:9 Asomok anyun ale
Malachi1:10 Kata kaigai nda kami chi eng’ okwek ne kerei kurgotik
Malachi1:11 Amu o kainennyu eng’ Bororiosiek koboch ole chorune asis agoi ole roroktoe; ak kigoitoi eng’ komosta age tugul nyamdutik che kibeelei agobo kainennyu
Malachi1:12 Ago ong’waniti amu omwae ole
Malachi1:13 Omwae kogeny ole
Malachi1:14 Ago chubot kaberberindet
Malachi2:1 Ee okwek tisiik
Malachi2:2 Ngot ko momache ogas
Malachi2:3 Ogeero
Malachi2:4 Ak onai ole kiayokwok ng’atutionito
Malachi2:5 Kimi kayomisennyu ne bo sobondo ak kalyet koboto inendet; ak kiagochi tuguchoto inendet si kobiit koiyweis
Malachi2:6 Kimi kutinnyi ng’atutietab imanit
Malachi2:7 Amu kanyo korib kutitab tisiindet naet
Malachi2:8 Ago kiomaste eng’ oret; kionach che chang’ eng’ ng’atutiet; kiong’em kayomisetab Lawi
Malachi2:9 Kiayaak anyun ak okwek oegu che kisasei ak ko nyerotin eng’ taitab bik tugul
Malachi2:10 Tos magitinye achek tugul kwanda agenge? Tos ma yaech Kamuktaindet agenge? Amu nee si koberberi age tugul eng’ achek tupchennyi
Malachi2:11 Kigoyai Juda kaberberisiet
Malachi2:12 Igesu Jehovah chito ne yachin inendet kiito
Malachi2:13 Ak ni kit age ne oyae kogeny
Malachi2:14 Ago
Malachi2:15 Ak tos kima yai inendet koek agenge
Malachi2:16 Amu aweche besiet
Malachi2:17 Kooiim Jehovah eng’ ng’alekwok. Ago omwae ole
Malachi3:1 Ogeero
Malachi3:2 Ago ng’o ne imuchi komuita eng’ betutab nyonunennyi? Ak ng’o ne tononi ye katook? Amu u inendet mat ne kitililisie
Malachi3:3 ak koteb ng’ony ko u kaunindetab feda ak ko katililindet
Malachi3:4 Si kochamak anyun kagochinetab Juda ak ne bo Jerusalem eng’ Jehovah ko u eng’ betusiek che bo keny
Malachi3:5 Ak arikyok eng’ kiruoget
Malachi3:6 Amu mawalaksei ane Jehovah
Malachi3:7 Kiomaste koboch betusiekab kwanisiekwok omete kayomisutikyuk
Malachi3:8 Tos chorei chi Kamuktaindet? Ago ochora. Ago omwae ole
Malachi3:9 Kichubok eng’ chubet; amu ochora
Malachi3:10 Oibu kebeberwek tugul che bo taman kobwa choge
Malachi3:11 Ak ager kong’ ne amisioti amu okwek
Malachi3:12 Ak koguurenok bororiosiek tugul bik che boiboi: amu oegu emet ne kichamei kot
Malachi3:13 Kigouuegitu ng’alekwok che kiomwa agobo ane
Malachi3:14 Kiomwa ole
Malachi3:15 Ak nguno keguure menotik bik che boiboi
Malachi3:16 King’alaljigei anyun che iywei Jehovah: ak kieb it Jehovah kogas ak kigisir eng’ tainnyi bukuitab kabwatet agobo ichek che iywei Jehovah
Malachi3:17 Ak mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole
Malachi3:18 Yeityo oweege ak obesie chito ne bo iman ak kiptengekyot
Malachi4:1 Amu
Malachi4:2 Ago okwek che oiywei kainennyu kochorjinok asista ne bo imanda ne ting’e kanyaiset kebebaikyik; ak omande
Malachi4:3 Ak otiech kiptengeginik; amu egu orek eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekwok eng’ betut ne ayae nito
Malachi4:4 Obwat Ng’atutietab Musa otwogindennyu
Malachi4:5 Ogeero
Malachi4:6 Ak kowal mugulelwekab kwanisiek kotokyigei lagokwak
Matthew1:1 Bukuit ne bo oretab Jesu Kristo
Matthew1:2 Kisich Abraham Isak; ak kisich Isak Jakobo; ak kisich Jakobo Juda ak che tupcho;
Matthew1:3 ak kisich Juda Pares ak Zera eng’ Tamar; ak kisich Pares Hesron; ak kisich Hesron Ram;
Matthew1:4 ak kisich Ram Aminadab; ak kisich Aminadab Nason; ak kisich Nason Salmon;
Matthew1:5 ak kisich Salmon Boas eng’ Rahab; ak kisich Boas Obed eng’ Ruth; ak kisich Obed Jesii;
Matthew1:6 ak kisich Jesii laitoriat Daudi. Ak kisich Daudi Solomon eng’ ne ki bo Uria;
Matthew1:7 ak kisich Solomon Reoboam; ak kisich Reoboam Abija; ak kisich Abija Asa;
Matthew1:8 ak kisich Asa Jeosabat; ak kisich Jeosabat Joram; ak kisich Joram Usia;
Matthew1:9 ak kisich Usia Jotam; ak kisich Jotam Ahas; ak kisich Ahas Hesekia;
Matthew1:10 ak kisich Hesekia Manase; ak kisich Manase Amon; ak kisich Amon Josia;
Matthew1:11 ak kisich Josia Jekonia ak che tupcho
Matthew1:12 Ak kingo kagimut koba Babulon
Matthew1:13 ak kisich Serubabel Abiud; ak kisich Abiud Eliakim; ak kisich Eliakim Asor;
Matthew1:14 ak kisich Asor Sadok; ak kisich Sadok Akim; ak kisich Akim Eliud;
Matthew1:15 ak kisich Eliud Eleasar; ak kisich Eleasar Matan; ak kisich Matan Jakobo;
Matthew1:16 ak kisich Jakobo Josep manong’otiotab Maria
Matthew1:17 Kiek ibinwek tugul taman ak ang’wan koboch Abraham agoi Daudi; ak kiek ibinwek taman ak ang’wan koboch Daudi agoi kamutet ne kigimut bik koba Babulon; ak kiek ibinwek taman ak ang’wan koboch ngab kimut koba Babulon agoi Kristo.
Matthew1:18 Ki u ni sigetab Jesu Kristo: ye kingo kagochamnyechi Josep kotungei ak Maria kametab Jesu
Matthew1:19 Ak kimachei Josep manong’otiondennyi kole kobagakta eng’ ung’ot amu kima cham konai chi
Matthew1:20 Ago ye kingota kobwati tuguchu
Matthew1:21 Ak tun sichei werit; ak iguure kainennyi JESU; amu inendet ne soru bikyik eng’ tengekwogikwak.
Matthew1:22 Ak kagoyaak tuguchu tugul
Matthew1:23 Ogeero
Matthew1:24 Ak king’eet Josep eng’ ruandanyi
Matthew1:25 ak kima rikyi inendet kot kosich werit: ak koguure kainennyi JESU.
Matthew2:1 Ak ye kingo kagesich Jesu eng’ Betlehem ne bo Judea eng’ betusiek che bo laitoriat Herod
Matthew2:2 koteeboti kole
Matthew2:3 Ak ye kingogas noto laitoriat Herod
Matthew2:4 Ak ye kingoyum inendet tisiik che eechen tugul ak sirik che bo bik
Matthew2:5 Ak kiwolji kolenji
Matthew2:6 Ak inye
Matthew2:7 Kiguur anyun Herod eng’ ung’ot bik che ng’omen
Matthew2:8 Ak kiiyokto koba Betlehem
Matthew2:9 Ak kingo kagogas ng’alekab laitoriat
Matthew2:10 Ak ye kingogeer kecheiyat
Matthew2:11 Ak kiba go orit ak kigeer lakwet ne ming’in koboto kamennyi Maria; ak kiibutyi ng’ony kolos inendet; ak kotiach konoraikwak che bo kamanutiet ne o
Matthew2:12 Ak kingo kagoteechi Jehovah eng’ karuotitoet kolenji
Matthew2:13 Ak kingo kagoba ichek
Matthew2:14 King’eet anyun kemoi komut lakwet ne ming’in ak kamet
Matthew2:15 ak kitebe oloto agoi kome Herod: si kosulda ne kimwa Kiptaiyat eng’ maotiot
Matthew2:16 Kingogeer Herod anyun
Matthew2:17 Kiisulda anyun eng’ betunoto ne kiga mwa maotiot Jeremia
Matthew2:18 Kigegas kutit eng’ Rama
Matthew2:19 Ago kingo kagome Herod
Matthew2:20 kolenji
Matthew2:21 Ak king’eet
Matthew2:22 Ago ye kingogas kole bou Arkelau Judea eng’ bounatet ne ki bo kwandanyi Herod
Matthew2:23 ak kinyo kotebe nganaset ne kiguure Nasaret: si kobiit kosulda ne kiga mwa maotik
Matthew3:1 Ak kinyo eng’ betusiechoto Johana Kabatisanindet koamdaati eng’ surkwenetab Judea
Matthew3:2 kolen
Matthew3:3 Amu inendet ni ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia
Matthew3:4 Ak kiilaachi Johana inendet sambutab tambesik
Matthew3:5 Ak ngunoto anyun
Matthew3:6 ak kiibatisan inendet ichek eng’ ainet ne kiguure Jordan
Matthew3:7 Ago ye kingogeer kobwanji kabatisanennyi che chang’ che bo Parisaik ak Sadukaik
Matthew3:8 Oi anyun logoek che nyoljin sigunet:
Matthew3:9 amat obwat eng’ oring’wong’ ole
Matthew3:10 Agot nguno ko kaginde aiywet tigitikab ketik: kiebei anyun ketit age tugul ne maiyiei logoek che miach
Matthew3:11 Abatisanok iman eng’ beek amu sigunet: ago tinyei kimnatet kosiira inendet ne isubwa
Matthew3:12 tinyei eng’ eunnyi keibennyi
Matthew3:13 Kinyo anyun Jesu kobunu Galili konyo Jordan ole mi Johana
Matthew3:14 Ago kimachei Johana koesio
Matthew3:15 Ago kiwolji Jesu kolenji
Matthew3:16 Ak ye kingo kagibatisan Jesu
Matthew3:17 ogeero
Matthew4:1 Kiimut anyun Tamirmiriet Jesu kotogosta kwo surkwen si koyom oindet.
Matthew4:2 Ak ye kingo kagorugutgei betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam eng’ let koam rubet.
Matthew4:3 Ak kinyo yomindet ak kolenji
Matthew4:4 Ago kiwolji kole
Matthew4:5 Yeityo komut oindet inendet kwo nganaset ne tilil; kiimut kwo kimonjogut ne bo hekalut
Matthew4:6 ak kolenji
Matthew4:7 Kilenji Jesu
Matthew4:8 Kiimut kogeny oindet inendet kwo tulwet ne koi mising’
Matthew4:9 ak kolenji
Matthew4:10 Kilenji Jesu anyun
Matthew4:11 Kibagach oindet anyun inendet; ak ogeero
Matthew4:12 Ak ye kingogas Jesu kole ki kerat Johana
Matthew4:13 ak kiwa eng’ Nasaret
Matthew4:14 si kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia
Matthew4:15 Emetab Sebulun ak emetab Naptali
Matthew4:16 Kigeer bik che kitebe mesundeito Lapkeiyet ne o
Matthew4:17 Koboch yoto kotoi Jesu koamda
Matthew4:18 Ak ye kiwendote ngegutab araraita ne bo Galili
Matthew4:19 Ak kolenji
Matthew4:20 Ak kibagach ngunoto regereiywekwak
Matthew4:21 Ak ye kingota kowendi eng’ oloto
Matthew4:22 Ak kibagach ngunoto moinget ak kwandanywa
Matthew4:23 Ak kiwendoti Jesu eng’ Galili komugul
Matthew4:24 Ak kiyesta ng’alek agobo inendet eng’ Suria komugul
Matthew4:25 Ak kiisub inendet tuiyosiek che eechen che kibunu Galili ak Dekapoli ak Jerusalem ak Judea ak Jordan bitonin.
Matthew5:1 Ak kingogeer tuiyosiek
Matthew5:2 ak kiyat kutinnyi
Matthew5:3 Boiboen che bonon eng’ tamirmiriet: amu nenywa bounatetab kipsengwet.
Matthew5:4 Boiboen che arogendos: amu tun kigoigoi.
Matthew5:5 Boiboen che taloen: amu tun bunjin ng’ony.
Matthew5:6 Boiboen che amei rubo ak melelda agobo imanda: amu tun biyong’dos.
Matthew5:7 Boiboen che riregei: amu tun nyoru agichek rirenetab ge.
Matthew5:8 Boiboen che tililen mugulelwek: amu tun keerei Jehovah.
Matthew5:9 Boiboen che yaei kalyet: amu kiguure werikab Jehovah.
Matthew5:10 Boiboen che kageusaus agobo imanda: amu nenywa bounatetab kipsengwet.
Matthew5:11 Oboiboi ye churok bik
Matthew5:12 Oboiboitu
Matthew5:13 O munyukab ng’ony: ago ngo bet anyinyindab munyuk
Matthew5:14 O lapkeiyatab ng’ony. Magimuchi keuny nganaset ne mi tulwet barak.
Matthew5:15 Ak mainaami bik tait
Matthew5:16 Ongoluu lapkeiyeng’wong’ ko u noto eng’ taitab bik
Matthew5:17 Molen kianyo abut Ng’atutiet anan maotik: kima anyo abut
Matthew5:18 Amu amwawok iman ale
Matthew5:19 Noto anyun
Matthew5:20 Amu amwawok ale
Matthew5:21 Kiogas kele
Matthew5:22 ago amwawok ale
Matthew5:23 Noto anyun ngigoite kagochineng’ung’ eng’ kaptisisiet
Matthew5:24 ibagakte eng’ oloto kagochineng’ung’ eng’ taitab kaptisisio ak iwe anyun
Matthew5:25 Osib ochamnyege ak bunyondeng’ung’
Matthew5:26 Amwaun iman
Matthew5:27 Kiogas kele kigimwa kele
Matthew5:28 ago amwawok ale
Matthew5:29 Ak ngo riichin kondang’ung’ ne bo tai
Matthew5:30 Ak ngo riichin eung’ung’ ne bo tai
Matthew5:31 Kigimwa kogeny kele
Matthew5:32 ago amwawok ale
Matthew5:33 Kiogas kogeny kele kigemwachi ichek che bo keny
Matthew5:34 ago amwawok ale
Matthew5:35 anan agobo ng’ony
Matthew5:36 Anan iyosie agobo meting’ung’
Matthew5:37 Ago ingoek ng’alaleng’wong’
Matthew5:38 Kiogas kele
Matthew5:39 ago amwawok ale
Matthew5:40 Ak ngomutyin age tugul kapkiruok
Matthew5:41 Ak age tugul ne birjinin iwe mailit agenge
Matthew5:42 Igochi inendet ne somin
Matthew5:43 Kiogas kele kigimwa kele
Matthew5:44 ago amwawok ale
Matthew5:45 si oegu werikab Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet; amu igochin asistanyi kochorji che yaach ak che miach
Matthew5:46 Amu ngot ochame ichek che chamok
Matthew5:47 Ak ngot ogati che otupche kityo
Matthew5:48 Noto anyun
Matthew6:1 Oripge si moyai imandang’wong’ eng’ taitab bik
Matthew6:2 Noto anyun
Matthew6:3 Ago ye igoite kagochinoik
Matthew6:4 si kobiit kobunji ung’ot kagochinoiguk; ak kogonin melekto Kwandang’ung’ ne keerei eng’ ung’ot.
Matthew6:5 Ak ye osae
Matthew6:6 Ago inye
Matthew6:7 Ak ye osae
Matthew6:8 Noto anyun amoige ichek; amu ingen Kwandang’wong’ tuguk che obononi
Matthew6:9 Noto anyun osa ko u ni: Kwandanyo ne mi kipsengwet
Matthew6:10 Ingonyo bounateng’ung’. Ingoyaak eng’ ng’ony mageng’ung’
Matthew6:11 Konech rani amitwogikyok che bo ra.
Matthew6:12 Ak inyoiywech kaat lelutikyok
Matthew6:13 Amemutech ole mi yomset
Matthew6:14 Amu ngonyochini kaat bik kachiliilutikwak
Matthew6:15 Ago ngo monyochini kaat bik kachiliilutikwak
Matthew6:16 Kogeny ye orugutge
Matthew6:17 Ago ye irugutge inye
Matthew6:18 si mageer bik kole irugutige
Matthew6:19 Amogonorjige konoraik eng’ ng’ony
Matthew6:20 ago ogonorjige konoraik eng’ kipsengwet
Matthew6:21 amu ole mi konorueng’ung’
Matthew6:22 Taitab borto konda; noto anyun
Matthew6:23 Ago ngo ya kondang’ung’
Matthew6:24 Mami chi ne imuchi koot kiptainik aeng’; amu wechei age
Matthew6:25 Amwawok anyun ale
Matthew6:26 Ogeer taritik che bo barak: magolsei
Matthew6:27 Ak imuchi ng’o ne kereri met eng’ okwek kotesyi koindanyi kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut?
Matthew6:28 Ak amu nee anyun si ogerer met agobo ngoroik? Obwat taptok che bo kewet
Matthew6:29 ago amwawok ale
Matthew6:30 Ago ngolaakyin Jehovah ko u noto suswek che bo kewet
Matthew6:31 Noto anyun amogerer met
Matthew6:32 Amu cheng’ei tuguchu tugul Bororiosiek; amu ingen Kwandang’wong’ ne bo kipsengwet kole
Matthew6:33 Ago ocheng’ korok bounatennyi
Matthew6:34 Noto anyun amogerer met agobo mutai: amu kerere met mutaut agobo ge. Yamei betut yaitiennyi.
Matthew7:1 Amoruoch
Matthew7:2 Amu kiruoget ne oruochi
Matthew7:3 Ak kalya si igeer betbetiat ne mi kondab ne otupche
Matthew7:4 Anan imwachindoi ano ne otupche ilenjini
Matthew7:5 Ee
Matthew7:6 Amogochi sesenik kit ne itabanat
Matthew7:7 Osom
Matthew7:8 amu age tugul ne somei
Matthew7:9 Anan mi ng’o eng’ okwek
Matthew7:10 anan ngo som njiriot

Matthew7:13 Obun okwek kurget ne mariich: amu kurget ne baraa
Matthew7:14 Amu marich kurget

Matthew7:19 Ketit age tugul ne mayiei logoek che miach keebei

Matthew10:1 Ak kiguur alamalyennyi taman ak aeng’ kobwanji inendet
Matthew10:2 Chu kainaik che bo che kiyoktoi taman ak aeng’: Ne bo tai ko Simon ne kiguure Petero
Matthew10:3 Pilipu
Matthew10:4 Simon Kananindet
Matthew10:5 Kiiyokto Jesu chuto taman ak aeng’
Matthew10:6 ago kaigai obe ole mi kechirek che betyotin che bo gotab Israel.
Matthew10:7 Ak ye obendi
Matthew10:8 Osoob che miandos
Matthew10:9 Amocheng’jige tahabu
Matthew10:10 anan lolet ne bo oret
Matthew10:11 Ak ocheng’ chito ne nyolu eng’ nganaset age tugul
Matthew10:12 Ak ye obe go
Matthew10:13 Ak ngo nyolu goyoto
Matthew10:14 Ak age tugul ne mataachok
Matthew10:15 Amwawok
Matthew10:16 Ogeero
Matthew10:17 Ago oribege bik: amu imutyinok kapkiruoget
Matthew10:18 ak kimutyinok taitab bounik ak laitorinik agobo ane
Matthew10:19 Ago ye igoitook
Matthew10:20 Amu ma okwek che ong’alali
Matthew10:21 Ak kong’wekta chito ng’etab kamet kong’wekyi meet
Matthew10:22 Ak kowechok bik tugul agobo kainennyu: ago inendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet kesoru.
Matthew10:23 Ago ye usok eng’ nganasani omwechi age: amu amwawok iman ale
Matthew10:24 Masiirei ne kineti
Matthew10:25 Yamei koteb ne kineti ko u konetindennyi
Matthew10:26 Moiywei ichek anyun amu noto: amu mami kiy ne tugot
Matthew10:27 Ne amwawok eng’ mesundeito
Matthew10:28 Amoiywei ichek che barei borto
Matthew10:29 Magialdae taritik aeng’ che mengechen kebebertab taman ne bo denarit? Amaibutyin ng’ony agenge eng’ ichek ama chamji Kwandang’wong’:
Matthew10:30 ago iitotin agot sumeek tugul che bo metowekwok.
Matthew10:31 Noto anyun amoiywei; osiire taritik che mengechen che chang’.
Matthew10:32 Noto anyun age tugul ne ibortoa eng’ taitab bik
Matthew10:33 Ago age tugul ne esioa eng’ taitab bik
Matthew10:34 Molen kianyo aipchi ng’ony kalyet: kima anyo aipchi kalyet
Matthew10:35 Amu kianyo atoiye chi ak kwanda
Matthew10:36 egu bunikab chi bikyik.
Matthew10:37 Inendet ne chamei kwanda anan kamet kosiira ko manyoljina; ak inendet ne chamei werit anan cheptanyi kosiira ko manyoljina.
Matthew10:38 Ak inendet ne maibei kimurtoiyondennyi ak kosubwa
Matthew10:39 Inendet ne ribei sobondanyi kobeeti; ak inendet ne ibeeti sobondanyi agobo ane ko tun nyoru.
Matthew10:40 Inendet ne taachok ko kataacha
Matthew10:41 Inendet ne taachei maotio eng’ kainetab maotio konyoru melektab maotio; ak inendet ne taachei chi ne bo iman eng’ kainetab chito ne bo iman konyoru melektab chito ne bo iman.
Matthew10:42 Ak age tugul ne igochin agenge eng’ chu mengechen kikombet ne bo beek che kaitit kityo eng’ kainetab alamalyet
Matthew11:1 Ak ye kingo kagong’at Jesu alamalyennyi taman ak aeng’ koges

Matthew11:3 ak koteebe inendet kole
Matthew11:4 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji
Matthew11:5 keertoi che koriotin
Matthew11:6 Ak baibai age tugul ne manyorunena kanagut eng’ ui tugul.
Matthew11:7 Ak ye kita kobendi chu bandanywa
Matthew11:8 Kiomande ogeer nee? Chito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero
Matthew11:9 Ago kilya si omande? Si kobiit ogeer maotiot? Ee
Matthew11:10 Nito ko inendet
Matthew11:11 Amwawok

Matthew11:14 Ak ngochame otaach ko u noto
Matthew11:15 Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoe
Matthew11:16 Ago aroge nee ibini? Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng’ oldinwekab aldaisiet

Matthew11:21 Bwa we

Matthew11:23 Ak inye

Matthew11:26 ee

Matthew11:28 Obwanja

Matthew11:30 Amu nyamnyum choginnyu
Matthew12:1 Eng’ betusiechoto kobun Jesu mbarenikab bek eng’ betutab sabato; ak kiamei rubet alamalyennyi
Matthew12:2 Ago ye kingogeer Parisaik
Matthew12:3 Ago kilenji ichek
Matthew12:4 ye kingwo gotab Jehovah
Matthew12:5 Anan tom osoman eng’ Ng’atutik

Matthew12:7 Ago ngo kionai ole teptoi ni
Matthew12:8 Amu kiptaiyat ne bo sabato Weritab chi.
Matthew12:9 Ak kiwa eng’ oloto
Matthew12:10 ak ogeero
Matthew12:11 Ak kilenji ichek
Matthew12:12 Siirtoot anyun ne tia chito eng’ kechiriet! Noto anyun
Matthew12:13 Kimwachi anyun chito kolenji
Matthew12:14 Ago kimanda anyun Parisaik
Matthew12:15 Ak kingonai Jesu
Matthew12:16 ak king’at ichek kole
Matthew12:17 si kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia
Matthew12:18 Ogeero
Matthew12:19 Matiitos
Matthew12:20 Mairiei tegat ne chisot
Matthew12:21 Ak imang’u Bororiosiek kainennyi.
Matthew12:22 Kigimutyi anyun chito ne kitinyei oindet
Matthew12:23 Kokwong’io anyun tuiyosiek tugul
Matthew12:24 Ago kingogas Parisaik
Matthew12:25 Ak kingonai inendet kabwatutikwak kolenji
Matthew12:26 ak ngo on Setani Setani
Matthew12:27 Ak ndaone oik eng’ Beelsebul
Matthew12:28 Ago ngaone oik eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah
Matthew12:29 Anan imuktoi ano kwo chi gotab chito ne kim
Matthew12:30 Inendet ne magimi tuwai kogirindaa; ak inendet ne magiyumi tuwai koiyestooti.
Matthew12:31 Noto anyun amwawok ale
Matthew12:32 Ak age tugul ne mwaitoe yaitio Weritab chi
Matthew12:33 Anan oyai ketit komieit
Matthew12:34 Okwek lagokab erenok che ng’wonen
Matthew12:35 Ibune chi ne mie tuguk che miach konoruennyi ne mie: ak ibune chi ne ya tuguk che yaach konoruennyi ne ya.
Matthew12:36 Ak amwawok ale
Matthew12:37 Amu kiityinin imanda eng’ ng’aleguk
Matthew12:38 Kiwolji anyun alak che bo sirik ak Parisaik
Matthew12:39 Ago kiwolji kolenji
Matthew12:40 amu ko u ye kimi Jona betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok moetab njiriot ne o mising’: ko u noto tun tebe Weritab chi betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok eng’ muguleldo ne bo ng’ony.
Matthew12:41 Tun tonondos murenik che bo Ninebe koboto ibini eng’ kiruoget
Matthew12:42 Ng’eetei tun laitoriat kobogoriot ne bo murot komostab tai koboto ibini eng’ kiruoget
Matthew12:43 Ago ye kagomong’une chi tamirmiriet ne muruon
Matthew12:44 Yeityo komwa kole
Matthew12:45 Kwo anyun komut tamirmirik alak tisab che yaach kosiir inendet
Matthew12:46 Kingota kong’alaljin tuiyosiek
Matthew12:47 Ak kimwachi anyun chito age kolenji
Matthew12:48 Ago kiwolji chito ne kimwachin inendet
Matthew12:49 Ak koiito eunnyi kotokyi alamalyennyi
Matthew12:50 Amu age tugul ne yaei magetab Baba ne mi kipsengwet
Matthew13:1 Kiwa Jesu betunoto komanda eng’ got
Matthew13:2 Ak kiiyumjigei inendet tuiyosiek che eechen
Matthew13:3 Ak kimwachi ichek tuguk che chang’ eng’ kalewenaik
Matthew13:4 ak kingota koletoi
Matthew13:5 ak kiibutyi alak ole mi koik
Matthew13:6 Ak kingochor asista
Matthew13:7 Ak kiibutyi alak katok; ak kobityo katok
Matthew13:8 ak kiibutyi alak ng’ung’unyek che miach
Matthew13:9 Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoi
Matthew13:10 Ak kibwa alamalyet
Matthew13:11 Ak kiwolji ichek kolenji
Matthew13:12 Amu age tugul ne tinyei
Matthew13:13 Noto anyun ang’alaljini eng’ kalewanaik; amu nganda keertoi
Matthew13:14 Ak isuldaat eng’ ichek maoinatetab Isaia
Matthew13:15 Amu kwalilenotin mugulelwekab bichu
Matthew13:16 Ago boiboen konyekwok
Matthew13:17 Amu amwawok iman
Matthew13:18 Ogas anyun okwek kalewenet ne bo kolindet.
Matthew13:19 Ye kasei chi age tugul ng’olyotab bounatet
Matthew13:20 Ak inendet ne kigilechi ole mi koik
Matthew13:21 ago matinyei tigitik inendet
Matthew13:22 Ak inendet ne kigilechi ole mi katok
Matthew13:23 Ak inendet ne kigilechi ng’ung’unyek che miach
Matthew13:24 Kiiborji kalewenet age kolenji
Matthew13:25 ago
Matthew13:26 Ago kingobit suswot
Matthew13:27 Ak kibwa otwogik che bo chitab got ak kolenji
Matthew13:28 Ak kilenji ichek
Matthew13:29 Ago kile
Matthew13:30 Ingobityo tugul agoi kesisiet; ak eng’ betutab kesisiet amwachi kesik
Matthew13:31 Kiiborji kalewenet age kolenji
Matthew13:32 ne ming’in iman eng’ keswek tugul; ago ye kagoeet
Matthew13:33 Kimwachi kalewenet age kolenji
Matthew13:34 Kimwachi Jesu tuiyosiek tuguchuto tugul eng’ kalewenaik; ak kima ng’alalji ichek ama eng’ kalewenet:
Matthew13:35 si kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot
Matthew13:36 Kibagakta anyun tuiyosiek
Matthew13:37 Ak kiwol kole
Matthew13:38 ak mbaret ko ng’ony; ak keswek che miach ko werik che bo bounatet; ak chemulbainik ko werikab inendet ne ya;
Matthew13:39 ak bunyot ne kigolei choto ko oindet; ak kesisiet ko kagesunetab ng’ony; ak kesik ko malaikaisiek.
Matthew13:40 Ko u ye kiyumi chemulbainik ak kebeel eng’ mat; egu ko u noto eng’ kagesunetab ng’ony.
Matthew13:41 Iyoktoi Weritab chi malaikaisiekyik
Matthew13:42 ak kowirji mat ne o: egu eng’ oloto kateeiyet ak nyeetab kelek.
Matthew13:43 Iluu anyun che bo imanda ko u asista eng’ bounatetab Kwandanywa. Inendet ne tinyei itik
Matthew13:44 Kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak kit ne bo magornatet ne ung’at eng’ mbar: ne kinyor chi
Matthew13:45 Kogeny
Matthew13:46 ak ye kingo kagonyor sonoiyat agenge ne bo alyet ne o
Matthew13:47 Kogeny
Matthew13:48 Ak ye kingo kagonyi kochuut konyo ngegut; ak koteb ng’ony
Matthew13:49 Egu ko u noto eng’ kagesunetab ng’ony: tun bwanei malaikaisiek
Matthew13:50 ak kowirji mat ne o: egu eng’ oloto kateeiyet ak nyeetab kelek.
Matthew13:51 Kaoguiye tuguchuto tugul? Kolenji
Matthew13:52 Ak kilenji ichek
Matthew13:53 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jesu kalewenaichu
Matthew13:54 Ak kiit emennyi ak konet ichek eng’ sunagoginywa
Matthew13:55 Tos ma weritab musogindet nito? Magiguure kamet Maria? Ak werik che tupcho ko Jakobo
Matthew13:56 Ak chepkametwagik
Matthew13:57 Ak kiinach ichek ng’alekyik. Ago kilenji Jesu ichek
Matthew13:58 Ak kima yai boisionik che chang’ che bo kimnatet eng’ oloto amu bistoenywa.
Matthew14:1 Kigas eng’ betusiechoto Herod bounindet logoiywek agobo Jesu
Matthew14:2 ak kolenji otwogikyik
Matthew14:3 Amu kiga konam Herod Johana
Matthew14:4 Amu kilenji Johana inendet
Matthew14:5 Ak ye kimachei kobar inendet
Matthew14:6 Ago ye kingoit betut ne bo sigetab Herod
Matthew14:7 Ak kiiyosiechi kogochi kiy age tugul ne kasom.
Matthew14:8 Ak ye kingo kagonet kamet
Matthew14:9 Kiarogen laitoriat; ago
Matthew14:10 ak kiiyokto anyun ketil metitab Johana eng’ korgoret.
Matthew14:11 Ak kigiib metinnyi eng’ tageito
Matthew14:12 Kibwa anyun alamalyennyi
Matthew14:13 Ak ye kingogas Jesu
Matthew14:14 Ak kimong’
Matthew14:15 Ak kingoek koskoleny
Matthew14:16 Ago kilenji Jesu
Matthew14:17 Ak kilenji
Matthew14:18 Ak kole
Matthew14:19 Ak king’at tuiyosiek kobuur eng’ suswek; ak kinam makatinichato mut
Matthew14:20 Ak kiamis tuguk
Matthew14:21 Ak icheget che kiam ko ki negit murenik elfusiek mut ama kiit kobogorisiek ak lagok.
Matthew14:22 Ak kiichirjir eng’ yoto alamalyennyi kolany moingetab beek
Matthew14:23 Ak kingo kagoyomis tuiyosiek koba
Matthew14:24 Ago kiga it moingetab beek araraita kwen
Matthew14:25 Ak eng’ ripset ne bo ang’wan ne bo kemoi kwo ole mi icheget
Matthew14:26 Ak ye kingogeer alamalyennyi inendet kobunei araraita barak
Matthew14:27 Ago king’alalji Jesu ichek eng’ yoto kolenji
Matthew14:28 Ak kiwolji Petero kolenji
Matthew14:29 Ak kile
Matthew14:30 Ago ye kingogeer usonet
Matthew14:31 Ak kiito Jesu ngunoto eunnyi
Matthew14:32 Ak ye kingo kagolany ichek moinget
Matthew14:33 Ak kiilos inendet ichek che kimi moinget
Matthew14:34 Ak ye kingo kagolanda
Matthew14:35 Ak ye kingonai bikab koronoto inendet
Matthew14:36 ak kiigaigai inendet kole kotwa agot tabandab ngoriennyi: ak kisopchi tugul che kitwa.
Matthew15:1 Kibwanji anyun Jesu Parisaik ak sirik che kibunu Jerusalem
Matthew15:2 Amu nee si kobistoe alamalyeng’ung’ bitonwekab boisiek? Amu amisiei kotom koun eunekwak.
Matthew15:3 Ak kiwolji kolenji
Matthew15:4 Amu king’at Jehovah kole
Matthew15:5 Ago omwae ole
Matthew15:6 ko mateechei inendet kwanda ak kamet; kaowal anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah koek buch amu bitonwekwok.
Matthew15:7 Okwek chombilik! Kimaoten Isaia komie agobo okwek
Matthew15:8 Teecha bichu eng’ kutuswekwak: Ago looen mugulelwekwak eng’ ane.
Matthew15:9 Ago iloswa buch: Ng’atutikab bik konetisiosiek che inetisie.
Matthew15:10 Ak kiguur inendet tuiyet kobwa ole mi
Matthew15:11 ma che bunei kutit che imuruoni chito; ago che mong’une kutit
Matthew15:12 Kibwa anyun alamalyennyi kolenji
Matthew15:13 Ago kiwol kole
Matthew15:14 Obagakte ichek: kandoik che koriotin. Ak ngondochi kipkoratiat kipkoratiat
Matthew15:15 Ak kiwolji Petero kolenji
Matthew15:16 Ak kile

Matthew24:5 Amu bwanei che chang’ eng’ kainennyu kolen
Matthew24:6 Tun ogase agobo lugosiek ak ng’alek agobo baretab ge: oripge si moarogense: amu bwanei tuguchu matiny; ago kotom koit kagesunet.
Matthew24:7 Amu setyin bororiet age bororiet age
Matthew24:8 Ago tuguchu tugul ko taunetab ng’woninwek.
Matthew24:9 Ak kondeak anyun ole mi nyalilda
Matthew24:10 Ak kinach che chang’ anyun
Matthew24:11 Ak tun ng’eetos maotik che chang’ che bo lembech
Matthew24:12 Ak amu tesoksei yaitiet
Matthew24:13 Ago inendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet
Matthew24:14 Ak keamdaati logoiywechu miach bo bounatet eng’ ng’ony komugul koek baornatet eng’ bororiosiek tugul; ak koit anyun kagesunet.
Matthew24:15 Ye ogeer anyun kit ne kiwechei ne bo ng’emisiet
Matthew24:16 ingomwechi tulonok anyun ichek che mi Judea:
Matthew24:17 ama chorugei inendet ne mi got barak si konem tuguk che mi gonnyi:
Matthew24:18 ama weekyingei let ne mi mbar si koib ngoriennyi.
Matthew24:19 Ago bwa eng’ ichek che chio ak che reritos eng’ betusiechoto!
Matthew24:20 Osa anyun si mabiit mweeng’wong’ eng’ betusiekab kaititindo
Matthew24:21 amu egu anyun nyalilda ne o
Matthew24:22 Ak nda ma kiga ketil konwagitu betusiechoto

Matthew24:24 Amu ng’eetos Kristoisiek che bo lembech
Matthew24:25 Ogeero
Matthew24:26 Noto anyun ngo mwawok kole

Matthew24:28 Oldo age tugul ole mi musto
Matthew24:29 Ak ne ma tianit
Matthew24:30 ak kotook anyun eng’ kipsengwet kaborunetab Weritab chi: ak koteiyo anyun bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony
Matthew24:31 Ak koyokto malaikaisiekyik ak cheet ne o ne bo iriaget
Matthew24:32 Onetge anyun kalewenetab mogoiywet: ye kang’arng’aritu temenikyik
Matthew24:33 o u noto ak okwek ye ogeer tuguchu tugul
Matthew24:34 Amwawok
Matthew24:35 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng’ony
Matthew24:36 Ago manaei chi age tugul agobo betunoto ak sainato
Matthew24:37 Ko u ole kiteptoi betusiechu ki bo Noa
Matthew24:38 Amu u eng’ betusiechoto ye kitom kobiit maranet kiamisiei ak kieeisei
Matthew24:39 ak kima nai ichek agoi koit maranet
Matthew24:40 Tun boisiei murenik aeng’u eng’ mbar; kimuti age
Matthew24:41 ng’aisei kobogorisiek aeng’u eng’ koita agenge; kimuti age
Matthew24:42 Oripse anyun: amu mongen betut ne nyonei Kiptaiyandeng’wong’.
Matthew24:43 Ago onai ni
Matthew24:44 Noto anyun ochoboge ak okwek: amu nyonei Weritab chi eng’ sait ne mobwati ole nyonei.
Matthew24:45 Ng’o anyun otwogindet ne kiyani ak ko ng’om
Matthew24:46 Baibai otwogindonoto
Matthew24:47 Amwawok
Matthew24:48 Ago ngo mwa otwogindet ne ya eng’ muguleldanyi
Matthew24:49 ak kotoi kobir che otwogik koboto inendet
Matthew24:50 nyonei anyun kiptaiyatab otwogindonoto eng’ betut ne len inendet manyonei
Matthew24:51 ak kobir mising’ ak kogochi kebebertanyi koboto chombilik: egu eng’ oloto rirek ak nyeetab kelek.

Matthew26:2 Ongen ole ye ibata betusiek aeng’u koek paska

Matthew26:5 Ago kimwa kole
Matthew26:6 Ak ye kimi Jesu Betania
Matthew26:7 konyonji inendet kobogoriot ne kitinyei chubait ne mi mwaita ne nyandut ne bichii mising’ alyennyi

Matthew26:9 Amu kota kialdoe mwai tuguk che chang’
Matthew26:10 Ago ye kingonai Jesu
Matthew26:11 Amu otinye kotugul kibananok; ago mami ane kobotok kotugul.
Matthew26:12 Amu ye rong’ji mwaita bortanyu
Matthew26:13 Amwawok

Matthew26:15 ak kole
Matthew26:16 Ak koboch yoto kocheng’ boroindo ne ng’wektoe inendet.

Matthew26:18 Ak kile

Mark1:1 Taunetab logoiywek che miach che bo Jesu Kristo

Mark1:5 Ak kiba ole mi inendet emet komugul ne bo Judea
Mark1:6 Ak kiilaachi Johana sambut ne bo tambesik
Mark1:7 Ak kiamda
Mark1:8 Kiabatisanak eng’ beek; ago ibatisanok inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil.
Mark1:9 Kinyo anyun Jesu eng’ betusiechoto
Mark1:10 Yeityo
Mark1:11 Ak kimong’ kutit eng’ kipsengwet kole
Mark1:12 Ak ngunoto kochirjir Tamirmiriet inendet kwo surkwen.
Mark1:13 Ak kitebi eng’ surkwen betusiek artam koyomei Setani; ak kitebyei ak tiong’ik che bo timin; ak kiboisiechin inendet malaikaisiek.

Mark1:15 kolen
Mark1:16 Ak ye kiwendi kobunei tabandab araraita ne bo Galili

Mark1:19 Ak kiba kitigin
Mark1:20 Yeityo koguur ichek: ak kibagakta kwandanywa Sebedi komi moinget koboto otwogik
Mark1:21 Kiba anyun Kapernaum; ak kiwa inendet ngunoto sunagogit orit betunoto bo sabato ak konetis.
Mark1:22 Ak kikwong’io eng’ konetisiennyi: amu kiineti ichek ko u ne tinyei kimnatet
Mark1:23 Ak kimi ngunoto eng’ sunagoginywa chi ne kitinyei tamirmiriet ne muruon

Mark1:26 Ak ye kimandoi tamirmiriet ne muruon eng’ inendet
Mark1:27 Ak kitang’any tugul

Mark1:29 Ak ngunoto

Mark6:42 Ak kiamis tugul
Mark6:43 Ak koyum katuganik
Mark6:44 Ak icheget che kiam makatinichoto ko ki murenik elfusiek mut.

Mark6:48 Ak kingogeer icheget konyalildos eng’ boisietab mugangok che kikwerie moinget

Mark6:50 amu kigeer ichek tugul inendet

Mark6:54 Ak ye kingomong’ eng’ moinget
Mark6:55 ak koruaat eng’ koronoto komugul

Mark15:13 Ak kibolyo ichek kogeny
Mark15:14 Ak kilenji Pilato ichek
Mark15:15 Ak kimach Pilato kobaibai tuiyet
Mark15:16 Ak kiimut askarik inendet kwo kapkiruok orit
Mark15:17 Ak kiilaakyi ngoriet ne arus ne birir
Mark15:18 ak kitoi kogat inendet kole
Mark15:19 Ak kikwer metinnyi eng’ tegat
Mark15:20 Ak kingo kagochotachot inendet
Mark15:21 Ak kibirji chito ne kisiirtoi
Mark15:22 Ak kimut inendet kwo oldo ne kiguure Golgota
Mark15:23 Ak kiigochi divaik che burugot ak tuguk che u igomoik: ago ma taach.
Mark15:24 Ak kogartat
Mark15:25 Ak kiigartat inendet
Mark15:26 Ak kigisirji ng’alekab kataamset agobo inendet metinnyi barak kele
Mark15:27 Ak kiigartat rebik aeng’ koboto inendet; age eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai
Mark15:28 [Ak kiisulda anyun siret ne mwaei kole
Mark15:29 Ak kichurochur che kisiirtoi
Mark15:30 soruge
Mark15:31 Ak kichurochur inendet ko u noto tisiik che eechen agichek
Mark15:32 Ingochorgei nguno Kristo
Mark15:33 Ak kingoit sait lo
Mark15:34 Ak eng’ sait sogol kotwek Jesu eng’ kutit ne o kole
Mark15:35 Ak kingogas alak eng’ che kitonondos eng’ ye negit
Mark15:36 Ak kilabat chito age
Mark15:37 Kotwek anyun Jesu eng’ kutit ne o
Mark15:38 Kigerer anget ne kiga kioiye hekalut kwen koboch barak agoi ng’ony.
Mark15:39 Ak kingogeer kiptaiyatab bogol
Mark15:40 Ak kimi agichek kobogorisiek che kigeerei eng’ ye loo: kimi eng’ icheget Maria Magdalene
Mark15:41 che kiisubi ak koboisiechin inendet ye kimi Galili; koboto kobogorisiek alak che chang’ che kitogosu Jerusalem koboto inendet.
Mark15:42 Ak kingoek koskoleny
Mark15:43 konyo Josep ne bo Arimatea
Mark15:44 Ak kikwong’ Pilato amu kaga kome: ak koguur kiptaiyatab bogol
Mark15:45 Ak kingo kagonai eng’ kiptaiyandanato
Mark15:46 Ak kial anget ne bo katanit
Mark15:47 Ak kigeerei Maria Magdalene ak Maria kametab Joses ole kaginde inendet.
Mark16:1 Ak kingo kagosiirto sabato koal Maria Magdalene
Mark16:2 Ak eng’ karon inne

Mark16:5 Ak kingochut kererit
Mark16:6 Ak kilenji ichek
Mark16:7 Ago

Mark16:15 Ak kilenji

Luke5:12 Ak kingota komitei nganaset age

Luke5:15 Ak kitesak mising’ koiyesta logoiywekyik: ak kiiyumgei tuiyosiek che chang’ kobwa si kogas ng’alekyik ak kisoob eng’ mianwekwak.

Luke5:23 Nee ne nyamnyum
Luke5:24 Ago si kobiit onai ole tinyei kimnatet Weritab chi eng’ ng’ony konyochi kaat bik tengekwogik (kolenji chito ne ki meat borto)

Luke5:28 Ak kibagakta tugul

Luke5:38 Ago kanyol kinde divaik che leelach lolotinwek che leelachen.

Luke6:38 ogoite
Luke6:39 Ak kimwachi kalewenet kolenji
Luke6:40 Masiirei alamalyet konetindennyi: ago inendet ne kigonetak kogergeitu ak konetindennyi.
Luke6:41 Ak amu nee si igeere betbetiat ne mitei kondab ng’etab komet
Luke6:42 Anan imuktoi ano ilenji ng’etab komet
Luke6:43 Amu mami ketit ne mie ne yiei logoek che yaach; ama mi ketit ne ya ne yiei logoek che miach.
Luke6:44 Amu kinae ketit age tugul logoekyik. Amu mabutei bik logoekab mogoonik eng’ katok
Luke6:45 Inemu chito ne mie kit ne mie kobunu konoruet ne mie ne mi muguleldanyi; ak inemu chito ne ya kit ne ya kobunu konoruet ne ya ne mi muguleldanyi: amu che mwaei kutinnyi ko che nyiitat muguleldo.
Luke6:46 Amu nee si oguurena Kiptaiyat
Luke6:47 Chi age tugul ne nyonjina
Luke6:48 kergei inendet ak chito ne teechei got
Luke6:49 Ago inendet ne kasei
Luke7:1 Ak kingo kagogesyi ng’alekyik tugul itikab bik
Luke7:2 Kimi kiptaiyatab bogol
Luke7:3 Ak ye kingogas agobo Jesu
Luke7:4 Ak ye kingoit icheget ole mi Jesu
Luke7:5 amu chamei bororiennyo
Luke7:6 Kwo anyun Jesu koboto icheget. Ak ye kima kota ko loo eng’ goyoto
Luke7:7 noto anyun
Luke7:8 Agot ane
Luke7:9 Ak ye kingogas Jesu ng’alechuto
Luke7:10 Ak kingoweek anyun che kiga kiyokto
Luke7:11 Ak ye kingo kagobata betunoto
Luke7:12 Ak ye kiga rikta ormarichetab nganaset
Luke7:13 Ak ye kingogeer Kiptaiyat inendet
Luke7:14 Ak kirikta ye negit ak kotwa kit ne kigisute inendet: ak kitononso anyun che kisutei. Ak kilenji Jesu inendet
Luke7:15 Ak king’eet anyun ne koga kome
Luke7:16 Ak kiiyweis tugul: ak kolos Jehovah
Luke7:17 Ak kiyom ng’olyondonito agobo inendet Judea komugul
Luke7:18 Ak kimwachi alamalyetab Johana inendet tuguchuto tugul.
Luke7:19 Ak kiguurjigei Johana aeng’ che bo alamalyennyi ak koyokto koba ole mi Kiptaiyat
Luke7:20 Ak ye kiga it bik ole mi inendet
Luke7:21 Eng’ sainato kosoob che chang’ che kitinyei mianwek ak korotwek ak tamirmirik che yaachen; ak kiigochi kipkoratinik che chang’ kogeerto.
Luke7:22 Kowolji kolenji
Luke7:23 Ak baibai age tugul ne manyorunena kanagut.
Luke7:24 Kingo kagoba che kiga koyokto Johana
Luke7:25 Ago kiomande ogeer nee okwek? Chito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero
Luke7:26 Ago kiomande ogeer nee? Maotiot? Ee
Luke7:27 Nito ne kigisir agobo inendet
Luke7:28 Amwawok ale
Luke7:29 Ak ye kingogas bik tugul
Luke7:30 Ago kiesio Parisaik ak ng’omotikab Ng’atutik
Luke7:31 Ak kile Kiptaiyat
Luke7:32 Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng’ oldab aldaisiet
Luke7:33 Amu kinyo Johana Kabatisanindet ama am makatia anan divaik; ak omwae anyun ole
Luke7:34 Kinyo Weritab chi koamis ak koeeiso; ak omwae ole
Luke7:35 Ak naat ng’omnatet kele bo iman
Luke7:36 Ak kimach age eng’ Parisaik kole koamis ak inendet. Ak kiwa gotab Parisaindonoto
Luke7:37 Ak ogeero
Luke7:38 ak kitonon eng’ let ole negite kelyekyik
Luke7:39 Ak ye kingogeer noto Parisaindonoto ne kiguurei inendet
Luke7:40 Ak kiwolji Jesu inendet kolenji
Luke7:41 Kole
Luke7:42 Ak ye kima kotinyei kiy ne yaakyin
Luke7:43 Kowol Simon kole
Luke7:44 Ak kingoweleljigei kobogoriot
Luke7:45 Ma ing’ututa; ago inendet
Luke7:46 Ma iile metinnyu mwaita: ago kagoiile ine kelyekyuk mwaita ne nyamdut.
Luke7:47 Noto anyun ne kamwaun ale
Luke7:48 Kolenji kobogoriondonoto
Luke7:49 Ak kitoi icheget che kimitei amisiet koboto inendet
Luke7:50 Ak kilenji kobogoriot
Luke8:1 Ak kingobata noto
Luke8:2 ak kobogorisiek alak che kiga kosoob eng’ tamirmirik che yaachen ak mianwek
Luke8:3 ak Joana osotiotab Kusa kiboitiotab Herod
Luke8:4 Ak kingo yomogei tuiyet ne o
Luke8:5 Kiwa kolindet koleta keswekyik: ak ye kita koletoi
Luke8:6 Ak kiibutyi alak ruandet; ak ye kingobityo
Luke8:7 Ak kiibutyi alak kwenutab katok; ak kibityo katok koboto keswechoto
Luke8:8 Ak kiibutyi alak ng’ung’unyek che miach
Luke8:9 Ak kiteebe alamalyennyi ole teptoi kalewenoni.
Luke8:10 Ak kile
Luke8:11 Kalewenonoto ko ni: Keswek ko ng’olyotab Jehovah.

Luke8:14 Ak che kiibutyi katok

Luke8:16 Mami chi

Luke8:19 Ak kibwanji inendet kamet ak che tupcho
Luke8:20 Ak kigimwachi kelenji
Luke8:21 Ago kiwolji kolenji

Luke8:24 Ak kibwa ole mi inendet
Luke8:25 Ak kilenji ichek
Luke8:26 Kiit anyun emetab Gerasenik
Luke8:27 Ak ye kingonyo ngegutab araraita

Luke8:31 Ak kisom kole

Luke11:6 amu kagoit choruennyu ne bunu rutoi
Luke11:7 kowolji ne mi go
Luke11:8 Amwawok ale
Luke11:9 Ak amwawok agane ale
Luke11:10 Amu age tugul ne somei
Luke11:11 Ak ng’o eng’ okwek kwanda ne ngo som werit makatiat
Luke11:12 Anan ngo som koitab ingok
Luke11:13 Ngongen okwek che o yaach ogochi lagokwok tuguk che miach
Luke11:14 Ak kion inendet oindet ne namat kut. Ak ye kingo kagomanda oindet

Luke11:19 Ngot aone oik eng’ Beelsebul

Luke11:22 ak ye nyonji chito ne kim kosiir inendet

Luke11:25 Ak ye it
Luke11:26 Kwo anyun

Luke11:28 Ago kile inendet

Luke11:34 Taitab bortang’ung’ kondang’ung’: ngo mie kondang’ung’

Luke11:38 Ak ye kingogeer Parisaindet

Luke11:43 Bwa okwek Parisaik! Amu ochame ng’echerok che tororen eng’ sunagogisiek
Luke11:44 Bwa okwek! Amu o kerge ak kererisiek che matoogu
Luke11:45 Ak kiwolji ng’omotiot age ne bo ng’atutik
Luke11:46 Ak kole
Luke11:47 Bwa okwek! Amu oteeche kererisiekab maotik
Luke11:48 Kioegu anyun baorinik ak ochamnyechini boisionikab kwanisiekwok: amu icheget che kibarei ak oteeche okwek kererisiekwak.

Luke11:50 si kobiit komage ibini
Luke11:51 koboch korotikab Abil agoi korotikab Sakaria

Luke12:2 Ago mami kiy ne tugot

Luke12:5 Ago ateeiywok si onai inendet ne kanyol oiywei: Oiywei inendet
Luke12:6 Tos magialdae taritik mut che mengechen kebebertab mut ne bo denarit? Ama utie Jehovah agot agenge.
Luke12:7 Ago iitotin sumeek tugul che bo metowekwok. Amoiywei anyun: osiire okwek taritik che chang’ che mengechen.

Luke14:1 Ak ye kingwo gotab age eng’ bounik che bo Parisaik eng’ betutab sabato
Luke14:2 Ak ogeero
Luke14:3 Ak kiwolji Jesu ng’omotikab ng’atutik ak Parisaik
Luke14:4 Ago kisisyo. Ak kinam inendet
Luke14:5 Ak kolenji icheget
Luke14:6 Ak kimata komuch anyun kowolji inendet kogeny agobo tuguchuto.
Luke14:7 Ak kimwachi kalewenet che kiga kiguur
Luke14:8 Ye kaguurjin chi age tugul igortab katunisiet
Luke14:9 si ye nyo inendet ne kaguurok okwek tuwai
Luke14:10 Ago ye kiguurin
Luke14:11 Amu age tugul ne itororigei kiming’ini; ak inendet ne iming’inegei kitorori.
Luke14:12 Kimwachi anyun chichoto kiga kuurso agine
Luke14:13 Ago ye ichob igorta
Luke14:14 si kiberurin; amu matinyei icheget che weegun: amu tun kiweegun eng’ ng’eetyetab che bo iman.
Luke14:15 Ak kingogas tuguchuto chito age ne kimi koboto inendet eng’ amisiet
Luke14:16 Ago kilenji
Luke14:17 ak kiiyokto otwogindennyi eng’ saitab amitwogik
Luke14:18 Ak kotoi tugul eng’ maget agenge komwa kit ne karany. Kilenji chito ne bo tai
Luke14:19 Kole age
Luke14:20 Kole age
Luke14:21 Konyo anyun otwogindonoto
Luke14:22 Ak kile otwogindonoto

Luke14:24 Amu amwawok ale
Luke14:25 Ak kiba ak inendet tuiyosiek che chang’: ak kiwelelgei inendet ak kolenji
Luke14:26 Ngo nyonja chi
Luke14:27 Ak chi age tugul ne maibei kimurtoiyondennyi
Luke14:28 Amu ng’o eng’ okwek
Luke14:29 Si ma ye kagotonon lumeiywot
Luke14:30 kole
Luke14:31 Anan ng’o laitoriat ne wendi kobaregei ak laitoriat age
Luke14:32 Anan
Luke14:33 Noto anyun
Luke14:34 Miachen munyuk: ago ngo kagogesgei anyinyindanyi
Luke14:35 Ma kotilei kiy eng’ emet anan eng’ kapng’atat: kilaktoi. Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoe
Luke15:1 Ak kirikyi inendet taagikab aisurut tugul ak kiptengeginik si kobiit kogas inendet.
Luke15:2 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’so Parisaik ak sirik
Luke15:3 Ak kimwachi ichek kalewenoni
Luke15:4 Ng’o chi eng’ okwek
Luke15:5 Ak ye kigonyor
Luke15:6 Ak ye kagoit ga
Luke15:7 Amwawok ale
Luke15:8 Ng’o kobogoriot ne tinyei fedaisiek taman
Luke15:9 Ak ye kagonyor
Luke15:10 U noto anyun
Luke15:11 Ak kimwa kole
Luke15:12 ak kilenji werit ne ming’in kwandanyi
Luke15:13 Ak kingobata betusiek che matia koyum weroto ming’in tugukyik tugul
Luke15:14 Ak kingo kagogesta tugul
Luke15:15 Ak kiwa kogakta chito age ne bo emonoto; ak kiiyokto kwo koyaga torok eng’ mbaret.
Luke15:16 Ak kimachei mising’ kole kobiyo metetek che kiamei torok: amu ma igochi chi kiy.
Luke15:17 Ak kingobwat
Luke15:18 Ang’eete ak awe oldab baba
Luke15:19 ma ko nyoljina kota keguurena wering’ung’: ingaek ko u age eng’ otwogiguk.
Luke15:20 King’eet anyun kwo oldab kwandanyi. Ago
Luke15:21 Ak kilenji werit
Luke15:22 Ago kilenji kwanda otwogikyik
Luke15:23 ak ogetu moita ne nerat
Luke15:24 amu werinnyu ni
Luke15:25 Ak kimi werinnyi ne o mbar: ak kingorik ye negit got
Luke15:26 Ak kiguur age eng’ otwogik
Luke15:27 Ak kilenji
Luke15:28 Ago kinerech
Luke15:29 Ago kiwolji kwandanyi kolenji
Luke15:30 ago ye kangonyo weritang’ung’et
Luke15:31 Ak kilenji
Luke15:32 Ago kanyolu keboiboitu ak kigasge: amu kiga kome weri otupche
Luke16:1 Ak kilenji inendet alamalyennyi kogeny
Luke16:2 Ak kiguur inendet kolenji
Luke16:3 Ak kile ribindonoto eng’ muguleldanyi
Luke16:4 Kaanai kit ne ayae
Luke16:5 Ak kingoguur age tugul eng’ besenikab kiptaiyandennyi
Luke16:6 Kole
Luke16:7 Yeityo kolenji age
Luke16:8 Ak kiichoi kiptaiyandennyi otwogindonoto kima ko bo imanda amu kayai eng’ ng’omnatet: amu ng’omen werikab ng’onyuni eng’ ibindanywa kosiir werikab lapkeiyet.
Luke16:9 Ak amwawok ale
Luke16:10 Inendet ne kiyani eng’ che ng’ering’
Luke16:11 U noto anyun
Luke16:12 Ak ngo kimata oegu che kiyani eng’ tugukab chito age
Luke16:13 Ma mi otwogindet ne imuchi koot kiptainik aeng’: amu tos wech age
Luke16:14 Ak kigas Parisaik tuguchuto tugul. Kichamei siling’isiek icheget
Luke16:15 Ak kilenji
Luke16:16 Kitebi Ng’atutik ak maotik agoi koit Johana: koboch betunoto keamdoi logoiywek che miach che bo bounatetab Jehovah
Luke16:17 Ago nyamnyum kosiirto kipsengwet ak ng’ony
Luke16:18 Age tugul ne onei osotiondennyi
Luke16:19 Ak kimi chi anum ne ki magorio ne kiilaachi ngoroik che arusen ne birir
Luke16:20 ak kimi kibanania ne kigiguure Lasaro ne kigimogoni eng’ kurgennyi
Luke16:21 ak kimachei kebae tuguk che ibutos eng’ mesetab magoriondonoto; ee
Luke16:22 Ak kime kibananiandanato betut age
Luke16:23 Ak ye kimi oldab che kigobek konyal barak
Luke16:24 Ak kiite kole
Luke16:25 Ago kile Abraham
Luke16:26 Ak ne siirei chu tugul
Luke16:27 Ak kile
Luke16:28 amu atinye che kitupche mut; kwo koteechi ichek
Luke16:29 Ak kilenji Abraham
Luke16:30 Ago kile
Luke16:31 Ak kilenji
Luke17:1 Kilenji alamalyennyi anyun
Luke17:2 Kita kaigai eng’ inendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitab bai ne o ak kewirji nyanjet
Luke17:3 Oripge: ngochiliilun ne otupche
Luke17:4 Ak ngo chalwogenjin konyil tisab eng’ betut agenge
Luke17:5 Ak kilenji che kiyoktoi Kiptaiyat
Luke17:6 Ak kile Kiptaiyat
Luke17:7 Ago mi ng’o eng’ okwek ne tinyei otwogindet ne ibatisiei anan ne iyagi kechirek
Luke17:8 Tos ma kaigai kolenji inendet
Luke17:9 Tos weekyin otwogindonoto kongoi amu kayai tuguk che kaga king’at?
Luke17:10 U noto tun ak okwek
Luke17:11 Ak ye kimi oret kowendi Jerusalem
Luke17:12 Ak kingomong’ji nganaset age
Luke17:13 ak kiwaach kole
Luke17:14 Ak kingogeer ichek
Luke17:15 Ak kingogeer age eng’ ichek kole kagosob
Luke17:16 ak kiibutyi kelyekyik kogochi kongoi; ak ki Samarindet chichoto.
Luke17:17 Ak kiwol Jesu kole
Luke17:18 Tos ma biit agot agenge ne kaweek kogochi kalosunet Jehovah
Luke17:19 Ak kolenji inendet
Luke17:20 Ak kingoteebe Parisaik kole nyonei au bounatetab Jehovah
Luke17:21 ama kimwaei kele
Luke17:22 Ak kilenji alamalyennyi
Luke17:23 Ak tun lenjinok
Luke17:24 amu u kalyelet
Luke17:25 Ago kanyol konyalil eng’ tuguk che chang’ ak koesio inendet ibini.
Luke17:26 Ak ko u ole kibiitunda eng’ betusiekab Noa
Luke17:27 Kiamisiei
Luke17:28 U noto agine
Luke17:29 ago eng’ betut ne kimanda Lot eng’ Sodom korobon mat ak koik che laldos che kibunu kipsengwet
Luke17:30 u noto eng’ betut ne kiboru Weritab chi.
Luke17:31 Eng’ betunoto
Luke17:32 Obwat osotiotab Lot.
Luke17:33 Age tugul ne cheng’ei kosor sobondanyi kobeeti: ak age tugul ne ibeeti sobondanyi koribei.

Luke17:36 Tun mi bik aeng’u mbar: kimuti age
Luke17:37 Ak kiwolji inendet kolenji

Luke20:1 Ak ye kiineti bik eng’ betut age eng’ hekalut
Luke20:2 ak kimwachi inendet kolenji
Luke20:3 Ak kiwolji kolenji
Luke20:4 Kabatisanetab Johana ko kibunu kipsengwet
Luke20:5 Ak king’alaljigei ichegei
Luke20:6 Ago ngot kemwa kele
Luke20:7 Ak kiwol kole
Luke20:8 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek
Luke20:9 Ak kitoi komwachi bik kalewenoni
Luke20:10 Ak kingoit betut koyokyi otwogindet meechoto
Luke20:11 Ak kiiyokto kogeny otwogindet age: ak kibir noto agine
Luke20:12 Ak kiiyokto kogeny ne bo somok: ak kiiguoten agine ak kotoorji sang’.
Luke20:13 Ak kile chitab kobo mbaret
Luke20:14 Ago ye kingogeer meek inendet
Luke20:15 Ak kitoorta komanda eng’ mbaretab sabibuk ak kobar. Itoi nee anyun chitab kobo mbaret bichoto?
Luke20:16 Nyonei anyun inendet ak kobar meechoto tugul
Luke20:17 Ak kiichiilji kong’ ichek ak kole
Luke20:18 Ak chi age tugul ne ibutyin koyata koilei konyaknyaksei; ak inendet ne ibutyin koyata
Luke20:19 Ak kicheng’ sirik ak tisiik che eechen konam inendet eng’ sainato; ak kiiywei ichek bik: amu kinai kole mwaei kalewenoni agobo ichek.

Luke20:21 Ak kiteebe inendet kole
Luke20:22 Tos chamdoi ng’atutik kigochi kodi Kaisari
Luke20:23 Ago kinai ng’alsenywa
Luke20:24 Oborua denarit
Luke20:25 Ak kilenji ichek
Luke20:26 Ak kima imuch koname mwaonato eng’ taitab bik; ak kikwong’io eng’ wolunennyi
Luke20:27 Ak kibwanji inendet Sadukaik alak
Luke20:28 kole
Luke20:29 Kimi anyun werik tisabu che kitupcho: ak kiitunis ne bo tai
Luke20:30 ak kiindi ne bo aeng’;
Luke20:31 ak u noto ne bo somok; ak kiigei noto tugul ko tisab
Luke20:32 Ak kingobata kome agine kobogoriondonoto.
Luke20:33 Tun eng’ ng’eetyet anyun koegu osotiotab ng’o eng’ ichek? Amu kiitun ichek tugul ko tisab.
Luke20:34 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek
Luke20:35 ago che kiityin kele nyoljin konyor betusiechoto bwanei
Luke20:36 amu ma komuchi kobek agoi: amu kergeitu ak malaikaisiek; ak icheget ko werikab Jehovah
Luke20:37 Ago ng’eetos che kigobek
Luke20:38 Inendet ko ma Jehovah ne bo che kigobek

Luke20:40 Amu kimata kogany ichek koteebe inendet teebut age tugul kogeny.

Luke20:42 Amu kimwa Daudi inendet eng’ bukuitab Tienwogikab Kalosunet
Luke20:43 Agoi ayai buniguk koek ng’echeretab kelyeguk.

Luke20:45 Ak kimwachi alamalyennyi kogasei bik tugul kolenji

Luke21:1 Ak kiyot met
Luke21:2 Ak kigeer mosoget age ne kibanania kondoi sendeisiek aeng’ che u kebebertab pesaiyat.

Luke21:4 amu kagonde chu tugul eng’ chang’indanywa ole kindoi kagochinoik; ago kagonde inendet eng’ banandanyi tugul che tinyei
Luke21:5 Ak kingota kong’alali alak agobo hekalut
Luke21:6 Eng’ tuguchu ogeere
Luke21:7 Ak kiteebe
Luke21:8 Ak kile
Luke21:9 Ak ye tun ogas agobo lugosiek ak chemarget
Luke21:10 Kolenji anyun ichek
Luke21:11 ak kobiit botanosiek che eechen che bo ng’ony
Luke21:12 Ago ye tom kobiit chuto
Luke21:13 Egu baornatet eng’ okwek.
Luke21:14 Oegu che begechinotin eng’ mugulelwekwok
Luke21:15 amu agonok kutit ak ng’omnatet
Luke21:16 Ak kong’wektak sigikwok
Luke21:17 Ak kowechok bik tugul agobo kainennyu.
Luke21:18 Ak mabetei sumeiyot agenge ne bo metowekwok.
Luke21:19 Ak eng’ muitaeng’wong’ onyoru sobonwekwok.
Luke21:20 Ak ye tun ogeer lugosiek koyiem Jerusalem
Luke21:21 Ingomwechi anyun chi mi Judea tulonok; ak ingomanda che mi kwenutab nganasanato; ak amat kota koba orit ichek che mi emonoto.
Luke21:22 Amu chuto ko betusiekab mugetut
Luke21:23 Bwa eng’ ichek che chio ak che reritos eng’ besiosiechoto! Amu biitu bichiindo ne o eng’ ng’ony
Luke21:24 Ak kobutyo ichek eng’ ng’atibindab rotwetab chok
Luke21:25 Ak kobiit kaborunoik eng’ asista ak eng’ arawet ak eng’ kecheik; ak kobiit eng’ ng’ony bichiindab bororiosiek
Luke21:26 ak kobek mugulelwekab bik amu kaiyweisiet
Luke21:27 Ak eng’ betunoto kogeer anyun Weritab chi konyonei eng’ boldet koboto kimnatet ak lilindo ne o.

Luke21:29 Ak kimwachi ichek kalewenet; kole
Luke21:30 ye ing’atyo ogeere ak onae okwek ole

Luke21:33 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng’ony: ago magoi siirto ng’alekyuk.

Luke21:35 amu u noto tun nyonjin bik tugul che menyei ng’ony komugul.
Luke21:36 Ago oripge eng’ betut age tugul
Luke21:37 Ak kiinetisiei eng’ hekalut betut age tugul; ak kimandoi kemout age tugul
Luke21:38 Ak kimusyin bik tugul inendet eng’ hekalut

Luke23:2 Ak kitoi anyun kotaam inendet
Luke23:3 Ak kiteebe inendet Pilato

Luke23:5 Ago kiisimji mising’
Luke23:6 Ago kingogas Pilato ng’olyondonoto
Luke23:7 Ak kingonai kole bo bounatet ne bo Herod
Luke23:8 Kingogeer Herod Jesu
Luke23:9 Ak kiteepse inendet eng’ ng’alek che chang’; ago ma wolji kiy.
Luke23:10 Ak kitonondos tisiik che eechen ak sirik
Luke23:11 Ak kiiming’in inendet Herod ak askarikyik
Luke23:12 Ak kiek choronoi Herod ak Pilato eng’ betunoto: amu kita kosurtos ichegei eng’ tai.
Luke23:13 Kiguur anyun Pilato tisiik che eechen ak bounik koboto bik kobwa tugul
Luke23:14 ak kilenji ichek
Luke23:15 achicha
Luke23:16 Noto anyun

Luke23:19 ne kiga kitoorji korgoret
Luke23:20 Ak king’alalji Pilato icheget kogeny
Luke23:21 ago kibolyo ichek
Luke23:22 Ak kimwachi ichek ne bo somok
Luke23:23 Ago kites kobolyo mising’
Luke23:24 Ak kitil anyun Pilato kiruoget koyaak ko u ye kimach ichek.
Luke23:25 Ak kiitiach inendet ne kiga kitoorji korgoret agobo chaamset ak rumisiet

Luke23:27 Ak kiisubi tuiyet ne o ne bo bik
Luke23:28 Ago kiweleljigei Jesu ichek kolenji

Luke23:37 kolen

Luke23:39 Ak kichurachur inendet age eng’ kiptengeginichoto kiga kigartat
Luke23:40 Ago kiwol age
Luke23:41 Ago bo iman nenyo; amu kagigonech ko u boisionikyok: ago ma yai chichi kiy ne ma nyolu.
Luke23:42 Ak kile
Luke23:43 Ak kilenji Jesu inendet
Luke23:44 Ak ki olo bo sait lo
Luke23:45 ak kima kota koluu asista: ak kigerer kwenutab anget ne kiga kioiye ole tilil.
Luke23:46 Ak kitwek Jesu eng’ kutit ne o
Luke23:47 Ak kingogeer kiptaiyatab bogol tuguk che kayaagis
Luke23:48 Ak kingogeer tuguk che kayaagis tuiyosiek tugul che kiga koyumgei si korat setio
Luke23:49 Ak kitonondos eng’ ye loo tugul che kiingengei

John1:1 Eng’ taunet ko kimi Ng’olyondet
John1:2 Kimi inendet ak Jehovah eng’ taunet.

John1:4 Kimi sobondo eng’ inendet; ak ki lapkeiyetab bik sobonato.

John6:56 Inendet ne amei bortanyu ak koeei korotikyuk komenya
John6:57 Ko u ye kiiyokwa Kwanda ne sobei
John6:58 Ni makatiandanato ne kichorgei eng’ kipsengwet: ma ko u ye kiam kwanisiek ak kobek: inendet ne amei makatiandani kosobei koigeny.

John6:61 Ago kinai Jesu eng’ orinnyi kole

John6:63 Tamirmiriet ne igoitoi sobondo; matilei kiy borto: tamirmiriet ak sobondo ng’alek che kaamwawok.
John6:64 Ago mitei alak eng’ okwek che maiyani. Amu kinai Jesu koboch taunet icheget che maiyani

John7:1 Ak kingobata tuguchu kowendot Jesu eng’ Galili: amu ma cham kowendot eng’ Judea
John7:2 Ak kiga rik igortab Yahudik
John7:3 Kilenji anyun tupchosiekyik
John7:4 Amu mami chi ne yaei kiy eng’ ung’ot
John7:5 Amu agot tupchosiekyik agichek
John7:6 Kolenji anyun Jesu ichek
John7:7 Maimuchi ng’ony kowechok; ago wecha ane
John7:8 Otogosyi okwek igorta: tom atogosyini ane igorita; amu tom kosulda betunnyu.
John7:9 Ak kingo kagomwachi tuguchuto
John7:10 Ago ye kingotogosta tupchosiekyik igorta
John7:11 Kicheng’ anyun Yahudik inendet eng’ igorta
John7:12 Ak kimi kang’unyng’unyet ne o eng’ tuiyosiek agobo inendet: amu kile alak
John7:13 Ago ma mwa chi ng’olyo kotook agobo inendet amu kiiywei Yahudik.
John7:14 Ago ye kingo kagoit kwenutab igorta kotogosta Jesu kwo hekalut
John7:15 Kokwong’io anyun Yahudik kole
John7:16 Kowolji anyun Jesu kolenji
John7:17 Ngo machei chi age tugul koyai magetab Jehovah
John7:18 Inendet ne mwaei che chechik inegei kocheng’ei torornatennyi: ago ne cheng’ei torornatetab ne kiiyok inendet ko bo iman
John7:19 Tos kima konok Musa Ng’atutiet
John7:20 Kowol tuiyet
John7:21 Kowolji Jesu kolenji
John7:22 Kigonok Musa kamuratanet amu noto (ago ma bo Musa
John7:23 Ngeyatitoi chi eng’ betutab sabato
John7:24 Amoruoch ko u ye ogeere
John7:25 Kimwa alak eng’ choto bo Jerusalem kole
John7:26 Ak ogeero
John7:27 Ago kingen ole bunu chichi: ago ye nyo Kristo
John7:28 King’alal anyun Jesu eng’ kutit ne o eng’ hekalut
John7:29 Angen inendet; amu abunu inendet
