John16:33 Kaamwawok tuguchu
John17:1 Kimwa Jesu ng’alechu; ak konyal kipsengwet
John17:2 ko u ye kiigochi inendet kimnatet koboi bik tugul
John17:3 Ak ni sobondab koigeny
John17:4 Kiatororin eng’ ng’ony
John17:5 Ak nguno
John17:6 Kiaborji kaineng’ung’ bik che kiigona eng’ ng’ony: ki cheguk
John17:7 Kagonai nguno kole bunun tuguk tugul che kiigona;
John17:8 amu kiagochi ichek ng’alek che kiigona ak kigotaach
John17:9 Asae agobo ichek: masae agobo ng’ony
John17:10 ak tuguk tugul chechuk ko cheguk
John17:11 Ak ma amite ng’ony
John17:12 Kiarib eng’ kaineng’ung’ ichek che kiigona
John17:13 Ak kanyonjin nguno; ak amwae tuguchu eng’ ng’ony
John17:14 Kiagochi ng’olyondeng’ung’; ak kawech ng’ony ichek
John17:15 Masae ale imut ichek eng’ ng’ony
John17:16 Ma bo ng’ony ichek
John17:17 Itilil ichek eng’ imanit: imanit ng’olyondeng’ung’.
John17:18 Ko u ye kiiyokwa anyo ng’ony
John17:19 Ak atabanige agobo ichek si kobiit kitaban ichek eng’ imanit.
John17:20 Amasae agobo chu kityo
John17:21 si kobiit koek ichek tugul agenge; ko u ye imi inye Baba
John17:22 Ak kaagochi ichek torornatet ne kiigona; si kobiit koek agenge ko u ye ki agenge achek;
John17:23 ane eng’ ichek
John17:24 Baba
John17:25 Ee Baba ne bo imanda
John17:26 ak kiang’ang’ji ichek kaineng’ung’
John18:1 Ye kingo kagomwa Jesu ng’alechu
John18:2 Ak kiingen koronoto Judas agine
John18:3 Ak kingo kagonyor Judas lugetab askarik
John18:4 Kwo anyun Jesu
John18:5 Kowolji kolenji
John18:6 Ye kingomwachi anyun kole
John18:7 Kiteebe anyun ichek kogeny
John18:8 Kowol Jesu
John18:9 si kosulda ng’olyot ne kimwa kole
John18:10 King’us anyun Simon Petero rotwetab chok ne kitinyei
John18:11 Kolenji Jesu anyun Petero
John18:12 Konam anyun luget ak kiptaiyat ne o
John18:13 ak komutyi Anas korok; amu ki kabyugoit ne bo Kaiapa
John18:14 Kaiapa noto ne kiiborji Yahudik kole
John18:15 Kiisub anyun Simon Petero Jesu
John18:16 ago kitononi Petero eng’ sang’ ye negit kurget. Kimanda anyun chichoto
John18:17 Kolenji anyun chepto ne kiribei kurget Petero
John18:18 Ak kitonondos eng’ yoto otwogik ak kiptainik
John18:19 Kiteebe anyun tisiindet ne o Jesu agobo alamalyennyi ak konetisiennyi.
John18:20 Kowolji Jesu kolenji
John18:21 Amu nee si iteebena? Teebe ichek che kigas kit ne kiamwachi ichek: keero
John18:22 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko u nito
John18:23 Kowolji Jesu kolenji
John18:24 Kiiyokto anyun Anas inendet ko ratat kwo oldab Kaiapa
John18:25 Ak kitononi Simon Petero koyue mat. Kolenji anyun ichek inendet
John18:26 Kole otwogindet age ne bo tisiindet ne o ne ki tilionut ak chichoto kiebei Petero itinnyi
John18:27 Kotiiyo anyun Petero kogeny; ak eng’ sainato kote kipsoiywet.
John18:28 Kiimut Jesu anyun kong’eete gab Kaiapa kwo Praitorium: ak kita ko karon mising’; ak maba icheget Praitorium orit
John18:29 Kimanda Pilato anyun kwo ole mi ichek
John18:30 Kowolji kolenji
John18:31 Kolenji Pilato ichek anyun
John18:32 si kobiit kosulda ng’olyotab Jesu
John18:33 Kiwa anyun kogeny Pilato Praitorium orit
John18:34 Kowolji Jesu kolenji
John18:35 Kowol Pilato kole
John18:36 Kowol Jesu
John18:37 Kolenji anyun Pilato inendet
John18:38 Kolenji Pilato
John18:39 Ago otinye biteet
John18:40 Kobolyo anyun kogeny
John19:1 Kinam anyun Pilato Jesu
John19:2 Ak kitaa askarik ngatiet ne bo katok
John19:3 ak kobwa ole mi inendet kole
John19:4 Ak kimanda Pilato kogeny
John19:5 Komong’ Jesu anyun konyo sang’
John19:6 Ye kingogeer anyun inendet tisiik che eechen ak kiptainik
John19:7 Kowolji Yahudik kolenji
John19:8 Ye kingogas anyun Pilato mwaonato
John19:9 ak kiwa Praitorium orit kogeny
John19:10 Kolenji Pilato anyun inendet
John19:11 Kowolji Jesu kolenji
John19:12 Koboch yoto kocheng’ Pilato kotiach inendet: ago kibolyo Yahudik
John19:13 Ye kingogas anyun Pilato ng’alechuto
John19:14 Ki Chobetab paska betunoto: ak ki olo bo sait lo. Ak kilenji Yahudik
John19:15 Kobolyo bichoto
John19:16 Kogoito anyun Pilato inendet kigartat. Konam anyun ichek Jesu ak komut:
John19:17 ak komanda
John19:18 ole kiigartate ichek inendet
John19:19 Ak kisir anyun Pilato siret
John19:20 Kosoman anyun Yahudik che chang’ sironito: amu ki negite nganaset ole kigigartate Jesu: ak kigisir eng’ kutitab Hebranik
John19:21 Kolenji anyun tisiik che eechen che bo Yahudik Pilato
John19:22 Kowol Pilato kole
John19:23 Ye kingo kagogartat anyun askarik Jesu
John19:24 Kolenjigei anyun ichegei
John19:25 Ago kitonondos eng’ ye negite kimurtoiyotab Jesu kamet
John19:26 Ye kingogeer Jesu anyun kamet
John19:27 Kolenji anyun noto ne bo alamalyet
John19:28 Kingobata choto
John19:29 Kiga kinde yoto teret ne nyiitat siki: konyiit anyun sibonjit siki ak koyogochine husop
John19:30 Ye kingo kagotaach Jesu siki
John19:31 Amu ki Chobet ak kima kemakyin muswek kotebe kimurtoiyot eng’ sabato (amu ki o betunoto bo sabato)
John19:32 Kobwa anyun askarik
John19:33 Ago ye kingobwa ye mi Jesu
John19:34 ago kitoore ng’otit karastanyi age eng’ askarik
John19:35 Ak kibaorian inendet ne kigeer
John19:36 Kiyaak tuguchu
John19:37 Ak kogeny mwaei sirutiet age kole
John19:38 Ak kingobata tuguchu
John19:39 Ak kinyo agine Nikodemo
John19:40 Kisut anyun mustab Jesu
John19:41 Kimi mbaret ole kigigartate inendet; ak kimi mbaranato kererit ne leel ne kitom ketupchi chi.
John19:42 Kiinde anyun Jesu oloto amu betutab Chobetab Yahudik
John20:1 Kinyo kererit Maria Magdalene
John20:2 Kolabat kot koit ole mi Simon Petero
John20:3 Koba anyun Petero
John20:4 Kiruai tuwai kibagenge: ak kilabat nin age ne bo alamalyet kondoe Petero
John20:5 ak kingong’uruk kogeer orit
John20:6 Konyo anyun Simon Petero agine
John20:7 ago anget ne kimitei metinnyi ko kima komi
John20:8 Kiwa orit agine noto age ne bo alamalyet ne kiga sib koit kererit
John20:9 Amu kitom konai sirutiet ne kile
John20:10 Koba ga anyun kogeny choto bo alamalyet.
John20:11 Ago kitononi Maria eng’ kererit sang’
John20:12 ak kigeer malaikaisiek aeng’ che leelach ngoroik kotebyei ng’ony
John20:13 Ak kilenji
John20:14 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko u noto
John20:15 Kolenji Jesu
John20:16 Kolenji Jesu
John20:17 Kolenji Jesu
John20:18 Konyo Maria Magdalene kolenji alamalyet
John20:19 Ak ye kingoek lagat eng’ betunoto bo tai ne bo wigit
John20:20 Ak ye kingo kagomwa nito
John20:21 Kolenji Jesu anyun kogeny
John20:22 Ak ye kingo kagomwa nito
John20:23 bik alak tugul che onyochini kaat tengekwogikwak
John20:24 Ago kima komi Tomas ne kigiguure Didumo
John20:25 Kolenji anyun chun alage che bo alamalyet
John20:26 Ak kingobata betusiek sisiitu ko kimi go alamalyennyi kogeny
John20:27 Kolenji Tomas
John20:28 Kowolji Tomas kolenji
John20:29 Kolenji Jesu inendet
John20:30 Kiyai Jesu kaborunoik alak che chang’ eng’ taitab alamalyet che ma sirotin eng’ bukuini:
John20:31 ago kigisir chu
John21:1 Kingobata tuguchu koborjigei Jesu kogeny alamalyet eng’ araraita ne bo Tiberia; kiiborjigei ko u ni.
John21:2 Kimi tugul
John21:3 Kolenji Simon Petero
John21:4 Ago ye kimachei koeech
John21:5 Kolenji Jesu anyun
John21:6 Ak kilenji ichek
John21:7 Komwachi age ne bo alamalyet
John21:8 Ago kibwa chun alage che bo alamalyet kobunu moinget ne ming’in (amu kima ko looen eng’ ngegut
John21:9 Noto anyun
John21:10 Kolenji Jesu
John21:11 Kolany Simon Petero moinget
John21:12 Kolenji Jesu ichek
John21:13 Konyo anyun Jesu ak konam makatiat
John21:14 Nito ko ne bo somok koborjingei Jesu alamalyet
John21:15 Ye kingo kagoamis anyun
John21:16 Kolenji kogeny ne bo aeng’ Simon
John21:17 Kolenji ne bo somok
John21:18 Amwaun
John21:19 Komwa ni
John21:20 Kowelelgei Petero
John21:21 Kingogeer Petero inendet
John21:22 Kolenji Jesu
John21:23 Kiyom anyun ng’olyondoni tupchosiek
John21:24 Nito anyun ko noto bo alamalyet ne baorianjin tuguchu
John21:25 Ak mi kogeny tuguk alak che chang’ che kiyai Jesu
Acts1:1 Ee Teopilo
Acts1:2 agoi betut ne kigimuti kwo barak
Acts1:3 icheget che kiiborjigei kosobei ye kingobata nyalildanyi
Acts1:4 ak
Acts1:5 amu kiibatisanis Johana iman eng’ beek; ago kibatisanok eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil kotom kogesgei betusiek che chang’.
Acts1:6 Noto anyun
Acts1:7 Kolenji ichek
Acts1:8 Ago otaache kamuktaet
Acts1:9 Ak ye kingo kagomwa tuguchuto
Acts1:10 Ak ye kingota konyali kipsengwet kochiiljin kong’ kota kowendi
Acts1:11 che kimwa agichek
Acts1:12 Koweek anyun koba Jerusalem kobunu tulwet ne kiguure tulwetab Emitik
Acts1:13 Ye kingo kagoba go
Acts1:14 Kitebi chu tugul eng’ kabwatet agenge eng’ kagiiletab ge ne bo saet
Acts1:15 Ak kitonon Petero eng’ kwenutab che tupcho eng’ betusiechoto (ki chang’ bik che kiga tuiyo
Acts1:16 Che kitupche
Acts1:17 Amu kigiititech
Acts1:18 Ak kinyor chichi mbaret eng’ melektab tengektanyi; ak kingobut kosieb mo
Acts1:19 Ak kinaak ng’olyondonoto eng’ tugul che menyei Jerusalem; kot keguure mbaranato Akeldama eng’ kutinywa
Acts1:20 Amu sirat eng’ bukuit ne bo Tienwogikab Kalosunet
Acts1:21 Ingobiit age eng’ bik che kicham kebendoti tugul eng’ betusiek tugul ye kicham komong’u Kiptaiyat Jesu ak komandoi eng’ kwenunnyo
Acts1:22 kotaune kabatisanetab Johana
Acts1:23 Ak kilewen bik aeng’
Acts1:24 Ak kisa
Acts1:25 si kobiit konam kebeberta eng’ boisioni ak kayoktaoni
Acts1:26 Ak kiser barbarek agobo ichek; ak kiibutyi barbariat Matia; ak kigiitito che kiyoktoi taman ak agenge.
Acts2:1 Ak kingoitei betutab Pentekost
Acts2:2 Ak kimong’ eng’ sainato cheet ne bunu kipsengwet ko u usonet ne usei eng’ kimnatet ne o
Acts2:3 Ak kimong’ji ng’elyebwek che pcheotin
Acts2:4 Ak kinyi ichek tugul Tamirmiriet ne Tilil
Acts2:5 Ak kimi Yahudik che kimenyei Jerusalem
Acts2:6 Ak kingogas cheonoto
Acts2:7 Ak kitang’any tugul ak kokwong’io
Acts2:8 Ak katepto ano si kegas achek chi tugul eng’ kutinnyo
Acts2:9 Partik ak Medoik ak Elamik
Acts2:10 ak Prugia ak Pampulia
Acts2:11 Kretik ak Marabuk
Acts2:12 Ak kitang’any tugul
Acts2:13 Ago kichombil alak kole
Acts2:14 Ago kitonon Petero koboto taman ak aeng’
Acts2:15 Amu ma bogityo bichu
Acts2:16 ago nito ne kimwaei maotiot Joel; kole
Acts2:17 Mwaei Jehovah kole
Acts2:18 Arong’jini Tamirmiriennyu eng’ betusiechoto; Ee
Acts2:19 Ak abarte kwong’utik eng’ kipsengwet barak
Acts2:20 Kiwalei asista koek mesundeito
Acts2:21 Ak tun kisoru age tugul ne kuurei kainetab Kiptaiyat.
Acts2:22 Okwek bikab Israel
Acts2:23 inendet ne kiigoito Jehovah eng’ begechinetab ng’olyondennyi ak naet ne kiga kechob eng’ tai
Acts2:24 inendet ne kiing’eet Jehovah ko kagotiach eng’ ng’wanindo ne bo meet: amu kima komuchi meet konam inendet.
Acts2:25 Amu kimwa Daudi agobo inendet
Acts2:26 Amu noto anyun kiigasgei muguleldanyu
Acts2:27 Amu mebagakyini sobondanyu oldab che kigobek
Acts2:28 Kiigona anai ortinwekab sobondo; Inyiitwa boiboiyet eng’ taing’ung’.
Acts2:29 Che kitupche
Acts2:30 Ak amu kimaotio
Acts2:31 kingogeer nito anyun kong’alal agobo ng’eetyetab Kristo kole
Acts2:32 Kiing’eet Jehovah Jesu nito
Acts2:33 Amu itororot inendet eng’ eutab tai ne bo Jehovah
Acts2:34 Amu kima togosta Daudi kipsengwetisiek: ago kimwa inendet kole
Acts2:35 Agoi ayai buniguk koek ng’echeretab kelyeguk.
Acts2:36 Ingonai anyun komie got komugul ne bo Israel
Acts2:37 Kingogas anyun nito
Acts2:38 Kolenji Petero ichek
Acts2:39 Amu neng’wong’ kayomisoni
Acts2:40 Ak kibaorian eng’ ng’alek alak che chang’
Acts2:41 Kigibatisan anyun icheget che kitaach ng’olyondennyi: ak kigitesyi ichek betunoto bik olo bo elfusiek somok.
Acts2:42 Ak kiigiiljingei ichek tugul konetisietab che kiyoktoi ak yamdaet
Acts2:43 Ak kinyor chi tugul kaiyweisiet: ak kiyaak kwong’utik che chang’ ak kaborunoik eng’ che kiyoktoi.
Acts2:44 Ak kimi tugul kibagenge che kiga koyan
Acts2:45 ak kialda mbarenikwak ak tuguk alak che kitinyei ak kopchechi ichek tugul che te che kinyalili chi age tugul.
Acts2:46 Ak kimi hekalut betut age tugul kotebyei eng’ kabwatet agenge
Acts2:47 kolosu Jehovah
Acts3:1 Ak kitogostoi Petero ak Johana hekalut eng’ sait ne bo saet
Acts3:2 Ak kigiganabi chito ne ki solomwo koboch komi moetab kamet
Acts3:3 ko ye kingogeer inendet Petero ak Johana komachei koba hekalut orit
Acts3:4 Ak kiichiilji kong’ Petero inendet koboto Johana
Acts3:5 Ak kiinyal inendet ichek
Acts3:6 Ago kile Petero
Acts3:7 Konam anyun inendet eut ne bo tai
Acts3:8 King’eet kochokyi
Acts3:9 Ak kigeer bik tugul inendet kowendoti ak kolosu Jehovah:
Acts3:10 ak kinai icheget kole
Acts3:11 Ak kingota konamoti chichoto Petero ak Johana
Acts3:12 Ak ye kingogeer Petero
Acts3:13 Jehovah ne bo Abraham
Acts3:14 Ago kiotiiye okwek Inendet ne Tilil ak ko bo Imanda
Acts3:15 ak kiobar Ne O ne bo sobondo; ne kiing’eet Jehovah eng’ che kibek; ki baorinikab noto achek.
Acts3:16 Ak kagogochi kainennyi chichi kimnatet
Acts3:17 Ak nguno anyun
Acts3:18 Ago tuguk che kiga kobor Jehovah eng’ tai eng’ kutuswekab maotik tugul
Acts3:19 Osigu anyun ak owalage
Acts3:20 si koyok Kristo ne kigilewenwok
Acts3:21 ne kanyol kotaach kipsengwet agoi betusiek che kiwale tuguk tugul komiagitu
Acts3:22 Kimwa Musa iman
Acts3:23 Ak tun king’emei kiwong’u eng’ kwenutab bik
Acts3:24 Ee
Acts3:25 O werikab maotik
Acts3:26 Ak ye kingo kagong’eet Jehovah Kiboitiondennyi
Acts4:1 Ak kingota kong’alaljin ichek bik
Acts4:2 kotinyei neregek amu kiinet bik ak koamda eng’ Jesu ng’eetyetab che kibek.
Acts4:3 Ak kinam icheget
Acts4:4 Ago kiiyan che chang’ eng’ ichek che kigas ng’olyot; ak kiek koitetab murenik olo bo elfusiek mut.
Acts4:5 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto koyumgei bounik ak boisiek ak sirik eng’ Jerusalem;
Acts4:6 ak Anas tisiindet ne o
Acts4:7 Ak kingo kagonde ichek kwenunywa
Acts4:8 Kingonyi anyun Petero Tamirmiriet ne Tilil
Acts4:9 ngemachei keginenech rani agobo boisiet ne mie ne kogiyachi chito ne nyalulat
Acts4:10 ingonaak anyun eng’ okwek tugul
Acts4:11 Inendet koita ne kiosas okwek teegik
Acts4:12 Ama mi yetunet eng’ chito age: amu mami kainet age eng’ kureretab kipsengwet
Acts4:13 Ak kingogeer nyiganatetab Petero ak Johana
Acts4:14 Ak kingogeer chito ne kogisoob kotononi koboto ichek
Acts4:15 Ago ye kingo kagong’at ichek komanda eng’ kapkiruok
Acts4:16 kole
Acts4:17 Ago si mata koiyestaat eng’ kwenutab bik
Acts4:18 Ak kiguur ichek
Acts4:19 Ago kiwolji Petero ak Johana ichek kolenji
Acts4:20 amu magimuchi kesisye kobate kemwa tuguk che kigegeer ak che kigegas.
Acts4:21 Ak kingo kagoger kong’ ichek kogeny
Acts4:22 Amu kisiirei artam kenyisiekab chichoto kiyaak eng’ inendet kwong’utionito bo kasoobet.
Acts4:23 Ak kingo kageunda
Acts4:24 Ak kingogas ichek komwachi Jehovah eng’ kutit ne o eng’ kabwatet agenge
Acts4:25 ne kiimwa eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil eng’ kutitab kwandanyo Daudi kiboitiondeng’ung’
Acts4:26 Kitetegei laitorinikab ng’ony
Acts4:27 amu iman kituitos eng’ nganasani Herod ak Pontio Pilato agine koboto Bororiosiek ak bikab Israel
Acts4:28 si koyai kit age tugul ne kisib kong’at eung’ung’ ak ng’omnateng’ung’ kole kosulda.
Acts4:29 Ak nguno anyun
Acts4:30 ye iitoi inye eung’ung’ isoobi bik; si koyaak kaborunoik ak kwong’utik eng’ kainetab Kiboitiondeng’ung’ ne Tilil
Acts4:31 Ak kingo kagosa
Acts4:32 Ak ki bo muguleldo agenge ak sobondo agenge tuiyet ne kiga koyan: ak ma mwa chi agot agenge kole
Acts4:33 Ak kibaorian che kiyoktoi eng’ kimnatet ne o agobo ng’eetyetab Kiptaiyat Jesu: ak kitebe mieindo ne o ichek tugul.
Acts4:34 Amu kima komi agot agenge eng’ kwenunywa ne kibanani kiy: amu tugul che kitinyei korotinwek anan gorik
Acts4:35 konde kelyekab che kiyoktoi: ak kigipchechi chi age tugul ne kinyalili.
Acts4:36 Ak kialda Josep mbaret ne kitinyei
Acts4:37 ak kiib siling’isiek konde kelyekab che kiyoktoi.
Acts5:1 Ago kialda chito age ne kigiguure Anania
Acts5:2 ak kiituuch kebebertab che kigialdae
Acts5:3 Ago kile Petero
Acts5:4 Kingota komi
Acts5:5 Ak kingogas Anania ng’alechu
Acts5:6 Ak king’eetyo murenik ak kotaae musto anget
Acts5:7 Ak ye ki negit kogesgei saisiek somogu
Acts5:8 Ak kiwolji Petero kolenji
Acts5:9 Ago kilenji Petero inendet
Acts5:10 Ak kiibutyi kelyekyik ngunoto
Acts5:11 Konyonji anyun kaiyweisiet ne o kaniset komugul
Acts5:12 Ak kiyaogis eng’ eunekab che kiyoktoi kaborunoik ak kwong’utik che chang’ eng’ kwenutab bik; ak kimi tugul eng’ kabwatet agenge eng’ keterut ne bo Solomon.
Acts5:13 Ago eng’ bik alak ko kimata kobiit chi ne kita kogany konamgei ak icheget; ago kiitoror bik ichek;
Acts5:14 ak kitesak kayanik eng’ Kiptaiyat kosiir
Acts5:15 kot komut ichek che miandos kobwa ortinwek
Acts5:16 Ak kiiyomogei tuiyet ne bunu nganasok che negite Jerusalem
Acts5:17 Ago kitonon tisiindet ne o
Acts5:18 ak kinam che kiyoktoi
Acts5:19 Ago kiyat malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat kurgotikab korgoret kemoi ak komut ichek komong’ sang’
Acts5:20 Oba
Acts5:21 Ak kingogas ko u noto
Acts5:22 Ago kingoit askarik korgoret ko manyor ichek: ak kiweektagei
Acts5:23 kole
Acts5:24 Ak kingogas ng’alechu kiptaiyatab hekalut ak tisiik che eechen
Acts5:25 Ak kinyo chi ak kolenji
Acts5:26 Kwo anyun kiptaiyat koboto askarik
Acts5:27 Ak kingo kagomut ichek kobwa
Acts5:28 kole
Acts5:29 Ago kiwol Petero ak che kiyoktoi kole
Acts5:30 Kiing’eet Jehovah ne bo kwanisiekyok Jesu
Acts5:31 Inendet ne kiitoror Jehovah eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai koek Ne O ago Yetindet
Acts5:32 Ak ki baorinik achek che bo tuguchu; ak Tamirmiriet ne Tilil agine
Acts5:33 Ak kingogas ichek nito
Acts5:34 Ago kitonon chito age eng’ kapkiruok
Acts5:35 Ak kilenji ichek
Acts5:36 Amu kingo tom koit betusiechu
Acts5:37 Kingobata chichoto kong’eet Judas ne bo Galili eng’ betusiek che bo sirisietab kainaikab bik
Acts5:38 Ara anyun
Acts5:39 ago ngot ko bo Jehovah
Acts5:40 Kocham anyun ng’alekyik: ak kingo kagoguur che kiyoktoi kobwa ole mi ichek
Acts5:41 Koba anyun eng’ taitab kapkiruok koboiboi amu kagiit kele nyoljin konyor katewerisiet agobo Kainanato.
Acts5:42 Ak kima sisyo eng’ betut age tugul konetis ak koamdoi eng’ hekalut ak eng’ gorik
Acts6:1 Eng’ betusiechoto anyun
Acts6:2 Koguur anyun tamanu ak aeng’ tuiyet ne bo alamalyet
Acts6:3 Ocheng’ anyun che kitupche bik tisab eng’ okwek che toogunotin kele miachen
Acts6:4 Ago si kigiiljige achek saet
Acts6:5 Kicham anyun tuiyet komugul ng’olyondonoto: ak kilewen Stepano
Acts6:6 kiinde choto anyun taitab che kiyoktoi: ak ye kingo kagosa
Acts6:7 Kitesak anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah; ak kotesak mising’ koitetab alamalyet eng’ Jerusalem; ak kogas it kayanet tuiyet ne o ne bo tisiik.
Acts6:8 Ak kinyiitat Stepano mieindo ak kamuget
Acts6:9 Ago king’eetyo alak che bo sunagogit ne kiguure ne bo Che Itiagotin
Acts6:10 Ak kima imuch ichek kogirinda ng’omnatet ak Tamirmiriet ne king’alale inendet.
Acts6:11 Kogaigai anyun bik komwa kole
Acts6:12 Kong’eetng’eet anyun bik konerekso ak boisiek
Acts6:13 ak konde baorinik che bo lembech
Acts6:14 amu kigegas inendet komwaei kolen
Acts6:15 Kiichiilji kong’ anyun inendet bik tugul che kitebyei eng’ kapkiruok
Acts7:1 Kole anyun tisiindet ne o
Acts7:2 Kole Stepano
Acts7:3 ak kolenji
Acts7:4 Komong’ anyun eng’ emetab Kaldeik
Acts7:5 ak kima igochi inendet borotet eng’ oloto
Acts7:6 Ak kimwa Jehovah ko u ni
Acts7:7 Ak kimwa Jehovah
Acts7:8 Ak kiigochi arorutiet ne bo kamuratanet: kosich anyun Abraham Isak
Acts7:9 Ak ye kingoam ng’et kong’ boisiechoto agobo Josep
Acts7:10 ak kisor inendet eng’ nyalilwogikyik tugul
Acts7:11 Kinyo anyun rubet Misri komugul ak Kanan
Acts7:12 Ago ye kingogas Jakobo kole mitei bek Misri
Acts7:13 Ak eng’ banda ne bo aeng’ koborjigei Josep tupchosiekyik; ak kinaak eng’ Parao bikab Josep.
Acts7:14 Ak kiiyokto Josep kole keguur kwandanyi Jakobo
Acts7:15 Kochortagei anyun Jakobo kwo Misri; ak kime
Acts7:16 ak kigila ichek koba Sekem
Acts7:17 Ak ye kingorik betut ne bo arorutiet
Acts7:18 agoi kobiit laitoriat age eng’ Misri
Acts7:19 King’omenji inendet bororiennyo
Acts7:20 Ak kigisich Musa eng’ betusiechoto
Acts7:21 ak kingo kagemeto
Acts7:22 Ak kiginet Musa ng’omnatet tugul ne bo Misrik; ak ki kim eng’ ng’alekyik ak boisionikyik.
Acts7:23 Ak ye kingoit olo bo kenyisiek artam
Acts7:24 Ak ye kingogeer kinyalili age eng’ ichek
Acts7:25 ak kilen inendet naei tupchosiekyik kole igochin Jehovah ichek sorunet eng’ eunnyi; ago ma nai.
Acts7:26 Ak eng’ betut ne isubi noto kochunji ichek kobortos
Acts7:27 Ago kitoorta inendet ne kiyachi nin age ne ya
Acts7:28 Imache ibara ko u ye koibar Misrindet amut?
Acts7:29 Kimwee Musa anyun ng’olyondonoto
Acts7:30 Ak kingobata kenyisiek artamu
Acts7:31 Ak kingogeer Musa
Acts7:32 kole
Acts7:33 Kolenji Kiptaiyat anyun inendet
Acts7:34 Kiageer iman nyalildab bikyuk che mitei Misri
Acts7:35 Musa nito ne kiesio ichek
Acts7:36 Kiimut chichi anyun ichek komanda
Acts7:37 Musa nito ko noto ne kilenji lagokab Israel
Acts7:38 Nito ko inendet ne kimi kaniset eng’ ong’atet koboto malaikaiyat ne king’alalji inendet eng’ tulwet ne bo Sinai
Acts7:39 ak kima kas it kwanisiekyok inendet
Acts7:40 kolenji Aron
Acts7:41 Ak kiyai anyun moita eng’ betusiechoto
Acts7:42 Ago kiituktochi batai Jehovah ichek
Acts7:43 Ak kioib okwek emait ne bo Molok. Ak kecheiyat ne bo kanamwet Repan
Acts7:44 Kitinyei kwanisiekyok emait ne bo baornatet eng’ ong’atet
Acts7:45 Ne kiib kwanisiekyok agichek eng’ betusiekwak
Acts7:46 ne kinyor chamet eng’ taitab Jehovah
Acts7:47 Ago Solomon ne kiteekyi got.
Acts7:48 Ago mamenyei Inendet ne Toror Mising’ gorik che kiyae eunek; ko u ye mwaei maotiot
Acts7:49 Ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet kipsengwet
Acts7:50 Tos ma eunnyu ne kiyaei tuguchu tugul?
Acts7:51 Okwek che uui kaat che ma kimuratan mugulelwek ak itik
Acts7:52 Ng’o eng’ maotik ne ma us kwanisiekwok? Ak kibar che kisib kobor nyonunetab Chito ne bo Imanda; ne kaoegu okwek nguno ng’wektoik ak rumik.
Acts7:53 Okwek che kiotaach Ng’atutiet ko u ye kiging’at eng’ malaikaisiek
Acts7:54 Ak ye kingogas ng’alechuto kong’wonegitu mising’ eng’ mugulelwekwak
Acts7:55 Ago kiinyal kipsengwet kochiilji kong’ ko nyiitat inendet Tamirmiriet ne Tilil
Acts7:56 ak kile
Acts7:57 Ago kibolyo eng’ kutit ne o
Acts7:58 ak kitoorta inendet komanda eng’ nganaset
Acts7:59 Kolach anyun Stepano
Acts7:60 Ak kigutuny
Acts8:1 Ak kichamei Saul agine meennyi. Ak king’eet betunoto usisiet ne o agobo kaniset ne kimi Jerusalem; ak kiyesta ichek tugul koyom emotinwekab Judea ak Samaria
Acts8:2 Kotub anyun Stepano bik che kigonyiti Jehovah
Acts8:3 Ago kiinyalil mising’ Saul kaniset
Acts8:4 Kiba anyun ichek che kiga koyesta
Acts8:5 Ak kichortagei Pilipu nganaset ne bo Samaria
Acts8:6 Ak kiepchi it tuiyosiek eng’ yamdaet agenge ng’alek che kimwaei Pilipu
Acts8:7 Amu kimanda tamirmirik che muruonen
Acts8:8 Ak kibiit boiboiyet ne o eng’ nganasanato.
Acts8:9 Ak kimi chito age ne kigiguure Simon
Acts8:10 kiepchin it tugul inendet
Acts8:11 Ak kiepchin it inendet
Acts8:12 Ago ye kingoyan ng’alekab Pilipu ye kiamdoi logoiywek che miach agobo bounatetab Jehovah ak kainetab Jesu Kristo
Acts8:13 Ak kiiyan Simon agine: ak kingo kagibatisan kotebi koboto Pilipu: ak kingogeer koyaogis kaborunoik ak boisionikab kimnatet kokwong’.
Acts8:14 Kingogas anyun che kiyoktoi che kimi Jerusalem kole
Acts8:15 ak ye kingo kagochorgei ichek
Acts8:16 amu kitom kochorjigei agot agenge eng’ bichoto: kiga kibatisan ichek eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu kityo.
Acts8:17 Yeityo kogonoor ichek eunekwak
Acts8:18 Ye kingogeer anyun Simon kole kaga ngo konoor alamalyet chi eunekwak
Acts8:19 kole
Acts8:20 Ago kilenji Petero inendet
Acts8:21 Metinye kebeberta anan motwet eng’ ng’olyondoni: amu ma mie muguleldang’ung’ eng’ taitab Jehovah.
Acts8:22 Sigu anyun eng’ tengeging’ung’et
Acts8:23 Amu ageere ale imi eng’ ng’wanindo ak eng’ ratutietab tengekto.
Acts8:24 Ak kiwol Simon kole
Acts8:25 Ye kingo kagobaorian anyun ak komwa ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat
Acts8:26 Ago kimwachi Pilipu malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat
Acts8:27 Ak king’eet anyun kwo: ak keero
Acts8:28 kiweeksei anyun
Acts8:29 Ak kilenji Tamirmiriet Pilipu anyun
Acts8:30 Ak kilabat Pilipu ak kogas inendet kosomani bukuitab maotiot Isaia
Acts8:31 Ak kile
Acts8:32 Ak chu sirutik che kisomanoti
Acts8:33 Kigiisto kiruogennyi eng’ kaming’inennyi bo ge: Ng’o ne tun mwaitoi ibindanyi? Amu kinemu sobondanyi eng’ ng’ony.
Acts8:34 Ak kiwolji chichoto kigimoch
Acts8:35 Kong’any anyun Pilipu kutinnyi
Acts8:36 Ak ye kingota kobendi eng’ oret
Acts8:37 Ak kile Pilipu
Acts8:38 Kong’at anyun kotonon karit: ak kichortagei tuwai koba beek
Acts8:39 Ak ye kingolong’ eng’ beek
Acts8:40 Ak kitook Pilipu eng’ Asoto: ak kosiirto
Acts9:1 Ak ye kita konerechi Saul koboisie kamuiset ak barisiet agobo alamalyetab Kiptaiyat
Acts9:2 ak kosom inendet baronok che ibei koba Damasko agobo sunagogisiek
Acts9:3 Ak ye kita kowendi
Acts9:4 ak kiibutyi ng’ony
Acts9:5 Ak kile
Acts9:6 ago ng’eet
Acts9:7 Ak kitononso ko nam kut bik che kibendi koboto inendet
Acts9:8 Kong’eet anyun Saul; ak kingo kagoyatogis konyekyik
Acts9:9 Ak kitar betusiek somok ama keerei kiy
Acts9:10 Ak kimi alamalyet age Damasko
Acts9:11 Kolenji Kiptaiyat
Acts9:12 ak kagogeer inendet chito ne kiguure Anania
Acts9:13 Ago kiwol Anania
Acts9:14 ak tinyei eng’ yuto kimnatet ne bunu tisiik che eechen si korat tugul che kuurei kaineng’ung’.
Acts9:15 Ago kilenji Kiptaiyat
Acts9:16 amu aborjini inendet ole te chang’indab tuguk che kanyol konyorune nyalilda agobo kainennyu.
Acts9:17 Kiwa anyun Anania
Acts9:18 Ak eng’ sainato
Acts9:19 ak kiamis ak kinyor kimnatet. Ak kitebi betusiek alak koboto alamalyet che kimi Damasko.
Acts9:20 Ak ne matianit koamda agobo Jesu eng’ sunagogisiek kole
Acts9:21 Ak kikwong’io tugul che kigas inendet
Acts9:22 Ago kitesak Saul kogimit
Acts9:23 Ak ye kingogesgei betusiek che chang’
Acts9:24 ago kinaak eng’ Saul chobenywa ne bo ung’ot. Ak kirib ormarichok bet ak kemoi
Acts9:25 ago kiimut alamalyennyi kemoi
Acts9:26 Ak ye kingonyo Jerusalem kotiem kole koyomogei ak alamalyet: ago kiiywei ichek tugul inendet
Acts9:27 Ago kiimut Barnaba inendet kwo ole mi che kiyoktoi
Acts9:28 Ak kimi koboto ichek eng’ Jerusalem
Acts9:29 koamdoi eng’ nyiganatet eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat: ak kong’alal ak kobeligei koboto Yahudik che ki kutinywa ko Yunanik; ago kicheng’ei kotugul kole kobar inendet.
Acts9:30 Ak ye kingonai tupchosiek
Acts9:31 Konyor anyun kamuung’et kaniset ne mi Judea komugul ak Galili ak Samaria
Acts9:32 Ak ye kiwendote Petero komoswek tugul
Acts9:33 Ak kinyorji oloto chito age ne kigiguure Ainea
Acts9:34 Kolenji anyun Petero inendet
Acts9:35 Ak kigeer inendet tugul che kimenyei Luda ak Saron
Acts9:36 Ak kimi age ne bo alamalyet Jopa ne kigiguure Tabita
Acts9:37 Ak kimian eng’ betusiechoto
Acts9:38 Ak amu ki negityin Luda ak Jopa
Acts9:39 Kong’eet anyun Petero ak koba ak ichek. Ak kingo kagoit
Acts9:40 Komaanda Petero tugul koba sang’
Acts9:41 Ak kogochi inendet eunnyi
Acts9:42 Ak kinaak eng’ Jopa komugul: ak kiiyan che chang’ Kiptaiyat.
Acts9:43 Ak kitebi eng’ Jopa betusiek che chang’ koboto chito age ne kigiguure Simon ne teiteindetab muiywek.
Acts10:1 Kimi chito age Kaisaria
Acts10:2 chito ne kigonyiti Jehovah ak koiywei inendet koboto gonnyi tugul
Acts10:3 Kigeer eng’ ng’ang’utiet kimni
Acts10:4 Ak kingogeer inendet mising’ eng’ kaiyweisiet
Acts10:5 Iyokte nguno anyun bik koba Jopa
Acts10:6 inendet ko toondetab Simon ne teiteindetab muiywek
Acts10:7 Ak ye kingo kakwa malaikaiyat ne king’alalji inendet
Acts10:8 ak kingo kagomwachi ichek ng’alek tugul
Acts10:9 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto ye kita kobendi
Acts10:10 ak kiam rubet
Acts10:11 ak kigeer kipsengwet koyatak
Acts10:12 kimi orit tiong’ik alak tugul che bo kelyek ang’wan ak tuguk che ichuutegei che bo ng’ony ak taritik che bo barak.

Acts10:14 Ago kile Petero
Acts10:15 Kinyonji anyun kutit kogeny ne bo aeng’
Acts10:16 Ak kiyaak kiito konyil somok; ak ngunoto ketaach kioto eng’ kipsengwet.
Acts10:17 Ak ye kita koiimegei Petero mising’ eng’ muguleldanyi kole
Acts10:18 ak koguurso ak koteeb ngo mi Simon oloto
Acts10:19 Ak ye kita kobwati Petero agobo ng’ang’utionoto
Acts10:20 Ago ng’eet
Acts10:21 Ak kichortagei anyun Petero kwo ole mi bichoto
Acts10:22 Ak kile
Acts10:23 Koguur anyun kobwa go ak kochopchi ichek ole ruitos. Ak king’eet karon koba koboto bichoto ak tupchosiek alak che kibunu Jopa.
Acts10:24 Ak betut ne kiisubi betunoto koit Kaisaria. Ak kiigeni ichek Kornelio
Acts10:25 Ak ye kingwo go Petero
Acts10:26 Ago kiing’eet Petero inendet kolenji
Acts10:27 Ak kingota kong’alaljindos tuwai
Acts10:28 kolenji anyun ichek
Acts10:29 noto anyun kaanyo amata asich kiy ne amwae
Acts10:30 Kole anyun Kornelio
Acts10:31 ak kole
Acts10:32 Iyokte anyun bik koba Jopa
Acts10:33 Kiayogu anyun bik eng’ sainato kobwa ole imi; ak kaiyai ne mie amu kainyo. Kimi anyun yu nguno achek tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah
Acts10:34 Ak king’any anyun Petero kutinnyi
Acts10:35 ago taachaksei eng’ inendet chito ne iywei inendet
Acts10:36 Ng’olyot ne kiiyokyi inendet lagokab Israel
Acts10:37 ongen okwek ng’olyondonoto
Acts10:38 ko u ye kiil Jehovah Jesu ne bo Nasaret
Acts10:39 Ak ki baorinik achek che bo tuguk tugul che kiyai eng’ emetab Yahudik
Acts10:40 Kiing’eet Jehovah inendet eng’ betutab somok
Acts10:41 ma eng’ bik tugul
Acts10:42 Ak king’atech keamji bik
Acts10:43 Baoriani maotik tugul agobo inendet
Acts10:44 Ye kita komwaei Petero ng’alechu
Acts10:45 Ak kikwong’io ichek che bo kamuratanet che kiiyani
Acts10:46 Amu kigasei ichek kong’alali eng’ kutuswek che terotin
Acts10:47 Imuchi chi koete beek
Acts10:48 Ak king’at kole kibatisan ichek eng’ kainetab Jesu Kristo. Kosom anyun ichek inendet kole kota kobeni betusiek alak.
Acts11:1 Ak kigas anyun che kiyoktoi ak tupchosiek che kimi Judea kole kogotaach agichek Bororiosiek ng’olyotab Jehovah.

Acts11:3 kolen
Acts11:4 Ago kitoi Petero kotetyi ichek komie ng’alechato
Acts11:5 Kiami nganasetab Jopa asae: ak kingobutya kiy ne u ruon ageer ng’ang’utiet
Acts11:6 ak ye kingageer mising’
Acts11:7 Ak kiagas kutit kolenja
Acts11:8 Ak kiamwa ale
Acts11:9 Ago kiwol kutinato ne bo aeng’ kobunu kipsengwet kole
Acts11:10 Ak kiyaak kioto konyil somok: ak kigichuut kogeny tugul koba kipsengwet.
Acts11:11 Ak ogeero
Acts11:12 Kong’ata anyun Tamirmiriet
Acts11:13 ak kimwawech ko u ye kiga keer malaikaiyat kotononi eng’ gonnyi

Acts11:16 Abwat anyun ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat

Acts11:18 Ak kingogas ng’alechuto

Acts11:20 Ago kimi alak eng’ ichek

Acts12:4 Ak kingo kagonam inendet
Acts12:5 Kigirib Petero anyun eng’ korgoret: ago kisa kaniset Jehovah mising’ agobo inendet.

Acts12:7 Ak ogeero
Acts12:8 Ak kolenji malaikaiyat inendet
Acts12:9 Ak kiwa sang’ ak kosub; ak kima nai kole iman kit ne kayai malaikaiyat

Acts12:13 Ak ye kingogongony kurgetab ormarichet

Acts13:2 Ak ye kiboisiechin Kiptaiyat ak korugutegei

Acts13:4 Ak kingo kagoyokto ichek Tamirmiriet ne Tilil
Acts13:5 Ak ye kimitei Salamis
Acts13:6 Ak kingo kagobun emet komugul ne kiikwen beek agoi koit Papos
Acts13:7 ne kimi koboto bounindet
Acts13:8 Ago kigirinda ichek Eluma ng’orindet (amu u noto kainennyi ye kiweech)
Acts13:9 Ago kinyi Tamirmiriet ne Tilil Saul
Acts13:10 ak kole
Acts13:11 Ak keer nguno anyun-o
Acts13:12 Kingogeer anyun bounindet kit ne kayaak
Acts13:13 Kiba anyun Paulo ak che kimi koboto inendet kobun melit eng’ Papos
Acts13:14 Ak kingobun ichek Perga
Acts13:15 Ak kingobata somanetab Ng’atutiet ak sirutikab maotik koyokto bounikab sunagogit bik koba ole mi ichek

Acts13:17 Kilewen Jehovah ne bo bichu Israel kwanisiekyok
Acts13:18 Ak kimuitochi ichek eng’ atebosiekwak eng’ olo bo kenyisiek artam eng’ ong’atet.
Acts13:19 Ak kingo kagong’em bororiosiek tisab eng’ emetab Kanan
Acts13:20 ak kingobata tuguchu kogochi ichek kiruogik agoi Samuel maotiot.

Acts13:22 Ak kingo kagoisto inendet
Acts13:23 Ak kiimutyi Jehovah Israel Yetindet
Acts13:24 ye kiga sib koamji Johana bik tugul che bo Israel
Acts13:25 Ak ye ki negit koges Johana bandanyi
Acts13:26 Che kitupche
Acts13:27 Ichek che menyei Jerusalem
Acts13:28 Ak nganda kimanyor eng’ inendet ng’olyot ne igochin kome
Acts13:29 Ak ye kingo kagoges tuguk tugul che kiga kisir agobo inendet
Acts13:30 Ago kiing’eet Jehovah inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek:
Acts13:31 Ak kigeer inendet eng’ betusiek che chang’ ichek che kitogosu koboto inendet kobunu Galili kobwanei Jerusalem
Acts13:32 Ak kiibwok logoiywek che miach che bo arorutiet
Acts13:33 ko u ye kigosuldochi Jehovah lagokyok noto
Acts13:34 Ak ko u ye kiing’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek
Acts13:35 Amu kimwa agine eng’ Tiendo age
Acts13:36 Amu ye kingo kagoboisiechi Daudi kiruogutikab Jehovah eng’ ibindanyi
Acts13:37 ago ma keer nunet inendet ne kiing’eet Jehovah.
Acts13:38 Ingonaak anyun eng’ okwek
Acts13:39 ak kiityin imanda eng’ inendet age tugul ne iyani
Acts13:40 Oripge anyun
Acts13:41 Ogeero
Acts13:42 Ak kingota komandoi ichek
Acts13:43 Ak kingo kagomanda tuiyet eng’ sunagogit
Acts13:44 Ak eng’ sabato ne isubi noto
Acts13:45 Ago ye kingogeer Yahudik tuiyosiek
Acts13:46 Kong’alal anyun Paulo ak Barnaba eng’ nyiganatet
Acts13:47 Amu king’atech Kiptaiyat ko u noto
Acts13:48 Ak kingogas Bororiosiek ng’olyondonito
Acts13:49 Ak kiyom ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat koronoto tugul.
Acts13:50 Ago kiinde Yahudik ng’alekab chaamset kobogorisiek che konyiti Jehovah ak ko toogunotin
Acts13:51 Ago kilelekyi ichek temburiek che mi kelyekwak
Acts13:52 Ak kinyi alamalyet boiboindo ak Tamirmiriet ne Tilil.
Acts14:1 Ak ye kimi Ikonio
Acts14:2 Ago kiim Yahudik che ki bistoik sobonwekab Bororiosiek kot kogochi kowech tupchosiek.
Acts14:3 Kitebe oloto anyun betusiek che chang’ ak kong’alali eng’ nyiganatet agobo Kiptaiyat
Acts14:4 Ago kipcheigei tuiyet ne bo nganaset; ak kinamgei alage ak Yahudik
Acts14:5 Ak ye kimachei Bororiosiek ak Yahudik koboto bounikwak kobokyi ichek
Acts14:6 kosib konai
Acts14:7 ak kiamda logoiywek che miach eng’ oloto.
Acts14:8 Ak kitebyei chito age eng’ Lustra
Acts14:9 Kigas chichoto Paulo kong’alali: ak kingochiilji kong’ inendet chichoto
Acts14:10 komwa eng’ kutit ne o kole
Acts14:11 Ak kingogeer tuiyosiek kit ne kayai Paulo
Acts14:12 Ak kiguure Barnaba
Acts14:13 Ak kiget tisiindetab Seu ne kimi hekalunnyi taitab nganaset
Acts14:14 Ago ye kingogas agobo noto che kiyoktoi Barnaba ak Paulo
Acts14:15 kolen
Acts14:16 kibagakyi inendet bororiosiek tugul eng’ ibinwek che kigosiirto
Acts14:17 Ago kima tebi buch inendet ama tinyei baoria
Acts14:18 Ak ki negit kotemene koger tuiyosiek eng’ ng’alechu si mata kogochi tiseiywot.
Acts14:19 Ago kibwa Yahudik che kibunu Antiokia ak Ikonia: ak kingo kagolom tuiyosiek
Acts14:20 Ago ye kitonondos alamalyet ko kayiem inendet
Acts14:21 Ak ye kingo kagoamji logoiywek che miach nganasanato
Acts14:22 kogimitoti sobonwekab alamalyet
Acts14:23 Ak kingo kagolewenji ichek boisiek eng’ kaniset age tugul
Acts14:24 Ak kibun Pisidia
Acts14:25 Ak kingo kagoamda ng’olyot eng’ Perga

Acts24:15 atinye kamang’unet eng’ Jehovah
Acts24:16 Ak achobege anyun agane eng’ ng’olyondoni atebe kotugul kabwatet ne matinyei kanagut eng’ taitab Jehovah ak bik.
Acts24:17 Ak kingobata kenyisiek che chang’ anyo aipchi bikab bororiennyu kagochinoik ak tuguk che kigoitoi:
Acts24:18 ak kinyortaa kitilila eng’ hekalut
Acts24:19 mie nda kami yu ichek eng’ taing’ung’ si komwaitaa ngo ting’ena ichek ng’olyo.
Acts24:20 Anan ingomwa bichu icheget boisiet ne ya ne kinyor
Acts24:21 kobate twegunet agenge ne kiarirji atononi eng’ kwenunywa
Acts24:22 Amu kiingen Peliki komie agobo Oranato
Acts24:23 Ak kong’at kiptaiyatab bogol kole kerib inendet
Acts24:24 Ago kingobata betusiek alage
Acts24:25 Ak ye kita kong’alali agobo imanda
Acts24:26 Kiimang’u kole togot kogochi Paulo siling’isiek: kiguur anyun inendet konyil che chang’
Acts24:27 Ago kingogesgei kenyisiek aeng’u
Acts25:1 Kingo kagoit Pesto koronoto
Acts25:2 Ak kimwachi tisiik che eechen ak bik che toogunotin che bo Yahudik ng’alek che kiting’e Paulo; ak kogaigai ichek inendet
Acts25:3 kosom chamdaet agobo inendet
Acts25:4 Ago kiwol Pesto kole kerib Paulo eng’ Kaisaria
Acts25:5 Ak kole inendet
Acts25:6 Ak kingo kagotebi eng’ kwenunywa koboto ichek eng’ betusiek che masiirei sisiit anan ko taman
Acts25:7 Ak kingo kagoit
Acts25:8 ago kimwa Paulo eng’ ng’alek che kisorunegei
Acts25:9 Ago ye kimachei Pesto kobaibai Yahudik
Acts25:10 Ago kile Paulo
Acts25:11 Ngo a kiptengekyo
Acts25:12 Ak kingo kagong’alal anyun Pesto ak bikab kapkiruok
Acts25:13 Ak kingo kagosiirto betusiek alage
Acts25:14 Ak ye kita kobeniei betusiek che chang’
Acts25:15 ne kimwawa ng’alekyik tisiik che eechen ak boisiekab Yahudik ye kiami Jerusalem
Acts25:16 Ak kiawolji ichek alenji
Acts25:17 Ye kingoyumgei anyun eng’ yu
Acts25:18 Ak kingotononso icheget che kiitaami inendet
Acts25:19 ago kiting’e inendet teebutik agobo kayanenywa
Acts25:20 Ago kialen agin ole teptoi ng’alechu kotemena
Acts25:21 Ago kingorirji Paulo kotebi kole si kotil kiruoget bounindet ne o
Acts25:22 Ak kilenji Agripa Pesto
Acts25:23 Ak mutai ko kagoit Agripa
Acts25:24 Komwa Pesto anyun
Acts25:25 Ago kiageer ale ma yai kiy ne nyoljin meet: ak ko u ye kirirji inendet bounindet ne o
Acts25:26 Matinye ng’olyo ne bo iman ne asirjini kiptaiyandennyu agobo inendet. Noto anyun kamutu inendet konyo taing’wong’
Acts25:27 Amu ageere ale
Acts26:1 Kolenji anyun Agripa Paulo
Acts26:2 Abwati ale abaibai
Acts26:3 ne siirei ko amu ingen komie bitonwek tugul ak teebutik tugul che tinyei Yahudik: noto anyun
Acts26:4 Ingen Yahudik tugul ateptab sobennyu
Acts26:5 ak kongena ichek koboch eng’ tai
Acts26:6 Ak katonon nguno eng’ yu si kiruokwa agobo kamang’unet ne bo arorutiet ne kichopchi Jehovah kwanisiekyok;
Acts26:7 noto ne imang’u ortinwekyok tamanu ak aeng’ kole nyoru
Acts26:8 Amu nee si kibwat kele maiyanaksei eng’ okwek kele
Acts26:9 Kiabwati anendet iman ale kanyol ayai tuguk che chang’ che kirindoi kainetab Jesu ne bo Nasaret.
Acts26:10 Ak kiayai nito agine eng’ Jerusalem: ak atoorji korgorosiek bik che chang’ eng’ che tililen
Acts26:11 Ak kiabirote konyil che chang’ eng’ sunagogisiek tugul
Acts26:12 Ak ye kingawendi Damasko atinye kimnatet ak kayoktoet ne bo tisiik che eechen
Acts26:13 ageer lapkeiyet ne kibunu kipsengwet
Acts26:14 Ak kingo kagibutyi ng’ony tugul
Acts26:15 Ak kiale
Acts26:16 Ago ng’eet
Acts26:17 asorun eng’ bik
Acts26:18 si kobiit ing’any konyekwak
Acts26:19 Noto anyun
Acts26:20 ago kiaborji che mi Damasko korok
Acts26:21 Kinama anyun Yahudik eng’ hekalut amu nito
Acts26:22 Ye kinganyoru toretet ne bunu Jehovah
Acts26:23 kole kanyol konyalil Kristo
Acts26:24 Ak ye kita kosorugei ko u noto
Acts26:25 Ago kile Paulo
Acts26:26 Amu ingen laitoriat ng’alechuto
Acts26:27 Laitoriat Agripa
Acts26:28 Ak kilenji Agripa Paulo
Acts26:29 Kole Paulo
Acts26:30 Kong’eet anyun laitoriat
Acts26:31 ak kingo kagoba
Acts26:32 Kolenji anyun Agripa Pesto
Acts27:1 Ak kingo katetil ng’alek kele kebun melit kebe Italia
Acts27:2 Kelany anyun melit ne bo Adramutio
Acts27:3 Ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ keit Sidon: ak kirire Julio Paulo
Acts27:4 Ak kigibun melit eng’ oloto ak kigitektaege Kupro
Acts27:5 Ak ye kiga kebun melit kelande eng’ nyanjet ne bo Kilikia ak Pampulia
Acts27:6 Ak kinyorji oloto kiptaiyatab bogol melit ne bo Aleksandria
Acts27:7 Ak ye kiga kebe mutyo eng’ melit eng’ betusiek che chang’
Acts27:8 ak kigibun ngegut eng’ bichiindo agoi keit komosta age ne kiguure Luukwek che Miach; ole negite nganasetab Lasea.
Acts27:9 Ak kingo kagosiirto betusiek che chang’
Acts27:10 kolenji
Acts27:11 Ago kigas kiptaiyatab bogol ng’alekab bounindet ak chitab kobo melit
Acts27:12 Ak amu kima ko luita ne yamei ketebe eng’ betusiekab kaititiet
Acts27:13 Ak ye kingous mutyo usonet ne bunu komostab tai
Acts27:14 Ak ne matenit kous chebwiwichet
Acts27:15 ak ye kingenam melit
Acts27:16 Ak kingeruai ketektaatege emet ne kiikwen beek ne kiguure Kauda
Acts27:17 ak kingo kagotogosune moingonoto
Acts27:18 Ak ye kita keboisiei mising’ eng’ kagiiletab ge
Acts27:19 ak eng’ betutab somok kowirta icheget eng’ eunekwak tuguk che kiboisie eng’ melit.
Acts27:20 Ak ye kimata koluuchech asista anan kecheik eng’ betusiek che chang’
Acts27:21 Ak ye kiga kotar betusiek che chang’ ama amis
Acts27:22 Amwawok nguno ale onyiganitu: amu mami chi ne meei eng’ okwek
Acts27:23 Amu kotonon malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ ye negitena kemouni
Acts27:24 kole
Acts27:25 Ara anyun
Acts27:26 Ago kanyol kewirjech emet ne kiikwen beek.
Acts27:27 Ago ye kingoit kemoutab taman ak ang’wan
Acts27:28 ak kiirooch beek kit ne kikwaise
Acts27:29 Ak kingoiywei ichek kole abere togot kewirjech bitet ne mi ruandosiek
Acts27:30 Ak ye kimachei bikab melit komwaei kobagakta melit
Acts27:31 kolenji Paulo kiptaiyatab bogol ak askarik
Acts27:32 Kotil anyun askarik rogoosiek che bo moinget
Acts27:33 Ak ye kimachei koeech
Acts27:34 Noto anyun asomok ale oamisie: amu nito sobeng’wong’; amu mabetei sumeiyot agot agenge eng’ metitab chi age tugul eng’ okwek.
Acts27:35 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko u noto
Acts27:36 Konyiganitu anyun ichek tugul
Acts27:37 Ak achek tugul ko kigiite bik bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik tisab ak lo eng’ melit.
Acts27:38 Ak kingo kagobiyong’so
Acts27:39 Ak kingo kagoeech
Acts27:40 Kotiach anyun nangaisiek
Acts27:41 Ago kingoit ye tuiyechin nyanjosiek aeng’u
Acts27:42 Ak ng’olyot ne kitinyei askarik ko kobar kimonjororinik
Acts27:43 Ago amu kimachei kiptaiyatab bogol kosor Paulo
Acts27:44 ak kibun alage baoinik
Acts28:1 Ak ye kingo kagesopche
Acts28:2 Ak kiyaiywech ne mie mising’ bikab emonoto: amu kiilaal mat
Acts28:3 Ago ye kingo kagoyum Paulo ratutiet ne bo kwenik
Acts28:4 Ak kingogeer bikab emonoto erenet kosonginini eng’ eut
Acts28:5 Ago kilelekta tionyoto kwo ma
Acts28:6 Ago kilen ichek abere tos ibwa
Acts28:7 Kimi anyun eng’ ole negite yoto
Acts28:8 Ak kimiani kwandab Publio koamei eset ak miandab moet ne bendi korotik: ak kiwa Paulo gotab chichoto
Acts28:9 Ak kingo kagoyaak nito kobwa agichek che kimiandos eng’ kakwembeiyondonoto
Acts28:10 ak kigonyitech eng’ teegisto ne o; ak ye kingebe eng’ melit
Acts28:11 Ak kingobata arawek somogu ketau banda eng’ melit ne bo Aleksandria
Acts28:12 Ak kingeit Surakusa
Acts28:13 Ak keng’eetye eng’ oloto kebe keyiematege
Acts28:14 ole kiginyorji tupchosiek
Acts28:15 Ak kingogas tupchosiek agobo achek eng’ oloto
Acts28:16 Ak kingeit Rom
Acts28:17 Ak kingo kagosiirto betusiek somogu koguur bik che eechen che bo Yahudik kotuiyo: ak kingo kagoyumgei
Acts28:18 ak kimachei kotiacha ichek
Acts28:19 Ago ye kingogirinda Yahudik ng’olyondonoto
Acts28:20 Amu nito anyun kasomok obwa kegeerge ak keng’alal tugul: amu a ratat eng’ sirimi agobo kamang’unetab Israel.
Acts28:21 Ak kilenji inendet
Acts28:22 Ago kimache kegasenen kiy ne ibwati: amu kigonaak eng’ achek kele kimwaoti ne ya agobo bitonito eng’ komosta age tugul.
Acts28:23 Ak ye kingo kagochob betut
Acts28:24 Ak kiiyan alak tuguk che kigimwaei
Acts28:25 Ak ye kimata kogasyin ichegei
Acts28:26 Ui oldab bichu
Acts28:27 Amu kwolilenotin mugulelwekab bichu
Acts28:28 Ingonaak anyun eng’ okwek
Acts28:29 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ng’alechu
Acts28:30 Ak kimeny eng’ kenyisiek aeng’ gonnyi ne kialei meng’et
Acts28:31 koamdoi agobo bounatetab Jehovah

Romans1:2 che kisib koaror eng’ maotikyik eng’ sirutik che tililen
Romans1:3 agobo Werinnyi

Romans1:7 eng’ okwek tugul che omite Rom
Romans1:8 Ne bo tai

Romans1:10 asome ale
Romans1:11 Amu atinye emosto ageerok
Romans1:12 noto ko si kobiit kigaigaige ane ak okwek eng’ kwenung’wong’
Romans1:13 Ak mamache oegu che mongen
Romans1:14 A ne kiyaachei eng’ Yunanik ak che ma Yunanik
Romans1:15 Noto anyun
Romans1:16 Amu malilanjini logoiywek che miach: amu choto ko kimnatetab Jehovah agoi yetunet eng’ age tugul ne iyani; eng’ Yahudiot korok
Romans1:17 Amu king’anyei eng’ choto imandab Jehovah eng’ kayanet agoi kayanet: ko u ye sirat kole
Romans1:18 Amu kigeng’any neregekab Jehovah kobun kipsengwet agobo bistoet tugul ak yaitiet tugul ne bo bik
Romans1:19 amu tugukab Jehovah che naotin ko toogunotin eng’ ichek; amu kigong’ang’ji Jehovah ichek.
Romans1:20 Amu kigeerei komie tugukyik che ma toogu koboch yaetab ng’ony che naoksei eng’ tuguk che yaotin
Romans1:21 amu kingo kagonai Jehovah
Romans1:22 Kingolen kondegei kong’omegitu
Romans1:23 ak kowal torornatetab Jehovah ne ma ng’emaksei kogergeit ak itondab chito ne ng’emaksei
Romans1:24 Noto anyun kibagakyi Jehovah ichek magutikab mugulelwekwak kosub muruonindo
Romans1:25 amu kiwal imanitab Jehovah kowale lembeita
Romans1:26 Amu nito kibagakyi Jehovah ichek magutik che bo tewernatet: amu kiwal kobogorisiekwak biteet ne nyolu koek ne ma nyolu:
Romans1:27 ak ko u noto agichek murenik
Romans1:28 Ak ko u ye kiesio kotebe Jehovah naenywa
Romans1:29 ko nyiitat tuguk tugul che ma bo iman
Romans1:30 che bo chemererosiek
Romans1:31 che matinyei kaguiyet
Romans1:32 che nganda ingen ng’atutietab Jehovah
Romans2:1 Noto anyun
Romans2:2 Ak kingen kele namegei kiruogetab Jehovah ak imanit agobo ichek che yaei tuguk che u choto.
Romans2:3 Ee
Romans2:4 Anan isase magornatosiek che bo mieindanyi ak muitaennyi ak talasiennyi ama inai ile imutyinin sigunet mieindab Jehovah?
Romans2:5 Ago eng’ uuindang’ung’ ak muguleldang’ung’ ne matinyei sigunet
Romans2:6 ne tun igochin chi tugul ko u boisionikyik:
Romans2:7 igochin sobondab koigeny ichek che cheng’ei eng’ muitaet ak eng’ boisionik che miach
Romans2:8 ago eng’ ichek che ngelelik
Romans2:9 nyalilda ak bichiindo
Romans2:10 ago torornatet ak teegisto ak kalyet eng’ chi age tugul ne yaei ne mie
Romans2:11 amu matiytii Jehovah bik.
Romans2:12 Amu tugul che kiyai tengek ko mami Ng’atutiet
Romans2:13 amu ma ichek che kasei Ng’atutiet ko che bo imanda eng’ taitab Jehovah
Romans2:14 Amu ye yaei Bororiosiek
Romans2:15 ibortoi eng’ noto boisietab Ng’atutiet ne sirat eng’ mugulelwekwak
Romans2:16 eng’ betut ne tun iruokyin Jehovah ung’otikab bik
Romans2:17 Ago ngeguurenen Yahudiot
Romans2:18 ak ingen magennyi
Romans2:19 ak iiti ile i kandoindet ne bo che koriotin
Romans2:20 kotigonindet ne bo che berber
Romans2:21 inyendet anyun ne ineti age
Romans2:22 Inye ne imwae ile amat oipgei
Romans2:23 Inye ne ichouge eng’ Ng’atutiet
Romans2:24 Amu kichubei kainetab Jehovah eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek
Romans2:25 Amu toreti iman kamuratanet
Romans2:26 Ngot koribei anyun tetutikab Ng’atutik inendet ne ma kimuratan
Romans2:27 Ak tos matun iruogun inendet ne ma kimuratan eng’ atebennyi
Romans2:28 Amu ma Yahudiot inendet ne Yahudiot eng’ borto barak
Romans2:29 ago Yahudiot inendet ne Yahudiot eng’ orit; ak kamuratanet ko noto bo muguleldo
Romans3:1 Tinyei borot nee anyun Yahudiot? Anan nee toretet ne bo kamuratanet?
Romans3:2 O eng’ oret age tugul: ne bo tai
Romans3:3 Amu egu nee ngot ko matinyei alage kayanet? Kayanenywa ne mami
Romans3:4 Achicha: ma u noto: ingoek ne bo iman Jehovah
Romans3:5 Ago ngot kogonyiti atebennyo ne ma bo imanda
Romans3:6 Achicha: ma u noto: amu nda u noto koruokyindoi ano Jehovah ng’ony?
Romans3:7 Ago ngo tesak imanitab Jehovah eng’ lembeitanyu agoi torornatennyi
Romans3:8 Ak amu nee si magimwa (ko u ye kimwaitaenech ne ya
Romans3:9 Nee anyun? Tos ki miachen kesiir ichek? Achicha
Romans3:10 ko u ye sirat
Romans3:11 Mami ne iguitos
Romans3:12 Kigomasta tugul
Romans3:13 Mokwekwak ko kererit ne yatat; Kiboisie kenisiet eng’ ng’elyebwekwak: Mi ng’wonetab erenok kutuswekwak orit:
Romans3:14 Che nyiitat kutuswekwak chubisiet ak ng’wanindo:
Romans3:15 Chepcheb kelyekwak kotumda korotik;
Romans3:16 Mi ortinwekwak ng’emisiet ak nyalilda;
Romans3:17 Ama nai oretab kalyet:
Romans3:18 Mami kaiyweisiet ne iywei Jehovah taitab konyekwak.
Romans3:19 Ak kingen kele tuguk alak tugul che mwaei Ng’atutiet
Romans3:20 amu mami chi ne kiityin imanda eng’ tainnyi eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet: amu bunu naetab tengekto Ng’atutiet.
Romans3:21 Ago nguno ko kagong’ang’ak imandab Jehovah ama eng’ ng’atutik
Romans3:22 agot imandab Jehovah ne mi eng’ kayanet eng’ Jesu Kristo eng’ icheget tugul che iyani; amu mami kabesiet;
Romans3:23 amu kigoyai tugul tengek
Romans3:24 che kiityin imanda buch eng’ mieindanyi eng’ katiaget ne mi eng’ Kristo Jesu:
Romans3:25 ne kiinde Jehovah koek kaptisisio eng’ kayanet
Romans3:26 amu kabartaetab imandanyi eng’ betusiechuto
Romans3:27 Mi ano anyun kachaunetab ge? Kigegerji sang’. Eng’ ng’atutiet ne u nee? Ne bo boisionik? Achicha: ago eng’ ng’atutietab kayanet.
Romans3:28 Kiiti anyun kele kiityin chi imanda eng’ kayanet ama boisionikab ng’atutik.
Romans3:29 Anan Jehovah ko Jehovah ne bo Yahudik kityo? Ama Jehovah ne bo Bororiosiek agichek? Ee
Romans3:30 ko u ye agenge Jehovah
Romans3:31 Tos kiyai anyun Ng’atutiet koek ne matilei kiy amu kayanet? Achicha

Romans5:1 Kitinye kalyet ak Jehovah eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo amu kigiityech imanda eng’ kayanet;
Romans5:2 ak kigenyoru eng’ inendet agine kemong’ji eng’ kayanet mieinoto kitonone; ak ongeboiboitu eng’ kamang’unetab torornatetab Jehovah.
Romans5:3 Ak ma u noto kityo
Romans5:4 ak ibu muitaet tiemisiet; ak ibu tiemisiet kamang’unet:
Romans5:5 magonu kamang’unet kililan; amu kigerong’ji chamnyetab Jehovah mugulelwekyok eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne kigegonech.
Romans5:6 Amu ye kita ko ki nyalulyotin
Romans5:7 Amu bichii kome chi agobo chi ne bo imanda: ago abere kanyei chito age kome agobo chi ne mie.
Romans5:8 Ago iboruech achek Jehovah chamnyennyi
Romans5:9 Ak ne siirei mising’ anyun
Romans5:10 Amu ye kita ko ki bunik
Romans5:11 Ak ma u noto kityo
Romans5:12 Noto anyun
Romans5:13 amu kimi ng’ony tengek agoi koit Ng’atutik: ago magiiti tengek ye mami ng’atutik.
Romans5:14 Ago kiboi meet koboch Adam agoi Musa
Romans5:15 Ago ma u bistoet
Romans5:16 Ak ma kergei kit ne biitune konunet ak kit ne biitune tengektab chito agenge: amu kinyo kiruoget eng’ agenge agoi kagikyinet
Romans5:17 Amu ngo kiboi meet eng’ bistoetab agenge; ne siirei mising’ anyun
Romans5:18 Noto anyun
Romans5:19 Amu ko u ye kiek che chang’ kiptengeginik eng’ bistoetab chito agenge

Romans6:1 Kimwae nee anyun? Kitebi eng’ tengek
Romans6:2 Achicha
Romans6:3 Anan ma onai ole achek tugul che kigibatisanjech Jesu Kristo ko kigibatisanjech meennyi?
Romans6:4 Noto anyun kigetubech koboto inendet eng’ kabatisanet agoi meet: si ko u ye kiging’eet Kristo eng’ che kibek eng’ torornatetab Kwanda
Romans6:5 Amu ngo kigituiyech ak inendet eng’ kergeindab meennyi
Romans6:6 kingen ni
Romans6:7 Amu inendet ne kigome kotiagat eng’ tengek.
Romans6:8 Ago ngo kigebegu koboto Kristo
Romans6:9 kingen kele kiging’eet Kristo komong’ eng’ che kigobek: ma komeei kogeny; ma kotinyei meet bounatet eng’ inendet kogeny.
Romans6:10 Amu meet ne kime
Romans6:11 Ko u noto oiityige ak okwek ole kiobekyi tengek
Romans6:12 Noto anyun amochamji tengek koboi borwekwok che begu
Romans6:13 anan ogochi tengek kebeberwekab borwekwok koek karik che ma bo iman; ago ogochige Jehovah
Romans6:14 Amu matinyei tengek bounatet eng’ okwek: amu ma omi eng’ Ng’atutik
Romans6:15 Nee anyun
Romans6:16 Mongen ole
Romans6:17 Ago kimwachini Jehovah kongoi
Romans6:18 ak ye kingitiachak eng’ tengek
Romans6:19 Ang’alali ko u biteetab bik amu nyalulet ne bo borwekwok: amu ko u ye kiogoite kebeberwekab borwekwok koek otwogikab muruonindo ak tengek agoi tengek
Romans6:20 Amu ye kita ko o otwogikab tengekto
Romans6:21 Kiotinye logoek nee eng’ betusiechoto eng’ tuguk che olilane nguno? Amu kagesunetab tuguchoto ko meet.
Romans6:22 Ago nguno ko kagitiachak eng’ tengekto
Romans6:23 Amu melektab tengek ko meet; ago konunetab chamnyet ne bo Jehovah ko sobondab koigeny eng’ Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo.

Romans7:2 Amu kobogoriot ne tinyei manong’otiot koratei ng’atutik eng’ manong’otiot eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi; ago ngo me manong’otiot
Romans7:3 Noto anyun
Romans7:4 Noto anyun
Romans7:5 Amu ye kingota kemi eng’ borto ko kiboisiei magutik che bo tengek eng’ kebeberwekab borwekyok
Romans7:6 Ago nguno
Romans7:7 Kimwae nee anyun? Tos tengek Ng’atutiet? Achicha
Romans7:8 ago kinyor tengek boroindo eng’ ng’atutiet koyai eng’ ane kasetab miat age tugul: amu ye mami Ng’atutiet ko meat tengekto.
Romans7:9 Ak kiasobe eng’ tai ye kima komi Ng’atutiet: ago ye kingonyo ng’atutiet
Romans7:10 ak kiageer ale kibunji meet ng’atutiet ne ki bo sobondo:
Romans7:11 amu kinyor tengek boroindo eng’ ng’atutiet kong’ala
Romans7:12 Noto anyun tilil Ng’atutiet
Romans7:13 Tos kiek anyun noto mie meet eng’ ane? Achicha
Romans7:14 Amu kingen kele bo Ng’atutiet tamirmiriet: ago a chitab borto
Romans7:15 Amu mangen ne ayae: amu ma ne amache
Romans7:16 Ago ngayai noto mamache
Romans7:17 Nguno anyun ko ma ko ane ne ayae
Romans7:18 Amu angen ale eng’ ane
Romans7:19 Amu noto mie ne kata ayae
Romans7:20 Ago ngot ayae ne mamache
Romans7:21 Ageere anyun ng’atutiet
Romans7:22 Amu abaibai eng’ Ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ chito ne bo orit:
Romans7:23 ago ageere ng’atutiet ne ter eng’ kebeberwekab bortanyu
Romans7:24 Ee
Romans7:25 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi eng’ Jesu Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo. Noto anyun
Romans8:1 Noto anyun ma komi kiruoget eng’ ichek che mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu.
Romans8:2 Amu kagotiacha ng’atutietab Tamirmirietab sobon eng’ Kristo Jesu among’une ng’atutietab tengek ak meet.
Romans8:3 Amu kit ne kima imuch Ng’atutiet koyai
Romans8:4 si kobiit kosulda kayomisetab Ng’atutiet eng’ achek
Romans8:5 Amu ichek che isubi borto kogereri met agobo tugukab borto; ago ichek che isubi Tamirmiriet kogereri met agobo tugukab Tamirmiriet.
Romans8:6 Amu kererwekab met che bo borto ko meet; ago kererwekab met che bo Tamirmiriet ko sobondo ak kalyet:
Romans8:7 amu kererwekab met che bo borto ko bunyondit eng’ Jehovah; amu magase it Ng’atutietab Jehovah
Romans8:8 ak icheget che mi borto kotemene kobaibai Jehovah.
Romans8:9 Ago ma omi eng’ borto ago eng’ Tamirmiriet
Romans8:10 Ak ngo mi Kristo eng’ okwek
Romans8:11 Ago ngo menyok Tamirmirietab inendet ne kiing’eet Jesu komong’une che kibek
Romans8:12 Noto anyun
Romans8:13 amu ngosubi borto
Romans8:14 Amu tugul che indochin Tamirmirietab Jehovah
Romans8:15 Amu kima otaach kogeny tamirmirietab otwoknot ne konok oiyweisie; ago kiotaach tamirmiriet ne kigiyaenak oegu lagok
Romans8:16 Baoriani Tamirmiriet inendet ak tamirmirikyok kole ki lagokab Jehovah:
Romans8:17 ak ngo ki lagok
Romans8:18 Amu aiiti ale nyalilwogik che bo betusiechu ko ma nyolu kiroge torornatet ne tun king’ang’wech.
Romans8:19 Amu igeni mising’ ak koganyei yaet komugul ng’ang’et ne bo werikab Jehovah.
Romans8:20 Amu kigigochi yaet tugul kogas it kit ne matilei kiy
Romans8:21 si kobiit kitiach yaet komugul agine eng’ otwoknatetab ng’emisiet agoi katiaget ne bo torornatetab lagokab Jehovah.
Romans8:22 Amu kingen kele tigeni ak kogasei ng’wanindo yaet komugul kobotech agoi nguno.
Romans8:23 Ak ma u noto kityo
Romans8:24 Amu kigesoruech eng’ kamang’unet: ago kamang’unet ne kigeerei ko ma kamang’unet; amu ng’o ne imang’u noto keerei?
Romans8:25 Ago ngimang’u noto magigeere
Romans8:26 Ak toreti ko u noto agine Tamirmiriet nyalulennyo: amu magingen kesa ko ye nyolu; ago saiywech Tamirmiriet inendet eng’ tigenoik che magimuchi kemwa;
Romans8:27 ak inendet ne isiachi mugulelwek kongen kit ne ibwati Tamirmiriet
Romans8:28 Ak kingen kele
Romans8:29 Amu Jehovah ne kisib konai ichek
Romans8:30 ak icheget che kisib kolewen
Romans8:31 Kimwae nee anyun eng’ tuguchuto? Ngo mi Jehovah komostanyo
Romans8:32 Inendet ne kima rire Werinnyi
Romans8:33 Ng’o ne itaami che kilewen Jehovah? Jehovah ne iityin imanda;
Romans8:34 ng’o inendet ne igikyin? Kristo Jesu ne kime
Romans8:35 Ibestosech ng’o eng’ chamnyetab Kristo? Nyalilda
Romans8:36 Ko u ye kigisir
Romans8:37 Ago
Romans8:38 Amu angen komie ale maimuchi kobesiech meet
Romans8:39 anan tororindo

Romans10:6 Ago mwaei imanda noto bo kayanet ko u ni
Romans10:7 Anan

Romans11:6 Ago ngot ko bo mieindo

Romans11:13 Ago ang’alalwok okwek che o bo Bororiosiek. Ko u ye a ne kiyoktoi ne bo Bororiosiek
Romans11:14 si agochi ng’etkonda eng’ or age tugul icheget che ki borto agenge
Romans11:15 Amu ngo toortaenywa ko katuiyetab ng’ony
Romans11:16 Ak ngo tilil tongoaniat

Romans11:18 mechauge ile isiire temenik: ago

Romans11:21 amu ngo kima rire Jehovah temenik che ki bo ketoto ye kinye
Romans11:22 Keer anyun-o mieindo ak koromnatetab Jehovah: eng’ ichek che kibutyo
Romans11:23 Ak ngo matebi ichek eng’ bistoenywa
Romans11:24 Amu ngo kigetilin eng’ emdit ne bo timin eng’ biteennyi
Romans11:25 Amu mamache oegu che mongen ung’otioni
Romans11:26 ak u noto tun kisoru Israel tugul: ko u ye sirat kole

Romans11:28 Ago bunik ichek eng’ okwek

Romans11:30 Amu ko u ye kiongelelji Jehovah eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto
Romans11:31 ko u noto agichek chu
Romans11:32 Amu kigoratyi Jehovah tugul eng’ bistoet

Romans12:1 Noto anyun che kitupche
Romans12:2 Amoyaniege ateptab betusiechu: ago ingewalak eng’ kaleelitetab kabwatutikwok

Romans12:5 ko u noto eng’ achek che ki chang’
Romans12:6 Ak ketinye konunoik che terotin ko u mieindo ne kigegonech
Romans12:7 anan boisiet
Romans12:8 anan inendet ne iteitoi
Romans12:9 Ingoek chamnyet ne matinyei ng’alset. Wech mising’ noto ya; onamge ak ne mie.
Romans12:10 Ochamnye eng’ chamnyet ne u ne bo tupchosiek; ingoiit chito age chito age kosiir inendet eng’ teegisto;
Romans12:11 eng’ kagiiletab ge amochoriren; ogiilge mising’ eng’ tamirmiriet
Romans12:12 oboiboitu eng’ kamang’unet; omuitoi eng’ nyalilda; ogiiljige saet kotugul;

Romans12:15 Oboiboitu koboto che boiboi; oririe koboto che rirtos.

Romans12:17 Amoyaakyi chi yaitio eng’ yaitio. Ibwat tuguk che bo teegisto eng’ taitab bik tugul.

Romans15:3 Amu kima ibaibaigei Kristo inegei; ago

Romans15:5 Ingogonok anyun Jehovah ne bo muitaet ak kagaigaet oegu che otinye kabwatet agenge okwege eng’ okwege ko u ye machei Kristo Jesu:
Romans15:6 si kobiit otoror Jehovah inendet Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo eng’ maget agenge ak kutit agenge.

Romans16:1 Kande eunekwok Poibe ne kitupche ne cheboitiotab kaniset ne mi Kenkrea:
Romans16:2 ale otaach inendet eng’ Kiptaiyat
Romans16:3 Ogat Priska ak Akula che ki kiboitinik tugul eng’ Kristo Jesu
Romans16:4 che ki chobotin kogoito sobonwekwak agobo sobondanyu; che mamwachini kongoi anege
Romans16:5 ak ogat kaniset ne mi gonywa. Ogat Epeneto ne achame mising’
Romans16:6 Ogat Maria
Romans16:7 Ogat Androniko ak Junia
Romans16:8 Ogat Ampliato ne achame mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat.
Romans16:9 Ogat Urbano kiboitiondennyu ne kiboisiei tugul eng’ Kristo
Romans16:10 Ogat Apele ne chamat eng’ Kristo. Ogat ichek che bo gotab Aristobulo.
Romans16:11 Ogat Herodion ne bo ornyo. Ogat ichek che bo gotab Narkiso
Romans16:12 Ogat Trupena ak Truposa
Romans16:13 Ogat Rupo ne lewenot eng’ Kiptaiyat
Romans16:14 Ogat Asunkrito
Romans16:15 Ogat Pilologo ak Julia
Romans16:16 Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil. Igatok kanisosiek tugul che bo Kristo.
Romans16:17 Kasomok anyun che kitupche
Romans16:18 Amu icheget che u choto
Romans16:19 Amu kigogasak eng’ bik tugul kaseng’wong’ bo it. Noto anyun abaibai eng’ okwek: ago amache ong’omegitu eng’ noto mie
Romans16:20 Ak tun tuei Jehovah ne bo kalyet Setani eng’ kelyekwok ko negit. Ingoteb kobotok mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo.
Romans16:21 Igatok Timoteo ne kiboitiot kobota; ak Lukio ak Jason ak Sosipatro
Romans16:22 Ane Tertio ne kasirei baruani
Romans16:23 Igatok Gaio ne ami gonnyi
Romans16:24 Ingoteb kobotok tugul mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. Amen.
Romans16:25 Nguno eng’ inendet ne imuchi kogimitok ko u logoiywekyuk che miach ak amdaetab Jesu Kristo
Romans16:26 ago kagong’ang’ak nguno
Romans16:27 bo Jehovah ne ng’om inegei
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo
1Corinthians1:2 kisirjini kanisetab Jehovah ne mitei Korinto
1Corinthians1:3 Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet ne bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo.
1Corinthians1:4 Amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi kotugul agobo okwek
1Corinthians1:5 amu kigeyaak oegu magorek mising’ eng’ inendet eng’ kiy age tugul
1Corinthians1:6 ko u ye kigigimit baornatetab Kristo eng’ okwek:
1Corinthians1:7 si moletu eng’ konunet age tugul; ogeni ng’ang’utietab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo.
1Corinthians1:8 Ne igimitok agine agoi let
1Corinthians1:9 Jehovah ko ne kiyani
1Corinthians1:10 Asomok mising’ anyun
1Corinthians1:11 Amu kigoborua ichek che mi gotab Kloe agobo okwek
1Corinthians1:12 Kit anyun ne amwae ko ni
1Corinthians1:13 Tos pcheat Kristo? Tos kigigartatwok Paulo? Anan kigibatisanjok kainetab Paulo?
1Corinthians1:14 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi amu ma abatisan chi eng’ okwek
1Corinthians1:15 si mamwa chi age tugul kole kigibatisanjok kainennyu.
1Corinthians1:16 Ak kiabatisan che bo gotab Stepana agichek: mangen kogeny
1Corinthians1:17 Amu ma iyokwa Kristo abatisanis
1Corinthians1:18 Amu berberindo ng’olyotab kimurtoiyot eng’ icheget che lustos; ago eng’ achek che kisoru ko kimnatetab Jehovah.
1Corinthians1:19 Amu kigisir kele
1Corinthians1:20 Mi ano ne ng’om? Mi ano sirindet? Mi ano kiptiiyotiot ne bo kenyisiechu? Tos ma yai Jehovah ng’omnatetab ng’onyuni koberberit?
1Corinthians1:21 Amu eng’ ng’omnatet ne bo Jehovah ko ma nai ng’ony Jehovah eng’ ng’omnatennyi
1Corinthians1:22 Amu somei Yahudik kaborunoik
1Corinthians1:23 ago kiamdoi achek Kristo ne kigigartat
1Corinthians1:24 ago eng’ ichek che kigiguur
1Corinthians1:25 Amu berberindo ne bo Jehovah ko ng’om kosiir bik; ak nyalulnatetab Jehovah ko kim kosiir bik.
1Corinthians1:26 Amu
1Corinthians1:27 ago kilewen Jehovah tuguk che berber che bo ng’ony
1Corinthians1:28 ak kilewen Jehovah tuguk che ma toogunotin che bo ng’ony
1Corinthians1:29 si mat kolosgei chi age tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah.
1Corinthians1:30 Ago o bo inendet okwek eng’ Kristo Jesu
1Corinthians1:31 si koek
1Corinthians2:1 Ak ye kianyonjok
1Corinthians2:2 Amu kiabegechi ale mamache anai kiy age tugul eng’ kwenung’wong’ kobate Jesu Kristo
1Corinthians2:3 Ak kiami kobotok eng’ nyalulet
1Corinthians2:4 Ak ng’alalennyu ak ng’olyondennyu ne kiaamdoi ko kima ko ng’alekab kagaigaet che bo ng’omnatet
1Corinthians2:5 si matonone kayaneng’wong’ ng’omnatetab bik
1Corinthians2:6 Ago kimwae ng’omnatet eng’ kwenutab che igesunotingei: ago ng’omnatet ne ma bo betusiechu
1Corinthians2:7 ago kimwae ng’omnatetab Jehovah eng’ ung’otiet
1Corinthians2:8 ne manaei agot agenge eng’ bounik che bo betusiechu: amu nda kiga nai
1Corinthians2:9 ago ko u ye kigisir kele
1Corinthians2:10 Ago king’ang’wech Jehovah eng’ Tamirmiriet: amu isiachi Tamirmiriet tuguk tugul

1Corinthians2:12 Ago kima kitaach tamirmiriet ne bo ng’ony

1Corinthians14:30 Ago ngeng’ang’ji ng’olyo age ne tebyei eng’ yoto
1Corinthians14:31 Amu omuchi okwek tugul oamde agenge agenge
1Corinthians14:32 ak kase it tamirmirikab maotik maotik;
1Corinthians14:33 amu Jehovah ko ma Jehovah ne bo bolatet
1Corinthians14:34 ingosisyo kobogorisiek eng’ kanisosiek: amu magichamjin icheget kong’alal; ago ingogas it
1Corinthians14:35 Ak ngo machei ichek konetgei kiy
1Corinthians14:36 Nee anyun? Tos okwek che kimong’unenok ng’olyotab Jehovah? Anan kibwanjok okwege?
1Corinthians14:37 Ngobwati chi age tugul kole maotiot
1Corinthians14:38 Ago ngo maingen chi age tugul kiy
1Corinthians14:39 Noto anyun
1Corinthians14:40 Ago ingoyaogis tuguk tugul ko u ye nyolu ak eng’ chobet ne mie.
1Corinthians15:1 Aboruok anyun
1Corinthians15:2 kisorunenok choto agichek; eng’ ng’alek che kiaamwok
1Corinthians15:3 Amu kiagonok eng’ tai noto kiataach agane
1Corinthians15:4 ak kigitub; ak kiging’eet eng’ betutab somok ko u ye mwaei sirutik;
1Corinthians15:5 ak kimong’ji Kepa; ye ibata
1Corinthians15:6 yeityo komong’ji tupchosiek che siirei bogol mut komi tugul
1Corinthians15:7 yeityo komong’ji Jakobo; ye ibata
1Corinthians15:8 ak let eng’ tugul
1Corinthians15:9 Amu a ne ming’in eng’ che kiyoktoi
1Corinthians15:10 Ago eng’ mieindab Jehovah a u kit ne a u: ak mieindanyi ne kigigona ko maek buch; ago kiaboisie mising’ asiir ichek tugul: ago ma ane
1Corinthians15:11 Ngo ane anyun
1Corinthians15:12 Ara anyun

1Corinthians15:15 Ee

1Corinthians15:17 ak ngo kima king’eet Kristo
1Corinthians15:18 Noto anyun

1Corinthians15:20 Ago kiging’eet anyun Kristo komong’ eng’ che kibek
1Corinthians15:21 Amu ko u ye kibunu meet chi
1Corinthians15:22 Amu ko u ye begu tugul eng’ Adam
1Corinthians15:23 Ago chi tugul eng’ komostanyi: Kristo ko tongoaniat; ye ibata ko ichek che bo Kristo
1Corinthians15:24 Ye ibata koit anyun let
1Corinthians15:25 Amu kanyol kolaitoran inendet matiny
1Corinthians15:26 Bunyot ne bo let ne tun king’emei ko meet.
1Corinthians15:27 Amu
1Corinthians15:28 Ak ye tun kaginde tuguk tugul kogas it inendet

1Corinthians15:30 Ko amu nee anyun si kemi ng’oiyondit sait age tugul?
1Corinthians15:31 Abaoriani eng’ kalosunonoto mi eng’ okwek
1Corinthians15:32 Ngo kigibarge ak tiong’ik eng’ Epeso ko u biteetab bik
1Corinthians15:33 Among’ kiberberak: Ng’emei choronok che yaach atepto ne mie.
1Corinthians15:34 Ogosu eng’ imanda
1Corinthians15:35 Ago mwaei chi age
1Corinthians15:36 Inye ne i berber
1Corinthians15:37 ak noto ne igole
1Corinthians15:38 ago igochin Jehovah borto ko u ye iboiboi inendet
1Corinthians15:39 Banyek tugul ko ma agenge: ago mi alak che bo bik
1Corinthians15:40 Mitei borwek che bo kipsengwet
1Corinthians15:41 Mitei lilindo ne bo asista
1Corinthians15:42 Ko u noto agine ng’eetyetab che begu. Kigolei eng’ ng’emisiet; king’eeti ko ma komi ng’emisiet:
1Corinthians15:43 kigolei ko mami teegisto; ak tun king’eeti eng’ telunatet: kigolei eng’ nyalulet; ak tun king’eeti eng’ kamuktaet:
1Corinthians15:44 kigolei borto ne kigisiktoi; king’eeti borto ne bo tamirmiriet. Ngo mi borto ne kigisiktoi
1Corinthians15:45 Ko u noto agine
1Corinthians15:46 Ago maindoi noto bo tamirmiriet
1Corinthians15:47 Chito ne bo tai ko bo ng’ony
1Corinthians15:48 Ko u ole teptoi ne bo ng’ung’unyek
1Corinthians15:49 Ak ko u ye kigiib itondab chitab ng’ung’unyek
1Corinthians15:50 Amwae ni anyun
1Corinthians15:51 Ogeero
1Corinthians15:52 eng’ ne matia
1Corinthians15:53 Amu kanyol kolaach ne nunei
1Corinthians15:54 Ago ye tun kagolaach nito nunei
1Corinthians15:55 Ee

1Corinthians15:57 ago kigochini Jehovah kongoi

1Corinthians16:1 Nguno anyun agobo kayumanik agobo bik che tililen
1Corinthians16:2 Ingogonor chi age tugul eng’ okwek eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo wigit
1Corinthians16:3 Ak ye tun aitu
1Corinthians16:4 Ak ngot ko nyolu awa agane
1Corinthians16:5 Ago anyonjinok
1Corinthians16:6 ago abere anyone ketebi ak okwek eng’ betusiek alak anan agot eng’ betusiekab kaititiet
1Corinthians16:7 Amu mamache ageerok nguno asiirtoi eng’ oret; amu amang’u ale atebi kobotok ne matia
1Corinthians16:8 Ago ta atebe Epeso agoi betutab Pentekost;
1Corinthians16:9 amu kogiyatwa kurget ne o ne nyoljin boisionik
1Corinthians16:10 Ngot anyun konyo Timoteo
1Corinthians16:11 amat kosas chi inendet anyun. Ago omonorsechi inendet eng’ bandanyi eng’ kalyet si konyo ole ami: amu ageni inendet koboto che kitupche.
1Corinthians16:12 Ago eng’ ng’alekab Apolo ne kitupche
1Corinthians16:13 Oripse
1Corinthians16:14 Ingoyaak eng’ chamnyet tugul che oyae.
1Corinthians16:15 Asomok anyun mising’
1Corinthians16:16 ale ogas it okwek che u chu
1Corinthians16:17 Ak abaibai eng’ nyonunetab Stepana ak Portunato ak Akaiko: amu kiinyiitwa ichek noto ne rarunot eng’ komostang’wong’.
1Corinthians16:18 Amu kiimuung’ji tamirmiriennyu ak neng’wong’: onai anyun komie ichek che u choto.
1Corinthians16:19 Igatok kanisosiekab Asia. Igatok Akula ak Priska mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat
1Corinthians16:20 Igatok tupchosiek tugul. Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil.
1Corinthians16:21 Kagatennyu nito ane Paulo eng’ eunnyu.
1Corinthians16:22 Ngot ko machamei chi age tugul Kiptaiyat
1Corinthians16:23 Ingotebi kobotok mieindab Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo.
1Corinthians16:24 Ingoteb chamnyennyi kobotok tugul eng’ Kristo Jesu. Amen.

Galatians1:2 ak tupchosiek tugul che mi kobota

Galatians1:5 nenyi torornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen.

Galatians1:8 Agot ngo achek
Galatians1:9 Ko u ye kiga kemwa eng’ tai

Galatians2:4 amu tupchosiek che bo lembech che kigimut kobwa orit eng’ ung’ot

Ephesians1:2 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo.
Ephesians1:3 Iberurot Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo
Ephesians1:4 ko u ye kilewenech eng’ inendet ye kitom kelumda ng’ony
Ephesians1:5 ko u ye kiga sib kolewenech kenamech keegu werik eng’ Jesu Kristo eng’ inendet
Ephesians1:6 agoi kalosunetab torornatetab mieindanyi
Ephesians1:7 ne kitinye eng’ inendet katiagennyo eng’ korotikyik
Ephesians1:8 che kiyai kotesak eng’ achek eng’ ng’omnatet tugul ak naet
Ephesians1:9 ko kagoboruech ung’otiet ne bo magennyi
Ephesians1:10 agoi tononjinet ne bo ripsetab betusiek che yamegei
Ephesians1:11 ne kiyaech eng’ inendet keegu borotennyi
Ephesians1:12 si kobiit keegu kalosunetab torornatennyi
Ephesians1:13 Kiogas ak okwek eng’ inendet ng’olyotab imanit
Ephesians1:14 ne tongoaniatab borotennyo
Ephesians1:15 Amu nito anyun
Ephesians1:16 ko mata asis agoito kongoi agobo okwek
Ephesians1:17 ale ingogonok Jehovah ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo
Ephesians1:18 ko kagokweng’ogis konyekab mugulelwekwok
Ephesians1:19 ak kit ne u oindo ne siirtoot ne bo kamuktaennyi eng’ achek che kiyani
Ephesians1:20 ne kiyai eng’ Kristo
Ephesians1:21 ne toror kosiir laitornatet tugul
Ephesians1:22 ak kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekyik
Ephesians1:23 noto ko bortanyi

Ephesians3:4 si

Ephesians3:8 Kigigona mieini

Ephesians3:19 ak onai chamnyetab Kristo ne siirei naet

Ephesians5:1 Oegu anyun kasubikab Jehovah
Ephesians5:2 ak obendate chamnyet
Ephesians5:3 Ago ko u ye nyoljin bik che tililen ko mat ong’alale eng’ kwenung’wong’ sokset
Ephesians5:4 anan tewernat
Ephesians5:5 Amu ongen nito iman ole
Ephesians5:6 Amat koberberak chi eng’ ng’alek che manamegei ak kiy: amu nyonjin nereknatet ne bo Jehovah werikab ngelelnatet amu tuguchuto.
Ephesians5:7 Noto anyun
Ephesians5:8 amu kio mesundeito eng’ betusiek alak
Ephesians5:9 (amu logoiyatab lapkeiyet ko eng’ mieindo tugul ak imanda ak imanit)
Ephesians5:10 si onai noto taachaksei eng’ Kiptaiyat;
Ephesians5:11 amoyai yamdaet ak boisionikab mesundeito
Ephesians5:12 amu tuguk che yaei ichek eng’ ung’ot ko tewernat ngelen kemwa.
Ephesians5:13 Ago tuguk tugul che kigere kong’ ko ng’ang’aksei eng’ lapkeiyet: amu kiy age tugul ne kibortoi ko lapkeiyet.
Ephesians5:14 Noto anyun
