Ephesians5:16 oboisie saisiek komie
Ephesians5:17 Noto anyun amoberberitu
Ephesians5:18 Amat obogitye eng’ maiyek
Ephesians5:19 ong’alaljinige eng’ tienwogikab kalosunet ak tienwogik ak tienwogikab tamirmiriet
Ephesians5:20 ogoitoi kongoi kotugul agobo tuguk tugul eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo
Ephesians5:21 oming’injige ge eng’ kaiyweisietab Kristo.
Ephesians5:22 Osotichu
Ephesians5:23 Amu manong’otiot ko metitab osotiot
Ephesians5:24 Ago ko u ye kase it kaniset Kristo
Ephesians5:25 Manong’otaichu
Ephesians5:26 si kobiit kotaban
Ephesians5:27 si kobiit komutyigei kaniset
Ephesians5:28 Ko u noto kanyolji manong’otaik agichek kocham osotikwak ko u ye chamei borwekwak ichegei. Inendet ne chamei osotiondennyi kochamegei inegei:
Ephesians5:29 amu mami chi ne wechei bortanyi; ago baei ak koribei
Ephesians5:30 amu ki kebeberwek che bo bortanyi.
Ephesians5:31 Amu ng’olyondoni
Ephesians5:32 O ung’otioni: ago ang’alali agobo Kristo ak kaniset.
Ephesians5:33 Ago ingocham chi age tugul osotiondennyi
Ephesians6:1 Lagochu
Ephesians6:2 Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet (nito ng’atutiet ne bo tai ne boto kayomiset)
Ephesians6:3 si kobiit komieit eng’ inye
Ephesians6:4 Ak okwek
Ephesians6:5 Otwogichu
Ephesians6:6 ama eng’ otwognatet ne kigeerei
Ephesians6:7 oyae boisiet eng’ chamnyet
Ephesians6:8 ongen ole kiy age tugul ne mie ne yaei chi age tugul
Ephesians6:9 Ak okwek kiptainichu
Ephesians6:10 Ne bo let anyun
Ephesians6:11 Olaach karikab luget komugul che bo Jehovah
Ephesians6:12 Amu ma bo kabelennyo bo ge borto ak korotik
Ephesians6:13 Noto anyun onam karikab luget komugul che bo Jehovah
Ephesians6:14 Otononse anyun
Ephesians6:15 ak ko kaoratyi kelyekwok bekyinet ne bo logoiywek che miach che bo kalyet;
Ephesians6:16 ak onam koboto chun tugul long’etab kayanet
Ephesians6:17 Ak onam kutwetab yetunet
Ephesians6:18 Osa betusiek tugul eng’ Tamirmiriet koboto saet tugul ak kagaigaet
Ephesians6:19 Ak agobo ane
Ephesians6:20 amu a tononjinindet ne bo noto eng’ sirimwek; si kobiit ang’alal eng’ choto eng’ nyiganatet
Ephesians6:21 Ago si kobiit onai ak okwek ng’alekyuk
Ephesians6:22 ne koayokwok agobo ng’olyondonito
Ephesians6:23 Ingotebi kalyet koboto tupchosiek
Ephesians6:24 Ingoteb mieindo koboto ichek tugul che chamei Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo eng’ atepto ne ma ng’emaksei.
Philippians1:1 Paulo ak Timoteo
Philippians1:2 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo.
Philippians1:3 Amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi agobo kabwatennyu tugul ne abwatok
Philippians1:4 eng’ somennyu age tugul agobo okwek tugul
Philippians1:5 amu yamdaeng’wong’
Philippians1:6 angen komie ng’olyondonito
Philippians1:7 ko u ye mie eng’ ane abwat ko u nito agobo okwek tugul
Philippians1:8 Amu Jehovah baoriandennyu
Philippians1:9 Ak ni ko saennyu ale kotesak chamnyeng’wong’ mising’ inne eng’ naet ak kaguiyet tugul;
Philippians1:10 si kobiit onai komie tuguk che bo telunatet; si kobiit oegu che matinyei kenisiet
Philippians1:11 ko o nyiitotin eng’ logoekab imanda
Philippians1:12 Ago amache
Philippians1:13 kot kotook monjorornatennyu agobo Kristo eng’ askarik tugul che bo gab laitoriat
Philippians1:14 ak tinyei che chang’ eng’ che kitupche eng’ Kiptaiyat nyiganatet ne o kosiir
Philippians1:15 Amdoi alage Kristo eng’ ng’etkonda
Philippians1:16 amdoi alage eng’ chamnyet
Philippians1:17 ago amdoi alage Kristo eng’ toiyet
Philippians1:18 Nee anyun? Kobate kityo eng’ oret age tugul
Philippians1:19 Amu angen ale walaksei nito koegu yetunennyu
Philippians1:20 Ko u eng’ kagenisiennyu ne ageni mising’ ak kamang’unennyu
Philippians1:21 Amu eng’ ane ngasobe ko Kristo
Philippians1:22 Ago ngasobe eng’ borto
Philippians1:23 Amu kagigikya kwenutab tuguk aeng’
Philippians1:24 ago ngatebi eng’ borto konyolu kosiir agobo okwek.
Philippians1:25 Ak atinye kamang’unoni
Philippians1:26 si kobiit kotesak kalosuneng’wong’ eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ ane
Philippians1:27 Ago ingoek atebeng’wong’ ne nyoljin logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo: si ngot anyo ageerok anan ngo mami ane
Philippians1:28 amat komuok bunik eng’ kiy age tugul: noto kaborunet ne toogunot ne bo luset eng’ ichek
Philippians1:29 amu kigigonok agobo Kristo
Philippians1:30 otinye lugonoto kiogeerena
Philippians2:1 Ngo mitei anyun kagaigaet age tugul eng’ Kristo
Philippians2:2 osulde anyun boiboiyennyu
Philippians2:3 Amoyai kiy age tugul eng’ toiyet
Philippians2:4 amat kogeer chi age tugul eng’ okwek tugukyik kityo
Philippians2:5 Ingotebenok ateboni
Philippians2:6 ne
Philippians2:7 ago kigaigei inendet koek buch ak konam itondab otwogindet
Philippians2:8 ak kingotook eng’ itondab chi
Philippians2:9 Noto anyun
Philippians2:10 si kobiit kogutuny kutundo age tugul eng’ kainetab Jesu
Philippians2:11 si kong’any ng’elyepta age tugul kole Jesu Kristo ko Kiptaiyat
Philippians2:12 Noto anyun
Philippians2:13 amu Jehovah ne boisiei eng’ okwek si omach
Philippians2:14 Oyai tuguk tugul ama eng’ kang’unyng’unyosiek ak tiiyosiek;
Philippians2:15 si kobiit oegu che matinyei lelut ak ko libwoben
Philippians2:16 obortoi ng’olyotab sobondo; si kobiit anyor ne alosunege eng’ betutab Kristo
Philippians2:17 Ee
Philippians2:18 ak ko u noto oboiboitu ak okwek
Philippians2:19 Ago amang’u eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu ale ayokwok Timoteo ko negit
Philippians2:20 Amu matinye chi age ne kergei kabwatennyi ak nenyu
Philippians2:21 Amu cheng’ei ichek tugul chechuak
Philippians2:22 Amu ongen atebennyi komie
Philippians2:23 Amang’u anyun ale
Philippians2:24 ago amang’u eng’ Kiptaiyat ale anyone anendet agane ko negit.
Philippians2:25 Ago kiabwat ale nyolu ayokwok Epaprodito
Philippians2:26 amu kiting’enok emosto okwek tugul
Philippians2:27 amu kimian iman
Philippians2:28 Kayogu inendet anyun eng’ kagiiletab ge ne o
Philippians2:29 Otaach inendet anyun eng’ Kiptaiyat eng’ boiboiyet tugul; ak ogonyit che u noto:
Philippians2:30 amu ki negit kome agobo boisietab Kristo
Philippians3:1 Ne bo let anyun
Philippians3:2 Oribege sesenik
Philippians3:3 amu ki kamuratanet achek
Philippians3:4 agot ngamuchi amang’ge agot eng’ borto: ngobwati chi age tugul kolen tinyei kamang’unet eng’ borto
Philippians3:5 Kigimuratana eng’ betut ne bo sisiit
Philippians3:6 eng’ kagiiletab ge
Philippians3:7 Ago tuguk che ki borotet eng’ ane
Philippians3:8 Ee iman
Philippians3:9 ak kenyorua eng’ inendet
Philippians3:10 si kobiit anai inendet
Philippians3:11 si kobiit anyor eng’ or age tugul aiityi ng’eetyetab che kibek.
Philippians3:12 Ma kele kianyoru
Philippians3:13 Che kitupche
Philippians3:14 Agiiljinige tai
Philippians3:15 Noto anyun
Philippians3:16 ago
Philippians3:17 Che kitupche
Philippians3:18 Amu bendoti che chang’ che kiamwawok kotugul agobo ichek
Philippians3:19 ne kagesunenywa ko luset
Philippians3:20 Amu ki bikab kipsengwet: che kigeni Yetindet kobun oloto
Philippians3:21 ne tun walei kileelit bortanyo ne bo nyerotiet
Philippians4:1 Noto anyun
Philippians4:2 Asome mising’ Euodia
Philippians4:3 Ee
Philippians4:4 Oboiboitu eng’ Kiptaiyet kotugul: ak amwae kogeny ale
Philippians4:5 Ingonaak mutyoneng’wong’ eng’ bik tugul. Kagorik Kiptaiyat.
Philippians4:6 Amogereri met eng’ kiy age tugul; ago eng’ kiy age tugul ko eng’ saet ak somet koboto kongoi
Philippians4:7 Ak ribei kalyetab Jehovah
Philippians4:8 Ne bo let anyun
Philippians4:9 Tuguk che kionetge ak che kiotaach ak che kiogas ak che kiogeer eng’ ane
Philippians4:10 Ago koabaibaitu mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat
Philippians4:11 Mang’alali amun matinye kiy: amu kianetge
Philippians4:12 Angen ole ateptoi eng’ terterindo
Philippians4:13 Amuchi ayai tuguk tugul eng’ inendet ne igimita.
Philippians4:14 Ago kioyai ne mie
Philippians4:15 Ak ongen okweget okwek Pilipik
Philippians4:16 amu agot eng’ Tesalonika ko kioyokwa atkai tugul tuguk che kiabanani.
Philippians4:17 Ma kele acheng’e konunet; ago acheng’e logoek che tesoksei eng’ koiteng’wong’.
Philippians4:18 Ago atinye tuguk tugul
Philippians4:19 Ago inyiitwok Jehovah nenyu kit age tugul ne obononi ko u magornatosiekyik eng’ torornatet eng’ Kristo Jesu.
Philippians4:20 Nguno anyun ingobunji Jehovah nenyo
Philippians4:21 Ogat age tugul ne tilil eng’ Kristo Jesu. Igatok tupchosiek che mi kobota.
Philippians4:22 Igatok tugul che tililen
Philippians4:23 Ingoteb mieindab Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo koboto tamirmirikwok.
Colossians1:1 Paulo
Colossians1:2 kisirjini che tililen che kitupche che iyanotin eng’ Kristo
Colossians1:3 Kigochini kongoi Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyandenyo Jesu Kristo
Colossians1:4 ye kingegas agobo kayaneng’wong’ eng’ Kristo Jesu
Colossians1:5 amu kamang’unet ne kigegonoruok eng’ kipsengwet
Colossians1:6 ne kigoityok; ko u ole teptoi agine eng’ ng’ony komugul koiyiei logoek ak ko tesoksei
Colossians1:7 ko u ye kionetge eng’ Epapra chamanennyo ne kiboisiei tugul
Colossians1:8 ne kiiboruech chamnyeng’wong’ ne mi eng’ Tamirmiriet.
Colossians1:9 Amu nito anyun
Colossians1:10 si obendate ko u ye nyolu eng’ Kiptaiyat
Colossians1:11 kigimitok eng’ kamuktaet tugul
Colossians1:12 ogochini kongoi Kwanda
Colossians1:13 ne kisoruech kemong’une kimnatetab mesundeito
Colossians1:14 ne kitinye eng’ inendet katiagennyo
Colossians1:15 Inendet itondab Jehovah ne ma toogu
Colossians1:16 amu kigitoi keyai tuguk tugul eng’ inendet
Colossians1:17 ak bo tai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul
Colossians1:18 Ak inendet metitab borto
Colossians1:19 Amu kichamak komie kele komeny nyiiet tugul eng’ inendet;
Colossians1:20 si kotuiyechigei tuguk tugul inendet
Colossians1:21 Ak nganda kio kipsagarek eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto
Colossians1:22 eng’ bortanyi ne bo banyek
Colossians1:23 ngotebi iman eng’ kayanet
Colossians1:24 Abaibai anyun nguno eng’ nyalilwogikyuk agobo okwek
Colossians1:25 ak
Colossians1:26 ung’otiet ne kigiuny koboch kenyisiek tugul che kigosiirto ak ibinwek: ago nguno
Colossians1:27 che kicham Jehovah kong’ang’ji kit ne u magornatosiekab torornatet ne bo ung’otionito eng’ Bororiosiek
Colossians1:28 inendet ne kimwaitoi
Colossians1:29 abirtochinige agine noto
Colossians2:1 Amu amache onai ole agiilige mising’ agobo okwek
Colossians2:2 si kobiit kigaigai mugulelwekwak
Colossians2:3 kigiuny eng’ inendet konoraik tugul che bo ng’omnatet ak naet.
Colossians2:4 Amwae nito ale
Colossians2:5 Amu agot ngo mami ane eng’ borto
Colossians2:6 Ko u ye kiotaach anyun Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyat
Colossians2:7 ko o lumdootin ak ko o teegotin eng’ inendet
Colossians2:8 Oripge si maluulok chi age eng’ ng’omnatennyi ak kaberberisiet ne bo buch
Colossians2:9 amu menyei eng’ inendet eng’ borto nyiiet tugul ne bo Jehovah
Colossians2:10 ak keyaok oegu che nyiitotin eng’ inendet
Colossians2:11 kigimuratanak eng’ inendet eng’ kamuratanet ne kima kiyae eunek
Colossians2:12 ko kagetubok koboto inendet eng’ kabatisanet
Colossians2:13 Ak okwek
Colossians2:14 ko kagobuch siret ne bo arorutik ne kiga kogikyech
Colossians2:15 ko kagorek bounatosiek ak kimnatosiek
Colossians2:16 Noto anyun amat koruokwok chi age tugul agobo amitwogik
Colossians2:17 che uruetab tuguk che bwanei; ago borto ko bo Kristo.
Colossians2:18 Amat korebenak chi melektang’wong’ eng’ oret ne machei inendet
Colossians2:19 ama namei komie Metit
Colossians2:20 Ko u ye kiobegu koboto Kristo omong’une konetisiosiek che bo tai che bo ng’ony
Colossians2:21 amonam
Colossians2:22 (betos tuguchuto tugul ye kiboisie)
Colossians2:23 Tinyei tuguchoto kaborunet ne bo ng’omnatet eng’ chamet ne bo kalosunet
Colossians3:1 Ko u ye king’eetye anyun koboto Kristo
Colossians3:2 Obwat tuguk che mi barak
Colossians3:3 Amu kiobegu
Colossians3:4 Ye tun took Kristo
Colossians3:5 Obar anyun kebeberwekwok che mitei ng’ony; sokset
Colossians3:6 nyonjin nereknatetab Jehovah werikab ngelelnatet amu tuguchoto;
Colossians3:7 eng’ tuguchoto che kiobendote ak okwek eng’ tai
Colossians3:8 Ago nguno olakte ak okwek tuguchuto tugul; neregek
Colossians3:9 amomwachige lembech
Colossians3:10 ak koolaach chito ne leel
Colossians3:11 ole mating’e boroindo Yunanindet ak Yahudiot
Colossians3:12 Noto anyun
Colossians3:13 omuitochinige
Colossians3:14 ak otes eng’ tuguchuto tugul chamnyet
Colossians3:15 Ak ingoboi kalyetab Kristo mugulelwekwok
Colossians3:16 Ingomenyok ng’olyotab Kristo eng’ magornatet
Colossians3:17 Ak kit age tugul ne oyae
Colossians3:18 Osotichu
Colossians3:19 Manong’otaichu
Colossians3:20 Lagochu
Colossians3:21 Kwanisiechu
Colossians3:22 Otwogichu
Colossians3:23 kit age tugul ne oyae
Colossians3:24 ongen ole otaache eng’ Kiptaiyat melekto ne bo borotet; oote Kiptaiyat Kristo.
Colossians3:25 Amu inendet ne yaei ne ya
Colossians4:1 Kiptainichu
Colossians4:2 Ogiilige kotugul eng’ saet
Colossians4:3 osaiywech ak achek
Colossians4:4 si abortoi
Colossians4:5 Obendoti eng’ ng’omnatet eng’ taitab icheget che mi sang’
Colossians4:6 Ingoteb ng’alekwok eng’ mieindo kotugul
Colossians4:7 Mwawok ng’alekyuk tugul Tukiko
Colossians4:8 ne koayokwok amu ng’olyondonito

Colossians4:10 Igatok Aristarko ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai
Colossians4:11 ak Jesu

Colossians4:13 Amu abaoriani agobo inendet
Colossians4:14 Igatok Luka
Colossians4:15 Ogat tupchosiek che mitei Laodikia
Colossians4:16 Ak ye kagesoman baruani eng’ kwenung’wong’
Colossians4:17 Ak omwachi Arkipo olenji
Colossians4:18 Kagatennyu ane Paulo eng’ eunnyu. Obwat monjorornatennyu. Ingoteb mieindo kobotok.
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo
1Thessalonians1:2 Kimwachini Jehovah kongoi kotugul agobo okwek tugul
1Thessalonians1:3 kibwati ne magisise
1Thessalonians1:4 kingen leweneng’wong’
1Thessalonians1:5 kele kima bwanjok logoiywekyok che miach eng’ ng’olyot kityo
1Thessalonians1:6 Ak kioegu kasubikyok
1Thessalonians1:7 kot oegu kaborunoik eng’ tugul che iyani eng’ Makedonia ak eng’ Akaya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Amu kigogasak ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat kobun olong’wong’
1Thessalonians1:9 Amu icheget che ibortoi agobo achek ole kigibwanunde oldang’wong’; ak ko u ye kioweekyige Jehovah olakte kanamonik
1Thessalonians1:10 ak ogeni Werinnyi ne bunu kipsengwet
1Thessalonians2:1 Amu ongen okwek
1Thessalonians2:2 ago kingo kaginyalilech eng’ tai ak kitewerech eng’ Pilipi
1Thessalonians2:3 Amu ma bo kateunennyo lelut
1Thessalonians2:4 ago ko u ye kigoyanwech Jehovah keegu che tononjin logoiywek che miach
1Thessalonians2:5 Amu kima kinyoruech eng’ sait age tugul keboisie ng’alekab kachaunetab ge
1Thessalonians2:6 ama kicheng’e teegisto eng’ bik
1Thessalonians2:7 Ago kigi taloen eng’ kwenung’wong’
1Thessalonians2:8 ko u noto
1Thessalonians2:9 Amu obwati
1Thessalonians2:10 O baorinik okwek
1Thessalonians2:11 ko u ye ongen ole kigiteechindoite chi age tugul eng’ okwek
1Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit obendate ko u ye nyolu eng’ Jehovah
1Thessalonians2:13 Kimwachini anyun Jehovah kongoi
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu okwek anyun
1Thessalonians2:15 che kibar Kiptaiyat Jesu ak maotik
1Thessalonians2:16 etenech keng’alalji Bororiosiek si kobiit kesor; inyiiti kotugul tengekwogikwak: ago nyonjin ichek nereknatet agoi let.
1Thessalonians2:17 Ago
1Thessalonians2:18 amu kigimache kebwa olong’wong’
1Thessalonians2:19 Amu tos nee kamang’unennyo
1Thessalonians2:20 Amu okwek torornatennyo ak boiboiyennyo.
1Thessalonians3:1 Noto anyun ye kingo mata kimuch kemuite
1Thessalonians3:2 ak kiyogu Timoteo
1Thessalonians3:3 si maing’eak chi age tugul eng’ nyalilwogichuto; amu ongen okweget ole kigilewenwech choto.
1Thessalonians3:4 Amu iman
1Thessalonians3:5 Amu ng’olyondonito ye kimata amuch amuita
1Thessalonians3:6 Ago
1Thessalonians3:7 amu ng’olyondonito anyun
1Thessalonians3:8 amu kisoptosi nguno
1Thessalonians3:9 Amu kongoi nee ne kimuchi kigochi Jehovah kogeny agobo okwek
1Thessalonians3:10 kisae mising’ kemoi ak bet si kobiit kegeer togochikwok
1Thessalonians3:11 Ingondochi anyun bandanyo kebwa oldang’wong’
1Thessalonians3:12 ingogonok Kiptaiyat otesage ak obaraitu eng’ chamnyet okwege eng’ okwege
1Thessalonians3:13 si kobiit kogimit mugulelwekwok ko motinye kiy ne kimuchi kiruogunenok eng’ tililindo eng’ taitab Jehovah nenyo ak ko Kwandanyo
1Thessalonians4:1 Ne bo let anyun
1Thessalonians4:2 Amu ongen ng’atutik che kigigonok achek eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu.
1Thessalonians4:3 Amu nito magetab Jehovah
1Thessalonians4:4 Si kobiit konai chi tugul eng’ okwek komuch gei
1Thessalonians4:5 ma eng’ maget ne bo kasetab miat
1Thessalonians4:6 amat koyai chi kachiliilut anan koyachi ne ya tupchennyi eng’ ng’olyondonito: amu Kiptaiyat yaaktaindetab mugetut eng’ tuguchuto tugul
1Thessalonians4:7 Amu kima kuurjech Jehovah simdo
1Thessalonians4:8 Inendet ne esioi
1Thessalonians4:9 Ago ma nyolu kesirwak agobo chamnyetab tupchosiek; amu onetotin okweget eng’ Jehovah si ochamnye;
1Thessalonians4:10 amu oyae ko u noto iman eng’ tupchosiek tugul che mitei Makedonia komugul. Ago kiteeiywok
1Thessalonians4:11 ak onetge otebi eng’ mutyonet
1Thessalonians4:12 si obendate ko u ye nyolu eng’ taitab ichek che mi sang’
1Thessalonians4:13 Ago magimache anyun
1Thessalonians4:14 Amu ngiyani kele kime Jesu ak kong’eet kogeny
1Thessalonians4:15 Amu kimwawok ni eng’ ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat
1Thessalonians4:16 Amu chorugei Kiptaiyat inendet eng’ kipsengwet
1Thessalonians4:17 ak achek anyun che kisoptosi
1Thessalonians4:18 Noto anyun ogaigaige okwege eng’ ng’alechuto.
1Thessalonians5:1 Ma nyolu anyun kesirwak
1Thessalonians5:2 Amu ongen okweget komie ole nyonei betutab Kiptaiyat ko u chorin ne nyonei kemoi.
1Thessalonians5:3 Ye mwaei ichek kolen
1Thessalonians5:4 Ago okwek
1Thessalonians5:5 amu okwek tugul ko o werikab lapkeiyet
1Thessalonians5:6 noto anyun among’ keruiye ko u bik alak
1Thessalonians5:7 Amu icheget che ruitos koruitos kemoi; ak icheget che bogitos kobogitos kemoi.
1Thessalonians5:8 Ago ongeegu che kiribegei
1Thessalonians5:9 Amu kima lewenjech Jehovah nereknatet
1Thessalonians5:10 ne kimechech
1Thessalonians5:11 Noto anyun ogaigaige okwege eng’ okwege
1Thessalonians5:12 Ago kisomok
1Thessalonians5:13 ak ogonyit ichek mising’ inne eng’ chamnyet agobo boisienywa. Otebi eng’ kalyet okwege eng’ okwege.
1Thessalonians5:14 Ak kitigonok
1Thessalonians5:15 Ogeer si mayaakyi chi age tugul chito age yaitio eng’ yaitio; ago osub noto mie kotugul
1Thessalonians5:16 Oboiboitu betusiek tugul;
1Thessalonians5:17 osae kotugul;
1Thessalonians5:18 omwae kongoi eng’ tuguk tugul: amu nito magetab Jehovah eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ okwek.
1Thessalonians5:19 Amogirinde Tamirmiriet;
1Thessalonians5:20 amosas maoinatosiek;
1Thessalonians5:21 otiem tuguk tugul; onam mising’ noto mie;
1Thessalonians5:22 oistoege kiy age tugul ne ya.
1Thessalonians5:23 Ak ingotabanak eng’ katabanet ne nyiitat Jehovah ne bo kalyet; ak ingoribogis komie tamirmirikwok ak sobonwekwok ak borwekwok
1Thessalonians5:24 Inendet ne kuurok ko inendet ne kiyani
1Thessalonians5:25 Tupchosiechu
1Thessalonians5:26 Ogat tupchosiek tugul eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil.
1Thessalonians5:27 Ayosiewok eng’ Kiptaiyat ale kesomanji baruani che kitupche tugul.
1Thessalonians5:28 Ingotebi mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo kobotok.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo
2Thessalonians1:2 Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo.
2Thessalonians1:3 Kanyol kemwachi Jehovah kongoi betusiek tugul agobo okwek
2Thessalonians1:4 kot kichounenok ge okwek eng’ kanisosiekab Jehovah amu muitaeng’wong’ ak kayanet eng’ usisiosiekwok tugul ak nyalilwogik che omuitoi;
2Thessalonians1:5 nito kaborunet ne toogunot ne bo kiruogetab imanda ne bo Jehovah; si kobiit kiitok kele onyolu eng’ bounatetab Jehovah
2Thessalonians1:6 si ngo kiy ne bo imanda eng’ Jehovah koyaakyi mugetut ne bo nyalilda icheget che inyalilok
2Thessalonians1:7 ak kogonok kamuung’et kobotech
2Thessalonians1:8 eng’ mat ne lalei
2Thessalonians1:9 che tun nyoru biret
2Thessalonians1:10 ye tun nyo si kobiit kitoror eng’ chechik che tililen; ak kekwong’e eng’ ichek tugul che iyani (amu kigiyan baornatennyo eng’ okwek)
2Thessalonians1:11 Noto anyun kisaiywok kotugul
2Thessalonians1:12 si kobiit kitoror kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu eng’ okwek
2Thessalonians2:1 Kisomok anyun
2Thessalonians2:2 si motoptobense ochokyi eng’ kabwatutikwok
2Thessalonians2:3 amat kong’alak chi eng’ kiy age tugul; amu maitu betunoto
2Thessalonians2:4 inendet ne kirindoi ak kotororegei kogirindoi tugul che kiguure Jehovah anan che kilosu; si koteb anyun eng’ hekalutab Jehovah
2Thessalonians2:5 Tos mobwati
2Thessalonians2:6 Ak nguno ongen noto ne ranyei
2Thessalonians2:7 Amu boisiei nguno ung’otietab ngelelnatet; kobate mi agenge ne ranyei nguno
2Thessalonians2:8 Ak yeityo keng’any ngeleliot
2Thessalonians2:9 nyonunennyi konamegei ak boisietab Setani koboto kamuget tugul ak kaborunoik ak kwong’utik che bo lembech
2Thessalonians2:10 koboto kenisiet tugul che ma bo imanda agobo ichek che lustos; amu ma taach chamnyetab imanit
2Thessalonians2:11 Amu nito anyun
2Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit kiruokyi ichek tugul che ma iyan imanit
2Thessalonians2:13 Ago kanyol kemwachi Jehovah kongoi kotugul agobo okwek
2Thessalonians2:14 kiguurok anyun eng’ choto eng’ logoiywekyok che miach
2Thessalonians2:15 Noto anyun
2Thessalonians2:16 Nguno anyun
2Thessalonians2:17 kogaigai mugulelwekwok ak kogimit ichek eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie ak ng’olyot.
2Thessalonians3:1 Ne bo let anyun
2Thessalonians3:2 si kobiit kesoruech eng’ bik che ngelelik ak che yaachen; amu matinyei tugul kayanet.
2Thessalonians3:3 Ago Kiptaiyat ko ne kiyani
2Thessalonians3:4 Ak kitinye kamang’unet eng’ Kiptaiyat agobo okwek
2Thessalonians3:5 Ak ingondochi Kiptaiyat mugulelwekwok agoi chamnyetab Jehovah
2Thessalonians3:6 King’atok anyun
2Thessalonians3:7 Amu ongen okweget ko u ye kanyol oyai ko u ye kiyae: amu kima kitebi achek eng’ kwenung’wong’ ko u bik che maribegei;
2Thessalonians3:8 ama kiam amitwogikab chi age tugul buch
2Thessalonians3:9 ma amu kele magitinye kimnatet
2Thessalonians3:10 Amu agot ye kigimi kobotok
2Thessalonians3:11 Amu kigase agobo alak eng’ kwenung’wong’ che bendoti eng’ bistoet
2Thessalonians3:12 Ago king’ate ak kiteechini che u choto eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo
2Thessalonians3:13 Ago okwek
2Thessalonians3:14 Ak ngo magase it chi age tugul ng’olyondennyo eng’ baruani
2Thessalonians3:15 Amoiit inendet ole bunyot
2Thessalonians3:16 Nguno anyun ingogonok kalyet Kiptaiyat inendet
2Thessalonians3:17 Kagatennyu ane Paulo eng’ eunnyu
2Thessalonians3:18 Ingoteb mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo kobotok okwek tugul.
1Timothy1:1 Paulo
1Timothy1:2 asirjini Timoteo lakwennyu
1Timothy1:3 Ko u ye kiasomin ale itebe Epeso
1Timothy1:4 anan koepchi it atindonik ak tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto
1Timothy1:5 Ago kasuldaetab ng’atutioni ko chamnyet ne bunu muguleldo ne tilil ak kabwatet ne mie ak kayanet ne matinyei kenisiet:
1Timothy1:6 ye kingo kagochilil bik alak eng’ tuguchuto
1Timothy1:7 chamei koek konetikab Ng’atutiet
1Timothy1:8 Ago kingen kele mie Ng’atutiet
1Timothy1:9 kongen kole kima kiyai Ng’atutiet agobo chi ne bo imanda
1Timothy1:10 agobo che soksei
1Timothy1:11 ko u ye mwaei logoiywek che miach che bo torornatetab Jehovah ne iberurot
1Timothy1:12 Amwachini kongoi inendet
1Timothy1:13 nganda kia chi ne chubisiei eng’ tai
1Timothy1:14 ak kitesak mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo kobarait koboto kayanet ak chamnyet ne mi eng’ Kristo Jesu.
1Timothy1:15 Bo iman ng’olyondoni
1Timothy1:16 ago kianyoru rirenetab ge amu ng’olyondoni
1Timothy1:17 Ingobunji anyun nguno Laitoriat ne bo koigeny
1Timothy1:18 Kagonin kayomisoni inye lakwennyu Timoteo
1Timothy1:19 iname kayanet ak kabwatet ne mie; che
1Timothy1:20 eng’ choto ko Humenayo ak Aleksandro; che kiagochi Setani
1Timothy2:1 Ne bo tai anyun aboru ale ingoyaak somutik
1Timothy2:2 agobo laitorinik ak tugul che tinyei bounatet; si kobiit ketebe kalyet ak mutyonet eng’ kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah ak teegisto.
1Timothy2:3 Mie nito ak ko taagaksei eng’ taitab Jehovah Yetindennyo;
1Timothy2:4 ne machei kole kesor bik tugul
1Timothy2:5 Amu mitei Jehovah agenge
1Timothy2:6 ne kiigoitogei koek ne kitiage tugul; ne tun kibaorianjin eng’ betusiekyik;
1Timothy2:7 kigindea anyun agobo noto aek amdoindet ak ne kiyoktoi (amwae imanit
1Timothy2:8 Amache anyun ale kosaei murenik eng’ komosta age tugul
1Timothy2:9 Ko u noto kobogorisiek ingolaach ge eng’ kalaakset ne nyolu
1Timothy2:10 ago (ko u ye nyoljin kobogorisiek che ibortogei kole bikab Jehovah icheget) eng’ boisionik che miach.
1Timothy2:11 Ingonetgei kobogoriot eng’ mutyonet koboto kasetab it.
1Timothy2:12 Ago machamjini kobogoriot konetis
1Timothy2:13 Amu kigiyai Adam korok
1Timothy2:14 ak kima king’al Adam
1Timothy2:15 ago kisoru eng’ sigisiet
1Timothy3:1 Bo iman ng’olyondoni
1Timothy3:2 Kanyolji anyun ribindet koek ne magigeerjin ng’olyo ne ma litit
1Timothy3:3 ne ma kimaiya
1Timothy3:4 ne bou gonnyi komie
1Timothy3:5 (ago ngo manai chi ole boundoi gonnyi
1Timothy3:6 Ama chi ne kota koyani
1Timothy3:7 Ak kogeny konyoljin kotinyei baornatet ne mie eng’ icheget che mi sang’; si maibutyi tewernatet ak mestetab oindet.
1Timothy3:8 Ko u noto kiboitinikab kaniset kanyol kotebi eng’ teegisto
1Timothy3:9 che namei ung’otietab kayanet eng’ kabwatet ne tilil.
1Timothy3:10 Ak nyolu ketiem chuto agichek korok; ingoyai anyun ichek boisietab kiboitinik ngo magigeerjin ng’olyo ne ma litit.
1Timothy3:11 Ko u noto kobogorisiek
1Timothy3:12 Ingoek kiboitinikab kaniset manong’otaikab osotiot agenge
1Timothy3:13 Amu icheget che kigobois komie eng’ boisionoto bo kiboitinik
1Timothy3:14 Kasirun tuguchu
1Timothy3:15 ago ngot agage
1Timothy3:16 Ak ne matiny
1Timothy4:1 Ago mwaei Tamirmiriet kotook
1Timothy4:2 eng’ chombilisietab bik che ng’alali lembech
1Timothy4:3 che etei kitunis
1Timothy4:4 Amu mie yautiet age tugul ne bo Jehovah
1Timothy4:5 amu kitilili eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah ak saet.
1Timothy4:6 Ngot ibwatyi che kitupche tuguchu
1Timothy4:7 ago esie atindonik che bo tangoita che manamegei ak oretab Jehovah
1Timothy4:8 amu borot ne matia kagiiletab ge ne bo borto; ago borotet eng’ tuguk tugul kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah
1Timothy4:9 Bo iman ng’olyondoni
1Timothy4:10 Kiyae anyun boisiet ne o amu nito ak kigiilige
1Timothy4:11 Ng’at tuguchu ak inet.
1Timothy4:12 Amat kosas chi ming’inateng’ung’; ago egu kaborunet eng’ ichek che iyani
1Timothy4:13 Agoi anyo
1Timothy4:14 Amebagakte iboisie konunet ne itinye
1Timothy4:15 Igiiljige tuguchuto; igochige mising’; si kotook eng’ bik tugul bandang’ung’ ne bo tai.
1Timothy4:16 Ripge
1Timothy5:1 Amerasyi boiyo
1Timothy5:2 chebiosok ko u kametisiek
1Timothy5:3 Teech mosogik che mosogik iman.
1Timothy5:4 Ago ngo tinyei mosoget age tugul lagok anan mochogoronik
1Timothy5:5 Ak inendet ne mosoget iman
1Timothy5:6 Ago inendet ne suegei ko kagome agot ngo sobei.
1Timothy5:7 Ng’at tuguchuto
1Timothy5:8 Ago ngo maribei chi bikyik
1Timothy5:9 Amat kesirji ole kisirjin mosogik kotom koit kenyisiek tamanwogik lo
1Timothy5:10 ne kimwaitae inendet boisionik che miach; ngo kigobai lagok
1Timothy5:11 Ago esie mosogik che mengechen; amu ye kagongelelji Kristo
1Timothy5:12 tinyei kiruoget anyun
1Timothy5:13 Koboto noto anyun konetgei koek chorirenik
1Timothy5:14 Noto anyun achame ale kitun mosogik che ta ko mengechen
1Timothy5:15 amu agot nguno ko kagomasta alak kosub Setani.
1Timothy5:16 Ngo tinyei kobogoriot ne iyanat mosogik
1Timothy5:17 Ingiityi boisiek che bou komie
1Timothy5:18 Amu mwaei sirutiet kole
1Timothy5:19 Ametaach kataamset agobo boiyo
1Timothy5:20 Ker kong’ eng’ taitab bik tugul icheget che yaei tengekwogik
1Timothy5:21 Kang’atin anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah
1Timothy5:22 Amegonoor chi age tugul eunek eng’ sartaet
1Timothy5:23 Koboch nguno ko mata iee beek kityo
1Timothy5:24 Toogunotin tengekwogikab bik alak
1Timothy5:25 Ko u noto agine mitei boisionik che miach che toogunotin; ak che ma u choto ko maimugaksei koung’ogis.
1Timothy6:1 Ingoiityi otwogik alak tugul che ratotin kole nyoljin kiptainikwak teegisto tugul
1Timothy6:2 Ak ichek che tinyei kiptainik che iyanotin
1Timothy6:3 Ngoneti chi age tugul konetisiet ne ter
1Timothy6:4 komenei
1Timothy6:5 boriosiekab bik che kigong’emogis kabwatutikwak
1Timothy6:6 Ago kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah koboto yametab ge eng’ tuguk che kitinye
1Timothy6:7 amu kima kiibu kiy konyo ng’ony
1Timothy6:8 ago kitinye amitwogik ak ngoroik; yamech choto.
1Timothy6:9 Ago ichek che machei koek magorek kobutyin yomset ak mestet ak magutik che chang’ che berberen
1Timothy6:10 Amu chametab siling’isiek ko tigitiot agenge ne bo yaitwogik alak tugul: che kigong’asyigei alage kot kometo kayanet ak kigotorgei eng’ arogenosiek che chang’.
1Timothy6:11 Ago inye
1Timothy6:12 Yai luget ne mie ne bo kayanet
1Timothy6:13 Kang’atin anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah
1Timothy6:14 ale irib ng’atutiet amanyor berut
1Timothy6:15 ne tun ibortoi eng’ betusiekyik
1Timothy6:16 ne tinyei inegei sobondab koigeny
1Timothy6:17 Ng’at magorek che bo betusiechu
1Timothy6:18 ile koyai ne mie
1Timothy6:19 kogonorjigei lumdaet ne mie
1Timothy6:20 Ee
1Timothy6:21 ne kigosub alage ak kigochiliil eng’ kayanet. Ingoteb mieindo koboten.
2Timothy1:1 Paulo
2Timothy1:2 asirjini Timoteo
2Timothy1:3 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi
2Timothy1:4 atinye emosto ageerin
2Timothy1:5 ye kingibwatwa kayanet ne matinyei kenisiet ne mi eng’ inye; ne kimenyei korok eng’ ingogo Lois
2Timothy1:6 Abwatun anyun amu nito ale iyuokyi konunet ne bo Jehovah
2Timothy1:7 Amu kima konech Jehovah tamirmirietab nyogoriet
2Timothy1:8 Amelilanji anyun baornatetab Kiptaiyandennyo
2Timothy1:9 ne kisoruech ak koguurech eng’ kuurset ne tilil
2Timothy1:10 ago kagotook nguno eng’ toogunetab Yetindennyo Kristo Jesu
2Timothy1:11 kigindea agobo noto aek amdoindet
2Timothy1:12 Anyoru anyun nyalilwogichu agichek agobo noto: ago malilani; amu angen inendet ne kiayan
2Timothy1:13 Nam itondab ng’alek che bo iman che kiigasena
2Timothy1:14 Rib eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne menyei eng’ achek
2Timothy1:15 Ingen ni ile
2Timothy1:16 Ingogochi Kiptaiyat rirenet gotab Onesiporo: amu kitoreta konyil che chang’
2Timothy1:17 ago
2Timothy1:18 (ingogochi Kiptaiyat inendet konyor rirenet ne bo Kiptaiyat eng’ betunoto;) ak ingen komie ole te boisiet ne kiyai eng’ Epeso.
2Timothy2:1 Kimitu anyun
2Timothy2:2 Ak tuguk che kiigasena eng’ kwenutab baorinik che chang’
2Timothy2:3 Nam yamdaet ne bo nyalilda
2Timothy2:4 Mami askarindet
2Timothy2:5 Ak ngot koyai chi agine kabeletab ge eng’ ureriosiek
2Timothy2:6 Nyoljin kabatindet ne yaei boisiet ne uui
2Timothy2:7 Ruchi komie kit ne amwae; amu konin Kiptaiyat kaguiyet eng’ tuguk tugul.
2Timothy2:8 Ibwat Jesu Kristo
2Timothy2:9 ne anyorune nyalilda
2Timothy2:10 Noto anyun amuitoi eng’ tuguk tugul amu che kigilewen
2Timothy2:11 Bo iman ng’olyondoni: Amu ngo kigebegu koboto inendet
2Timothy2:12 ngemuite
2Timothy2:13 ngo ma ki bo iman
2Timothy2:14 Ibwatyi ichek tuguchuto
2Timothy2:15 Igiilgei ibartege ile kigoyanun Jehovah iegu kiboitiot ne manyol kolilan
2Timothy2:16 Istoege ng’alek che manamegei ak oretab Jehovah: amu tesoksei koyaagitu kosiir eng’ yaitiet
2Timothy2:17 ak amei ng’olyondenywa ko u chepsergechet: eng’ ichek ko Humenayo ak Pileto;
2Timothy2:18 bik che kigochiliil eng’ imanit
2Timothy2:19 Ago tononi lumeiywot ne kim ne bo Jehovah
2Timothy2:20 Ago eng’ got ne o ko mami terenikab tahabu ak feda kityo
2Timothy2:21 Ngotililgei anyun chi eng’ tuguchuto
2Timothy2:22 Ago mwee magutik che bo neranik
2Timothy2:23 Ago esie teebutik che berberen che mabunu konetisiet
2Timothy2:24 Ama nyoljin otwogindetab Kiptaiyat koyai boriet
2Timothy2:25 ne kere kong’ eng’ mutyonet ichek che kirindoi; tamangab kogochi Jehovah ichek sigunet ne bo naetab imanit
2Timothy2:26 ak kosorgei ichek komong’une mestetab oindet
2Timothy3:1 Ago nai ni ile bwanei eng’ betusiek che bo let egosiek che bichien.
2Timothy3:2 Amu egu bik che chamegei ichegei
2Timothy3:3 che matinyei chamnyet
2Timothy3:4 ng’wektoik
2Timothy3:5 che tinyei kergeindab kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah
2Timothy3:6 Amu biitune chuto che itoti gorik
2Timothy3:7 Che inetegei kotugul
2Timothy3:8 Ak ko u Janne ak Jambre
2Timothy3:9 Ago matesei tai: amu toogu berberindanywa eng’ bik tugul
2Timothy3:10 Ago kiisub inye konetisiennyu
2Timothy3:11 usisiosiek
2Timothy3:12 Ee
2Timothy3:13 Ago tesoksei kiptengeginik ak kenik eng’ yaitiet
2Timothy3:14 Ago tebi inye eng’ tuguk che kiinetge
2Timothy3:15 ak koboch ko i lakwa ko kiingen sirutik che tililen che imuchi kong’omitin agoi yetunet eng’ kayanet ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu.
2Timothy3:16 Bunu kabusetab Jehovah sirutiet age tugul
2Timothy3:17 si kobiit koek chitab Jehovah
2Timothy4:1 Kang’atin anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah
2Timothy4:2 amde ng’olyot; choboge eng’ betut ne nyolu
2Timothy4:3 Amu nyonei betut ne ma tun epchin it agot kitigin konetisiet ne bo imanit; ago
2Timothy4:4 ak koesio koepchi it imanit
2Timothy4:5 Ago ripge inye eng’ tuguk tugul
2Timothy4:6 Amu kigoitoa nguno
2Timothy4:7 Kiayai luget ne mie
2Timothy4:8 koboch nguno ko kagegonorua kutwet ne bo imanda
2Timothy4:9 Igiilge nyonja ko negit:
2Timothy4:10 amu kigobagakta Dema
2Timothy4:11 Luka inegei ne mi kobota. Imutu Mariko
2Timothy4:12 Ago kiayokte Tukiko kwo Epeso.
2Timothy4:13 Ye inyo iibu sumet ak bukusiek
2Timothy4:14 Kiyaiywa ne ya mising’ Aleksandro
2Timothy4:15 ribege inendet; amu kigirinda ng’alekyok mising’ kot.
2Timothy4:16 Ma biit chi ne kitoreta eng’ wolunennyu ne bo tai; kibagakta tugul: amat kiityi ichek ng’olyondonito.
2Timothy4:17 Ago kitonon Kiptaiyat kobota
2Timothy4:18 Sorua Kiptaiyat eng’ boisiet age tugul ne ya
2Timothy4:19 Igat Priska ak Akula
2Timothy4:20 Kitebi Erasto eng’ Korinto: ago kiabagach Tropimo eng’ Mileto komiani.
2Timothy4:21 Igiilge nyo kotom koit betusiek che bo kaititiet. Igatin Eubulo
2Timothy4:22 Ingoteb Kiptaiyat koboto tamirmirieng’ung’. Ingoteb mieindo kobotok.
Titus1:1 Paulo
Titus1:2 eng’ kamang’unet ne bo sobondab koigeny
Titus1:3 ago king’any ng’olyondennyi eng’ betusiekyik eng’ amdaet
Titus1:4 asirjini Tito
Titus1:5 Kiabagakten eng’ Krete amu ng’olyondoni
Titus1:6 ngot komi chi age tugul ne matinyei lelut
Titus1:7 Amu kanyolji ribindetab kaniset koek chi ne matinyei lelut
Titus1:8 ago ne taachei toek
Titus1:9 ne namei ng’olyot ne kiyani ko u ole teptoi konetisiet
Titus1:10 Amu mi bik che chang’ che magase it
Titus1:11 che kanyol keger kutuswekwak; che itarng’anyi go komugul
Titus1:12 Kile age eng’ ichek
Titus1:13 Bo iman baornatanito. Ker kong’ anyun eng’ kimnatet amu noto
Titus1:14 ama epchin it atindonikab Yahudik
Titus1:15 Tililen tuguk tugul eng’ ichek che tililen: ago mami kiy ne tilil eng’ icheget che muruonen che maiyanotin; ago muruonen nautikwak ak kabwatutikwak.
Titus1:16 Mwaei kole ingen Jehovah; ago esioi inendet eng’ boisionikwak
Titus2:1 Ago ng’alal inye agobo ng’alek che nyoljin konetisiet ne bo iman:
Titus2:2 si koripgei boisiek che kagoeegitu
Titus2:3 ko u noto chebiosok che kagoeegitu
Titus2:4 si kobiit konet osotik che mengechen kocham manong’otaikwak
Titus2:5 koek che bou kabwatutikwak
Titus2:6 iteechi neranik agichek koek che bou kabwatutikwak;
Titus2:7 ibartege inyendet eng’ tuguk tugul iegu kaborunet ne bo boisionik che miachen; eng’ konetisieng’ung’ ibarte atebet ne ma ng’emaksei
Titus2:8 ng’alek che bo iman
Titus2:9 Ingogas it otwogik kiptainikwak
Titus2:10 amaek che koen eun
Titus2:11 Amu kigotook mieindab Jehovah
Titus2:12 Inetech kole keesie oret ne matokyingei Jehovah
Titus2:13 kigeni kamang’unet ne iberurot
Titus2:14 ne kiigoitogei agobo achek
Titus2:15 Mwa tuguchuto ak iteechi ak iger kong’ koboto bounatet tugul. Amat kosasin chi age tugul.
Titus3:1 Ibwatyi ichek koming’injigei bounik
Titus3:2 amat komwa kiy ne ya agobo chi age tugul
Titus3:3 Amu kigi berberen agachek keny
Titus3:4 Ago ye kingotook talasietab Jehovah Yetindennyo
Titus3:5 kosoruech
Titus3:6 ne kirong’wech eng’ aiyebindo
Titus3:7 si
Titus3:8 Bo iman ng’olyondoni
Titus3:9 ago istoege teebutik che berber
Titus3:10 Esie chito ne ibu toiyet ye kagitigon ne bo tai ak ne bo aeng’;
Titus3:11 ingen ile chito ne u noto ko kigomasta
Titus3:12 Ye tun kayogu Artema
Titus3:13 Igiilge imonorsechi eng’ bandanywa Sena ng’omotiotab ng’atutik ak Apolo
Titus3:14 Ak ingonetgei bikyok agichek koyai boisionik che miachen kotugul
Titus3:15 Igatin tugul che kemi tugul. Igat ichek che chamech eng’ kayanet. Ingoteb mieindo kobotok okwek tugul.
Philemon1:1 Paulo
Philemon1:2 ak Apia
Philemon1:3 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok ak kalyet
Philemon1:4 Amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi kotugul
Philemon1:5 agase agobo chamnyeng’ung’
Philemon1:6 si koek yamdaetab kayaneng’ung’ ne boisie komie
Philemon1:7 Amu kiatinye boiboiyet ne o ak kagaigaet eng’ chamnyeng’ung’
Philemon1:8 Noto anyun
Philemon1:9 ago
Philemon1:10 asomin mising’ agobo lakwennyu Onesimo
Philemon1:11 inendet ne kima kotoretin eng’ kiy eng’ tai
Philemon1:12 ne kaaweegun inendet ne muguleldanyu:
Philemon1:13 ne kitamache arany ketebi tuwai
Philemon1:14 ago ma amach ayai kiy kotom agas kit ne ibwati; si mabun mieindang’ung’ torjinet
Philemon1:15 Amu abere kiibesienengei eng’ betusiek che matia
Philemon1:16 ma ko u otwogin kogeny
Philemon1:17 Noto anyun ngiita ile ki agenge eng’ boisiet
Philemon1:18 Ago ngo kigoyaun kiy ne ya
Philemon1:19 anendet Paulo ne kasir eng’ eunnyu
Philemon1:20 Ee
Philemon1:21 Kasirun amu amang’u kaseng’ung’ bo it
Philemon1:22 Ago koboto choto ichobwa ole anyo arue: amu amang’u ale eng’ sautikwok amuchi abiit.
Philemon1:23 Igatin Epapra ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai
Philemon1:24 ko u noto Mariko
Philemon1:25 Ingoteb mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo koboto tamirmirikwok. Amen.
Hebrews1:1 Jehovah
Hebrews1:2 ko ne kagong’alalwech eng’ betusiechu bo let
Hebrews1:3 inendet ko kakweng’etab lilindanyi
Hebrews1:4 ko kagoek ne kararan kosiir malaikaisiek
Hebrews1:5 Amu kimwachi malaikaisiek ngorjo eng’ betut age
Hebrews1:6 Ak ye imut kogeny taita konyo ng’ony komwa kole
Hebrews1:7 Ak kimwa agobo malaikaisiek kole
Hebrews1:8 Ago kimwa agobo Werit kole
Hebrews1:9 Kiicham imanda
Hebrews1:10 Ak
Hebrews1:11 Betos choto; ago itebye inye agoi: Ak osegitu tugul ko u ngoriet;
Hebrews1:12 Ak imamani ko u ngoriet ne tabanu barak
Hebrews1:13 Tos kimwachi malaikaisiek ngorjo eng’ betut age
Hebrews1:14 Tos choto tugul ko ma tamirmirik che boisiei
Hebrews2:1 Eng’ noto anyun kanyol kenam mising’ kosiir
Hebrews2:2 Amu ngo tononot ng’olyot ne kigimwau eng’ malaikaisiek ak kigonyor bistoet age tugul ak ngelelnatet melekto ne kageerjinet ne bo imanda;
Hebrews2:3 kechilildoi ano anyun
Hebrews2:4 ak kibaoriani agine Jehovah koboto icheget
Hebrews2:5 Amu ma igochi malaikaisiek koboi ng’onyut ne nyonei
Hebrews2:6 Ago baoriani chito age eng’ komosta age
Hebrews2:7 Kiiyai inendet koming’init kitigin eng’ malaikaisiek; Ilaakyini inendet kutwetab torornatet ak teegisto
Hebrews2:8 Kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekyik. Eng’ noto anyun ko u ye kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it inendet
Hebrews2:9 Ago kigeere inendet ne kigiyai koming’init kitigin eng’ malaikaisiek
Hebrews2:10 Amu kinyolji inendet
Hebrews2:11 Amu inendet ne itililisiei ak ichek che kitilili kobunu agenge: eng’ noto anyun ko mageerei inendet kalilanet koguure ichek che kitupche
Hebrews2:12 kole
Hebrews2:13 Ak kogeny
Hebrews2:14 Amu yamdoi anyun lagok korotik ak borto
Hebrews2:15 si kobiit kotiach ichek tugul che ki ratotin betusiekwak tugul eng’ kaiyweisietab meet.
Hebrews2:16 Amu iman manamei itondab malaikaisiek
Hebrews2:17 Eng’ noto anyun kinyolji keyai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul kogergeit ak tupchosiekyik
Hebrews2:18 Amu ko u ye kinyalil inendet ye kigiyomei
Hebrews3:1 Noto anyun
Hebrews3:2 ne kiek ne kiyani eng’ inendet ne kilewen
Hebrews3:3 Amu kigiit kele nyoljin torornatet ne o kosiir Musa
Hebrews3:4 Amu teechei chito got age tugul; ago inendet ne kiteechei tuguk tugul ko Jehovah.
Hebrews3:5 Ak kiek Musa iman ne kiyani eng’ gotab Jehovah tugul ko u kiboitiot
Hebrews3:6 ago Kristo ko u werit
Hebrews3:7 Noto anyun
Hebrews3:8 Ko mat ouuiit mugulelwekwok
Hebrews3:9 Ye kiyoma kwanisiekwok kotiema
Hebrews3:10 Eng’ noto anyun kianerekyi ibini
Hebrews3:11 Ko u ye kiayosie eng’ neregekyuk ale
Hebrews3:12 Oripge anyun che kitupche
Hebrews3:13 ago oteechige betut age tugul
Hebrews3:14 amu kigeegu yamdoikab Kristo
Hebrews3:15 ye ta kemwaei kele
Hebrews3:16 Amu ng’o che kitagis ye kingogas? Tos ma ichek tugul che kimong’une Misri eng’ Musa?
Hebrews3:17 Ak ng’o che kinerekyi inendet kenyisiek artam? Tos ma icheget che kichalwogenso
Hebrews3:18 Ak ng’o che kiiyosiechi inendet kole magoi it kamuung’ennyi
Hebrews3:19 Kigeere anyun kele kima imuch ichek koit amu ma iyan.
Hebrews4:1 Ongiywei anyun yo ta komi arorutiet ne keite kamuung’ennyi
Hebrews4:2 Amu kigiamwech iman logoiywek che miach
Hebrews4:3 Amu achek che kigiyan keite kamuung’onoto; ko u ye kigomwa inendet kole
Hebrews4:4 Amu kigomwa ko u ni eng’ komosta age agobo betutab tisab kole
Hebrews4:5 ak eng’ yu agine komwa kole
Hebrews4:6 Eng’ noto anyun amu mitei boroindo ne bo alak koit oloto
Hebrews4:7 kamwa kogeny agobo betut age
Hebrews4:8 Amu nda kiga kogochi Josua ichek kamuung’et
Hebrews4:9 Ng’etunot anyun kamuung’etab sabato agobo bikab Jehovah.
Hebrews4:10 Amu inendet ne kagoit kamuung’etab Jehovah ko kagomuuny eng’ boisionikyik
Hebrews4:11 Ongigiilge anyun si keit kamuung’onoto
Hebrews4:12 Amu sobei ng’olyotab Jehovah
Hebrews4:13 Ama mi kiy age tugul ne kigiyai ne ma toogu eng’ tainnyi: ago ng’ang’otin ak yatotin tuguk tugul eng’ taitab konyek che bo inendet ne tun kitetyini atebosiekyok.
Hebrews4:14 Amu kitinye tisiindet ne o ne kigochut kipsengwetisiek
Hebrews4:15 Amu magitinye tisiindet ne o ne maimuchi kogaswech nyalulnatosiekyok; ago ne kigiyom ko u achek eng’ tuguk tugul
Hebrews4:16 Ongerikyi anyun ng’echeret ne bo mieindo eng’ nyiganatet
Hebrews5:1 Amu tisiindet age tugul ne o
Hebrews5:2 inendet ne imuchi korire kimanainik ak che mastoi
Hebrews5:3 ak amu noto anyun
Hebrews5:4 Ama mi chi ne igochingei inegei teegisi
Hebrews5:5 Ko u noto anyun

Hebrews5:7 Ne ki eng’ betusiek che kimi eng’ borto

Hebrews5:9 ak kingo kageyai koek ne igesunotgei
Hebrews5:10 ne kiguure Jehovah tisiindet ne o ko u kit ne ki u Melkisedek.

Hebrews5:12 Amu eng’ ye kita nyolu oegu konetik
Hebrews5:13 Amu age tugul ne luei chego kotom konai koboisie komie ng’olyotab imanda; amu manyurut inendet.
Hebrews5:14 Ago bo bik che eechen amitwogik che uuen
Hebrews6:1 Noto anyun ongebagakte mata ongeng’alale ng’alek che bo tai che bo Kristo
Hebrews6:2 ne bo konetisietab kabatisanosiek

Hebrews7:1 Amu Meldisedeki-nito
Hebrews7:2 ne kipchechi agine Abraham kebebertab taman ne bo tugul ne ye kiweech
Hebrews7:3 ne matinyei kwanda
Hebrews7:4 Obwat anyun ole ki te oindab chichi
Hebrews7:5 Ak tinyei iman werikab Lawi che namei boisietab tisisiet
Hebrews7:6 ago kinam kebeberwekab taman eng’ Abraham inendet ne kima kiitito ichek eng’ orenywa
Hebrews7:7 Ago ne mami tiiyet age tugul
Hebrews7:8 Ak eng’ yu kotaachei bik che begu kebeberwekab taman; ago eng’ oloto
Hebrews7:9 Ak
Hebrews7:10 amu kita komi bortab kwandanyi
Hebrews7:11 Ak nda kimi kagesunatetab ge eng’ tiseinatetab Lawik (amu kinyorune yoto bik Ng’atutiet)
Hebrews7:12 Amu ngot kowalak tiseinatet
Hebrews7:13 Amu inendet ne kimwaitae tuguchu ko bo bororiet age
Hebrews7:14 Amu toogu kele kibunu Kiptaiyandennyo oretab Juda; bororiet ne kima mwaitae Musa ng’olyo age tugul eng’ ng’alekab tisiik.
Hebrews7:15 Ak toogu komie kosiir
Hebrews7:16 ne kigiyai
Hebrews7:17 amu kibaoriani kele
Hebrews7:18 Amu mitei metoet ne bo ng’atutiet ne kiga kindoune
Hebrews7:19 (amu ma yai Ng’atutiet kiy koek ne igesunotgei)
Hebrews7:20 Ama yaaksei ama kiyosio
Hebrews7:21 (amu kigiyai ichek koek tisiik ama mi kayosiet eng’ inendet ne mwaei agobo inendet kole
Hebrews7:22 Ko u noto anyun kiek Jesu tononjinindet ne bo arorutiet ne mie kosiir.
Hebrews7:23 Ago icheget ko kigiyai koek tisiik che chang’
Hebrews7:24 ago amu tebyei inendet koigeny
Hebrews7:25 Eng’ noto anyun komuchi kogeny kosor agoi kasuldaet ichek che bwanjin Jehovah eng’ inendet
Hebrews7:26 Amu nyoljinech tisiindet ne o ne u ni
Hebrews7:27 ne ma nyoljin kogoito tiseiywek betut age tugul
Hebrews7:28 Amu indoi Ng’atutiet bik che nyalulyotin koek tisiik che eechen; ago ng’olyotab kayosiet
Hebrews8:1 Nguno anyun
Hebrews8:2 kiboitiot ne bo tuguk che tililen
Hebrews8:3 Amu kindoi tisiindet age tugul ne o si kogoitoi kagochinoik ak tiseiywek: noto anyun konyolu kotinyei agine tisiindoni kit ne igoitoi.
Hebrews8:4 Nda mi ng’ony
Hebrews8:5 che boisiei eng’ karogutiet ak uruetab tuguk che bo kipsengwet
Hebrews8:6 Ago kagosich nguno boisiet ne mie kosiir
Hebrews8:7 Amu nda kima ko rartaat arorutiet ne bo tai
Hebrews8:8 Amu ye kingonyorji lelutik ichek
Hebrews8:9 Ma ko u kayomiset ne kigiyomisge ak kwanisiekwak Eng’ betut ne kianam eunekwak si amut komong’ eng’ emetab Misri; Amu kima koteptoi kayomisennyu
Hebrews8:10 Amu ni kayomiset ne tun kiyomisyinige ak gotab Israel. Ye ibata betusiechoto
Hebrews8:11 Amu koneti chi tugul chitab kokwennyi
Hebrews8:12 Amu tun arire ichek amu tengekwogikwak
Hebrews8:13 Amu kimwa kole
Hebrews9:1 Noto anyun
Hebrews9:2 Amu kiga kichob emait; ne bo tai ko ole kimi keldab tait
Hebrews9:3 Ak kingesiir anget ne bo aeng’
Hebrews9:4 ne tinyei kapkorosutab tahabu
Hebrews9:5 ak kimi baragunnyi kerubisiekab lilindo che kiiuuri keruetab rirenet; tuguk che magimuchi keng’alale nguno agenge agenge.
Hebrews9:6 Ak kingo kagechob anyun tuguchuto ko u noto
Hebrews9:7 ago
Hebrews9:8 iboru Tamirmiriet ne Tilil eng’ ng’olyondoni kole
Hebrews9:9 ne kalewenetab betusiechu; kigigoitoi eng’ kalewenonoto agine kagochinoik ak tiseiywek
Hebrews9:10 amu (koboto amitwogik ak che kieei ak kaunsosiek che terotin) choto ko ng’atutik che bo borto kityo
Hebrews9:11 Ago Kristo
Hebrews9:12 ama eng’ korotikab kwesik ak moek
Hebrews9:13 Amu ngot kotilili agoi kaunetab borto korotikab kwesik ak kirugik
Hebrews9:14 kotilili anyun ne tia korotikab Kristo
Hebrews9:15 Ak amu ng’olyondonito inendet ko katuiyoindetab kayomiset ne leel
Hebrews9:16 Amu ole mitei arorutiet ne bo nametab tuguk ko kanyol komitei meetab inendet ne kiyaei.
Hebrews9:17 Amu tinyei arorutiet kimnatet ye kabiit meet: tos kim kota kosobei inendet ne kiyaei?
Hebrews9:18 Eng’ noto anyun agot arorutiet ne bo tai
Hebrews9:19 Amu ye kingo kagomwachi Musa bik tugul kayomiset age tugul ko u eng’ Ng’atutiet
Hebrews9:20 komwaei kole
Hebrews9:21 Ak koise kogeny korotik emait koboto tuguk che kiboisie.
Hebrews9:22 Ak eng’ Ng’atutiet ko u kele
Hebrews9:23 Kinyolu anyun kitilil itonwekab tuguk che bo kipsengwetisiek eng’ choto; ago kitilile tuguk che bo kipsengwet tiseiywek che miach kosiir chuto.
Hebrews9:24 Amu kima mong’ji Kristo ole tilil ole kigiyae eunek
Hebrews9:25 ma si kogoitogei konyil che chang’: ko u ye wendi tisiindet ne o ole tilil eng’ kenyit age tugul koibei korotik che ma chechik;
Hebrews9:26 amu nda ki u noto anyun ta kinyoljin konyalil konyil che chang’ koboch ngelumda ng’ony: ago kagong’ang’ak nguno konyil agenge eng’ kagesunetab kenyisiek si kobiit koisto tengekto eng’ tiseiywot ne ki inendet.
Hebrews9:27 Ak ko u ye kiging’at agobo bik kobek konyil agenge
Hebrews9:28 ko u noto Kristo agine
Hebrews10:1 Amu tinyei Ng’atutiet uruetab tuguk che miachen che bwanei
Hebrews10:2 Nda ki u noto
Hebrews10:3 Ago eng’ tiseiywechoto komitei kabwatetab tengekwogik kenyit age tugul.
Hebrews10:4 Amu maimugaksei eng’ korotikab kirugik ak kwesik konem tengekwogik.
Hebrews10:5 Eng’ noto anyun ye kingonyo Kristo ng’ony
Hebrews10:6 Kima ibaibaitu eng’ kagochinoik che kibeelei komugul ak che bo tengekwogik:
Hebrews10:7 Amwa anyun ale
Hebrews10:8 Mwaei ng’alechu mi meto yu kole
Hebrews10:9 yeityo komwa anyun inendet kole
Hebrews10:10 Kigitililech anyun eng’ magonato eng’ kagoitoetab bortab Jesu Kristo konyil agenge ak koyam.
Hebrews10:11 Ak tononi iman tisiindet age tugul eng’ betut age tugul koboisiei ak kogoitoi konyil che chang’ tiseiywechoto
Hebrews10:12 ago tisiindoni
Hebrews10:13 kogeni koboch yoto agoi keyai bunikyik koek ng’echeretab kelyekyik.
Hebrews10:14 Amu kigoyai koek che igesunotingei agoi koigeny eng’ kagoitoet agenge ichek che kigitilil.
Hebrews10:15 Ak baorianjinech agine Tamirmiriet ne Tilil: amu kingobata komwa kole
Hebrews10:16 Ni kayomiset ne tun kiyomisyinige ak ichek Ye ibata betusiechoto
Hebrews10:17 Ama abwati chalwogikwak ak tengekwogikwak kogeny.
Hebrews10:18 Ye mitei anyun nyoetab kaat ne bo chuto
Hebrews10:19 Amu kitinye nyiganatet anyun
Hebrews10:20 eng’ oret ne leel ak kosobei
Hebrews10:21 ak amu kitinye tisiindet ne o ne bou gotab Jehovah;
Hebrews10:22 ongerikte anyun eng’ muguleldo ne bo iman eng’ nyiietab kayanet
Hebrews10:23 ongenam mising’ ng’ang’etab kamang’unennyo si mawalak; amu iman inendet ne kiiaroru:
Hebrews10:24 Ak ongibwatge achege eng’ achege kigimitge eng’ chamnyet ak boisiosiek che miach;
Hebrews10:25 ama kibagaktoi kituiyege achege eng’ achege
Hebrews10:26 Amu ngot kekwetyini keyae tengek ko kagetaach naetab imanit
Hebrews10:27 ago kagenet ne bo kiruoget eng’ kaiyweisiet
Hebrews10:28 Meei chito ne kasas Ng’atutietab Musa ko mami rirenet
Hebrews10:29 obwatitoi ano okwek
Hebrews10:30 Amu kingen inendet ne kigomwa kole
Hebrews10:31 Kit ne bichii kot kibutyi eunekab Jehovah ne sobei.
Hebrews10:32 Ago obwat betusiek che bo keny
Hebrews10:33 ye kioegu
Hebrews10:34 Amu kiorire ichek che ki ratotin
Hebrews10:35 Amowirte anyun nyiganateng’wong’
Hebrews10:36 Amu nyolu otinye muitaet
Hebrews10:37 Amu ta komi kitigin mising’
Hebrews10:38 Ago sobei nenyu ne bo imanda eng’ kayanet
Hebrews10:39 Ago achek ko ma ki bo ichek che ichuchuchegei kobendi luset: ago ki bo ichek che iyani kot koit sorunetab sobondo.
Hebrews11:1 Noto anyun kayanet ko naetab tuguk che kimang’u
Hebrews11:2 Amu kigibaorianjine noto boisiek.
Hebrews11:3 Kinae eng’ kayanet kele kigiyai ng’onyusiek eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah
Hebrews11:4 Kiigochi Abil Jehovah eng’ kayanet tiseiywot ne mie kosiir ne bo Kaen
Hebrews11:5 Kigimut Enok eng’ kayanet si mageer meet; ak kimata kogeer chi inendet
Hebrews11:6 ak ngo mami kayanet ko ma imugaksei kibaibai inendet: amu inendet ne rikyin Jehovah konyoljin koyan kole mi inendet
Hebrews11:7 Kiyai Noa melit eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:8 Kigas it Abraham eng’ kayanet ye kingeguur
Hebrews11:9 Kiek eng’ kayanet kiprutoiyot eng’ emetab arorutiet
Hebrews11:10 amu kiigeni nganaset ne tinyei lumeiywek
Hebrews11:11 Kisich agot Sara agine kimnatet eng’ kayanet komanach ko kagosiirto kenyisiekyik
Hebrews11:12 noto anyun kigisich eng’ agenge
Hebrews11:13 Kibek chuto tugul eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:14 Amu ichek che mwaei tuguk che u choto koboru kole cheng’ei emet ne nenywa.
Hebrews11:15 Ak nda kiga ibwat iman emoni kimong’une
Hebrews11:16 Ago machei kot nguno emet ne kararan kosiir noto
Hebrews11:17 Kingo kagetiem Abraham
Hebrews11:18 ne kiga kemwachi kelenji
Hebrews11:19 koiit kole imuchi Jehovah kong’eet agot eng’ che kigobek
Hebrews11:20 Kiiberur Isak eng’ kayanet Jakobo ak Esau
Hebrews11:21 Kiiberur Jakobo eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:22 Kimwa Josep eng’ kayanet agobo mandaetab lagokab Israel ye ki negit kome; ak kogon ng’atutiet agobo kowekyik.
Hebrews11:23 Kiuny sigikyik Musa eng’ kayanet eng’ arawek somok kingo kagesich
Hebrews11:24 Kiesio Musa eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:25 kolewen keyachi ne ya koboto bikab Jehovah
Hebrews11:26 koiit tewernatet ne kiteweri Kristo kole magornatosiek che eechen kosiir konoraik che bo Misri: amu kiigeni melekto.
Hebrews11:27 Kibagakta Misri eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:28 Kiyai paska eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:29 Kilandae Nyanjet ne Birir eng’ kayanet ko u ye bunei emet ne yaamat; ak ye kilen kotiem Misrik koyai ko u noto kelugui.
Hebrews11:30 Eng’ kayanet ko kilulyo irimoikab Jeriko
Hebrews11:31 Eng’ kayanet ko ma me chepkugoniot Rahab koboto ichek che ki ngelelik
Hebrews11:32 Ara nee anyun age ne ta amwae? Amu mayama boroindo ngot amwa agobo Gideon
Hebrews11:33 che kiiterter bounatosiek eng’ kayanet
Hebrews11:34 kiimis kimnatet ne bo mat
Hebrews11:35 Kitaach kwonyik bikwak che kiga kobek
Hebrews11:36 ak kigitiem alak eng’ chombilet
Hebrews11:37 kigilach eng’ koik
Hebrews11:38 (che kima konyoljin ng’ony ichek)
Hebrews11:39 Ak kingo kagosich chuto tugul baornatet ne kigibaorianji amu kayanenywa
Hebrews11:40 amu kisib kochobwech Jehovah kit ne mie kosiir
Hebrews12:1 Noto anyun
Hebrews12:2 kegeere Jesu ne kandoindet ak ko kawong’unindet ne bo kayanet
Hebrews12:3 Obwat mising’ inendet ne kimuita eng’ kirindaetab ge ne bo kiptengeginik agobo inendet
Hebrews12:4 Tom oyai luget kot kotumdagei korotik
Hebrews12:5 ak kioutie kateunet
Hebrews12:6 Amu inendet ne chamei Kiptaitaiyat
Hebrews12:7 Omuitoi amu kotigonet; yaiywok Jehovah ko u noto ko u ye yachin werik; ng’o werit ne maitigoni kwanda?
Hebrews12:8 Ago ngot ko motinye kotigonet
Hebrews12:9 Ak kigitinye kwanisiek che bo borwekyok che kiitigonech
Hebrews12:10 Amu kiitigonisiei ichek betusiek che ng’ering’ ko u ye kigeerei kole mie; ago inendet
Hebrews12:11 Ma toogu kotigonet tugul kele bo boiboiyet eng’ betunnyi; ago bo arogenet: ago ye ibata koiichi icheget che kinetegei noto
Hebrews12:12 Eng’ noto anyun onamji barak eunek che nyalulyotin
Hebrews12:13 ak oyachi kelyekwok ortinwek che lititen
Hebrews12:14 Ogiilge otebi eng’ kalyet koboto bik tugul
Hebrews12:15 ogeer si marartae chi mieindab Jehovah; si mabiit tigitiotab ng’wanindo ak konyalilis
Hebrews12:16 si mabiit ne soksei
Hebrews12:17 Amu ongen ole kingomach eng’ let konam kaberuret
Hebrews12:18 Amu ma oit tulwet ne kimuchi ketwa
Hebrews12:19 ak cheetab iriaget
Hebrews12:20 amu kima imuch komuita eng’ ng’olyondonoto kiging’at kele
Hebrews12:21 ak noto kitook
Hebrews12:22 ago kaoit okwek tulwetab Sion
Hebrews12:23 ak tuiyetab bik tugul ak kaniset ne bo che bo tai eng’ siget che kigesir eng’ kipsengwet
Hebrews12:24 ak Jesu katuiyoindetab kayomiset ne leel
Hebrews12:25 Ogeer
Hebrews12:26 ne kiitumdum ng’ony kutinnyi betunoto: ago kagoaror anyun nguno
Hebrews12:27 Ago ng’olyondonito
Hebrews12:28 Noto anyun
Hebrews12:29 amu Jehovah nenyo ko mat ne igesu.
Hebrews13:1 Ingoteb ko u noto chamnyetab che kitupche.
Hebrews13:2 Amoutie oborji toek chamnyet: amu kigotaach alak malaikaisiek eng’ noto amaingen.
Hebrews13:3 Obwat ichek che mi eng’ ratisiosiek
Hebrews13:4 Ingogonyit tugul katunisiet
Hebrews13:5 Oegu che itiogotin eng’ chametab siling’isiek; ingoyamak tuguk che otinye: amu kigomwa inendet
Hebrews13:6 Noto anyun kimwae eng’ nyiganatet ne mie kele
Hebrews13:7 Obwat ichek che kiindoiywok
Hebrews13:8 Kergei Jesu Kristo eng’ amut ak ra
Hebrews13:9 Amatata ongobeetok konetisiosiek che besiotin che ter: amu mie kolumdaak muguleldo eng’ mieindo; ma eng’ amitwogik
Hebrews13:10 Ki tinye kaptisisiet
Hebrews13:11 Amu borwekab tiong’ichoto kiibu tisiindet ne o korotikwak kobwa ole tilil agobo tengekto
Hebrews13:12 Noto anyun
Hebrews13:13 Ongebe anyun ole mi inendet eng’ sang’utab ormarich
Hebrews13:14 Amu magitinye eng’ yu nganaset ne tebyei koigeny
Hebrews13:15 Noto anyun ongigochi Jehovah eng’ inendet korosiotab kalosunet kotugul
Hebrews13:16 Oyai che miachen
Hebrews13:17 Ogas it che indoiywok
Hebrews13:18 Osa agobo achek: amu kiyani kele kitinye kabwatet ne mie
Hebrews13:19 Ak asome mising’ kot ale oyai ko u noto
Hebrews13:20 Ingoyaak Jehovah ne bo kalyet
Hebrews13:21 oegu che o chobotin eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie si oyai magennyi
Hebrews13:22 Ago asomok mising’
Hebrews13:23 Onai ole kogitiach tupchennyo Timoteo; ngot konyo ko negit
Hebrews13:24 Ogat tugul che indoiywok
Hebrews13:25 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok okwek tugul. Amen.
James1:1 Jakobo
James1:2 Tupchosiekyuk
James1:3 ongen ole ibu muitaet tiemetab kayaneng’wong’.
James1:4 Ak ingoek muitaet ne tinyei boisiet ne igesunotgei
James1:5 Ago ngot kobetyi chi age tugul eng’ okwek ng’omnatet
James1:6 Ago ingosom eng’ kayanet
James1:7 Amat kobwat chichoto kole sichei kiy eng’ Kiptaiyat
James1:8 chitab kabwatutik aeng’
James1:9 Ago ingobaibait ne tupchet ne ko nyerat
James1:10 ak ingobaibait magoriot
James1:11 Amu choru asista koboto usonet ne beelei tuguk
James1:12 Baibai chito ne muitoi eng’ yomset: amu ye kagoterter
James1:13 Amat komwa chi ye kagiyom kole
James1:14 ago kiyomei chi tugul
James1:15 ak ye kagomanach maget ne ya
James1:16 Amat ongegenak
James1:17 Kagoitoet age tugul ne mie ak konunotiot age tugul ne igesunotgei ko bo barak
James1:18 Kisichech eng’ magennyi eng’ ng’olyotab imanit
James1:19 Ongen ng’olyondoni
James1:20 amu mayaei neregekab chi imandab Jehovah.
James1:21 Eng’ noto anyun omete simdo tugul ak chang’indab yaitwogik
James1:22 Ago oegu che yaei ng’olyot
James1:23 Amu ngot koek chi age tugul kasindetab ng’olyot
James1:24 amu keeregei
James1:25 Ago inendet ne isiachi ng’atutiet ne igesunotgei
James1:26 Ngo len chi tinyei atebet ne u ne bo kayanik
James1:27 Kayanet ne tilil ne matinyei muruonindo eng’ taitab Jehovah Kwanda
James2:1 Tupchosiekyuk
James2:2 Ngot konyo chi ole otuiyechini ne tinyei peteit ne bo tahabu
James2:3 ak ogonyit inendet ne ilaachi ngoroik che kororon
James2:4 ko ma obesiege okwege
James2:5 Ogaso
James2:6 Ago kaosas kibananiat. Tos mainyalilok magorek
James2:7 Machubei ichek kainet ne bo teegisto ne kimwaitaenok?
James2:8 Ago ngot osulde Ng’atutietab kaplaitoriat
James2:9 ago ngot otiytii bik
James2:10 Amu chito age tugul ne ribei Ng’atutiet komugul
James2:11 Amu inendet ne kimwa kole
James2:12 Omwa ak oyai ko u bik che tun kiruokyin eng’ ng’atutietab katiaknatet.
James2:13 Amu matinyei kiruoget rirenetab ge eng’ inendet ne ma ibor rirenetab ge: itororegei rirenetab ge kogirindoi kiruoget.
James2:14 Kelu nee
James2:15 Ngot komi ach ngor ng’etab komet
James2:16 ak kolenji ichek age eng’ okwek
James2:17 Ko kit ne u agine kayanet
James2:18 Ago imuchi komwa chito kole
James2:19 Iyani ile agenge Jehovah; iyae ne mie: iyani agichek oik
James2:20 Ago imache inai
James2:21 Kima kiityi imanda kwandanyo Abraham eng’ boisionik
James2:22 Igeere ile kibois kayanet koboto boisionikyik
James2:23 ak kiisulda sirutiet ne mwaei kolen
James2:24 Ogeere ole kiityin chi imanda eng’ boisionik
James2:25 Ak ko u noto
James2:26 Amu ko u ye meat borto ne matinyei tamirmiriet
James3:1 Amat koek che chang’ eng’ okwek konetik
James3:2 Amu kibutosi achek tugul eng’ tuguk che chang’. Ngot ko maibut chi age tugul eng’ ng’olyo
James3:3 Ngot kinde karik kutuswekab mbartanyisiek
James3:4 Ogeer melisiek agichek
James3:5 U noto agine ng’elyepta
James3:6 Ak ng’elyepta ko mat: ng’onyut ne bo tengekto eng’ kebeberwekyok ko ng’elyepta
James3:7 Amu kibaei tiong’ik alak tugul
James3:8 ago maimuchi chi koboi ng’elyepta: yaitiet ne ma bounaksei
James3:9 Kilosune noto Kiptaiyat ak ko Kwanda: ak kichube bik
James3:10 bunu kutit agenge kaberuret ak chubisiet. Che kitupche
James3:11 Tos kutune konda agenge beek che anyiny ak che ng’wonen?
James3:12 Che kitupche
James3:13 Ng’o ne ng’om eng’ okwek ak koguitos? Ingobarta boisionikyik eng’ atebet ne mie eng’ kaming’inetab ge ne bo ng’omnatet.
James3:14 Ago ngot otinye ng’etkonda ne ng’wan ak toiyet eng’ mugulelwekwok
James3:15 Mabunu barak ng’omnatoni bo ng’ony
James3:16 Amu ole mitei ng’etkonda ak toiyet
James3:17 Ago ng’omnatet ne bunu barak ko ne tai ko tilil
James3:18 Ak kegolei logoekab imanda eng’ kalyet agobo ichek che yaei kalyet.
James4:1 Bunu ano lugosiek ak boriosiek eng’ kwenung’wong’? Mabunu magutikwok che bortos eng’ kebeberwekwok?
James4:2 Ogase miat
James4:3 Osome
James4:4 Okwek che oibege
James4:5 Anan obwati ole ng’alali buch sirutik
James4:6 Ago konu mieindo ne tesat. Len anyun
James4:7 Noto anyun
James4:8 Orikyi Jehovah
James4:9 Onginyalilak
James4:10 Oming’inge eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat
James4:11 Amomwaitaege ng’alek che yaach okwege
James4:12 Ne konu Ng’atutiet ak koruochi ko agenge
James4:13 Ogas anyun
James4:14 ago mongen kit ne biitu karon. Nee sobeng’wong’? Amu okwek ko o kibungweret
James4:15 Amu kata nyoljinok ole
James4:16 Ago nguno otororige eng’ kachaunosiekwok bo ge: katororetab ge age tugul ne u noto ko ya.
James4:17 Eng’ inendet anyun

James5:2 Kagonunio magornatosiekwok
James5:3 Kagoruotityo tahabusiekwok ak fedaisiekwok; ak tun egu karuotitoenywa baornatet eng’ okwek
James5:4 Ogeero
James5:5 Kiomeng’isie eng’ ng’ony eng’ kabaibaetab ge
James5:6 Kioruokyi
James5:7 Omuite anyun

James5:11 Ogeero
James5:12 Ago ne siirei tuguk tugul
James5:13 Mi chi eng’ okwek ne nyalili? Ingosa. Mi ne baibai? Ingotien kalosunet.
James5:14 Mitei ne miani eng’ kwenung’wong’? Ingoguur boisiekab kaniset; ak kosa ichek agobo inendet
James5:15 ak kosoob saetab kayanet inendet ne miani
James5:16 Ong’ang’jige anyun kachiliilutikwok okwege
James5:17 Ki chito Elija ne u achek
James5:18 Ak kisa kogeny; ak kigon kipsengwet ropta
James5:19 Che kitupche
James5:20 ko ingonai kole inendet ne walei kiptengekyot kobagakta mastaetab orennyi kosoru sobondo eng’ meet
1Peter1:1 Petero
1Peter1:2 ko u eng’ naetab Jehovah Kwanda ne kisib konai
1Peter1:3 Iberurot Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo
1Peter1:4 ketaach borotet ne ma ng’emaksei
1Peter1:5 okwek che kiribei eng’ kimnatetab Jehovah eng’ kayanet si onyoru yetunet ne chobot keng’any eng’ betutab let.
1Peter1:6 Ne oboiboi mising’ eng’ noto
1Peter1:7 si kenyor eng’ kalosunet ak torornatet ak teegisto
1Peter1:8 ne ochame nganda tom ogeer; inendet ne nganda mogeere nguno
1Peter1:9 ye tun onyoru kasuldaetab kayaneng’wong’
1Peter1:10 Kicheng’ maotik ak kogilgilye mising’ inne agobo yetunanoto
1Peter1:11 ye kicheng’ei betut ne inet anan ole u betut ne kiiborjin Tamirmirietab Kristo ne kimitei eng’ ichek
1Peter1:12 Che kiging’ang’ji
1Peter1:13 Eng’ noto anyun ogermen suenutikab kabwatutikwok
1Peter1:14 ko u lagok che kase it
1Peter1:15 ago ko u ye tilil inendet ne kiguurok
1Peter1:16 amu kigisir kele
1Peter1:17 Ak ngot oguure inendet olen Kwanda
1Peter1:18 ongen ole kigitiachak omong’une atebeng’wong’ ne bo buch ne kionyoru eng’ kwanisiekwok
1Peter1:19 ago eng’ korotik che bo kamanutiet ne o
1Peter1:20 ne kisib konaam iman kotom kelumda ng’ony
1Peter1:21 che o kayanik eng’ Jehovah amu inendet
1Peter1:22 Amu kiotilil sobonwekwok eng’ kasetab it ne ogase it imanit kot koit chamnyetab tupchosiek ne matinyei kenisiet
1Peter1:23 amu kigesichok kogeny
1Peter1:24 Amu
1Peter1:25 Ago tebyei koigeny ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat. Nito ko ng’olyotab logoiywek che miach che kigiamwok.
1Peter2:1 Oiste anyun yaitiet tugul
1Peter2:2 omach mising’ chego che bo ng’omnatetab tamirmiriet
1Peter2:3 ngo kiochamjam ole Kiptaiyat ko bo mieindo:
1Peter2:4 obwanjini inendet koita ne sobei
1Peter2:5 ak okwek
1Peter2:6 Amu mi eng’ siret kole
1Peter2:7 Eng’ okwek anyun che oyani ko chamat mising’ inendet: ago eng’ ichek che maiyani
1Peter2:8 ak ko
1Peter2:9 Ago okwek ko o bororiet ne kigelewen
1Peter2:10 Okwek che kima ko o bororiet eng’ tai
1Peter2:11 Chamanichu
1Peter2:12 okwek che otinye atebet ne nyolu eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek: si nganda itaamok ko u yaikab yaitio
1Peter2:13 Ogas it kit age tugul ne ng’atei bik amu Kiptaiyat: agot ngo laitoriat
1Peter2:14 anan ko bounik
1Peter2:15 Amu u noto magetab Jehovah
1Peter2:16 ko u che itiogotin
1Peter2:17 Oteech bik tugul. Ocham che otupche. Oiywei Jehovah. Oteech laitoriat.
1Peter2:18 Okwek che o otwogik
1Peter2:19 Amu chamaksei nito
1Peter2:20 Amu teegis nee
1Peter2:21 Amu kigiguurjok nito: amu kinyalil Kristo agine agobo okwek
1Peter2:22 inendet ne kima yai tengek
1Peter2:23 ne ye kingeng’emji kut
1Peter2:24 inendet ne kiib tengekwogikyok eng’ bortanyi eng’ ketit barak
1Peter2:25 Amu kiobetooti ko u kechirek; ago kaoweekyigei Mestowot ak ko Ribindetab sobonwekwok.
1Peter3:1 U noto
1Peter3:2 ye keerei atebeng’wong’ ne tilil ne boto kaiyweisiet.
1Peter3:3 Amaek lelestanywa lelesta ne bo sang’
1Peter3:4 ago ingoek chito ne ung’at ne bo muguleldo
1Peter3:5 Amu kiyaei lelesta ko u noto agichek kwonyik che tililen chu ki bo keny
1Peter3:6 ko u ye kigase it Sara Abraham
1Peter3:7 Okwek manong’otaichu
1Peter3:8 Ne bo let anyun
1Peter3:9 che mayaaktoi yaitio eng’ yaitio
1Peter3:10 Amus
1Peter3:11 Ak ingoistoegei yeitio
1Peter3:12 Amu tokyingei konyekab Kiptaiyat che bo imanda
1Peter3:13 Ak ng’o ne yaiywok ne ya
1Peter3:14 Ago ngot onyalili agobo imanda
1Peter3:15 ago ogonyit Kristo koek Kiptaiyat ne tilil eng’ mugulelwekwok: ak oegu che chobotin kotugul owolji chi tugul ne teebenok ng’olyo agobo kamang’unet ne mitei eng’ okwek
1Peter3:16 otinye kabwatet ne mie; si ye kitaamok
1Peter3:17 Amu kaigai ngot ko noto magetab Jehovah
1Peter3:18 Amu kime Kristo agine konyil agenge agobo tengekwogik
1Peter3:19 kiwa eng’ noto agine koamji tamirmirik che kimi korgoret
1Peter3:20 che kima kogase it eng’ tai
1Peter3:21 kergeindab tuguchuto ko kabatisanet
1Peter3:22 ne kikwa kipsengwet ak komi eutab tai ne bo Jehovah; ak kigiyai malaikaisiek ak bounatosiek ak kimnatosiek kogas it inendet.
1Peter4:1 Noto anyun ko u ye kinyalil Kristo eng’ borto
1Peter4:2 si ko mata osopche eng’ borto eng’ betusiekwok che ng’etunotin eng’ magutik che yaach che bo bik
1Peter4:3 Amu kigoyam betusiek che kigosiirto kosulda magetab Bororiosiek
1Peter4:4 tuguk che keerei ichek kole kwong’et amu moruachini osubi kimargatinoto koboto ichek
1Peter4:5 che tun tetyin ng’alek inendet ne chobot koruokyi che soptos ak che kigobek.
1Peter4:6 Amu nito ko kigiamji logoiywek che miach agot che kigobek
1Peter4:7 Ago kagorik kagesunetab tuguk tugul: noto anyun oegu che oribege
1Peter4:8 ne siirei tuguk tugul ko ochamnye mising’ okwege; amu tuchei chamnyet chang’indab tengekwogik:
1Peter4:9 otaachge okwege eng’ okwege ama eng’ kang’unyng’unyet:
1Peter4:10 ko u ye kigonyor chi age tugul kagochinet oboisiechinege
1Peter4:11 ngo ng’alali chi
1Peter4:12 Chamanichu
1Peter4:13 ago oboiboitu
1Peter4:14 Ngechurok eng’ kainetab Kristo
1Peter4:15 Amat konyalil age eng’ okwek amu rumin
1Peter4:16 ago nginyalil chi amu Kristianindet
1Peter4:17 Amu kagoit betut ne kitaune kiruoget gotab Jehovah: ak ngot ketaunenech achek
1Peter4:18 Ak ngot ko bichii kesor chi ne bo imanda
1Peter4:19 Noto anyun ingogoito sobonwekwak che nyalildos ko u magetab Jehovah kogochi eng’ yaet ne mie Yaindet ne kiyani
1Peter5:1 Ateechini mising’ boisiek che mi kwenung’wong’
1Peter5:2 oyage akwetab Jehovah ne mitei kwenung’wong’
1Peter5:3 amoegu kiptainik eng’ che otononjini
1Peter5:4 Ak ye tun took Mestowot ne o
1Peter5:5 Ko u noto ak okwek che o mengechen

1Peter5:8 Oripge
1Peter5:9 ogirinde inendet ko o lumdootin eng’ kayaneng’wong’
1Peter5:10 Ak ingochobok
1Peter5:11 Nenyi kimnatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen.

1Peter5:13 Igatok inendet ne mitei Babulon
1Peter5:14 Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne bo chamnyet. Ingoteb kalyet eng’ okwek tugul che omite eng’ Kristo.
2Peter1:1 Simon Petero
2Peter1:2 Ingotesak mieindo ak kalyet eng’ okwek eng’ naet ne ongen Jehovah ak Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo.
2Peter1:3 Amu kigonech kamuktaetab Jehovah tuguk tugul che nyoljin sobondo ak kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah
2Peter1:4 kigogonech eng’ choto arorutik che miachen mising’ ak ko eechen inne; si kobiit oegu eng’ chuto yamdoikab atebetab Jehovah
2Peter1:5 Ee
2Peter1:6 ak otesyi ribetab ge naet; ak otesyi muitaet ribetab ge; ak otesyi kaiyweetab Jehovah
2Peter1:7 ak otesyi chametab tupchosiek kaiyweetab Jehovah; ak otesyi chamnyet chametab tupchosiek.
2Peter1:8 Amu ngot komitei eng’ okwek tuguchuto ak kotesak
2Peter1:9 Amu inendet ne matinyei tuguchuto
2Peter1:10 Eng’ noto anyun
2Peter1:11 amu kigonok ko u noto eng’ chang’indo ochut bounatetab koigeny ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindet Jesu Kristo.
2Peter1:12 Noto anyun achobege kotugul abwatwok tuguchuto
2Peter1:13 Ak abwati ale mie ko ta ami eng’ bori
2Peter1:14 angen ale nyonei kochogu metoetab bortanyu
2Peter1:15 Ee
2Peter1:16 Amu kima kisub atindonik che kigichobei eng’ ng’omnatet
2Peter1:17 amu kitaach teegisto ak torornatet eng’ Jehovah Kwanda
2Peter1:18 ak kigigas kutinito kobunu kipsengwet
2Peter1:19 Ak kitinye ng’olyotab maoinatet ne bo iman inne; ne oyae ne mie ye orib
2Peter1:20 ye kaonai ni korok
2Peter1:21 Amu mami maoinatet ne kigobiit eng’ magetab chi: ago king’alali bik eng’ Jehovah
2Peter2:1 Ago kibiit maotik che bo lembech agichek eng’ kwenutab bik
2Peter2:2 Ak isubi bik che chang’ magutikwak che yaachen; kimwaitoe ne ya oretab imanit amu ichek.
2Peter2:3 Ak kocheng’jingei borotet eng’ okwek eng’ ng’alekab ng’alset amu kasenywa ne bo miat: che ma igaegei kiruogenywa koboch keny
2Peter2:4 Amu ngot ko kima rire Jehovah malaikaisiek ye kingoyai tengekto
2Peter2:5 ak kima rire ng’onyut ne bo keny
2Peter2:6 ak koruokyi nganasokab Sodom ak Gomora
2Peter2:7 ak kosor Lot chitab imanda
2Peter2:8 (amu ye kimenyei chichoto bo imanda kwenunywa
2Peter2:9 ingen anyun Kiptaiyat kosor eng’ yomset che iywei Jehovah
2Peter2:10 ago eng’ magetab muruonindo
2Peter2:11 Agot nganda siirtoot malaikaisiek
2Peter2:12 Ago bichuto matinyei ng’omnatet
2Peter2:13 che nyoru nyalilda
2Peter2:14 bik che tinyei konyek che nyiitotin ibetab ge
2Peter2:15 kingobagakta oretab iman
2Peter2:16 ago kigiger kong’ amu bistoennyi: king’alal sigiriet ne namat kut eng’ kutitab chi ak korany iywekab maotiondonoto.
2Peter2:17 Chuto kondametusiek che matinyei beek
2Peter2:18 Amu
2Peter2:19 koarorjin ichek katiaget
2Peter2:20 Amu ye kagochililye muruonindab ng’ony eng’ naet ne naei Kiptaiyat ak ko Yetindet Jesu Kristo
2Peter2:21 Amu kita kaigai eng’ ichek ko ma nai oretab imanda
2Peter2:22 Kigoyaak eng’ icheget ko u ye mwaei kalewenetab iman
2Peter3:1 Chamanichu
2Peter3:2 si obwat ng’alek che kimwa maotik che tililen eng’ tai
2Peter3:3 korok
2Peter3:4 ak komwaei kolen
2Peter3:5 Amu kwetyin ichegei koutie kole kimi kipsengwetisiek koboch keny
2Peter3:6 kimarane beechoto ng’onyut ne ki bo betusiechoto
2Peter3:7 ago kipsengwetisiek ak ng’onyut che bo nguno
2Peter3:8 Ago amoutie ng’olyondoni
2Peter3:9 Maigaegei Kiptaiyat eng’ arorutiennyi
2Peter3:10 Ago tun nyonei betutab Kiptaiyat ko u chorin; ne siirtoe kipsengwetisiek eng’ cheet ne o
2Peter3:11 Amu tun chootos tuguchuto tugul ko u nito
2Peter3:12 ogeni nyonunetab betutab Jehovah
2Peter3:13 Ago
2Peter3:14 Noto anyun
2Peter3:15 Ak oiit ole muitaetab Kiptaiyandennyo ko yetunet; ko u ye kisirwak agine Paulo
2Peter3:16 ko u eng’ baronokyik tugul agichek
2Peter3:17 Ko okwek anyun
2Peter3:18 Ago onerie eng’ mieindo ak naet ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindennyo Jesu Kristo. Nenyi torornatet nguno agoi koigeny. Amen.
1John1:1 Noto ne kimi koboch taunet
1John1:2 (ak king’ang’ak sobonoto
1John1:3 noto kigegeer ak kegas ko noto ne keamwok ak okwek
1John1:4 ak kesirwok tuguchuto
1John1:5 Ak ni ng’olyot ne kigigas eng’ inendet
1John1:6 Ngot kemwa kele kitinye yamdaet koboto inendet
1John1:7 ago ngot kebendote lapkeiyet
1John1:8 Ngot kemwa kele magitinye tengek
1John1:9 Ngot keng’anye tengekwogikyok
1John1:10 Ngot kemwa kele tomo keyai tengek
1John2:1 Lagokyuk che mengech
1John2:2 ak inendet tiseiywot ne bo tengekwogikyok; ago ma bo tengekwogikyok kityo
1John2:3 Ak kingen eng’ ni kele kingen inendet
1John2:4 Inendet ne mwaei kole
1John2:5 ago inendet ne ribei ng’olyondennyi
1John2:6 inendet ne mwaei kole menyei eng’ inendet konyoljin agine kowendot ko u ye kiga wendot inendet.
1John2:7 Chamanichu
1John2:8 Ak kogeny
1John2:9 Inendet ne mwaei kole mi eng’ lapkeiyet
1John2:10 Inendet ne chamei ne tupcho komenyei eng’ lapkeiyet
1John2:11 Ago inendet ne wechei ne tupcho komi eng’ mesundeito
1John2:12 Asirwok lagochu mengech
1John2:13 Asirwok kwanisiechu
1John2:14 Kaasirwak kwanisiechu
1John2:15 Amocham ng’ony
1John2:16 Amu tuguk tugul che mitei ng’ony
1John2:17 Ak siirtoi ng’ony
1John2:18 Lagochu
1John2:19 Kimandoi eng’ olinnyo
1John2:20 Ak kigiilak eng’ Inendet ne Tilil
1John2:21 Ma asirwak amu mongen imanit
1John2:22 Ng’o kiplembechwet? Ma inendet ne esioi kole Jesu ko Kristo? Nito ko kirindoindetab Kristo
1John2:23 Age tugul ne esioi Werit
1John2:24 Ak okwek anyun
1John2:25 Ak ni arorutiet ne kiiaroruech inendet
1John2:26 Kaasirwak tuguchu agobo ichek che machei kobeetok.
1John2:27 Ak okwek anyun
1John2:28 Ak nguno anyun
1John2:29 Ngot ongen ole bo imanda inendet
1John3:1 Ogeero
1John3:2 Chamanichu
1John3:3 Ak chi age tugul ne tinyei kamang’unoni agobo inendet kotililegei
1John3:4 Chi age tugul ne yaei tengek koyaei bistoet: amu tengekto ko bistoet.
1John3:5 Ak ongen ole kiging’any inendet si kobiit koib tengekwogik; ama mi tengek eng’ inendet.
1John3:6 Chi age tugul ne menyei inendet ko mayaei tengek: ak chi age tugul ne yaei tengek ko tom kogeer inendet
1John3:7 Lagochu mengech
1John3:8 inendet ne yaei tengek ko bo oindet; amu kiyai oindet tengek koboch taunet. Kigeng’any Weritab Jehovah amu noto
1John3:9 Chi age tugul ne kigesich eng’ Jehovah ko mayaei tengek
1John3:10 Ng’ang’aksei lagokab Jehovah eng’ nito
1John3:11 Amu ni ng’olyot ne kiogas koboch taunet
1John3:12 Ma ko u Kaen ne ki bo inendet ne ya
1John3:13 Amokwong’ie
1John3:14 Kingen kele kigemong’une meet kemong’ji sobondo
1John3:15 Chi age tugul ne wechei ne tupcho ko rumin: ak ongen ole mami rumin ne tinyei sobondab koigeny ne menyei eng’ inendet.
1John3:16 Kingen eng’ nito chamnyet
1John3:17 Ago chito ne tinyei tugukab ng’onyuni
1John3:18 Lagochu mengech
1John3:19 Kinae eng’ nito kele ki bo imanit
1John3:20 eng’ kiy tugul ne iruogunenech mugulelwekyok; amu o Jehovah kosiir mugulelwekyok
1John3:21 Chamanichu
1John3:22 ak kiy age tugul ne kisome
1John3:23 Ak ni ng’atutiennyi
1John3:24 Ak inendet ne ribei ng’atutikyik komenyei eng’ inendet
1John4:1 Chamanichu
1John4:2 Ongen eng’ ni Tamirmirietab Jehovah: tamirmiriet age tugul ne ng’anyei kole kinyo Jesu Kristo eng’ borto ko bo Jehovah:
1John4:3 ak tamirmiriet age tugul ne mang’anyei Jesu ko ma bo Jehovah: nito anyun ko kirindoindetab Kristo
1John4:4 O bo Jehovah
1John4:5 Bo ng’ony icheget: ko amu noto kong’alali che bo ng’ony
1John4:6 Ki bo Jehovah achek: inendet ne ingen Jehovah kogasech; inendet ne ma bo Jehovah ko magasech. Kingen eng’ nito tamirmirietab imanit
1John4:7 Chamanichu
1John4:8 Inendet ne matinyei chamnyet ko maingen Jehovah; amu Jehovah ko chamnyet.
1John4:9 Kigeng’any eng’ nito chamnyetab Jehovah eng’ achek
1John4:10 Nito chamnyet
1John4:11 Chamanichu
1John4:12 Mami chi ne kigogeer Jehovah ole kigoi; ngot kechamdosi
1John4:13 kingen eng’ nito kele kimenye eng’ inendet
1John4:14 Ak kigegeer ak kebaoriani kele kiiyok Kwanda Werit konyo koek Yetindetab ng’ony.
1John4:15 Age tugul ne ng’anyei kole Jesu ko Weritab Jehovah komenyei Jehovah eng’ inendet
1John4:16 Ak kingen ak kigiyan chamnyet ne ting’enech Jehovah
1John4:17 Kigeyai chamnyet koek ne igesunotgei eng’ achek
1John4:18 Mami kaiyweisiet eng’ chamnyet: ago onei chamnyet ne igesunotgei kaiyweisiet
1John4:19 Kichame
1John4:20 Ngot komwa chi kole
1John4:21 Kitinye anyun ng’atutioni bunu inendet
1John5:1 Age tugul ne iyani kole Jesu ko Kristo ko kigesich eng’ Jehovah: ak age tugul ne chamei inendet ne kisichei
1John5:2 Kingen eng’ nito kele kichame lagokab Jehovah
1John5:3 Amu ni chamnyetab Jehovah
1John5:4 Amu age tugul ne kigesich eng’ Jehovah koterteri ng’ony: ak ni ko katerteret ne iterteri ng’ony
1John5:5 Ak ng’o inendet ne iterteri ng’ony
1John5:6 Ni ko inendet ne kinyo eng’ beek ak korotik
1John5:7 Ak Tamirmiriet ne baoriani
1John5:8 Amu mi somogu che baoriani
1John5:9 Ngot ketaache baornatetab bik
1John5:10 Inendet ne iyani Weritab Jehovah kotinyei baornatanato eng’ inendet: inendet ne maiyani Jehovah ko kagoyai inendet koek kiplembechwa; amu ma iyan baornatet ne kibaorian Jehovah agobo Werinnyi.
1John5:11 Ak baornatanato ko ni
1John5:12 Inendet ne tinyei Werit kotinyei sobondo: inendet ne matinyei Weritab Jehovah ko matinyei sobondo.
1John5:13 Kaasirwak tuguchu
1John5:14 Ak ni nyiganatet ne ketinye eng’ inendet
1John5:15 ak ngot kingen kele kasech eng’ kit age tugul ne kisome
1John5:16 Ngot kogeer chi tupchennyi koyaei tengekto ne ma bo meet
1John5:17 Kiy age tugul ne ma bo imanda ko tengek: ak mi tengekto ne ma bo meet.
1John5:18 Kingen kele mayaei tengekto chi age tugul ne kigesich eng’ Jehovah; ago inendet ne kigesich eng’ Jehovah koribei inendet
1John5:19 Kingen kele ki bo Jehovah achek
1John5:20 Ak kingen kele kigonyo Weritab Jehovah
1John5:21 Lagochu mengech
2John1:1 Ane boiyot ne asirjini chebioset ne lewenot ak lagokyik
2John1:2 agobo imanit ne menyech ak kotebyei kobotech koigeny:
2John1:3 tebyei kobotech mieindo ak rirenet ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwanda ak Jesu Kristo
2John1:4 Abaibai mising’ amu kianyoru lagoguk alak kobendoti eng’ imanit
2John1:5 Ak nguno anyun chebiosoni
2John1:6 Ak ni ko chamnyet
2John1:7 Amu kigomong’ji ng’ony kenik che chang’
2John1:8 Oripge
2John1:9 Chi age tugul ne indoi ama tebyei eng’ konetisietab Kristo ko matinyei Jehovah; inendet ne tebyei eng’ konetisiet kotinyei tuwai
2John1:10 Ngot konyonjok chi ama ibu konetisioni
2John1:11 amu inendet ne igati ko kayamda ak inendet boisionikyik che yaach.
2John1:12 Amu atinye tuguk che chang’ che katasirwok
2John1:13 Igatin lagokab chepkomet ne lewenot.
3John1:1 Ane boiyot ne asirjini Gaio chamanet
3John1:2 Chamanani
3John1:3 Amu kiabaibaitu mising’ kingobwa che ketupche kobaorian agobo imaning’ung’
3John1:4 Matinye boiboiyet age ne siirei ni
3John1:5 Chamanani
3John1:6 che baoriani agobo chamnyeng’ung’ eng’ kaniset: iyae ne mie ye iyomisi eng’ bandanywa ko u ye nyolu eng’ Jehovah:
3John1:7 amu kiba ichek agobo Kainet
3John1:8 Noto anyun kanyoljech ketaach che u ichek
3John1:9 Kiasirji ng’olyo kaniset: ago ma taachech Diotrepe
3John1:10 Ko noto anyun
3John1:11 Chamanani
3John1:12 Kigobaorian bik tugul agobo Demetrio
3John1:13 Katinye tuguk che chang’ che katasirun
3John1:14 ago amang’u ageerin ko negit
Jude1:1 Juda
Jude1:2 Ingotesak rirenet eng’ okwek ak kalyet ak chamnyet.
Jude1:3 Chamanichu
Jude1:4 Amu mi bik alak che kichut orit eng’ ung’ot
Jude1:5 Amache anyun abwatwok
Jude1:6 Ak kiinde malaikaisiek che kima rib bounatenywa
Jude1:7 Ko u noto
Jude1:8 Imuruoni agichek chuto ko u noto borwek eng’ karuotitaosiekwak
Jude1:9 Ago ye kingobaregei Mikael
Jude1:10 Ago chubei bichu tuguk alak tugul agot che maingen: ak tuguk che kiguitos ichegei ko u biteenywa
Jude1:11 Bwa ichek! Amu kiisub oretab Kaen
Jude1:12 Bichuto ko ruandosiek che ung’otin eng’ igorwekwok che bo chamnyet ye oamisiei tugul
Jude1:13 mildaetab ge ne korom ne bo nyanjet; che igutu kalilanenywa; kecheik che ombenioti
Jude1:14 Ak kimaoten Enok agine
Jude1:15 konyo koyachi kiruoget tugul
Jude1:16 Chuto ko che ing’unyng’ung’dos
Jude1:17 Ago okwek
Jude1:18 ko u ye kimwawok
Jude1:19 Chuto che ibu kabesiosiek
Jude1:20 Ago okwek

Jude1:22 Ak orire alak che tinyei saget;
Jude1:23 ak osoru alak

Jude1:25 kobunji Jehovah ne inegei

Revelation1:14 Ak ki leel metinnyi ak ki leelach sumeekyik ko u kororik che leelachen

Revelation1:16 Ak kitinyei kecheik tisab eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai: ak kimong’une kutinnyi rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai: ak ki u togennyi asista ne iluu eng’ kimnatennyi.

Revelation10:2 ak kitinyei eng’ eunnyi bukuit ne ming’in ne yatat: ak kiinde keldanyi ne bo tai nyanjet
Revelation10:3 ak kitwek eng’ kutit ne o
Revelation10:4 Ak ye kingo kagobolyo tulosiek tisabu
Revelation10:5 Ak kinamji barak eunnyi ne bo tai kotokyi kipsengwet malaikaiyat ne kiageer kotonone nyanjet ak emet
Revelation10:6 ak kiiyosio eng’ inendet ne sobei koigeny ak koigeny
Revelation10:7 ago eng’ betusiekab kutitab malaikaiyatab tisab
Revelation10:8 Ak kutit ne kiagas kobunu kipsengwet
Revelation10:9 Awe anyun ole mi malaikaiyat
Revelation10:10 Ak kianam bukuit ne ming’in eng’ eutab malaikaiyat

Revelation11:2 Ago bagakte
Revelation11:3 Ak agochini baorinikyuk aeng’ komaoten betusiek elfut agenge bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik lo
Revelation11:4 Choto ko ketik aeng’ che bo emitik
Revelation11:5 Ak ngot komachei chi konyalil ichek
Revelation11:6 Tinyei chuto kimnatet koger kipsengwet
Revelation11:7 Ak ye tun kagoges baornatenywa
Revelation11:8 Ak tebyei muswekwak eng’ oretab nganaset ne o
Revelation11:9 Ak keerei muswekwak alak eng’ bik ak ortinwek ak kutuswek ak bororiosiek eng’ betusiek somok ak kebebertab betut

Revelation13:5 Ak kigigochi inendet kutit kong’alal tuguk che eechen ak chubisiosiek; ak kigigochi inendet kimnatet koboisie arawek artam ak aeng’.

Revelation21:3 Ak kiagas kutit ne o komong’une ng’echeretab laitornatet kole
Revelation21:4 ak kous inendet beekab kong’ alak tugul eng’ konyekwak; ama komi meet kogeny; ama komi kateiyet kogeny
Revelation21:5 Ak kimwa inendet ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet
Revelation21:6 Ak kolenja
Revelation21:7 Inendet ne iterteri konamei tuguchu; ak aegu Jehovah nenyi

Revelation21:10 Ak kiimuta eng’ Tamirmiriet agoi tulwet ne o ak ko koi
Revelation21:11 kotinyei lilindab Jehovah: ne kergei lapkeiyennyi ak koita ne bo kamanutiet ne o
Revelation21:12 ne tinyei irimet ne o ak ko koi; ak kotinyei kurgotik taman ak aeng’
Revelation21:13 kimi komostab kong’asis kurgotik somogu; ak kimi komostab murot ne bo katam kurgotik somogu; ak kimi komostab murot ne bo tai kurgotik somogu; ak kimi komostab cherongo kurgotik somogu.
Revelation21:14 Ak kitinyei irimetab nganaset lumeiywek taman ak aeng’
Revelation21:15 Ak kitinyei inendet ne king’alalwa tegat ne bo tahabu si kokwae nganaset

Revelation21:17 Ak kiikwa irimennyi
Revelation21:18 Ak kigiteege jasipi irimennyi: ak ki tahabu che tililen nganaset
Revelation21:19 Ak kigilelesonji lumeiywekab irimet ne bo nganaset eng’ koik alak tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o. Lumeiywot ne bo tai ko ki jasipi; ne bo aeng’ ko sapire; ne bo somok ko kalkedo; ne bo ang’wan ko sumaragdo;
Revelation21:20 ne bo mut ko sardonukso; ne bo lo ko sardio; ne bo tisab ko krusolito; ne bo sisiit ko berulo; ne bo sogol ko topasio; ne bo taman ko krusopraso; ne bo taman ak agenge ko huakinto; ne bo taman ak aeng’ ko ametusto.
Revelation21:21 Ak kurgotik taman ak aeng’ ko ki sonoek taman ak aeng’ che kororon; age tugul eng’ kurgotik ko ki bo sonoiyat agenge: ak ki tahabu che tililen oretab nganaset
